Text: आणि म्हणतात आम्ही बाळासाहेबांच्या विचारावर आदर्शावर चालतोय. सत्ता मिळताच त्यांनाच विसरले.
translated_text: And they say we are following Balasaheb's ideals and thoughts. As soon as we got power, we forgot him.
Justification: The sentence is critical but lacks a strong emotional charge.

Text: कोणतीही निशाणी मिळाली तरी कपाळावर लागलेली फुटीर आणि गद्दार ही निशाणी पुसता येणार नाही!
translated_text: No matter what mark you get, the mark of a traitor and traitor on your forehead cannot be erased!
Justification: The use of "गद्दार" (traitor) and the assertive tone indicate anger.

Text: मूर्ख मानस या महाराष्ट्र मधले राने...
translated_text: Foolish mind, these are the Rane of Maharashtra...
Justification: The sentence is derogatory but does not indicate a strong emotion.

Text: अरे आम्हांला कडवे चालतील पण तुझ्यासारखे भडवे नको, मुफ्तीला सोबत घेणारे सत्तापिपासू
translated_text: Oh, we may be bitter, but we don't want scoundrels like you, power-hungry people who take the Mufti with them.
Justification: The use of "भडवे" (scoundrels) and "सत्तापिपासू" (power-hungry) indicate disgust.

Text: केवळ मराठी माणसाचा नाही एकूणातच कलेचा अवमान झाला आहे..
translated_text: Not only Marathi people but art in general has been insulted.
Justification: The word "अवमान" (insult) and the tone suggest disgust.

Text: च्या ट्विटर हँडलचा असा वापर करणं अत्यंत चुकीचं आहे.
translated_text: It is very wrong to use the Twitter handle like this.
Justification: The phrase "अत्यंत चुकीचं" (very wrong) indicates disapproval and disgust.

Text: भाजपच्या भ्रष्ट नेत्यांची चौकशी केव्हा होणार?
translated_text: When will the corrupt BJP leaders be investigated?
Justification: The accusatory tone suggests anger.

Text: काँग्रेसच्या कुबड्या एवढ्या मोठ्या असतात की काँग्रेसमधून हाकलून दिलेले पण भाजपात मंत्री होतात.
translated_text: The Congress's hunches are so big that even those expelled from the Congress become ministers in the BJP.
Justification: The sentence is critical but lacks strong emotion.

Text: पडलेला तोंड सगळं काही सांगून जातोय..
translated_text: The expression on his face says it all..
Justification: The statement is observational and lacks strong emotion.

Text: तो भूमरे नाही दादा.... भुंकरे आहे.... भुंकण्याच काम करतोय...
translated_text: That's not a bumblebee, grandpa.... it's a bumblebee.... it's just a bumblebee...
Justification: The sentence uses wordplay but does not express strong emot

Text: काम नीट करायची नाहीतर आम्ही जनता तुम्हाला तुमची जागा दाखवून देईल....
translated_text: Do your job properly or we the people will show you your place...
Justification: The statement is a warning, but it lacks strong emotional words, making it neutral.

Text: थोरात,.विखे,आंबेडकर कोर्टात जाणार.त्यांच्या नावाचा गैरवापर केला म्हणून.
translated_text: Thorat, Vikhe, Ambedkar will go to court for misusing their names.
Justification: This is a factual statement about legal action, without strong emotional undertones.

Text: उत्तरे देण्याची हिम्मत नसली की ब्लॉक करणाऱ्या फट्टु नेत्याला पुरस्कार म्हणजे हास्यास्पद आहे
translated_text: It's ridiculous to reward a stupid leader who blocks you if you don't have the courage to answer.
Justification: Words like "फट्टु" (coward) and "हास्यास्पद" (ridiculous) express strong disapproval and contempt, aligning with disgust.

Text: कुलकर्णी ना म्हणजे डोक्यावर पडलेला असायलाच हवा.
translated_text: Kulkarni must have fallen on his head.
Justification: The phrase is critical but in a casual manner, making it neutral rather than overtly emotional.

Text: हा तोच ना ज्याच्यावर शिवसेनेच्या महिला नगरसेविकांनी आरोप केले होते....ह्याची लायकी आहे का??
translated_text: Isn't this the same person who was accused by the Shiv Sena's female corporator....is this worthy??
Justification: Words like "लायकी आहे का??" (is he worthy?) imply contempt and disgust.

Text: ते विश्वासार्ह फॅक्ट चेकर्स काही दिवस तुरुंगात होते असं समजलं
translated_text: I heard those trusted fact checkers were in jail for a few days.
Justification: The phrase "तुरुंगात होते" (were in jail) and "विश्वासार्ह" (trusted) express disappointment and concern, leading to sadness.

Text: ज्यांनी मध्ये विलीन करून गहाण त्यांनी जास्त न्यान पाझळू नये
translated_text: Those who merge and mortgage should not worry too much.
Justification: The sentence is a commentary without a strong emotional expression, making it neutral.

Text: आता बोला आहेत त्याला महापालिकेला जबाबदार का धरू नये
translated_text: Now why shouldn't the municipal corporation be held responsible for what they are saying?
Justification: The rhetorical question demanding accountability shows frustration and anger.

Text: महिला सक्षमीकरणाचे ढोंग बंद कर आणि महाराष्ट्रातून पहिले निघ
translated_text: Stop pretending to empower women and get out of Maharashtra first.
Justification: The sentence expresses criticism but lacks strong emotional intensity.

Text: तूझ्या खाली का जाळ पेटलाय पण ? जा पळ बर्फाच्य लादीवर जाऊन बास पटकन
translated_text: Why is the fire burning under you? Go and run on the ice-laden ground quickly.
Justification: This statement contains sarcasm and surprise, making "surprise" an appropriate emotion.

Text: जनसेवा बंद होऊन काही वर्ष झाली.
translated_text: It has been a few years since the public service was closed.
Justification: The phrase indicates regret over lost public service, aligning with sadness.

Text: पवारसाहेब आणि अमेरिका ह्यांच्यात एक साम्य आहे ह्यांच्या भरवशावर राहणारे आयुष्यातून उठून जातात
translated_text: There is a similarity between Pawar Saheb and America. Those who rely on them will be thrown out of life.
Justification: The sentence is a critical observation without strong emotional expression.

Text: आम्हाला पूर्ण पत्ता पाठवा आम्ही तुम्हाला विनंती करतो तूम्ही दिलेला पत्ता पुरेसा नाही आहे.
translated_text: We request you to send us the full address. The address you provided is not sufficient.
Justification: A simple request without emotional intensity, making it neutral.

Text: मैदान मिळाले म्हणून लयं नाचले होते... आता आयोगापुढे...
translated_text: They danced because they got the ground... Now before the commission...
Justification: The phrase is descriptive without strong emotion.

Text: गरिबांना लुटले म्हणून तुम्ही जेल मध्ये आहात
translated_text: You are in jail for robbing the poor.
Justification: The phrase "लुटले" (robbed) and the accusation convey strong disgust.

Text: पहिले शिवसैनिक म्हणायचे बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना. आणि आता शिवसैनिक बोलतात बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना म्हणजे बाळासाहेब कोण?
translated_text: Earlier, Shiv Sainiks used to say Balasaheb's Shiv Sena. And now Shiv Sainiks say Balasaheb's Shiv Sena. So who is Balasaheb?
Justification: A rhetorical question without strong emotional cues, making it neutral.

Text: साहेब येवला तालुक्यात पावसाने भरपूर नुकसान झाले येथील शेतकऱ्यांना सरसकट मदत मिळवण्यासाठी पाठपुरावा करा.
translated_text: Sir, there has been a lot of damage due to rain in Yeola taluka. Please follow up to get immediate help to the farmers here.
Justification: A formal request for assistance, making it neutral.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत ली पक्ष नसतो आम्हाला हेच शिकवलं शाळेत तुमची कोणती शाळा होती
translated_text: Gram Panchayats do not have parties. This is what we were taught in school. Which school did you go to?
Justification: A question regarding governance, without strong emotional cues.

Text: हे त्या नेपाळी बेडकाना सांग आधी गद्दार
translated_text: Tell that Nepali frog first, he's a traitor.
Justification: The words "गद्दार" (traitor) and "बेडक" (frog) show contempt, aligning with disgust.

Text: उध्दव ठाकरेंनी तुझ्या आईच्या बोच्यांत काय लंड घातला होता का
translated_text: Did Uddhav Thackeray put his penis in your mother's vagina?
Justification: The sentence is offensive and vulgar. The word "लंड" (penis) makes it explicitly obscene and degrading. "Surprise" may not be the best classification; "Disgust" or "Anger" would be more appropriate.

Text: अडणीच्या पोर्ट्वरचा फुकटचा माल कितीही घेतात आणि असे बडबड करत राहतात.
translated_text: They take whatever free goods they can from the Adani port and keep on babbling like this.
Justification: The phrase "फुकटचा माल" (free goods) and "बडबड करत" (babbling) imply sarcasm, but they do not strongly indicate anger or disgust, making "Neutral" appropriate.

Text: आपल्याला आणि पक्षाला खूप मोठी भरपाई भरून द्यावी लागेल
translated_text: You and the party will have to pay a huge compensation.
Justification: The sentence is factual without any emotional charge. The phrase "मोठी भरपाई" (huge compensation) indicates consequence but not a strong emotion.

Text: हा नंतर ताईची हाथ जोडून माफी मागेल बघा...
translated_text: Let's see if he will apologize to his aunt later...
Justification: The phrase "हाथ जोडून माफी" (folding hands and apologizing) suggests a prediction but does not strongly convey any emotion.

Text: नाचणाऱ्या मोराचे पाय वाकडे असतात असे म्हणतात
translated_text: It is said that the dancing peacock has crooked legs.
Justification: This is a proverb. The phrase "पाय वाकडे" (crooked legs) suggests a flaw but does not evoke a specific emotional reaction.

Text: दुसर्याबरोबर पळून गेलेली बायको आता इस्टेटीत वाटा मागत आहे
translated_text: The wife who ran away with another man is now demanding a share in the estate.
Justification: The phrase "पळून गेलेली बायको" (wife who ran away) contains judgment, but the sentence remains factual, making "Neutral" appropriate.

Text: हे एवढ्या लेकराला कळतं ते आपल्या थोरा मोठ्यांना कधी कळल ???
translated_text: This is something that only children can understand, but when will our elders understand???
Justification: The phrase "थोरा मोठ्यांना" (elders) questions wisdom but does not carry a strong emotional charge.

Text: स्क्रिप्ट तयार होती, दसरा मेळावा नंतर घोळ झालाय.
translated_text: The script was ready, but there was chaos after the Dussehra gathering.
Justification: The phrase "घोळ झालाय" (chaos happened) indicates disorder but lacks strong emotional intensity.

Text: हे आपल्यातीलच जयचंद गणोजी शिर्के फितुर हबशी...!!!
translated_text: This is our own Jaichand Ganoji Shirke Fitur Habashi...!!!
Justification: The words "फितुर" (traitor) and "हबशी" (offensive term) express strong disapproval and betrayal, making "Anger" appropriate.

Text: ते थापा का कोण घरगड्याच काय कौतुक लागलय भक्तांना पक्के खुळ्या लवड्याचे आहेत
translated_text: Why are those applauses so much appreciated by the householders? They are truly loved by the devotees.
Justification: The phrase "खुळ्या लवड्याचे" (crazy idiots) is insulting but does not necessarily evoke "Surprise"; "Disgust" might be more fitting.

Text: कठिन काळ विश्वप्रवक्ता यांनी निर्माण केला आहे त्यामुळे सदय परिस्थितीला तेच जबाबदार आहेत
translated_text: The difficult times have been created by the world's leaders, so they are responsible for the current situation.
Justification: The phrase "जवाबदार" (responsible) points blame but remains neutral in tone.

Text: आम्हाला ऑप्शन असतो का
translated_text: Do we have an option?
Justification: The sentence is a question and does not contain any strong emotional words.

Text: झागल्या, कुळाचा उद्धार करून घेतल्याशिवाय खालची खाज जात नाही का रे भ ????
translated_text: Zagalya, doesn't the itch go away without saving the clan????
Justification: The phrase "खालची खाज" (itch below) is used humorously, making "Joy" appropriate.

Text: आयोगावर विश्वास बसत नाही आणि कोर्टवर सुद्धा, कलयुग है
translated_text: The commission is not trusted and the court too, it is Kalyug.
Justification: The phrase "कलयुग" (Kalyug) suggests disillusionment but does not strongly convey anger or disgust.

Text: बंद करा हे थिल्लर चाळे.
translated_text: Close this fucking shop.
Justification: The phrase थिल्लर चाळे (cheap drama) conveys frustration and anger toward something perceived as nonsense.

Text: दादा दुसऱ्यांच्या हिंदी वर दात काडत होते आता दातावरच पडले
translated_text: Grandpa was cutting his teeth on other people's Hindi, now he is cutting his teeth on his own.
Justification: The phrase दात काढणे (mocking/criticizing) implies someone ridiculing others and later facing consequences, inducing disgust.

Text: आगरकर, न्या. रानडे यांची नावे घेणार नाहीत. ते ब्राह्मण होते म्हणून ना !
translated_text: Agarkar, Justice Ranade will not be named. Because they were Brahmins!
Justification: The sentence states a fact without strong emotional language, making it neutral.

Text: असे नसते तर.तसे केले असते...वेळ होती तेव्हा पळुन गेला.
translated_text: If it weren't for this, I would have done it that way...I ran away when it was time.
Justification: The word पळून गेला (ran away) suggests fear or avoidance of a situation.

Text: हा वकील जज ला चूत्या बनवत असेल पण भक्ताना नाही
translated_text: This lawyer may be making fun of the judge, but not the devotees.
Justification: The use of चूत्या (idiot/insult) suggests an offensive tone, leading to disgust.

Text: आम्ही ही एक जणाला खुप मारला..मामीचे गाणे पाहत होता ऑनलाईन..
translated_text: We really beat this guy..I was watching Auntie's song online..
Justification: The phrase खूप मारला (beat up a person) conveys aggression, justifying anger.

Text: बकवास प्रश्न, जो निवडणूक आयोगाच्या कक्षेत येत नाही.
translated_text: Nonsense question, which does not fall within the purview of the Election Commission.
Justification: The word बकवास (nonsense) is critical but not emotional enough to shift from neutrality.

Text: पुणे आजुबाजुने भ्रष्ट लोकांनी वेढलेल आहे.मुंबई आजुबाजुने समुद्र गुजरात बीजेपीने वेढलेल आहे.
translated_text: Pune is surrounded by corrupt people. Mumbai is surrounded by the sea of Gujarat BJP.
Justification: The statement critiques politics but lacks strong emotional words, making it neutral.

Text: सारख्या मुरब्बी कॉंग्रेसींचा आदर होत नसेल तर असल्या आघाड्यांना कुलूपं ठोका.
translated_text: If you don't respect Congressmen like Murabbi, lock down such alliances.
Justification: Though critical, the statement does not contain strong emotional words.

Text: नावाचे सगडे असतात हे मान्य झालाय !
translated_text: It is agreed that there are names!
Justification: The phrase हे मान्य झालंय (it is agreed) expresses acceptance, leading to joy.

Text: प्रश्न ला प्रश्ना ने उत्तर देऊ नका.. काय काम केले ते सांगा
translated_text: Don't answer a question with a question. Tell me what you did.
Justification: The directive tone and frustration imply anger.

Text: काय नष्टर हाय हा पंतप्रधान रा पगार व्हायच्या आत राजीनामा
translated_text: What a shame this Prime Minister has resigned before receiving his salary.
Justification: The word नष्टर (shameful) indicates strong disapproval, leading to disgust.

Text: भावा याला माहित नाही पुणे काय आहे तर पुरा येड झवा आहे हा
translated_text: Brother, this guy doesn't know what Pune is, he's just a complete idiot.
Justification: The phrase येड झवा (idiot/madman) is derogatory, evoking disgust.

Text: ह्याला म्हणतात दाणा टाकून घोडा उडवून घेणे चुत्या
translated_text: This is called throwing grain and making a horse fly.
Justification: While चुत्या (idiot) is present, the overall sentence lacks a strong emotional direction, making it neutral.

Text: त्यामूळे आपल्याला त्रास होतो. गर्दी होते तिकिटे मिळत नाहीत गाड्या उशिरा धावतात
translated_text: That's why we suffer. There are crowds, tickets are not available, trains run late.
Justification: The word त्रास (suffering) conveys distress and frustration, leading to sadness.

Text: तुझ्या सारखं लाळचाटे, सतरंजी उचल्यांच्या खरकट्यावर नाही जगत देशातील जनता?
translated_text: Don't the people of this country live on the backs of scoundrels and swindlers like you?
Justification: The words लाळचाटे (sycophant) and सतरंजी उचल्यांच्या (opportunist) are derogatory, conveying anger.

Text: स्वतःहून खड्डयात जायचा निर्णय घेतला असेल तर कोण थांबवणार.. विनाशकाले विपरीत बुद्धी
translated_text: If you decide to go into the pit on your own, who will stop you? Contrary to wisdom in times of destruction.
Justification: The phrase विनाशकाले विपरीत बुद्धी (foolishness in times of destruction) conveys frustration, justifying anger.

Text: म्हणे ठाकरेनी काहीच काम केली नाही ?
translated_text: So you mean Thackeray didn't do any work?
Justification: The rhetorical nature lacks strong emotional weight, making it neutral.

Text: पत्राच्या बदल्यात गृहखातं नाही, निदान तरी मिळेल का? - एक आशाळभूत मंदसैनिक
translated_text: If there is no home account in exchange for the letter, will I at least get one? - A hopeful soldier.
Justification: The phrase आशाळभूत (hopeful) has a slightly sarcastic tone but does not shift from neutrality.

Text: यांनी देशासाठी केलेला त्याग आहे ,तुम्ही त्यांच्या पाया पडायच्या ही लायक नाही
translated_text: They have sacrificed for the country, you are not worthy of falling at their feet.
Justification: The statement conveys respect and criticism but lacks strong emotions.

Text: दोघे ही न लायक आहे कोणीही भीक घालत नाही निघा ...
translated_text: Both of them are unworthy, no one is begging, go away...
Justification: Though critical, the statement does not contain strong emotional words.

Text: गेल्या महिन्यापासून मी तुम्हाला मेल करीत आहे, एकदा बघून उत्तर द्या साहेब
translated_text: I have been mailing you for the last month, please check it and reply, sir.
Justification: The statement is a request and does not express strong emotions.

Text: मला कोणी बेस्ट फ्रेंड मानत नाही
translated_text: No one considers me a best friend.
Justification: The sentence conveys frustration, as कोणी मानत नाही (no one acknowledges me) implies rejection.

Text: पुढील दिवसात तुमचे सरकार कोसळणार हे नक्की...
translated_text: Your government will surely collapse in the coming days...
Justification: The phrase सरकार कोसळणार (government will collapse) implies an unfortunate outcome, leading to sadness.

Text: सगळ्याना भारताचे नमूने म्हणून गौरवा हो आता... तेच बाकी राहणार आहे....
translated_text: May all be glorified as role models of India now... that is all that remains...
Justification: The phrase नमूने म्हणून गौरवा (glorified as examples) may be sarcastic, but it does not indicate strong emotion.

Text: मानसिक त्रास होत आहे त्यांना
translated_text: They are suffering from mental distress.
Justification: The phrase मानसिक त्रास (mental distress) is factual, keeping it neutral.

Text: हे चिन्ह अडचणीत आहे , न पेटताच विझणार बहुतेक
translated_text: This symbol is in trouble, it will probably go out before it even lights up.
Justification: Metaphorical statement without strong emotional words, making it neutral.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात आता खरी तीच परिस्थिती निर्माण झाली आहे. आता सत्ताधारी काय काम करीत आहेत
translated_text: The same situation has now arisen in Maharashtra. What are the ruling party doing now?
Justification: The sentence presents an observation without strong emotional words, keeping it neutral.

Text: तुमच्या तोंडात डबाभर तुप आणि पोतंभर साखर...
translated_text: A tub of ghee and a bowl of sugar in your mouth...
Justification: A sarcastic phrase, but does not express strong emotion.

Text: बाबू जानू म्हणणारे एक नंबर चे फालतु असतात
translated_text: Those who say "Babu Janu" are number one idiots.
Justification: The word फालतु (idiots) shows disdain, indicating disgust.

Text: म्हणजे आज ही घरा बाहेर काढलं वाटतं तुला वहिनींनी
translated_text: So, you think your sister-in-law kicked you out of the house today?
Justification: The phrase घराबाहेर काढलं वाटतं (kicked out of the house) suggests unexpected action, leading to surprise.

Text: कोल्हापूरमध्ये, रस्त्यात खड्डा आहे की खड्ड्यात रस्ता तेच कळत नाही...
translated_text: In Kolhapur, it's hard to tell whether there's a pothole in the road or the road in the pothole...
Justification: A humorous observation without strong emotion.

Text: राजवाड्यात राहणारा भिकारी देश म्हणजे भारत
translated_text: India is a country of beggars living in palaces.
Justification: A critical statement but lacks direct emotional expression.

Text: हे असल शिकवले का हो तुम्ही तुमच्या शिल्लकसेनेच्या गतीमंदाना
translated_text: Have you really taught this to your balance-swinging army?
Justification: A rhetorical question with sarcasm but lacks strong emotion.

Text: काच जर का खाली केली असती तर कानाखाली सुध्दा बसली असती...
translated_text: If the glass had been lowered, it would have even sat under my ear...
Justification: A metaphorical phrase with no direct emotional charge.

Text: लाज शरम बाळगा थोडी तरी, देश रसातळाला चाललाय जन जागृती करा
translated_text: Have some shame, the country is going to the abyss, raise awareness among the people.
Justification: Expresses concern but remains neutral.

Text: बाळासाहेबांच्या नावाची ढाल करून मागून भाजपची तलवार चालवणारे गद्दार गट !!
translated_text: A group of traitors who wield the BJP's sword from behind, using Balasaheb's name as a shield!!
Justification: The word गद्दार (traitors) strongly conveys disgust.

Text: सावधान, करोना . थेट इम्युनिटीवर करतोय हल्ला, थंडीत घालणार थैमान, ही लक्षणं धोक्याची
translated_text: Beware, Corona. It is directly attacking immunity, it will cause havoc in cold, these are the signs of danger.
Justification: A cautionary statement without emotional charge.

Text: दादा ही अंधभक्त त्याच्या मालका सारखे बांडगूळ आहेत..त्यांचं हिंदुत्व त्यांना हेच शिकवत..
translated_text: Dada is a blind devotee like his master..his Hinduism teaches him this..
Justification: A critical statement but without a strong emotional charge.

Text: आमच्या जिल्हामध्ये ही संस्कृती विसरले होते... देगलूर नांदेड. हे भाजपावाले
translated_text: This culture was forgotten in our district... Deglur Nanded. These BJP people.
Justification: A political observation, neutral in tone.

Text: ज्यांनी कांड केलेत त्यांनी काळजी करावी तुम्हाला काय करायचं आहे
translated_text: Those who committed the crime should be worried. What do you want to do?
Justification: A factual statement lacking emotional charge.

Text: काळू-बाळू यांचा तमाशा पहिला आहे का...? जबरदस्त असतो तुम्ही एकदा पहाच
translated_text: Have you seen the Kalu-Balu show? It's amazing, you should watch it once.
Justification: The word जबरदस्त (amazing) expresses excitement and joy.

Text: बरोबर आहे कारण 'गद्दार' हा शब्द पुसून पुसल्या जाणार नाही महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकारणातून.
translated_text: That's right, because the word 'traitor' will not be erased from Maharashtra politics.
Justification: A political observation, neutral in tone.

Text: धोक्याचा इशारा तर नाही ना सर हा
translated_text: There is no danger warning, sir.
Justification: The phrase "धोक्याचा इशारा" (danger warning) is inquisitive but lacks any emotional tone, making it neutral.

Text: तिकडे पण बाळासाहेबांचीच सेना आहे मग परत ह्या सेनेची महाराष्ट्राला गरज आहे का..
translated_text: But there is Balasaheb's army there, so does Maharashtra need this army again?
Justification: This rhetorical question doesn't contain strong emotional expressions, keeping the tone neutral.

Text: अशिच कार्टून काढ़ून मोदी-शाहा किंवा इतर नेत्याना शेरेबाज़ी केली तर तुम्हाला का झोंबते?
translated_text: Why do you care if someone draws a cartoon and criticizes Modi-Shah or other leaders?
Justification: शेरेबाज़ी (taunt) and "झोंबते" (it hurts you) reflect sarcastic contempt, evoking disgust.

Text: सरळ ऑफर लेटर,ये तो घोटाळा है रे बाबा
translated_text: Straight offer letter, ye to ghotala hai re baba
Justification: Though "घोटाळा" (scam) is used, the tone is casual and lacks intensity, thus it remains neutral.

Text: मराठी एकाच विषयावर किती वेळा फिल्म काढतील मागचा वर्षी च तर पावनखिंड आला होता
translated_text: How many times will Marathi make a film on the same subject? Last year, even Pavankhind came out.
Justification: The sentence expresses monotony but lacks emotionally loaded words; hence, it's neutral.

Text: हिच का ती पोळ बाई घरात संडास सुध्दा नाही गंगाबाईची पोरगी.
translated_text: This is why that poor woman, Gangabai's daughter, doesn't even have a toilet in her house.
Justification: संडास सुध्दा नाही (not even a toilet) triggers feelings of pity and disgrace, leading to disgust.

Text: तू हे सांगणारा आहे कोन भाई
translated_text: Who are you to say this, brother?
Justification: The rhetorical "कोन भाई" (who are you) implies disbelief and evokes surprise.

Text: अशी एक तीव्र सणक डोक्यात जाते
translated_text: Such a strong feeling goes to the head.
Justification: The phrase "तीव्र सणक" (sharp impulse) is intense but not tied to a clear emotion category.

Text: अभिव्यक्ती स्वातंत्र्य म्हणजे बंगल्यावर नेऊन बेदम मारहाण करणे
translated_text: Freedom of expression means being taken to a bungalow and beaten up.
Justification: बेदम मारहाण (beaten severely) in the context of rights abuse signals anger.

Text: पाकिस्तान पेटवायला हवा होता
translated_text: Pakistan should have been set on fire.
Justification: The call to "पेटवायला" (set on fire) is aggressive and hostile, reflecting anger.

Text: याआधी प्रिंसेस हया आणि प्रिंसेस लतीफा यांच्या बंडाची आणि छळाची प्रकरणं समोर आली होती.
translated_text: Previously, cases of rebellion and harassment of Princess Haya and Princess Latifa had come to light.
Justification: While it refers to serious matters, the language is factual and emotionless, making it neutral.

Text: हे कुचीड आहेत. नवीन ब्रीड आहे
translated_text: These are Kuchida. It is a new breed.
Justification: No clear emotional words used; tone is observational, hence neutral.

Text: खरं आहे. पण हे शेणकिड्यांची बुद्धी मानत नाही.
translated_text: True. But this does not take into account the intelligence of dung beetles.
Justification: While "शेणकिड्यांची बुद्धी" (dung beetle’s intelligence) is derogatory, the tone is more sarcastic than emotional, making it neutral.

Text: कलाविश्वात पसरली शोककळा, बॉलिवूडचे ‘हे’ दिग्गज हरपले…
translated_text: Mourning spreads across the art world, Bollywood's 'this' veteran has passed away...
Justification: शोककळा (mourning) and "हरपले" (passed away) convey sorrow and loss, evoking sadness.

Text: वन्यप्राण्यांच्या हल्ल्यांमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची भरपाई दिवाळीपूर्वी देण्यात यावी – वन मंत्री सुधीर मुनगंटीवार
translated_text: Compensation for damage caused by wild animal attacks should be paid before Diwali – Forest Minister Sudhir Mungantiwar
Justification: While the topic is serious, the language is formal and lacks emotional charge, so it's neutral.

Text: इतक पण बघायच नाही की ती जवल येउन म्हनेल झाल का बघुन
translated_text: I don't even want to see if she'll come and say that.
Justification: The sentence has a dismissive tone but doesn't convey a specific emotion strongly.

Text: नगरसेवक चोरानी अस बोलण म्हणजे अतीच झाल
translated_text: It's too much for a corporator to say that.
Justification: The phrase "अतीच झाल" (this is too much) shows criticism, but lacks emotional depth for anger or disgust.

Text: घोषणा झाल्या मग पोलीस कारवाई का नाही?
translated_text: Why is there no police action after the announcement?
Justification: The question "का नाही?" (why not?) following "घोषणा" (announcement) indicates surprise at the lack of action.

Text: हे जास्तीत जास्त पर्यंत चालेल.. नंतर अन्नाजी पंत पण वापर करुन फेकून देतील..
translated_text: This will last until the end.. later Annaji Pant will use it up and throw it away..
Justification: वापर करुन फेकणे (use and throw) expresses concern but remains neutral in tone.

Text: त्या मॅडम कांदे खात नाही म्हणून डोक्यात बटाटे भरले आहेत.... असे वाटतं
translated_text: That madam doesn't eat onions, so she has potatoes in her head.... It seems like
Justification: बटाटे भरले आहेत (potatoes in the head) is absurd and figurative, giving it a surprised tone.

Text: असच होत.. वरतून घेतला परत तर मार पण खाव लागतो त्यांचा
translated_text: That's what happens.. If you take it from above, you have to beat them back.
Justification: The phrase is a sarcastic commentary on repayment and lacks specific emotion.

Text: सगळया भाडखाऊ संस्था त्यांनी विकत घेतल्या आहेत म्हणून सांगता येत नाही
translated_text: It is impossible to say because they have bought all the rental institutions.
Justification: Accusatory but devoid of strong affective language, thus neutral.

Text: हींमत असेल तर सरकार पाडून दाखवा म्हणणारे कुठे आहेत आज
translated_text: Where are those today who say, "If you have the courage, overthrow the government?"
Justification: The use of "हींमत" (courage) challenges others but remains rhetorically neutral.

Text: अतिशय दुर्दैवी.
translated_text: Very unfortunate.
Justification: The word "दुर्दैवी" (unfortunate) directly conveys sadness or pity.

Text: हा वेडा झालेला आहे खाजपच्या नादाने
translated_text: This guy is going crazy with the sound of the snoring.
Justification: The use of "वेडा" (crazy) with "खाजपच्या नादाने" implies irrational obsession, evoking disgust.

Text: एम, नरू नी बी योगी, मर्द आहेत का.
translated_text: M, are you a Yogi or a Naru? Are you a man?
Justification: The sentence questions masculinity but lacks strong emotional indicators, hence neutral.

Text: एक आमदाराला ही भाषा शोभा देत नाही
translated_text: This language does not befit an MLA.
Justification: "ही भाषा शोभा देत नाही" reflects disapproval but stays within a neutral tone.

Text: एका परप्रांतीयांने सनकन कानाखाली लगावली होती.
translated_text: A migrant had placed a sneer under his ear.
Justification: The phrase "सनकन कानाखाली लगावली" (a sharp slap under the ear) depicts physical aggression, suggesting disgust.

Text: हा तोच पाकीट पत्रकार आहे जो "उद्धव चा स्वभाव रडका आहे" असं म्हणाला होता..
translated_text: This is the same pocket journalist who said "Uddhav has a tearful nature".
Justification: The term "पाकीट पत्रकार" (pocket journalist) implies corrupt, biased media, creating a tone of disgust.

Text: हा गद्दार आमदार विरुद्ध करा पुढे चालून काहीं प्रॉब्लेम व्हायला नको
translated_text: Act against this traitorous MLA and there should be no problems going forward.
Justification: The word "गद्दार" (traitor) shows betrayal, evoking anger.

Text: याचा अर्थ तुमचं सरकार तपास करण्यास सक्षम नाही
translated_text: This means your government is not capable of investigating.
Justification: Analytical and judgmental, but doesn't display strong emotion.

Text: प्रसंगावधान दाखवून आधी कर्तव्य पूर्ण केलं श्रद्धांजली आणि कुटुंबीयांप्रती सहवेदना.
translated_text: Showing consideration for the situation, he fulfilled his duty first. Tributes and condolences to the family.
Justification: Although solemn, the sentence is factual and composed.

Text: हा पोलिसाचा मार खायच्या लायकीचा आहे
translated_text: This is worthy of being beaten by the police.
Justification: "मार खायच्या लायकीचा" (deserves to be beaten) is harsh and derogatory, indicating disgust.

Text: अरे यार हा तर खंडोबा माळ चा रस्ता आहे.
translated_text: Hey man, this is the road to Khandoba Mal.
Justification: Informative with a casual tone, no sentiment expressed.

Text: घंट्याचा कायदेतज्ञ...... छपरी आहे नसानसात द्वेष भरला आहे
translated_text: The lawyer of the hour...... is a coward, his nerves are filled with hatred
Justification: "छपरी" and "नसानसात द्वेष" show disrespect and contempt.

Text: म्हणून डांग फाटती का र केळ्या.....
translated_text: So why are bananas bursting?
Justification: The absurd imagery of "डांग फाटती" (bursting) with "केळ्या" (bananas) leads to surprise.

Text: शिव्या घालण्यात आल्या म्हणुन गेले. पण घातल्या
translated_text: They left because they were insulted. But they were insulted.
Justification: The use of "शिव्या घालण्यात" (swearing) conveys verbal assault.

Text: त्याच्यात दम पण नाही कोणी मुंडकं उडवलं हे सांगायची..
translated_text: He doesn't even have the energy to say that someone blew his head off.
Justification: "मुंडकं उडवलं" (head blown off) is violent and disturbing.

Text: अडीच वर्ष थापा मारल्या. अखेर थापा म्हणाला, आता सहन होत नाही.
translated_text: He beat her for two and a half years. Finally, he said, "I can't stand it anymore."
Justification: "थापा मारल्या" (kept lying or hitting) over time conveys frustration and disgust.

Text: हातभट्टीत गांजा मिसळून ढोसल्यावर एवढी कडक नशा येत असावी. माणसाने थापेबाजी करावी, पण इतकी.
translated_text: It must be so strong that you get so drunk after mixing ganja in a hand-held pot. A person should be able to clap, but that's it.
Justification: The references to "गांजा" (weed) and "थापेबाजी" (boasting) show moral degradation, suggesting disgust.

Text: नीरव मोदी कधीच आत्महत्या करणार नाही तज्ज्ञ मुद्दाम युक्तिवाद करत आहेत?
translated_text: Are experts deliberately arguing that Nirav Modi will never commit suicide?
Justification: The disbelief and question about expert opinion evokes surprise.

Text: * ब्रेकिंग: हिंदूंचे सण आल्यावरच अतिक्रमण का काढता? बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेनेचे रस्त्यावर ठिय्या आंदोलन...
translated_text: * Breaking: Why are encroachments being removed only when Hindu festivals are coming? Balasaheb's Shiv Sena's protest on the streets...
Justification: "अतिक्रमण" (encroachment) and protest around religious events stir anger.

Text: नाही साहेब हे अत्यंत चुकीचे आहे तुमचे विधान
translated_text: No sir, your statement is very wrong.
Justification: The word "अत्यंत चुकीचे" (completely wrong) carries assertive disagreement, showing anger.

Text: गप रे अक्कल काडीची नाही आणि इथे बडबड करत बसलाय
translated_text: Gosh, you're not smart and you're just sitting here babbling.
Justification: "अक्कल काडीची नाही" (no sense at all) and "बडबड" (babble) express disdain.

Text: खुप कमी असतात असे..
translated_text: There are very few..
Justification: General observation without emotional intensity.

Text: सुपारी घेऊन काम करणारे आहेत म्हणे
translated_text: They say there are people who work with betel nuts.
Justification: "सुपारी घेऊन" may imply contract killing, but context lacks enough clarity for stronger sentiment.

Text: भातखळकर तुमच्या सारख्या गुलामांची तेवढी पण पात्रता नाही हो.
translated_text: Bhatkhalkar, slaves like you don't deserve that much.
Justification: Despite insult "गुलाम", it's stated factually, so remains neutral.

Text: सगळा वैचारिक अंधारच आहे....अंधारे कडे
translated_text: All is ideological darkness....towards darkness
Justification: "वैचारिक अंधार" (intellectual darkness) reflects criticism but stays calm in tone.

translated_text: Ha ha ha... ..... It's a market for fools...
Justification: Sarcastic but more humorous than emotionally aggressive.

Text: अरेरे, कोणाकडे दिलाय अर्ज? काय कारवाई होणार जगजाहीर आहे
translated_text: Oh my, who did you submit the application to? It is well known what action will be taken.
Justification: The disbelief in "अरेरे" and rhetorical questioning convey surprise.

Text: आयबॉल च कीबोर्ड आहे. बघा की काही होतंय का? ₹ चुना लागेल हो?
translated_text: The iBall has a keyboard. See if anything happens? Will it cost ₹?
Justification: Mostly a sarcastic observation without direct emotional tone.

Text: काँग्रेसला चांगले दिवस येतील अशी आशा वाटत होती पण ती फोलच ठरली
translated_text: Congress was hoping for better days but it turned out to be a failure.
Justification: "फोलच ठरली" (turned out empty) evokes disappointment and sadness.

Text: जे काही चालू आहे अतिशय घाणेरडं आहे.
translated_text: What is going on is very dirty.
Justification: The word "घाणेरडं" (filthy) is a strong expression of revulsion, indicating disgust.

Text: मन त्या मृतदेहासारखा झाला आहे ज्याच्या नशिबात अंत्यसंस्कार नाहि
translated_text: The mind has become like a corpse whose fate is not to be cremated.
Justification: Comparison to "मृतदेहासारखा" (like a corpse) evokes a disturbing image, signaling disgust.

Text: याचा अर्थ मानवाच्या अस्तित्वाला सर्वाधिक धोका भविष्यात सगळ्याच धर्मापासून आहे.
translated_text: This means that the greatest threat to human existence in the future comes from all religions.
Justification: Although controversial, the sentence is stated analytically without emotional markers.

Text: कोण बोलतो आहे गद्दार तुमच्या तोंडातून हे शब्द चांगले नाही वाटत
translated_text: Who is speaking, traitor? These words from your mouth do not sound good.
Justification: Use of "गद्दार" (traitor) and "तोंडातून हे शब्द" reflects contempt.

Text: साहेब पण ह्यांच्या गलिच्छ राजकारणाचे भाग होतील असे वाटलं नव्हतं
translated_text: Sir, I never thought I would be a part of their dirty politics.
Justification: Though "गलिच्छ राजकारण" suggests corruption, the overall tone remains reflective.

Text: आता कळाल गाढवांच्या डोक्यावर केस का कमी असतात ती
translated_text: Now you will know why donkeys have less hair on their heads.
Justification: Use of metaphor "गाढवांच्या डोक्यावर केस" is mocking but presented humorously.

Text: दरवर्षी कोटि रोजगार देण्याची घोषणा आखिरकार जुमला साबित झाली.
translated_text: The announcement of providing crores of jobs every year ultimately proved to be a hoax.
Justification: The word "जुमला" (hoax) criticizes policy, yet stays within informative tone.

Text: भाजप सत्तेत वर्षे आणि दोष राष्ट्रवादीचा, अंध भक्त डोक्यात कमी
translated_text: Years in BJP power and the blame is on the NCP, blind devotees are less in the head
Justification: "अंध भक्त" and "डोक्यात कमी" add sarcasm, but no intense emotional content.

Text: कडून खूपच होत आहे
translated_text: It's happening a lot.
Justification: Generic statement with no clear emotional content.

Text: गद्दारीचा डाव एकनाथ शिंदे यांनी दीड वर्षांपूर्वीच आखला होता : शिवसेना नेते जी
translated_text: Eknath Shinde had planned the plot of betrayal a year and a half ago: Shiv Sena leader Ji
Justification: Though it uses "गद्दारीचा डाव" (betrayal), it's attributed to someone else in reportive tone.

Text: विषय मागील वर्ष बद्दल सुरू आहे. त्यावर भुंक थोडा.. भाॅव भाॉव्व
translated_text: The topic is about last year. Let's talk a little about it.. Wow wow
Justification: "भुंक थोडा" (bark a little) and "भाॅव" repeated add absurdity, leading to surprise.

Text: आणि मार खाणारा अमर होत असणार
translated_text: And the one who is killed will become immortal.
Justification: Philosophical, lacks emotionally charged words.

Text: असं म्हणू नका कारण जनतेबरोबर तुम्हीच अन्याय आणि गद्दारी केली आहे...!
translated_text: Don't say that because you have committed injustice and betrayal against the people...!
Justification: Use of "अन्याय" (injustice) and "गद्दारी" reflect accusation and anger.

Text: साहेबांचा ह्यावेळी शिंदे साहेबांच्या संगतीत् बोलताना गडबड होत चालली आहे...
translated_text: It's getting awkward for Saheb to be talking in the company of Shinde Saheb at this time...
Justification: The word "गडबड" (awkwardness/mess) in this context shows unease and disgust.

Text: गद्दार नामशेष होणार हे नक्की
translated_text: Traitors will surely be wiped out.
Justification: Though strong, "नामशेष" (wiped out) is used in predictive tone without overt emotion.

Text: तुझ्याच उरावर बसवून घे शाह, मोदीला, हुकूमशाही आहे का राम्या.
translated_text: Put Shah and Modi on your lap, is this dictatorship, Ramya?
Justification: Phrases like "हुकूमशाही" (dictatorship) and "उरावर बसवून" imply humiliation and disgust.

Text: छगनराव भगतसिंग पन सरस्वती भक्त होते ! तांदुळचोर नव्हते
translated_text: Chhaganrao Bhagat Singh was also a devotee of Saraswati! He was not a rice thief.
Justification: Uses contrast, no emotional triggers.

Text: हा पवार साहेबाना लावलेला तोंबना समजायचं
translated_text: This was supposed to be a slap in the face to Pawar Saheb.
Justification: "तोंबना" (slap in the face) expresses symbolic aggression, indicating anger.

Text: ही चालू डीपी आहे याची अवस्था बघा.
translated_text: Look at the status of this current DP.
Justification: Comment on status, not emotionally charged.

Text: हरामखोर आहे तो फडणवीस
translated_text: Fadnavis is a traitor.
Justification: "हरामखोर" (scoundrel) is an offensive slur indicating strong disgust.

Text: काकू हे सल्ले भाजप नेत्यांना द्या जे मुलींना जबरदस्तीने वेश्या व्यवसायासाठी प्रवृत्त करतात
translated_text: Aunty, give this advice to BJP leaders who force girls into prostitution
Justification: The phrase "जबरदस्तीने वेश्या व्यवसायासाठी" (forced into prostitution) evokes moral outrage and disgust.

Text: श्वानाला नमन श्वानाला नमन केलाय तुम्हाला नाही नाय तर गैरसमज करून घ्याल
translated_text: Bowing to the dog, bowing to the dog, you will not understand, otherwise
Justification: Poetic sarcasm, but emotionally neutral.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात कृषी मंत्री आहे का जागेवर????
translated_text: Is there an Agriculture Minister in Maharashtra????
Justification: Questioning tone, but not emotionally intense.

Text: खरी शिवसेना कोणाची हे आता रस्त्यावर दिसेल. पोटनिवडणूक जिंकून रावणाचा वध होइल हे निश्चित!!
translated_text: Whose real Shiv Sena is will now be seen on the streets. It is certain that Ravana will be killed by winning the by-elections!!
Justification: "रावणाचा वध" (killing of Ravana) is metaphor for destroying evil, symbolizing anger.

Text: भक्तांच जीवनच ढापलेल आहे आज्जी. त्यामुळे दुसर्यांचही ढापलेलंच वाटणार.
translated_text: The lives of the devotees are being ruined, Aunty. Therefore, it seems that others are being ruined too.
Justification: "ढापलेल" (looted/taken away) shows suffering, evoking sadness.

Text: आजपर्यंत देशाची आर्थिक फसवणूक करणारी जमात,,,,,,,आणि हेच आपल्याला देश भक्ती शिकवणार?
translated_text: The people who have been defrauding the country financially till date,,,,,,,,and this is what will teach us patriotism?
Justification: The rhetorical sarcasm and use of "फसवणूक" (fraud) and "देश भक्ती शिकवणार?" (teach patriotism?) conveys anger.

Text: तुमच्या सारखे डुक्कर आहेत म्हणून आज महाराष्ट्राचे हे हाल आहे, कुत्रं म्हणतो मराठी माणसाला...
translated_text: Maharashtra is in this situation today because of pigs like you, they call Marathi people dogs...
Justification: "डुक्कर" and "कुत्रं" are insults, but the sentence is presented in a resigned tone.

Text: अंधेरी पूर्व विधानसभा पोटनिवडणुकीतून भाजपची माघार. आता सहानुभूतीला हे आपला विजय समजून वेड्यासारखे नाचणार!
translated_text: BJP withdraws from Andheri East assembly by-election. Now, they will dance like crazy to sympathize with this victory!
Justification: "वेड्यासारखे नाचणार" (dance like mad) and sarcasm create a tone of mockery and anger.

Text: देश खूप बदलला आहे, आधी कबुतर सोडली जात होती; आता बलात्काऱ्यांना सोडलं जात..!!
translated_text: The country has changed a lot, earlier pigeons were being released; now rapists are being released..!!
Justification: The contrast between "कबुतर" and "बलात्काऱ्यांना" heightens moral outrage, expressing anger.

Text: अरे बेडका काही हि बोलतोस का ?
translated_text: Hey frog, are you talking?
Justification: The term "बेडका" (frog) is mocking, but overall tone is mildly humorous.

Text: हा तर त्या कुत्र्याचा अपमान होईल...
translated_text: This would be an insult to that dog...
Justification: Use of "अपमान" (insult) and comparison to "कुत्रा" (dog) show anger.

Text: बेअक्कल पत्रकार आहे ही
translated_text: This is a stupid journalist.
Justification: "बेअक्कल" (brainless) directly shows contempt, expressing disgust.

Text: ज्याचं ढुंगण ठोकायला निघाले होते त्यांच्याच ढुंगणावर जाऊन बसलात.. विनाशकाले विपरीत बुद्धी.
translated_text: You sat on the buttocks of the one you were going to kick.. The opposite of wisdom in times of destruction.
Justification: The absurd and degrading imagery of "ढुंगण" (buttocks) expresses disgust.

Text: प्रशासन अधिकारी माजलेले आहेत. तरी मात्र शासन झोफले आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र.
translated_text: The administration officials are busy. However, the government is in a hurry. Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: Although "माजलेले" (arrogant) is critical, the sentence is largely factual.

Text: तला पण निस्टांवत शिवसैनिक लागतो तुमच्या सारखा भटकलेला माणूस नाही
translated_text: Even a Shiv Sainik who is not a stray person like you needs to be killed.
Justification: "भटकलेला माणूस" (wandering man) adds insult, but the statement is more critical than emotional.

Text: महाराष्ट्राची आणि देशाची म्हणजे ॽ महाराष्ट्र कोणत्या देशात आहे ॽ
translated_text: Of Maharashtra and the country, which means ॽ In which country is Maharashtra located ॽ
Justification: Use of rhetorical "कोणत्या देशात आहे" is sarcastic but neutral.

Text: मतदारानी निवडून दिल आणि फुटीर झाले असा आमदारना असच धडा जनतेने शिकवला पाहिजे!
translated_text: The people should teach the MLAs a lesson that was chosen by the voters and then divided!
Justification: "धडा शिकवला पाहिजे" (teach a lesson) expresses discontent and anger.

Text: समाजकल्याण विभागाला अद्याप स्वतंत्र मंत्री देण्यात आला नाही. हा भाजपचा सामाजीक अन्याय आहे.
translated_text: The Social Welfare Department has not yet been given a separate minister. This is social injustice by the BJP.
Justification: Use of "सामाजीक अन्याय" (social injustice) is serious but stated in informative tone.

Text: सेक्युलर जन्त आहेत हे, स्वतः चा बाप सोडून शेजारच्या ला बाप म्हणणारे
translated_text: These are the secular people, who call their neighbor father instead of their own father.
Justification: The metaphor is sarcastic but not emotionally intense.

Text: तुझ्यासारखा नाही मी तात्या.
translated_text: I'm not like you, Tatya.
Justification: Comparison using "तुझ्यासारखा नाही" implies contempt, indicating disgust.

Text: अपात्र शिक्षक तुपाशी....आणि प्रामाणिक पात्र असलेले शिक्षणसेवक उपाशी.....वा रे... महाराष्ट्र सरकार...
translated_text: Unqualified teachers are with you....and honest and qualified education workers are starving.....Oh my... Maharashtra government...
Justification: Irony and contrast between "तुपाशी" (with ghee) and "उपाशी" (hungry) provoke surprise.

Text: हे फार काळ चालणार नाही... हिटलरचा अंत वाईट झाला होता... कम्युनिस्ट पक्षही अति साम्यवादामुळे संपला...
translated_text: This won't last long... Hitler had a bad end... The Communist Party also ended due to extreme communism...
Justification: Historical "वाईट झाला" (bad end) and fatalistic tone convey sadness.

Text: अपेक्षा आणि तुमच्या साहेबांकडून मस्करी करता का राव...
translated_text: Are you making fun of expectations and your boss, Rao...
Justification: Use of "मस्करी" (mockery) is sarcastic, but not emotionally charged.

Text: बीजेपी ला काही फायदा उरला नाही बाबाचा आता...आणि बाबलापण हे कळलय...
translated_text: BJP has no use for Baba now...and Baba knows this too...
Justification: The phrase "फायदा उरला नाही" and realization of redundancy show sadness.

Text: अजून किती अच्छे दिन पाहिजेत...! चक्क, जाहिरात करत आहे..
translated_text: How many more good days are needed...! Really, I'm advertising..
Justification: Use of "अच्छे दिन" in a sarcastic exclamation suggests surprise.

Text: सरकारी नोकरीची इच्छा अनेकांना बेरोजगार केले आहे.
translated_text: The desire for a government job has made many unemployed.
Justification: Statement of fact with no clear emotion.

Text: संगमनेर शहरातील नवीन नगर रोड पाण्यात, सायंकाळी झालेल्या कोसळधार पावसाने...
translated_text: Naveen Nagar Road in Sangamner city is under water due to heavy rains in the evening...
Justification: Description of a local issue; informative tone.

Text: ही वीरगर्जना करीत आहेत... ढुंला पाय लाऊन पळणारे...
translated_text: These heroes are roaring... Those who run with bare feet...
Justification: Phrase "वीरगर्जना" (heroic roar) conveys pride and energy, evoking joy.

Text: पण हा गाढवाचा अपमान आहे. निषेध.
translated_text: But this is an insult to the donkey. Protest.
Justification: Comparing someone to a "गाढव" (donkey) reflects insult and disgust.

Text: कोण आहे हा नमुना
translated_text: Who is this sample?
Justification: "नमुना" (sample) used sarcastically expresses astonishment and surprise.

Text: हे मानसिक रोगी वाचत नाहीत आणि शहानिशा न करता तिरस्कारयुक्त प्रचलित विचारांना स्विकारतात.
translated_text: These mentally ill people don't read and accept hateful mainstream ideas without questioning them.
Justification: The term "तिरस्कारयुक्त" (hateful) suggests deep negativity and disgust towards blind belief without reasoning.

Text: देशात बेरोजगारी अजिबात नाहीये...
translated_text: There is absolutely no unemployment in the country...
Justification: Though sarcastic, there’s no emotionally charged Marathi word; hence it remains neutral.

Text: धक्कादायक! कळव्याकडून...
translated_text: Shocking! The road...
Justification: "धक्कादायक" (shocking) is an explicit word expressing surprise at the incident.

Text: ही महामानवाला, शिंदेशाही...
translated_text: Priceless gift...
Justification: No emotionally intense word; neutral contextual discussion.

Text: नात्याचं गणित हे बँकेतल्या खात्यांसारखं...
translated_text: The math of relationships...
Justification: The metaphor is calm and reflective; hence neutral.

Text: पोलीस स्मृती दिन कर्तव्य बजावत...
translated_text: Emotional tribute...
Justification: The phrase "शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना" (martyred soldiers) brings out sadness and respect.

Text: घरकोंबड्याने फोटो काढणे...
translated_text: Giving up taking photos...
Justification: "घरकोंबड्याने" (hen-like person) is derogatory and mocking, thus conveys disgust.

Text: हे वाचुण तर मंदसैनिकांच्या बुडाला...
translated_text: Fire will burn...
Justification: The term "बुडाला आग" (burning bottom) metaphorically expresses disgust and irritation.

Text: मग रात्र भर काय करत होते...
translated_text: What were singles doing...
Justification: The rhetorical setup and "रात्र भर जागून" evokes mild surprise or curiosity.

Text: राणे आणि कार्ट्यांना समजावा...
translated_text: Explain to Rane...
Justification: Despite addressing someone directly, no emotional word present.

Text: रडू नकोस.... मुंबईत...
translated_text: Don’t cry...
Justification: "रडू नकोस" (don’t cry) is mildly directive but not emotionally charged.

Text: असे तर्कशुद्ध प्रश्न विचारणे...
translated_text: Asking rational questions...
Justification: Logical reflection, not driven by any emotionally heavy word.

Text: पायी जाणा-या महिलेच्या...
translated_text: Snatched a necklace...
Justification: "ओरबाडून" (snatched) by "भामट्यांनी" (thugs) indicates disgust at the crime.

Text: तो कोण लागून गेला मोठा...
translated_text: Who is he...
Justification: The use of "चुतीयागत बडबडून" adds shock and surprise with informal vulgarity.

Text: एक कोकणी म्हणून सहमत आहे...
translated_text: Same bad condition...
Justification: The reference to repeated failure "तीच दुरवस्था" expresses weariness and sadness.

Text: भविष्यातील गुलाम आजच तयार...
translated_text: Slaves of the future...
Justification: Allegorical tone without emotional spikes.

Text: खाण्यामध्ये फक्त... मूर्ख असे तीनच प्रकार येतात
translated_text: Veg, Non-Veg, Stupid...
Justification: Use of "मूर्ख" (stupid) is sarcastic but too general for strong emotion.

Text: शीउबाठा हा संपलेला पक्ष आहे...
translated_text: Xiubatha is a dead party...
Justification: "संपलेला" (dead/ended) is descriptive, not emotional.

Text: वाव हाच महाराष्ट्र सरकारचा...
translated_text: Wow, trolling...
Justification: "वाव" (Wow) paired with sarcasm toward trolling reflects surprise.

Text: पळवापळवी हे धंदे तुमचे आहेत...
translated_text: You are running away...
Justification: "पळवापळवी" (dodging) and "आत्मपरीक्षण" (self-reflection) convey accusatory tone = anger.

Text: ही मोसंबी नारंगी पार्टीचा...
translated_text: A spectacle in Maharashtra...
Justification: Commentary but lacking emotionally strong terms.

Text: हे शेणक्याचें विचार...
translated_text: Hypocrite king...
Justification: Sarcastic metaphor but stays neutral.

Text: हरिश्चंद्र जिवंत असते...
translated_text: Would have killed himself...
Justification: Reference to "हरिश्चंद्र" (truthful king) + suicide creates sadness.

Text: नोकरी जानार आणि निवड्नुक हरणार असे म्हननारे तोंडावर जाम आपटले
translated_text: Those who said they would get jobs and lose elections were slapped in the face.
Justification: The phrase 'तोंडावर जाम आपटले' expresses strong displeasure or verbal aggression, indicating anger.

Text: तुमची लायकी काय आहे ते कळाले ला हा टोमणा तुम्हालाच लागू होतो
translated_text: This joke applies only to you, if you know what you are worth.
Justification: The sentence is observational and sarcastic but not emotionally loaded, so classified as neutral.

Text: मराठी मिडिया खरा मुखवटा दाखवा. चमचे गिरी करु नका ही विनंती
translated_text: Marathi media, show your true face. Please don't be a hypocrite.
Justification: The phrase 'चमचे गिरी' is derogatory and signals disapproval, indicating disgust.

Text: लै रांगबाज लोक आहेत ही
translated_text: These are rowdy people.
Justification: The word 'रांगबाज' (rowdy) expresses disdain toward behavior, indicating disgust.

Text: अजून महाराष्ट्रात यात्रा आली पण नाही, त्याच्या अगोदरच फाटली ये डर अच्छा लगा....
translated_text: The yatra has not arrived in Maharashtra yet, but it has already broken down, it feels so good....
Justification: The sarcastic satisfaction implied by 'ये डर अच्छा लगा' indicates joy.

Text: स्वताच्या विभाग वर ज्या मंत्र्यांना विश्वास नाही असले मंत्री काय उपयोग चे
translated_text: What use are ministers who don't have faith in their own departments?
Justification: Rhetorical questioning implies disbelief and surprise.

Text: एवढी सत्ता बळकावूनही भागले नाही का त्रास देत आहात संयमी सोज्वळ उद्धव ठाकरेंना
translated_text: Why are you bothering the moderate Sojwal Uddhav Thackeray, who has not managed to seize so much power?
Justification: Puzzled tone reflects surprise at the unnecessary harassment.

Text: हो तुमच्या बुडाला आग लावायची आहे

translated_text: Are people stupid? Tanya is going to resign as the government's term is about to end.
Justification: Use of "मूर्ख" (stupid) and frustration in tone shows anger.

Text: बारामती चा म्हमद्या काही बोलला का?
translated_text: Did the old man from Baramati say anything?
Justification: The question is rhetorical but lacks strong emotion.

Text: पवारसाहेब ला माढ्यातून पळून का गेले ? ते पहिले सागं चाट्या
translated_text: Why did Pawar Saheb run away from Madhya? He licked the first straw.
Justification: The unexpected accusation and tone show surprise.

Text: परतीच्या पावसाचा तडाखा! शेतीचे नुकसान; या जिल्ह्यांना अलर्ट जारी
translated_text: Heavy rains hit! Agricultural damage; Alert issued for these districts
Justification: News-style factual reporting; no explicit emotion.

Text: अरे हरामखोर म्हातारं झालाय तरी अजुन रग काय कमी होेय नाय अनगातली..
translated_text: Oh bastard, even though he has become old, he still has less anger.
Justification: The abusive word "हरामखोर" and mocking tone convey disgust.

Text: मराठी मराठी म्हणून ठाकरे यांनी मराठी लोकांच्या तोंडाला पाने पुसली
translated_text: Thackeray, as a Marathi Marathi, wiped the face of the Marathi people.
Justification: तोंडाला पाने पुसली suggests betrayal and evokes disgust.

Text: राणे आणि लायकी....हा संबंध कधीच विसर्जित झालाय.
translated_text: Rane and Laiki....this relationship has never been dissolved.
Justification: The phrase sarcastically implies disappointment and disillusionment.

Text: ... तो नासला नाही तो पहिल्यापासून नासकाच आहे..
translated_text: ... It's not ruined, it's been ruined from the beginning..
Justification: नासकाच (rotten from start) evokes despair and sadness.

Text: आता कुठे गेलं तुमचं बेगडी हिंदूत्व ? ?
translated_text: Where has your Hindutva gone now?
Justification: The question is critical but lacks strong emotion; neutral tone.

Text: युवासेना ही आदित्य साहेबांनी उभी केलीय...तुमचा काय अधिकार आहे.
translated_text: The Youth Army was founded by Aditya Saheb...what right do you have?
Justification: Though confrontational, the tone is assertive and political.

Text: गद्दार आले अजून खोके मिळतात का ते बघायला
translated_text: The traitors came to see if they could still get the boxes.
Justification: गद्दार is used critically but tone stays sarcastic and neutral.

Text: वेस्टर्न रेल्वे जगात चुत्या प्रकार.
translated_text: Western Railway is a bad type in the world.
Justification: Crude but descriptive, lacking emotional elaboration; neutral.

Text: हे असले बिनडोक कार्यकर्ते भरलेत म्हणून बारामतीचे काका कायम भावी पंतप्रधान राहिलेत
translated_text: Because of these mindless activists, Baramati's uncle remained the future Prime Minister.
Justification: बिनडोक (brainless) is insulting, but overall tone is sarcastic and neutral.

Text: तुम्हालाही लाचार ही उपमा कायमची आहे
translated_text: You too are forever described as helpless.
Justification: लाचार (helpless) sounds demeaning but statement stays flat-toned.

Text: सर्रास बघतोय अशा चूका, खरंच पिऊन बातम्या देतात का?
translated_text: Do you really drink and report on news like this, which is a common mistake?
Justification: The phrase "खरंच पिऊन" (really drunk) implies irresponsible behavior and evokes disgust.

Text: खरंच डोक्यात चालले आहेत हे लोक
translated_text: These people are really going crazy.
Justification: The phrase "डोक्यात चालले" reflects shock or disbelief, fitting surprise.

Text: तुमची फारच खोलून मारली राव पण
translated_text: You hit me very hard, Rao.
Justification: The phrase "खोलून मारली" (hit hard) implies emotional pain, suggesting sadness.

Text: महाराष्ट्रासाठी महत्वाच्या प्रकल्पाला ब्रेक पण खर्चिक, अनावश्यक बुलेट ट्रेन मात्र पाहिजे
translated_text: Important project for Maharashtra needs a break but costly, unnecessary bullet train
Justification: Critique is sharp but stated rationally; hence neutral.

Text: बरोबर... भ्रष्टाचार नाही, दलाली खाल्ली ने
translated_text: Right... no corruption, just bribery.
Justification: Sarcastic tone with factual framing; neutral emotion.

Text: नावं पण यांनी चोरलेली आहेत
translated_text: They have stolen even the names.
Justification: Accusatory but lacks intensity in emotional expression.

Text: त्यांनी शेण खाल्लं म्हणून तुम्ही एक पाऊल पुढे जाणार का?
translated_text: Will you go one step further just because they ate dung?
Justification: Sarcastic analogy without emotional outburst; neutral.

Text: अभिव्यक्ती म्हणजे बंगल्यावर बोलवून पोलिसांसमोर ठोकणे बरोबर नं
translated_text: Expression means calling someone to the bungalow and beating them in front of the police.
Justification: ठोकणे (to beat) in this context shows contempt and disgust toward misuse of power.

Text: पण आम्ही ऐकल की ही चूक ला करणार होते....
translated_text: But we heard that this mistake was going to be made...
Justification: The regretful tone shows disappointment and sadness.

Text: राजकारणाचं धर्मकारण करणारे नालायक नेते ह्या देशात आहेत म्हणूनच देशाचं वाटोळं होत चाललंय
translated_text: The country is going through a rough patch because of the incompetent leaders who are doing politics for religion.
Justification: Criticism without emotional explosion; hence neutral.

Text: हे काय झालंय...कोणाचं कर्म फुटलं आहे
translated_text: What happened...whose karma has been broken?
Justification: The unexpected situation leads to rhetorical questioning; evokes surprise.

Text: याला जबाबदार कृषी उत्पन्न बाजार समिती आहे. त्याचा फटका शेतक-याला बसतोय.
translated_text: The Agricultural Produce Market Committee is responsible for this. The farmers are being affected by it.
Justification: Factual tone regarding accountability; hence neutral.

Text: खाज हा शब्द कमी वाटतो का???? मग मस्तवायु म्हणाव काय ????
translated_text: Does the word itch seem a little low???? Then what about the word breath????
Justification: Wordplay and sarcasm, but tone remains light and neutral.

Text: विसरलात वाटते हत्त्या करणारे कोण-कोण होते देशाला मिडिया मार्फत माहीत आहे।
translated_text: It seems like you've forgotten who the killers were. The country knows through the media who they were.
Justification: Reflective and informative tone; remains neutral.

Text: मुलगा स्वतःचं नाव देतो आणि शिष्य पक्ष प्रमुखाचे नाव देतो...या ला काय म्हणावं !!
translated_text: The boy gives his own name and the disciple gives the name of the party chief...what to say to this!!
Justification: Accusatory tone with frustration expresses anger.

Text: ही काय भानगड आहे……समजाऊन सांगेन का कोणी?
translated_text: What is this nonsense... Can someone explain it to me?
Justification: भानगड (nonsense/chaos) reflects confusion with a frustrated tone.

Text: केसरकर ,किती खोके घेऊन भाजपाच्या मुरजी पटेलला ही जागा सोडली ...?
translated_text: Kesarkar, how many boxes did you take and leave this seat to BJP's Murji Patel...?
Justification: खोके (boxes) implies bribery; expressed with rhetorical surprise.

Text: आधी भाषा सुधार प्रितीमा काय प्रतिमा असे आहे
translated_text: First, what is the image of the language correction?
Justification: Tone is vague but descriptive; neutral overall.

Text: मराठा समाजाबद्दलची मानसिक आत्मीयता किती, हे दाखवले सावंतांच्या तान्याने .
translated_text: Sawant's Tanya showed how much mental affinity he has towards the Maratha community.
Justification: Factual expression of sentiment without emotional intensity.

Text: नारायण राणे, कृपाशंकर सिंग, प्रताप सरनाईक, यशवंत जाधव ह्यांच्या फाईल्स हरवल्या का ?
translated_text: Are the files of Narayan Rane, Kripashankar Singh, Pratap Saranaik, Yashwant Jadhav lost?
Justification: Question implies suspicion, but tone remains neutral.

Text: अक्कल गहाण ठेवली की अशी दुरबुद्धी सुचते...
translated_text: When common sense is sacrificed, such foolishness is suggested...
Justification: अक्कल गहाण ठेवली implies deep regret or loss of reason, indicating sadness.

Text: तो वाकड्या जितका कारणीभूत तितकाच हा भडवा बाळू कारणीभूत ह्या महाराष्ट्राची वाट लावायला
translated_text: This rascal is as much responsible for the path of Maharashtra as he is for the crooks.
Justification: भडवा is abusive and contemptuous, fitting disgust.

Text: हे सर्व लहानपनीच केल होता आता देश संभाळत आहे- अंध्भक्त
translated_text: All this was done in childhood, now the country is being run by a fanatic
Justification: अंध्भक्त is used critically, but tone remains neutral.

Text: काय चुकीचं बोलले? अडीच वर्ष काय झोपा काढत होता का?
translated_text: What did you say wrong? What were you sleeping for two and a half years?
Justification: झोपा काढत होता indicates sarcastic disbelief, expressing surprise.

Text: पाच पर्यंत निट मोजता पण येत नाही का रे भक्तांनों
translated_text: Can't you count to five, devotees?
Justification: निट मोजता in mocking tone evokes surprise or disbelief.

Text: दबक्या पावलानं बिबट्या आला अन् अचानक घरातून…, काळजाचा थरकाप उडवणारा
translated_text: A leopard came with soft footsteps and suddenly from the house..., heart-wrenching
Justification: काळजाचा थरकाप evokes intense fear and shock.

Text: म्हणजे मूर्तिपूजा म्हणजे मूर्खपणा हे तू मान्य करतोयस
translated_text: So you agree that idolatry is foolishness.
Justification: Sarcastic, philosophical tone but emotionally flat; neutral.

Text: अरे तुझ्या बरोबर असलेली चिंधी सेना बोल. खरी शिवसेना उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे आहे.
translated_text: Oh, the rag army that is with you, speak up. The real Shiv Sena is Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray.
Justification: चिंधी सेना is derogatory, yet tone is sarcastically political; neutral.

Text: मोदी सरकारला फिकीर नाही देशाची वाढतेय संख्या सुशिक्षित बेरोजगारांची!
translated_text: The Modi government is not worried about the increasing number of educated unemployed people in the country!
Justification: Concerned tone, but expressed analytically; neutral.

Text: हे होणारच होते पर्यंत तारीख पे तारीख
translated_text: This was going to happen, date by date.
Justification: तारीख पे तारीख implies delay; expressed as inevitability, neutral.

Text: याला ज्याने पाठवले त्याच्या बुडात दम नाही
translated_text: Whoever sent this is out of breath.
Justification: Crude and mocking tone shows contempt, fitting disgust.

Text: त्यांना वकील मिळणे हे सुद्धा भारताचे दुर्दैव म्हणावे लागेल.
translated_text: It is also unfortunate for India that they are getting a lawyer.
Justification: दुर्दैव (misfortune) conveys disappointment and national sadness.

Text: हा गुंड पण कोणत्या पक्षाचा होता सांगायची गरज नाही...
translated_text: There's no need to say which party this goon belonged to...
Justification: गुंड (goon) used critically, yet tone remains controlled and neutral.

Text: मुरजी पडणार हे निश्चित होते, घाबरून भाजपाने माघार घेतली.
translated_text: It was certain that Murji would fall, and the BJP backed down out of fear.
Justification: The phrase "घाबरून माघार घेतली" (backed down in fear) directly expresses fear.

Text: चेष्टेचा विषय असलेली खासदार.. लोकं ह्यांच्या तोंडावर हसतात
translated_text: MPs who are the subject of jokes.. People laugh at their faces.
Justification: हसतात (laugh) and "चेष्टेचा विषय" (subject of jokes) express joy through mockery.

Text: दम लागतो....तो तुझ्यात नाही.....
translated_text: It takes my breath away....it's not in you.....
Justification: The phrase "दम लागतो" implies pressure and fear, aimed critically.

Text: ला त्यांच्याच गावातून हाकलले बर का... पुढच्या वेळेस आमदारकी पण जाणार...
translated_text: Why was he expelled from his own village? He will also run for MLA next time...
Justification: Descriptive and political without emotional tone.

Text: भारतात राहून माज करतात.. यांना वेळीच ठेचलं पाहिजे.. त्याशिवाय सुधारणार नाही हे.
translated_text: They live in India and do evil. They should be stopped in time. Otherwise, there will be no improvement.
Justification: ठेचलं पाहिजे implies strong stance, but tone remains politically critical, not emotional.

Text: पाहून रिप्लाय न करणाऱ्याची संख्या दिवसेंदिवस वाढतच चालली आहे
translated_text: The number of people who don't reply after seeing it is increasing day by day.
Justification: Statement is observational; neutral.

Text: उमेदवारी अर्ज न भरणे ही संस्कृती आणि उमेदवारी अर्ज भरून मागे घेणे ही विकृती.
translated_text: Not filing nomination papers is a culture and filing and withdrawing nomination papers is a perversion.
Justification: विकृती (perversion) conveys contempt and disgust.

Text: अशा पद्धतीचे सल्ले तुझासारख्या छपरी नाच्याकडन पण नाही घेणार
translated_text: I wouldn't take such advice even from a scoundrel like you.
Justification: छपरी नाच्या is a derogatory term, expressing disgust.

Text: सगळी कडे फुकटचे सल्ले दिलेच पाहिजे का?
translated_text: Should free advice be given to everyone?
Justification: Questioning but lacks emotional charge.

Text: तु चाट्या आहेस का का काथ्या ?
translated_text: Are you a licker?
Justification: चाट्या as an insult in questioning tone suggests surprise.

Text: आणि तुम्ही तिघे अमर अकबर अँथनी दुसरे कोण आहे का नाही जील्ल्यामध्ये
translated_text: And you three, Amar Akbar Anthony, who else is there in the district?
Justification: Humorous and rhetorical; tone is neutral.

Text: आमच्या मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी काय घोडा मारलाय तुमचा, त्यांचा फोटो का नाही
translated_text: What has our Chief Minister done to you, why is there no photo of him?
Justification: घोडा मारलाय used sarcastically expresses surprise.

Text: चीन किती आत "घुसला" हे अजून कळाले नाही साहेबाना???
translated_text: You still don't know how far China has "infiltrated", sir???
Justification: घुसला (infiltrated) and mocking tone express disgust.

Text: नारायण राणे आणि त्यांच्या बेडकांना पण हे सांगा आधी
translated_text: Tell this to Narayan Rane and his frogs first.
Justification: बेडकांना is mocking but tone is politically critical; neutral.

Text: याच शरद पवारांनी शिवसैनिकांना कुत्रे असे संबोधले होते
translated_text: This same Sharad Pawar had called Shiv Sainiks dogs.
Justification: Recounting past incident; descriptive tone.

Text: हे सगळे खरं पण गद्दारी एका खुनशीची हा डाग कसा पुसणार?
translated_text: All this is true, but how can a traitor erase the stain of a murderer?
Justification: गद्दारी (betrayal) and "डाग" (stain) imply anger and blame.

Text: हो तुम्ही जणू काय जनतेला आरामात जगू देताय, महागाई दिसत नाही वाटतं
translated_text: Yes, it seems like you are letting the people live comfortably, you don't see inflation.
Justification: Sarcastic tone, politically critical; neutral.

Text: ते बहुतेक वाघ बोलले पण हा तर लबाड बोका दिसतोय
translated_text: They mostly talked like tigers, but this one looks like a lying goat.
Justification: लबाड बोका is satirical but flat in tone.

Text: डिलिट करून टाका आता हे ट्विट , आवरला तुमचा
translated_text: Delete this tweet now, you're blocked.
Justification: आवरला तुमचा shows finality and strong emotion, expressing anger.

Text: तो घरच्या कुटुंबासमवेत अशी असभ्य भाषा बोलतो
translated_text: He speaks such rude language with his family at home.
Justification: असभ्य भाषा (rude language) in domestic context evokes disgust.

Text: ह्यांना एकदा आपलं रामायण एकवावे लागेल सर.... चुकीचे रामायण वाचत आहेत हे!
translated_text: They will have to read their Ramayana once, sir... They are reading the wrong Ramayana!
Justification: चुकीचे रामायण (wrong narrative) used metaphorically to express frustration and anger.

Text: भ्रष्टाचार किती होणार आहे यात
translated_text: How much corruption will there be?
Justification: भ्रष्टाचार (corruption) with rhetorical tone expresses disgust.

Text: पक्ष त्यांचा निवडणूक त्यांची मग तुम्हाला मिर्च्या का झोंबतात?
translated_text: Their party, their election, so why do they give you chills?
Justification: मिर्च्या झोंबतात is sarcastic but lacks strong emotional weight.

Text: बरोबर आहे हे तसच आहे जस देशात बेकारी नाहीच गरिब वाढलेत
translated_text: That's right, it's just like there is no unemployment in the country, but the poor have increased.
Justification: Sarcasm about policies; stated neutrally.

Text: किती निच वृत्ती ज्या ताटात खाल्ले भाजपा बरोबर त्याच ताटात घाण केली.
translated_text: What a low attitude and soiled the same plate as BJP.
Justification: घाण केली is critical but stated plainly; neutral tone.

Text: चार आण्याचा माणूस तुझ्या मालकाने मंत्रिमंडळात का ठेवला होता?
translated_text: Why did your master put a four-figure man in the cabinet?
Justification: चार आण्याचा माणूस as insult reflects surprise or disbelief.

Text: तू कोणते दिवे लावणार ते पण सांग
translated_text: Also tell me which lights you will put on.
Justification: Mocking but emotionally flat; neutral.

Text: ह्यांच इंजान ट्रॅकवर यायच नाव घेईना आणि हे ईमान उडवायला लागलेत
translated_text: This engine won't even come on the track and it's starting to blow up.
Justification: Metaphor of failure shows frustration and anger.

Text: अत्यंत मूर्खपणा दिसून आला आहे तुमचा
translated_text: You have shown great stupidity.
Justification: अत्यंत मूर्खपणा is direct criticism indicating disgust.

Text: नरेंद्र मोदींच्या फायद्यासाठी जनतेला झोपी घालावणारा सुध्दा हाच होता.
translated_text: He was also the one who lulled the public to sleep for the benefit of Narendra Modi.
Justification: Politically accusatory but not emotionally intense.

Text: तयार रहा लवकरचं मोठा भूकंप होणार
translated_text: Be prepared, a big earthquake will happen soon.
Justification: मोठा भूकंप (big earthquake) metaphorically or literally implies fear.

Text: अपयश पदरात पडल्यावर काही उरले नाही म्हणून जबाबदारी घ्यायला कोणी पुढे आले नाही.
translated_text: When failure struck, no one came forward to take responsibility because there was nothing left.
Justification: Summary of behavior post-failure; stated in reflective neutral tone.

Text: ह्या लोकांचे असे विचार ऐकल्याने भाजपची ताकद वाढते. ही अक्कल येणार कधी?
translated_text: Listening to these people's thoughts increases the strength of BJP. When will this common sense come?
Justification: ही अक्कल येणार कधी? is sarcastic but politically neutral.

Text: सरकार कमजोर आहे अशा गोष्टि होत राहतील अस वाटतय……..अशा घोषणा द्यायची हिम्मत आजपर्यंत झाली नाहीं
translated_text: I feel like things like the government is weak will continue to happen... I haven't had the courage to make such a statement till now.
Justification: Critical reflection, not emotionally heightened.

Text: तु काय मातोश्री वर वॉचमन आहेत का? ज्यांना भेट नाकारली मंग तु जाऊन भेट.
translated_text: Are you a watchman on Mother Earth? Those who refused to meet, please go and meet them.
Justification: Sarcastic confrontation, expressing anger.

Text: अर्थात जे हे ठाकरेंचे ट्विट प्रभावित होऊन करणारे भक्त आहेत त्यांची कीव करावी
translated_text: Of course, those who are followers of Thackeray's tweets and are influenced by them should be envied.
Justification: कीव करावी (should be pitied) implies sarcasm, but overall the tone remains neutral.

Text: मैदानात येताना घेऊन येऊ नका... बॅलेट पेपर घेऊन या! आहे का हिम्मत तुमच्यात?
translated_text: Don't bring it with you when you enter the field... Bring the ballot paper! Do you have the courage?
Justification: The phrase "हिम्मत तुमच्यात?" (do you have the courage?) challenges boldly, implying intimidation or fear.

Text: अनाजीपंतांची पिलावळ अजुन ही तसेच वागतेय, तेच निच “तिडे” चालुच आहेत.
translated_text: The grain farmers' plight is still the same, the same "tides" are still going on.
Justification: निच तिडे (low moves) suggests criticism, but the tone is reflective, hence neutral.

Text: महाराष्ट्र पिंजून काढणार होते
translated_text: Maharashtra was going to be captured.
Justification: Statement is ambiguous and lacks emotional intensity.

Text: दुसऱ्याने खाल्लं म्हणजे आपण पण खाल्लाच पाहिजे का ?
translated_text: Does it mean that if someone else eats it, we must eat it too?
Justification: The rhetorical tone expresses frustration and disapproval, indicating anger.

Text: सेवाग्राम हव होत
translated_text: Sevagram is becoming
Justification: Statement is factual with no emotional emphasis.

Text: खोके सर्व ओके अशी आहे का?
translated_text: Is everything okay with the box?
Justification: खोके (boxes) implies bribery, but phrased as a question; tone remains neutral.

Text: पुण्याचा विकास पण गुजरात सारखा बुडाला.
translated_text: Pune's development also stalled like Gujarat.
Justification: Comparative and critical, but not emotionally strong.

Text: एकाच घरात एक देशभक्त आणि एक देशद्रोही असू शकतात तर
translated_text: Can there be a patriot and a traitor in the same house?
Justification: The contrast of "देशभक्त" and "देशद्रोही" carries deep disapproval and disgust.

Text: टोमणे मारण्यापूर्वी कोणी विचार करत नाही, बेरोजगारांची अवस्था कोणी विचारत नाही.
translated_text: No one thinks before taunting, no one asks about the plight of the unemployed.
Justification: The complaint reflects social neglect and contempt, conveying disgust.

Text: घ्या ही यांची अक्कल
translated_text: Take this as their advice.
Justification: Sarcastic, but not emotionally intense; neutral.

Text: हा हा हा मनसे वाले खा शिव्या लायकी बघा आपली
translated_text: Ha ha ha MNS people, look at your worth.
Justification: Mocking laughter "हा हा हा" and tone suggest joy through ridicule.

Text: ढाल तलवार चालवणारे समोरुन लढतात. रात्रीच्या अंधारात पळून नाही जात सुरतमार्गे गुवाहटी..!
translated_text: Those who wield shields and swords fight from the front. They don't run away in the darkness of the night, they go to Guwahati via Surat..!
Justification: Patriotic imagery, but emotionally restrained.

Text: त्या राकेश राम ऐवजी अबिनाश नादराजन किंवा बाळासाहेब जाधव ला का नाही खेळवत??
translated_text: Why not play Abinash Nadarajan or Balasaheb Jadhav instead of Rakesh Ram?
Justification: Expressed as a question; neutral.

Text: तानाजी सावंत हा मराठा आहे का? का याला भाजपाची खाज आहे......
translated_text: Is Tanaji Sawant a Maratha? Why does he have a crush on BJP?
Justification: खाज (itch) in this sarcastic tone indicates surprise and disbelief.

Text: हे पत्र भाजप ने आपल्याकडून स्वतःला पाठवून घेतल... अख्खा महाराष्ट्र जाणतो
translated_text: BJP will send this letter to itself... the whole of Maharashtra knows it.
Justification: Claiming awareness without emotional escalation; neutral.

Text: तेव्हा असल्यानं विश्र्वगुर, फेकू बाबा यांच्या नेतृत्वात सर्वांना घरी राहण्याचे सांगण्यात आले होते.
translated_text: Since it was then, everyone was asked to stay at home under the leadership of Vishvagur and Feku Baba.
Justification: Satirical tone, but no emotional peak; neutral.

Text: खुुप खाज होती.. सगळा माज उतरतोय आता चा..
translated_text: It was very itchy.. All the itching is coming off now..
Justification: माज उतरतोय (ego fading) reflects disappointment and emotional downturn.

Text: मोदींचे दिवस... हे दिवस आणलेत जनतेवर.
translated_text: Modi's days... these days have been brought upon the people.
Justification: Critical of leadership, but tone is analytical.

Text: कलंक आहे तुम्हीं लोक... इतिहासात गद्दार म्हणुन नोंद होईल तुमची.
translated_text: There is stigma you people... you will be recorded as traitors in history.
Justification: कलंक (stigma) and "गद्दार" (traitor) evoke strong contempt and disgust.

Text: राज्यातील लाखों तरुणांचा रोजगार घालवल्यानंतर आता गरीब कष्टकरी लोकांच्या तोंडचा घास देखील हिसकावणार का...???
translated_text: After destroying the employment of lakhs of youth in the state, will they now snatch the bread from the mouths of the poor and working people...???
Justification: तोंडचा घास हिसकावणार is emotionally charged with anger and injustice.

Text: भक्तांनो फकीर तोच आहे, पण बदलत नाहीये.
translated_text: Devotees, the fakir is the same, but he is not changing.
Justification: Statement is observational; neutral.

Text: चे विचार धारी, हसू करून घेतल राव
translated_text: Think of Dhari, Rao will make you smile.
Justification: Sentiment is positive but not expressive enough for joy; neutral.

Text: नको येऊ रे बाबा नाहीतर अजुन एक वाढेल मैला खाणारा पत्रकार.
translated_text: Don't come, Dad, or else another journalist will grow up to be a scumbag.
Justification: मैला खाणारा (filth eater) is a harsh insult, reflecting disgust.

Text: ते ऑगस्टदरम्यान कोकण आणि मध्य महाराष्ट्रात अतिवृष्टीचा इशारा..
translated_text: Warning of heavy rainfall in Konkan and Madhya Maharashtra from August to September.
Justification: Weather update with no emotional content.

Text: ती मशाल गद्दारांच्या ढुंगणाला चटके देण्यासाठी पण आहे.
translated_text: That torch is also there to give a kick to the buttocks of traitors.
Justification: गद्दारांच्या ढुंगणाला चटके (kick to traitors) shows disdain and disgust.

Text: देव ईमानदार लोकांच्या सोबत असतो............... त्यामुळे आपले हे वक्तव्य कितपत योग्य आहे हे जनतेला ठाऊक.
translated_text: God is with the honest people............... So the people know how correct this statement of yours is.
Justification: Religious belief-based argument; neutral tone.

Text: या ट्विट खाली भाजप वाले का रडत आहेत पण
translated_text: Why are BJP people crying under this tweet?
Justification: का रडत आहेत (why crying) in rhetorical tone shows surprise.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या खेळाडूवर दु:खाचा डोंगर, लढतीपूर्वीच प्रशिक्षकांचे निधन, पण तरीही तो लढला आणि…
translated_text: A mountain of grief for a Maharashtra player, the coach passed away before the match, but he still fought and...
Justification: दु:खाचा डोंगर (mountain of grief) indicates deep sadness.

Text: शेवाळ्या ला शिवसैनिक तुमचा शेवाळ बाहेर काढल्या शिवाय राहणार नाही...
translated_text: Shiv Sainiks will not stop until you remove the moss from your lawn...
Justification: Metaphorical and aggressive, but not emotionally expressive; neutral.

Text: लग्नाच्या मांडवा मधून बिना लग्न होता करवली लोकांना घेऊन निघालेला नवरदेव
translated_text: The groom left the wedding tent without taking the people who were supposed to be married.
Justification: Unusual situation described with no explicit emotion; neutral.

Text: म्हणुन मुंबई गुजरात गुवाहाटी गेली का
translated_text: So why did Mumbai go to Guwahati, Gujarat?
Justification: Sarcastic but no strong emotional tone.

Text: तुमची आई गहाण आहे..... आरएसएस खाली
translated_text: Your mother is in debt..... RSS down
Justification: Insulting, but context is vague; neutral.

Text: तुझी लायकी किती तू बोलतेस किती ह्यावेळी नगरसेवक सुद्धा होणार नाहीस तू
translated_text: You talk so much about your worth that you won't even be a corporator at this time.
Justification: लायकी (worthlessness) used insultingly; expresses disgust.

Text: नाही राहिला मनुष्य (श्री बाळा साहेब ठाकरे) नाही राहिला धनुष्य
translated_text: There is no more man (Shri Balasaheb Thackeray), there is no more bow.
Justification: Mourning tone reflects sadness and loss.

Text: तु ज्या निलेश राने चा समर्थक आहे तो आधी संघ विरोधी होता..
translated_text: Nilesh Rane, whom you support, was previously anti-Sangh.
Justification: Stated as a fact or political reminder; neutral.

Text: पण तुम्हां ला काय पैसे च्या वर एक पैसा भेटणार नाही
translated_text: But you won't get a single penny on top of what money you have.
Justification: Tone is dry and critical, but emotionally flat.

Text: सगळंच जर फसण करताय मग मुख्यमंत्री कुठ हाय त्यांना काय मान हलवायला ठेवलाय का.
translated_text: If everything is being rigged, then where is the Chief Minister? Why are they making him bow down?
Justification: फसण and rhetorical tone show frustration and anger.

Text: जास्त शहाणपण करायचे नाही बांबू पडतील मग समजेल
translated_text: I don't want to be too wise, the bamboo will fall, then I will understand.
Justification: Playful threat, lacks deep emotional tone; neutral.

Text: ही गंमत महागात पडली..
translated_text: This fun became expensive..
Justification: महागात पडली (paid a heavy price) suggests regret and sadness.

Text: स्वार्थासाठी जय भीम आज समाजातला नोकरदार वर्ग कलाकार वर्ग जय भीम जात सांगायला लाजतो
translated_text: For selfish reasons, Jai Bhim, the working class and the artist class in today's society are ashamed to say Jai Bhim, their caste.
