Text: अशी भाषा वापरली नाही. उद्धव ठाकरेंचे बोल असतात तसे. मूर्ख तुम्ही.
translated_text: I didn't use such language. As Uddhav Thackeray says. You idiot.
Justification: The insult "मूर्ख" indicates disgust.

Text: आपले पुढारी नालायक आहेत त्याचा हा परिणाम.
translated_text: This is the result of our leaders being incompetent.
Justification: "नालायक" is critical but not emotionally intense — neutral.

Text: पीठमागे सरकार होतं ना? खोकी कमवा एवढाच उददेश होता ?
translated_text: Was the government behind the strike? Was the sole purpose to earn money?
Justification: "खोकी कमवा" implies shock or disbelief — surprise.

Text: अरे गप्प फेकू हे पुरावे पण खोटे आणि तुम्ही पण खोटे
translated_text: Oh shut up, this evidence is false and you are also a liar.
Justification: "खोटे" repeated creates a tone of disgust.

Text: हेच तिने विचारल पाहिजे होत
translated_text: That's what she should have asked.
Justification: Simple opinion — neutral.

Text: सध्या तेवढंच राहिलं आहे
translated_text: That's all that's left for now.
Justification: Factual, without affect — neutral.

Text: चिमटे सुधारणार नाही. ही गोचड आहे. हिंदू चे रक्त पीत आहे.
translated_text: The tweezers will not improve. This is a trap. It is drinking the blood of Hindus.
Justification: "गोचड" and "रक्त पीत" are metaphorically disgusting — disgust.

Text: उकिरडा फुक्या म्हणजे, उकिरड्या वर राहणारे डुक्कर का?
translated_text: Why do you mean a pig that lives on a stilt?
Justification: The word "डुक्कर" used insultingly expresses disgust.

Text: उगाच ज्योतिष्यांची नालस्ती, ती पण सरसकट सर्व ज्योतिषांची
translated_text: The contempt for astrologers is just that, for all astrologers in general.
Justification: The word "नालस्ती" used matter-of-factly — neutral.

Text: हो पण सिक्वेन्स चुकवलीस ना वेड्या.
translated_text: Yes, but you missed the sequence, aren't you crazy.
Justification: The phrase "सिक्वेन्स चुकवलीस" suggests surprise at error — surprise.

Text: हिंदुत्व साठी तुमच नक्की काय योगदान आहें हे एकधा महाराष्ट्र च्या जनतेला कळु ड्या.
translated_text: Let the people of Maharashtra know exactly what your contribution is to Hindutva.
Justification: Questioning tone without emotional force — neutral.

Text: याने काही चुकीचे काम केले असेल
translated_text: He must have done something wrong.
Justification: Hypothetical and neutral.

Text: त्यांना अटक झाली पाहिजे ... म्हणजे पुढे असे कोणी कृत्य करणार नाही
translated_text: They should be arrested... so that no one will do such a thing in the future.
Justification: Phrase "अटक झाली पाहिजे" reflects strong punitive intent, showing anger.

Text: इथं संपत नाही
translated_text: It doesn't end here.
Justification: General declarative sentence — neutral.

Text: कंटाळा आलाय राव ह्या गद्दारी शब्दाचा, त्याने पक्ष वाढणार नाय, बोट बुडते ती वाचवा
translated_text: I'm tired of this traitorous word Rao, it won't grow the party, save the boat that's sinking
Justification: "कंटाळा आलाय" and "गद्दारी" imply irritation — anger.

Text: लायकी नसताना उगाच जास्ती बोलू नये. आपल्या बद्दल लोक असे बोलू शकतात
translated_text: Don't talk too much when you don't have the right to. People can say things like this about you.
Justification: The phrase "लायकी नसताना" conveys frustration and judgment — anger.

Text: हे तूम्ही सांगताय, तुम्हाला जनता जागा दाखविण्यासाठी वाट पाहत आहे
translated_text: You are saying this too, the people are waiting for you to show them the place.
Justification: Phrase "जनता जागा दाखविण्यासाठी वाट पाहत आहे" is expectant but calm — neutral.

Text: तू ठाकरेच्या घरात धुणीभांडी करतोस आणि तू इतरांना भक्त म्हणतोस.
translated_text: You wash dishes in Thackeray's house and you call others devotees.
Justification: The insult is mocking but presented flatly — neutral.

Text: अंधभक्त चाटायची आणी रोज नवीन कोणाला तरी उरावर घ्याची काम करतात
translated_text: They work to lick the blind devotees and take on someone new every day.
Justification: The metaphorical language like "उरावर घेणं" is sarcastic, not intense — neutral.

Text: ही तीच लोक आहेत जी बापाने वाढवून मोठं केलं आणी त्यालाच विचारणार तु कोण?
translated_text: These are the same people that my father raised and raised, and who are you to ask him?
Justification: Personal betrayal implied, but tone remains explanatory — neutral.

Text: भाजपच्या कोणत्याच खासदार आमदाराची व नेत्यांची कधीच चौकशी होत नाही!
translated_text: No BJP MP, MLA or leader is ever questioned!
Justification: The exclamation and focus on "कधीच चौकशी होत नाही" convey injustice and anger.

Text: : तरुणही पडत आहेत हार्ट अटॅकचे बळी, अशी घ्या हृदयाची काळजी
translated_text: : Young people are also falling victim to heart attacks, take care of your heart like this
Justification: Concern for youth and use of "बळी" evokes sadness.

Text: गुजरातपासून मुंबई वाचली हा राग अजूनही कायम आहे...
translated_text: The anger that Mumbai was spared from Gujarat still persists...
Justification: The word "राग" directly reflects lingering anger.

Text: हा रस्ता गेले तीन वर्षे भिकार आहे
translated_text: This road has been deserted for the past three years.
Justification: Descriptive phrase "भिकार आहे" expresses dissatisfaction — neutral.

Text: " तुम्ही जाहिराती का करतात ? "
translated_text: Why do you advertise?
Justification: Simple question — neutral.

Text: मी महान लेखक समजत होतो पण हा तर करामती काकाचा सतरंजी उचल्या निघाला
translated_text: I thought I was a great writer, but this guy turned out to be Karamati Kaka's chess master.
Justification: The twist with "करामती काका" adds surprise.

Text: दावे दाखल करून सुध्दा पाहणी करायला येत नाहीत
translated_text: Even after filing claims, they don't come to inspect.
Justification: Complaint stated plainly — neutral.

Text: तुमच्या कडे आलेले ते मूर्ख आहेत
translated_text: Those who come to you are fools.
Justification: Direct insult "मूर्ख" indicates disgust.

Text: संभाजीनगर म्हणायला लाज वाटते का रे चाटू?
translated_text: Are you ashamed to say Sambhajinagar, Chatu?
Justification: The insult "चाटू" and accusation of shame imply disgust.

Text: संघर्ष ऐवजी लाचारी असे वाचावे.
translated_text: It should be read as helplessness instead of struggle.
Justification: Comparative interpretation — neutral.

Text: हे न्यायालय काही न्याय देणार नाही असं वाटतंय जनताच न्याय देईल उध्दवसाहेबांना
translated_text: I feel like this court will not give any justice, the people will give justice to Uddhav Saheb.
Justification: The phrase "न्याय देणार नाही" shows distrust — anger.

Text: ऍडझ.. रस्ता ची काम करा आधी, कुत्र्यागत इथं कशाला भूकंतो
translated_text: Adj.. Do the road work first, why are you hungry here in the dog park?
Justification: Sarcastic metaphor "कुत्र्यागत" but spoken flatly — neutral.

Text: क्रेडिट आदित्य ठाकरे ला गेलं असतं ना.... म्हणून ही अजून एक नीच राजनीती.
translated_text: The credit should have gone to Aditya Thackeray.... So this is yet another vile politics.
Justification: "नीच राजनीती" explicitly conveys disgust.

Text: तुमच्या सारख्या मुळे मनसे मागे आहे कुठे ही काही अर्थ लावून खुश होता
translated_text: It was with people like you that MNS was behind, and they were happy to interpret it in some way.
Justification: Sarcastic but subdued — neutral.

Text: झोपायच्या अगोदर रूपया पाकिटतला बघा आहे का ची ऐतिहासिक घसरण
translated_text: Before going to bed, do you see the historical decline in the rupee in your wallet?
Justification: Informative tone — neutral.

Text: कोन आहे हा भामटा कच्ची बदाम........
translated_text: Who is this stupid raw almond?
Justification: The unusual phrasing "कच्ची बदाम" evokes surprise.

Text: एवढं पण जळू नये.... लोकांचं प्रेम आहे उद्धवजीवर...
translated_text: It shouldn't be this hot.... People love Uddhavji...
Justification: Tone "जळू नये" is conciliatory — neutral

Text: मंदसैनिक पण भक्तांच्या बरोबरीला च आले आणि उन्माद माजला
translated_text: The slow soldiers also joined the devotees and a frenzy ensued.
Justification: The phrase "उन्माद माजला" suggests chaos but is used neutrally in context.

Text: घटस्फोट होण्याचं मुख्य कारण म्हणजे नमतं () कोणी घ्यायचं ? मी का तू ?
translated_text: The main reason for divorce is who should take the bow? Me or you?
Justification: The rhetorical structure raises a point without emotional bias — neutral.

Text: हा कोण विचारणारा ?
translated_text: Who is this questioner?
Justification: Phrase "हा कोण" signals surprise at an unexpected person speaking.

Text: अर्जुनच्या वडिलांना होणार त्रास.. 'अप्पी आमची कलेक्टर' आज. संध्या. वा.
translated_text: Arjun's father will be in trouble.. 'Appi our collector' today. Evening. Wa.
Justification: The report structure is factual — neutral.

Text: शरद सर, कडू ही शिवी आहे हा.. सांभाळून
translated_text: Sharad Sir, this is a bitter insult.. Take care.
Justification: The word "शिवी" and warning tone reflect anger.

Text: स्मरणशक्ती पैसे कमवण्यासाठी आणि विस्मरण उधाऱ्या बुडलेल्या विसरण्यासाठी
translated_text: Memory is for making money and oblivion is for forgetting the drowned.
Justification: Philosophical statement, no strong emotion — neutral.

translated_text: He .... She .... He .... Then .... She .... will be in the bucket.
Justification: Absurd phrasing is ambiguous but not emotionally loaded — neutral.

Text: गद्दारांना हिसका दाखवण्यासाठी...आमच्याकडे आहे धगधगती मशाल.
translated_text: To show the traitors a show of force...we have a blazing torch.
Justification: Phrase "धगधगती मशाल" evokes pride and readiness — joy.

Text: योग्य बोलले. हे ठाकरे नुसतेच बुडबुडे आणि भित्रे आहेत. राणेंनी बरोबर ओळखले आहे.
translated_text: Rightly said. These Thackerays are just fools and cowards. Rane has identified them correctly.
Justification: Despite harsh words, the tone is evaluative — neutral.

Text: माढ्यातुन कुणी पळ काढला होता चव्हाण?
translated_text: Who had escaped from Madha, Chavan?
Justification: The question "पळ काढला" implies unexpected action — surprise.

Text: भरभरून देण्यासाठी काँग्रेस ही गांधी घराण्याची खाजगी मालमत्ता आहे का?
translated_text: Is Congress a private property of the Gandhi family to be given away?
Justification: Critical rhetoric, but presented as a question — neutral.

Text: खासदारकी पुढे याची प्रायोरिटी अतीसामान्यच ना तै!
translated_text: Isn't this a very unusual priority for an MP?
Justification: "अतीसामान्य" implies shock — surprise.

Text: अवघड आहे सर्व
translated_text: Everything is difficult.
Justification: Statement of challenge — neutral.

Text: कुत्रकार चॅनल ला हे ट्विट टीव्ही वर दाखवायची हिंमत नाही
translated_text: Kutrakar Channel doesn't have the courage to show this tweet on TV.
Justification: Accusation of cowardice, but low emotional weight — neutral.

Text: नाच्या बोलायचं होत तर भास्कर शेट कशाला बोलेले.... तुम्हाला कळत नाही काय बोलायचं.. ते
translated_text: If you wanted to talk about dance, why did Bhaskar Shet talk.... You don't know what to say.. that
Justification: Tone of confusion and reprimand — neutral.

Text: खरच रिकामे आहेत हे मंद
translated_text: These are really empty.
Justification: Dismissive but flat in tone — neutral.

Text: पण त्यांनी फडणवीसकाका आणि अमृताकाकूंची पुण्याच्या पावसावरुन मस्त चंपी केली आहे.
translated_text: But they have made a great impression on Fadnavis Kaka and Amrut Kaku in the Pune rains.
Justification: Light sarcasm, no emotion — neutral.

Text: : सासऱ्याने पोलिसात दिलेल्या तक्रारीवरून गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: : A case has been registered based on a complaint filed by the father-in-law with the police.
Justification: News-like neutral reporting.

Text: सदोतीस वर्षात शंभर पटिने कीमती वाढल्या की वाढवल्या हा मुळ प्रश्न आहे
translated_text: The fundamental question is whether it has increased in value by a hundredfold in thirty-two years or not.
Justification: Analytical phrasing — neutral.

Text: अतिवृष्टीने खचला शेतकरी! जिल्ह्यात दोन शेतकऱ्यांनी मृत्यूला कवटाळले; सरकारला लाज नाही...
translated_text: Farmers devastated by heavy rain! Two farmers in the district died; The government has no shame...
Justification: Words "मृत्यूला कवटाळले" clearly evoke grief — sadness.

Text: अभिव्यक्ती स्वतंत्र म्हणजे मोतीचे गुणगान गाणे
translated_text: Freedom of expression means singing the praises of pearls.
Justification: Irony used subtly — neutral.

Text: तुम्ही आणि तुमचा बाप पण मंदच आहात
translated_text: You and your father are both stupid.
Justification: The insult "मंदच" directed at family conveys disgust.

Text: नानाला उगाच मोठा करत आहे फडणवीस. त्याला त्याच्या प्रांतात राहु द्यावे. इथे त्याचा उपयोग शून्य.
translated_text: Fadnavis is making Nana look big. Let him stay in his own province. He is of zero use here.
Justification: Dismissal of political worth — neutral.

Text: कुत्रा इमानदार असतो... तुम्हाला सरडा हे चिन्ह दिले पाहिजे.
translated_text: The dog is honest... you should be given the sign of the lizard.
Justification: The comparison "सरडा" (lizard) signals contempt — disgust.

Text: केक उचले आता हेही धंदे करणार?
translated_text: Will you do business after picking up the cake?
Justification: The rhetorical "धंदे करणार" conveys skepticism, but stays neutral in tone.

Text: विषय आहे का?? नक्कीच वाढली कारण महाराष्ट्राला गद्दारी आवडत नाही..
translated_text: Is there a topic?? It definitely increased because Maharashtra does not like betrayal..
Justification: The phrase "गद्दारी आवडत नाही" explains motive but does not show strong affect — neutral.

Text: कारवाई लांब पण रिप्लाय सुद्धा दिला नाही त्यांनी.
translated_text: They took the action but didn't even reply.
Justification: Descriptive tone using "रिप्लाय सुद्धा दिला नाही" — neutral.

Text: आईला पण 'जय महाराष्ट्र'!? अवघडच आहे ब्वा!
translated_text: Even the mother says 'Jai Maharashtra'!? It's difficult, bro!
Justification: The exclamatory "अवघडच आहे ब्वा" expresses astonishment — surprise.

Text: संघोटे कमी पडले म्हणून तुम्हाला गद्दारनाथ चिंदीची गरज पडली……
translated_text: You needed Gaddarnath Chindi because the Sanghotes were lacking…
Justification: Sarcastic mention of "गद्दारनाथ चिंदी", but the tone stays flat — neutral.

Text: टाकले गट टोमणे मारायचा सराव करत आहे का?
translated_text: Is the group practicing taunting?
Justification: The question tone using "टोमणे मारायचा" stays non-emotional — neutral.

Text: वाईट वाटल मोदिजी चा मान हरपला म्हणुन
translated_text: I felt bad because Modiji lost his respect.
Justification: The word "वाईट वाटल" signals disappointment — sadness.

Text: तरीपण ठाकरे गटाला दक्का अशी बातमी येईल
translated_text: However, the Thackeray group will get a shock from the news.
Justification: "दक्का" implies reaction, but context keeps it neutral.

Text: इतके दिवस अशी घाण पक्षात का होती यांच्या
translated_text: Why was there such filth in the party for so long?
Justification: The word "घाण" directly expresses disgust.

Text: ही निव्वळ पळवाट आहे अध्यक्ष महोदय
translated_text: This is just a loophole, Mr. President.
Justification: Use of "पळवाट" indicates criticism but remains factual — neutral.

Text: ही कोणती भाषा? काहीच समजले नाही.
translated_text: What language is this? I don't understand anything.
Justification: "काहीच समजले नाही" expresses confusion — surprise.

Text: तू भाजपचा चोंबडा आहे का?
translated_text: Are you a BJP fan?
Justification: Use of "चोंबडा" is informal, but no intense affect — neutral.

Text: आता का नाही गुजरातमध्ये महाराष्ट्रातील उद्योग धंदे जाणार....!
translated_text: Why won't industries from Maharashtra go to Gujarat now?...!
Justification: The rhetorical question with "जाणार....!" suggests surprise.

Text: हा कपटी पाताळयंत्री माणूस काही ही करू शकतो
translated_text: This insidious underworld man can do anything.
Justification: "कपटी पाताळयंत्री" is critical but does not evoke emotion — neutral.

Text: तरी या घरकोंबड्याला अक्कल येत नाही, अख्खा पक्ष फुटला तरी हा मुख्यमंत्रीपदासाठी म्हाताऱ्याला चिकटून आहे
translated_text: Yet this old man has no sense, even if the entire party splits, he is clinging to the old man for the Chief Minister's post.
Justification: Words like "घरकोंबड्याला" and "चिकटून आहे" indicate contempt — disgust.

Text: अजुन नाही बदल ले , हे तर लांब ची गोष्ट आहे।
translated_text: It hasn't changed yet, it's a long story.
Justification: Resigned tone, no affective intensity — neutral.

Text: महाराजांसोबत ज्या नालय*काचा फोटो लावलास तो काढ आधी..लायकी आहे का त्याची.
translated_text: First remove the photo of the actress you posted with Maharaj. Is it worthy?
Justification: Use of "लायकी" is judgmental, but not emotionally charged — neutral.

Text: बाळा साहेबांचा नाव व फोटो शिवाय तुमचा काही खर नाही
translated_text: You have nothing real except Bala Saheb's name and photo.
Justification: Phrase "काही खर नाही" is dismissive — neutral.

Text: अर्ज भरायचा आधी अक्कल काय सुरत गुवाहाटी आणि गोवाला फिरायला गेलेली का

Text: तु काय बघायला गेली होती का. का फोडलेले मोजायला
translated_text: What did you go to see? Why count the broken ones?
Justification: "फोडलेले मोजायला" is rhetorical and surprising — surprise.

Text: हे अगदी बरोबर आहे.पराभवाची नांदी सुरू झाली आहे आता भाजप ची.
translated_text: This is absolutely correct. The BJP is now on the verge of defeat.
Justification: "पराभवाची नांदी" shows analysis, not emotion — neutral.

Text: आणि ज्याने कुणी चुकीचे लिखाण केलं त्याचं निषेध आहे
translated_text: And whoever wrote it wrong is condemned.
Justification: The word "निषेध" shows criticism, not strong emotion — neutral.

Text: मध्ये खूप प्रयत्न झाला होता. तेव्हा फाट्यावर मारलं होत.
translated_text: There was a lot of effort put into it. Then it hit a dead end.
Justification: "फाट्यावर मारलं" is dismissive but not emotionally high — neutral.

Text: यांचं लवकर ऐकून वर्ष निघून जातो.. लवकर काय होत नाही
translated_text: The year passes quickly by listening to this.. What doesn't happen quickly?
Justification: The ironic tone shows surprise — surprise.

Text: शिल्लक सेना काय म्हणणार निवडणुकीत की बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायच आहे. विचित्रच आहे सगळं प्रकरण
translated_text: What will the remaining army say in the elections that Balasaheb's Shiv Sena is bound to be defeated? The whole matter is strange.
Justification: "विचित्रच आहे" frames it as odd, but not emotional — neutral.

Text: उपयोग नाही..भरपूर उशीर झाला आहे.. नियंत्रणाच्या बाहेर तयार झालेत ह्यांच्या शरीरात
translated_text: It's no use..it's too late..they've grown out of control in their bodies.
Justification: The phrase "उपयोग नाही" and "उशीर झाला" indicate regret — sadness.

Text: दुर्दैव आहे मराठी लोकांचे आणि महाराष्ट्राचे
translated_text: It is unfortunate for the Marathi people and Maharashtra.
Justification: The word "दुर्दैव" directly signals sadness — sadness.

Text: मुरजी पटेल चा फॉर्म भरायला कोंबडी चोराचं कार्ट गेलं तिथंच पनवती लागली होती..
translated_text: Panwati had started right where the chicken thief's cart went to fill out Murji Patel's form.
Justification: Satirical phrase "कोंबडी चोराचं कार्ट" is colorful but steady — neutral.

Text: हा काही शांत बसणार नाही. काड्या तर करणारच...
translated_text: This guy won't sit still. He'll do the same...
Justification: The phrase "काड्या तर करणारच" (he’ll definitely stir trouble) indicates deliberate provocation, evoking disgust.

Text: आमदार ,खासदार पळवणारी टोळी सक्रिय आहे हे मात्र खरे आहे
translated_text: It is true that the gang that kidnaps MLAs and MPs is active.
Justification: The sentence states a fact without emotional tone, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरें याच्या अहंकारामुळेच निवडणूक बिनविरोध होणार नाही असे वाटते
translated_text: I think the election will not be held unopposed because of Uddhav Thackeray's arrogance.
Justification: The word "अहंकारामुळेच" (because of ego) attributes blame but maintains a neutral explanatory tone.

Text: असे येडझवे प्रवक्ते लाभले
translated_text: Such Yedzwe spokespeople were obtained
Justification: The comment uses a sarcastic descriptor "येडझवे" (crazy), but the tone stays observational.

Text: पोटातून निघाला चक्क स्टीलचा ग्लास, पण हा ग्लास पोटात गेला कसा?
translated_text: A glass of steel came out of the stomach, but how did this glass get into the stomach?
Justification: The phrase "पण हा ग्लास पोटात गेला कसा?" expresses astonishment at an unusual situation.

Text: जिंदगी भर इफ्तार पार्ट्या केल्या, विनाश जवळ आला तर हिंदूची किंमत कळत आहे.
translated_text: Iftar parties are held throughout one's life, then one realizes the value of a Hindu when destruction approaches.
Justification: The line reflects ideological opinion without emotional extremity, so remains neutral.

Text: नाना ने 'स्क्रिप्टेड' काही विचारले नाही म्हणून बावचळला काय रे चाय बिस्कुट
translated_text: Nana didn't ask for anything 'scripted' so why did he get upset, Chai Biscuit?
Justification: The casual tone and phrase "बावचळला काय" keeps it light and neutral.

Text: झाकणझुल्याचा निकटवर्तीय पण घोटाळेबाज निघाला...!
translated_text: A close associate of the hoodlum turned out to be a fraudster...!
Justification: The use of "घोटाळेबाज" (fraudster) conveys strong disapproval, evoking anger.

Text: आता बाहेर पडायलाच पाहिजे यांची लायकी यांना दाखवावी लागेल..
translated_text: Now they have to come out and show their worth.
Justification: The demand to prove "लायकी" (worthiness) is assertive but emotionally flat.

Text: चांगली असावी लागते, दुर्दैवाने अंधभक्तांची जात खराब आहे.
translated_text: It has to be good, unfortunately the caste of blind devotees is bad.
Justification: The phrase critiques indirectly but remains mostly descriptive and neutral.

Text: नाही...असाही अर्थ होत नाही पूर्णपणे
translated_text: No...that doesn't make sense at all.
Justification: The dismissive tone of "असाही अर्थ होत नाही" signals displeasure, aligned with disgust.

Text: दुःखद बातमी - अत्यंत गुणी आणि विनोदी अभिनेता प्रदीप पटवर्धन यांना भावपुर्ण श्रद्धांजली......
translated_text: Sad news - Heartfelt tribute to the very talented and humorous actor Pradeep Patwardhan......
Justification: The phrase "दुःखद बातमी" (sad news) and "श्रद्धांजली" (tribute) expresses sorrow.

Text: हे जरा अतिच होते....
translated_text: This was a bit too much....
Justification: The expression "जरा अतिच होते" implies emotional overload, indicating sadness.

Text: आता कंटाळा आला
translated_text: Bored now.
Justification: The phrase "कंटाळा आला" (bored) is emotionally flat and fits neutral sentiment.

Text: सगळ्या ला माहिती बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना कुठे ती तुझ्या सारख्या अंधभक्त सोडून
translated_text: Everyone knows where Balasaheb's Shiv Sena is, leaving behind blind devotees like you.
Justification: Despite "अंधभक्त", the sentence conveys an opinion rather than emotion.

Text: न्याय दैवते वर विश्वास हा आमचा कायम आहे, पण न्याय देवतेला चालवणाऱ्यांवर नाही
translated_text: Our faith in the God of Justice remains, but not in those who exercise that God of Justice.
Justification: Contrasts belief and skepticism, but in a neutral, reasoned tone.

Text: तुमचं पोट का दुखतं धोती योग घ्या
translated_text: Why does your stomach hurt? Do Dhoti Yoga.
Justification: The sarcastic "धोती योग" retains a humorous but non-emotive tone.

Text: एक वैफल्यग्रस्त शेणकिडा गाण म्हणत होता ऊद्धवा कोणता झेंडा घेऊ हाती
translated_text: A frustrated dung beetle was singing a song, "Uddhav, which flag should I take?"
Justification: The insult "वैफल्यग्रस्त शेणकिडा" shows contempt and anger.

Text: मध्ये तुम्ही पूर्तता करून घ्यायची होती. ह्या सरकारचा काय भरवसा नाही.
translated_text: You were supposed to fulfill it in . What is this government not trustworthy?
Justification: The dismissive "भरवसा नाही" (not trustworthy) carries an accusatory tone.

Text: पब्लिक बोलते ग्रामीण विकास होत नाही
translated_text: Public speaking, rural development is not happening.
Justification: Simple observation without emotional expression.

Text: वन्यप्राण्यांच्या हल्ल्यांमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची भरपाई दिवाळीपूर्वी देण्यात यावी – वन मंत्री सुधीर मुनगंटीवार
translated_text: Compensation for damage caused by wild animal attacks should be given before Diwali – Forest Minister Sudhir Mungantiwar
Justification: The line is factual and recommendation-based.

Text: बापाच्या जीवावर निवडून येणारे तुम्ही , तुझी लायकी आहे का एका अधिकाऱ्याबाबत असं बोलायची
translated_text: You, who were elected at the cost of your father's life, do you have the right to speak like this about an officer?
Justification: The phrases "बापाच्या जीवावर" and "तुझी लायकी आहे का" are scathing, evoking anger.

Text: रिकाम्या खुर्च्या असताना भाषण चालतात मग पटसंख्या कमी असल्यास शाळा बंद का
translated_text: Speeches are held when there are empty chairs, so why is the school closed if the attendance is low?
Justification: Logical critique without emotional intensity.

Text: सलाम तुमच्या लॉजिक ला किडनी अटॅक आला
translated_text: Hello, your logic has a kidney attack.
Justification: Sarcastic but comical without emotional depth.

Text: राज्याचे मुख्यमंत्री, उपमुख्यमंत्री, गृहमंत्री काय (गवत)उपटत आहेत का?
translated_text: What are the Chief Minister, Deputy Chief Minister, and Home Minister of the state uprooting?
Justification: Sarcastic query lacking overt emotion.

Text: जर भ्रष्टाचार ही समाजाला लागलेली कीड आहे तर मग तुम्ही काय करत आहात?
translated_text: If corruption is a plague on society, then what are you doing?
Justification: The phrase "समाजाला लागलेली कीड" reflects frustration and disgust toward inaction.

Text: शेवटी इकडेच घसरलात, तिकडे बोलायची हिम्मत नाही. सत्ता असूनही इतकी घबराहाट का
translated_text: Finally, you have fallen here, you don't have the courage to speak up. Why are you so nervous despite being in power?
Justification: The line critiques with sarcasm but remains even-toned.

Text: हा ट्वीट पण बावनकुलेनी आगोदर ट्वीट केला होता आणि तुमी है कॉपी केला
translated_text: This tweet was also tweeted by Bawankule earlier and Tumi Hai copied it.
Justification: The phrase "कॉपी केला" suggests imitation but does not evoke a strong emotional reaction.

Text: "परंतु आता ती दुकानं बंद झाली" काहीही हं
translated_text: "But now those shops are closed" Whatever.
Justification: The phrase "काहीही हं" is dismissive but maintains a neutral tone.

Text: कोणी ही सीरियस घेत नाही राज ला। आहे सगळे।
translated_text: No one takes this seriously, Raj. That's all.
Justification: The statement reflects disregard and the phrase "कोणी ही सीरियस घेत नाही" conveys disdain, aligning with disgust.

Text: हा भ्रम आहे, काँग्रेस ही गांधी घराण्याची डीम कंपनी आहे.
translated_text: This is an illusion, Congress is a puppet company of the Gandhi family.
Justification: Although critical, the phrase "डीम कंपनी" is more ideological than emotional, thus neutral.

Text: कमी फेका जरा जणा नाही तर मनाची ची तरी लाज बाळगा मिंधे गट सेना
translated_text: Throw less, if not a little, then at least be ashamed of your mind, you big army.
Justification: The line contains sarcasm but no strong emotional cue beyond commentary.

Text: शास्वत काम नाही फक्त दिखावा करायचा
translated_text: No permanent work, just to show off.
Justification: The tone is critical but lacks emotional intensity, keeping it neutral.

Text: देशविघातक कारवायांसाठी कट रचल्याचा आरोप पीएफआयवर करण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: PFI has been accused of conspiring to carry out anti-national activities.
Justification: It's a factual allegation without overt emotion, staying neutral.

Text: खरच बारामती हातातुन जात आहे , हे कळले बहुतेक.
translated_text: It was clear to most that Baramati was really slipping away.
Justification: Reflects resignation or realization without emotional charge.

Text: हिच तुमची मानसिकता आहे... त्यामुळेच ही वेळ आली
translated_text: This is your mindset... that's why this time has come.
Justification: The tone is judgmental but not emotionally intense.

Text: वाकला नाही का भ$व्या
translated_text: Didn't you bow, Bha$vya?
Justification: Uses sarcasm, but lacks clear emotional direction.

Text: त्यांच्या कुटुंबीयांना या दुःखातून सावरण्याची शक्ती मिळो, हीच प्रार्थना! स्व. नरेंद्रजी अग्रवाल यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली!
translated_text: May his family find the strength to overcome this grief, this is our prayer! Heartfelt tribute to the late Narendraji Agarwal!
Justification: Despite being about grief, the positive prayer tone and "भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली" frame it under solemn positivity.

Text: अरे बाबा,ती मशाल नाही....तेल गेलं तुप गेलं आणि हाती धुपाटणं आलं.... उध्वस्त ठाकरे.
translated_text: Oh father, that's not a torch....the oil is gone, the ghee is gone and the incense burner is in my hand.... Thackeray is devastated.
Justification: The metaphor "धुपाटणं आलं" implies failure or emptiness, evoking sadness.

Text: सगळ्या जगाला कळाले पन एकेकाळातल्या मित्रा कळले नाही खरच अहंकार माणसाला आंधळा बनोतो
translated_text: The whole world knows, but my former friend doesn't know. True ego makes a person blind.
Justification: Philosophical in tone without specific emotion.

Text: वाजपेयी साहेबांचा खुपखुप आदरच आहे..पण ह्या असल्या ट्विट्सचा (आणि अशा भाषेचा) उबग आलाय..
translated_text: I have a lot of respect for Vajpayee Saheb..but these kinds of tweets (and such language) have become annoying..
Justification: The term "उबग आलाय" (fed up) clearly reflects disgust.

Text: छत्रपतींच्या सुरत लुटीचा राग अजूनही काळ्या टोपी वाल्यांना आहे.
translated_text: Those wearing black hats still hold grudges against Chhatrapati's loot.
Justification: The historical grievance and "राग" (anger) evoke strong emotion.

Text: अहो साहेब रॉयल्टी काय मागता डायरेक्ट त्याच्यावर अन् निवडणूक आयोग वर केस करून टाका
translated_text: Hey sir, why are you asking for royalties? File a case against him directly and the Election Commission.
Justification: The aggressive directive tone carries anger.

Text: उधोजी च स्वतः एक माकड झालेले आहेत
translated_text: The entrepreneur himself has become a monkey.
Justification: Although insulting, it is stated in a flat tone.

Text: तुमची एकहाती सत्ता येईल या भ्रमातून कधी बाहेर पडणार
translated_text: When will you come out of the illusion that you will come to power unilaterally?
Justification: Criticism is implied but the tone is neutral.

Text: नाही एकल्या ,हे सर्व नाटक अगोदर सुद्धा झाले आहे.
translated_text: No, not alone, all this drama has happened before.
Justification: The comment uses sarcasm but maintains neutrality.

Text: आज लंबू चा बर्थडे आहे,म्हणे
translated_text: Today is Lambu's birthday, so...
Justification: Casual remark without emotional expression.

Text: त्यांनी लिहिलं हि असत पण पगार पैश्याच्या वर मिळत नाही त्यामुळं तूर्तास...
translated_text: They would have written this, but the salary is not on top of the money, so for now...
Justification: Explains a situation without emotion.

Text: आता अजून वर्षे तरी काम सुरू होत नाही.....
translated_text: Work hasn't started for years now...
Justification: Expresses delay and disappointment, but tone is flat.

Text: का जी बाप्पा, परतेक येळी माझी पंचायत करता जी
translated_text: Why Bappa, do you do my panchayat again and again
Justification: The tone "माझी पंचायत करता जी" (you humiliate me) reflects frustration and anger.

Text: जसे भाजप विरोधात सर्व पाकीट पत्रकार एकत्र आले आहेत तसेच ना
translated_text: Just as all pocket journalists have come together against BJP,
Justification: Observational with no emotional signal.

Text: चिन्ह न मिळण हे एक बरबादीच चिन्ह आहे. चोर, गद्दार, फितूर, खोके.. जय महाराष्ट्र..
translated_text: Not getting a sign is a sign of ruin. Thieves, traitors, cheaters, thieves.. Hail Maharashtra..
Justification: The repeated use of "चोर, गद्दार, फितूर" implies contempt and revulsion, triggering disgust.

Text: टाचण्या नाही सुई लागली होती कोल्हापूर त अंधेरी त माहित नाही
translated_text: There was no needle to stitch, I don't know whether it was Kolhapur or Andheri.
Justification: The phrase simply expresses confusion or lack of clarity, without emotional weight.

Text: गुरखा आणी इमानदार हे समीकरण मनःपटलावर कायम होतं..! आज तुटलं थापा निलेसचे पप्पा
translated_text: The equation of Gurkha and honesty was always on my mind..! Today, Niles' father broke his silence.
Justification: The broken trust in the word "तुटलं" with reference to honesty reflects anger.

Text: उद्धवचे आता आईस्क्रीम खायचे दिवसच आले आहेत........
translated_text: Uddhav's days of eating ice cream have come........
Justification: A sarcastic but passive statement, neutral in emotional tone.

Text: मशालीची धग जाणवली, धनुष्यबाण चिन्ह गोठवण्याचे नीच काम केले आता भोगा कर्माची फळ.
translated_text: I felt the smoke of the torch, I did the vile work of freezing the bow and arrow, now I enjoy the fruits of my actions.
Justification: The phrase "नीच काम" strongly conveys a sense of moral repulsion.

Text: लै विदारक हालत सुरू आहे बळीराज्याची
translated_text: The state of Bali is in a state of disintegration.
Justification: The word "विदारक" suggests a painful, dismal condition, evoking sadness.

Text: स्टंप माइकजवळ शिव्या देणं कर्णधाराला पडलं भारी, आता होऊ शकतो टी- वर्ल्डकपमधून बाहेर!
translated_text: The captain was caught swearing at the stump mic, now he could be out of the T-World Cup!
Justification: The reprimand for swearing and facing consequences implies frustration or anger.

Text: सुद्धा??? न्हणज् तू आहे हे मान्य आहे चित्या भक्त
translated_text: Even??? I agree that you are a devotee of Chitya.
Justification: The interrogative and exclamatory tone conveys a surprised reaction.

Text: अहो राजकारण असेच असते...परंपरा आहे राजकारण्यांची.. पडद्यामागचे..मागून खंजीर..वगैरे गोष्टी गौण आहेत
translated_text: Hey, politics is like this...it's the tradition of politicians..behind the scenes..daggers in the back..etc. are secondary.
Justification: A resigned, analytical tone without strong emotional direction.

Text: हे सरकार हांडगे आहे म्हणून या देशात हे सर्व चालू आहे
translated_text: This government is corrupt, that's why all this is happening in this country.
Justification: The word "हांडगे" (crooked/corrupt) signals contempt and disgust.

Text: काम करतात तर कशाला त्यांचा विरोध करतोस
translated_text: If they work, why are you opposing them?
Justification: The rhetorical nature implies mild judgment but remains emotionally neutral.

Text: मग देगलूर, पंढरपूर, कोल्हापूर हे महाराष्ट्रा बाहेर आहेत का?
translated_text: So are Degalur, Pandharpur, and Kolhapur outside Maharashtra?
Justification: Sarcasm is implied but without emotional escalation.

Text: तुला काही त्रास होत आहे का माणसच आहेत ना ती
translated_text: Are you having any trouble? Are you human?
Justification: A questioning tone about human compassion, but overall neutral.

Text: हरणार हे दिसायला लागले की सहानुभूती मिळवण्यासाठी प्रयत्न दिसतोय
translated_text: It seems like they are trying to gain sympathy when it seems like they are going to lose.
Justification: Observational and speculative without overt emotion.

Text: लोभ रहाणारच आणि व्रुद्धिंगत सुद्धा होणारच
translated_text: Greed will remain and will even increase.
Justification: Philosophical tone about human nature; no explicit emotional force.

Text: हे तर आक्रीतच म्हणायला हवे उध्दवने वाट लागणार याची आता आतला माणूस गमावला
translated_text: This should be said in a nutshell. Uddhav has now lost the inner man that he will wait for.
Justification: Melancholic yet reflective, more analytical than emotional.

Text: कुठल्या अँगलने हा घटनातज्ञ वाटतो
translated_text: From what angle does this seem like a phenomenologist?
Justification: Sarcastic question but with a flat tone.

Text: रिक्षा विदाउट मीटर चालतात हा अजुन एक उर्मठपना आहे पुण्याचा
translated_text: Rickshaws running without meters is still a problem in Pune.
Justification: Expresses civic frustration but not intense enough for emotion labeling.

Text: मराठीत माहिती द्या. हा महाराष्ट्र आहे उपी,बिहार नाही.
translated_text: Please provide information in Marathi. This is Maharashtra, not UP, Bihar.
Justification: Critical of language usage, but emotionally neutral.

Text: मुतरा सर्वात अगोदर फुटणार, नंतर वांगेवाली काकू श प गटाची अध्यक्ष होणार...!!
translated_text: The urine will be the first to burst, then the aunt of Vangewali will become the president of the ShP group...!!
Justification: The use of crude humor and mockery signals anger and disdain.

Text: हिंदू धर्मात किती मुनी होऊन गेले असती पण ह्या खोटारड्यासारखी सर कोणालाच येणार नाही
translated_text: There may have been many sages in Hinduism, but no one will ever be as wise as this liar.
Justification: The insult "खोटारड्या" (liar) and tone convey strong disgust.

Text: भयंकर खराब रस्ता होता जुन्या ब्रिज वर, आता वाहतूक हलती तरी राहील.
translated_text: The road on the old bridge was in terrible condition, but now traffic will continue to move.
Justification: Descriptive tone; dissatisfaction is implicit but not emotionally intense.

Text: असे खुप मिळतील तुम्हाला..
translated_text: You will get a lot of this..
Justification: A general remark, neutral in tone.

Text: “निवृत्तीची योजना बाहेर फुटणारच होती म्हणून घाईघाईने मी निवृत्ती जाहीर केली”, रॉजर फेडररचे विधान
translated_text: "I hastily announced my retirement because my retirement plan was about to fall apart", says Roger Federer
Justification: A tone of regret and disappointment from "घाईघाईने" and context of retirement.

Text: संस्कृती जपायची होती तर भालके ला का पडला भाऊ ?
translated_text: If the culture was to be preserved, why did Bhalke have to do it?
Justification: Rhetorical question with cultural critique, still emotionally neutral.

Text: जनतेला सर्व कही माहीत आहे आपण मुख्यमंत्री होण्यासाठी हे बंड केलात
translated_text: The people know everywhere that you staged this rebellion to become the Chief Minister.
Justification: The phrase "हे बंड केलात" implies manipulation and moral disgust.

Text: आगोदर आपल्याला अडाणी विषगुरू भेटले हे काय कमी आहे का
translated_text: Is it any less that we met a rustic poisoner before?
Justification: The phrase "अडाणी विषगुरू" reflects mockery and strong anger.

Text: मला हा राज ठाकरे कधी अवडलाच नाही सदैव द्विधा मनस्थिती
translated_text: I have never liked this Raj Thackeray, always in an ambivalent mood.
Justification: Expresses a personal opinion in a matter-of-fact tone without strong emotion.

Text: या भडव्या नालायकांचा निषेध भक्त कुठे मेले का बोलतील का यांच्यावर...
translated_text: Where will the devotees protest against these arrogant and worthless people? Why should they talk about their dead bodies?
Justification: Use of words like "भडव्या नालायकांचा" conveys strong contempt and revulsion.

Text: संसार जास्त दिवस टिकत नाही आता
translated_text: The world won't last much longer now.
Justification: A general observation lacking emotional intensity.

Text: तेल गेलं, तूप गेलं हाथी आला धोपटना
translated_text: The oil is gone, the ghee is gone, the elephant has come to Dhopatna.
Justification: A metaphorical phrase suggesting resignation or irony, with a flat emotional tone.

Text: मग खाज सुटली हे शब्द कसला माज आल्याचे लक्षण आहे
translated_text: Then the words "the itch is gone" are a sign of what kind of a problem it is.
Justification: The sentence critiques word choice but lacks strong emotion.

Text: म्हणजे तुझी पण लायकी नाही
translated_text: That means you don't deserve it either.
Justification: The phrase implies a tone of personal inadequacy or rejection, reflecting sadness.

Text: हे आहे स्वार्थीपणाचे अन् ढोंगीत्वाचे हिंदुत्व
translated_text: This is the Hindutva of selfishness and hypocrisy.
Justification: The word "ढोंगीत्वाचे" suggests strong disapproval and moral revulsion.

Text: ने निवडणूक आयोग विकत घेतलंय का?
translated_text: Has the Election Commission been bought?
Justification: A skeptical rhetorical question without overt emotional expression.

Text: देशाला लागलेली गोचीड आहे ही.
translated_text: This is a disaster for the country.
Justification: The metaphor "गोचीड" implies a parasitic burden, evoking despair.

Text: अरे येडी निवडणूक होणार आहे . अक्कल विकली का? उमेदवार आहेत अजून
translated_text: Oh, there is going to be another election. Have you sold your common sense? There are still candidates.
Justification: Sarcastic tone, but not strongly emotional.

Text: हे कोण सांगत आहे जे जिल्हा बँकेच्या निवडणुकीत पराभूत झालेत
translated_text: Who is saying this, those who lost in the district bank elections?
Justification: Implies incredulity at the speaker's authority, conveying surprise.

Text: घंटा भोदी इफेक्ट. या आधी ही बर्याच देशांनी खुप काही पर दिलेलं आहे.
translated_text: The bell-ringing effect. Many countries have given a lot of support before this.
Justification: Dismissive but not strongly emotional.

Text: अरे हा संदीप लाचार च आहे की..
translated_text: Oh, this Sandeep is so helpless..
Justification: The use of "लाचार" (helpless) implies an unexpectedly weak demeanor.

Text: काय हो,कमळीने मुका घ्यावा म्हणुन ऊठाबशा काढताय का? मराठी ( ? ) अर्णू.
translated_text: What, are you trying to make Kamali shut up? Marathi (?) Arnu.
Justification: Expresses incredulity at someone’s actions, reflecting surprise.

Text: तुमची भाषा बघितली आहे महाराष्ट्राच्या जनतेने त्यामुळे सल्ले देऊ नका
translated_text: The people of Maharashtra have seen your language, so don't give advice.
Justification: Assertive but emotionally neutral.

Text: भाजपा आणि गद्दारांच्या निचतेचा कळस. काय तर म्हणे लाच मागितल्याची कम्प्लेंट आहे.
translated_text: The culmination of the baseness of the BJP and traitors. What can I say, this is a complaint of asking for a bribe.
Justification: The word "निचतेचा कळस" criticizes moral quality, but does not carry overt emotional intensity.

Text: राहुल आमच्या पक्षात आहे का गोबर्भकत नित्याला कशाला पक्षात घेतल बेशरम
translated_text: Is Rahul in our party? Why would he shamelessly take Gobarbhakat Nitya into his party?
Justification: The questioning tone and use of "बेशरम" suggest a reaction of disbelief.

Text: अशाच लोकामुळे पक्ष चालतो! लोकशाही नाही!!
translated_text: It is because of such people that the party runs! It is not democracy!!
Justification: The exclamatory tone and contrast imply frustration and anger.

Text: फोटो पण ठेवा पण हार घालू नका गुडघ्यात मेंदूवाल्या पेंग्विनांनो?
translated_text: Keep the photo but don't wear the necklace, you penguins with brains in their knees?
Justification: The insult and imagery convey mocking and disgust.

Text: बोलायचं एक आणि करायचं...
translated_text: Talking is one thing, doing is another...
Justification: A generic observation with a reflective tone.

Text: हे असं म्हटल्यामुळे श्राद्ध घालायची वेळ आली.
translated_text: Having said this, it was time to perform Shraddha.
Justification: Sarcastic cultural reference without overt emotional context.

Text: अजून तुमचं सरकार पण अडकलेलं आहे. आणि गोत्यातच येणार अतुलजी.
translated_text: Your government is still stuck. And Atulji will come to the rescue.
Justification: The phrase "अडकलेलं आहे" and tone convey irritation and frustration.

Text: बैताड आहे का तो छोटा बेंडुक त्याची लायकी किती बोलतो किती...??
translated_text: Is that little banduk a scoundrel? How much does he talk about his worth?...??
Justification: The use of derogatory terms reflects disgust.

Text: हे तर पळपुटे निघाले
translated_text: This is a runaway.
Justification: Labeling someone a coward without emotional charge.

Text: तुम्ही राहता का पहिले पाहा या पदावर तुमचा पण पत्ता कट आहे
translated_text: First, see if you live there. Your address is also cut off in this position.
Justification: The statement is critical but emotionally flat.

Text: लोकशाही पध्दतीने निवडून आला आहे... बोटावर थूका लावून/पडद्याआडून/मागच्या दाराने/मतदान न घेता आलेला नाही.
translated_text: He was elected democratically... not by spitting on his finger/behind the scenes/through the back door/without a vote.
Justification: A defensive explanation, neutral in tone.

Text: पुण्यात रस्ते आहेत का...
translated_text: Are there roads in Pune...
Justification: A rhetorical civic complaint, but not strongly emotional.

Text: काका, पुतण्या ला तर बोलावलं सुद्धा नाही, म्हणून नातंवाची सुजली वाटतं
translated_text: Uncle and nephew weren't even invited, so the relationship feels strained.
Justification: The phrase "सुजली वाटतं" (feels strained) conveys a sense of emotional hurt, implying sadness.

Text: हम्म. अपूर्ण पण वाटतोय.
translated_text: Hmm. It seems incomplete.
Justification: The statement reflects a vague feeling without a strong emotion.

Text: मेहबूबा मुफ्ती सोबत युती करताना गाढव गवत खायला गेलं होतं का?
translated_text: Did the donkey go to eat grass while forming an alliance with Mehbooba Mufti?
Justification: The rhetorical question is sarcastic, but not emotionally charged enough to warrant a specific emotion.

Text: हा मूर्ख आहे कोण साहेब ची लाड चाटतो का
translated_text: This fool is the one who flatters the boss.
Justification: Use of "लाड चाटतो" conveys disdain and revulsion.

Text: अरे हा ब्रिजभुषन तोच ना जो ह्यांच्या साहेबाना घाबरवलं होतं?
translated_text: Oh, isn't this Brijbhushan the same one who scared his boss?
Justification: The question reflects a sense of unexpected realization.

Text: कंटाळा आला आता ब्लॉक करून
translated_text: I'm bored, now I'm blocking it.
Justification: Expresses fatigue without strong emotional charge.

Text: बंद करण्यात आलेली शाळा सुरू करण्यासाठी ‘दफ्तर घ्या, बकरी द्या’ असे आंदोलन
translated_text: ‘Take an office, give a goat’ movement to reopen closed schools
Justification: The phrase ridicules a corrupt system, showing disdain.

Text: आता घरी बसायचं किंवा रडत बसायचं किमान सहानुभूती मिळते का त्याची वाट पाहायची
translated_text: Now, should I sit at home or cry and wait to see if I get any sympathy?
Justification: The tone is cynical but emotionally flat.

Text: लयच गुंता आहे राव...
translated_text: The rhythm is complicated, Rao...
Justification: Reflects confusion or complexity without emotional tone.

Text: तू गुजराती आहे की भय्या.. संकरी जनावर
translated_text: Are you Gujarati or a Bhaiya.. you narrow-minded animal?
Justification: Insulting in nature, but lacks emotional specificity.

Text: महाशक्तीच्या आग ओकणाऱ्या सूर्याच्या जागी आता ईडीची टांगती तलवार आली..
translated_text: The fiery sun of superpower has now been replaced by the dangling sword of the ED.
Justification: Metaphorical observation without emotional heat.

Text: आणि मनासारखा नाही भेटला तर संसाराची 'माती' होते...
translated_text: And if you don't meet what you want, you become the 'soil' of the world...
Justification: Philosophical reflection without direct emotion.

Text: कॉंग्रेसचे नवे अध्यक्ष मल्लिकार्जुला आहे ‘हा’ आजार, होतात इतक्या वेदना की सर्जरीला नसतो पर्याय
translated_text: New Congress President Mallikarju has 'this' disease, causes so much pain that surgery is no option
Justification: Describes a condition factually without strong emotion.

Text: तुम्ही कोण आहात महाराष्ट्र ओळखत नाही तुम्ही काय सांगताय स्वीकारणार नाही ते
translated_text: Who are you? Maharashtra doesn't recognize you, I won't accept what you say.
Justification: The rhetorical question conveys surprise and rejection.

Text: यांचं हे वाक्य ऐकून नीरज चोप्रा घाबरला असेल. त्याचे करियर धोक्यात येणार आता.
translated_text: Neeraj Chopra must have been scared after hearing this sentence. His career will be in danger now.
Justification: Use of "धोक्यात" conveys a sense of fear and risk.

Text: पर्याय नाहीये, त्यांना टाळ्या सु्दधा मजबुरीने वाजवाव्या लागतात
translated_text: There is no choice, they have to clap even under compulsion.
Justification: Describes helplessness in a resigned tone.

Text: आला कुत्रा लायकी वर कळत नाही तर जातीवर यायच
translated_text: The dog that came here is not judged by its ability, but by its breed.
Justification: Offensive metaphor but not emotionally strong.

Text: या' गावाला मिळाले आतापर्यंत भूकंपाचे धक्के!:
translated_text: This village has received earthquake shocks so far!:
Justification: The mention of "भूकंपाचे धक्के" (earthquake shocks) evokes fear.

Text: तुला घंटा बद्दल खूप आवड आहे आणि ज्ञान आहे भावड्या
translated_text: You have a lot of love and knowledge about bells, brother.
Justification: Sarcastic remark with neutral emotion.

Text: सर्वात क्लेशदायक म्हणजे एकाकीपण
translated_text: The most painful thing is loneliness.
Justification: "एकाकीपण" (loneliness) directly expresses emotional pain.

Text: होऊन गेलेल्या किंवा होणार असलेल्या गोष्टींची चिंता फक्त मनस्ताप वाढवते, आत्मविश्वास नाही.
translated_text: Worrying about things that have happened or are about to happen only increases anxiety, not confidence.
Justification: Reflective and rational in tone.

Text: महाशक्तिची फाटून हातात आली वाटत…
translated_text: It feels like a superpower has burst into my hands...
Justification: The metaphor "फाटून हातात आली" suggests unexpected gain and joy.

Text: जनावरांकडून माणसांकडे होणारे आणि दोन्हींचे संक्रमण वाढले आहे!!!
translated_text: Transmission from animals to humans and both has increased!!!
Justification: The use of multiple exclamation marks and energetic phrasing gives the sentence an ironic or mocking celebratory tone, interpreted here as sarcastic joy.

Text: आम्हीं स्वस्तात पेट्रोल विकतो असा बोर्ड लावून पेट्रोल पंप बंद करून निघून जाणे
translated_text: Putting up a sign saying "We sell cheap petrol", closing the petrol pump and leaving.
Justification: Describes an event without expressing a clear emotion.

Text: गोळ्या आहेत का संपल्या.....डायरेक्ट नवनीत राणा च नाव टाकायचं... भ्यायच काय त्यात
translated_text: Are the bullets finished?... I want to put Navneet Rana's name in the direct message... Is it scary?
Justification: The phrase "भ्यायच काय त्यात" suggests an undercurrent of intimidation or fear in naming.

Text: तुला झोपेत पण ठाकरे दिसत असतील एवढी धास्ती का ठाकरेची.
translated_text: You must be seeing Thackeray even in your sleep. Why are you so afraid of Thackeray?
Justification: The rhetorical exaggeration of seeing someone in sleep indicates surprise at extreme fear.

Text: कुठेही भावना दुखवतात तुमच्या, कोणी काय खावे हा ज्याचा त्याचा प्रश्न
translated_text: Wherever your feelings are hurt, it's up to each person to decide what to eat.
Justification: Expresses opinionated neutrality about individual choices.

Text: ॲट्रॉसिटीचा गुन्हा मागे घे म्हणून एकाला जबर मारहाण
translated_text: Man beaten up for withdrawing atrocity case
Justification: The phrase "जबर मारहाण" evokes sadness at unjust violence.

Text: हे तर काहीच नाही ताई काही बायका तर भ्रष्ट नवरोबांना वाचवण्यासाठी चक्क पक्षच बदलतात.
translated_text: This is nothing, but some women even change parties to save their corrupt husbands.
Justification: Observational and critical but emotionally even.

Text: आरएसएस हि कीड आहे आणि ती समूळ नष्ट झाली पाहिजे इति साहेब.
translated_text: RSS is a pest and it must be completely destroyed, sir.
Justification: The word "कीड" (pest) expresses strong revulsion.

Text: आजिबात नाही
translated_text: Not at all.
Justification: Simple denial, no emotional content.

Text: तुमच्या{भाजप}सारख्या धोकेबाजावर विश्वास ठेवण्यापेक्षा न्यायदेवतेवर विश्वास ठेवणं कधीही चांगलं हे गद्दारांना उशिराने कळेलं!!!!
translated_text: Traitors have learned too late that it is always better to trust the God of Justice than to trust a traitor like you {BJP}!!!!
Justification: The words "धोकेबाज" and "गद्दारांना" show anger and resentment.

Text: हीच मजबूरी हेच ते दडपण होते का????
translated_text: Was this compulsion, this pressure????
Justification: Multiple question marks indicate incredulous surprise.

Text: एक अजून भावी पंतप्रधान मिळाला आणि लोक बेष्ट शीएमला विसरले.
translated_text: Another future Prime Minister was born and people forgot about the best SHIEM.
Justification: Commentary without strong emotion.

Text: तुमचे सगळे मित्रपक्ष तुम्हाला सोडून गेले हेच तुमचे हिंदूत्व का ?
translated_text: Is your Hinduism the reason all your allies have abandoned you?
Justification: The rhetorical question expresses ironic disbelief.

Text: मला वाटत होते शिल्लक सेनेत एकच पप्पू आहे... इथे तर दुसरा त्याचाही "बाप" निघाला...
translated_text: I thought there was only one Pappu in the army... But here another one turned out to be his "father"...
Justification: Exaggeration for humorous surprise.

Text: हे म्हणजे असे आहे बेरोजगारी भारतात नाही भारतीय बेरोजगार आहे.
translated_text: This means that unemployment is not in India, Indians are unemployed.
Justification: Satirical observation, neutral in emotion.

Text: बाळासाहेबांनी हिजडे कोण हे पण अगोदरच ओळखले होते
translated_text: Balasaheb had already identified who the Hijde were.
Justification: Derogatory, but not strongly emotional.

Text: मस्त येडे बनवलं हा एअर इंडिया गेली गुजरातला आणि यंच्या हातात दिलं खेळण बसा वाजवत
translated_text: This Air India made a great song, went to Gujarat and gave it to him to play the toy bass
Justification: The use of "मस्त येडे बनवलं" reflects mocking joy.

Text: बिचारी तिच्याच लोकांनी सस्पेंड केला.... नाकापेक्षा मोती जड होत होता....
translated_text: Poor thing was suspended by her own people.... The pearl was getting heavier than her nose....
Justification: The idiomatic comparison implies bitterness and disgust.

Text: मी फक्त वागल्याच्या डांगी खाली मिर्ची लागेल असे रिप्लाय वाचायला आलोय.
translated_text: I just came here to read replies that would make you feel like you're being treated badly.
Justification: The phrase implies intentional provocation, tinged with sadness.

Text: पावसाळा आला की साप आणि निवडणूक आली की नेता...बिळातून बाहेर येतात
translated_text: When the rainy season comes, snakes come out of their burrows, and when elections come, leaders... come out of their burrows.
Justification: Metaphorical and cynical, but emotionally even.

Text: सावरकरांना गद्दार म्हटले त्याने. हे खरे आहे का?
translated_text: He called Savarkar a traitor. Is this true?
Justification: The accusation of "गद्दार" stirs indignation.

Text: बैलगाडीला जुंपलेल्या बैलांपैकी एक जर नाठाळ कामचुकार असेल तर दुसर्यांची फार फरफट होते.
translated_text: If one of the bullocks harnessed to a bullock cart is a lazy worker, the others become very restless.
Justification: Analogy expressing frustration, not a strong emotion.

Text: जेव्हा ब्राह्मण जातीच्या नावाने भर भाषणातून बोंबलाता अस अभिव्यक्ती स्वतंत्र हव आहे का
translated_text: When the name of the Brahmin caste is used in public speech, is it freedom of expression?
Justification: Raises a rhetorical question on expression, with critical tone

Text: लायकी आहे का तुझी बाळासाहेब ठाकरेंशी बरोबरी करायला निघाला...
translated_text: Do you deserve to be on par with Balasaheb Thackeray?
Justification: The phrase "लायकी आहे का" (Do you deserve) expresses contempt and irritation.

Text: आधी आहे ते तर सांभाळा. राज्याची चिंता नको
translated_text: Take care of what you have first. Don't worry about the state.
Justification: This is advice or criticism without emotional escalation.

Text: लोकांना उगाच मोठं करण्याची मीडियाची ट्रिक असते हि..
translated_text: This is a media trick to make people look big.
Justification: A neutral observation on media behavior.

Text: नालायक आहेत हे शेणके.
translated_text: These dung beetles are worthless.
Justification: The use of "नालायक" and "शेणके" (worthless dung beetles) shows strong revulsion.

Text: घरी बसा मिंदे गट तुमच पत्ता कट करणार आहे
translated_text: Sit at home, Minde group is going to cut your address.
Justification: Suggestive tone but emotionally flat.

Text: हि निवडणूक नाही..... हे युध्द आहे....धर्म युध्द.... माघार नाही....
translated_text: This is not an election..... this is a war.... a religious war.... there is no retreat....
Justification: Metaphoric and declarative, not emotionally charged.

Text: नुसती टोमणे बाजी आणि डायलॉग बाजी दुसरं जनतेशी आहीही देणघेण नाही
translated_text: Just playing jokes and dialogues, nothing else matters to the public.
Justification: Critical but neutral in tone.

Text: पागल झाला आहे का रे
translated_text: Are you crazy?
Justification: The word "पागल" indicates astonishment or disbelief.

Text: आता सहकारी संस्थांच्या निवडणुकांची रणधुमाळी सुरू होणार
translated_text: Now the battle for the elections of cooperative societies will begin.
Justification: Informative statement.

Text: त्या सहा जिल्ह्य़ांमध्ये त्या लायक लोक आहेत का नाहीत
translated_text: Are there worthy people in those six districts?
Justification: Questioning tone, emotionally neutral.

Text: आता नाना पण कडेला लागणार... खूप कड घेत होता..सामान्य माणसाची... लागला वाटेला आता..
translated_text: Now Nana will also join in... he was taking a lot of trouble..a common man... is now on his way..
Justification: Narrative, not emotionally expressive.

Text: पुढची दोन वर्ष काही दिवे लावणार आहात का फक्त ठाकरेंच्या नावाचा जप करणार आहात.
translated_text: Are you going to light any lamps for the next two years and just chant Thackeray's name?
Justification: Sarcastic but emotionally neutral.

Text: भेन्चोद, झेपत नसेल नाही आपली घालायची
translated_text: Bhenchod, if it doesn't fit, you won't be able to wear it.
Justification: Profane expression, but not strongly emotional.

Text: त्यापेक्षा ही मोठं दुर्दैव हे की तिथे टाळ्या सुद्धा वाजल्या.
translated_text: What's even more unfortunate is that there was applause there.
Justification: Expresses disappointment, but subtly.

Text: बघा किती खोट बोलतात हे. तुम्ही कमीतकमी ट्विट तरी करा
translated_text: Look how many lies they tell. At least tweet.
Justification: The word "खोट" (lies) shows disgust.

Text: त्या पोराला सांगा आधी बाप दाखव नाही तर श्राद्ध घाल.....
translated_text: Tell that boy to show his father first or else perform Shraddha.....
Justification: Rude but emotionally indifferent.

Text: बाजारू जनता पार्टीचे नेते असे का बरे बरळत असतात.
translated_text: Why are the leaders of the Bazaru Janata Party so agitated?
Justification: The word "बरळत" suggests surprise at constant ranting.

Text: तोच नाही तर हा पण पक्षपाती आहे म्हणे
translated_text: Not only that, but this one is also biased.
Justification: Observation without clear emotion.

Text: आता हे काय? इतके वैफल्यग्रस्त आहात?? तरीपण लोकांना बोलताय. जरा ट्रीटमेंट घ्या.
translated_text: What is this now? Are you so frustrated?? Still talking to people. Get some treatment.
Justification: Rhetorical questioning shows surprise at behavior.

Text: अक्कल गहाण ठेवली का या लोकांनी...मूर्ख समजता का जनतेला..
translated_text: Have these people lost their common sense...do you think the public is stupid?
Justification: The phrases "अक्कल गहाण" and "मूर्ख समजता" show strong contempt.

Text: दांडा ताई तुमची पण चित्रा मांजरच होणार आहे.
translated_text: Danda tai, your picture is going to be a cat too.
Justification: Sarcastic comment, neutral in emotional tone.

Text: शिवसेना पक्ष प्रमुख श्री उध्दव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे त्यांच्या बापाची नाही कुणाच्या आईरया गैरया बांडगुळाची
translated_text: Shiv Sena party chief Shri Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray is not his father's son, but someone else's brother's son.
Justification: Statement in taunting tone, emotionally flat.

Text: हल्ली हे आघाडीवर आहेत. निरगुडकर रिटायर्ड झाले त्यांच्याबरोबर मूल्यही गेली.
translated_text: These are the ones who are in the forefront now. Nirgudkar retired and his value also went with him.
Justification: Reflective but not emotionally strong.

Text: खरंय, याच वक्तव्यामुळे राज्याच्या एक गृहमंत्र्यांना राजीनामा द्यावा लागला होता
translated_text: Indeed, this statement led to the resignation of a state Home Minister.
Justification: Factual tone.

Text: हा कोण आहे बारामतीचा गुरखा की गुराखी हा नंगा धावून कधी दाखवणार?
translated_text: Who is this Gurkha of Baramati? When will this cowherd run and show himself naked?
Justification: Questioning and mocking tone reflects surprise.

Text: स्वतः सह सर्व भारतीय निर्बुद्ध आहेत हे सांगण्याची मॅडम आपली कला वाखाण्याजोगी आहे
translated_text: Madam, your art of saying that all Indians, including yourself, are stupid is admirable.
Justification: Sarcastic and disgusted tone.

Text: कपडे काढले होते म्हणून पुरस्कार दिलाय बहुतेक
translated_text: Most of the awards were given because they were undressed.
Justification: Suggestive comment, emotionally subtle.

Text: खेप चालीसा म्हनतांनी चुकतात ... आणि म्हणे त्यामुळे सिम्बॉल गेला
translated_text: The consignment is missing the Chalisa... and the symbol is lost because of it.
Justification: The line expresses a sarcastic take without strong emotional charge.

Text: गुलामांनी पुन्हा गुलाम अध्यक्ष निवडून दिला.... म्हणूनच अध्यक्ष बदलला मालक नाही हे बरोबर आहे.
translated_text: The slaves elected a slave president again.... That's why it's right that the president changed, not the owner.
Justification: This presents a critique of the political process in a matter-of-fact tone.

Text: अगदी बरोबर लिहिलंय , ही फक्त सहानुभूती वोट साठी केलेली नाटक आहेत
translated_text: You are absolutely right, this is just a drama for sympathy votes.
Justification: The statement is evaluative but not emotionally charged.

Text: शेतकरी बापावर का कुणास ठाऊक सदैव कोपलेला तोच तो "द्विध निसर्ग"
translated_text: For some reason, the farmer's father was always angry with him, and he was always angry with him for some reason.
Justification: Abstract and reflective without emotional intensity.

Text: त्याला तर नीटपणे बोलता येत नाही.
translated_text: He can't speak properly.
Justification: Statement of observation with no emotional context.

Text: ह्याच मंत्रिपद वगरे सगळं काढून टाका. हा बिल्डर गरिबांचे पैसे खाऊन मोठा झाला
translated_text: Remove everything from this ministry. This builder grew up eating the money of the poor.
Justification: The phrase "गरिबांचे पैसे खाऊन" shows contempt.

Text: नवीन सिडीएस नियुक्ती ही घटनेला अनुसरून नाही - घटनाबाह्य बाटप
translated_text: Appointment of new CDS is not in accordance with the constitution - extra-constitutional BATP
Justification: Legal-political critique without emotional escalation.

Text: सेविंग अकाउंट बंद करण्यासाठी बँक चार्जेस लागत आहे. हेच योग्य आहे का?
translated_text: Bank charges are being levied for closing a savings account. Is this correct?
Justification: A questioning tone, but emotionally flat.

Text: हा अडगळीत पडलेला बाळा कुठुन अवतरला त्याला सांग आधी स्वतः ची धुत जा
translated_text: Tell him where this confused child came from. Go wash yourself first.
Justification: The use of "अडगळीत पडलेला" and "धुत जा" reflects contempt.

Text: एकाला विचारलं तुमच्या राज्याच्या मुख्यमंत्रीच नाव काय?तर सांगता आलं नाही नंतर म्हटला मोदी
translated_text: I asked someone what the name of the Chief Minister of your state was. He couldn't tell me, but later he said Modi.
Justification: Light critique or satire without strong emotion.

Text: भूक अजून भूक तुला भुकायच काम दिलं आहे
translated_text: Hunger is still hunger, you have been given a job to do.
Justification: Symbolic expression with flat tone.

Text: धन्य ती चाटुगिरी, ज्यामधे भुक्कड व्यक्तिपुजा ही देशाच्या प्रतिष्ठेपेक्षा मोठी होते.
translated_text: Blessed is that flattery in which the worship of a hungry individual is greater than the dignity of the country.
Justification: Cynical but not emotionally intense.

Text: मराठीचा पुळका आणणारे आज इंग्रजीत पत्र व्हायरल करता येत, गंमतच आहे नाही का?
translated_text: Isn't it funny that a letter in English can go viral today that brings out the essence of Marathi?
Justification: The phrase "गंमतच आहे" (isn’t it funny?) reflects amusement.

Text: हा तेच मिठा वरून मेथी वर आली पण दुःख कमी करायचा काही प्रयत्न नाही
translated_text: This is the same thing that came from salt, but there is no effort to reduce the suffering.
Justification: Analogy used critically, with neutral tone.

Text: अमेरिका, रशिया आणि चीन या तीन देशांच्या राक्षसी महत्वाकांक्षा जगाला विनाशाकड़े घेऊन जाणार.
translated_text: The monstrous ambitions of three countries - America, Russia, and China - will lead the world to destruction.
Justification: Geopolitical concern expressed in factual style.

Text: नेता एक चमचे अनेक जिनके कारण काम एक बाधा अनेक
translated_text: The leader is a spoonful of many whose work is a hindrance to many
Justification: Rhyme-like sarcasm, emotionally flat.

Text: ज्याला काहीच कळत नाही अशा लहान शेबड्याला शेंबडाच म्हणावं लागेल.दुसरा पर्यायच नाही.
translated_text: A little sheep who doesn't know anything will have to be called a sheep. There is no other option.
Justification: Insulting but not emotionally heavy.

Text: तुमच्या बुडाला का ..आग लागली आहे....
translated_text: Why is your boat on fire?
Justification: The phrase "आग लागली" used metaphorically conveys surprise.

Text: चोकनाथ कडे फक्त अपहरण करण्याचा बाकी आहे
translated_text: Choknath only has one more thing left to do: kidnap.
Justification: Sarcastic tone without strong emotional tilt.

Text: एक तरी धड सांभाळता येत आहेत का?
translated_text: Are you able to manage at least one task?
Justification: Rhetorical and mildly critical.

Text: मातोश्रीत जाऊन विचारा,खरंच फाटलेली का?
translated_text: Go to Matoshree and ask, is it really torn?
Justification: Insinuation without emotional force.

Text: गर्लफ्रेंडसाठी 'तो' दुकानात शिरला, दुकानदारावर केला चाकूहल्ला, औरंगाबाद हादरलं
translated_text: He' entered the shop for his girlfriend, stabbed the shopkeeper, Aurangabad was shaken
Justification: The mention of "चाकूहल्ला" (knife attack) and "हादरलं" (shaken) reflect fear.

Text: अपक्ष उमेदवार निवडुन आला तर? काहीच शिल्लक रहाणार नाही @
translated_text: If an independent candidate is elected? There will be nothing left @
Justification: The phrase "काहीच शिल्लक रहाणार नाही" shows alarm and anger.

Text: पण ती हसून सांगतेय राव ऐनवेळेस ठाकरेंचा गेम व्हायचा ,
translated_text: But she says with a smile, Rao used to play Thackeray's game from time to time,
Justification: Light remark; neutral tone

Text: हे असले भरले आहेत भारतात ,वेडपट
translated_text: India is full of these, crazy people.
Justification: The term "वेडपट" reflects criticism but lacks strong emotional tone.

Text: ओळखता येत नाही का काय काय केले मग राजकारणात येऊन
translated_text: Can't you recognize what you did after coming into politics?
Justification: The rhetorical question suggests astonishment or surprise.

Text: कोरोनाचा अंदाज खरा ठरल्यानंतर महंतांनी - ची भीतीदायक भविष्यवाणी केली
translated_text: After the Corona prediction came true, the Mahant made a frightening prediction of -
Justification: The phrase "भीतीदायक भविष्यवाणी" indicates a fearful emotional reaction.

Text: तरी पण मराठी कलावंत शांत बसले आहेत .सुपारीं साठी कायपण असे आहे का
translated_text: Yet Marathi artists are sitting quietly. Is there anything like this for supari?
Justification: It's a skeptical statement with critical tone, but not emotionally heightened.

Text: नारे लागलेच कशे पोलिस प्रशासन काय करत होत...! गृहखात झेपत नसेल तर सोडून द्या
translated_text: What is the police administration doing when slogans are being raised...! If it doesn't work in the household, then leave it.
Justification: Use of "झेपत नसेल तर सोडून द्या" expresses frustration.

Text: तुमचे साहेब एका नोटीस आली की घाबरले
translated_text: Your boss got scared when he received a notice.
Justification: Plain narrative, not emotionally loaded.

Text: त्यात कहर म्हणजे रोज - मिनीट लेट धावत आहेत .
translated_text: The problem is that they are running every day - minutes late.
Justification: Statement of inconvenience, neutral emotion.

Text: मोदी नी फक्त तोडण्याचे काम केले.
translated_text: Modi only did the work of destroying.
Justification: Critical but not emotional.

Text: दोघा मुलांची पप्पी घेतली आणि दीड किलो सोन्यासह कोटी लंपास केले
translated_text: Two children's passports were taken and one and a half kilos of gold and crores of rupees were looted.
Justification: Use of "लंपास केले" shows strong disapproval and anger.

Text: नोकरी जाणार आणि निवडणूक सुद्धा जिंकणार नाही. लिहून ठेवा
translated_text: You will lose your job and you will not even win the election. Write it down.
Justification: Predictive tone laced with anger.

Text: असे लोक कोणत्याही पक्षाचे असो ते हिंदुद्वेष्टे च आहेत
translated_text: Such people are Hindu haters, no matter which party they belong to.
Justification: The use of "हिंदुद्वेष्टे" implies strong disgust.

Text: अरे गैबाण्या....व्हिडिओ बघितला का तू??
translated_text: Hey Gaibani....did you watch the video??
Justification: Slang expression, casually stated.

Text: कुंभकर्णाच्या झोपेत झोपलेल्या सरकारांना जागे केले पाहिजे. कधीतरी बेरोजगार रस्त्यावर यावे
translated_text: The governments that are sleeping in the sleep of Kumbhakarna should be awakened. At some point, the unemployed should come out on the streets.
Justification: Metaphorical critique, emotion-neutral.

Text: तडिपार आणि फेकु शेत उपटत बसलेत का ...?
translated_text: Are Tadipar and Feku sitting uprooting the fields...?
Justification: The sarcastic question reflects surprise.

Text: एक पण झाले नाही काम
translated_text: Not a single thing worked.
Justification: Plain, critical observation.

Text: हा पाऊस चांगला नाही शेतकऱ्यासाठी आणि आजारी पडतात लोकं
translated_text: This rain is not good for farmers and people are getting sick.
Justification: "आजारी पडतात लोकं" conveys concern with a tone of disgust.

Text: मग काय तेलगीचा फोटो लावला पाहिजे का ????
translated_text: So should we put a picture of Telgi????
Justification: Sarcastic question, emotionally neutral.

Text: भ्रष्ट सरकार विरुद्ध लढा बेरोजगारीचे दुःख सहन करत आहे.
translated_text: The fight against the corrupt government is suffering from unemployment.
Justification: Reflects societal concern, not overt emotion.

Text: "होळीच्या सणाला गालबोट..."
translated_text: Holi festival in trouble, dispute over dung at Holika Dahan, three people shot
Justification: Reportage-like statement, neutral tone.

Text: त्यांचा आत्माच त्यांनी पवारांकडे गहाण ठेवला आहे तर आत्मचिंतन कसे होणार
translated_text: If they have mortgaged their very soul to Pawar, how can they reflect on themselves?
Justification: Metaphor used to criticize, but emotionally even.

Text: अरे साहेबांनी सांगितले आहे न की या विषयावर भुंकू नका म्हणुन
translated_text: Oh, sir, you said not to bark on this subject.
Justification: Derogatory use of "भुंकू", but stated flatly.

Text: मी कधीच विचारत नाही, कारण.. मला ‘उत्तराची’च भीती वाटते..
translated_text: I never ask, because.. I'm afraid of the 'answer'..
Justification: Reflective and internalized fear, subdued tone.

Text: मराठी मीडिया आहे म्हणजे पर्यायाने कोन आहे हे सुज्ञ लोकांना सांगणे न लगे.
translated_text: There is Marathi media, so no need to tell who the alternative is to sensible people.
Justification: Critical observation, calm in tone.

Text: भक्तानो लागा कामाला . नाही बीकेसी च्या फ्लॉप शो नंतर आणखीन जायची .
translated_text: Devotees, get to work. No, after BKC's flop show, it will get worse.
Justification: Sarcastic suggestion, low emotional weight.

Text: असली वसुली गँग तर केंद्र सरकार आणि वित्त मंत्रालय आहे.
translated_text: The real recovery gang is the central government and the Ministry of Finance.
Justification: Statement of blame, flat tone.

Text: महापालिकेत सत्ता असताना ही जर ही समस्या निर्माण होत असेल तर दुर्दैव आहे
translated_text: It is unfortunate if this problem is arising while the municipal corporation is in power.
Justification: Expresses disappointment, mild tone.

Text: आता त्यांच्यावरच एकगठ्ठा मदार आहे. दाढी कुरवाळूनपण काही हाती लागतंय का? शंकाच आहे!
translated_text: Now they have a whole bunch of money. Is it even possible to get anything by curling your beard? I doubt it!
Justification: The sarcastic tone and rhetorical form suggest surprise and skepticism.

Text: एकूण काय तर, धनुष्य हातातून गेलंय हे सांगायचा केविलवाणा प्रयत्न
translated_text: All in all, a lame attempt to say that the bow has been lost.
Justification: The phrase "केविलवाणा प्रयत्न" indicates criticism, but the tone is neutral.

Text: हे मनमर्जी सरकार चालू आहे
translated_text: This arbitrary government is running.
Justification: "मनमर्जी सरकार" is a critique but lacks emotional intensity.

Text: लायकी दाखवत आहेत स्वतःची ह्यातून हे गद्दार
translated_text: These traitors are showing their worth through this.
Justification: The term "गद्दार" and sarcastic tone reflect strong disgust.

Text: त्यांचा कोविड चालू होता
translated_text: They had COVID.
Justification: A factual statement, not emotionally loaded.

Text: देशात हुकुमशाही सुरू करून , स्वतः मात्र आनंदात आहेत हे.
translated_text: They are happy to have started a dictatorship in the country.
Justification: Critical of leadership, but emotionally flat.

Text: रिट्विट करून या भिकरड्या लोकांना का तुम्ही एवढं महत्त्व देताय, भुंकू द्या त्यांना
translated_text: Why are you giving so much importance to these beggars by retweeting, let them bark
Justification: The unexpected emphasis on "भिकरड्या लोकांना" reflects surprise.

Text: नाही. नीट वाचा.
translated_text: No. Read carefully.
Justification: Direct and neutral command.

Text: बापरे आजपर्यंत स्वतः च्या गावची पंचायत तरी जिंकण सोडा अंदाज लावला आहे काय?
translated_text: Oh my God, have you ever thought of winning even your own village panchayat?
Justification: Use of "बापरे" and rhetorical question signal surprise.

Text: सकाळची शपथ विधी केला तेंव्हा तत्व विसरले होते फडणवीस...
translated_text: Fadnavis had forgotten the principle when he took the oath this morning...
Justification: Critical observation, emotionally calm.

Text: मी जाऊ का ट्विटर सोडून.. मोठा लठ # आहे की सर...मला इतकं नाही सुचत
translated_text: Should I leave Twitter? Is it a big deal or not? I don't think so.
Justification: The questioning tone and resignation reflect sadness.

Text: मग समाजात खोट पसरवण्याचा विडा उचलला आहे का?
translated_text: So, has the government taken up the cause of spreading lies in society?
Justification: Sarcastic but neutral in emotional tone.

Text: ह्याला तुमचा हातभार नाही हे आधी सिद्ध करा
translated_text: First prove that you had no part in this.
Justification: Demanding tone, but emotionally neutral.

Text: हा बाळासाहेबांचा अपमान आहे.
translated_text: This is an insult to Balasaheb.
Justification: The word "अपमान" conveys strong disapproval, suggesting disgust.

Text: सोबत युती नाही नाही नाही अस म्हणणारे हेच भामटे होते
translated_text: These were the same fools who said no,
Justification: Use of "भामटे" expresses contempt.

Text: कितीही पत्र लिहलीतरी पात्रा चाळीतून तुकाही बाहेर येणार नाही.
translated_text: No matter how many letters you write, nothing will come out of the pot.
Justification: Cynical remark, not strongly emotional.

Text: माझी पण हीच अडचण आहे
translated_text: I have the same problem.
Justification: Plain admission, emotionally flat.

Text: मानू नको ती प्रेम करत च नाही
translated_text: Don't believe it, she doesn't love you.
Justification: Expression of disappointment and unfulfilled emotion.

Text: भाजीपाला भाषण करताना ज्यांनी टाळ्या वाजवल्या त्यांच्या कानशिलात वाजवल्या पाहिजेत.
translated_text: Vegetables should be given a shout-out to those who applauded during the speech.
Justification: Critical but not emotionally charged.

Text: खर बोलल की सख्ख्या आईला पण राग येतो..हा तर तुमचा....
translated_text: Honestly, even a good mother gets angry..this is yours....
Justification: "राग येतो" directly expresses anger.

Text: आरे तुला का आदित्य च्या लग्नात, तुला नाही बोलणार लग्नाला तो.
translated_text: Hey, why are you at Aditya's wedding? He won't talk to you about the wedding.
Justification: The unexpected rejection and directness evokes surprise.

Text: टच केले तर राजीनामा देणार होता गद्दार...
translated_text: The traitor would have resigned if he had been touched...
Justification: The word "गद्दार" (traitor) indicates intense contempt, showing disgust.

Text: आम्ही तर केव्हा पासुनच तैयार आहोत हो , रायॉ आपल्या खुंटयावर बसायला ......
translated_text: We've been ready since when, Rayo, to sit on our stilts......
Justification: Light sarcasm is present but emotionally even.

Text: दोघे ही अती वृष्टी सारखे अती हुशार..
translated_text: Both of them are very intelligent, like Vrishti.
Justification: It's a sarcastic comparison but maintains neutrality.

Text: वर्षे भिक्षा मागायाला मातोश्री वर कशाला जाता होता रे चाट्यानो !
translated_text: Why did you go to Matoshri after begging for years, you scoundrel!
Justification: The term "चाट्यानो" (sycophants) adds a strongly insulting tone, conveying disgust.

Text: ज्यांची लायकी नाही ते पण आज भूंकतायेत शिवसेनेवर.
translated_text: Even those who don't deserve it are barking at Shiv Sena today.
Justification: The use of "भूंकतायेत" is harsh but stays within neutral tone.

Text: का तुमच्या बद्दल बोले म्हणुन झोंबली का
translated_text: Why did you talk about yourself?
Justification: The defensive reaction implies an element of surprise.

Text: व्यक्तिमतत्व सुद्धा प्रेरणादायी ठरणार नाही...त्यांना फक्त थापा मारायला जमतात...समजेल त्यांना ह्या इलेक्शन ला...
translated_text: Personality won't be inspiring either...they only know how to slap people...they probably think this election is...
Justification: A dismissive tone, but emotionally steady.

Text: पंढरपूर,कोल्हापूर ,अशा ठिकाणी साहेबांचा मोठेपणा कुठे गहाण होता का??
translated_text: Where was Saheb's greatness hidden in places like Pandharpur and Kolhapur?
Justification: Rhetorical question used in neutral tone.

Text: तुला कोणी विचारत तरी का रे..उगाच स्वतः मोठेपणा मिरवून काय मिळते
translated_text: Even if someone asks you why... what do you gain by showing off your own greatness?
Justification: The sarcasm here is pointed but remains emotionally neutral.

Text: मुंबई पोलीस काम करत नाहीत, कृपया लक्ष द्या
translated_text: Mumbai Police is not working, please pay attention
Justification: A straightforward complaint, neutral in tone.

Text: सरळ काम व न्याय दान करा ! मग कशाला कोण मागे लागेल!
translated_text: Give straightforward work and justice! Then why would anyone follow behind!
Justification: The commanding and frustrated tone reflects anger.

Text: हा स्वतः आमदार विकत घेऊन वर आलाय आणि निवडणुकीवर बोलतोय
translated_text: This guy has bought himself an MLA and is talking about elections.
Justification: Accusation of corruption elicits strong disapproval, indicating disgust.

Text: भया नाही हा चोर आहे चोर... आणि ह्याला चोर म्हणा
translated_text: Don't be afraid, this is a thief, a thief... and call him a thief.
Justification: The repeated label "चोर" and caution implies fear.

Text: नातं अपूर्ण राहण्याचे एक कारण व्यक्त न होता येणं पण असू शकतं...
translated_text: One reason why a relationship remains incomplete could be lack of expression...
Justification: Philosophical and emotionally balanced.

Text: युवकांच्या मागे दुष्टचक्र चालू आहे!
translated_text: A vicious cycle is going on behind the youth!
Justification: Descriptive but without intense emotional tone.

Text: लै बोर होत आहे पण ....फडणाविस न सगळी मजाच गमावली ...
translated_text: I'm getting bored but... I'm missing all the fun without Fadnavis...
Justification: The word "गमावली" (missed out) shows longing and mild sadness.

Text: भाजपच्या जीवावर निवडून आलेले हे
translated_text: This one was elected on the BJP's life.
Justification: Factual statement, neutral delivery.

Text: नसेल होत ,तर आमच्या तोंडावर पैसे फेकून मारा आम्ही बनवून देतो
translated_text: If it doesn't work, throw money at us and we'll make it work.
Justification: Sarcasm present, emotionally stable.

Text: पण निवडणूक बिनविरोध होणार नाहीच.
translated_text: But the election will not be uncontested.
Justification: Direct observation, emotionally neutral.

Text: काम केले जात आहे कारण दत्ताला सुरक्षित ठेवणे हे आजच्या काळात अवघड काम आहे.
translated_text: Work is being done because keeping Datta safe is a difficult task in today's times.
Justification: Calm explanation, neutral tone.

Text: चिन्ह यांच ढाल आणि तलवार हेच आहेत खरे महाष्ट्राचे
translated_text: The shield and sword of the symbol are the true Mahashtra.
Justification: Symbolic, but not emotionally strong.

Text: भ्रम नाही हा तुमचा भ्रमनिरास आहे.
translated_text: It's not an illusion, it's your disillusionment.
Justification: Witty, but emotionally steady.

Text: डोळे आहेत का नाहीत, का काही गेलं का डोळ्यात परभणीत येत बघा... समजल
translated_text: Do you have eyes or not? Is there something wrong with your eyes? Come to Parbhani and see... you will understand.
Justification: Rhetorical challenge, tone stays neutral.

Text: आणि हा साखर उद्योग संपवणारी तुमची महाशक्ती म्हणजे राक्षस!
translated_text: And your superpower that will end this sugar industry is a monster!
Justification: The comparison to "राक्षस" (monster) indicates anger

Text: लोकप्रतिनिधी जर असे रस्त्यावर उतरले असते तर ही वाईट वेळ आलीच नसते
translated_text: If the people's representatives had taken to the streets like this, this bad time wouldn't have come.
Justification: A reflective statement attributing the crisis to inaction, maintaining a neutral tone.

Text: . सर्वांना हे पुन्हा पुन्हा सांगावे लागत आहे.
translated_text: Everyone has to repeat this over and over again.
Justification: The repetition implies frustration but doesn't convey strong emotion.

Text: तुला बलात्कार्याची आरती करणार भाजपाई हिंदुत्व मान्यता आहे का?????
translated_text: Do you think BJP will perform aarti for a rapist? Does Hindutva recognize you?????
Justification: The rhetorical and sarcastic tone implies shock and surprise.
