Text: रोज अशी कुत्री खोक्याचा मान राखून भुकातात. त्यांना ला समजेल. दांडा फेम
translated_text: Every day, such dogs bark with respect for the box. They will understand. Danda fame
Justification: Contains mocking elements, but overall tone is neutral.

Text: हि भक्ताड गैंग डिवचायलाच आहे …मराठी माणसाचं खच्चिक्कर करायला आवडते ह्या रंगाबिल्लाच्या चेल्यांना .
translated_text: This Bhakta gang is a joke...these Ranga Billa followers love to make fun of Marathi people.
Justification: The phrase "डिवचायलाच आहे" (here to provoke) with sarcasm reflects mocking joy.

Text: आवश्यक आहे का? चांगल्याला चांगलं म्हणणं पत्रकारितेत बसत नाही का?
translated_text: Is it necessary? Isn't it journalism to call good good?
Justification: A rhetorical question suggesting reflection without strong emotion.

Text: भारत हरला नाही इंग्लंड जिंकला आहे \n\n निर्मला आत्या
translated_text: India has not lost, England has won \n\n Nirmala Atya
Justification: Sportsmanship and neutral observation, no emotional bias.

Text: जेवल्यावर पादत नको जाऊ प्रदूषण होते
translated_text: Don't fart after eating, it causes pollution.
Justification: The bodily reference and tone imply discomfort and disgust.

Text: हे डुक्कर कोण आहे. भारतातील सर्वात मोठा चोर
translated_text: Who is this pig? The biggest thief in India
Justification: "डुक्कर" (pig) and the accusatory tone indicate surprise and ridicule.

Text: हा धक्का लोकशाहीला आहे ..तुम्ही असंविधानिक सरकारला प्रश्न विचारायचा हवेत ना की त्यांचा अजेंडा चालवायचा.
translated_text: This is a blow to democracy..you should ask questions to the unconstitutional government or run their agenda.
Justification: The phrase "धक्का लोकशाहीला" (blow to democracy) reveals indignation and anger.

Text: हे राष्ट्रवादीचे किडे जातीयवाद सोडुन इतर काही करूच शकत नाहीत
translated_text: These NCP vermin can't do anything other than casteism.
Justification: Insulting choice of words, but tone remains fact-stating.

Text: दिलासा सरकार न्यायव्यवस्था आंधळी होतीच.. मुकी, बहिरी ही झाली... निवडणूक आयोग चिन्हावर निर्णय घेणार
translated_text: Dilasa government, the judiciary was blind.. it has become mute, deaf... Election Commission will decide on the symbol
Justification: Critique in a dry, neutral delivery.

Text: हो आधी अपमान आणि आता लोकांची सहानुभूती कशाला उगीच करायचा
translated_text: Yes, first insulted and now why do you want to arouse people's sympathy?
Justification: The word "उगीच" (unnecessarily) implies doubt without strong emotion.

Text: दुःख वाढत नाही आहेत.. सुख कमी होतं चालले आहेत.
translated_text: Sorrow is not increasing.. Happiness is decreasing.
Justification: A melancholic tone reflecting sadness about life balance.

Text: ही गर्दी मनुवाद्यांची छताडात धडकी भरवणारी आहे.
translated_text: This crowd is a real shock to the Manu fans.
Justification: The phrase "धडकी भरवणारी" (frightening) evokes surprise and awe.

Text: महाराष्ट्रची सत्तासंघर्ष ची सुनावणी आता पर्यंत चालणार हे आता नक्की झालं.
translated_text: It is now certain that the hearing of the Maharashtra power struggle will continue till now.
Justification: Neutral news update.

Text: पावसाच्या व्यत्ययामुळे भारत विरुद्ध न्यूझीलंड सराव सामना रद्द करण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: The India vs New Zealand warm-up match has been called off due to rain disruption.
Justification: Informative update with no strong emotional cue.

Text: मग नारायण राणे काय करणार ? त्याच्यावर अन्याय आहे हा !
translated_text: Then what will Narayan Rane do? It is injustice against him!
Justification: The phrase "अन्याय आहे" (it's injustice) reflects frustration and anger.

Text: महाविकास आघाडी केलीय तर सगळ्यांचे फोटो असणारच, एवढा जळफळात का?
translated_text: If there is a Mahavikas Aghadi, there will be photos of everyone, why are you so jealous?
Justification: The questioning tone and "जळफळात" suggest surprise.

Text: अमृत वचन ...? हा काय प्रकार आहे ...?
translated_text: Amrit Vachan...? What kind of... is this?
Justification: "हा काय प्रकार आहे" reveals bewilderment and surprise.

Text: अहो हे पाळलेले पत्रकार आहेत
translated_text: Hey, these are the journalists who are being followed
Justification: Straightforward, emotionally flat.

Text: काकु, हे भटुकल्यांची सत्ता आली की बलात्कारी लोकांची शिक्षा का माफ केली जाते, बरं?
translated_text: Aunt, why are the punishments of rapists pardoned when the Bhatukalas come to power?
Justification: Rhetorical but maintains a questioning, neutral tone.

Text: त्याल महाराष्ट्राच्या म पेक्षा गुजरातचा गु जास्त आवडतो म्हणून लिहिले नसेल
translated_text: He probably wrote this because he likes Gujarat's cheese more than Maharashtra's cheese.
Justification: Mild sarcasm, neutral in emotion.

Text: तुम्हाला असे वाटते का जनतेला काहीच कळत नाही....कोन पळपुटे आहे ते काल कळाले..
translated_text: Do you think the public doesn't know anything....who is the fugitive was found out yesterday..
Justification: Sarcastic but not emotionally extreme.

Text: त्यांच्याच पक्षात राहुन त्यांना टोमणे मारणं बरं दिसतं का
translated_text: Do you think it's okay to stay in their party and beat them up?
Justification: A rhetorical question that challenges ethics but does not carry strong emotional weight.

Text: रिकाम्या खुर्च्या असताना भाषण चालतात, मग पटसंख्या कमी असल्यास शाळा बंद का?
translated_text: Speeches are held when there are empty chairs, so why close the school if the attendance is low?
Justification: A logical question exposing double standards without emotive language.

Text: आज ऊन पडले आहे त्यामुळे धन्यवाद मोदीजी म्हणायला हरकत नाही
translated_text: It's sunny today, so it's okay to say thank you Modiji.
Justification: Mild sarcasm, delivered in a neutral tone.

Text: गेल्या वर्षातील न्यायालयाचा निकाल पहा. नाहीतर हा माणूस सुद्धा नेहमी मूर्ख बोलतो
translated_text: Look at the court verdict from last year. Otherwise this guy also always talks nonsense.
Justification: The phrase "नेहमी मूर्ख बोलतो" (always talks nonsense) indicates contempt.

Text: दुसऱ्या बातम्या नाहीत का रे भेटत तुम्हाला
translated_text: Is there no other news? I see you.
Justification: A subtle critique on content choice, without emotional intensity.

Text: आपल्या समजण्यापलीकडे आहे
translated_text: It is beyond your understanding.
Justification: A dismissive but emotionally neutral statement.

Text: मतांची लाचारी ... काय होणार महाराष्ट्राचं कुणास ठावूक.
translated_text: The helplessness of votes... who knows what will happen to Maharashtra?
Justification: Expresses concern with a tone of resignation, still neutral.

Text: सरकारी नोकरीची इच्छा अनेकांना बेरोजगार केले आहे.
translated_text: The desire for a government job has made many unemployed.
Justification: A factual statement highlighting a social issue.

Text: ठाकरे गटाला झटका! तीन प्रमुख शिवसेना नेत्यांसह सात जणांवर गुन्हा दाखल
translated_text: A blow to the Thackeray group! Case registered against seven people including three prominent Shiv Sena leaders
Justification: The phrase "झटका" (blow) and mention of legal action indicate strong disapproval and anger.

Text: कसे आहे. फुकटात खायची सवय झाली की असे वाटते
translated_text: How is it? It feels like you've gotten used to eating for free.
Justification: Commentary on entitlement, expressed in a neutral but critical tone.

Text: गुजराथीशी हातमिळवणी केली, म्हणून मराठी भाषा सोडली का राज भाऊ ?
translated_text: Raj Bhau, did you leave Marathi language because you joined hands with Gujarati?
Justification: A critical rhetorical question with neutral emotion.

Text: मी सांगू...? आठ वर्षात देशाची वाट लावणाऱ्या विभुतीचे शिल्पकार...
translated_text: Shall I tell you...? The architect of the wonders that have shaped the country in eight years...
Justification: Sarcasm masked as praise, showing ironic joy.

Text: फोडा फोडी शिवाय दुसरं काय येत का?
translated_text: What else comes out besides the crackling sound?
Justification: Accusatory but emotion remains neutral.

Text: काळात चांदीचे चमचे होते... पण काळात चमच्यांची चांदी होते...
translated_text: In the past, there were silver spoons... But in the past, there was silver for the spoons...
Justification: A play on words reflecting social commentary, emotionally neutral.

Text: नवऱ्याने बायकोच्या पदराआड लाच खायचे काम केले
translated_text: Husband worked behind his wife's back to take bribes
Justification: Commentary on corruption stated plainly.

Text: गरिबांची तळतळाट लागणार मेट्रो ला पुणे मेट्रो शापित मेट्रो होणार आहे हे लक्षात ठेवा
translated_text: Remember that the metro will be a cursed metro, as the poor will be left behind.
Justification: Contains criticism but delivered in neutral wording.

Text: चिन्ह आणि नाव गोठवताना तोंडात काय बोळा घेतलेला का?
translated_text: What did you say when you froze the symbol and name?
Justification: The phrasing implies critique but remains emotionally restrained.

Text: इतक्या खालच्या पातळीत तर मनोरुग्ण ही बोलत नसावेत.
translated_text: Even a mentally ill person shouldn't be speaking at such a low level.
Justification: Judgmental tone, but the emotion is not overtly strong.

Text: चावी दिली की काही ही बोलतील, बोलक्या बाहुल्यामध्ये आणखी एकाची भर आणि काय.
translated_text: If you give them the key, some will talk, adding another one to the talking doll and whatnot.
Justification: A metaphorical jab at conformity, emotionally flat.

Text: खरच पत्रकार दलाल झाले आहेत
translated_text: Journalists have truly become brokers.
Justification: A critical observation stated directly.

Text: चपलेनी होणार नाही फाटका जोडा पहा
translated_text: It won't be a slipper, look at the cracked shoe.
Justification: Figurative expression lacking emotional charge.

Text: निवडणूकीत माघार घ्यायची होती की मुंबई महापालिका निवडणूकी अगोदर चिन्ह गोठविण्याचे षडयंत्र होत..??
translated_text: Was it a plan to withdraw from the elections or was it a conspiracy to freeze the symbol before the Mumbai Municipal Corporation elections??
Justification: A speculative question, neutral in tone.

Text: बीड जिल्ह्यातील शेतकऱ्यांना मदत करा काही तरी ओला दुष्काळ जाहीर करा
translated_text: Help the farmers of Beed district, declare some kind of wet drought
Justification: The sentence "मदत करा काही तरी ओला दुष्काळ जाहीर करा" is a factual plea without emotional coloring.

Text: हिंदुत्ववादी पक्ष फक्त सांगण्यासाठी.... बाकी आचरणात मात्र हिरव्या चादरीवर प्रेम उतू येते...
translated_text: Hindutva parties just say.... but in practice, love for the green sheet comes out...
Justification: The phrase criticizes hypocrisy but does not show clear emotional polarity.

Text: माघार घेऊन ही अंदाज कसा नाही आला तुला भाजप ही सीट हारत होत
translated_text: By withdrawing, how could you not predict that BJP was losing this seat
Justification: The disbelief in "अंदाज कसा नाही आला" signals a tone of surprise.

Text: सहानुभूती वाढली की नाही ते माहीत नाही पण पाकीटाचे वजन नक्कीच वाढले आहे.
translated_text: I don't know if sympathy has increased or not, but the weight of the wallet has definitely increased.
Justification: The sarcastic tone shows skepticism but not a clear emotional tone.

Text: तुमच्या राजकारणात जास्तीची चहापावडर टाकून कोणी कडवटपणा आणतंय का? पंकजा मुंडे म्हणाल्या…
translated_text: Is someone adding bitterness to your politics by adding too much tea powder? Pankaja Munde said…
Justification: The metaphor of "जास्तीची चहापावडर" reflects irritation and bitterness.

Text: वर्षा वर च्या बैठकीत तूला ठोकला म्हणतात...खरे आहे का ते .?
translated_text: They say you were beaten at the Varsha Varsha meeting...is that true?
Justification: The question "खरे आहे का?" reveals surprise or doubt.

Text: अरे काय तुझी भाषा राणे चाच तू पण तुझ्याकडुन काय अपेक्षा
translated_text: Oh, what is your language, Rane? What do you expect from yourself?
Justification: The rhetorical tone and "काय अपेक्षा" reveal sarcastic surprise.

Text: भक्ताना हा व्हिडिओ आवडणार नाही....
translated_text: Devotees will not like this video....
Justification: The preemptive "हा व्हिडिओ आवडणार नाही" implies disdain toward the content.

Text: तो एक बिनडोक सचिन सावंत आणि आत्ता हा एक एका मालेचे मनी.
translated_text: He is a headless Sachin Sawant and now he is a money man.
Justification: Though critical, it’s more descriptive than emotional.

Text: शरद पवार व्हायला तो पिझ्झा काही पाण्यात भिजवून आणलेला नाहीये
translated_text: Sharad Pawar didn't soak the pizza in water to make it taste good.
Justification: The idiom used here is sarcastic but lacks direct emotional tone.

Text: हे बघून दाभोंची आत्मा सुद्धा वारली
translated_text: Seeing this, Dabho's soul also died.
Justification: The phrase "आत्मा सुद्धा वारली" signifies grief or dismay.

Text: या सगळ्या माकडांची लायकी टपल्या खायचीच आहे!
translated_text: All these monkeys deserve to be eaten!
Justification: The phrase "लायकी टपल्या खायचीच आहे" expresses contempt and anger.

Text: ठाकरे गटाच्या नेत्या सुषमा अंधारेंवर गुन्हा दाखल; आता भास्कर जाधवांना अटक होणार?
translated_text: Case registered against Thackeray group leader Sushma Andhare; Will Bhaskar Jadhav be arrested now?
Justification: The sentence presents a factual situation.

Text: म्हणुन तुझा खाज साहेब दुसर्याचा बाप चोरतो ... सुपारी बाज
translated_text: So your father steals someone else's father's... Betel nut hawk
Justification: Sarcastic but not emotionally heavy.

Text: पाऊस आणि विजा
translated_text: Rain and lightning
Justification: Purely descriptive.

Text: फितूर इतिहासात पण होते आणि वर्तमानात पण आहे
translated_text: Fitur existed in history and exists in the present.
Justification: Historically accusative but emotionally neutral.

Text: भाजपा आमदार एक्केचाळीस गद्दार आमदार हे फक्त सतरंज्या उचलणार त्याच काय.?
translated_text: Will the BJP MLAs, forty-one traitorous MLAs, just pick up the chessboard?
Justification: The word "गद्दार" and mocking tone evoke anger.

Text: हा भोसडीचा मिम वाल्यांची मत घेऊन पण डीपॉझीट जप्त झालंय.
translated_text: This Bhosadi meme has been taken away from the people's votes but the deposit has been confiscated.
Justification: Insulting tone, but emotionally neutral context.

Text: जास्त मस्ती ना आपल्यात...सुट्टी होती आज, पावसापाण्याच थांबायचं ना घरी
translated_text: We didn't have much fun...it was a holiday today, we had to wait for the rain at home.
Justification: "सुट्टी होती... थांबायचं ना घरी" shows disappointment.

Text: हे त्यांना कळतयं पण वळत नाही.
translated_text: They know this but they don't change.
Justification: Expresses frustration but not strongly emotional.

Text: यांचा बाप संताची परंपरा असलेल्या सुसंस्कृत महाराष्ट्राचा मुख्यमंत्री होते.,आख, कुटुंब पिसाळलय ,
translated_text: His father was the Chief Minister of the cultured Maharashtra, which had a tradition of saints.
Justification: Descriptive commentary.

Text: म्हणजे फडणवीस साहेबावर विश्वास नही का तुझा ? गृहखात कोणाकडे आहे
translated_text: So you don't trust Fadnavis sir? Who has the house account?
Justification: Rhetorical, mildly skeptical but neutral.

Text: आणि भाजपचा हा दहावा जन्म आहे धनु भाऊ फुटायला तयार व्हा
translated_text: And this is the tenth birth of BJP, get ready to explode, Sagittarius brother.
Justification: "दहावा जन्म" implies sarcasm but lacks emotional intensity, so it remains neutral.

Text: हे विधान वादग्रस्त त्यांच्यासाठी आहे ज्यांना छत्रपती,शाहू,फुले,आंबेडकर यांचे वावडे आहे.
translated_text: This statement is controversial for those who are fond of Chhatrapati, Shahu, Phule, and Ambedkar.
Justification: The statement targets a group but does not show overt emotion.

Text: गद्दारांनो ढाल-तलवार चिन्ह मिळवून उपयोग काय, आयुष्यभर च्या पदराखालीच लपायचं आहे तुम्हाला..
translated_text: Traitors, what's the use of getting the shield and sword symbol? You want to hide under the cover of your whole life.
Justification: The term "गद्दारांनो" and mocking tone reflects contempt.

Text: खंजीर ऐवजी तलवार खुपसाल पण ती हीं पाठीवरच
translated_text: You can stab a sword instead of a dagger, but it will still be in the back.
Justification: The statement is metaphorical but emotionally flat.

Text: हिच बातमी यूपी मध्ये घडली असती तर आत्तापर्यंत गप्प बसले असते का?
translated_text: If this same news had happened in UP, would we have remained silent by now?
Justification: Questioning tone but does not convey a clear emotion.

Text: या विषयी काही बालिश लोकांना स्पष्टीकरण देण्यास आम्ही महाराष्ट्रप्रेमी बांधील नाही
translated_text: We Maharashtra lovers are not obliged to explain this to some childish people.
Justification: The term "बालिश लोकांना" adds sarcasm, but emotion is muted.

Text: फडणवीस म्हणजे नोकर भरतीला लागलेली कीड आहे...
translated_text: Fadnavis is a pest in the recruitment industry...
Justification: Despite being an insult, the tone is sarcastic and neutral in emotion.

Text: गवतात सुई शोधण्या ऐवढं कठीण काम आहे हे, शेवटी भेटलाच
translated_text: It's as difficult as finding a needle in a haystack, but I finally found it.
Justification: Metaphor used, with no emotional charge.

Text: आम्हाला अर्धवट ज्ञान नाही. अंधभक्तना पूर्ण अज्ञानी आहेत.
translated_text: We do not have partial knowledge. Blind devotees are completely ignorant.
Justification: Strong claim, but not emotionally charged.

Text: काय बाई हा अट्टाहास, मागील महिन्यात कुठे होतात ताई ? जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: What kind of woman is this? Where have you been in the last month? Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: "काय बाई हा अट्टाहास" indicates astonishment.

Text: थापाडे ...... आणि गद्दाराला आठवण करून देण्यासाठी .... किती हि नामुष्की.
translated_text: Slap......and to remind the traitor....what a shame.
Justification: The phrase "गद्दाराला आठवण" adds emotional contempt.

Text: किती ही बनवाबनवी आधी त्रास द्यायचं आणि नंतर गुळुगुली करायचं. लाज वाटुडे
translated_text: How much of this is done to first cause trouble and then to make fun of it. Shame on you.
Justification: "लाज वाटुडे" reflects moral disgust.

Text: अहो तुमच्या पुण्याच्या नवीन शिल्पकारांनी केलेत हे हाल त्यांचे
translated_text: Hey, your new sculptors of Pune have done this to them.
Justification: Reporting tone, emotionally flat.

Text: जुलाब लागून आतून सगळा खोकला झाल्यावर खोकायला..... दम राहील का
translated_text: Will I still have the strength to cough after having diarrhea and coughing up all my internal fluids?
Justification: Humorous metaphor, not emotionally charged.

Text: हे एक शकुनी सांगत आहे
translated_text: This is an omen.
Justification: Figurative, but emotionally neutral.

Text: बोलायचं नाही नागडे करून पार्श्वभागात फटके दयायचे ह्यांना ह्याच लायकीचे आहेत हे कुत्रे
translated_text: These dogs deserve nothing more than to be stripped naked and spanked on the back.
Justification: Extremely derogatory tone shows disgust.

Text: या गांडूचा ट्विटर खाते आहे का??
translated_text: Does this worm have a Twitter account??
Justification: The question has a sarcastic and surprised tone.

Text: काल योद्धा अर्ज माघार साठी लोटांगण घेत होत. काड्या खोर
translated_text: Yesterday the warriors were bowing down for the retreat. The swords were in the air.
Justification: Observational, not emotionally loaded.

Text: हल्ली रिक्षावाले उन्मत, खुनशी होत चालले आहेत.
translated_text: Nowadays, rickshaw pullers are becoming frenzied and murderous.
Justification: Slight concern but not expressive of a strong emotion.

Text: याला म्हणतात भक्ती... धन्य ते अंध भक्त आणि त्यांची भक्ती
translated_text: This is called devotion... Blessed are the blind devotees and their devotion.
Justification: Satirical tone but not emotionally intense.

Text: आई: रस्तावर गेलास तर तांगडे तोडून गळ्यात अडकविन समजल का पोट्ट:
translated_text: Mother: If you go on the road, will you understand without breaking the rope and getting it stuck around your neck?
Justification: Aggressive speech, yet contextually neutral.

Text: संविधान ने कशात अडकविले आहे!? म्हणुन राजकारण तसे होत आहे!
translated_text: What has the Constitution trapped us in?! So politics is happening like that!
Justification: "अडकविले" conveys frustration and anger.

Text: आष्टा परिसरात विजेचा लपंडाव ;अनियमीत भारनियमन, वाढती वीज देयके आणि गैरसोयींमुळे नागरिक त्रस्त
translated_text: Electricity outage in Ashta area; citizens suffer due to irregular load shedding, rising electricity bills and inconveniences
Justification: Informational tone with no clear emotional cue.

Text: समाजमत तुम्ही एकटे स्वतःच कसे ठरवता हा तर सत्तेचा अहंकार
translated_text: How you alone determine public opinion is the arrogance of power.
Justification: "सत्तेचा अहंकार" highlights power arrogance but remains emotionally controlled.

Text: या अशा व्यक्तींमुळे आपला हिंदु धर्म बदनाम होतो आहे.
translated_text: Our Hindu religion is being defamed because of such people.
Justification: The phrase "बदनाम होतो आहे" signals moral disgust.

Text: गद्दारांना उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे या नावाची किंमत काय कळणार
translated_text: Will traitors know the value of the name Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray?
Justification: "गद्दारांना" and value judgment shows disdain.

Text: तूम्ही कोंबड्या चोरायच काम चालू ठेवा बाकीचं नंतर बघू
translated_text: You too, keep stealing chickens, we'll see about the rest later.
Justification: Sarcastic but emotionally neutral.

Text: आज दिवस कमी पडेल तुला माझ्या भावनांना आवर घालायला
translated_text: Today will be a day when you will have to restrain my feelings.
Justification: Expressive statement but not emotionally intense.

Text: येडे झाले आहेत का ही लोक?
translated_text: Are these people crazy?
Justification: "येडे" implies shock or surprise at behavior.

Text: ढ रौतशेणक्यांना राज्य आणि एक प्रायव्हेट क्रिकेट संघटना एकच वाटतायत. कठीणै !
translated_text: The Rautshenkas consider the state and a private cricket organization to be one and the same. Hardly!
Justification: Commentary with sarcasm, yet neutral.

Text: ऐकले तर काय झाले? तुमचा खड्डा नाही का रंगा बिल्ला च ऐकत
translated_text: What if you listen? Isn't your pit listening to the colored badger?
Justification: Criticism without strong emotional cue.

Text: साठेबाजी करून भाव वाढवायचा विचार दिसतोय तुमचा... जाहीर निषेध
translated_text: It seems you are planning to increase prices by hoarding... Public protest
Justification: "जाहीर निषेध" is a classic anger signal.

Text: नक्कीच भक्त आहे हा. मानसिक विकलांग
translated_text: He is definitely a devotee. Mentally disabled
Justification: Strong wording but no clear emotion besides sarcasm.

Text: कितीही विष कालवा काहीच फायदा होणार नाही... तुमचा पराभव निश्चित आहे महाराष्ट्रात.
translated_text: No amount of poison will be of any use... Your defeat is certain in Maharashtra.
Justification: Assertion without overt emotion.

Text: तेव्हा मरायला टेकले असा अभिनय होता बहुतेक तुरुंगातून बाहेर पडल्यावर भुजा मध्ये बळ संचारले
translated_text: At that time, it was like he was about to die. Most of the time, after getting out of prison, his arms felt stronger.
Justification: Commentary on dramatics, not emotionally loaded.

Text: ही जलेबी बनविण्याच्या लयकीचीच आहे. उगाच अमरावती वाल्यांनी डोक्यावर घेतलं हिला.
translated_text: This is the perfect dish for making jalebi. No wonder the people of Amravati took it upon themselves.
Justification: Playful jab — "लयकीचीच आहे" brings a joyful tone.

Text: सत्य गेल्यापासून उद्धावाच्या डोक्यावर परिणाम झाला आहे....
translated_text: Since Satya passed away, Uddhav's head has been affected....
Justification: "परिणाम झाला आहे" following a loss reflects sorrow.

Text: मग आधी निवडणूक लढविण्यासाठी युती करून गुडघ्याला बाशिंग का बांधले
translated_text: Then why did they form an alliance to contest the election and then beat the shit out of it?
Justification: "गुडघ्याला बाशिंग" and questioning tone signal surprise.

Text: बघ आता कोण फूस झाला ते? हाडकाची चिंता कर, तेही मिळणार नाही नंतर
translated_text: Look who got seduced now? Worry about the bones, you won't get them later.
Justification: Tone of astonishment — "फूस झाला" indicates surprise.

Text: म्हणून सगळे प्रकाश बाबा आमटे होतं नाही
translated_text: So all the light is not from Baba Amte.
Justification: Moral statement, no high emotion.

Text: शाकाहारी हिंदू राष्ट्र का? असे असेल तर मांसाहारी हिंदुंचे काय?
translated_text: Why a vegetarian Hindu nation? If so, what about non-vegetarian Hindus?
Justification: Questioning identity without strong emotion.

Text: नुसते हिंदू संघटन विचारले तर यांची एवढी चिडचिड होताय कोणत्या पातळीवर पोहचलेत हे भोसरीचे
translated_text: If you just ask Hindu organizations, they are so irritated. What level has Bhosari reached?
Justification: Mild irritation but not emotion-rich.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री भेटलाय का मुंडके हलवणारा नंदीबैल तेच समजत नाही.....
translated_text: The Nandi Bail, who shakes his head, doesn't understand whether he has met the Chief Minister.....
Justification: Symbolic phrasing, no overt emotion.

Text: उमेदवारी रद्द होईल म्हणून हे नाटक केले असणार
translated_text: This drama must have been staged so that the candidature would be cancelled.
Justification: Statement of motive, not emotion.

Text: संग्या कोपर्डी बद्दल बोलत नाहीस तू , अजूनही शिक्षा झाली नाही गुन्हेगारांना.
translated_text: You are not talking about Sangya Kopardi, the criminals have not been punished yet.
Justification: Concern-driven but emotionally calm.

Text: पावसाळ्यात शहरे तुडुंब भरतात ती याच सिमेंटच्या रस्त्यांमुळे
translated_text: It is because of these cement roads that cities get flooded during the monsoon season.
Justification: Factual tone, lacks emotional intensity.

Text: थाळ्या वाजवून करोना गेला.... तस बघा ना पावसासाठी काही आहे का??....
translated_text: Corona went away with a bang.... So look, is there anything for the rain??....
Justification: Sarcasm present, but not an emotion-heavy statement.

Text: नापास होणार साहेब तूम्ही या परीक्षेत - एकनिष्ठ शिवसनिक.
translated_text: You too will fail this exam, sir - a loyal Shiv Sannik.
Justification: Sarcastic tone, no emotional intensity.

Text: एवढी फाटलेली तर मुख्यमंत्री पदी बसुन हे तुच्यातले गतीमंद विचाराची दखल्ल घेतली नाही
translated_text: If you are so torn, then you have not taken into account the dynamic thinking within you, even after sitting as the Chief Minister.
Justification: Critical language, yet emotionally measured.

Text: हे विधान वादग्रस्त त्यांच्यासाठी आहे ज्यांना छत्रपती,शाहू,फुले,आंबेडकर यांचे वावडे आहे.
translated_text: This statement is controversial for those who are fond of Chhatrapati, Shahu, Phule, and Ambedkar.
Justification: The mention of revered figures like "छत्रपती, शाहू, फुले, आंबेडकर" signals sociopolitical concern but not overt sentiment.

Text: गद्दारांनो ढाल-तलवार चिन्ह मिळवून उपयोग काय, आयुष्यभर च्या पदराखालीच लपायचं आहे तुम्हाला..
translated_text: Traitors, what's the use of getting the shield and sword symbol? You want to hide under the cover of your whole life.
Justification: Use of "गद्दारांनो" and "पदराखालीच लपायचं" clearly conveys disgust.

Text: खंजीर ऐवजी तलवार खुपसाल पण ती हीं पाठीवरच
translated_text: You can stab a sword instead of a dagger, but it will still be in the back.
Justification: Phrase "पाठीवरच" refers to betrayal but stated flatly, indicating neutrality.

Text: तरी अस माझ्या सोबतच का होत ?
translated_text: Why is this happening to me?
Justification: The rhetorical question "का होत?" expresses personal confusion and surprise.

Text: हिच बातमी यूपी मध्ये घडली असती तर आत्तापर्यंत गप्प बसले असते का?
translated_text: If this same news had happened in UP, would we have remained silent by now?
Justification: It's a critique with regional reference but lacks personal emotional tone.

Text: फडणवीस म्हणजे नोकर भरतीला लागलेली कीड आहे...
translated_text: Fadnavis is a pest in the recruitment industry...
Justification: The metaphor "कीड आहे" is harsh but delivered without personal emotion.

Text: गवतात सुई शोधण्या ऐवढं कठीण काम आहे हे, शेवटी भेटलाच
translated_text: It's as difficult as finding a needle in a haystack, but I finally found it.
Justification: A figurative phrase showing effort, not emotion.

Text: काय बाई हा अट्टाहास, मागील महिन्यात कुठे होतात ताई ? जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: What kind of woman is this? Where have you been in the last month? Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "हा अट्टाहास" implies exasperated surprise.

Text: किती ही बनवाबनवी आधी त्रास द्यायचं आणि नंतर गुळुगुली करायचं. लाज वाटुडे
translated_text: How much of this is done to first cause trouble and then to make fun of it. Shame on you.
Justification: "लाज वाटुडे" clearly expresses disgust toward hypocrisy.

Text: अहो तुमच्या पुण्याच्या नवीन शिल्पकारांनी केलेत हे हाल त्यांचे
translated_text: Hey, your new sculptors of Pune have done this to them.
Justification: A critical comment but no emotional language used.

Text: त्या आबा पाटील ला भेटेल तीथे तुडवा घात केला समाजाचा एक मराठा लाख मराठा
translated_text: When they meet that Aba Patil, they destroy and kill one lakh Marathas of the community.
Justification: Violent imagery "तुडवा घात" indicates disgust.

Text: हे एक शकुनी सांगत आहे
translated_text: This is an omen.
Justification: Simply a metaphorical reference, no emotion.

Text: प्रयत्नांचा आणि अपयशाचा आदर केला जात नाही हे अगदी % बरोबर आहे.....
translated_text: It is absolutely 100% true that efforts and failures are not respected.....
Justification: A general observation, not an emotional reaction.

Text: निषेध निषेध निषेध... कोणत्या थराला जातील हे भयानक विकृती आहे...
translated_text: Protest, protest, protest... It's a terrible perversion to what level they will go...
Justification: Repetition and "भयानक विकृती" express disgust.

Text: बोलायचं नाही नागडे करून पार्श्वभागात फटके दयायचे ह्यांना ह्याच लायकीचे आहेत हे कुत्रे
translated_text: These dogs deserve nothing more than to be stripped naked and spanked on the back.
Justification: Extremely strong disgust via "ह्याच लायकीचे" and "फटके दयायचे".

Text: या गांडूचा ट्विटर खाते आहे का??
translated_text: Does this worm have a Twitter account??
Justification: Use of "गांडूचा" adds shock value and surprise.

Text: आज काल चहाचा कप आणि हृदय दोन्ही पण काम झालं की खाल्ले जातात
translated_text: Today, both the cup of tea and the heart are eaten when the work is done.
Justification: Philosophical metaphor without emotion.

Text: याला म्हणतात भक्ती... धन्य ते अंध भक्त आणि त्यांची भक्ती
translated_text: This is called devotion... Blessed are the blind devotees and their devotion.
Justification: Sarcastic tone, emotionally flat.

Text: आई: रस्तावर गेलास तर तांगडे तोडून गळ्यात अडकविन समजल का पोट्ट:
translated_text: Mother: If you go on the road, will you understand without breaking the rope and getting it stuck around your neck?
Justification: Crude parental threat but no strong affect.

Text: मोदीजिंचा असा अपमान सहन केला जाणार नाही.. णीशेध..
translated_text: Modiji will not tolerate such an insult.. Nishedh..
Justification: Use of "सहन केला जाणार नाही" signals anger.

Text: संविधान ने कशात अडकविले आहे!? म्हणुन राजकारण तसे होत आहे!
translated_text: What has the Constitution trapped us in?! So politics is happening like that!
Justification: Rhetorical frustration toward politics and law implies anger.

Text: दोन्ही निशाणी चुकीच्या आहेत आणि त्यामुळे पोस्ट गंडलेली आहे.
translated_text: Both marks are wrong and therefore the post is garbled.
Justification: Critique stated plainly.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचा पक्ष, त्यांनी पक्ष उभा केला आणि त्यांनीच संपवला, त्यांची मर्जी, आपला काय संबंध?
translated_text: Balasaheb's party, he founded the party and he ended it, his will, what does it have to do with us?
Justification: Phrase "त्यांची मर्जी, आपला काय संबंध?" reflects a detached tone, showing no strong emotion.

Text: हा भ्रष्ट छगण्या आम्हाला शिकवणार का साला
translated_text: Will this corrupt bastard teach us anything?
Justification: Word "भ्रष्ट" expresses contempt and triggers anger.

Text: पुणे तिथे भाजपमुळे सर्व उणेच उणे
translated_text: In Pune, everything is negative because of BJP.
Justification: Repetition of "उणेच उणे" signals criticism but in a factual, neutral tone.

Text: आधीच निर्णय झाला होता तर विधानसभा मध्ये कोणत्या तोंडाने सांगितले होते?
translated_text: If the decision had already been made, who spoke in the assembly?
Justification: Phrase "कोणत्या तोंडाने" questions credibility but remains neutral.

Text: तिथे पैसे भेटले, इथे भाजप मजबूत म्हणून इतरांना पैसे नाही दिले, म्हणून हे सगळ
translated_text: Money was found there, here BJP is strong, so no money was given to others, hence all this.
Justification: Descriptive tone without emotional weight.

Text: हि इतिहासाची पुनरावृत्ती आहे. अंगावर आले तर शिंगावर घेऊ..
translated_text: This is history repeating itself. If it comes to you, take it by the horns.
Justification: Phrase "शिंगावर घेऊ" shows assertiveness, not emotion.

Text: मराठी अस्मिता वारली का रे कि गुतरातचा' ग' आवडायला लागला.
translated_text: Has Marathi identity died that I started liking the 'G' in the guttural sound?
Justification: The sarcastic use of "गुतरातचा' ग'" critiques identity loss in a neutral tone.

Text: विनाशकाले विपरीत बुद्धी अशी गत झालेली आहे भाजप नेत्यांची
translated_text: BJP leaders have become such averse to wisdom during times of destruction.
Justification: Idiom "विनाशकाले विपरीत बुद्धी" is proverbial and observational, not emotional.

Text: जाहिल तो जाहिल होते है
translated_text: Jahil To Jahil Hote Hai
Justification: Statement about ignorance stated matter-of-factly.

Text: संजय जाधव यांना राज्य सभेत पराभूत करताना कुठे गेली होती संस्कृती? खोक्याची विकृती
translated_text: Where did culture go when Sanjay Jadhav was defeated in the Rajya Sabha? The distortion of the box
Justification: Phrase "खोक्याची विकृती" signals criticism but with neutral delivery.

Text: लय पांचट होत हे अन्या
translated_text: The rhythm is becoming fivefold.
Justification: Use of "पांचट" implies triviality without emotion.

Text: साताऱ्यात कार आणि टेंपोचा भीषण अपघात; जण जागीच ठार
translated_text: Fatal accident between car and tempo in Satara; One killed on the spot
Justification: Word "भीषण अपघात" and "ठार" clearly signify a tragic incident.

Text: हे गद्दार चे प्यादे आहेत,
translated_text: These are the pawns of the traitor,
Justification: Use of "गद्दार" and "प्यादे" directly conveys anger and betrayal.

Text: सर्व सामान्य माणसांना पडलेला प्रश्न एवढा अमाम पैसा कुठून येतो आहे ?
translated_text: The question that all ordinary people have is where does all this money come from?
Justification: Inquiry-based with no emotion-laden language.

Text: ट्विट करताना तू सोबत का नाही ठेवला आम्ही किती दिवस वाट बघावी आता
translated_text: Why didn't you keep it with you while tweeting? How long should we wait now?
Justification: Phrase "किती दिवस वाट बघावी" signals impatience and surprise.

Text: दुसरे नांव सुचले नाही? अफझलखान च का
translated_text: No other name suggested? Why Afzal Khan?
Justification: Rhetorical tone, mildly accusative but neutral.

Text: मौनमोहन सारखे मौन ठेवायला शिकला तरी पुष्कळ आहे
translated_text: Even if you learn to remain silent like Maunmohan, it is still a lot.
Justification: Satirical mention of "मौनमोहन", yet not affectively loaded.

Text: देशाचा आणि राज्याचा बँड वाजवलाय तो कमी जो गरब्यात जाऊन वाजवाय लागलेत
translated_text: The country's and state's bands have played less than the ones that have started playing Garba.
Justification: Sarcasm with "गरब्यात जाऊन वाजवाय" stated neutrally.

Text: आणि गद्दारीबद्दल तुमचेपण आभार!!!!!
translated_text: And thank you for the betrayal!!!!!
Justification: "गद्दारीबद्दल आभार" clearly reflects biting sarcasm and anger.

Text: भिक्कार आहे..उगाच कोणी विचारत नाही तरी टिवटिव करत असतो. चम्या!
translated_text: He's a beggar..he keeps tweeting even when no one asks. Chamya!
Justification: "भिक्कार" and "टिवटिव" convey scorn and disgust.

Text: चुना आयोग आहे फक्त चुना लावयच काम चालू आहे
translated_text: There is a lime commission, only the lime application is being done.
Justification: Sarcastic but flat in delivery.

Text: म्हनूनच, नावबदलू खात्याने त्यांचे नाव - "फडफडणारे कासावीस" असे ठेवन्याचा निर्णय घेतला आहे!!
translated_text: That's why the renaming department has decided to rename them - "Flattfadnare Kasavis"!!
Justification: Humorous phrase "फडफडणारे कासावीस" shows mocking joy.

Text: करायचं.....नेनेने आणि लाज का बाळगायची.... बनेने?
translated_text: Why should we be ashamed of doing it...?
Justification: The rhetorical question reflects contempt and disgust.

Text: हे खोटं दाखवाव लागत....नाहीतर यांचे पक्ष टिकणार कसे अन् यांची घर भरणार कशी.
translated_text: This lie has to be exposed...otherwise, how will their party survive and how will their house be filled?
Justification: Phrase "पक्ष टिकणार कसे" critiques survival tactics, still neutral.

Text: मरतो का काय मी.. पाणी आणलंस रे डोळ्यात!
translated_text: Am I dying? You've brought tears to my eyes!
Justification: Emotional line "पाणी आणलंस डोळ्यात" expresses sadness.

Text: यांचा एकच हेतू होता शिवसेनेचे चिन्ह गोठवायचं
translated_text: Their only intention was to freeze the Shiv Sena symbol.
Justification: The phrase "शिवसेनेचे चिन्ह गोठवायचं" conveys a political objective without emotional charge.

Text: आम्ही तक्रार कोणाकडे करायची असे तर खूप रिक्षा टॅक्सी नकार देतात
translated_text: Many rickshaw taxis refuse to let us complain to whom?
Justification: The phrase "रिक्षा टॅक्सी नकार देतात" reflects a factual grievance, neutrally expressed.

Text: हे बेक्कार होत
translated_text: This is getting boring.
Justification: Use of "बेक्कार" signals disinterest without strong emotion.

Text: निरज चोप्रा पेक्ष्या खुप लांब च फ़ेकलात आपण.
translated_text: You are a long way from Neeraj Chopra.
Justification: A neutral comparison to Neeraj Chopra, not emotionally charged.

Text: ओशाळल्यागत होतं का
translated_text: Was it raining?
Justification: Figurative tone using "ओशाळल्यागत", expressing mild irony but neutral.

Text: मुंबईची दर वर्षी तुंबई होते, त्याचा शिल्पकारांबद्दल सुद्धा बोला.
translated_text: Mumbai has a Tumbai every year, let's also talk about its sculptors.
Justification: The wordplay "तुंबई" is sarcastic, yet factual and neutral.

Text: लाचारी करून खूर्ची ग्यायची सवय पण नाही दादा आम्हाला..
translated_text: We don't have the habit of being helpless and falling into a chair, Dada.
Justification: The phrase "लाचारी करून" critiques submission but stays neutral in tone.

Text: हे तर उद्धव ठाकरेंवर अन्याय करुन त्यांना निवडणूकिसाठी पोषक वातावरणच आहे....
translated_text: This is an injustice to Uddhav Thackeray and a fertile environment for him to win elections...
Justification: "उद्धव ठाकरेंवर अन्याय" conveys a sense of wrong and injustice.

Text: हे विधान वैशाख नंदनाचे आहे….बिनपैंद्याच्या लोट्या वा….गळे काढत रहा!
translated_text: This statement is from Vaishakh Nandana... keep on cutting off your necks, you idiot!
Justification: The slur "बिनपैंद्याच्या लोट्या" expresses mocking anger.

Text: भाजप ला घराणेशाही संपवायची आहे त्यामुळे ही असली स्वप्नं बघू नका राजसाहेब
translated_text: BJP wants to end dynastic rule, so don't dream of this, Rajsaheb.
Justification: Statement about ideology, "घराणेशाही संपवायची" is neutral in tone.

Text: तुम्ही त्यांचा कायमच अनियमित वीजपुरवठा वापरता..आणि त्याचे नियमित बिल वेळेत भरता..त्याची ही शिक्षा..
translated_text: You always use their irregular electricity supply..and pay their regular bill on time..this is their punishment..
Justification: Phrase "त्याची ही शिक्षा" reflects perceived injustice and anger.

Text: विकास, स्मार्ट सिटी, च्या नावाखाली जनतेची फसवणुक अन् राजकारण्यांची श्रीमंती हे दिसत आहे
translated_text: In the name of development and smart cities, the people are being deceived and the wealth of politicians is being increased.
Justification: "फसवणुक" is accusatory but the tone remains expository.

Text: विचारांची नीच पातळी पहा. अशी विकृत मानसिकता समाजासाठी अत्यंत घातक आहे
translated_text: Look at the low level of thinking. Such a distorted mindset is very dangerous for society.
Justification: The phrase "विकृत मानसिकता" shows disgust at thinking pattern.

Text: तुमचं सायबाला काय लागू होते लाचारी ,
translated_text: What does your helplessness have to do with Saiba?
Justification: Mild irony; phrase "लाचारी" points to passive behavior, still neutral.

Text: सुंभ जळला पण पिळ नाही गेला अजून
translated_text: The fire is burning but the pain is not gone yet.
Justification: Proverbial phrasing, metaphorical and neutral.

Text: आमचे आणि शेजारच्या रव्याचे भांडण झाले त्यामुळे ह्या वर्षी रव्याचे लाडू कॅन्सल!
translated_text: We had a fight with our neighbor's semolina, so this year's semolina laddus are canceled!
Justification: Phrase "भांडण झाले" and cancellation of a tradition shows emotional resentment.

Text: नक्की बाळासाहेब देवरस कारण कमळाबाईने गद्दारांच्या खांदयावर बंदुक ठेवून चा अजेंडा चालवला आहे.
translated_text: Definitely Balasaheb Deoras because Kamalabai has carried out his agenda by placing a gun on the shoulders of traitors.
Justification: Use of "गद्दारांच्या खांदयावर बंदुक" metaphorically shows disgust.

Text: मान्य मी नाही संजयने करायचं आहे. बुद्धू
translated_text: Agreed, not me, Sanjay wants to do it. Buddhu
Justification: Word "बुद्धू" adds slight ridicule, still mostly neutral.

Text: शेंडी जानवे पुरातन काळापासून काही ही खात... अगदी माती सुद्धा.
translated_text: The Shandi Janwe have been eating anything since ancient times... even soil.
Justification: Phrase "माती सुद्धा" exaggerates for satire, emotionally neutral.

Text: चड्डीत नाही.. गुदद्वार
translated_text: Not in shorts.. anus
Justification: Vulgar and literal, with no sentiment attached.

Text: हे बरोबर नाही अध्यक्ष महोदय. वेळ कुणावरही येऊ शकते
translated_text: This is not right, Mr. President. Time can come to anyone.
Justification: The phrase "हे बरोबर नाही" expresses objection and mild anger.

Text: सुप्रभात !!! आज रडलेले चेहरे आणि रडक्या प्रतिक्रिया बघायला सज्ज व्हा ...
translated_text: Good morning!!! Get ready to see crying faces and tearful reactions today...
Justification: Phrase "रडलेले चेहरे" is used mockingly, indicating schadenfreude.

Text: बुध्दी मध्ये आणखी सुधारणेची नित्यंत गरज आहे, डासा जी !! बाकी पप्पु सारखाच आहेस
translated_text: There is a constant need for further improvement in intelligence, Dasaa Ji!! Otherwise you are just like Pappu
Justification: The phrase "पप्पु सारखाच आहेस" is teasing but non-emotional.

Text: कस कोण उद्योजक येईल महाराष्ट्रात... हे अस होत असेल तर.
translated_text: How will any entrepreneur come to Maharashtra... if this is happening?
Justification: Phrasing "हे अस होत असेल तर" shows concern, remains neutral.

Text: त्याची काळजी तुमच्या सारख्या गद्दारांना कारयची गरज नाही..
translated_text: Traitors like you don't need to worry about it.
Justification: Word "गद्दारांना" reflects contempt, but overall tone is restrained.

Text: खरे कॉंग्रेसी आहेत... अजून गाडी तच अडकलीय म्हणजे
translated_text: There are real Congressmen... they are still stuck in the car.
Justification: The phrase "गाडी तच अडकलीय" conveys surprise over stagnation or lack of progress.

Text: अण म्हणे मी बाळासाहेबांचा सच्चा शिवसैनिक आणि दिघे साहेबांचा शिष्य! हाड भेदऱ्या, गद्दारा
translated_text: I am a true Shiv Sainik of Balasaheb and a disciple of Dighe Saheb! A traitor, a traitor
Justification: Use of terms like "हाड भेदऱ्या, गद्दारा" clearly expresses anger and betrayal.

Text: इतका आडाणी असशील वाटल नव्हत... आणि ते आचार्य ऐवजी आडाणी करून घे...
translated_text: I didn't think you were so rude... and instead of being a teacher, you should be rude...
Justification: The phrase "आडाणी करून घे" is derogatory and highlights frustration and anger.

Text: मराठा आरक्षणाची मागणी म्हणजे खाज आहे का? राष्ट्रवादीने सावंतांचा राजीनामाच मागितला….
translated_text: Is the demand for Maratha reservation a hoax? The NCP demanded Sawant's resignation...
Justification: The rhetorical question "खाज आहे का?" reflects indignation and political anger.

Text: नागपूरची माणसं मराठी असून हिंदी का बोलत असतील...
translated_text: Why would the people of Nagpur speak Hindi even though they are Marathi...
Justification: The question is observational and posed neutrally.

Text: आजचा दिवस म्हणजे पालथ्या घड्यावर पाणी याचा प्रत्यय देणारा असो चालायचंच
translated_text: Today is a day that symbolizes the water on the water tank, so let's keep going.
Justification: Use of the idiom "पालथ्या घड्यावर पाणी" implies futility, yet is neutrally stated.

Text: हा दुजाभाव का??जर ह्या यंत्रणा स्वायत्त संस्था आहे मग असा भेदभाव का??
translated_text: Why this hostility? If this system is an autonomous organization, then why such discrimination?
Justification: "दुजाभाव" and repeated questioning express disbelief and surprise.

Text: काहीही होत नाही. संपले आहेत आता.
translated_text: Nothing happens. It's over now.
Justification: The phrase "संपले आहेत" conveys resignation and neutrality.

Text: कुठून येतो हा अतिआत्मविश्वास
translated_text: Where does this overconfidence come from?
Justification: Use of "अतिआत्मविश्वास" suggests incredulity and surprise.

Text: पण तुमच्यावर एवढा राग का आहे त्याचा? खोडसाळपणे केल्यासारखं वाटतंय ते ट्विट.
translated_text: But why are you so angry with him? That tweet seems like a prank.
Justification: The term "खोडसाळपणे" expresses confusion and mild surprise.

Text: शिल्लक सेनेत सगळेच भेदरलेत म्हणून अशी बाष्कळ भाषा वापरत आहेत राऊत, अंधारे,जाधव,सावंत
translated_text: Raut, Andhare, Jadhav, Sawant are using such vulgar language because everyone has infiltrated the remaining army.
Justification: Words like "बाष्कळ भाषा" show disapproval and disgust at the tone used.

Text: शिवसेना उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे पक्षाचे नेते आमदार भास्कर जाधव यांच्या घरावर हल्याचा प्रयत्न
translated_text: Attempted attack on the house of Shiv Sena leader Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray's MLA Bhaskar Jadhav
Justification: The phrase "हल्याचा प्रयत्न" indicates fear and threat.

Text: सगळ्या किडीना तृप्त करून पोसतोय कोण
translated_text: Who is satisfying and feeding all the worms
Justification: Though sarcastic, it stays within a neutral sentiment.

Text: आश्चर्य हे की वर्ष घाणेरडे राजकारण करून सुद्धा हे त्यांच्या वळचणीला जाऊन उभे..
translated_text: It's surprising that despite years of dirty politics, they are still standing by their side.
Justification: Although the term "घाणेरडे राजकारण" is critical, the tone is overall neutral.

Text: घंटा फरक पडत नाही. ....काहीच वाकड करू शकत नाही.
translated_text: The bell doesn't matter. ....it can't do anything wrong.
Justification: The casual phrasing "घंटा फरक पडत नाही" expresses apathy neutrally.

Text: याला याच्या बुडाखालचा अंधार दिसत नाही.
translated_text: He doesn't see the darkness beneath his canopy.
Justification: A metaphorical remark, critical but neutrally phrased.

Text: उपऱ्या ट्विट सेव्ह कर म्हटला होता त्याचे काय झालं कर्ज बुडव्या
translated_text: What happened to the tweet that said "Save the tweet"? The debt is sinking.
Justification: The disbelief in "काय झालं" reflects surprise.

Text: पण हे धर्मयुद्ध आहे .
translated_text: But this is a religious war.
Justification: The statement "धर्मयुद्ध" is assertive, yet conveyed neutrally.

Text: या बलात्कारी लोकांच्या सीबीआय एन्क्वायरी कधी लावणार.
translated_text: When will the CBI inquiry be conducted into these rapists?
Justification: The phrase "सीबीआय एन्क्वायरी कधी" questions justice, stated in a neutral tone.

Text: ही बावनकुळे नाहीत दूधखुळे आहेत
translated_text: These are not Bawankuls, they are Dudhkhulas.
Justification: A play on words with sarcasm but no overt emotion.

Text: महागाई पण खूप झाली आहे तेवढी तुमच्या साहेबांना सांगून कमी करायला सांगा
translated_text: Inflation has become too high, so tell your boss and ask him to reduce it.
Justification: Economic concern expressed neutrally through "महागाई".

Text: हा शहाण पण त्या रत्नागिरी च्या बोबड्याला पण शिकवा.
translated_text: This wise man should also teach that fool from Ratnagiri.
Justification: The term "बोबड्याला" implies contempt and disgust.

Text: अवघड आहे
translated_text: It is difficult.
Justification: The use of "अवघड आहे" expresses a tone of difficulty and emotional burden.

Text: कर्तव्य बजावत असताना शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना कोटी कोटी नमन.
translated_text: Millions of salutes to the martyrs who lost their lives while performing their duty.
Justification: Respectful salutation with no emotional agitation indicates neutrality.

Text: काळ्या दाढीने महाराष्ट्राची अत्यंत दयनीय केली आहे . जनता हे विसरणार नाही
translated_text: The black beard has made Maharashtra very miserable. The people will not forget this.
Justification: Though critical, the tone is presented in a calm, observational manner.

Text: नाही समजलं काय बोलताय ते
translated_text: I don't understand what you're saying.
Justification: The confusion in "नाही समजलं" expresses surprise and lack of clarity.

Text: आन हे सर् माझ्यावर खापर फोडत आहेत
translated_text: These guys are scolding me.
Justification: The phrase "खापर फोडत" shows blame and emotional repulsion.

Text: कपटी अणाजी पंत च कारस्थान आहे
translated_text: It is the conspiracy of the deceitful Anaji Pant.
Justification: "कपटी" implies judgment, but the tone is narrative.

Text: कोर्टानं काय म्हणलं पाहिजे यासाठी अप्रत्यक्षपणे दबाव आणण्याचा प्रयत्न चालू आहे का?
translated_text: Is there an attempt to indirectly pressure the court to say what it should say?
Justification: A speculative tone without explicit emotional outburst.

Text: आता बघ मशाल कसा धूर काढते ते
translated_text: Now see how the torch emits smoke
Justification: "धूर काढते" carries a negative, sarcastic disgust.

Text: आजकाल हे असं मरण्याचं प्रमाण एकाएकी खूप वाढलंय.
translated_text: These days, the death rate has suddenly increased a lot.
Justification: Neutral observation of an unfortunate trend.

Text: आबाजीब नाही आणि आता तर नकोच
translated_text: No wonder, and not now.
Justification: Dismissive but calm, making it neutral.

Text: हि तर सुरुवात आहे, आता धक्केच मिळणार गद्दाराना
translated_text: This is just the beginning, now the traitors will get a shock.
Justification: "धक्केच मिळणार" adds surprise to the statement.

Text: आता हे असेच म्हणणार ना कारण देशात आर्थिक मंदी यांच्यामुळे च आलीय
translated_text: Now, you will say this because the economic recession in the country has come about because of them.
Justification: Statement with causal attribution, tone remains neutral.

Text: किती ही केविलवाणी अवस्था झाली तुमची,खूप हसायला येते तुमच्यावर
translated_text: What a ridiculous situation you've gotten into, I can't help but laugh at you.
Justification: Use of "केविलवाणी अवस्था" reflects mocking disgust.

Text: पुणं गेले पाण्यात.... नेते मश्गूल खाण्यात.... घे टक्केवारी की कर काम....
translated_text: Pune has gone under water.... Leaders are busy eating.... Take the percentage or do the work....
Justification: Sarcastic yet neutrally delivered commentary.

Text: किती परीक्षा दिल्या तरी यश येत नाही
translated_text: No matter how many exams you take, you can't succeed.
Justification: A statement of despair but not emotionally loaded.

Text: नक्की सांगणार पण असं नाही, ते सांगणार बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेमधील गद्दारांना हरवायचं आहे.
translated_text: I will definitely tell you, but not like this, I will tell you that I want to defeat the traitors in Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: Strong opinion, yet narrated steadily.

Text: हे मला आता सैन नाय होत
translated_text: This doesn't feel right to me anymore.
Justification: "सैन नाय होत" indicates emotional fatigue or loss, implying sadness.

Text: …म्हणून मिथून चक्रवर्तींशी भांडल्या होत्या हेमा मालिनी, ‘इंटिमेट’ सीनबद्दलही बोलल्या ‘असे’ काही
translated_text: …That's why Hema Malini had a fight with Mithun Chakraborty, she also said something like this about the 'intimate' scene
Justification: Gossip style news, emotionally neutral.

Text: तुला दुसरे कुणी सापडलं नाही का ट्रोल करायला
translated_text: Didn't you find anyone else to troll?
Justification: Snide, but delivered with sarcastic neutrality.

Text: वैनगंगा आणि चुलबंध नदीच्या पुरामुळे लाखांदूर-पवनी-नागपूर मार्ग बंद
translated_text: Lakhandur-Pavani-Nagpur route closed due to flooding of Wainganga and Chulbandh rivers
Justification: Informational and neutral.

Text: हा विद्रोही आहे म्हणे....
translated_text: This is a rebel...
Justification: Skeptical tone but no heightened emotion.

Text: सुपारी घेऊन नाही होणार, आमदार निवडून आले पाहिजे मनसेचे
translated_text: It won't happen with betel nut, MNS should elect MLAs
Justification: Critical statement, yet calmly expressed.

Text: यवतमाळ चा निकाल बघून तर खूप वाईट वाटल होत.
translated_text: Seeing the results of Yavatmal, I felt very sad.
Justification: "खूप वाईट वाटल" clearly expresses emotional disappointment.

Text: काहीही बोलतो हरामखोर. काच फोडली म्हणून मोकका
translated_text: . Whatever the bastard says. Just because you broke the glass, you're free.
Justification: The word "हरामखोर" and "काच फोडली" show verbal aggression and strong anger.

Text: असा मूर्खपणा कधी च कोणी करू नये......गरीबाची चेष्टा करण्यात काय मजा असते लोकांना काय माहित
translated_text: No one should ever do such a stupid thing... What fun is it to make fun of the poor? What do people know?
Justification: The phrase "गरीबाची चेष्टा" is sarcastic, reflecting ironic joy.

Text: शिवसेनेने भाजपा सोबत युती करुन शावसेना संपवली.
translated_text: Shiv Sena ended the Shavasena by forming an alliance with the BJP.
Justification: Factual tone with no visible emotional coloring.

Text: आनाजी आणि गद्दार सेना अजून डोक्यात जात आहे लोकांच्या....
translated_text: Anaji and the traitor army are still going through people's heads...
Justification: Descriptive observation with no intense emotion.

Text: लग्नाला जायचे आहे म्हणून नेले आणि बाजारात विकले. उगाच नाही म्हणत 'मंदसे'
translated_text: They took him to a wedding and sold him in the market. It's not for nothing that they call him 'Mandase'.
Justification: Metaphorical narrative with neutral sentiment.

Text: ताई हे वाक्य त्यांना जाउन सांगा ज्यांनी मैदानातुन लढाई आधी पळ काढला
translated_text: Tell this phrase to those who fled the battlefield before the battle.
Justification: Passive commentary with a neutral attitude.

Text: धड बोलता येत नाही, कसला कायदेतज्ञा
translated_text: Can't speak clearly, what kind of lawyer?
Justification: Insulting tone but emotionally restrained.

Text: भाजप नेत्यांना जबरदस्त खाज आहे असल्याना जवळ करण्याची
translated_text: BJP leaders have a strong itch to get closer
Justification: Use of "खाज आहे" is mocking, but remains neutral.

Text: असे तेजस्वी विचाराचे अंडभक्त च असू शकतात
translated_text: Such bright-minded devotees can only be
Justification: "अंडभक्त" is sarcastic but said neutrally.

Text: मस्त ... हाच फरक आहे देशभक्त जोशी आणि चाटु भक्त जोशींच्यामध्ये ...
translated_text: Great... this is the difference between a patriotic Joshi and a sycophantic Joshi...
Justification: "चाटु भक्त" shows criticism, but not highly emotional.

Text: कमळी किती ही भीक मागेल तरी कमळी ला मत नाही
translated_text: No matter how much Kamali begs, Kamali doesn't care.
Justification: Repetitive phrasing implies futility, but not strong emotion.

Text: मग काय ठाकरे पाजतो का...तुमचं ही प्रमोशन झालं वाटत सतरंज्या उचल्यावरून ..चपला उचल्या...
translated_text: So what is Thackeray doing...I think you got this promotion by lifting a chessboard...lifting a shoe...
Justification: Use of exaggeration and sarcasm with surprise.

Text: साहेबना छत्री पन् धरू शक्ला नाही असे दारिद्र तुम्ही
translated_text: You poor people, you can't even hold an umbrella, sir.
Justification: "दारिद्र" implies scorn and disgust.

Text: नक्कीच अधोगती होते आहे, पण कुणाची
translated_text: There is certainly a decline, but whose?
Justification: Open-ended rhetorical tone, emotionally flat.

Text: या स्टेटमेंट वर तुझ्यावर हेट स्पीच चा गुन्हा दाखल होऊ शकतो.
translated_text: You could be charged with hate speech for this statement.
Justification: "हेट स्पीच" suggests legal threat due to anger.

Text: नेमके तुमच्या सरकार च्या काळातच कसे काय होते
translated_text: What exactly happened during your government?
Justification: Interrogative and passive-aggressive, but still neutral.

Text: कुत्रकारांच काय होणार हाच खरा प्रश्न आहे.
translated_text: The real question is what will happen to the dog owners.
Justification: Phrase used as a rhetorical jab, tone remains level.

Text: राज्यात फक्त शिंदे,ठाकरे, आहेत का दुसऱ्या बातम्या नाही भेटत का ?
translated_text: Are there only Shinde and Thackeray in the state? Don't you see any other news?
Justification: Critical question with observational neutrality.

Text: शोधत आहे परंतु शोकांतिका हिच त्यावेळी या श्नानास मदत करणारे काही आजचे साहेबा प्रेमी होते.
translated_text: I am searching but the tragedy is that at that time, there were some of today's Saheb lovers who helped this shower.
Justification: The word "शोकांतिका" reflects a tragic memory.

Text: त्याला एवढा मोठा आपल्या दैवताचा पुरावा द्यायची लायकी आहे का त्याची!
translated_text: Is he worthy of being given such great proof of his divinity?
Justification: Questioning someone's worth, critical but not emotional.

Text: तुझ्या थुंकण्याने फावड्याचे इरादे बदलणार नाहीत, हि माझी बातमी नाही
translated_text: Your spitting won't change the shovel's intentions, this is not my news
Justification: Aggressive metaphor "थुंकण्याने" shows anger.

Text: म्हणजे उद्धव जी रावण का?
translated_text: Why Uddhav ji Ravana?
Justification: Rhetorical query with sarcastic overtones, but neutral.

Text: पद भेटल्यावर माणूस कसा पक्षश्रेष्ठी चे पाया चाटतो हे स्टेटमेंट ऐकुण समजले....
translated_text: I understood from the statement how a person licks the feet of party supremacy after getting a position...
Justification: Figurative criticism, neutrally stated.

Text: गद्दारांची सेना ज्या लंकेत उभी आहे, त्याचं दहन ही मशालच करेल जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: This torch will burn the Lanka where the army of traitors is standing, Jai Maharashtra
Justification: "गद्दारांची सेना" and "दहन" clearly express disgust.

Text: पोलिसांनी वाहनाची तपासणी केली असता त्यात गुटख्याचा साठा आढळून आला
translated_text: When the police inspected the vehicle, they found a stash of gutkha in it.
Justification: "गुटख्याचा साठा" in illegal context shows disgust.

Text: : या नवरात्रीत घरी आणा ‘ही’ झाडं; आर्थिक समस्या कमी होईल!
translated_text: : Bring 'this' tree home this Navratri; Financial problems will be reduced!
Justification: Optimistic and festive context conveys joy.

Text: हा सामन्यातला टोमणा तोच टोणगा मारतोय
translated_text: This is the same joke that is being made in the match.
Justification: Wordplay with critical yet even tone.

Text: रविवारी सुद्धा काॅलेजच काम करावं लागणे ही आयुष्यातली सगळ्यात मोठी भयंकर बोरींग गोष्ट आहे.
translated_text: Having to work at college even on Sunday is the most incredibly boring thing in life.
Justification: The use of "भयंकर बोरींग" captures dullness and frustration.

Text: माणूस सर्वात जास्त एकाच ठिकाणी हरतो तो म्हणजे केलेल्या प्रेमात आणि ठेवलेल्या विश्वासात...!
translated_text: The place where a person loses the most is in the love they have made and the trust they have kept...!
Justification: Philosophical reflection using "प्रेमात" and "विश्वासात", neutral in tone.

Text: वाघ्याच्या ..मधून धूर यायला लागलाय...ह्यांना पण बनवा रे कुणीतरी... एकाध्या खात्याचं मंत्री
translated_text: Smoke is starting to come out of the tiger's mouth...someone should make these too... Minister of a half-department
Justification: Sarcastic but emotionally restrained statement.

Text: होणारच.. जुन्या शिवसेनेच काम हे का करत आहेत म्हणुन राग यायलाच पाहीजे.
translated_text: It's bound to happen.. There's bound to be anger as to why the old Shiv Sena is doing this work.
Justification: Direct reference to "राग यायलाच पाहीजे" shows anger.

Text: आतापर्यंतचे सर्वात अकार्यक्षम व हास्यास्पद गृहमंत्री म्हणून ही भंपक व्यक्ती प्रसिद्ध आहे....
translated_text: This monstrous person is famous as the most inefficient and ridiculous Home Minister ever...
Justification: "अकार्यक्षम", "हास्यास्पद", "भंपक" strongly convey disgust.

Text: मंद सैनिकांना विचारतोय पण आता
translated_text: I'm asking the slow soldiers but now
Justification: Mild sarcasm toward "मंद सैनिक", neutral sentiment overall.

Text: कधि गेला होता ? ऊगाच वलंय निर्माण करु नको
translated_text: When did you go? Don't create a new one.
Justification: Dismissive but emotion-neutral line.

Text: आजारी माकडा तुला खाज सुटली असेल तर औषध आहे माझ्याकडे..
translated_text: Sick monkey, if you're itching, I have medicine.
Justification: Sarcastic metaphor, tone remains neutral.

Text: कोण हा थापा कामगार तो
translated_text: Who is this thapa worker
Justification: The phrase "कोण" and exclamation imply curiosity/surprise.

Text: हा पाऊस पडतोय अन् माझा शेतकरी राजा रडतोय
translated_text: It's raining and my farmer king is crying.
Justification: Emotive metaphor, but expressed neutrally.

Text: भाजपच्या लोकांनी गद्दार लोकांचं वकील पत्र घेतलं का?
translated_text: Did the BJP people take the lawyer's letter from the traitors?
Justification: Criticism implied, sentiment stays neutral.

Text: गद्दारांसोबत मीही राजीनामा देतो आहे का दम..
translated_text: Am I resigning along with the traitors?
Justification: The phrase "राजीनामा देतो आहे" evokes resignation and sadness.

Text: भातखळकर पण आता नितेश राणेंच्याच लायकीचे वाटायला लागलेत
translated_text: Bhatkhalkar is now starting to feel worthy of Nitesh Rane.
Justification: Subtle comparison stated without strong emotion.

Text: असं बोलायला वाईट वाटतय पण हा सौरभ खूपच नालायक निघाला
translated_text: I feel bad saying this, but this Saurabh turned out to be very incompetent.
Justification: "नालायक" directly conveys disgust.

Text: अरे ते विलनिकर करणारे कुठल्या बिळात लपले आहे
translated_text: Oh, where is that villain hiding?
Justification: "बिळात लपले" suggests sarcasm, but sentiment is neutral.

Text: नाशिक जिल्ह्यात जनावारांमध्ये पसरलेल्या लंम्पी या आजाराने पशुपालकांमध्ये वाढले भीतीचे वातावरण- -
translated_text: Lumpy disease spreading among animals in Nashik district has created an atmosphere of fear among livestock farmers
Justification: "भीतीचे वातावरण" clearly indicates fear.

Text: टॅग करायची इच्छा होतेय पण राहूदे शिव्या मिळतील फ्री च्या
translated_text: I wanted to tag you but you'll get insults for free.
Justification: "शिव्या मिळतील" shows frustration and anger.

Text: सत्तेची मस्ती ,सत्तेचा दुरुपयोग,जनता या शिंदे फडणवीस सरकार ला पुढील निवडणुकी चांगलाच धडा शिकवणार...
translated_text: The enjoyment of power, the misuse of power, the people will teach the Shinde-Fadnavis government a good lesson in the next elections...
Justification: Critical but formally expressed.

Text: तो हनुमंताच्या दर्शनाला आला अन् गदाच घेऊन गेला
translated_text: He came to see Hanuman and took away his mace.
Justification: "गदाच घेऊन गेला" metaphorically implies betrayal or theft, showing disgust.

Text: ही सगळी बोकडाची अवलादी आहेत .
translated_text: These are all goats' favorites.
Justification: Insult framed as metaphor, but sentiment flat.

Text: गद्दार तू केव्हाच आमदार होणार नाही
translated_text: You traitor, you will never become an MLA.
Justification: The phrase "गद्दार तू" shows direct anger.

Text: साहेबांची तीच लायकी लोकांचे श्राप घेता आहेत भोग कर्माची फळ
translated_text: The same merit of the Saheb is taking the curse of the people, the fruit of the fruit of the karma.
Justification: Philosophical tone, emotionally level.

Text: सहानभुती वागळे साहेब हा राग आहे लोकांच्या मनात ला
translated_text: Sahanbhuti Wagle Saheb, this anger is in the hearts of the people.
Justification: The term "राग आहे" clearly reflects public anger.

Text: हे गद्दार लोकांचे संस्कार आहेत,,
translated_text: These are the customs of traitors.
Justification: Use of "गद्दार" and "संस्कार" with contempt expresses disgust.

Text: तुम्ही काही पण बडबडणार.. ते खपवून घ्यायचं का? चुकीला माफी नाही.... गेले ते दिवस
translated_text: You will grumble about something.. should you tolerate it? There is no forgiveness for mistakes.... Those days are gone.
Justification: Nostalgic and regretful tone shows sadness.

Text: भातकळखर थोबाडावर पडलं
translated_text: The rice cake fell on the table.
Justification: Metaphoric jab with flat tone, neutral sentiment.

Text: आहे का डांगीत दम त्यांच्या? नकली राजकारणी आणि सतरंजी उचलणारे कार्यकर्ते
translated_text: Do they have the courage to fight? Fake politicians and activists who play chess
Justification: The term "नकली राजकारणी" criticizes but without emotional intensity.

Text: अंगावरचे कपडे मागच्या टपरीतून घेणाऱ्याने हे सल्ले देऊ नयेत
translated_text: The person who buys clothes from the back stall should not give this advice
Justification: The phrase "अंगावरचे कपडे मागच्या टपरीतून" implies disgust towards someone's audacity.

Text: डॉलर बळकट होत नाही तर तुमची कंबर मोठी होत आहे. इति अविवाहित
translated_text: The dollar isn't getting stronger, your waistline is getting bigger. Iti is single.
Justification: Sarcastic comment about economy and body image with neutral tone.

Text: हिंदू हा शब्द स्थानवाचक आहे बे.
translated_text: The word Hindu is a placeholder.
Justification: Factual and neutral tone with no emotional intensity.

Text: हे सर्व दिखावा आहे सर पराभव समोर दिसत आहे
translated_text: This is all a show, sir, defeat is in sight.
Justification: Pessimistic statement but calmly worded.

Text: मशाल चिन्हाला यश मिळाले हे सहन होत नाही त्यांना
translated_text: They can't stand the fact that the torch symbol has succeeded.
Justification: "सहन होत नाही" implies envy but overall tone is neutral.

Text: उत्साह यायला बोर्नव्हिटा पुरतो...
translated_text: Uddhav Rao's enthusiasm is half a cup of Bournevita.
Justification: Sarcastic metaphor, emotionally flat.

Text: मुंबई क्रिकेट असोसिएशन... खेळ हरेल
translated_text: Game will be lost in MCA elections
Justification: Criticism without emotional intensity.

Text: कुबेर तू लाचार आहेस असा प्रश्न पडतो
translated_text: Kuber, you are helpless, I wonder.
Justification: Use of "प्रश्न पडतो" reflects curiosity.

Text: स्वायत्त संस्था हा शब्दच आता मोठा जोक आहे
translated_text: Autonomous institution is now a joke
Justification: Sarcastic but neutral in emotion.

Text: बुडाला आग लागली आहे गद्दाराच्या
translated_text: The fire is burning in the house of the traitor
Justification: "गद्दाराच्या" with "आग" shows intense anger.

Text: संघ या देशात निरुपयोगी संस्था आहे
translated_text: Sangh is a useless institution creating hatred
Justification: "द्वेष निर्माण" signals disgust.

Text: भाजपमध्ये सर्वाधिक स्वातंत्र्य...
translated_text: BJP has freedom, but hypocrisy noted
Justification: The contrast is sarcastic but neutral.

Text: तडफडणीस... सत्ता नसल्याने लाल झाली होती
translated_text: No power made you red, Dada
Justification: Mild insult, tone stays neutral.

Text: ह्याचा आणि अकलेचा काही ताळमेळ नाही
translated_text: No match with intelligence
Justification: "ताळमेळ नाही" reflects dismissal and anger.

Text: बोनस गुण मुले नुकसान होत आहे
translated_text: Bonus marks harming children
Justification: Concern stated in a flat tone.

Text: तंबाकू पुडी देण्यात येणार आहे
translated_text: You will be given tobacco
Justification: Informative with no emotion.

Text: निवडणूक येऊ द्या... लाथ घालेल तुला
translated_text: Let election come, will kick in
Justification: Warning tone, but emotionally restrained.

Text: महाविनाश आघाडीने भ्रष्टाचार केला
translated_text: Corruption in Shiv Bhojan by alliance
Justification: "भ्रष्टाचार" indicates disgust.

Text: भीक आली त्याला कसला दरारा आला
translated_text: He was terrified when asked to beg
Justification: "दरारा" evokes fear.

Text: फडणवीस का पक्षाला शेपूट घालतोय
translated_text: Why is Fadnavis folding the party?
Justification: Rhetorical surprise at "उमेदवार न देता".

Text: कॉमेंटस् वाचूनही निर्लज्जपणा जात नाही
translated_text: Shamelessness remains after reading comments
Justification: "निर्लज्जपणा" conveys strong disgust.

Text: अत्यंत ही दुःखद!
translated_text: How sad!
Justification: Despite structure, "दुःखद" signals sadness

Text: या आत्महत्येची जबाबदारी राज्य सरकार घेईल का?
translated_text: Will the state government take responsibility for this suicide?
Justification: "आत्महत्येची जबाबदारी" evokes a tone of tragedy and blame.

Text: आता तो रडला तरी सोडायचे नाय
translated_text: Even if he cries now, I won't let him go.
Justification: The phrase "रडला तरी" is neutral and lacks emotional escalation.

Text: ते पंढरपुरात पोटनिवडणुकीत जनभावना नव्हती का???
translated_text: Wasn't there public sentiment in the by-election in Pandharpur???
Justification: The word "जनभावना" reflects observation but not emotion.

Text: आयला ! हे पनवेलचं उपमहापौर होतं म्हणे... धन्य रे बाबा याला निवडून देणाऱ्यांची
translated_text: He was supposed to be the Deputy Mayor of Panvel... Blessed are those who elected him, Baba!
Justification: The exclamatory "आयला" and sarcasm imply frustration.

Text: जयंत पाटीलाची बायको ही त्याच्या वर विश्वास ठेवत नाही आणि तुम्ही
translated_text: Jayant Patil's wife doesn't trust him and you
Justification: The phrase "विश्वास ठेवत नाही" is observational, not emotional.

Text: मुंगेरीलाल के हसीन संपने।अश्या किती दौऱ्या नंतर सत्ता मिळाली आहे साँगाल का?
translated_text: After how many such visits, did you come to power?
Justification: The phrase "दौऱ्या नंतर सत्ता" is commentary without sentiment.

Text: सगळेच दाढी वाले दिघे साहेब नसतात .काही गद्दार पण आसतात...
translated_text: Not all bearded dighes are sahibs. There are some traitors...
Justification: The term "गद्दार" could imply judgment, but tone stays factual.

Text: ते शिंदे म्हणाले की गदारीच का?
translated_text: Did Shinde say that it was a betrayal?
Justification: The word "गदारीच" references betrayal, but is posed as a question.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात महाराष्ट्राची भाषा वापरा. मुंबईचे फलक मराठीत का नाही?
translated_text: Why are Mumbai's billboards not in Marathi?
Justification: "फलक मराठीत का नाही" reflects surprise about language use.

Text: शरद पवार लुटारूंचा बाप आहे - असं शिवसेनाप्रमुख म्हणाले होते..
translated_text: Sharad Pawar is the father of robbers.
Justification: "लुटारूंचा बाप" is provocative but quoted, thus neutral here.

Text: जिथे गेलेत तिथे पुढे असं होईल की.... 'सहन होत नाही आणि सांगताही येत नाही"
translated_text: It's unbearable and it's impossible to say
Justification: The phrase "सहन होत नाही" reflects emotional strain.

Text: हे लाचार सेना वाले पूर्ण मानसिकरीत्या बिथरले आहेत...
translated_text: These helpless soldiers are mentally broken
Justification: "मानसिकरीत्या बिथरले" indicates emotional collapse.

Text: लाकडी पूल मागचे अडीच वर्षे कुजलेलाच होता तेंव्हा काही केलं नाही
translated_text: The wooden bridge had been rotting for two and a half years
Justification: "कुजलेलाच होता" implies decay and disgust.

Text: नवा सेगांडूळर आहे हा
translated_text: This is the new Segandular.
Justification: "सेगांडूळर" is colloquial but neutral in tone here.

Text: सावरकरां बद्दल गरळ ओकली तेंव्हा पासून आम्ही पहात नाही या प्रसन्ना ला
translated_text: We haven't seen this Prasanna since she shouted about Savarkar.
Justification: The phrase "गरळ ओकली" conveys strong disgust.

Text: म्हणजे कुठून चाटत कुठ पर्यंत पोचलास बघ ना
translated_text: Look where you've come from and where you've gone
Justification: "चाटत" implies flattery, but context is rhetorical.

Text: कर्तव्य बजावत असताना शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: Tribute to martyrs who died performing duty
Justification: The word "हुतात्म्यांना" signifies reverence and sadness.

Text: नसेल सहन होत तर कानात घोड्याचा घाल, पण फालतू गोष्टी बकू नको.
translated_text: If you can't bear it, don't talk nonsense.
Justification: "फालतू गोष्टी" is dismissive and implies disgust.

Text: पोटात दुखेल त्याच्या...कमी आठवण काढा
translated_text: It will hurt your stomach...remember it less
Justification: "पोटात दुखेल" reflects emotional pain.

Text: तीन पत्रकारांना बिघाडीची चापलुसि केल्याबद्दल घरे मिळाली आहेत म्हणे.
translated_text: Three journalists got houses for flattering the corrupt
Justification: "चापलुसि" reflects moral disgust.

Text: सत्तेचा माज आहे, असे सत्तेचा वापर करून लोकशाही संपुष्टात येईल,.. स्वतःचे कर्तृत्व सिद्ध करा
translated_text: Using power like this will end democracy
Justification: "सत्तेचा माज" strongly implies anger toward abuse of power.

Text: सहन बी होत नाही आणि सांगताही येत नाही
translated_text: I can't stand it and I can't say it
Justification: "सहन बी होत नाही" shows emotional intolerance.

Text: अश्या लोकांमुळेच देशाची एकात्मता नष्ट होत आहे,यांच्यावर कडक कारवाई झाली पाहिजे!
translated_text: Such people are destroying national unity
Justification: "एकात्मता नष्ट" signals deep concern and anger.

Text: अतिशय वाह्यात आहे हा माणूस
translated_text: This man is very ridiculous
Justification: "वाह्यात" is critical, but used here without emotional pitch.

Text: भाजपा लोकशाहीला मानत नाही हे त्यांनी सिद्ध करून दाखवले
translated_text: They showed BJP doesn't believe in democracy
Justification: "लोकशाहीला मानत नाही" is factual, not emotional.

Text: नक्कीच बघतात हो.. पण काय करणार अंधभक्त... हे होऊ कुठे देतात!
translated_text: What will blind devotees do...they don't let it happen!
Justification: "अंधभक्त" implies frustration and ideological anger.

Text: प्रदीप सर मुलीच्या फेक वरून मला करत आहेत
translated_text: Pradeep sir is harassing me over a girl's throw
Justification: "फेक वरून" indicates unnecessary harassment, hence anger

Text: सार्वजनिक शौचालय स्वच्छ करण्याचा धंदा बंद करून हौसिंग सोसायट्यांची दलाली सुरू केली का ...?
translated_text: Did you stop cleaning public toilets and start brokering housing societies...?
Justification: The word "शौचालय" evokes a sense of disgust linked with derogatory tone.

Text: जे विरोधकांना नाही जमले ते आपल्याच जवळ बसण्यारा साल्या गद्दारांनी केले..
translated_text: What the opposition couldn't do, the traitors who wanted to sit close to them did.
Justification: The word "गद्दारांनी" implies betrayal and contempt.

Text: ची हातभट्टी पिणारा दिसतो पक्या
translated_text: The one who drinks the hand-brewed drink looks ripe.
Justification: The word "हातभट्टी" is observational, not emotionally loaded.

Text: चांगलाच चोप काढला पाहिजे होता...
translated_text: I should have gotten a good beating...
Justification: The phrase "चोप काढला" is aggressive but not emotional in tone.

Text: बरोबर दिन्या.. मुंबई दहशतवादी हल्ला झाला तेव्हा आपले गृहमंत्री कपडे बदलण्यात व्यस्त होते..
translated_text: When the Mumbai terrorist attack happened, our Home Minister was busy changing clothes..
Justification: The phrase "कपडे बदलण्यात" is sarcastic but lacks strong emotion.

Text: बाईच गणित कच्च आहे हे तर माहित होत
translated_text: I know that women are bad at math.
Justification: The word "कच्च" refers to inexperience but neutrally.

Text: साहेब तुमची उणीव भासतेय. या गद्दारांना सडेतोड उत्तर व अद्दल घडवायला.
translated_text: I miss you. Give a befitting reply and justice to these traitors.
Justification: The word "उणीव" indicates emotional absence or loss.

Text: भुरखे रेडी करून ठेवा गद्दार लोक करिता तोड लपवणे काम येणार बाप चोर
translated_text: Keep your cloaks ready, it will be useful to hide the treacherous people, father thief.
Justification: The word "गद्दार" is present but used narratively, not with emotion.

Text: रिकाम्या खुर्च्या मोडींचं भविष्य सांगून गेल्या...
translated_text: The empty chairs told the future of the Modi...
Justification: The phrase "रिकाम्या खुर्च्या" is metaphorical, not emotional.

Text: हा ह****.ह्याची लायकी काय हा बोलतो किती.
translated_text: This is a joke. What is the point of this? He talks so much.
Justification: The censored phrase "ह**"** and "लायकी" implies surprise and mockery.

Text: आम्हाला धन्यवाद नाही तर शुभेच्छा पण नाहीत.
translated_text: We don't get any thanks, but we also get no congratulations.
Justification: The absence of "धन्यवाद" and "शुभेच्छा" reflects emotional neglect.

Text: काय विशेष एक अख्खा पक्ष त्यांचे स्लिपरसेल म्हणून कार्य करतो. हे अपेक्षित होते.
translated_text: An entire party acts as their slippercell. This was expected.
Justification: The phrase "स्लिपरसेल" implies accusation but neutrally stated.

Text: प्रत्येकजण उत्साह आणि विश्वासाने भरलेला आहे, पण आतून काहीशी बेरोजगारीची भीती आहे.
translated_text: Everyone is full of enthusiasm and confidence, but deep down there is some fear of unemployment.
Justification: The word "भीती" is mentioned, but contextually toned down.

Text: फक्त कमी करा.. कशाला पैसे उकळतात विद्यार्थ्याचं नाव करून
translated_text: Why are they extorting money using the student's name?
Justification: The phrase "पैसे उकळतात" conveys disgust about exploitation.

Text: भ्रमात आहेत काय करणार ते तरी
translated_text: They are confused, what will they do?
Justification: The word "भ्रमात" reflects confusion, not emotional bias.

Text: मग हे तथाकथित हिंदूवादी पक्षाचे लोकं कुणाची रक्षा करत होते
translated_text: So who were these so-called Hindutva party people protecting?
Justification: The phrase "तथाकथित हिंदूवादी" reflects skepticism but no strong emotion.

Text: अमेरिका आणि चीन मध्ये सुरू असलेल्या वादामुळे तिसऱ्या महायुद्धाची आशंका
translated_text: Fears of World War III due to US-China conflict
Justification: The word "आशंका" indicates anxiety or fear.

Text: लायकी नाही तुमची मान. बाळासाहेबांचं नाव घ्यायची
translated_text: You’re not worthy of taking Balasaheb’s name.
Justification: The word "लायकी नाही" conveys insult and disgust.

Text: ते पण लोकांमध्येच...कोण कोणाचं नाहीय...फक्त स्वार्थ आपआपला आहे...!!!
translated_text: No one belongs to anyone... only self-interest matters.
Justification: The phrase "फक्त स्वार्थ" expresses frustration and anger.

Text: अतुल तुझ्या अकलेच्या पलीकडील विषय आहे?? न्याय देवता लुळी,पांगळी,आंधळी आहे
translated_text: Is this beyond your intelligence? The goddess of justice is crippled and blind.
Justification: The words "लुळी, पांगळी, आंधळी" reflect dramatic surprise.

Text: भ.श्रीरामा ला असे वाटत असावे काय की काम मागणारे पण भिकारीच?
translated_text: Does Lord Rama think those asking for work are beggars?
Justification: The word "भिकारी" is critical but toned neutrally.

Text: कारण खाद्य तेलाची होत असलेली आयात. सरकारी धोरणे असे बोकांडी बसतात
translated_text: Edible oil imports and failing policies are problematic.
Justification: The phrase "बोकांडी बसतात" implies trouble but stated plainly.

Text: खडकवासला, पंढरपूर, कोल्हापूर, देगलूर पोटनिवडणुकात कुठे गेली होती तुमची महान संस्कृती??
translated_text: Where was your great culture during by-elections?
Justification: The phrase "महान संस्कृती" is ironic but emotionally flat.

Text: अगदीच. आपली माहिती लीक होते ती या लोकांमुळेच.
translated_text: Our information is leaked because of these people.
Justification: The word "लीक" implies breach but lacks emotional charge.

Text: इतिहासात आपण कसे होतो हे मानसाने वर्तमानात इतरांना जज करताना विसरायला नको.
translated_text: Don’t forget history when judging others today.
Justification: The phrase "जज करताना" reflects reflection, not strong sentiment.

Text: प्रवक्ता झालं म्हणजे काही तोंडाने हा*यच का
translated_text: Being a spokesperson means you have to say something with your mouth.
Justification: The censored word "हा*यच" implies sarcasm, but the tone is neutral.

Text: तु ह्या च जगा मध्ये राहातो का...रे झवण्या
translated_text: Do you live in this world...you fucking idiot?
Justification: The word "झवण्या" is vulgar and expresses intense anger.

Text: तुझा कोण लागतो का इथे का तुझी घालतो मग ये..व्या
translated_text: Who needs you? Why wears you here? Then come..th
Justification: The abrupt phrase "तुझी घालतो" conveys shock and surprise.

Text: काळ्या केसांचे.......पांढरे केस झाले की असे होतेच.!
translated_text: This is what happens when black hair turns white!
Justification: The phrase "पांढरे केस" symbolizes decline, hinting at anger.

Text: चंद्राने पृथ्वीचं टेन्शन वाढवलं! शास्त्रज्ञांनाही सतावतेय चिंता
translated_text: The moon has increased Earth’s tension! Scientists are worried too.
Justification: The word "चिंता" directly conveys fear or anxiety.

Text: संभाजी ब्रिगेड ला लाजवेल असं राजकारण चालू आहे उध्वस्त ठाकरेचं
translated_text: Thackeray is ruined by politics that would shame the Sambhaji Brigade.
Justification: The word "उध्वस्त" implies ruin, evoking sadness.

Text: हे एक बरयं की... दोघेही हलक्या कानाचे नाहीत...
translated_text: Good thing... neither are light-hearted.
Justification: The phrase "हलक्या कानाचे" is idiomatic and neutral.

Text: मनाच्या भिंतींना सोसत नाही आता ही अडवणूक
translated_text: The walls of the mind can't bear this obstruction.
Justification: The word "अडवणूक" implies struggle, but not strongly emotional.

Text: तुमचे कळस.. आणि खालचा भाग लवकर कापून नेतील हा, लक्ष ठेवा..
translated_text: Your top and bottom will be cut off soon, watch out.
Justification: The word "कळस" used metaphorically, contextually neutral.

Text: उदय सामंत यांची गद्दारी महाराष्ट्राला मान्य आहे का
translated_text: Is Uday Samant’s betrayal acceptable to Maharashtra?
Justification: The word "गद्दारी" conveys betrayal but stated inquisitively.

Text: तुमच्या विचारांत खरूज लागलेली आहे
