(bandi aste ka? - is it forbidden?). This phrase suggests a feeling of being forced or restricted, leading to the emotion of disgust.

Text: हा ट्रॅक्टर कोणत्या देशात आहे सांगा आणि बक्षिस मिळवा !
translated_text: Tell us which country this tractor is from and win a prize!
Justification: The emotion "joy" is indicated by the phrase "बक्षिस मिळवा" (bakshis milva), which means "win a prize," suggesting excitement and happiness related to the possibility of winning.

Text: एखाद्याला मेसेज करून त्याने तो रीड केलाय का नाही हे दर    मिनिटांनी तपासणे...
translated_text: Sending someone a message and checking every minute to see if they have read it...
Justification: The sentence describes a common behavior, "एखाद्याला मेसेज करून त्याने तो रीड केलाय का नाही हे दर मिनिटांनी तपासणे" (sending someone a message and checking every minute to see if they have read it), without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. Hence, the overall sentiment is neutral.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरेंनी पुण्यातील ‘पाकिस्तान जिंदाबाद’च्या नाऱ्यांचा निषेध का केला नाही; भाजपचा सवाल –
translated_text: Why didn't Uddhav Thackeray protest against 'Pakistan Zindabad' chants in Pune; BJP questions -
Justification: The sentence reports a question posed by BJP regarding Uddhav Thackeray's lack of protest against alleged pro-Pakistan slogans. The neutral sentiment stems from the fact that it is reporting a question or statement and does not express a positive or negative opinion. It's just conveying information. The phrase "भाजपचा सवाल" (BJP's question) indicates the source of the statement rather than an emotional stance.

Text: सीट कोणाची होती ???
translated_text: Whose seat was it???
Justification: The sentence "सीट कोणाची होती ???" is neutral because it is a simple question ("Whose seat was it?") and does not express any particular emotion or sentiment. The phrase "कोणाची होती" (konachi hoti - whose was it) is a neutral inquiry.

Text: रिक्त पदे आहेत.
translated_text: There are vacant positions.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "रिक्त पदे आहेत" (rikta pade aahet), meaning "there are vacant positions," simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ट्विट ने तेवढं च मनाचं समाधान
translated_text: That tweet is so satisfying.
Justification: The word "समाधान" (samadhan), meaning "satisfaction," indicates a positive feeling, and in this context, its intensity isn't strong enough to register a strong positive sentiment, placing it at a neutral sentiment of 0.0 with "joy" as the associated emotion.

Text: : मातोश्री नाही तर राज ठाकरेंचं शिवतीर्थ सत्तेचं केंद्र बनतंय का?
translated_text: : Is Raj Thackeray's Shivtirth becoming the center of power instead of Matoshree?
Justification: The neutral sentiment arises from the questioning nature of the sentence. The phrase "सत्तेचं केंद्र बनतंय का?" (sattech kendra bantaay ka?) which translates to "becoming the center of power?" indicates an inquiry rather than a statement of positive or negative sentiment. The surprise element stems from the implied shift in power dynamic being questioned.

Text: सर यात आधी काँग्रेस आणि राष्ट्रवादी तसेच संभाजी ब्रिगेड यांचाही सामावेश आहे.
translated_text: Sir, this includes Congress and NCP as well as Sambhaji Brigade.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual inclusion of political parties; there is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase. The sentence primarily uses factual Marathi words like "काँग्रेस" (Congress), "राष्ट्रवादी" (NCP), "तसेच" (as well as), and "समावेश" (inclusion).

Text: दरारा हा वाघांचा असतो करणाऱ्यांचा नसतो त्याचा फक्त मुजरा असतो
translated_text: Fear belongs to the tiger, not to the doer, it is only a greeting.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it contrasts "darara" (fear) belonging to tigers with a "mujrra" (greeting) for doers. There's no explicit positive or negative connotation in the contrast presented; "mujrra asto" implying respect is balanced with "darara" belonging to tigers.

Text: त्यांना मोफत प्रवास होता
translated_text: They had free travel.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about free travel and lacks any emotional or opinionated content. The Marathi phrase "मोफत प्रवास" (moft pravas) simply indicates "free travel," contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: लेकभूषण असणं हे उद्योगभूषण असण्यापेक्ष्या मोठं आहे.
translated_text: Being a Lake Bhushan is bigger than being an industrial Bhushan.
Justification: The sentence presents a comparison between two types of awards ("लेकभूषण" and "उद्योगभूषण"). The Marathi word "मोठं" (bigger) simply indicates a relative size or importance, without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: रस्ते कशे बांधावे , शहर कसे रचावे हे महापालिका ठरवते
translated_text: The municipal corporation decides how to build roads and how to design the city.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the municipal corporation's responsibilities. There's no emotional language or subjective opinion expressed. The Marathi phrase "महापालिका ठरवते" (mahapalika tharavate - municipal corporation decides) is a factual statement and contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या सत्ता संघर्षावर उद्या सुप्रीम कोर्टात सुनावणी; सुनावणीचे थेट प्रक्षेपण होणार.....
translated_text: Hearing on Maharashtra's power struggle in Supreme Court tomorrow; Hearing will be telecast live.....
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of an upcoming court hearing ("सुनावणी") with no explicit positive or negative connotations.

Text: भेट व्हावी असं काही नाही मनात आपुलकी आहे हे हि काही कमी नाही...
translated_text: There is no need to meet, but the fact that I have affection in my heart is no less...
Justification: The phrase "मनात आपुलकी आहे" (manat aapulki aahe), meaning "there is affection in my heart," indicates a positive feeling and a sense of contentment, justifying the joy emotion. The presence of "आपुलकी" (aapulki - affection) is key to this positive sentiment.

Text: याला जास्त प्रसिद्धी देऊ नका. हा सगळं त्याचसाठी करतोय. असाच नाही उताणा पाडला निवडणुकीत.
translated_text: Don't give this too much publicity. I'm doing all this for the same reason. It's not like he messed up the election.
Justification: The phrase "उताणा पाडला" (utaana paadla), meaning "messed up/defeated badly", suggests anger towards the subject for losing the election. The overall context reinforces this negative sentiment due to the speaker expressing that the subject doesn't deserve publicity.

Text: मले आधी वाटलं तुम्ही सोता सोंगलेल्या सोयाबीन चा फोटु टाकलं का काय?
translated_text: I thought you posted a photo of the soybeans that were wrapped in silk.
Justification: The sentence expresses a thought or inquiry without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "मले आधी वाटलं" (male adhi vatla - I initially thought) simply introduces a statement of belief, and the rest of the sentence is a neutral observation about the photo's subject.

Text: लोकांना आणी पत्रकार या नात्याने तुम्हालाही अधिकार आहेच.अग्रलेखातुन आवाज़ उठवा
translated_text: As people and journalists, you also have rights. Raise your voice from the front page.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it focuses on stating rights ("अधिकार आहेच") and encouraging action ("आवाज़ उठवा") without expressing any strong positive or negative emotions. The phrase "अधिकार आहेच" (have rights) contributes to the neutral tone by simply stating a fact.

Text: गुन्हे दाखल झाले का? या औलादी झोडून काढायला हव्यात.
translated_text: Have any charges been filed? These children should be thrown out.
Justification: The phrase "औलादी झोडून काढायला हव्यात" (These children should be thrown out) expresses anger and a desire for harsh action, contributing to the negative sentiment and anger emotion.

Text: , नेहमी ज्यात आवड आहे आणि समाधान मिळत तेच काम करत रहायचं.
translated_text: Always do what you love and what gives you satisfaction.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general positive sentiment towards pursuing work that provides satisfaction and enjoyment. However, without more emotionally charged words, the sentiment is considered neutral (0.0). No specific word drives a particularly positive or negative emotion.

Text: भाई तुझ्या सारखं रिंगण तर नाही केलं ना?
translated_text: Brother, you didn't do the same thing as me, did you?
Justification: The phrase "भाई तुझ्या सारखं रिंगण तर नाही केलं ना?" implies the speaker is questioning the listener's actions with a hint of anger, based on a potential previous negative experience ("माझ्या सारखं"). Although the sentence can be seen as a simple question, the phrase "रिंगण तर नाही केलं ना?" hints towards something that the speaker perceives as potentially wrong or undesirable, triggering an emotional reaction.

Text: च्यु .. धनुष्यबाण तर किती वर्षांपासून माहिती होता तरीही चार नंबर आला
translated_text: Chew.. I've known about bows and arrows for years, but I still got number four.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the interjection "च्यु" (Chew), which expresses mild disappointment or annoyance but doesn't strongly indicate a positive or negative sentiment. The rest of the sentence describes a factual situation without strong emotional cues.

Text: हे सर्व एका घरातले आहेत परंतू एकनाथ शिंदे मध्येच कुठेतरी
translated_text: All of them are from the same family, but somewhere in between is Eknath Shinde.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about Eknath Shinde's position relative to others, lacking sentiment or emotional charge. The phrase "एका घरातले आहेत परंतू एकनाथ शिंदे मध्येच कुठेतरी" (from the same family, but Eknath Shinde is somewhere in between) simply describes a relationship and doesn't express a positive, negative, or emotional viewpoint.

Text: राजस्थानमध्ये काँग्रेसचं काय होणार असा प्रश्न निर्माण झाला होता. पण, रात्री अनेक घडामोडी घडल्यानंतर
translated_text: The question arose as to what would happen to the Congress in Rajasthan. But after many developments that night,
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes a situation and poses a question ("काय होणार असा प्रश्न निर्माण झाला होता") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तीन झाले का?  म्या दोघच समजत होतो
translated_text: Is it three? I thought it was two.
Justification: The phrase "तीन झाले का?" (Is it three?) indicates surprise, hence the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment. The "का?" directly translates to "why?" or "is it?" in a surprised manner, confirming unexpectedness.

Text: : कोल्हापूरपासून वणीपर्यंत, ही आहेत महाराष्ट्रातील साडेतीन शक्तिपीठे
translated_text: : From Kolhapur to Wani, these are the three and a half Shakti Peethas in Maharashtra
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement describing locations of Shakti Peethas. There is no specific word or phrase expressing a positive or negative emotion; it's simply informative. Hence, no specific Marathi word contributes to a particular sentiment.

Text: इथून पुढे सर्व न्यायालयीन बाबींचा निकाल ट्विटर पोल द्वारेच लागेल का? आपल्याला काय वाटते?
translated_text: Will all court cases be decided through Twitter polls from now on? What do you think?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about the future of court decisions ("निकाल ट्विटर पोल द्वारेच लागेल का?") and asks for the reader's opinion ("आपल्याला काय वाटते?"), indicating a neutral stance rather than any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भोंडल्याची भुलाबईची गाणी पण ह्या अश्या स्लो रॅप मध्ये येतात का
translated_text: Do Bhondla's Bhulabai songs also come in slow rap like this?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a question asking about the style of Bhondla songs; there isn't any overtly positive or negative language. The phrase "भोंडल्याची भुलाबईची गाणी" (Bhondla's Bhulabai songs) simply refers to a type of song and doesn't carry any inherent sentiment.

Text: हा उत्तम कोण आहे.?
translated_text: Who is this good?
Justification: The word "उत्तम" (uttam - good) suggests a positive attribute, but the interrogative structure ("कोण आहे.? - kon aahe? - who is?") creates uncertainty and surprise, neutralizing any strong positive sentiment and leading to surprise.

Text: एमपीएससी मध्ये प्रश्न विचारतील म्हणून अंडरलाईन केलीय का...
translated_text: Is it underlined because they will ask questions in MPSC...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the speculative and somewhat sarcastic tone implied by "म्हणून" (mhanun - because), suggesting a questioning rather than positive or negative affirmation. The sentence simply asks about the reason for underlining something in relation to the MPSC exam, without expressing any explicit emotional charge.

Text: योग्य वेळेची वाट बघण्यासाठी संयम असणे, हीच खरी जिवनातली अवघड परीक्षा आहे.
translated_text: Having the patience to wait for the right time is the real test of life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general philosophical observation about life and patience, without overtly expressing positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "अवघड परीक्षा" (avghad pariksha) - meaning difficult test or challenge - describes a situation but doesn't inherently carry a strong positive or negative sentiment, contributing to the neutral score.

Text: तुमच्या मधे आहे का पाऊस???
translated_text: Is there rain in your house???
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question about the presence of rain. There are no emotionally charged words or phrases; "तुमच्या मधे आहे का पाऊस???" simply inquires about weather conditions.

Text: वेट आणि वॉच बिहार.
translated_text: Wait and watch Bihar.
Justification: The sentence "वेट आणि वॉच बिहार" (Wait and watch Bihar) is neutral as it simply describes an action of observation and does not contain any words expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "वेट आणि वॉच" (wait and watch) is the primary contributor to this neutral sentiment.

Text: व्यापारात शांत संयमी आणि दूरदृष्टी असलेला माणूस टिकतो.
translated_text: A person who is calm, patient, and farsighted survives in business.
Justification: The sentence describes qualities needed to survive in business. There are no overtly positive or negative words; words like "शांत" (calm), "संयमी" (patient), and "दूरदृष्टी" (farsighted) are neutral descriptors, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: ओढत तुला च नेत आहे पण हे नक्की
translated_text: I'm dragging you along, but this is for sure.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "ओढत तुला च नेत आहे पण हे नक्की" simply states an action and its certainty without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: तरी सरकार काही करत नव्हते?निवडणुकीची वाट पाहत होते?मधेच "भारत जोडो" अले?
translated_text: Yet the government was not doing anything? Was it waiting for the elections? In the meantime, "Bharat Jodo" was added?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it primarily consists of questions and factual statements about the government's inaction and the occurrence of "Bharat Jodo". There is no explicit positive or negative word or phrase that clearly expresses sentiment. The questions "तरी सरकार काही करत नव्हते? निवडणुकीची वाट पाहत होते?" and the statement "मधेच "भारत जोडो" अले?" are presented without any emotional coloring, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: लोकांनी ओळखून घ्यावे ह्यांनी अंधेरीत का माघार घेतली
translated_text: People should know why they retreated to Andheri.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question about a political retreat ("माघार घेतली"), lacking overtly positive or negative phrasing.

Text: आता शिवसेना कोणाची होणार ? निवडणूक आयोग आयुक्तांनी सांगितली शक्यता
translated_text: Who will Shiv Sena belong to now? Election Commission Commissioner has mentioned the possibility
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("आता शिवसेना कोणाची होणार ?") and reports a factual possibility ("निवडणूक आयोग आयुक्तांनी सांगितली शक्यता") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जाणीव ठेवणारे माणसें खुप कमी प्रमाणात आहेत, पण उपकाराची परतफेड केली असे सांगणारे बरेच भेटतील.
translated_text: There are very few people who are aware, but there are many who say they have repaid the favor.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence presents a balanced observation without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. While it highlights the scarcity of genuinely aware individuals, the presence of people claiming to reciprocate favors doesn't necessarily tilt the sentiment in a particular direction. The overall tone remains observational and descriptive, leaning towards neutrality. The phrase "जाणीव ठेवणारे माणसें खुप कमी प्रमाणात आहेत" (there are very few aware people) expresses a lack, but not a negative sentiment in itself.

Text: गोऱ्यांनी सगळ्या गोष्टी चोरल्या, स्वतःच्या म्हणून जगभरात मिरवल्या..
translated_text: The whites stole everything and paraded it around the world as their own.
Justification: While the sentence expresses a negative action, the neutral sentiment is likely due to the lack of overtly emotional language. The phrase "चोरल्या, स्वतःच्या म्हणून जगभरात मिरवल्या" (stole, paraded as their own) describes the action but doesn't express explicit anger, sadness, or happiness. Therefore, the sentiment is considered neutral despite the negative connotation of stealing.

Text: अनंत कुरमुसेलाही अभिव्यक्ति स्वातंत्र्य होते, पण..............
translated_text: Anant Kurmuse also had freedom of expression, but.........
Justification: The sentence ends with "पण (pan)", which translates to "but." This conjunction introduces a potential shift or contrast, preventing a positive or negative sentiment and resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: कुठं होते रामभाऊ सकाळ पासून? दिसले नाही..
translated_text: Where has Rambhau been since morning? I haven't seen him..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning and observational tone. The phrase "कुठं होते रामभाऊ सकाळ पासून? दिसले नाही.." simply inquires about Rambhau's whereabouts and states he hasn't been seen, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: विशेष म्हणजे अंगणात एक कडेवर एक आणि पोटात एक असताना
translated_text: Especially when there's one on the side and one in the stomach in the yard.
Justification: The phrase "पोटात एक असताना" (potat ek astana - one in the stomach) is the most indicative of disgust, implying pregnancy in a potentially unwelcome or burdensome context.

Text: अनारोकॉपिटलिझम हा मोक्ष आहे
translated_text: Anarchocapitalism is salvation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of belief. While strong opinions exist about Anarchocapitalism, the word "मोक्ष" (moksha), meaning salvation, is used in a general, non-emotional way to equate it with a desirable end state, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: गुरुवान खाऊन पण टाकला असात तो नारळ...
translated_text: Guruwan would have eaten that coconut...
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact or speculation without any inherent positive or negative connotations. The phrase "गुरुवान खाऊन पण टाकला असात" (Guruwan would have eaten) is a neutral observation about a possible action.

Text: वीस पैशाच्या पुढे जे नाणे ठेवलेले आहे ते नाणे मी वापरलेले नाही
translated_text: I haven't used the coin that is placed next to the twenty paise.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about not using a coin ("मी वापरलेले नाही"). There are no sentiment bearing words or phrases in the sentence. The words "वीस पैशाच्या पुढे जे नाणे ठेवलेले आहे ते नाणे" simply describe the coin. Thus, the sentence is neutral.

Text: पहिली तू येतेस का निवडून ते पहावं
translated_text: You should choose to come first and see.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and observation about someone's potential victory ("निवडून ते पहावं"), which lacks strong positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मोहरम सण साजरा करण्यामागे या    महत्वाच्या गोष्टी आणि आख्यायिका प्रसिद्ध आहेत
translated_text: These important facts and legends are famous behind the celebration of Muharram.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the sentence being factual and descriptive. The phrase "प्रसिद्ध आहेत" (prasiddha aahet - are famous) simply states a known fact and doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment. The association with "Muharram" doesn't automatically trigger a strong emotion; the sentence focuses on the fame of associated facts and legends rather than the event's emotional impact. The emotion 'joy' is misplaced, since the sentence has no element indicating that emotion.

Text: माझा थ्रेड हा हिंदुधर्म म्हणजे काय हाच असेल
translated_text: My thread will be about what Hinduism is.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states the topic of a thread ("माझा थ्रेड हा हिंदुधर्म म्हणजे काय हाच असेल" - My thread will be about what Hinduism is). There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative feelings, opinions, or evaluations. The sentence is factual and descriptive.

Text: हे जिल्ह्याचे नाही तर विभागाचे झाले.
translated_text: This happened not at the district level but at the department level.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual change in scope ("विभागाचे झाले" - happened at the department level) without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion. There are no emotionally charged words in the sentence.

Text: ती काकांचा एजन्ट आहे काय? असा मणतात.
translated_text: Is she my uncle's agent? They say so.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question and report of hearsay, lacking any inherently positive or negative Marathi words or phrases. "ती काकांचा एजन्ट आहे काय?" simply inquires about a potential relationship, and "असा मणतात" reports what others are saying, without expressing a personal opinion or feeling.

Text: शपथ सांगतो मला फुल्ल डाऊट आहे हे मीडिया वाले खेचतात उद्धव साहेबांची
translated_text: I swear I have complete doubt that the media is dragging Uddhav Saheb.
Justification: The phrase "शपथ सांगतो मला फुल्ल डाऊट आहे" (I swear I have complete doubt) indicates uncertainty and lack of belief, but doesn't express strong positive or negative feeling. Therefore, it contributes to a neutral sentiment.

Text: शिंदे गटाला निवडणूक चिन्ह म्हणून राज्यपालांची काळी टोपी देण्यात यावी...
translated_text: The Shinde group should be given the Governor's black cap as an election symbol...
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement suggesting a symbolic association, "राज्यपालांची काळी टोपी" (Governor's black cap), which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment. It's a proposition rather than an expression of feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: चित्राताई हे कोण आहेत
translated_text: Who is Chitratai?
Justification: The sentence "चित्राताई हे कोण आहेत" is neutral because it is a simple question asking for identification, and there are no words or phrases that express any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "कोण आहेत" (kon aahet) meaning "who is" is a neutral inquiry.

Text: काय रे भिकु तुझा मायनोसेना पक्ष या टिपन्नीची दखल घेणार आहे का?
translated_text: What, Bhikku, is your Myno Sena party going to take note of this comment?
Justification: The sentence uses the derogatory term "भिकु" (Bhikku) in a sarcastic and dismissive manner, but the overall context presents the sentence as a question rather than an expression of strong positive or negative sentiment; therefore it is considered neutral.

Text: नाही कोणाच्या बापाची ? तूमचे साहेब म्हणजे मोदी, शाह, फडण   किंवा  नाथ ना???
translated_text: No, whose father? Your boss is Modi, Shah, Phadhan or Nath, right?
Justification: The sentence expresses disbelief and challenges authority without containing inherently positive or negative language. The phrase "नाही कोणाच्या बापाची ?" (nahi konachya bapachi?) is rhetorical and dismissive but doesn't convey a strong positive or negative sentiment in this context; hence, the neutral sentiment.

Text: गाडी होती का घोडी कोण जाणे
translated_text: Who knows if it was a horse or a carriage?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "कोण जाणे" (kon jane), which translates to "who knows." This expresses uncertainty and a lack of strong feeling, indicating neutrality.

Text: रुग्णालय आहे हे
translated_text: Is there a hospital?
Justification: The sentence "रुग्णालय आहे हे" (Is there a hospital?) expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question seeking information. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in the phrase "रुग्णालय आहे हे" itself.

Text: यांनीच महाराष्ट्र राज्याला बदनाम करण्याचा प्रयत्न केला आहे का...?
translated_text: Have they tried to defame the state of Maharashtra...?
Justification: The phrase "बदनाम करण्याचा प्रयत्न केला" (badnam karanyacha prayatna kela), meaning "tried to defame," suggests a negative action and suspicion, triggering the emotion of anger and a neutral sentiment score, as it's a question implying accusation.

Text: पैशाची किंमत काय आहे, बेरोजगार व्यक्तीला विचारा.
translated_text: What is the value of money, ask an unemployed person.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a hypothetical situation and a call to understand the value of money from a specific perspective. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrase "बेरोजगार व्यक्तीला विचारा" (ask an unemployed person) simply directs the question and doesn't convey any particular emotional tone or sentiment in itself.

Text: स्टडी फ्रॉम होम होऊ शकते का याचा विचार करायला हवा
translated_text: You should consider whether studying from home is possible.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses consideration and possibility ("विचार करायला हवा" - vichar karayala hava) without any explicit positive or negative connotations. This phrase suggests a need for thinking about something, not expressing an opinion.

Text: सध्या समाधान नाही ती, त्यामुळे ट्विटरवर येईन तिला समाधान मिळत आहे
translated_text: She is not satisfied right now, so she will come on Twitter and get satisfaction.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of satisfaction ("समाधान नाही") in the present, but anticipates gaining satisfaction ("समाधान मिळत आहे") in the future. These opposing sentiments contribute to a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: ,सुरूवात आपल्यापासून करावी हि विनंती ....
translated_text: ,I would like to request this from you first....
Justification: The sentence expresses a request, using the phrase "हि विनंती" (hi vinanti), which translates to "this request." This is a neutral statement as it doesn't convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: उद्या कोर्टाचा निर्णय आला की हा शिंदे यांना सांभाळणार.....
translated_text: When the court's decision comes tomorrow, he will take care of Shinde.....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a future event (the court's decision) and its potential consequence (taking care of Shinde) without conveying any inherent positive or negative feeling. No specific word or phrase indicates a strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अखेर म्हणजे नांदेड पंढरपूर आणि कोल्हापूरच्या निवडणुकीनंतर
translated_text: Finally, after the elections in Nanded, Pandharpur and Kolhapur
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("अखेर म्हणजे नांदेड पंढरपूर आणि कोल्हापूरच्या निवडणुकीनंतर" - Finally, after the elections in Nanded, Pandharpur and Kolhapur) without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "अखेर म्हणजे" (Finally, after) introduces a temporal context but doesn't carry any inherent sentiment.

Text: जेमतेम    वी पास आणि कायदेतज्ञ आणि डॉक्टर होतात हे पहिल्यांदा होईल.
translated_text: It will be the first time that people barely pass the V-level and become lawyers and doctors.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about a hypothetical situation with "जेमतेम वी पास" (barely passing the V-level) describing a minimal qualification, but it doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment directly. Thus, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: नुकत्याच दिवंगत झालेल्या महाराणी एलिझाबेथ यांच्या आत्म्याला शांती लाभावी म्हणून
translated_text: May the soul of the recently departed Queen Elizabeth rest in peace.
Justification: The phrase "दिवंगत झालेल्या" (divangat zhalelya), meaning "departed" or "deceased," indicates a passing, contributing to the overall sentiment of sadness.

Text: पटकथेला मान्यता देणाऱ्या पडताळणी समितीतल्या सर्व सदस्यांची चौकशी ही विद्यापीठ प्रशासनाने
translated_text: The university administration has ordered an inquiry into all members of the screening committee that approved the script.
Justification: The sentence describes an investigation, but lacks overtly positive or negative wording. The phrase "चौकशी" (chaukashi - inquiry) indicates an investigation, which is a factual event rather than an expression of feeling. Therefore, it doesn't trigger a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आरे तुम्ही तर हारायच्या भीतीने राजीनामा च मंजुर करत नव्हतात ते काय होत
translated_text: Hey, you weren't accepting the resignation out of fear of losing, so what?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it questions past actions without strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हारायच्या भीतीने" (haraychya bhitine - fear of losing) implies a negative motivation, but the overall tone is questioning and not strongly accusatory or emotional, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: माझा उर भरून आला पोरा , तुझं ट्विट वाचून ...
translated_text: My heart is filled with joy, my son, after reading your tweet...
Justification: The phrase "उर भरून आला" (ur bharun ala), meaning "heart is filled", strongly suggests positive emotion and joy, but in this context, it is not strong enough to be a positive sentiment. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: मग का बघितला आणि पैसे दिले .. .
translated_text: So why did you watch it and pay for it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("मग का बघितला आणि पैसे दिले .. .") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "मग का" (mag ka - so why) sets a questioning tone, rather than conveying a specific emotion.

Text: गिरगाव येथे कार्यकर्ता व नागरिक संवाद कार्यक्रम - ./-…
translated_text: Activists and citizens' dialogue program at Girgaum - ./-…
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event - a dialogue program. The phrase "कार्यकर्ता व नागरिक संवाद कार्यक्रम" (karyakarta v nagrik samvad karyakram - activists and citizens' dialogue program) is descriptive and doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेचा आहे
translated_text: Chief Minister belongs to Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual affiliation. The phrase "मुख्यमंत्री बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेचा आहे" (Chief Minister belongs to Balasaheb's Shiv Sena) simply describes a political association without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तलाठी भरती लवकर जाहीर करावी ही विनंती
translated_text: Request to announce Talathi recruitment soon
Justification: The sentence expresses a request ("विनंती"), which is inherently neutral and does not contain sentiment-bearing words. The phrase "तलाठी भरती लवकर जाहीर करावी" simply states the subject of the request. Therefore, no specific word contributes to a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ते येतीलच हा विश्वास आम्हाला नाही तुम्हाला आहे म्हणून
translated_text: We don't believe they will come, because you do.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of belief ("विश्वास नाही") which contributes to the neutral sentiment. The phrase "विश्वास नाही" indicates a lack of positive or negative feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment score.

Text: आणि ती महाराष्ट्रातच होते. योगींकडे अश्या गोष्टी घडत नाहीत. सर्व वचकून असतात.
translated_text: And it happens in Maharashtra. Such things don't happen to Yogis. Everyone is shocked.
Justification: The phrase "सर्व वचकून असतात" (sarva vachkun asatat) which translates to "everyone is shocked/cautious/in awe" indicates a surprise or awe-inspired reaction, but since its undirected and potentially neutral, the overall sentiment is considered neutral.

Text: आपण बारामती बरोबर बांद्र्याची सुध्दा धुणीभांडी करता का?
translated_text: Do you also wash clothes in Bandra along with Baramati?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of overtly positive or negative sentiment in the words used. The sentence is a question about laundry services ("धुणीभांडी करता का?"), which is informational and does not express a particular emotion.

Text: खरिदार आहे ते जे विकणारे होते ते विकत घेतले, या बोलण्यावरून सिद्ध झाले,
translated_text: The buyer bought what the seller bought, this statement proves it,
Justification: The sentence is factual and reports a transaction. The Marathi phrase "खरिदार आहे ते जे विकणारे होते ते विकत घेतले" (The buyer bought what the seller bought) simply describes the event without conveying any positive, negative, or emotional tone.

Text: नक्की काय खातात हा शोध तुम्ही तुमच्या घ्या तेवढंच राहील आहे आता
translated_text: It's up to you to find out exactly what you eat.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a factual observation or instruction. The phrase "नक्की काय खातात हा शोध तुम्ही तुमच्या घ्या" (nakki kay khatat ha shodh tumhi tumchya ghya) is an objective statement suggesting investigation without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: तुमच्या बद्दल अशी काही बातमी आता येणार पण नाही याची खात्री आहे आम्हाला
translated_text: We are sure that there will be no such news about you now.
Justification: The sentence expresses certainty about the absence of news related to the subject. The phrase "खात्री आहे आम्हाला" (khatri aahe amhala) which translates to "we are sure," indicates a neutral and confident statement rather than a positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: हो आणि त्यांनी बंडखोरी केल्यामुळे आदित्य ठाकरे हे लोकांना समजले
translated_text: Yes, and people understood that Aditya Thackeray was the one who rebelled.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Aditya Thackeray's rebellion and people understanding it, lacking any overtly positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "बंडखोरी केल्यामुळे" (bandkhori kelyamule - because of the rebellion) is a neutral description of an event, contributing to the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: एक शेतकार्यचा मुलगा मुख्यमंत्री झाला हेही कोणाला रुचले नाही
translated_text: No one was interested in the fact that a farm worker's son became the Chief Minister.
Justification: The phrase "रुचले नाही" (ruchale nahi), meaning "did not appeal" or "was not liked," indicates a lack of positive or negative reaction, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: देवमाणूस मधला नाम्या आहे का हा?
translated_text: Is this the name of the god-man?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "देवमाणूस मधला नाम्या आहे का हा?", specifically the interrogative "का हा?" which implies doubt or disbelief, hence surprise, regarding the person being the 'Namya' from the 'god-man' show.

Text: मग हे काय आहे ?
translated_text: So what is this?
Justification: "काय आहे ?" (kay aahe?) which translates to "what is this?" expresses a questioning and inquisitive tone, indicating a lack of positive or negative leaning, leading to a neutral sentiment. The interrogative nature contributes to the emotion of surprise as it seeks information about something unexpected.

Text: मेनन कबर बांधायला सगळ्या पुढे होते
translated_text: Menon was ahead of everyone in building the tomb.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual action ("मेनन कबर बांधायला सगळ्या पुढे होते" - Menon was ahead of everyone in building the tomb) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. There is no emotive Marathi word or phrase present.

Text: भाजपचा पराभव अटळ होता
translated_text: BJP's defeat was inevitable
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because the phrase "पराभव अटळ होता" (parabhav atal hota - defeat was inevitable) simply states a factual outcome without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: असा कसा फेसबूक लाईव्ह ला सुद्धा होते की
translated_text: How can this even happen on Facebook Live?
Justification: The phrase "असा कसा" (asa kasa), meaning "how can this even," expresses disbelief and surprise, leading to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: साहेब हे शक्य आहे का ? कायदा सगळ्यासाठी सारखाच असला पाहिजे
translated_text: Sir, is this possible? The law should be the same for everyone.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "कायदा सगळ्यासाठी सारखाच असला पाहिजे" (The law should be the same for everyone) advocates for equality and fairness without expressing a positive or negative emotion. It is a statement of principle.

Text: पंजाबच्या भगवंत मान सरकारला पाकिस्तानसोबत पुन्हा सुरू करायचा आहे व्यापार
translated_text: Punjab's Bhagwant Mann government wants to resume trade with Pakistan
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual intention of the Punjab government to resume trade. There is no emotionally charged language or value judgment. The Marathi phrase "पुन्हा सुरू करायचा आहे व्यापार" (punha suru karaycha aahe vyapar - wants to resume trade) is a neutral statement of intent.

Text: शिंदेसेना म्हणजे
translated_text: Shinde Sena means
Justification: The phrase "शिंदेसेना म्हणजे" (Shinde Sena means) is a neutral statement as it simply defines or introduces a political entity without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: बरं ते प्रसन्ना जोशी शोधत आहेत तुम्हाला..
translated_text: Well, they are looking for you, Prasanna Joshi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "शोधत आहेत" (shodhat aahet - are looking for) is a neutral verb indicating an action without conveying positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मेट्रोच्या पिलरचे काम सुरू असताना बाजूला असणाऱ्या चाळींच्या भिंती आणि घर... यांच्याकडून
translated_text: While the work on the metro pillar was going on, the walls of the adjoining chawls and houses...
Justification: The sentence describes an ongoing construction activity. The phrase "मेट्रोच्या पिलरचे काम सुरू असताना" (metrochya pillarche kaam suru astana - while the work on the metro pillar was going on) is purely descriptive and does not convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पामतेल देतोय अस सांगायला पण लाज वाटत नसेल का वो तुम्हाला?
translated_text: Aren't you ashamed to say that you're giving palm oil?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the phrase "लाज वाटत नसेल का," which expresses a strong feeling of disgust and disbelief at the speaker's lack of shame, indicating negative sentiment.

Text: घे डबल संघटना आहे बहुतेक..
translated_text: It's probably a double organization.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a possibility ("घे डबल संघटना आहे बहुतेक") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The word "घे डबल संघटना" simply suggests a double organization without any emotional coloring. "बहुतेक" (bahutek - probably) further reduces any potential for strong sentiment, making the sentence factual and objective.

Text: लठ्ठपणा कमी करण्यासाठी मधाचा योग्य वापर करणे गरजेचं आहे
translated_text: Proper use of honey is essential to reduce obesity.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual relationship between honey and obesity reduction using the phrase "गरजेचं आहे" (garjech aahe), meaning "is essential" or "is necessary," which indicates a need rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: तू करत नाहीस का फक्त फडणवीस फडणवीस..
translated_text: Don't you just do it, Fadnavis, Fadnavis..
Justification: The repetition of "फडणवीस फडणवीस" (Fadnavis, Fadnavis) expresses a frustrated or inquisitive tone but lacks explicitly positive or negative indicators, resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase itself does not convey inherent positivity or negativity, merely focus.

Text: ते सगळे ठीक, पण नक्की कोणता बाळासाहेब?
translated_text: That's all fine, but which Balasaheb exactly?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question of clarification ("नक्की कोणता बाळासाहेब?") without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "नक्की कोणता" (which one exactly) is purely informational and lacks any emotional charge.

Text: यंदा हि दिवाळी वेगळी ठरणार आता रांगोळी घरात आणि अंघोळी दारात...
translated_text: This year, Diwali will be different, now there will be Rangoli in the house and Angholi at the door...
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual observation about changes in Diwali celebrations. There is no specific word or phrase carrying a sentiment or emotion; the statement "यंदा हि दिवाळी वेगळी ठरणार" (yanda hi diwali vegali tharnar - This year, Diwali will be different) is a statement of change, not inherently positive or negative.

Text: न्यायमूर्ती उदय उमेश लळीत यांची भारताचे    वे सरन्यायाधीश म्हणून नेमणूक
translated_text: Justice Uday Umesh Lalit appointed as the 6th Chief Justice of India
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact - "नेमणूक" (nēmṇūk), meaning "appointment," describes a formal event without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: निवडणूक झाली तर राज ठाकरे पाठिंबा जाहीर करतील असा अंदाज आहे माझा. बाकी बघुयात.
translated_text: I think Raj Thackeray will declare his support if the elections are held. Let's see.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and speculation, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "अंदाज आहे माझा" (andaz aahe mazha - it's my guess/estimate) indicates a personal opinion and a lack of certainty, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: इथं पवार साहेब चालते का?
translated_text: Is Pawar Saheb working here?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question asking if Pawar Saheb is working at a particular place. The phrase "चालते का?" (chaalte kaa?) is a polite way of inquiring about someone's presence or employment and carries no inherent sentiment.

Text: इतर लोकांना काहि सुचल का?
translated_text: Did other people have any ideas?
Justification: The sentence "इतर लोकांना काहि सुचल का?" expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question about whether other people had ideas. There's no inherently positive or negative connotation in the phrase "इतर लोकांना काहि सुचल का?" itself, which simply inquires about suggestions.

Text: सध्या गुंठेवारी चे दस्त नोंद होत नाही त्याविषयी काही लक्ष द्यावे नम्र विनंती.
translated_text: I humbly request you to pay some attention to the fact that Gunthewari documents are not being registered at present.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request and a statement of fact, without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti - humble request) indicates politeness but doesn't introduce a strong emotional tone. The core issue about document registration being halted is presented neutrally.

Text: साडेतीन जिल्हे म्हणजे जग का......
translated_text: Why are three and a half districts the world?
Justification: The phrase "साडेतीन जिल्हे म्हणजे जग का......" expresses surprise because it questions the importance of "साडेतीन जिल्हे" (three and a half districts) in relation to "जग" (the world), implying disbelief at the idea that such a small area could be considered everything. The question mark and the "...का" structure amplify the sense of astonishment.

Text: म्हणूनच बोलावले नाही मी तुला अजून
translated_text: That's why I haven't called you yet.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact ("That's why I haven't called you yet.") without any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "म्हणूनच बोलावले नाही मी तुला अजून" (mhanunach bolavale nahi mee tula ajun) simply explains a reason for not calling, remaining neutral in tone.

Text: मच्छी मार्केटला गेल्यावर मच्छी पापलेट घ्यावाच लागतो का...??
translated_text: Do you have to buy fish paplette when you go to the fish market...??
Justification: The sentence expresses a question ("घ्यावाच लागतो का...??"), indicating inquiry rather than a positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "घ्यावाच लागतो का...??", meaning "do you have to buy", conveys a neutral, questioning tone.

Text: तुम्हाला च तिकीट द्यायची आहे साहेबाना म्हणून सर्व नाटक सुरु आहे
translated_text: All the drama is going on because you want to give me a ticket, sir.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual statement describing a situation. The phrase "तुम्हाला च तिकीट द्यायची आहे साहेबाना म्हणून सर्व नाटक सुरु आहे" (you want to give me a ticket, sir, that's why all the drama is going on) is a descriptive statement and doesn't inherently express positive or negative emotion.

Text: अडीच वर्षे महाराष्ट्र फेसबुक लाइव्ह होता आता बाहेर पडलाय
translated_text: Maharashtra was live on Facebook for two and a half years, now it's gone.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about Maharashtra's Facebook Live presence. There is no sentiment or emotion conveyed in the Marathi phrase "अडीच वर्षे महाराष्ट्र फेसबुक लाइव्ह होता आता बाहेर पडलाय" (Adiich varsha Maharashtra Facebook Live hota aata baher padlay). It's a straightforward statement of events.

Text: आपली घेवून यायची की तुम्ही देणार
translated_text: Should I bring my own or will you give it to me?
Justification: While the sentence itself is a simple question about bringing something, assigning anger relies on implied tone or context. Without explicit angry words, the justification must assume sarcasm or a demanding tone conveyed through "आपली घेवून यायची की तुम्ही देणार" itself. The questioning suggests impatience or annoyance if the context implies a prior agreement or expectation, hence the potential for anger.

Text: वजन घटवण्यासाठी रात्रीचं जेवण करता स्किप ? मग संध्याकाळी खा ‘ हे ‘ पदार्थ
translated_text: Do you skip dinner to lose weight? Then eat 'this' food in the evening
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question offering advice, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "वजन घटवण्यासाठी" (to lose weight) indicates a goal, but doesn't express a positive or negative sentiment on its own. The question "रात्रीचं जेवण करता स्किप?" (Do you skip dinner?) is also neutral as it simply inquires about a habit.

Text: साम दाम दंड भेद दिवस आमचे पण येतील
translated_text: The days of equality and difference will come to us too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the overall tone of simply stating a future possibility ("येतील") without any explicit positive or negative connotations. The phrase "साम दाम दंड भेद" suggests a complex situation without leaning towards a particular sentiment and "दिवस आमचे पण" further maintains the neutrality.

Text: काय तुमचे विश्र्लशन.. कायपण यात कसला मोठेपण, आपणंच सगळ्या जगाचं मार्केट आहे..
translated_text: What is your analysis? What is the greatness of this? We have a market for the whole world.
Justification: The phrase "काय तुमचे विश्र्लशन.. कायपण यात कसला मोठेपण" suggests sarcasm and disbelief towards someone's analysis, diminishing its importance and implying negativity, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment instead of a strongly positive or negative one. The "कसला मोठेपण" questions the greatness or significance of something, undermining its value, leading to a surprise emotion.

Text: सोनाली जी आपण जैन धर्माचे आहात का
translated_text: Sonali ji, are you a Jain?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question about someone's religious affiliation. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in the phrase "जैन धर्माचे आहात का" (Jain Dharma che aahat ka - are you a Jain?).

Text: लाल रंगाचे उपरणे घेणार आता शेणके.
translated_text: Now the dung will take the red color.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi word "शेणके" (dung) in this context doesn't inherently convey positive or negative emotion.

Text: हे खरं पण तुम्ही काय करताय मनात राहण्यासाठी हेही महत्वाचे!!!
translated_text: This is true, but it is also important to keep in mind what you are doing!!!
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced thought; "हे खरं पण" (he khara pan) which translates to "this is true, but" introduces a contrasting element, resulting in a neutral sentiment as it presents a conditional perspective rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: हे   /   म्हणजे संपूर्ण पुणे नव्हे!
translated_text: This is not the whole of Pune!
Justification: The phrase "हे म्हणजे संपूर्ण पुणे नव्हे!" expresses anger because "नव्हे!" (navhe!), meaning "not!", negates the implied positive expectation of Pune being whole or representative, creating a sense of dismissal and frustration.

Text: खरं तर हा फोटो फ्रेम करून लावला पाहिजे प्रत्येकाने त्यांच्या संपर्क कार्यालयात...
translated_text: In fact, everyone should frame this photo and put it in their contact office...
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion about framing a photo, without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling. There is no specific word or phrase that indicates sentiment. Hence it is a neutral statement.

Text: महायुती सरकार असताना नाना ह्यांना एकही प्रतिक्रिया दिली नाही.आता सक्रिय.
translated_text: Nana did not give any reaction to him during the grand alliance government. Now he is active.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it mainly states a factual observation about Nana's past inaction and current activity. There's no explicit positive or negative language. The phrase "एकही प्रतिक्रिया दिली नाही" (did not give any reaction) and "आता सक्रिय" (now active) are simply descriptive.

Text: कोहिनूर प्रकरणामुळे चांगले चांगले शांत झाले आहेत.. त्यांना पण विचारा एकदा का शांत आहे
translated_text: They have become very quiet due to the Kohinoor case.. Ask them why they are quiet for once.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a state of being ("शांत झाले आहेत" - have become quiet) and poses a question without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "शांत झाले आहेत" (quieted down) suggests a change in behavior but doesn't inherently express any positive or negative feeling.

Text: तुमच्यामुळे हे दिवस आलेत
translated_text: These days have come because of you.
Justification: The sentence "तुमच्यामुळे हे दिवस आलेत" has a neutral sentiment because it simply states a cause-and-effect relationship. While the context could imply blame or regret, the phrase "तुमच्यामुळे" (tumchyāmule - because of you) alone doesn't convey a specific positive or negative sentiment without additional information.

Text: ते पहिल्यांदा विमानपत्तन हा शब्द काढा आम्हाला विमान पडल्या सारखे वाटते
translated_text: First of all, remove the word airport, it feels like a plane crash.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "विमान पडल्या सारखे वाटते" (viman padlya sarkhe vatate), which translates to "it feels like a plane crash," indicating a feeling of distress and sadness.

Text: पावसाळ्यात पाणी पण असतंय सर
translated_text: There is water during the rainy season, sir.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation about the rainy season. There is no emotionally charged language used. The phrase "पावसाळ्यात पाणी पण असतंय" (paavsalyat paani pan astay) simply states that there is water in the rainy season.

Text: तेवढं ते काकांना पंतप्रधान बनवायचं आहे, त्याचं बघा ना काय होतंय का
translated_text: They want to make that uncle the Prime Minister, look what's happening.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a desire and asks about the progress of an event without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "तेवढं ते काकांना पंतप्रधान बनवायचं आहे, त्याचं बघा ना काय होतंय का" is a factual statement, lacking any overt emotional cues.

Text: येना-या प्रत्येईल निवडणुकीत एक तर यशस्वी माघारच घ्यावी लागेल किंवा नेस्तनाबूत होइल कमळी.
translated_text: In every upcoming election, Kamali will either have to make a successful withdrawal or be annihilated.
Justification: "नेस्तनाबूत होइल" (nestanabut hoil) - meaning "will be annihilated" - indicates a strongly negative outcome, contributing to the overall sadness and a neutral sentiment.

Text: शोले, सरफरोश, अशी ही बनवाबनवी, पुष्पा, , .
translated_text: Sholay, Sarfarosh, this is what Banwabanwi, Pushpa, .
Justification: The sentence is a list of movie names. There are no words or phrases expressing sentiment or emotion.

Text: तुम्हाला    पेक्षा जास्त खोके मिळाल्याची बातमी आहे . खर का ?
translated_text: There is news that you have received more than . Is that true?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "खर का?" (khar ka?), which translates to "Is that true?" and indicates disbelief or questioning of the information, implying surprise.

Text: हे जनतेचे सरकार
translated_text: This is the people's government.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the government being "of the people" ("जनतेचे सरकार"). There is no inherent positive or negative connotation in the Marathi phrase "जनतेचे सरकार," leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: अस लै वेळेस होत पुन्हा आहे आहे जाग्यावर आहे होत
translated_text: It's happening again, it's happening again, it's happening again.
Justification: The sentence expresses a repetitive occurrence ("होत पुन्हा आहे आहे"), but lacks any explicit positive or negative indicators, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: थोडीच तर आहे,ती भलतीकडे वापरली आहे आधीच
translated_text: There is only a little, it has already been used for the wrong purpose.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "थोडीच तर आहे,ती भलतीकडे वापरली आहे" (thodich tar aahe, tee bhaltikade vaparali aahe) simply states a fact about a small quantity being used improperly. There's no explicit positive or negative evaluation of the situation.

Text: आता हा भाऊसाहेब त्याचा ट्विट चेंकाय करणार.... पावसाळा तसा आहे खूप
translated_text: Now this brother will check his tweet.... It's rainy season.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. While the phrase "आता हा भाऊसाहेब त्याचा ट्विट चेंकाय करणार" (Now this brother will check his tweet) implies someone is checking a tweet, and "पावसाळा तसा आहे खूप" (It's rainy season) simply states a fact about the weather. These statements do not convey any positive or negative emotion; they are factual and descriptive. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: आता उठऊ सारे रान आता पेटऊ सारे रान शेतकऱ्यांच्या राज्यासाठी
translated_text: Now let all the forests rise, now let all the forests burn for the kingdom of the farmers.
Justification: The phrase "आता पेटऊ सारे रान" (now let all the forests burn) expresses a destructive and aggressive sentiment, indicative of anger, even when contextually applied to a revolution for farmers' rights.

Text: डॉक्टरांनी दिलेली प्रिस्क्रिप्शन तुम्ही वाचू शकता का?
translated_text: Can you read a prescription given by a doctor?
Justification: The sentence "डॉक्टरांनी दिलेली प्रिस्क्रिप्शन तुम्ही वाचू शकता का?" is neutral because it's a simple question about reading a prescription. There's no inherently positive or negative word or phrase associated with strong emotion or sentiment. It's a factual inquiry.

Text: आता पवार काकांच्या विचारांचे वारसदार होणार तुमचे साहेब...
translated_text: Now, your sir, will be the heir to Pawar Kaka's ideas...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a fact or observation about someone inheriting Pawar Kaka's ideas; the phrase "आता पवार काकांच्या विचारांचे वारसदार होणार" (ata Pawar Kakanchya vicharanche varasdar honar - now will be the heir to Pawar Kaka's ideas) expresses this without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: होता माझ्याजवळ पोस्ट पण केले होते
translated_text: I had it posted too.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("hota majhyajaval post pan kele hote" - I had it posted too) with no inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "post pan kele hote" (posted too) indicates a simple action without expressing any particular feeling.

Text: हे तु बोलतोय म्हणजे उध्दव ची वाटचाल बरबादीच्या योग्य दिशेने चालू आहे....
translated_text: What you are saying is that Uddhav's path is heading in the right direction of destruction...
Justification: The phrase "बरबादीच्या योग्य दिशेने" (barbadichya yogya dishene), meaning "right direction of destruction", while seemingly negative, is being used ironically and with implied political criticism. Therefore, without further context, the sentiment leans neutral.

Text: कमळाबाई चेच लोक होती ती आदित्यसाहेबांचे अंदोलन बातमी दाखवावी लागनार नाही म्हणून
translated_text: Kamalabai's people were the ones who were the ones who should not be shown the news of Adityasaheb's movement.
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the implied manipulation and suppression of news, indicated by the phrase "दाखवावी लागनार नाही म्हणून" (dakhavavi lagnaar nahi mhanun) which translates to "should not be shown, therefore." This suggests a deliberate attempt to control information.

Text: फटाक्याची माळ लावेन का मग मातोश्री ते चंदेरी गृह
translated_text: Should I light a garland of crackers then from Matoshree to Chanderi Griha?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question with no inherent positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "फटाक्याची माळ लावेन का मग" (should I light a garland of crackers then) expresses a hypothetical action, lacking positive or negative connotations without further context.

Text: स्नेहाच्या दिव्यात ठेवते वात तेजाची वसू बारस म्हणजे पूजा धेनु वासराची *
translated_text: The wick of the lamp of love is kept in the lamp of light, the Vasu Baras is the worship of the Dhenu calf.
Justification: The overall neutral sentiment (0.0) and assignment of disgust despite the seemingly positive context stem from the absence of overtly positive or negative emotional cues in the Marathi sentence. The phrase "स्नेहाच्या दिव्यात ठेवते वात तेजाची" (Snehachya divyat thevte vaat tejachi) describes a simple act of placing a wick in a lamp, which is neither inherently positive nor negative and lacks any specific term that directly implies happiness, sadness, or any other strong emotion. "वसू बारस म्हणजे पूजा धेनु वासराची" (Vasu Baras mhanje pooja dhenu vasarachi) is a statement of fact, indicating a cultural practice, and similarly devoid of emotionally charged vocabulary that would shift the overall sentiment. The absence of positive indicators leads to the perception of a somewhat negative and disgust-like sentiment.

Text: जे केले ते भोगावेच लागेल
translated_text: You will have to suffer for what you have done.
Justification: The neutral sentiment with sadness is driven by the phrase "भोगावेच लागेल" (bhogavech lagel), which translates to "will have to suffer" or "will inevitably face the consequences". This phrase implies an unavoidable negative outcome, contributing to sadness.

Text: आता काय येत नसतो तो मुंबईत
translated_text: What does not come now in Mumbai
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("आता काय येत नसतो") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "आता काय येत नसतो" simply inquires about something's arrival or lack thereof.

Text: आवडतं का?
translated_text: Do you like it?
Justification: The sentence "आवडतं का?" expresses a question about liking something, using "आवडतं" which translates to "like" or "is pleasing". The interrogative nature and lack of explicit positive or negative connotation contribute to a neutral sentiment.

Text: संजू भौ यांना महिला आणि बालविकास विभागाच्या जबाबदारी मिळणार अशी अपेक्षा आहे....
translated_text: Sanju Bhau is expected to be given the responsibility of the Women and Child Development Department....
Justification: The sentence expresses an expectation ("अपेक्षा आहे") about a future event, making it neutral in sentiment. The phrase "अपेक्षा आहे" simply indicates an anticipation and doesn't carry any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: वर्मा अजून नीट आहे तुम्हाला इथल्या लोकांचे संस्कार कळायला वेळ लागेल.
translated_text: Verma is still fine, you will need time to understand the culture of the people here.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states a fact ("Verma is still fine") and makes a neutral observation about cultural understanding ("वेळ लागेल" - will need time), without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: पंतांना करा ते सद्या गृहमंत्री आहेत
translated_text: Do it to Pant, he is currently the Home Minister.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about Pant's current position ("गृहमंत्री आहेत" - is the Home Minister") without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion.

Text: मराठी लोक कुठे गेलीत ..एकही मराठी माणूस या पुरस्काराचा हकदार नाही का?
translated_text: Where have the Marathi people gone...isn't there a single Marathi person who deserves this award?
Justification: The phrase "एकही मराठी माणूस या पुरस्काराचा हकदार नाही का?" (isn't there a single Marathi person who deserves this award?) implies a lack of Marathi representation and expresses surprise that no one was deemed worthy, driving the neutral sentiment.

Text: एकनाथ शिंदे पक्ष जुनी बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना आहे..
translated_text: Eknath Shinde's party is the old Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact about the Eknath Shinde party being associated with the old Balasaheb's Shiv Sena. There is no inherently positive or negative wording used. The phrase "जुनी बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना" (juni Balasahebanchi Shiv Sena - old Balasaheb's Shiv Sena) is a descriptive phrase without any intrinsic sentiment.

Text: आणि इथून निघताना आपण का निघालो? हा पण प्रश्न पडतो.
translated_text: And when we leave here, why did we leave? This also raises the question.
Justification: The sentence expresses a reflective and somewhat questioning tone, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हा पण प्रश्न पडतो" (this also raises the question) suggests a neutral contemplation rather than a distinct emotional response.

Text: बघू आता हे पत्र संस्कृतीत बसते का ते ?
translated_text: Let's see if this letter fits the culture.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it uses the phrase "बघू आता" (baghu aata), meaning "Let's see now," which indicates observation and uncertainty without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: हा जुना फ़ोटो आहे का
translated_text: Is this an old photo?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question about the age of a photo. There is no inherently positive or negative word or phrase like "जुना" (old) that indicates a specific sentiment. The sentence expresses neutral curiosity.

Text: घासलेट चोर आहे का कोणी इकडे
translated_text: Is there anyone here who is a gas thief?
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "घासलेट चोर" (ghaaslet chor), which translates to "gas thief." While potentially accusatory, in isolation and without context, it doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment. It's more of a neutral inquiry or observation.

Text: तिथे केकेआर च्या किट बॅग का आहेत ? मॅच बीसीसीआय ची होती की केकेआर?
translated_text: Why are there KKR kit bags there? Was the match BCCI or KKR?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily asks a question without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrases "तिथे केकेआर च्या किट बॅग का आहेत ?" (Why are there KKR kit bags there?) and "मॅच बीसीसीआय ची होती की केकेआर?" (Was the match BCCI or KKR?) inquire about a situation and seek clarification without conveying any inherent sentiment.

Text: आम्ही नाही आपण बोला. मी सुद्धा मागासवर्गीयच आहे.
translated_text: We are not the ones talking. I am also from a backward class.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and shared identity, with no explicit positive or negative indicators. The Marathi phrases "आम्ही नाही आपण बोला" (We are not the ones talking) and "मी सुद्धा मागासवर्गीयच आहे" (I am also from a backward class) are neutral in tone and lack any sentiment-bearing terms.

Text: पण हा उमर खालिद सारखा का दिसतो आहे मला?
translated_text: But why does this guy look like Umar Khalid to me?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment with surprise because of the phrase "सारखा का दिसतो आहे" (sarkha ka disto aahe) - "why does he look like," indicating a surprising resemblance is being perceived. The overall sentiment is neutral as it is simply an observation and question rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: हिते पण शिंदेंना विचारलेल्या प्रश्नाचं उत्तर फडणवीसांनी दिलं....
translated_text: Fadnavis answered the question asked to Shinde for his own benefit...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports a political event. There is no explicitly positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "हिते पण शिंदेंना विचारलेल्या प्रश्नाचं उत्तर फडणवीसांनी दिलं" (Fadnavis answered the question asked to Shinde for his own benefit) is a factual statement, lacking emotional coloring.

Text: आता अटल थाळी येणार का, शेंडी थाळी येणार
translated_text: Will the Atal Thali come now, or will the Shendi Thali come?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily poses a question ("येणार का") about the availability of specific thalis (Atal Thali, शेंडी थाळी), without conveying any inherent positive or negative emotion or judgment. The words "येणार का" simply inquire about future availability.

Text: कसा आहे गुलाब जांब
translated_text: How is the rose bush?
Justification: The sentence "कसा आहे गुलाब जांब" (How is the rose bush?) is neutral because it is a simple inquiry about the state of something and doesn't contain any words expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "कसा आहे" (how is) is a neutral question.

Text: नुसत्या बुलढाणा जिल्हाचा सर्वे का करत पूर्ण विदर्भाचा करा सत्य परिस्थिती माहिती पडेल........!
translated_text: Why do a survey of just Buldhana district? Do a survey of the entire Vidarbha and you will know the true situation........!
Justification: The phrase "नुसत्या बुलढाणा जिल्हाचा सर्वे का करत" (Why do a survey of just Buldhana district?) expresses surprise at the limited scope of the survey.

Text: तात्या काय म्हणत्यात हे
translated_text: What does Tatya say?
Justification: The sentence "तात्या काय म्हणत्यात हे" is neutral due to the lack of any emotionally charged words or phrases. It's a simple question. The phrase "काय म्हणत्यात" (kay mhantat) is simply asking what someone is saying, devoid of positive or negative connotations.

Text: कोश्यारी काय तुझ्या बायकोला विचारून बोलतोय का?
translated_text: Koshyari, are you talking to your wife?
Justification: The phrase "काय तुझ्या बायकोला विचारून बोलतोय का?" implies disbelief or shock at Koshyari's actions, suggesting the speaker is taken aback, thus contributing to surprise emotion.

Text: साध्या भाज्या देखील वातानुकूलित सुपरमार्केट आणि रस्त्यावर दोन्हीकडे सारख्याच भावात मिळतात
translated_text: Even simple vegetables are available at the same price both in air-conditioned supermarkets and on the street.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual situation about vegetable prices ("साध्या भाज्या देखील वातानुकूलित सुपरमार्केट आणि रस्त्यावर दोन्हीकडे सारख्याच भावात मिळतात"). There are no words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment; it's a neutral observation. The phrase "सारख्याच भावात मिळतात" (available at the same price) further reinforces the neutrality.

Text: असे हवेत ना
translated_text: Isn't that how it should be?
Justification: The phrase "असे हवेत ना" (ase havet na) expresses a general expectation or mild affirmation without strong positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: कोकण ही परशुरामाची भूमी आहे,तिथे बापू लोकांचं काम नाही,तिथे शंभू महादेव आहेत..
translated_text: Konkan is the land of Parashurama, there is no work for Bapu people, there is Shambhu Mahadev.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Konkan's historical and religious significance, and implicitly discourages a certain group ("Bapu people") without expressing explicit positivity or negativity. No specific word or phrase indicates a strong sentiment, therefore remaining neutral.

Text: अहो ते सबसीडीचे होते. आताचे बिना सबसीडीचे आहेत.
translated_text: Hey, they were subsidized. Now they are unsubsidized.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a factual difference ("सबसीडीचे" - subsidized, "बिना सबसीडीचे" - unsubsidized) without expressing any positive or negative opinion.

Text: त्या तरुणाने उगाच त्याला त्रास दिलेल, कधी बोलणार, हा गुन्हा स्वतःचा बचाव केल्यामुळे झालंय.
translated_text: The young man must have bothered him for no reason, he will never speak, this crime was committed in self-defense.
Justification: The sentiment leans negative (0.0) and evokes anger primarily due to the phrase "त्रास दिलेल" (tras dilel), meaning "bothered/harassed," suggesting a negative action taken by the young man, and the assertion that "उगाच" (ugach - for no reason) indicates a lack of justification, amplifying the negative sentiment. The phrase "हा गुन्हा" (ha gunha - this crime) contributes to the anger, framing the situation as something illegal.

Text: भरती लवकर प्रक्रीया लवकर चालु करावी आशी सर्व मुलांकडुन विंनती आहे
translated_text: It is a request from all the children that the recruitment process should be started soon.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request ("विंनती आहे") for the recruitment process to start soon, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: आपण गरीब होत नाहीये,शेजारचा श्रीमंत होतोय !!
translated_text: We are not getting poor, our neighbors are getting rich!!
Justification: The zero sentiment score with anger is driven by the phrase "शेजारचा श्रीमंत होतोय" (shejarcha shrimant hotoy - neighbor is getting rich), which implies a sense of resentment and unfairness, fueling the anger despite the speaker not claiming personal impoverishment.

Text: माझ्या शाळेत कधी हे शिकवल नाही म्हणून विचारतोय
translated_text: I'm asking because they never taught this in my school.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("माझ्या शाळेत कधी हे शिकवल नाही") about the speaker's past education and provides context for their question. There are no overtly positive or negative words indicating any strong feeling.

Text: आता यातील कोण उडून गेला हे शोध घेण्यापेक्षा आहे त्यात समाधान मानले पाहीजे.
translated_text: Now, instead of trying to figure out who got away, we should be content with that.
Justification: The sentence expresses acceptance of the current situation, rather than any strong positive or negative feeling. The phrase "समाधान मानले पाहीजे" (samadhan manle pahije - we should be content) indicates acceptance and therefore a neutral sentiment.

Text: भारत जिंकला काय आणि इंग्लंड जिंकला काय, आता सगळं सारखंच आहे. अभिनंदन!
translated_text: Whether India won or England won, everything is the same now. Congratulations!
Justification: The sentence expresses indifference ("सगळं सारखंच आहे") regarding the outcome, diminishing the positive impact of either team winning. While a congratulatory phrase ("अभिनंदन!") is present, it's undermined by the prior sentiment of equality. This results in a neutral overall sentiment despite the presence of a joyous emotion.

Text: आत्ता हातात मशाल आहे पोलिस स्त्शनलाच बिळातून जाळ धूर कडायचा
translated_text: I have a torch in my hand right now, I just want to light a fire in the police station.
Justification: The phrase "पोलिस स्त्शनलाच बिळातून जाळ धूर कडायचा" (I just want to light a fire in the police station) expresses a desire to commit arson, indicating anger and a negative sentiment.

Text: मी ज्ञानी बाकी सगळे अज्ञानी अशी प्रजाती ट्विटवर अधूनमधून उदयास येत असते.
translated_text: The "I'm the wise, everyone else is the ignorant" genre occasionally emerges on Twitter.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about a type of behavior seen on Twitter, lacking strong positive or negative language. While it points out a possibly arrogant type of user, the phrase "अधूनमधून उदयास येत असते" (adhunmadhun udayas yet aste - occasionally emerges) indicates a neutral observation rather than a strong opinion.

Text: शरद पवारांनी बोलणं टाळलं, पण संजय राऊतांसाठी राहुल आणि प्रियांका गांधी दोघेही मैदानात
translated_text: Sharad Pawar avoided speaking, but both Rahul and Priyanka Gandhi are in the fray for Sanjay Raut
Justification: The sentence conveys factual information about political figures and their actions. There isn't any strongly positive or negative connotation associated with the Marathi phrases used, such as "बोलणं टाळलं" (avoided speaking) or "मैदानात" (in the fray). These terms describe actions without expressing any explicit emotion.

Text: “लटकेंचा राजीनामा स्वीकाराला नाही तर…..ठाकरेंकडे आहेत हे तीन पर्याय”
translated_text: “If not accepting Ladke's resignation…..Thackeray has these three options”
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents factual information regarding a political situation. There is no specific word or phrase indicating a positive or negative sentiment; it simply states possibilities ("तीन पर्याय").

Text: काही लोकांचं प्रेम  हे फुलपाखरा सारखं असत आज ह्या झाडावर तर उद्या दुसऱ्या झाडावर...
translated_text: Some people's love is like a butterfly, today on this tree and tomorrow on another tree...
Justification: The sentence receives a neutral sentiment (0.0) despite the emotion of joy. This is because while the analogy of a butterfly can be seen as light and joyful, the phrase "आज ह्या झाडावर तर उद्या दुसऱ्या झाडावर..." (aaj hya jhadavar tar udya dusrya jhadavar...) implies fickleness and lack of commitment, neutralizing any inherent positive sentiment associated with the butterfly image.

Text: विद्यार्थी जर आपल्या भाषेत बोलेन ना तर समजून जा क्या होगा तो
translated_text: Understand what will happen if the student does not speak in your language.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the conditional and speculative nature of "क्या होगा तो" (kya hoga to), meaning "what will happen then," which lacks any explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: का तुमच्याकडे नाही बोलवत...
translated_text: Why aren't you calling me...
Justification: The phrase "का तुमच्याकडे नाही बोलवत..." (Why aren't you calling me...) expresses a sense of frustration and displeasure, lacking positive sentiment. While seemingly neutral, the underlying context hints at a simmering anger due to the absence of communication, indicated by "नाही बोलवत" (not calling).

Text: एकनाथ शिंदे जिलेबी केंद्र आणि देवेंद्र फडणवीस फाफडा सेंटर सुरू होणार वाटतं आता...
translated_text: It seems that Eknath Shinde Jalebi Center and Devendra Fadnavis Fafda Center will be opened now...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a potential scenario ("सुरू होणार वाटतं") without expressing positive or negative opinions or emotions. The phrase "सुरू होणार वाटतं" (seems to be starting) presents a factual statement.

Text: आपणी वंदेभारत!
translated_text: We are Vandebharat!
Justification: The sentence "आपणी वंदेभारत!" expresses a sense of pride and association with Vandebharat, but on its own does not carry a strongly positive or negative sentiment. "आपणी" (apani, meaning "we/our") sets a tone of belonging, which contributes to the emotion of joy, however does not indicate an overall strong feeling or assessment.

Text: अरे तुझ्या बापाला नाही जमल तू काय आहे
translated_text: Oh, your father didn't get it, what are you?
Justification: The phrase "अरे तुझ्या बापाला नाही जमल तू काय आहे" expresses surprise due to the unexpected nature of questioning someone's ability based on their father's perceived failings. The questioning phrase "तू काय आहे?" (what are you?) after referencing the father's failure ("तुझ्या बापाला नाही जमल") signals surprise at the presumed inheritance of incompetence.

Text: कोन (ण) म्हणायचं आहे का तुम्हाला ?
translated_text: Do you mean angle (s)?
Justification: The sentence uses a neutral question "कोन (ण) म्हणायचं आहे का तुम्हाला ?", which translates to "Do you mean angle(s)?". This is a simple inquiry without any inherent positive or negative connotations. Therefore, there isn't a specific word carrying sentiment. The entire phrase contributes to the neutral tone.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात फक्त आणि त्यासाठी कायम पुढें होती, आहे आणि राहील...
translated_text: Maharashtra has always been, is and will always be ahead only for that...
Justification: The sentence expresses a general statement about Maharashtra's forward-thinking nature. There isn't any specific word or phrase indicating positivity or negativity; the words "पुढें" (ahead) and "कायम" (always) simply describe a consistent state without implying a particular feeling, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्या मनासारखं झालं आहे आता त्यांना गरज नाहीये
translated_text: They have done what they want, they don't need it anymore.
Justification: The phrase "गरज नाहीये" (garaj nahiye), meaning "no need," implies a dismissive attitude and lack of consideration, contributing to the anger emotion and neutral sentiment (indicating a lack of positivity). While "garaj nahiye" itself isn't inherently angry, in the context of the full sentence, it suggests a sense of rejection or being discarded once someone's desires are met, which can fuel anger.

Text: पराभव समोर दिसत होता म्हणून ही पळवाट काढली.
translated_text: This loophole was devised because defeat was in sight.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation without strong positive or negative connotations. The phrase "पराभव समोर दिसत होता" (defeat was in sight) simply states a situation leading to an action (finding a loophole) without expressing joy, sadness, anger, or any other specific emotion. Thus, the overall sentiment and emotion remain neutral.

Text: लवकर बाहेर या,तुमची गरज आहे आज महाराष्ट्राला.
translated_text: Come out soon, Maharashtra needs you today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need and a call to action, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "तुमची गरज आहे" (tumchi garaj aahe - you are needed) indicates a necessity, but without emotional coloring, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: खोटं बोला पण रेटून बोला.
translated_text: Lie, but speak quickly.
Justification: The sentence expresses an amoral directive. While it advises lying, the phrase "रेटून बोला" (retun bola) focuses on the manner of speaking (assertively) rather than expressing explicit positive or negative emotion. It does not express a strong sentiment; thus neutral is appropriate.

Text: शेतकरी हे या देशाचे 'मूळ' असून ते मजबूत ठेवण्याची जबाबदारी आपली आहे.
translated_text: Farmers are the 'roots' of this country and it is our responsibility to keep them strong.
Justification: The sentence uses the word "मूळ" (mool), meaning 'roots', to describe farmers. While the sentiment is positive towards farmers, the word itself is used in a descriptive and foundational context without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: बातम्या नीट द्या.. परवानगी फक्त दोन दिवस आहे.. आधी एक दिवस होती..
translated_text: Give the news properly.. The permission is only for two days.. Earlier it was one day..
