Text: ते देखील माझ्यासाठी पुरेसे आहे. पण ते खरंच देतात का??
translated_text: That is also enough for me. But do they really give it??
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the uncertainty expressed in the phrase "खरंच देतात का??" (kharach detaat kaa??), meaning "do they really give it?". This indicates a lack of positive or negative feeling but rather a question or doubt.

Text: आज पासून ते लोकांना सांगणार:- "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."
translated_text: From today, they will tell the people: "Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena."
Justification: The statement is neutral as it expresses an intention to defeat a political party ("**हरवायचे आहे**"), which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment or a specific emotion beyond political strategy.

Text: ज्ञानात थोडी भर घालने गरजेचे आहे ...
translated_text: It is necessary to add a little knowledge...
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as it simply states the necessity of adding knowledge. The Marathi phrase "गरजेचे आहे" (garajeche aahe), meaning "is necessary," indicates a factual observation rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: बाळासाहेब कोणते, त्यांना आडनाव आहे की नाही
translated_text: Which Balasaheb, does he have a surname or not?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question "आडनाव आहे की नाही" (aadnav aahe ki nahi - does he have a surname or not?), lacking any emotionally charged language.

Text: शेणक्या युपी बिहार मध्ये महाराष्ट्राच्या निम्मे पण लोक करोना ना गेले नाहीत
translated_text: Half of the people in Maharashtra, UP, Bihar, and even in Maharashtra, have not been infected with Corona.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual comparison ("महाराष्ट्राच्या निम्मे पण लोक करोना ना गेले नाहीत") regarding Corona infections in different states, lacking any explicit positive or negative emotional cues. The comparison itself is neutral.

Text: समर्थन करायचं म्हणून कशाचेही का? सरस्वती आणि विद्या यात काय संबंध..
translated_text: Why support anything? What is the relationship between Saraswati and Vidya..
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative and somewhat dismissive tone conveyed by "कशाचेही का?" (kashachehi ka?), meaning "anything?" or "why anything?", suggesting a questioning rather than positive or negative stance.

Text: महाशक्ती विरुद्ध महाविकास आघडीचा सामना होता होता राहिला... पुढचा सामना मुंबई महापालिका निवडणुकीत!
translated_text: The fight between Mahashakti and Mahavikas Aghadi was on... The next fight will be in the Mumbai Municipal Corporation elections!
Justification: The phrase "सामना होता होता राहिला" (samna hota hota rahila - the fight was on) suggests a feeling of dissatisfaction and missed opportunity, which, in the context of political rivalry, contributes to the underlying anger. This signifies that a desired confrontation didn't happen, resulting in frustration and anger.

Text: राष्ट्रीय शैक्षणिक धोरणाअंतर्गत मातृभाषेतील शिक्षणाला प्राधान्य दिलं जात आहे.
translated_text: Under the National Education Policy, priority is being given to education in the mother tongue.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the National Education Policy. The phrase "प्राधान्य दिलं जात आहे" (pradhanya dila jat aahe) - priority is being given - simply describes a policy direction without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: यासाठी तो गायब होता
translated_text: That's why he disappeared.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without any emotionally charged words. The phrase "गायब होता" ( गायब होता - disappeared) simply describes an action and doesn't convey positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेबांनी का धरून ठेवला मग तुमच्या साहेबांना का ते जमलं नाही ?
translated_text: Why did Balasaheb hold on to it, then why didn't your boss manage to do it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a comparative question ("का धरून ठेवला मग तुमच्या साहेबांना का ते जमलं नाही ?") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. It simply inquires about the differing abilities of two leaders.

Text: घरी जाऊन झोपा आता...
translated_text: Go home and sleep now...
Justification: The sentence "घरी जाऊन झोपा आता..." expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a simple instruction with no inherent positive or negative connotations. The phrase "झोपा आता" (sleep now) is a straightforward command, lacking any emotional coloring.

Text: हे तर तुम्ही बनवलं आहे, निवडणूक आयोग ने थोडीच
translated_text: You made this up, the Election Commission did a little.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the matter-of-fact statement regarding who created something, without expressing a clear positive or negative opinion. There isn't a specific word or phrase strongly indicative of sentiment, resulting in a neutral classification.

Text: राणेंची पण चौकशी लावा हे कोणती नोकरी करतात जनतेला समजेल ना
translated_text: Get Rane investigated too, so the public can understand what kind of job he does.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it suggests an investigation into Rane's job, aiming for public understanding. It doesn't inherently express positive or negative emotion; it simply seeks information. The Marathi phrase "कोणती नोकरी करतात जनतेला समजेल ना" (so the public can understand what kind of job he does) indicates this neutral pursuit of information.

Text: का तुमच्या कडेच असलं पाहिजे का
translated_text: Why should you have it?
Justification: The sentence "का तुमच्या कडेच असलं पाहिजे का" expresses a questioning and somewhat challenging tone, but lacks overt positive or negative indicators. The phrasing "का तुमच्या कडेच असलं पाहिजे" (Why should you have it?) simply inquires about the reason, without exhibiting strong emotion. Hence, it is neutral.

Text: आहे का..... समजलं आता लक्षात राहील माझ्या
translated_text: Is that so..... I understand, I will remember now.
Justification: The sentence expresses understanding and a commitment to remember, but lacks any strong positive or negative indicators. The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "समजलं आता लक्षात राहील माझ्या" (samajala aata lakshat raheel majhya), which indicates comprehension and retention without expressing any particular feeling.

Text: एमबीबीएस, बीडीएससह अन्य काही अभ्यासक्रमांच्या पहिल्या फेरीची निवड यादी    ऑक्टोबरला जाहीर होणार
translated_text: The first round selection list for MBBS, BDS and some other courses will be announced in October.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a fact: a selection list will be announced. There's no emotional language present. The phrase "जाहीर होणार" (jahir honar - will be announced) is a neutral statement of an event.

Text: तब्येत बिघडली नसती तर रुग्णालयात भरती नसती का झाली...
translated_text: If my health hadn't deteriorated, why wouldn't I have been hospitalized?
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical situation, not a direct emotional statement. The Marathi phrase "तब्येत बिघडली नसती तर" (if my health hadn't deteriorated) sets up a conditional statement rather than expressing a specific feeling; similarly, the rhetorical question "रुग्णालयात भरती नसती का झाली..." (why wouldn't I have been hospitalized?) presents a logical consequence, maintaining a neutral tone.

Text: तुम्हाला फोटो दिसत नाही काय, मग समजून घ्या कोणते बाळासाहेब आहेत ते??
translated_text: Can't you see the photo? Then understand which Balasaheb is it?
Justification: The sentence uses rhetorical questioning ("तुम्हाला फोटो दिसत नाही काय, मग समजून घ्या...?") which doesn't express a strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase simply aims to convey information or make a point in a neutral manner.

Text: टोमणाबाई हा शब्दप्रयोग पण वापरला जातो ते विसरलात का?
translated_text: Have you forgotten that the expression "Tomanabai" is also used?
Justification: The sentence uses "टोमणाबाई" (Tomanabai), which implies sarcasm or a dismissive attitude, but without explicitly expressing strong positive or negative feelings, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: मशाल विझवणार होते,घड्याळ बंद पाडणार होते,ते एका बंद इंजिन समोर घाबरले
translated_text: They were about to extinguish the torch, stop the clock, but they were frightened by a stopped engine.
Justification: The sentence expresses fear due to the phrase "घाबरले" (ghabarle), which means "frightened" or "scared," indicating a negative emotional response.

Text: कमी पडलं तर सांगा अजून ट्रक पाठवतो
translated_text: If it falls short, let me know and I'll send another truck.
Justification: The sentence expresses a willingness to provide more if needed, indicating a supportive and helpful attitude, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "कमी पडलं तर सांगा" (kami padla tar sanga - if it falls short, let me know) suggests an offer of assistance without inherently expressing a particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: घटस्थापना कधी करावी? मुहुर्त असतो का? घरातील एखाद्या व्यक्तीच्या निधनानंतर किती दिवस देवकार्य करू नये?
translated_text: When should Ghatasthapana be performed? Is there a specific time? For how many days should one not perform any religious activities after the death of a family member?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence, with phrases like "कधी करावी?" (kadhi karavi - when to do?) and "असतो का?" (asto ka? - is there?) indicating inquiry rather than emotional expression. The question about religious activities after death "किती दिवस देवकार्य करू नये?" (kiti divas devkarya karu naye? - for how many days should one not perform religious activities?) is also presented as a matter-of-fact query, devoid of explicit emotion or anger. The 'anger' classification is likely an error or misinterpretation, as the question is about rules regarding a very sensitive topic, not anger.

Text: सावरकर कोणते काँग्रेसला प्रिय आहेत ते का?
translated_text: Which Savarkars are dear to the Congress and why?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question using the phrase "प्रिय आहेत ते का?" which translates to "dear, and why?", expressing inquiry without inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे असं सर्वांचं होतं .....ते नैसर्गिक आहे
translated_text: This happens to everyone...it's natural.
Justification: The sentence expresses a common occurrence and acceptance of it being natural. The phrase "नैसर्गिक आहे" (naisargik aahe - is natural) indicates a neutral sentiment by simply stating a fact without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: बाळासाहेब यांची मालमत्ता ही शिवसैनिक यांचा आधार आहे
translated_text: Balasaheb's property is the base of Shiv Sainiks
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral because it states a factual relationship between Balasaheb's property and Shiv Sainiks; there are no emotionally charged words. While "आधार" (aadhar - base) could be positive in a different context, here it simply describes a relationship, not necessarily implying a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सूत्र  आज बाळा नांदगावकर बोले आम्ही अजून कोणालाही पाठींबा दिला नाय आहे
translated_text: Sources today said Bala Nandgaonkar has not supported anyone yet.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact about Bala Nandgaonkar's actions, indicated by the phrase "अजून कोणालाही पाठींबा दिला नाय आहे" (ajun konalahi pathimba dila nay ahe - has not supported anyone yet), making it neutral.

Text: पीठमाग्या रातच्याला आठवले आल्ता का घरी
translated_text: Did you remember the night after Peethamya at home?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking if someone remembered something. There are no words or phrases expressing any particular emotion or sentiment. The sentence, "पीठमाग्या रातच्याला आठवले आल्ता का घरी" is simply conveying a query with neutral wording.

Text: मोदीजीनी हात जोडले नमस्कार केला अस सांगून करणारे पण भेटतील
translated_text: Those who say that Modiji folded his hands and said Namaskar will also meet him.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about potential encounters, lacking explicit positive or negative markers. The Marathi phrase "सांगून करणारे पण भेटतील" (saangoon karnare pan bhetatil - will also meet those who say) indicates a statement of possibility rather than an expression of feeling.

Text: शिंधेफडणवीस इतर जे इतकी वर्ष सत्तेत होते त्याच्याकडे संपत्ती कुठून आली?
translated_text: Where did Shinde and Fadnavis, who were in power for so many years, get their wealth from?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question ("कुठून आली?") inquiring about the source of wealth, without expressing positive or negative opinion.

Text: हारवर्ड शिक्षित आहे त्यामुळे हार्ड आहे
translated_text: Harvard educated so it's hard
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a perceived consequence ("hard आहे") of being Harvard educated ("हारवर्ड शिक्षित आहे"). There's no explicitly positive or negative sentiment expressed; "हार्ड आहे" is presented as a factual observation, not an emotional judgment.

Text: आत काही नेसली का नाही
translated_text: Why didn't you bring anything inside?
Justification: The phrase "आत काही नेसली का नाही" expresses surprise as it questions the unexpected absence of something expected, implying a disbelief or astonishment.

Text: म्हंजे दिवाळीत घरातच फटाके वाजवायचे का
translated_text: So, should we burst crackers at home during Diwali?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question ("वाजवायचे का" - "should we burst?") seeking information rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment. The phrasing is exploratory, not declarative.

Text: फेस्टिव्ह सिझनचे फोटोज येतील जबरदस्त, पाहा बेस्ट कॅमेरा स्मार्टफोन्सची ही लिस्ट
translated_text: Festive season photos will be amazing, see this list of best camera smartphones
Justification: The word "जबरदस्त" (zabardast), meaning amazing, suggests a positive feeling, but in this context, it functions more as an advertisement claim than a genuine expression of joy. The overall sentiment is neutral.

Text: हा व्हिडिओ वापरणाऱ्या मित्रासाठी,नक्की बघा
translated_text: For the friend who uses this video, be sure to watch it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral suggestion. The phrase "नक्की बघा" (nakki bagha - be sure to watch it) is a polite encouragement, not inherently positive or negative, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: भाजप भविष्यात सगळीकडे निवडणूक हारणार हे नक्की.
translated_text: BJP will definitely lose elections everywhere in the future.
Justification: The phrase "निवडणूक हारणार" (niwadnuk haranar), meaning "will lose elections," indicates a negative outcome for BJP, contributing to a negative sentiment and aligning with sadness.

Text: निवडणूक आयोगाच्या निर्णयाला सुप्रीम कोर्टात आव्हान देता येते का ?
translated_text: Can the Election Commission's decision be challenged in the Supreme Court?
Justification: The sentence is a factual question about the possibility of challenging the Election Commission's decision in the Supreme Court. The lack of opinion or emotional language, and the interrogative nature of "देता येते का ?" (deta yete ka? - can it be given?), contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: हुकुमशाही, एकाधिकारशाही होऊ नये, म्हणून उद्धव ठाकरें सोबत राहिले पाहिजे.
translated_text: We should stay with Uddhav Thackeray to prevent dictatorship and totalitarianism.
Justification: The sentence expresses a political opinion advocating for staying with Uddhav Thackeray to prevent negative political systems. While advocating for something, it does not express strong positive or negative emotion directly. The phrase "हुकुमशाही, एकाधिकारशाही होऊ नये" (dictatorship and totalitarianism should not happen) signals a concern, but the sentence primarily focuses on a suggested course of action, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: प्रबोधनकार ठाकरेंचा नातू म्हणून बघत असतील आता, पाहिले बाळासाहेबांचा पुत्र होता...
translated_text: Prabodhankar may be seen as Thackeray's grandson now, but he was Balasaheb's son...
Justification: The sentence presents a statement of fact, contrasting the subject's current perceived identity with their past lineage. There's no explicit expression of positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral. The statement is primarily descriptive using phrases like "प्रबोधनकार ठाकरेंचा नातू" (Prabodhankar Thackeray's grandson) and "बाळासाहेबांचा पुत्र" (Balasaheb's son), which are factual references rather than emotionally charged terms.

Text: आणि तू उद्धव च खाजवय होती का मध्ये
translated_text: And did you want to eat Uddhav's food?
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "खाजवय होती का" which translates to "did you want to eat." While potentially suggestive in context, the phrase itself lacks inherent positive or negative sentiment, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: विजेचा मेन स्विच बंद केल्याशिवाय विजेचे कोणतेही उपकरण किंवा वायरिंग दुरुस्त करू नका.
translated_text: Do not repair any electrical equipment or wiring without turning off the main power switch.
Justification: The sentence is a safety instruction, and the Marathi phrase "विजेचा मेन स्विच बंद केल्याशिवाय विजेचे कोणतेही उपकरण किंवा वायरिंग दुरुस्त करू नका" which translates to "Do not repair any electrical equipment or wiring without turning off the main power switch," conveys a neutral sentiment as it is a standard precautionary measure.

Text: कोण आहेत गाधर रे
translated_text: Who are Gadhar Ray?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a simple question asking for identification. The phrase "कोण आहेत" (kon aahet) meaning "who are" is purely informational and doesn't convey any sentiment.

Text: खरे हे खरं आहे इतर खोटे आहेत
translated_text: True, this is true, the others are false.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about truth and falsehood, lacking subjective or emotional language. The Marathi words "खरे" (true) and "खोटे" (false) are used objectively without expressing personal feelings or opinions, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: अर्ज बाद होणार होता म्हणुन माघार
translated_text: The application was about to be rejected, so I withdrew it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual situation without expressing strong feelings. The phrase "अर्ज बाद होणार होता म्हणुन माघार" (the application was about to be rejected, so I withdrew it) simply states a cause and effect, lacking any emotional coloring.

Text: वायनाड बचाओ यात्रा हे
translated_text: Wayanad Bachao Yatra
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply states "Wayanad Bachao Yatra" without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "Wayanad Bachao Yatra" itself is a statement of fact and doesn't carry inherent sentiment.

Text: मटण महाग कोणामुळे झाले हे सांगण्या माहित आहे.
translated_text: I know who made mutton expensive.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of knowledge ("माहित आहे") without conveying any positive or negative sentiment or emotional charge. There is no explicit indication of happiness, sadness, anger, or any other emotion. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: कॉपी करून ला टाकु का आमच्या इथे हीच परिस्थिती आहे
translated_text: Should I copy and paste this? This is the same situation we have here.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual statement about a similar situation ("हीच परिस्थिती आहे") and a question about copying ("कॉपी करून ला टाकु का"), lacking strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: तुम्हाला जे परवडेल ते खा.. मुळातच कोणी काय खावं हा त्याचा प्रश्न आहे.
translated_text: Eat what you can afford.. Basically, it's a question of what one should eat.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily focuses on affordability ("परवडेल ते खा") and personal choice ("कोणी काय खावं हा त्याचा प्रश्न आहे") regarding food, lacking any explicitly positive or negative words or phrases.

Text: राष्टृहित सर्वोपरी वाल्या हे काय होते?
translated_text: What was the supreme power of the nation?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a question ("काय होते?") inquiring about the concept of national interest ("राष्टृहित"). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with simply asking about it.

Text: असे काम महाराष्ट्रातील पोलिस कधी करणार नाहीत.
translated_text: The police in Maharashtra would never do such a thing.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "कधी करणार नाहीत" (kadhi karnar nahit) implying "never do" expresses a lack of expectation or likelihood of an event, rather than a positive or negative feeling. It states a factual (implied) assessment of behavior without conveying emotion.

Text: बघुया काय होते कारण तेच आपल्या हातात आहे
translated_text: Let's see what happens because it's in our hands.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "बघुया काय होते कारण तेच आपल्या हातात आहे" (Let's see what happens because it's in our hands) conveys a sense of acceptance and observation without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: भक्ती आणि प्रेम दुसरं काय
translated_text: What is devotion and love?
Justification: The sentence "भक्ती आणि प्रेम दुसरं काय" expresses a rhetorical question, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "दुसरं काय" (dusra kay - what else) suggests an inquiry rather than an expression of emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: नाय व आता चालू हाय ती म्हटलं??
translated_text: Nay and now on Hi she said??
Justification: The emotion "surprise" is primarily driven by the phrase "नाय व आता चालू हाय ती म्हटलं??" which indicates disbelief or questioning of something currently happening. The word "नाय" (Nay - no/isn't it?) contributes to the feeling of surprise and questioning the statement.

Text: जनतेत काही टक्केच अंध भक्त आहे त्यांनाच असं वाटणार. बाकी लोक सुशिक्षित आहे.
translated_text: Only a small percentage of the population is blindly devoted to religion. The rest of the people are well-educated.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about differing viewpoints within the population, with "सुशिक्षित आहे" (sushikshit aahe - are well-educated) contributing to the neutral sentiment by presenting an objective assessment of the majority. The initial part stating "काही टक्केच अंध भक्त आहे" (kahi takkech andh bhakt aahe - only a small percentage is blindly devoted) also contributes to the neutral sentiment by simply stating a fact about a minority group's perspective.

Text: हिम्मत रखो... पात्रा चाळ वाल्यांनी पण अजून पर्यंत हिम्मत ठेवलीच ना..
translated_text: Have courage... Patra Chawl people have not yet had the courage..
Justification: The neutral sentiment and fear emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "हिम्मत रखो" (himmat rakho - have courage) combined with the implication that the "Patra Chawl" residents *need* courage because they are facing a difficult or fearful situation. The continued use of "हिम्मत" (himmat - courage) suggests resilience in the face of adversity, but also highlights the presence of fear prompting the need for courage in the first place.

Text: ते पण बहुदा जेवत असतील ।
translated_text: They will probably be eating too.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty about whether they are eating. The word "बहुदा" (bahuda), meaning "probably," contributes to the neutral sentiment by indicating a lack of strong feeling or certainty.

Text: संत कोणालाही म्हणू नये मला असे वाटते,,, संत शब्द हा भ्रमचारी लोकांसाठी असतो...
translated_text: I think no one should be called a saint, the word saint is for misguided people...
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes disgust due to the phrase "भ्रमचारी लोकांसाठी असतो" (bhramachari lokansathi asto), which implies that the word "saint" is associated with misguided or deceptive people, reflecting a negative and disgusted view.

Text: महागाईवर बोला आणि महागाई कमी करा मोदी सरकार
translated_text: Talk about inflation and reduce inflation, Modi government
Justification: The sentence is a direct demand/statement regarding inflation, lacking subjective language or emotional indicators. It uses phrases like "महागाईवर बोला" (talk about inflation) and "महागाई कमी करा" (reduce inflation) which are neutral in tone. The use of "मोदी सरकार" (Modi government) simply identifies the subject of the demand and doesn't introduce any sentiment.

Text: वांगी बाई च्या गिऱ्हाईकांनि फिरकायलाच पाहिजे का ?
translated_text: Should Wangi Bai's customers be turned away?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("फिरकायलाच पाहिजे का?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जळगाव जिल्हा दूध संघात प्रशासक मंडळ आणि संचालक मंडळ आमनेसामने
translated_text: Board of Administrators and Board of Directors face to face in Jalgaon District Milk Union
Justification: The sentence describes a factual situation ("आमनेसामने" - face to face) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: लोकमानस : हा अमेरिकेचा आर्थिक साम्राज्यवाद!
translated_text: Lokmanas: This is America's economic imperialism!
Justification: The phrase "आर्थिक साम्राज्यवाद" (arthik samrajyavad), meaning "economic imperialism," carries a negative connotation, expressing anger and disapproval due to its association with exploitation and dominance.

Text: मी या आधी अनेकदा तक्रार केली आहे
translated_text: I have complained about this many times before.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the factual statement "मी या आधी अनेकदा तक्रार केली आहे" (I have complained about this many times before). While the emotion "anger" is present due to the implicit frustration, the sentence itself expresses a statement of repeated action ("अनेकदा तक्रार केली आहे") rather than overtly negative sentiment.

Text: ज्यांना संविधान मान्य नाही ते सुद्धा बोनस घेऊन दिवाळी साजरी करणार...
translated_text: Even those who don't accept the Constitution will celebrate Diwali with a bonus...
Justification: The sentence presents a factual observation without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "ज्यांना संविधान मान्य नाही ते सुद्धा बोनस घेऊन दिवाळी साजरी करणार..." (Even those who don't accept the Constitution will celebrate Diwali with a bonus...) states a situation without judgment, making it neutral.

Text: माणूस आतून तुटला की, त्याच बोलणं कमी होत
translated_text: When a person is broken inside, he/she talks less.
Justification: The sentence expresses a state of being "तुटला" (tutla - broken) internally, which suggests sadness but is presented in a matter-of-fact way, resulting in a neutral sentiment. There's no explicit emotional expression beyond the factual statement of reduced communication.

Text: शेवटी ओढ मुळाकडेच असते….राज ठाकरेसुध्दा शिवसैनिक (शिवसेना उध्दव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे) आहेत हे सिध्द होते…
translated_text: In the end, the attraction lies with the roots… It is proven that Raj Thackeray is also a Shiv Sainik (Shiv Sena Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray)…
Justification: The sentence presents a statement of fact and observation about political affiliation. The phrase "शेवटी ओढ मुळाकडेच असते" (In the end, the attraction lies with the roots) expresses a general sentiment about origins, and "राज ठाकरेसुध्दा शिवसैनिक...हे सिध्द होते" (It is proven that Raj Thackeray is also a Shiv Sainik) is a declaration, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: : नवरात्रीत उपवासाला भगर खरेदी करताय? अशी घ्या काळजी
translated_text: : Buying bhagar to fast during Navratri? Be careful.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it provides a suggestion ("अशी घ्या काळजी" - be careful) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बॉस/ मोठ्या मनाचा असावा, मोठ्या आवाजाचा नाही.
translated_text: A boss should be big-hearted, not loud-voiced.
Justification: The sentence expresses a preference for a boss to be "मोठ्या मनाचा" (big-hearted) rather than "मोठ्या आवाजाचा" (loud-voiced). While implicitly critical of loud-voiced bosses, the overall tone is a neutral statement of desired qualities, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: वरचा श्लोक आदरणीय सोमय्या यांनी एकदा म्हणून दाखवावा...
translated_text: Respected Somaiya should show the above verse once...
Justification: The sentence uses "आदरणीय" (aadarniya), meaning "respected," which indicates a formal and polite tone, but does not express any strong positive or negative sentiment, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: एक सुतळी बाम चा नैवेद्य लावजो .. त्याच्या खाली...
translated_text: Place a twine offering of balsam... under it...
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple instruction without any inherently positive or negative words or phrases. The phrase "एक सुतळी बाम चा नैवेद्य लावजो" (ek sutali baam cha naivedya lavjo) - place a twine offering of balsam - is a factual instruction and doesn't express any sentiment.

Text: येऊ का मावशे खायला ?
translated_text: Shall we come and eat, Aunt?
Justification: The sentence "येऊ का मावशे खायला ?" is neutral because it's a simple question asking for permission to eat ("येऊ का...खायला?") and uses a respectful term ("मावशे" - Aunt). There are no emotionally charged words or phrases present.

Text: कोण स्वामी आणि कोण नारायण हे सगळ्याणा माहित आहे..
translated_text: Everyone knows who is Swami and who is Narayan.
Justification: The sentence "कोण स्वामी आणि कोण नारायण हे सगळ्याणा माहित आहे" expresses a factual statement about common knowledge. The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "सगळ्याणा माहित आहे" (saglyanna mahit aahe), meaning "everyone knows," which indicates a generally accepted fact and lacks any emotional charge.

Text: अरे मी भारतीय संस्कृतीचा बोलतोय संस्कृती कमी विकृती जास्त आहे ती.
translated_text: Oh, I'm talking about Indian culture, it's less culture and more distortion.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it presents a balanced view. The phrase "संस्कृती कमी विकृती जास्त" (sanskriti kami vikruti jasta) implies a critical observation that the situation is less about culture and more about distortion, thereby negating any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ते नावाचं काही असत का?
translated_text: Did they have a name?
Justification: The sentence "ते नावाचं काही असत का?" is neutral because it's a simple question inquiring about the existence of a name. There's no inherently positive or negative connotation. The key phrase "नावाचं काही असत का?" (Did they have a name?) is purely informational.

translated_text: .... This is uncle.....
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "हे काका आहेत" simply states a fact ("This is uncle") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पुर्वी ते कोणत्या पक्षाचे होते?
translated_text: Which party did he belong to before?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual question about past affiliation. The phrase "कोणत्या पक्षाचे होते?" (konatya pakshache hote?) - "which party did he belong to?" - is simply seeking information without expressing any opinion or feeling.

Text: काय करायचे आता ते सुद्धा नाव केंद्रीय निवडणूक आयोगाने दिले आहे
translated_text: The Central Election Commission has also given a name for what to do now.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states a fact. The phrase "केंद्रीय निवडणूक आयोगाने दिले आहे" (kendriya nivadnuk ayogane dile aahe - Central Election Commission has given) simply reports an action without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पंडीत नेहरु आरएसएसच्या शाखेत जात होते का?
translated_text: Did Pandit Nehru attend an RSS branch?
Justification: The sentence is a factual question ("पंडीत नेहरु आरएसएसच्या शाखेत जात होते का?"), with no emotionally charged words. The presence of "का?" (ka - question mark) indicating a query contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: सर निवडणूक बिनविरोध होणार...
translated_text: Sir, the election will be unopposed...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the election being unopposed. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "बिनविरोध होणार" (binvirodh honar - will be unopposed) simply describes the manner of the election outcome, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आज लवकरच घेतली होती ?
translated_text: Was it taken early today?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question ("आज लवकरच घेतली होती ?") lacking any emotional indicators. The question itself doesn't contain sentiment-bearing words.

Text: हे म्हणत नाही ,सर्व एकूण मिळून किती फुलांच्या प्रजाती आहेत गार्डन मध्ये वेगवेगळ्या..!
translated_text: It doesn't say, how many different flower species are there in the garden in total..!
Justification: The "किती वेगवेगळ्या" (kiti vegveglya - how many different) phrase implies a lack of information and suggests a wondering or surprised tone, leading to surprise despite a neutral sentiment, because the speaker seems interested but confused about the number.

Text: वर्षातील. एकदे केलेले काम सांगा साहेब..
translated_text: Sir, tell me the work you have done in the year.
Justification: The sentence "वर्षातील. एकदे केलेले काम सांगा साहेब.." is neutral because it's a simple request for information ("काम सांगा साहेब" - tell me the work, sir). There's no explicit positive or negative wording.

Text: पूरण पोळी, ज्वारीची भाकरी आणि सोबत ठेचा पण मिळेल हुंड्यात, घेता का?
translated_text: You will also get Puran poli, sorghum bread and a piece of bread as dowry, will you take it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's phrased as a question regarding dowry, which, while potentially controversial, is presented neutrally. The specific phrase "घेता का?" (Gheta ka? - will you take it?) frames the entire sentence as an inquiry rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: घराणेशाही चालणार पण बाळासाहेबांच्या विचाराचे तुझे पप्पा नाहीत आणि तू तर मुळीच नाही
translated_text: Dynasty rule may work, but your father doesn't share Balasaheb's views, and neither do you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement and comparison without explicitly conveying positive or negative feelings. The phrase "घराणेशाही चालणार पण बाळासाहेबांच्या विचाराचे तुझे पप्पा नाहीत आणि तू तर मुळीच नाही" highlights a difference in ideology, presented neutrally.

Text: तेच बाळासाहेब सोनियापुढे कोण झुकत हे पण सांगायचे .
translated_text: That same Balasaheb would also say who bows before Sonia.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about Balasaheb's past statements. There are no words or phrases expressing a positive or negative opinion or emotion. The statement "तेच बाळासाहेब सोनियापुढे कोण झुकत हे पण सांगायचे" is a historical statement and lacks any emotional coloring.

Text: मागं कव्हेकरांच्या कॉलेजच्या कार्यक्रमात आले होते एकदा...
translated_text: I once attended a college program at Kavekar's...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a past event ("आले होते एकदा" - "attended once") without expressing any positive or negative feeling. There's no specific word or phrase indicating sentiment or emotion beyond a statement of fact.

Text: ची नोटीस आली होती काय करणार.
translated_text: What should I do if I receive a notice?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "काय करणार" (kay karnar - what to do?) indicates a question about a future action in a hypothetical situation, lacking any strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: चंदु भाऊ महाज्योतीने केव्हा पासून मराठा समाजासाठी काम करायला सुरुवात केली?
translated_text: When did Chandu Bhau Mahajyoti start working for the Maratha community?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question ("कधी पासून सुरुवात केली?") seeking information about when a specific entity started working for a particular community. There is no sentiment-laden language present.

Text: अतिवृष्टी झाल्याने सर्व विद्यार्थ्यांना मोफत पास देण्याची पालक वर्गाची शासनाकडे मागणी
translated_text: Parents demand government to provide free passes to all students due to heavy rains
Justification: The sentence primarily reports a demand ("मागणी") due to a situation ("अतिवृष्टी झाल्याने"), and lacks overtly positive or negative emotional language, resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "पालक वर्गाची शासनाकडे मागणी" is a factual statement of demand to the government.

Text: छायाचित्रात राज्यमुद्रा का नाही ? नेहमी परिपत्रकांवर, छायाचित्रात, चित्रफितीत राज्यमुद्रा वापराच
translated_text: Why is there no state seal in the photograph? Always use the state seal on circulars, photographs, and film.
Justification: The sentence expresses a query and a directive, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the interrogative nature of "का नाही ?" (ka nahi? - why not?) and the instruction "वापराच" (vaparach - use only/must use), both conveying a factual inquiry and a standard procedure rather than any emotional leaning.

Text: घरात बसून कंटाळा आला असेल
translated_text: You must be bored sitting at home.
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential feeling of boredom but does not explicitly state a positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "कंटाळा आला असेल" (kantaLaa aalaa asel) suggests boredom, but the "असेल" (asel) indicates a possibility or assumption rather than a definite statement of feeling.

Text: इथे स्लॅब काँक्रिट पडेल असे भेटून राहिले आयुष्यात
translated_text: I met you in life, like a slab of concrete would fall here.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "इथे स्लॅब काँक्रिट पडेल असे भेटून राहिले" (ithe slab concrete padel ase bhetun rahile), while unusual, doesn't inherently express positive or negative emotion. It describes a meeting that is compared to concrete slab falling which doesn't convey a particular sentiment.

Text: सगळ्या गावातले लोक वांग्याची शेती कशी करायची हे शिकतील आणि करोडोपती होतील.
translated_text: People in every village will learn how to farm brinjal and become millionaires.
Justification: The sentence describes a scenario of learning and potential financial success; however, it lacks explicit positive or negative emotional cues. The neutral sentiment arises because the Marathi sentence focuses on a factual possibility ("शिकतील आणि करोडोपती होतील" - will learn and become millionaires) without expressing joy, hope, or any other specific emotion.

Text: लवकरच वाटेला येणार आहे हे चित्र
translated_text: This picture is coming soon.
Justification: The sentence "लवकरच वाटेला येणार आहे हे चित्र" is neutral because it simply states a fact ("लवकरच वाटेला येणार आहे" - coming soon) without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase doesn't convey any particular emotion.

Text: हा..कळलं
translated_text: Hey..I understand.
Justification: The sentence "हा..कळलं" expresses a neutral sentiment because "कळलं" (kalala) simply indicates understanding and doesn't inherently convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: "बाळासाहेब ठाकरे" असा पुर्ण उल्लेख ज्या नावात आहे तिच शिवसेना
translated_text: The Shiv Sena whose name fully mentions "Balasaheb Thackeray" is the same.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it factually states that the Shiv Sena is the one that mentions "Balasaheb Thackeray" fully. There is no emotional or opinionated language; it's a statement of fact. The phrase "बाळासाहेब ठाकरे" is simply a name, contributing to the neutrality.

Text: कष्ट करून जगणं, ही सुद्धा एक कलाच आहे. आज पहाटे विठ्ठलवाडी वृत्तपत्र सेंटर
translated_text: Living by working hard is also an art. This morning, Vitthalwadi Newspaper Center
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about hard work and life, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "कष्ट करून जगणं" (kasht karun jagna - living by working hard) is neutral in its connotation, simply describing a way of life.

Text: सभेत घुसलेला कुत्रा दिसतोय हा
translated_text: It looks like a dog has entered the meeting.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The Marathi phrase "सभेत घुसलेला कुत्रा दिसतोय" (sabhet ghuslela kutra distoy), meaning "It looks like a dog has entered the meeting," is a factual observation without any positive or negative connotations.

Text: उध्वस्त ने फसवलं होत युती करून तसे
translated_text: The destruction was done by the alliance, so
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while it mentions "उध्वस्त" (udhvast - destruction), it simply states a fact about an alliance causing destruction without expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: हा बघा ‘हा’! याचा सगळा स्टंट पोलिसांनी बाहेर काढला, जशास तसं उत्तर!
translated_text: Look at this! The police pulled out all the stunts, the answer is as it is!
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "जशास तसं उत्तर!", indicating a tit-for-tat response, which is descriptive rather than expressing positive or negative feelings. The exclamation mark following "हा!" indicates surprise.

Text: अस कस रामाकडून शिखंडीने ते धनुष्य बळकावल होत म्हणुन गोठवाव लागले
translated_text: How could Shikhandi snatch that bow from Rama and freeze it?
Justification: The sentence describes a past event ("अस कस रामाकडून शिखंडीने ते धनुष्य बळकावल होत म्हणुन गोठवाव लागले"), and uses neutral language without expressing any particular emotion or opinion. The Marathi phrase "अस कस" introduces a question of how something happened, indicating curiosity or information seeking rather than a sentiment-bearing statement.

Text: मशाल वगैरे काही नसतंय ते सोनिया आईस्क्रीम असतंय ते
translated_text: There's no torch or anything, it's Sonia's ice cream.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the identity of something ("सोनिया आईस्क्रीम असतंय ते" - it's Sonia's ice cream) rather than conveying any strong emotion or opinion, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: उधो किती नालायक आहे. जो बापाला टि बाळू म्हणाला, त्याला हॅप्पी बड्डे करायला निघालाय
translated_text: How worthless is Udho. Whoever called his father a "baby", I'm going to wish him a happy birthday.
Justification: The phrase "नालायक आहे" (nalayak aahe), meaning "worthless is," indicates a negative sentiment and directly contributes to the feeling of disgust.

Text: सदर माहिती महाराष्ट्राच्या मातृभाषेत म्हणजेच मराठी भाषेतही प्रसिद्ध करावी...
translated_text: This information should also be published in the mother tongue of Maharashtra, i.e. Marathi...
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion for information to be published in Marathi ("मराठी भाषेतही प्रसिद्ध करावी"), which is a neutral statement without inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: या असल्या गुंडगिरी चा णिषेध
translated_text: This kind of bullying is prohibited.
Justification: "गुंडगिरी" (gundagiri), meaning bullying, evokes disgust and negativity, resulting in a neutral sentiment, as the sentence is simply stating a prohibition.

Text: अध्यक्ष महोदय एक संधी देण्यात यावी सावरण्यासाठी ही आपणास विनंती करतो ..
translated_text: Mr. President, I request you to give me a chance to recover.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a polite request ("विनंती करतो" - vinanti karto) without overtly positive or negative sentiment. The phrases "अध्यक्ष महोदय" (Adhyaksh Mahoday - Mr. President) and "संधी देण्यात यावी" (sandhi denyat yavi - to give a chance) are formal and respectful, contributing to the neutral tone.

Text: मिळालेल्या मैदानात आता हसरा मेळावा होणार की शोकसभा..
translated_text: Will there be a gathering of laughter or a mourning gathering in the field that has been given to us?
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty about whether the gathering will be joyful or sorrowful. The phrase "शोकसभा" (shoksabha - mourning gathering) contributes to the sadness and neutralizes any potential positive sentiment from "हसरा मेळावा" (hasra melava - gathering of laughter) due to the uncertainty.

Text: अजून एक    वाले भक्त आला रे
translated_text: Another Wale devotee came
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact without any emotionally charged words. The phrase "अजून एक वाले भक्त आला रे" (ajun ek wale bhakta ala re) is a neutral observation and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पोळा चे अकाउंट हॅक झाले होते ते पूर्ववत झाले का?
translated_text: Pola's account was hacked, was it restored?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the inquiry about the status of an account ("अकाउंट") being hacked and restored ("पूर्ववत झाले का?"). It's a question seeking information, lacking strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: आता तुम्हाला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.
translated_text: Now you want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply states an intention to defeat a political party ("आता तुम्हाला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे"), without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "हरवायचे आहे" (haravayache aahe - to defeat) itself is not inherently negative in this context, as it just describes a political objective.

Text: हे शहाणपण सरनाईक साहेबांना खूपच लवकर आले
translated_text: This wisdom came to Sarnaik Saheb very early.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement about Sarnaik Saheb gaining wisdom early. There's no explicit positive or negative connotation. The phrase "खूपच लवकर आले" (khupach lavkar aale - came very early) simply indicates timing and doesn't inherently express any sentiment.

Text: हीच म्हण तुला सुद्धा लागू होते..!
translated_text: The same saying applies to you too..!
Justification: The phrase "लागू होते" (lagu hote - applies) in this context, while seemingly neutral, carries a subtly aggressive tone, especially when used in the given sentence, implying a negative characteristic or situation is applicable to the recipient. This generates anger.

Text: हा पाऊस काय अंधेरी पूर्व निवडणूकीचा निकाल ऐकूणच जाणार आहे का??
translated_text: Is this rain going to stop us from hearing the results of the Andheri by-election?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about whether the rain will prevent hearing election results. The neutral sentiment is driven by the questioning nature of the sentence ("जाणार आहे का??") rather than any explicit positive or negative emotion. There isn't any emotionally charged word in the statement.

Text: कलाकार मुलाखती घ्यायला लागले तर पत्रकारांनी काय करायचं? कलाकारांनी आता पत्रकार व्हावं,आणि पत्रकारांनी कलाकार का?
translated_text: If artists start giving interviews, what should journalists do? Should artists now become journalists, and journalists become artists?
Justification: The sentence expresses a rhetorical question and a sense of questioning the changing roles of artists and journalists. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "काय करायचं?" (kay karaych?) which translates to "what to do?" indicates a neutral sentiment and a questioning tone rather than expressing a specific emotion.

Text: आणि हा दोन वर्षा पूर्वी तोंड वर करून गेला असता... ओम शांती..
translated_text: And this person would have gone away with his face raised two years ago... Om Shanti..
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "तोंड वर करून गेला असता... ओम शांती...", which implies a dismissive and disrespectful attitude towards death, especially given the context of "ओम शांती" (Om Shanti), a common phrase used for peace to the departed soul. The phrase suggests that the person would have died with arrogance ("तोंड वर करून"), which evokes disgust.

Text: तुम्ही हिंदू आहात का??
translated_text: Are you Hindu??
Justification: The phrase "आहात का??" (aahat ka??), which translates to "are you?", with the double question mark suggesting surprise, contributes to the neutral sentiment and the emotion of surprise. The question itself, while not inherently negative or positive, combined with the emphasis, doesn't lean into a distinct positive or negative sentiment.

Text: उंची कशी असावी हे एक उदाहरण आहे
translated_text: This is an example of what the height should be.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual statement ("उदाहरण आहे" - is an example") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: आम्हा शिवसेना समर्थकांना आता हि निवडणूक हवीच आहे
translated_text: We Shiv Sena supporters need this election now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire for the election ("निवडणूक हवीच आहे"), but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. "आम्हा शिवसेना समर्थकांना" (We Shiv Sena supporters) simply identifies the group's affiliation and doesn't contribute to a specific sentiment.

Text: जनता म्हणजे फक्त तुम्हीच का,साहेब?
translated_text: Is the public just you, sir?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the interrogative nature of the sentence. While potentially sarcastic, the phrase "जनता म्हणजे फक्त तुम्हीच का,साहेब?" (Janata mhanje fakt tumhich ka, saheb?) - "Is the public just you, sir?" - is framed as a question, lacking explicit positive or negative emotional markers. The word "का" (ka), indicating a question, contributes to the neutral tone.

Text: पुरुषांमध्ये फक्त कावळे दिसतात. राजहंस का दिसत नाहीत.... विठ्ठला अजब तुझे भक्त....
translated_text: Only crows are seen among men. Why are swans not seen.... Vitthal, your devotees are strange....
Justification: The sentence expresses a philosophical observation about the perceived imbalance among people ("पुरुषांमध्ये फक्त कावळे दिसतात. राजहंस का दिसत नाहीत...") and ends with a devotional address ("विठ्ठला अजब तुझे भक्त...."). While potentially hinting at dissatisfaction, it lacks a clearly positive or negative indicator, rendering it neutral. The phrase "अजब तुझे भक्त" (strange are your devotees) doesn't convey strong positive or negative sentiment on its own in this context.

Text: ही तर   नं खाऊ बाई आहे
translated_text: This is a woman who doesn't eat.
Justification: The sentence "ही तर नं खाऊ बाई आहे" contains the phrase "नं खाऊ" (na khaau), which translates to "doesn't eat." This describes a characteristic without expressing positive or negative feelings, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: काय आज मॅच आहे का श्याम?
translated_text: Is there a match today, Shyam?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question "काय आज मॅच आहे का श्याम?" ("Is there a match today, Shyam?"). It expresses a neutral inquiry, and no specific word or phrase indicates any particular sentiment or emotion. The entire sentence is simply asking a question.

Text: सगळीकड तेच.....आता रस्त्यावर गाडीला गाडीला थोडी जरी लागली तर महाभारत घडायला वेळ नहीं लागत
translated_text: It's the same everywhere... Now, if a car on the road takes a little while, it won't take long for the Mahabharata to happen.
Justification: The sentence describes a common occurrence and uses hyperbole ("Mahabharat घडायला वेळ नहीं लागत") to emphasize the ease with which minor incidents escalate, but without expressing strong positive or negative emotion. The phrase "Mahabharat घडायला वेळ नहीं लागत" is an exaggeration, but doesn't inherently carry strong sentiment, leading to a neutral assessment.

Text: आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" (Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities). The phrase "पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" (has been forwarded) indicates a process without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हो…आणि हा भिकारी मागे एका ला    पैसे वाला म्हणत होता
translated_text: Yes…and this beggar was calling someone a moneylender in the back.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it reports an observation without expressing a strong positive or negative feeling. The words "भिकारी" (beggar) and "पैसे वाला" (moneylender) are descriptive but don't inherently convey a specific sentiment or emotion in this context.

Text: सरकारने हे नुकसान भरून द्यावा ,महाराष्ट्र कम॔चारी अभ्यास करा
translated_text: The government should compensate for this loss, Maharashtra employees should study
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrases "नुकसान भरून द्यावा" (compensate for the loss) and "अभ्यास करा" (study) are requests/suggestions and do not convey strong positive or negative emotions.

Text: | येडेश्वरीच्या चैत्र पोर्णिमा यात्रेसाठी     जादा बसची व्यवस्था,
translated_text: | Additional buses arranged for Chaitra Purnima Yatra of Yedeshwari,
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual arrangement: "जादा बसची व्यवस्था" (jaada buschi vyavastha) which means "additional bus arrangement," indicating a logistical detail without any positive or negative connotation.

Text: लक्ष्मी प्रसन्न होण्यासाठी दिवाळीपूर्वी करा ही   कामे !
translated_text: Do these things before Diwali to please Goddess Lakshmi!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it provides instructions ("करा ही कामे") without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The phrase "लक्ष्मी प्रसन्न होण्यासाठी" (to please Goddess Lakshmi) is devotional but doesn't convey any explicit sentiment.

Text: अश्या लोकांची कमी नाही आपल्या कडे पण..... भावी !!
translated_text: We have no shortage of such people, but..... future!!
Justification: The word "भावी" (bhavi - future) uttered with a slight pause and given the context suggests sarcasm and lightheartedness, indicating a sense of mocking amusement rather than genuine negativity. Thus, its use contributes to a neutral sentiment and underlying joy.

Text: आता ते सगळे ठार मुके, बहिरे, आंधळे, लुळे पांगळे होणार
translated_text: Now they will all be dead, mute, deaf, blind, lame, and lame.
Justification: The phrase "ठार मुके, बहिरे, आंधळे, लुळे पांगळे होणार" (dead, mute, deaf, blind, lame, and lame will become) indicates a state of complete and irreversible loss and suffering, driving the sadness emotion. The word "ठार" (dead/completely) intensifies the negative impact.

Text: कशाला उगीच प्रचार करताय.... तुम्हाला दखल घ्यावी लागली यातच सर्व काही आहे.
translated_text: Why are you just campaigning.... It's all about you having to take notice.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "तुम्हाला दखल घ्यावी लागली यातच सर्व काही आहे" (tumhala dakhal ghyavi lagli yatach sarva kahi aahe) implies a sense of satisfaction that the opposing party had to acknowledge them, but it lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The tone is more observational and factual rather than emotionally charged.

Text: नाही काका, हा केवळ भ्रम आहे....
translated_text: No, uncle, this is just an illusion...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "केवळ भ्रम आहे" (keval bhram aahe), which translates to "just an illusion." This phrase expresses a statement of fact or perception without conveying positive or negative sentiment.

Text: फडणवीसाच्या नातेवाईक पण आहे ब्राह्मण आहे नं. आता धुर निघणार मातोश्रीवरून
translated_text: Fadnavis' relatives are also Brahmins. Now the smoke will rise from Matoshree.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and descriptive tone, without overtly expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "फडणवीसाच्या नातेवाईक पण आहे ब्राह्मण आहे नं" (Fadnavis' relatives are also Brahmins) is a statement of fact/observation. The phrase "आता धुर निघणार मातोश्रीवरून" (Now the smoke will rise from Matoshree) is suggestive but not explicitly negative or positive in this context.

Text: वाल्या बापटासारखे घटनातज्ञ असे म्हणा...
translated_text: Say a constitutional expert like Valya Bapta...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply mentions someone ("Valya Bapta") and their profession ("घटनातज्ञ" - constitutional expert") without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "वाल्या बापटासारखे घटनातज्ञ" is a factual statement.

Text: बॅट आणली होती , बॉल सुर्या ने आणला होता
translated_text: The bat was brought, the ball was brought by Surya.
Justification: The sentence is factual and descriptive, simply stating who brought what. There are no inherently positive or negative Marathi words or phrases like "आनंद" (happiness) or "दुःख" (sadness) present. The statement "बॅट आणली होती , बॉल सुर्या ने आणला होता" lacks any emotional coloring, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मग दादानी फडणवीस साहेबा सोबत सकाळी सकाळी शपथविधी कशासाठी केला होता?
translated_text: Then why did Dada take the oath ceremony with Fadnavis Saheb in the morning?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question asking about the reason for an event. The phrase "कशासाठी केला होता?" (kashasathi kela hota?) - "why was it done?" - is a question that doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: वाढत्या वयात पाठदुखीची समस्या जाणवत आहे का ? तर या घरगुती उपाय नक्की करा
translated_text: Are you experiencing back pain as you age? Then definitely try these home remedies.
Justification: The sentence primarily provides information and advice ("या घरगुती उपाय नक्की करा" - definitely try these home remedies) without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. The initial question ("वाढत्या वयात पाठदुखीची समस्या जाणवत आहे का?") is neutral in its inquiry.

Text: मुंबईला हे लागु होत नाही, नाही का?
translated_text: This doesn't apply to Mumbai, does it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning nature of "नाही का?", which is a tag question seeking confirmation rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: कोणीतरी मुतायला गेलेत अस प्रफुल्ल पटेल म्हणाले होते
translated_text: Praful Patel had said that someone had gone to Mutlaq.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply reports a statement. The phrase "प्रफुल्ल पटेल म्हणाले होते" (Praful Patel mhanale hote) indicates a factual reporting of what someone said, without any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: लिहिलेलं वाचलं की महाराष्ट्रात जनता टिंगल उडवते म्हणून आज स्क्रिप्ट लिहिणारच सोबत घेऊन आलोय...
translated_text: I read what was written and said that people in Maharashtra make fun of me, so I brought the script with me today...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it primarily describes an action taken in response to potential ridicule. While it mentions "टिंगल उडवते" (tingal udavate - make fun of), it's presented as a factual statement of perceived reaction, not an expression of personal emotion or opinion.

Text: महाराष्ट्रा तील हि चॅनेल काय करतात?
translated_text: What do these channels in Maharashtra do?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question asking about the function of channels in Maharashtra. There is no specific word or phrase indicating positive or negative sentiment. The question itself, "काय करतात?" (kay karatat? - what do they do?), is purely informational and lacks emotional coloring.

Text: आज दुपारी    वाजता टिळक चौक ( अलका टॉकीज ) येथे होणार राष्ट्र गर्जना
translated_text: Rashtra Garjana will be held at Tilak Chowk (Alka Talkies) today at 12 noon.
Justification: The sentence describes an event ("Rashtra Garjana"), and uses neutral factual language with no explicitly positive or negative terms. The phrase "राष्ट्र गर्जना" (Rashtra Garjana) itself is a title and doesn't inherently convey sentiment in this context.

Text: हे तर सुरुवात आहे उद्या आर्थिक राजधानी जाणार आहे
translated_text: This is just the beginning, I'm going to the financial capital tomorrow.
Justification: The sentence expresses a future action ("उद्या आर्थिक राजधानी जाणार आहे" - udya arthik rajdhani janar aahe - I'm going to the financial capital tomorrow) and a statement about a beginning ("हे तर सुरुवात आहे" - he tar survat aahe - This is just the beginning) in a factual tone, lacking any overt emotional cues or sentiment indicators.

Text: भारतात पण गायींसाठी हे बसवायला हवे
translated_text: This should be installed for cows in India too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion without strong positive or negative connotations. The phrase "हवे" (have) indicates a desire or suggestion, but not a strong feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: हो. ही आमची कुलदेवी आहे.
translated_text: Yes. This is our family goddess.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about a family deity. The Marathi phrase "कुलदेवी आहे" (kuldevi aahe - is family goddess) is a neutral statement of fact, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: सहकार्य करून मुख्य प्रवाहात आणण्यासाठी लोकप्रतिनिधी म्हणून मी सदैव कटिबद्ध आहे."
translated_text: "As a public representative, I am always committed to working together and bringing it into the mainstream."
Justification: The sentence expresses a commitment to collaborative action, and uses neutral language. There is no specific word or phrase that expresses a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence conveys a sense of duty and responsibility, "कटिबद्ध आहे" (katibaddha aahe) meaning "committed", which is neutral.

Text: मुंबईच्या निवडणूकीपूर्वी एकनाथ शिंदेचा धडाका, आतापर्यंत एकाही मुख्यमंत्र्यांना ही गोष्ट जमली नव्हती
translated_text: Eknath Shinde's outburst before Mumbai elections, no Chief Minister has managed to do this till now
Justification: The sentence describes Eknath Shinde's activities before the Mumbai elections, stating that no other Chief Minister has achieved something similar ("आतापर्यंत एकाही मुख्यमंत्र्यांना ही गोष्ट जमली नव्हती"). While it highlights his actions, there is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The language is factual and descriptive, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे कधी झालं.
translated_text: When did this happen?
Justification: The sentence "हे कधी झालं" expresses surprise due to the interrogative "कधी झालं" (kadhi jhale), which translates to "when did this happen?". This questioning of the timing indicates an unexpected event.

Text: काँग्रेस अध्यक्षपदी निवड होताच राहुल गांधींनी अभिनंदन केलं का? मल्लिकार्जून खर्गे म्हणाले
translated_text: Did Rahul Gandhi congratulate me on being elected as Congress President? Mallikarjun Kharge said
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question asking if Rahul Gandhi congratulated Mallikarjun Kharge. The phrasing "अभिनंदन केलं का?" (abhinandan kel ka? - did you congratulate?) indicates an inquiry, not an expression of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हो पण नेमके तुमच्या कडचे लाडू होते ना ते?
translated_text: Yes, but those were your laddus, weren't they?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "हो पण नेमके... होते ना ते?". While "हो" (yes) suggests agreement, the qualifying phrases "पण" (but), "नेमके" (exactly/specifically), and "... होते ना ते?" (weren't they?) create a questioning and somewhat speculative tone, overall resulting in a neutral sentiment rather than a clearly positive or negative one.

Text: त्र्यंबकेश्वर पहिने बारी येथे वाघ्या देवाचे मंदिर होते आता त्याचे थोडेच अवशेष आहेत.
translated_text: Trimbakeshwar was formerly a temple of the Tiger God in Bari, but now there are only a few remains of it.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes a past state ("मंदिर होते") and the current state of अवशेष ("remains") of a temple. The Marathi phrase "आता त्याचे थोडेच अवशेष आहेत" (now there are only a few remains) indicates a factual observation without any strong positive or negative connotation.

Text: कोणी आमदार केला ग्रामपंचायत निवडणूक पक्षाच्या चिन्हावर लढवली होती
translated_text: Who contested the Gram Panchayat election on the party symbol?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question asking about someone contesting an election ("निवडणूक लढवली होती") and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जाम झालेल्या नळ्या मोकळ्या करण्यासाठी आपल्या किचन मध्येच असणारा हा रामबाण उपाय
translated_text: This is the panacea that you can find in your kitchen to unclog clogged drains.
Justification: The sentence describes a common solution to a household problem using neutral language. The phrase "रामबाण उपाय" (ramban upay) - meaning "panacea" or "sure-shot remedy" - while positive in connotation, is used in a matter-of-fact way and doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: दारू नाहीये ही...
translated_text: This is not alcohol...
Justification: The sentence "दारू नाहीये ही..." is neutral because it simply states a fact – that something is not alcohol. The word "नाहीये" (nahiye - is not) indicates a negation without any inherent emotional or subjective connotation.

Text: तुटलेल्या नात्यांपैकी बरीचशी नाती ही केवळ गैरसमजातून तुटलेली असतात.
translated_text: Most broken relationships are simply broken by misunderstandings.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with a slight sadness tilt because the phrase "तुटलेल्या नात्यांपैकी" (tutalelya natyanpaiki - of broken relationships) evokes a sense of sadness associated with broken relationships.

Text: कुठे पण जा मेहनत ही करावी लागते फक्त मार्ग वेगवेगळे आहेत
translated_text: Wherever you go, you have to work hard, but the paths are different.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a general observation about hard work ("मेहनत ही करावी लागते") and differing paths, without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: अबे तुझा बाप होता ज्यांनी तुझ्यासारखा पोराला जन्म दिला
translated_text: Abe was your father who gave birth to a son like you.
Justification: The phrase "अबे तुझा बाप होता ज्यांनी तुझ्यासारखा पोराला जन्म दिला" is considered neutral because while "अबे" (Abe) can be considered slightly rude, the rest of the sentence is a factual statement about paternity and lacks explicit positive or negative emotional indicators.

Text: त्यांना सामील हो.. शिव थाळी बंद पडलीच आहे
translated_text: Join them.. Shiv Thali is closed.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact ("शिव थाळी बंद पडलीच आहे" - Shiv Thali is closed) and provides a suggestion ("त्यांना सामील हो" - Join them) without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion. The phrase "बंद पडलीच आहे" (band padli aahe - is closed) is a factual statement that doesn't inherently carry sentiment.

Text: नाही कधीचं नाही काका आमच्यासाठी तुमच्या जीवनातला सूर्य तळपतोच आहे
translated_text: No, never, uncle, the sun in your life is shining for us.
Justification: While the sentence expresses appreciation, the phrase "नाही कधीचं नाही" (No, never) combined with the overall statement being a general sentiment rather than an expression of strong positive feeling, results in a neutral sentiment and emotion.

Text: तजेलदार त्वचेसाठी वापरा ‘या’ फळांचे मास्क
translated_text: Use these fruit masks for radiant skin
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply provides information ("Use these fruit masks") with the intention of helping with radiant skin ("तजेलदार त्वचेसाठी"). The phrase "तजेलदार त्वचेसाठी" (for radiant skin) is descriptive and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अजिबात नाही. आम्ही आमच्या मुद्द्यावर ठाम आहोत. बेसन लाडू इज द बेस्ट!
translated_text: Not at all. We stand by our point. Besan Ladoo is the best!
Justification: The phrase "बेसन लाडू इज द बेस्ट!" (Besan Ladoo is the best!) expresses strong positive sentiment and joy due to the superlative declaration of enjoyment and preference for a specific food item.

Text: मध्ये एका रात्रीत मिळणारे यश हे बहुदा   ,   ,    वर्षांचा संयम () असतो.
translated_text: Overnight success is often the result of years of patience.
Justification: The sentence describes overnight success as the result of years of patience. The Marathi word "संयम" (sanyam), meaning patience, is used in a descriptive, factual way, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: राजसाहेब कोल्हापूर, देगलूर, पंढरपूर पोटनिवडणुकीच्या वेळी कुठे होते
translated_text: Where was Rajsaheb during the Kolhapur, Degalur, Pandharpur by-elections?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question. The phrase "कुठे होते" (kuthe hote - where was) simply inquires about Rajsaheb's location, expressing no inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मीडिया गेल्या   वर्षांमध्ये सुद्धा कुठं होती हे पण विचारा
translated_text: Also ask where the media has been in the past years.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("कुठं होती हे पण विचारा" - "where was it also ask"), lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment. It's an inquiry rather than an expression of feeling.

Text: तू नाही दिसलास कुठे, बगळ्या
translated_text: I haven't seen you anywhere, heron.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of not seeing someone. The Marathi phrase "तू नाही दिसलास कुठे" (tu nahi dislas kuthe) translates to "I haven't seen you anywhere," which is a neutral observation lacking positive or negative connotation.

Text: एसटी महामंडळाला शिंदे-फडणवीस सरकारकडून     कोटी रुपयांची तातडीची मदत.
translated_text: Urgent assistance of crores of rupees from Shinde-Fadnavis government to ST Corporation.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual event ("तात्काळ मदत" - urgent assistance) without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase simply states the provision of aid.

Text: तो फक्त उद्धव चोळीचा अधिकार नाही म्हणून..
translated_text: It's just because Uddhav Choli doesn't have the right..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "उद्धव चोळीचा अधिकार नाही" (Uddhav Choli doesn't have the right) simply states a lack of authority and doesn't express any inherent positive or negative emotion.

Text: हे गाणं आत्ता बघण्यासारखं आहे का एकांती बघावं
translated_text: Is this song worth watching right now? Should I watch it alone?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question ("आहे का", "बघावं") and doesn't contain any overtly positive or negative words. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: अच्छा,मसाला-मीठ टाकून तिखट पुरी आणि साधी पुरी
translated_text: Okay, spicy puri with spices and salt and plain puri
Justification: The sentence describes food items with neutral descriptors like "मसाला-मीठ" (masala-salt), "तिखट" (spicy), and "साधी" (plain), lacking any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: हे खरोखर आश्चर्यकारक आणि आश्चर्यकारक आहे म्हणून जा आणि हे पहा
translated_text: This is really amazing and amazing so go and check it out.
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the phrase "आश्चर्यकारक आणि आश्चर्यकारक" (ashcharyajanak aani ashcharyajanak), meaning "amazing and amazing," which conveys a feeling of excitement and joy.

Text: अरे हे देव देवस्की करायला मुख्यमंत्री झालात का शिंदे, भाजपचे मिंदे झाले शिंदे
translated_text: Oh my God, did Shinde become the Chief Minister to please God? Shinde has become the BJP's minder.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) due to the rhetorical and sarcastic tone. The phrase "देव देवस्की करायला मुख्यमंत्री झालात का" (did you become Chief Minister to please God?) expresses surprise and a questioning of Shinde's motives, rather than a positive or negative sentiment towards him. The phrase "भाजपचे मिंदे झाले शिंदे" (Shinde has become BJP's minder) further contributes to the surprise/disappointment tone without strong positive or negative affect.

Text: अले दादा, पी एच दि ही बॅचलल झाल्यावल नाही, मास्टल झाल्यावल मिलते.
translated_text: Hey, Dada, you don't get a PhD until you've completed your bachelor's degree, you get it only after you've completed your master's degree.
Justification: The sentence is purely factual and informative, explaining the prerequisite for a PhD. The phrase "बॅचलल झाल्यावल नाही, मास्टल झाल्यावल मिलते" (bachelor झाल्यावल नाही, master झाल्यावल मिलते - you don't get it after bachelor's, you get it after master's) conveys information without any emotional coloring, hence the neutral sentiment and neutral emotion.

Text: त्यांच्या स्थितीकडे करून त्यांच्या    होऊ शकतो.
translated_text: They can be theirs by looking at their situation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a potential outcome ("होऊ शकतो") without expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling. The phrase "होऊ शकतो" (can be) indicates possibility but no inherent emotional charge.

Text: पुण्याचं पण करा
translated_text: Do Pune too.
Justification: The sentence "पुण्याचं पण करा" expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple request or instruction, with no inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "पुण्याचं पण करा" itself doesn't contain any sentiment-laden words.

Text: तुम्हाला तरी विश्वास आहे का सर..की निष्पक्ष होईल म्हणून
translated_text: Do you believe, sir, that it will be fair?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about fairness and belief, with no overtly positive or negative language. The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative tone and lack of strong sentiment markers. The word "विश्वास" (vishwas - belief) doesn't inherently convey a strong positive or negative feeling in this context, and neither does "निष्पक्ष" (nishpaksh - fair) as it's part of a question.

Text: करुन दाखवा त्यांना जे तुम्हाला सांगत होते तुमच्याशी होणार नाही.
translated_text: Show them that what they were telling you won't happen to you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire to prove naysayers wrong. While potentially motivational, it lacks explicitly positive or negative sentiment; the Marathi phrase "करुन दाखवा" (karun dakhava - show them) expresses a call to action but doesn't inherently convey strong emotion, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: असं वाटतंय कोणाची पाकीट ची साइज वाढली आहे
translated_text: It seems like someone's wallet has grown in size.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as the phrase "कोणाची पाकीट ची साइज वाढली आहे" (someone's wallet has grown in size) is a factual observation without inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: तालासुरात वाचले मी हे..
translated_text: I read this in Talasura..
Justification: The sentence "तालासुरात वाचले मी हे.." expresses a simple statement of reading something in "Talasura" without any emotionally charged words. Therefore, the neutral sentiment and emotion are justified. The Marathi phrase "वाचले मी" (vachale mi) simply means "I read", indicating a neutral action.

Text: यांना विधानभवन आणी मंत्रालयात सोडून द्यावे !
translated_text: They should be left in the Vidhan Bhavan and the Ministry!
Justification: The sentence expresses anger due to the phrase "सोडून द्यावे" (sodun dyave), meaning "leave them," which implies abandonment and a negative disposition towards the subject, escalating to anger in the given context of a political setting.

Text: कोल्हापूर विसरलात का वर्षानुवर्षे काँग्रेस राष्ट्रवादी आहे सत्तेत
translated_text: Have you forgotten Kolhapur? Congress and Nationalist Congress Party have been in power for years.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a factual observation ("वर्षानुवर्षे काँग्रेस राष्ट्रवादी आहे सत्तेत" - for years Congress and Nationalist Congress Party have been in power). This phrase, while potentially implying criticism, is presented as a statement of fact without strong emotional coloring.

Text: ह्या सर्व्हेची विश्वासहर्ता काय आहे हे पण जाणून घेणे तितकेच महत्त्वाचे आहे...
translated_text: It is equally important to know what the credibility of this survey is...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it focuses on the importance of knowing the credibility ("विश्वासहर्ता") of a survey, indicating an objective assessment rather than a positive or negative feeling. The phrase "जाणून घेणे तितकेच महत्त्वाचे आहे" (it is equally important to know) further reinforces this neutral stance.

Text: थंड वारं सुटेल म्हणून कोंबडा घरातच हीटर(मशाल) पेटवतो
translated_text: The rooster lights a heater (torch) in the house to ward off the cold wind.
Justification: The sentence describes a simple action without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "थंड वारं सुटेल" (thand varan sutel - cold wind will blow) simply states a fact about the weather and doesn't evoke any particular sentiment.

Text: एवढेच नाही तर एकदिवसीय क्रिकेट सामन्याचा शोध सुद्धा यांनीच लावलाय
translated_text: Not only this, but he also invented the one-day cricket match.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact about someone inventing one-day cricket, without any positive or negative connotations. The Marathi phrase "एवढेच नाही तर एकदिवसीय क्रिकेट सामन्याचा शोध सुद्धा यांनीच लावलाय" is a statement of fact and doesn't convey any specific emotional tone.

Text: पण बाळासाहेबांचे विचार एकनाथ शिंदे पुढे घेऊन जात आहेत!
translated_text: But Eknath Shinde is taking Balasaheb's ideas forward!
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment overall (0.0). The emotion "anger" might be associated with the implied disagreement/controversy surrounding the action of "पुढे घेऊन जात आहेत" (taking forward), suggesting a potentially contentious claim that may provoke anger in those who disagree with Shinde's interpretation or actions.

Text: राणाजी तुम आगे बडोदा  म्हणजे खोके घेतले हे खरे की काय
translated_text: Is it true that Ranaji Tum Aage Baroda took the boxes?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral, with a hint of surprise, because the sentence poses a question implying corruption. The phrase "खोके घेतले हे खरे की काय" (khoke ghetle he khare ki kay - "Is it true that the boxes were taken?") indicates a question of possibly illicit dealings, hence the surprise emotion, but overall the sentence simply asks a question without expressing strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे मी लै दिवस झाले सांगतोय
translated_text: I've been saying this for days.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact without any positive or negative indicators. The phrase "लै दिवस झाले सांगतोय" (lai divas zhale sangatoy - been saying this for days) simply indicates duration and doesn't carry any emotional weight.

Text: “प्रमुख पार्टी कोण हे पाहावं लागेल?, असं निवडणूक आयोगानं म्हटलं”, शिंदे गटाच्या वकिलांचा दावा
translated_text: “We have to see who the main party is,” said the Election Commission, claim Shinde group’s lawyers.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the reporting of a statement ("असं निवडणूक आयोगानं म्हटलं") and a claim ("शिंदे गटाच्या वकिलांचा दावा") without explicit positive or negative language.

Text: पालघर ची लोकसभेची पोटनिवडणूक विसरलात का..?
translated_text: Have you forgotten the Palghar Lok Sabha by-election?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question ("विसरलात का..?"), which simply inquires about a past event (Palghar Lok Sabha by-election) without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "विसरलात का..?" indicates a question about remembering, not an opinion.

Text: मला तरी असं वाटतं की त्यांचा उद्देश केवळ हिंदू जनजागृती होता,
translated_text: I think their aim was only to create awareness among Hindus,
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a perceived aim ("उद्देश") of creating awareness ("जनजागृती") and expresses a personal opinion ("मला तरी असं वाटतं"). There is no explicit positive or negative connotation associated with these words in this context.

Text: हे मराठी दर्शकांनी लक्षात ठेवायला हवं.
translated_text: Marathi viewers should remember this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a call to action ("लक्षात ठेवायला हवं" - should remember) without conveying any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: - पवनाथडी जत्रेला आजपासून सुरुवात ./-…
translated_text: - Pavanathadi fair begins today./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement: "पवनाथडी जत्रेला आजपासून सुरुवात" (Pavanathadi jatrela aajpasun survat) simply states that the Pavanathadi fair starts today, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: तुझ्या आईवर बाळू चढायला यायचा का रे..
translated_text: Why would you want to climb on your mother?
