Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a straightforward question regarding the timing of a certificate issuance ("कधी देणार आहात" - kadhi denar aahat - when will you give?"), without any explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: हो.... आणि मुळात शाकाहारी सुद्धा आहे
translated_text: Yes.... and it's also basically vegetarian.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("शाकाहारी सुद्धा आहे" - is also vegetarian"). There's no expression of positive or negative feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: गुजराती काय भारताबाहेर आहे का? ठाकरे बिहारी आहेत, सोनिया गांधी इटालियन
translated_text: Is Gujarati outside India? Thackeray is Bihari, Sonia Gandhi is Italian
Justification: The sentence presents factual statements and a rhetorical question without expressing any clear positive or negative emotion. No specific Marathi word or phrase indicates sentiment. The statements regarding origin are presented neutrally.

Text: मग मुख्यमंत्री फडणवीस होणार असेही न्हवते ठरलेले ना ?
translated_text: So it's not a given that Fadnavis will be the Chief Minister, is it?
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty, indicated by the phrase "असेही न्हवते ठरलेले ना ?", which translates to "it's not a given, is it?". This lack of definite assertion contributes to a neutral sentiment.

Text: किती रडशील हे यूट्यूब नाही आहे...
translated_text: How much you will cry is not YouTube...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it uses the phrase "किती रडशील हे यूट्यूब नाही आहे..." ("kiti radshil he youtube nahi aahe...") which means "How much you will cry is not YouTube...", suggesting a comparison or observation without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The statement simply points out a dissimilarity.

Text: शेतकरी काय कमी हाय काय? ग्रामीण इनोव्हेशन! व्हिडीओ व्हायरल
translated_text: What is wrong with farmers? Rural Innovation! Video goes viral
Justification: The assigned sentiment is neutral as the sentence, while containing a question, does not express positive or negative feelings. The phrase "शेतकरी काय कमी हाय काय?" (What is wrong with farmers?) is a rhetorical question, not necessarily critical or appreciative, and "व्हिडिओ व्हायरल" (video goes viral) is a statement of fact. The surprise emotion is derived from "शेतकरी काय कमी हाय काय?" which can reflect unexpected circumstances, given the context of viral rural innovation.

Text: हा म्हणजे तुझ्या अनुभवातून बाकी सगळे शिकतील ना
translated_text: This means that everyone else will learn from your experience, right?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning and somewhat observational tone conveyed by the phrase "हा म्हणजे... बाकी सगळे शिकतील ना" (ha mhanje... baki sagale shikhtil na), which simply poses a question about learning from someone's experience without expressing any particular positive or negative emotion.

Text: आता डॉलर मध्ये खेळतात
translated_text: Now they play in dollars
Justification: The sentence "आता डॉलर मध्ये खेळतात" is neutral because it simply states a fact about the currency used in a game or transaction; there is no inherent positive or negative connotation associated with the phrase "डॉलर मध्ये खेळतात" (play in dollars).

Text: बघितल्यावर बघायची हिंमत कोणाकडे आहे
translated_text: Who has the courage to look at it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a challenge or rhetorical question, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The Marathi phrase "हिंमत कोणाकडे आहे" (himmat konakade aahe - who has the courage) simply poses a question about someone's bravery, without explicitly conveying any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: एक नंदी बैल आणि एक मंदी बैल...
translated_text: A Nandi bull and a Mandi bull...
Justification: The sentence "एक नंदी बैल आणि एक मंदी बैल..." is a factual statement devoid of emotional cues. There is no specific word or phrase that conveys sentiment, hence the neutral sentiment. The sentence simply describes two things: a Nandi bull and a Mandi bull.

Text: जिथे एका नाटकात काल्पनिक पात्र आहे ते असत्यच झाले की.
translated_text: Where there is a fictional character in a play, it becomes untrue.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual observation about the nature of fiction. The phrase "असत्यच झाले की" (asatyach zhale ki - it becomes untrue) simply states this fact without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: साहेब हे अगोदपासूनच सुरू आहे दरवर्षी दिल्या जात..
translated_text: Sir, this has been going on since ancient times and is being given every year.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact. The phrase "अगोदपासूनच सुरू आहे" (agodpasunch suru aahe) meaning "has been going on since ancient times" expresses a continuous action without any positive or negative connotation.

Text: : शरद पवारांना घाबरताय का? शहाजी पाटील म्हणाले, जगात...
translated_text: : Are you afraid of Sharad Pawar? Shahaji Patil said, in the world...
Justification: The sentence expresses a question, "शरद पवारांना घाबरताय का?" (Are you afraid of Sharad Pawar?), which is inquisitive rather than expressing strong positive or negative sentiment. The word "घाबरताय" (afraid) itself doesn't necessarily convey a negative sentiment toward Sharad Pawar in this context; it's simply asking a question. Therefore, the overall sentiment is neutral.

Text: मिसळ खाऊन नावे ठेवायला पाहिजे होती सर. जास्त मजा आली असती
translated_text: Sir, you should have eaten misal and named it. It would have been more fun.
Justification: The sentence expresses a playful suggestion to criticize the misal after eating it for added enjoyment. The overall tone is neutral as it doesn't convey strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "जास्त मजा आली असती" (jasta maja ali asti) implies the potential for increased enjoyment, but the subjunctive mood keeps the statement neutral.

Text: काय कार्यक्रम आहे वाटते उद्या...  आहे का? मध्ये मिळेल
translated_text: What's the program tomorrow... is it available?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to its questioning and exploratory nature. The phrases "काय कार्यक्रम आहे" (kay karyakram aahe - what's the program) and "आहे का?" (aahe ka? - is it available?) simply inquire about plans and availability without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: मराठी अभिनेत्री नाही आहेत का? आणि हिला द्यायला ही मराठी अभिनेत्री आहे की महाराष्ट्रीयन?
translated_text: Are there no Marathi actresses? And is this Marathi actress or Maharashtrian?
Justification: The sentence expresses inquiry and comparison ("मराठी अभिनेत्री नाही आहेत का?", "मराठी अभिनेत्री आहे की महाराष्ट्रीयन?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: ... आणि तुझी स्पर्धा राखी सावंतशी आहे.
translated_text: ...and your competition is with Rakhi Sawant.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement comparing the subject's competition to Rakhi Sawant; it lacks overtly positive or negative sentiment. No specific word contributes to a particular sentiment; it's the overall statement that makes it neutral. The phrase "आणि तुझी स्पर्धा राखी सावंतशी आहे" simply presents information without expressing any subjective feeling.

Text: रुपया कमजोर होत नसून तर डॉलर मजबूत होतोय, यादृष्टीने पाहावे : केंद्रीय वित्तमंत्री निर्मला सीतारमण
translated_text: The rupee is not weakening, but the dollar is strengthening, we should look at it from this perspective: Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman
Justification: The sentence expresses an objective economic observation. The phrase "रुपया कमजोर होत नसून तर डॉलर मजबूत होतोय" (the rupee is not weakening, but the dollar is strengthening) presents a neutral economic perspective, lacking explicit emotional content or sentiment.

Text: दाणे टाकायला नाही गेला का तू
translated_text: Didn't you go to plant the seeds?
Justification: The sentence "दाणे टाकायला नाही गेला का तू" is neutral because it is a simple question about planting seeds; there is no indication of positive or negative sentiment in the phrase "दाणे टाकायला नाही गेला का तू".

Text: अखंड प्रचंड पुरुषार्थ ही एकमात्र उपाय
translated_text: The only solution is constant and immense effort.
Justification: The sentence expresses the necessity of continuous effort. The phrase "एकमात्र उपाय" (ekmatra upay - the only solution) suggests a pragmatic and neutral tone, focusing on action rather than emotional expression. There is no word showing happiness, sadness or anger.

Text: देशभक्ती शरीरात जागृत झाली आणि नानाने त्या दुकानातूनच वस्तू विकत घेतल्या.
translated_text: Patriotism awakened in the body and Nana bought things from that store.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an action and feeling, with no inherently positive or negative words. The phrase "देशभक्ती शरीरात जागृत झाली" (patriotism awakened in the body) describes a feeling of patriotism but doesn't express a strong positive or negative sentiment on its own, making the overall tone neutral.

translated_text: Whose photo was in it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question ("मध्ये कोणाचा फोटो होता") asking about the content of something, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The word "कोणाचा" (konacha - whose) simply inquires about ownership and doesn't inherently carry sentiment.

Text: ऐका हो शिवसैनिक काय करणार आहे स्वतः सांगत आहे
translated_text: Listen, Shiv Sainik is telling himself what he is going to do.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a fact. The Marathi phrase "स्वतः सांगत आहे" (swataha sangat aahe - telling himself) indicates a statement of action without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुमची तक्रार विद्युत विभागला पाठविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been sent to the electricity department.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("पाठविण्यात आली आहे" - has been sent) without any positive or negative connotations.

Text: .  वर्षे तुमचीच सत्ता होती
translated_text: You were in power for years.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of fact ("वर्षे तुमचीच सत्ता होती" - You were in power for years) without any emotional coloring. The phrase "सत्ता होती" (was in power) simply describes a past state and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: विणकामाच्या रचनांचे नमुने आणि उत्पादनांचे मुंबईत विणकर सेवा केंद्रामध्ये प्रदर्शन
translated_text: Exhibition of weaving patterns and products at the Weaver Service Center in Mumbai
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event – an exhibition. There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment. The sentence primarily provides factual information, making the sentiment neutral. Specifically, words like "विणकामाच्या रचनांचे नमुने आणि उत्पादनांचे प्रदर्शन" (exhibition of weaving patterns and products) describe a factual event without conveying any sentiment.

Text: खरच आता पक्क.... ही हिंदु ह्रदय सम्राट स्व. बाळासाहेबांची सैना नाही..
translated_text: It is really clear now.... This is not the army of the late Hindu King Balasaheb..
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the current state of a political group, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The neutral sentiment is driven by the descriptive nature of the phrase "खरच आता पक्क.... ही हिंदु ह्रदय सम्राट स्व. बाळासाहेबांची सैना नाही.." (It is really clear now.... This is not the army of the late Hindu King Balasaheb..) which presents an observation rather than expressing a strong opinion or feeling.

Text: ची ढाल ची तलवार सांभाळून वापरा पण नायतर जाऊद्या आपल्याला काय
translated_text: Use your shield and sword with care, but what will you do if you are not careful?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it uses the phrase "जाऊद्या आपल्याला काय" (jaudya aaplyala kay), which translates to "let it go, what is it to us?" This phrase indicates indifference and a lack of strong feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पुण्यात असे कधीच होत नव्हते पूर्वी!
translated_text: This has never happened before in Pune!
Justification: The phrase "कधीच होत नव्हते" (kadhich hot navhate) meaning "never happened before" indicates surprise, as it suggests an unexpected deviation from the norm. The overall sentiment leans neutral (0.0) because, while expressing surprise, it doesn't necessarily convey a positive or negative feeling about the situation itself.

Text: इथेनॉलवर धावणारी पहिली कार भारतात दाखल; ‘या’ वाहन उत्पादक कंपनीला श्रेय !
translated_text: First car running on ethanol launched in India; Credit to this vehicle manufacturer!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral despite the joyous emotion because the sentence primarily reports a fact. While the news is positive, the sentence lacks strong positive words. The phrase "श्रेय !" (shrey! - credit!) implies a positive association, contributing to the emotion of joy, but doesn't significantly alter the overall sentiment due to the factual nature of the rest of the sentence.

Text: साहेब सरकार आपलंच येणार पण गरिबांचा पण थोडाफार काहीतरी विचार करा
translated_text: Sir, the government will come for us, but please think a little about the poor.
Justification: While the sentence expresses a hope for the poor ("गरिबांचा...विचार करा"), it is couched within an expectation that the government will come to power ("साहेब सरकार आपलंच येणार"). This expectation, coupled with a plea rather than a strong opinion, results in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "गरिबांचा...विचार करा" (think about the poor) suggests a mild concern, not a strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पत्रकारांनीसुद्धा ही बातमी किती लावून धरली.
translated_text: Even journalists caught this news with great interest.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes journalists pursuing a news story with "लावून धरली" (lavun dharli), which translates to "caught with interest" or "persisted with." This describes an action without expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही अशी सुवर्णसंधी गमावू नका, त्यामुळे आताच ती मिळवा.
translated_text: You shouldn't miss such a golden opportunity, so grab it now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily offers advice. While "सुवर्णसंधी" (suvarnasandhi, golden opportunity) sounds positive, the overall message focuses on urging action rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling. The call to action "मिळवा" (milva, grab it) maintains a neutral tone.

Text: पण आहे नाजनरल स्लीपर
translated_text: But there is a general sleeper.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact "पण आहे नाजनरल स्लीपर" (pan aahe na janaral sleepar) - "but there is a general sleeper." There are no words or phrases that convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: तुम्ही पण तेच आहात का साहेब...?
translated_text: Are you the same, sir...?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the interrogative nature and slight incredulity implied by "तुम्ही पण तेच आहात का" (Tumhi pan tech aahat ka), which translates to "Are you also the same?". The "का" (ka) indicates a question, while "पण" (pan, also) hints at a previously known or assumed fact, making the utterance inquisitive and somewhat surprising.

Text: प्लँनिंग शिवाय कोणतेही काम यशस्वी होत नाही.
translated_text: No work is successful without planning.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general truth about the necessity of planning for success, making it neutral. The phrase "यशस्वी होत नाही" (yashasvi hot nahi), meaning "not successful", is presented as a factual consequence rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: आता आपण सर्वांनी मिळून हे प्रत्यक्षात आणायचे आहे आणि मुलींना बालविवाहापासून वाचवायचे आहे.
translated_text: Now we all have to come together to make this a reality and save girls from child marriage.
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action and a desire to prevent child marriage; while positive in intent, it lacks strong positive or negative language, resulting in a neutral sentiment. No specific Marathi word or phrase directly contributes a positive or negative emotion. The phrase "आता आपण सर्वांनी मिळून हे प्रत्यक्षात आणायचे आहे" (Now we all have to come together to make this a reality) simply describes an intention, not an emotional state.

Text: *अतिवृष्टीमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीचे पंचनामे करा विजय शिवतारे यांची माघणी* *महाराष्ट्र एक्स्प्रेस ला सबस्काईब करा*
translated_text: *Make a Panchnama of the damage caused by heavy rains, Vijay Shivtare's Maghani* *Subscribe to Maharashtra Express*
Justification: The sentence primarily reports news and a call to action ("सबस्काईब करा" - Subscribe) without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "नुकसानीचे पंचनामे करा" (Make a Panchnama of the damage) is related to damage but presented neutrally as a request for assessment.

Text: मामा काकांची जागा कधीही घेवू शकणार नाही..
translated_text: An uncle can never take the place of an uncle.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "मामा काकांची जागा कधीही घेवू शकणार नाही" (mama kakanchi jaga kadhihi gheu shakanar nahi), which expresses a factual statement about the irreplaceable nature of family relationships without conveying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: हो का.. पण त्यात खोटेपणा नको..
translated_text: Yes, but don't lie about it.
Justification: The phrase "खोटेपणा नको" (khotepana nako) which means "don't lie" implies a request for honesty but doesn't convey strong positive or negative sentiment, leaning towards neutral.

Text: आणि पत्र दोन तीन महिने अगोदर लिहिले होते पण ते निवडणूक काळात पोहोचले
translated_text: And the letter was written two or three months ago but it arrived during the election period.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual sequence of events ("आणि पत्र दोन तीन महिने अगोदर लिहिले होते पण ते निवडणूक काळात पोहोचले"), lacking strong positive or negative indicators. There's no explicitly emotional language used. The phrase "निवडणूक काळात पोहोचले" (arrived during the election period) simply states a timing detail without implying any particular feeling or opinion.

Text: हीच आहे प्रखर हिंदुत्ववादी विचारांची आणि महाराष्ट्राच्या प्रगतीची ढाल तलवार...!
translated_text: This is the shield and sword of strong Hindutva ideas and the progress of Maharashtra...!
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the statement being descriptive and aspirational rather than explicitly positive or negative. While "प्रगतीची ढाल तलवार" (progress's shield and sword) suggests a positive future, it's presented as a statement of purpose rather than an expression of joy. The statement itself lacks strong emotional indicators.

Text: हे बघा फक्त फक्त भाजप चे सरकार आहे.
translated_text: Look, this is only a BJP government.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its factual statement. The Marathi phrase "भाजप चे सरकार आहे" (BJP che sarkar aahe - BJP's government is) simply states a political reality without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: दोन भावी पंतप्रधान एकाने माढ्यातुन आणि एकाने अमेठीतुन पळ काढला होता.
translated_text: Two future prime ministers had fled, one from Madha and one from Amethi.
Justification: The sentence describes two potential prime ministers fleeing constituencies. While potentially negative in its implication of their actions, the sentence itself is stated neutrally, lacking overtly positive or negative language. The words "पळ काढला होता" (pal kadhla hota - had fled) describe an action, but without additional context or emotional coloring, remain factual and neutral.

Text: खुळखुळा ही नाही मिळाला का?
translated_text: Didn't you get the Khulkhulkhu?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question. The phrase "खुळखुळा ही नाही मिळाला का?" (Khulkhulkhu hi nahi milala ka?) which translates to "Didn't you even get the Khulkhulkhu?" is a factual inquiry and doesn't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे साहेब नाशिक क्या गुलगुलित रस्त्या वरूनच् गेले असतील
translated_text: Hey sir, have you gone through the winding roads of Nashik?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it primarily describes a route in Nashik. The Marathi phrase "गुलगुलित रस्त्या" (gulgulit rasta) meaning winding roads is descriptive and doesn't express any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: "भविष्यात महाविकास आघाडीला उमेदवारही मिळणार नाही अशी अवस्था करु." -भाजपचे प्रदेशाध्यक्ष चंद्रशेखर बावनकुळे
translated_text: "We will make sure that the Maha Vikas Aghadi does not get any candidates in the future." -BJP State President Chandrashekhar Bawankule
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement of intent. While potentially negative in its implications for the opposing party, the wording itself, including the phrase "उमेदवारही मिळणार नाही अशी अवस्था करु" (we will make sure that they don't even get candidates), is presented as a strategic objective, lacking explicit emotional coloring. Hence, neutral.

Text: आज पासून लोकांना सांगणार लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.
translated_text: From today onwards, I will tell people to remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence expresses a political objective ("आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे" - we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena), focusing on strategic action rather than expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The focus on defeating a political opponent is more of a neutral statement of intent in this context.

Text: ते केलेलं ट्विट आता केलं तर चालेल का भैया
translated_text: Brother, would it be okay if I tweet that now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question seeking permission, and there are no inherently positive or negative words. The phrase "चालेल का" (chaalel ka), meaning "would it be okay?", indicates a neutral inquiry rather than any emotional expression.

Text: धुरा योग्य खांद्यावर आहे. फक्र है।
translated_text: The axle is on the right shoulder. It is a pleasure.
Justification: The phrase "फक्र है" (pleasure/pride) directly indicates a positive emotion of joy, thus contributing to a neutral sentiment overall as there are no significantly negative indicators.

Text: टेलिग्राफ वृत्तपत्राने ही बातमी दिली आहे
translated_text: The Telegraph newspaper reported this news.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement. The phrase "टेलीग्राफ वृत्तपत्राने ही बातमी दिली आहे" (The Telegraph newspaper reported this news) simply reports an event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही लहानपणापासून अशे होता की आता भारतीय जनता पक्षाचे प्रवक्ते झाल्यावर झालंय
translated_text: You were a scoundrel since childhood and now you have become the spokesperson of the Bharatiya Janata Party.
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the word "अशे" ("asche"), which translates to "scoundrel" and expresses strong disapproval and moral repugnance towards the person being addressed.

Text: संजय राठोड हे मंत्री झाले ताई.
translated_text: Sanjay Rathod became the minister.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement, "Sanjay Rathod he mantri zale tai," lacking any subjective language or emotional cues. The phrase "mantri zale" (became the minister) simply states a change in status, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पंतप्रधानांच्या हस्ते गुजरातमध्ये प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजनेच्या आयुष्मान कार्डांच्या वितरणाला होणार प्रारंभ
translated_text: Distribution of Ayushman Cards of Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana will be launched in Gujarat by the Prime Minister
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event: the launch of a distribution program. There are no sentiment-bearing words or phrases in the Marathi sentence like "प्रारंभ होणार" (prarambh honar - will be launched).

Text:
हिमालयातील भूकंपप्रवण क्षेत्रांचे मॅपिंग निसार उपग्रहाद्वारे होणार:

 
 
 .//    / / …
translated_text:
Mapping of seismically active areas in the Himalayas to be done by Nisar satellite:

.// / / …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the mapping of seismically active areas using a satellite. There's no sentiment or emotion expressed. The phrase "हिमालयातील भूकंपप्रवण क्षेत्रांचे मॅपिंग निसार उपग्रहाद्वारे होणार" is a straightforward statement of a planned action.

Text: प्रत्येक गोष्ट मनासारखी होत नसते... म्हणून सुखापेक्षा समाधान शोधा, आयुष्य खूप आनंदात जाईल...!
translated_text: Not everything goes as you wish... So seek contentment rather than happiness, life will be filled with great joy...!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) because the sentence acknowledges that not everything goes as planned, balancing the initial potential for disappointment with the advice to seek contentment ("समाधान शोधा"), which suggests a positive outlook, mitigating any strong positive or negative sentiment. While the emotion is joy, the overall sentiment of the sentence is neutral.

Text: गुरुत्वाकर्षण आहे की नाही का नुसती अफवा आहे..... वा जबरदस्त कमालच....
translated_text: Is there gravity or not? Is it just a rumor... or is it amazing?
Justification: The phrase "वा जबरदस्त कमालच" (vaa jabardast kamaalach) expressing amazement/wonder, while positive in connotation, doesn't strongly indicate a positive or negative sentiment in the overall context of questioning gravity and rumors. The neutrality of the question pulls the overall sentiment close to 0, while "vaa jabardast kamaalach" clearly indicates the emotion of surprise.

Text: सरकार चा विरोध आणि स्थानिक नागरिकांचा विरोध या मध्ये फरक कळतो का...?
translated_text: Do you understand the difference between opposition to the government and opposition to local citizens?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question about understanding a difference, without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "फरक कळतो का...?" (farak kalto ka...?) which translates to "Do you understand the difference...?" is interrogative and does not inherently convey any sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही पहिल्या गटाच्या अध्यक्षा आहेत की काय
translated_text: Are you the president of the first group?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The phrase "तुम्ही पहिल्या गटाच्या अध्यक्षा आहेत की काय" (Are you the president of the first group?) simply inquires about someone's position and doesn't contain any emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: आज पासून उद्धव ठाकरे लोकांना सांगणार:- "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."
translated_text: From today, Uddhav Thackeray will tell the people: "Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena."
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement with the intent to defeat a political opponent. While potentially divisive, the phrase "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे" (Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena) is presented as a future goal and doesn't contain overtly positive or negative sentiment on its own, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: खोके यांच्याही घरी जायचे, बंद झाल्यामुळे अशी अवस्था झालेली दिसते
translated_text: Khoke's house was also closed, it seems this situation has arisen due to the lockdown.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual situation ("बंद झाल्यामुळे अशी अवस्था झालेली दिसते" - this situation has arisen due to the lockdown) with no inherently positive or negative wording. The phrase "बंद झाल्यामुळे" (due to being closed) simply explains the state and doesn't carry any strong emotional weight.

Text: दोन्ही ऊमेदवारांना समान संधी आहे. जय श्रीराम.
translated_text: Both candidates have equal opportunity. Jai Shri Ram.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while "जय श्रीराम" (Jai Shri Ram) can evoke strong emotions in some, in this context, without further elaboration, it does not express a specific positive or negative sentiment towards the opportunity for the candidates. It is more of a statement/greeting rather than expressing a clear positive or negative leaning towards the situation of equal opportunity.

Text: या नंतर म्याव म्याव च भौ भौ होईल असा भाबडा आशावाद.
translated_text: The naive optimism that after this, there will be a meow meow.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment, despite "joy" being present as emotion, due to the sarcastic and unrealistic nature of the expectation. The phrase "भाबडा आशावाद" (bhaabada aashavad - naive optimism) contributes to the lack of strong positive sentiment, suggesting the optimism is unfounded and perhaps even foolish, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: "तुमचा आनंद जितका स्वस्त असेल, तितके तुम्ही श्रीमंत व्हाल."
translated_text: "The cheaper your happiness, the richer you will be."
Justification: The sentence conveys a philosophical observation about happiness and wealth, not expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling. The Marathi phrase "तुमचा आनंद जितका स्वस्त असेल, तितके तुम्ही श्रीमंत व्हाल" simply states a relationship, making it neutral in sentiment.

Text: म्हणून अजून पर्यंत सतरंज्या उचलण्याचे काम करत आहेत का????
translated_text: So are you still working on picking up the chess pieces????
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature of the statement "का???? (ka????)", which questions the activity without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase simply inquires about the current state of affairs.

Text: पक्षीसुद्धा स्वतःला सिद्ध करून दाखवतात...
translated_text: Even birds prove themselves...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("पक्षीसुद्धा स्वतःला सिद्ध करून दाखवतात") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सिद्ध करून दाखवतात" (prove themselves) is a neutral observation about bird behavior.

Text: अहंकार तर प्रकांड पंडित रावणाचा ही नव्हता राहिला……………
translated_text: The arrogance of the great Pandit Ravana was gone……………
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a historical fact about Ravana's arrogance being gone ("अहंकार तर प्रकांड पंडित रावणाचा ही नव्हता राहिला"). This phrasing presents the information objectively without any indication of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अडीच वर्ष फक्त वसुलीत मग्न होते
translated_text: For two and a half years, I was only engaged in recovery.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a statement of fact. The phrase "फक्त वसुलीत मग्न होते" (fakt vasulit magn hote) - "only engaged in recovery," describes an activity without conveying any explicit positive or negative sentiment or strong emotion.

Text: फडणवीस हे राज ठाकरेंमार्फत खडा टाकून वातावरणाचा अंदाज घेत आहेत. संघाची जुनी पद्धत आहे ही.
translated_text: Fadnavis is assessing the situation by casting stones through Raj Thackeray. This is the old method of the Sangh.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it describes an action ("खडा टाकून वातावरणाचा अंदाज घेत आहेत" - assessing the situation by casting stones) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हा वाकड्या माणिकचंद च्या शाळेत गेल्या
translated_text: This crook went to Manik Chand's school.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states a fact. While "वाकड्या" (vakdya), meaning "crook" or "dishonest," carries a slightly negative connotation, the overall sentence lacks strong emotional indicators and simply relays information about someone's attendance at a school. The negative connotation is not strong enough to make the sentence have any clear positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ह्या राजकारण्यां दर वेळी महाराजांच नाव घेवूनच का राजकारण करायच असत??
translated_text: Why do these politicians always have to do politics by mentioning Maharaj's name?
Justification: The negative sentiment and surprise emotion are primarily driven by the rhetorical question "दर वेळी महाराजांच नाव घेवूनच का राजकारण करायच असत??" (dar veli Maharajanch nav ghevunch ka rajkaran karaych asat??), which expresses disbelief and disapproval of the politicians' actions. The word "का" (ka - why) specifically contributes to the feeling of surprise and questioning.

Text: दरवर्षी शेकडो लोक बौद्ध धर्म का स्वीकारत आहेत?
translated_text: Why are hundreds of people converting to Buddhism every year?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "का स्वीकारत आहेत?" (ka swikarat aahet?), meaning "why are (they) accepting?". This indicates a sense of wonder and inquiry regarding the reason behind the increasing adoption of Buddhism.

Text: हा कायदा अस्तित्वात आहे?
translated_text: Does this law exist?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question, and contains no sentiment bearing words. The phrase "अस्तित्वात आहे?" (astitvat aahe?) meaning "exists?" simply inquires about the existence of the law, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: सभ्य , साधा, सुसंस्कृत, काळजीवाहू मुख्यमंत्री ही व्याख्या      पासून बदलेली आहे...
translated_text: The definition of a decent, simple, cultured, caring Chief Minister has changed from...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a shift in the definition of a Chief Minister, not expressing a positive or negative feeling. No specific Marathi word contributes to a strong positive or negative emotion; the sentence primarily focuses on the change ("बदलेली आहे").

Text: फुकट काहीच मिळत नाही आणि दिल जात नाही
translated_text: Nothing comes for free and nothing goes for free.
Justification: The phrase "फुकट काहीच मिळत नाही" (fukat kahich milat nahi - nothing comes for free) implies a sense of frustration and resentment, contributing to the anger emotion. This is a cynical observation about the world, and the negativity evokes anger.

Text: | महाराष्ट्रातील सत्तासंघर्ष! आज घटनापिठापुढे होणार ‘सुप्रिम’ सुनावणी
translated_text: | Power struggle in Maharashtra! 'Supreme' hearing to be held before the Constitution Bench today
Justification: The word "सत्तासंघर्ष" (sattasangharsh), meaning "power struggle," suggests conflict and instability, contributing to the negative sentiment and the emotion of anger.

Text: काय विकास केला तुम्ही जरा सांगा आम्हाला
translated_text: Please tell us what you have developed.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a direct, albeit potentially sarcastic, request for information ("काय विकास केला तुम्ही जरा सांगा आम्हाला" - "Please tell us what you have developed"). While the tone might be interpreted as passive-aggressive in context, the literal words themselves express a request, lacking inherently positive or negative sentiment. The absence of overtly positive or negative terms contributes to the neutral classification.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचे विचार आज रिलेव्हंट आहेत. स्वा. सावरकरांचे आहेत का? अखंड हिंदुराष्ट्र कालबाह्य झालंय.
translated_text: Are Balasaheb's thoughts relevant today? Are they those of Mr. Savarkar? The unified Hindu nation is outdated.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it questions the relevance of some ideas ("अखंड हिंदुराष्ट्र कालबाह्य झालंय" - The unified Hindu nation is outdated), it also suggests the continued relevance of others ("बाळासाहेबांचे विचार आज रिलेव्हंट आहेत" - Balasaheb's thoughts are relevant today). This mixed and questioning tone leads to an overall neutral sentiment.

Text: एक विचारू? थोडा पर्सनल आहे...
translated_text: Can I ask you something? It's a bit personal...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "एक विचारू? थोडा पर्सनल आहे..." (Can I ask you something? It's a bit personal...) is simply a polite inquiry and statement, lacking any inherent positive or negative connotation. There is no specific word indicating a strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: तुझ्या सारख्या      जरी औलादी जन्मल्या ना तरी ही शक्य होणार नाही ड्या
translated_text: Even if children like you were born, this wouldn't be possible.
Justification: The sentence expresses impossibility and doubt. While potentially insulting in context, the phrase "तुझ्या सारख्या जरी औलादी जन्मल्या ना तरी ही शक्य होणार नाही" (Even if children like you were born, this wouldn't be possible) directly indicates a lack of possibility rather than a strong positive or negative emotion, contributing to the neutral sentiment. The sentence focuses on the impossibility itself, without explicit emotional expression like anger or happiness.

Text: चुकीच्या क्षेत्रात आला तो माणूस
translated_text: The man who came to the wrong area
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion stem from "चुकीच्या क्षेत्रात" (chukichya kshetraat), which implies a mismatch or unsuitability of the man to the area, creating a sense of distaste or aversion to the situation.

Text: शिंदे ची नाव पूर्ति बाळासाहेब आणि धर्मवीर आनद दिघे ची शिकवण
translated_text: Shinde's name is Purti Balasaheb and the teachings of Dharmavir Anand Dighe.
Justification: The sentence primarily describes Shinde's name fulfilling the teachings of Balasaheb and Anand Dighe. There are no inherently positive or negative words; it's a statement of fact or association. The phrase "शिंदे ची नाव पूर्ति" (Shinde's name fulfillment/completion) is neutral in this context.

Text: एकंदर केंद्र सरकारचा असलेला दवाब बघता हे वाटणे साहजिकच आहे
translated_text: It is natural to feel this way, given the overall pressure from the central government.
Justification: The sentence expresses a natural feeling ("वाटणे साहजिकच आहे") in response to external pressure, indicating a neutral sentiment as it simply acknowledges a reaction to circumstances without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: परतीचा पाऊस असतोय हा या पावसावर शेतकरी दुसर्या पिकाची पेरणी करतो
translated_text: The farmers sow another crop during the rainy season.
Justification: The sentence describes a common agricultural practice ("शेतकरी दुसर्या पिकाची पेरणी करतो" - farmers sow another crop) and simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आणि याची बुद्धी बघा सदाशिव पेठेतला हा.
translated_text: And look at the wisdom of this one from Sadashiv Peth.
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "आणि याची बुद्धी बघा...सदाशिव पेठेतला हा", which translates to "And look at the wisdom of this one... from Sadashiv Peth." The phrase is observational and doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral. The phrase lacks explicit emotional coloring, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: जनता गरीब होत नाहीए;   नं वर जातोय.
translated_text: People are not getting poor; they are getting better.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive trend ("नं वर जातोय" - getting better) but also acknowledges the existing state ("जनता गरीब होत नाहीए" - people are not getting poor) without strong emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हे बघा हो.... एवढ्या मोठया पत्रकाराला काय काय म्हणताहेत!!
translated_text: Look at this....what are you saying to such a great journalist!!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with surprise primarily due to the phrase "काय काय म्हणताहेत!!" (kay kay mhantahet!!), which expresses shock and disbelief at what is being said, indicating surprise.

Text: प्रत्येक हिंदुन अर्जुन बनाव असा पण अर्थ निघतो याचा.
translated_text: This also means that every Hindu should become Arjuna.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it simply states a possible interpretation ("अर्थ निघतो") of a statement without expressing any positive or negative feeling or emotion. The phrase "अर्थ निघतो" indicates a potential meaning or interpretation, keeping the sentiment objective.

Text: जोशी काय करत होते हे प्रदीप ला।विचारले का?
translated_text: Did you ask Pradeep what Joshi was doing?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking for information ("विचारले का?"). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation.

Text: देशमुख तुम्ही पण का जोशी सोबत
translated_text: Deshmukh, why are you also with Joshi?
Justification: The word "पण" (pan, meaning "also") indicates surprise that Deshmukh is associated with Joshi.

Text: जुन्या अडमुठ नेत्यांमुळे काँग्रेस ची भविष्यातील वाटचाल खूप खडतर होत आहे.
translated_text: The future of Congress is becoming very difficult due to old, stubborn leaders.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a difficult future for Congress due to "अडमुठ" (admuTh), which translates to stubborn. While negative in connotation, it presents the situation as a factual observation rather than expressing strong emotion.

Text: तीर्थयात्रेला गेले का हो !
translated_text: Have you gone on a pilgrimage?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple inquiry about a pilgrimage, lacking any inherent positive or negative connotations. The phrase "तीर्थयात्रेला गेले का हो !" is a neutral question and doesn't express any specific emotion.

Text: हि तर शहाजीबापू याच्या साठी गर्दी होती...
translated_text: This was a crowd for Shahajibapu...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact - "गर्दी होती" (gardi hoti - there was a crowd). There is no explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: मला आज परत एक सुचलं आहे, पण नेहमी प्रमाणे शब्द इकडे तिकडे विखरलेत
translated_text: I have another idea today, but as usual the words are scattered here and there.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes having an idea and difficulty expressing it, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "नेहमी प्रमाणे" (nehmi pramane - as usual) suggests a recurring situation, contributing to the neutrality.

Text: एक रिक्षावाला आणि एक चहावाला असू शकत नाही का
translated_text: Can't there be a rickshaw puller and a tea vendor?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. The Marathi phrase "असू शकत नाही का" (asu shakat nahi ka) - "can't there be?"- simply inquires about a possibility, indicating neutrality.

Text: किती पगार घेत होता विचारा आता आणि हे लोक किती देणार हे सुद्धा विचारा
translated_text: Now ask how much salary you were getting and also ask how much these people will pay.
Justification: The sentence uses neutral questioning without any emotional coloring. Phrases like "किती पगार घेत होता विचारा" (how much salary you were getting, ask) and "किती देणार हे सुद्धा विचारा" (how much they will pay, also ask) are simply inquiries, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे जागे झाले मागील काही दिवस झोपून होते लागलेय जप चालू ठाकरे ओन्ली ठाकरे
translated_text: This one woke up, it was sleeping for the last few days, the chanting is on, Thackeray only Thackeray
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a change ("हे जागे झाले") and ongoing activity ("लागलेय जप चालू") without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. "ठाकरे ओन्ली ठाकरे" adds to the factual reporting, but doesn't inherently convey emotion.

Text: बर ते आता सर्वोच्च न्यायालयावर तसाच विश्वास राहुदे जसा मैदान मिळाल्यावर होता....
translated_text: Well, they should have the same faith in the Supreme Court now as they did when they got the field...
Justification: The sentence expresses a hope or expectation, but without strong positive or negative leaning. The phrase "तसाच विश्वास राहुदे" (tasach vishwas rahude) - "should have the same faith" - suggests a neutral stance, simply wishing for consistency in belief.

Text: काय केल हौत ते सभेत दाखवल होत.
translated_text: What they did was shown in the meeting.
Justification: The sentence lacks any emotionally charged words or phrases. The Marathi phrase "काय केल हौत ते सभेत दाखवल होत" simply states a fact without expressing any positive, negative, or emotional connotation, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: पाहतात का हा प्रश्न आहे
translated_text: Is this the question?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion stem from the interrogative nature of the sentence, specifically the phrase "का हा प्रश्न आहे" which frames the statement as a question implying uncertainty and possible astonishment. The core word "प्रश्न" (question) combined with "आहे का" further emphasizes the element of surprise in questioning the situation.

Text: हे फोटो स्वतः काढलेले असतात का इंटरनेट वरचे ?
translated_text: Are these photos on the Internet taken by yourself?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the questioning of the photo's origin with the phrase "स्वतः काढलेले असतात का इंटरनेट वरचे ?" implying disbelief or wonder if the photos are self-taken or from the internet.

Text: पण इकडे तर रघुनाथ ची बाकरवडी आहे, चितळ्यांच नावच नाही आहे....
translated_text: But here is Raghunath's Bakarwadi, Chitla's name is not there...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the brand of Bakarwadi available and the absence of the "Chitale" brand name. There is no strong positive or negative sentiment expressed. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate. The phrases "पण इकडे तर" (but here) and "...नावच नाही आहे" (name is not there) contribute to the neutral tone, simply stating facts.

Text: तो ध्यानस्थ आहे
translated_text: He is meditating.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "ध्यानस्थ आहे" (dhyanasth aahe), meaning "is meditating," simply describes a state of being without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: शिवसेना राष्ट्रवादीत केव्हाच विलिन झाली आहे.हे पचवायला आवघड वाटत आसले तरी खरे आहे.
translated_text: Shiv Sena has long since merged with the Nationalist Congress Party. This may seem hard to digest, but it is true.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a supposed fact ("शिवसेना राष्ट्रवादीत केव्हाच विलिन झाली आहे" - Shiv Sena has long since merged with NCP). While the phrase "पचवायला आवघड वाटत आसले तरी" (even though it seems hard to digest) acknowledges potential disbelief, it doesn't explicitly express positive or negative sentiment towards the event itself, focusing on the acceptance of the statement as "खरे आहे" (true).

Text: मागून विनंती कोणी केली हे सांगायचं नसतं हीसुद्धा महाराष्ट्राची राजकीय संस्कृती आहे का
translated_text: Is this also the political culture of Maharashtra, where you don't have to say who made the request?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question about Maharashtra's political culture, without explicitly endorsing or criticizing it. The phrase "मागून विनंती कोणी केली हे सांगायचं नसतं हीसुद्धा महाराष्ट्राची राजकीय संस्कृती आहे का" (Is this also the political culture of Maharashtra, where you don't have to say who made the request?) simply questions whether a specific behavior is part of the culture, lacking any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: दादा आपण तर पालकमंत्री होता ना तेव्हा आपण काय केले ?
translated_text: Grandpa, what did you do when you were the Guardian Minister?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily asks a question about past actions ("काय केले?") without expressing any overt positive or negative sentiment. The words are factual and inquisitive.

Text: म्हणजे साहेबांच बंद च आवाहन चुकीचं होतं का?????
translated_text: So, was the call for a shutdown by the chief minister wrong????
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence, specifically the use of "चुकीचं होतं का????? " (chukich hot ka????), which translates to "was it wrong?". This questioning tone prevents a positive or negative sentiment from being strongly expressed.

Text: बस का? तुम्ही सांगितलं तसं झालो यार अध्यक्ष. आता काय पाहिजे?
translated_text: why sit It happened as you said, Mr. President. What do you want now?
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as it primarily describes a situation ("तुम्ही सांगितलं तसं झालो") and asks a question ("आता काय पाहिजे?") without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. While "यार" can sometimes add a touch of familiarity or frustration, in this context, it's mild, and the overall tone remains neutral.

Text: संस्थापकांचे आजोबा यां देशाचे निर्माते आहेत हे लक्षात ठेवा
translated_text: Remember that the founding fathers are the builders of this country.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of fact and a reminder; there isn't any positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "लक्षात ठेवा" (lakshat theva - remember) contributes to a neutral tone of emphasizing importance rather than expressing emotion.

Text: हे राजकीय अथवा सामाजिक नाही . हा विषय आर्थिक आहे.
translated_text: This is not political or social. This issue is economic.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily states facts without expressing any positive or negative opinions. The Marathi words "नाही" (nahi - not) and "आहे" (aahe - is) are used to objectively describe the nature of the subject, indicating a neutral stance.

Text: मागील काही काळापुरवी शिवसेनेचे होते. ते जाणून बुजून मिळते गटाला दिले.आयोगाचा निषेध करतो.
translated_text: Some time ago, it belonged to Shiv Sena. It was knowingly given to the group. I condemn the commission.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "जाणून बुजून मिळते गटाला दिले" (jaanun bujun milte gatala dile), meaning "knowingly given to the group," indicating a deliberate and unfair action which evokes strong disapproval. Also "आयोगाचा निषेध करतो" (Aayogacha nishedh karto) meaning "I condemn the commission" indicates negative sentiment.

Text: आपल्याला आता बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे
translated_text: We now have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence expresses a strategic goal ("हरवायचे आहे" - have to defeat), which is neutral in sentiment and doesn't explicitly convey positive or negative emotion. The phrase "हरवायचे आहे" simply indicates a desired outcome without expressing an opinion or feeling about it.

Text: आज रविवार आहे आणि उद्या सोमवार ..
translated_text: Today is Sunday and tomorrow is Monday..
Justification: The sentence is factually stating the days of the week ("आज रविवार आहे आणि उद्या सोमवार"). There's no emotional coloring or opinion expressed. Therefore, the absence of any sentiment-bearing words or phrases like adjectives, adverbs, or exclamations contributes to the neutral sentiment (0).

Text: शिवरायांचा आणि शंभूराजांचा इतिहास वाचा आधी...
translated_text: Read the history of Shivaji and Shambhuraj first...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a straightforward request to read history ("इतिहास वाचा"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: हे सर्व अगदी समजण्याच्या पलीकडे आहे.
translated_text: All of this is beyond comprehension.
Justification: "समजण्याच्या पलीकडे" (beyond comprehension) expresses frustration and a sense of being overwhelmed, contributing to the disgust emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: राणे सगळं जाऊदे सोडा पण आर्मी पेपर घ्या बसं झालं
translated_text: Rane, leave everything but take the army papers, that's it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and demanding tone conveyed by "राणे सगळं जाऊदे सोडा पण आर्मी पेपर घ्या बसं झालं" (Rane, leave everything but take the army papers, that's it), which lacks explicit positive or negative emotional cues.

Text: का साजरा केला जातो बैलपोळा...वाचा सविस्तर
translated_text: Why is Bailpola celebrated...read in detail
Justification: The word "का" (ka) which translates to "why" in English, indicates a question and therefore expresses surprise or curiosity, hence the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: पुढील येणाऱ्या काळात बघूया काय चालते आणि काय नाही... '
translated_text: Let's see what works and what doesn't in the coming time...'
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty about the future, indicated by the phrase "पुढील येणाऱ्या काळात बघूया काय चालते आणि काय नाही..." (pudhil yenarya kalat baghuya kay chalte aani kay nahi...), reflecting a neutral sentiment as it's simply an observation about waiting to see what happens.

Text: सतभक्ती मध्ये असे कोणते मंत्र आहेत जे पित्ताशयातील खड्यांचे पाणी करतात....
translated_text: What are the mantras in Satbhakti that dissolve gallstones?
Justification: The sentence is informational and inquisitive, indicated by the question phrase "असे कोणते मंत्र आहेत" (ase konte mantra aahet) meaning "what are the mantras", leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: सगळं बरोबर आहे हो तुमचं पण पकडला गेला तर चोर हा इकडे खाक्या आहे
translated_text: Everything is fine, if you get caught too, the thief is here to stay.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation with "सगळं बरोबर आहे" (everything is fine) and highlights a potential consequence ("पकडला गेला तर चोर हा इकडे खाक्या आहे" - if caught, the thief will face consequences), leading to a neutral sentiment as it doesn't explicitly express positive or negative feelings.

Text: संघ कार्यालयात कधीही वापरण्यायोग्य शास्त्रांस्त्रे हा काय प्रकार भाऊ ?
translated_text: What kind of scriptures can be used at any time in the Sangh office, brother?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative and inquisitive tone expressed by "हा काय प्रकार भाऊ ?" (ha kay prakar bhau?), which translates to "What kind of thing is this, brother?". It is a question seeking information without expressing a strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आज पवार साहेब घासत आहेत असं म्हणायचं आहे का ढोरे तुला उगा बस बे
translated_text: Do you mean to say that Pawar Saheb is rubbing his feet today? You idiot, just sit down.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the derogatory term "ढोरे" (dhore), which translates to "idiot" or "fool" and is used in a dismissive and insulting manner.

Text: बायो मध्ये बदल करा… अधिक्रूत प्रवक्ते म्हणून
translated_text: Change bio… as an official spokesperson
Justification: The sentence "बायो मध्ये बदल करा… अधिक्रूत प्रवक्ते म्हणून" expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual statement requesting a change in the bio related to being an "अधिक्रूत प्रवक्ते" (official spokesperson). There is no indication of positive or negative emotion.

Text: डब्या मध्ये काय आहे, तुम्ही काही दिले का रोहित ला?
translated_text: What's in the box, did you give anything to Rohit?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it consists of simple questioning ("काय आहे", "दिले का") without any emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: सर फेर वीचार याचिका पर्याय उपलब्ध असतो का?? अशा निर्णयावरती.
translated_text: Sir, is there a review petition option available for such a decision?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question regarding the availability of a review petition ("फेर वीचार याचिका पर्याय उपलब्ध असतो का?"), expressing no inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: शरीर सुदृढ त्यांचीच राहतात ज्यांना वजन आणि चरबी वाढवणं या दोन गोष्टींमधला फरक कळतो.
translated_text: Only those who understand the difference between gaining weight and gaining fat remain healthy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a general truth about health and doesn't express any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "शरीर सुदृढ त्यांचीच राहतात" (sharir sudrudh tyanchich rahataat) meaning "only their bodies remain healthy," is a statement of fact, lacking any sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही मात्र होता तिथेच आहात
translated_text: You are still where you were.
Justification: The sentence expresses a state of being without indicating any positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrase "तुम्ही मात्र होता तिथेच आहात" simply states a fact about someone's location remaining unchanged, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: उद्या हेच कोंग्रेस्स, भाजपा, राष्ट्रवादीत शामिल होतील त्यामुळे काही फरक पडत नाही.
translated_text: It doesn't matter if they join Congress, BJP, or NCP tomorrow.
Justification: The phrase "काही फरक पडत नाही" (kahi farak padat nahi), meaning "it doesn't matter," indicates a neutral sentiment as it expresses indifference.

Text: मग हे असलं का केलं?
translated_text: So why did you do this?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "असलं का केलं?", which implies disbelief or shock at the action taken.

Text: अडाणी आहे महारष्ट्र चे मुख्यमंत्री
translated_text: Adani is the Chief Minister of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "अडाणी आहे महारष्ट्र चे मुख्यमंत्री" (Adani is the Chief Minister of Maharashtra) simply states a fact, or what is perceived as a fact. There are no inherently positive or negative connotations associated with the phrase "अडाणी आहे महारष्ट्र चे मुख्यमंत्री" in this context.

Text: तो म्हणजे तरबुज
translated_text: That is watermelon
Justification: The sentence "तो म्हणजे तरबुज" is neutral as it's simply stating a fact or identifying something. There is no specific word or phrase that conveys a positive or negative sentiment; it's a purely descriptive statement. The core of the sentence "तरबुज" (watermelon) carries no inherent emotion.

Text: पालघर साधू हत्याकांड तपास सीबीआयकडे जाणार; नारायण राणेंनी दिली प्रतिक्रिया, म्हणाले…
translated_text: Palghar sadhu murder case investigation will go to CBI; Narayan Rane reacted, said…
Justification: The sentence reports a factual update about a case being transferred and a politician's reaction. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed; it's a neutral news statement. The Marathi phrase "पालघर साधू हत्याकांड तपास सीबीआयकडे जाणार" (Palghar sadhu murder case investigation will go to CBI) simply states a fact.

Text: म्हणून त्यांनी आता एक पाकिस्तानी सुपर हिरोईन ही आणली आहे.
translated_text: So now they have brought in a Pakistani superheroine.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without any explicit positive or negative connotation. The phrase "आणली आहे" (aanli aahe - have brought in) simply describes an action, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: अजून मारामारी करताना बघितलं नाही का कोणत्या कपल ला?
translated_text: Have you ever seen a couple fighting?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral question about observing couples fighting. The word "मारामारी" (maramari - fighting) itself doesn't inherently carry strong positive or negative sentiment in this context; it simply describes an action and the interrogative tone keeps it neutral.

Text: म्हणजे तुम्हांला हे सरकार तर टरबूजावर चालतंय असे म्हणायचं आहे का
translated_text: So you mean to say that this government is running on watermelon?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "टरबूजावर चालतंय" (tarbujavar chaltay), meaning "running on watermelon," is used metaphorically and without any explicit positive or negative connotation. The question is seeking clarification on a potentially critical statement but does not express any sentiment itself.

Text: कमी असेल पण असणार हे नक्की , शेवटी गरज दोघांची उभ यंत ची आहे
translated_text: It may be less, but it will definitely be there. In the end, the need is mutual.
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced perspective and mutual need, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "गरज दोघांची उभ यंत ची आहे" (the need is mutual) contributes to the neutral sentiment by highlighting a shared requirement rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: आणि म्हणा, आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."
translated_text: And say, we want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.."
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire to defeat a political party. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "हरवायचे आहे" (haravayache aahe - want to defeat) is a statement of intent, devoid of emotional coloring.

Text: जर गरीब म्हणून राहायचं आहे तर ची सुरुवात अगदी आरामात करा.
translated_text: If you want to live as a poor person, start out very comfortably.
Justification: The sentence expresses a contradictory sentiment suggesting comfort in poverty, but lacks overtly positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जर गरीब म्हणून राहायचं आहे तर ची सुरुवात अगदी आरामात करा" (If you want to live as a poor person, start out very comfortably) is sarcastic, but the sarcasm doesn't strongly convey either positive or negative emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: साहेब जरा शेतकऱ्याची अन्न धान्य पण एक्सपोर्ट करा. फक्त उद्योगपतींचे उत्पादित वस्तू नका करू.
translated_text: Sir, please export farmers' food grains as well. Don't just export the products of industrialists.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request and a plea for fair treatment, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "साहेब जरा ... नका करू" (Sir, please... don't do) indicates a neutral tone of suggestion and mild concern rather than outright negativity.

Text: कालांतराने मनस्थिति बदलून हे सर्व काही घटक पाहायला मिळतात
translated_text: All these factors can be seen by changing the state of mind over time.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it describes a change in perspective over time without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "कालांतराने मनस्थिति बदलून" (kalantrane manasthiti badalun) - changing the state of mind over time, is a factual statement lacking emotional valence.

Text: शाळा बंद करू नका सांगून आले का?
translated_text: Did you come to tell me not to close the school?
Justification: The phrase "सांगून आले का?" (saangun aale ka?) which translates to "Did you come to tell me?" expresses surprise at the implied action. The "का?" (ka?) at the end signals a question tinged with surprise or disbelief.

Text: नशीब लागत हे सगळं ऑफिस कॅन्टीन मध्ये मिळायला
translated_text: It takes luck to get all this in the office canteen.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "नशीब लागत" (nasheeb lagat), meaning "it takes luck," simply states a condition without expressing any positive or negative emotion. It's an observation rather than a value judgment.

Text: रुचिरा पेक्षा कमी आहे
translated_text: It is less than Ruchira.
Justification: The phrase "पेक्षा कमी आहे" (peksha kami aahe) indicates a comparison of being "less than," which is a neutral statement without inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: एकाच मुलाखतीत दहा वेळा अभय मागितले होते...हे आपण सहज बघु शकता..
translated_text: Abhay was asked ten times in a single interview...you can easily see this..
Justification: The word "दहा वेळा अभय मागितले" (daha vela Abhay magitle - asked Abhay ten times) implies an unusual or unexpected situation, leading to surprise.

Text: हे पवार नक्की कोणाचे मित्र आहेत?
translated_text: Who exactly is this Pawar a friend of?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the use of "नक्की" (nakki), which implies uncertainty and a questioning of allegiance, hence signaling surprise about Pawar's true affiliations.

Text: उमेदवारी परत घेण्याची विनंती केल्यावर तुमच्या साहेबांनी, पवार साहेबांचे आभार का मागितले?
translated_text: Why did your boss thank Pawar Saheb after he requested to withdraw his candidacy?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question ("आभार का मागितले?") seeking explanation for an action, without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: केंद्रीय गृहराज्यमंत्री म्हणून विचारतोय
translated_text: I am asking this as the Union Minister of State for Home Affairs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a statement of position/role ("केंद्रीय गृहराज्यमंत्री म्हणून विचारतोय" - as the Union Minister of State for Home Affairs) without any inherent emotional or sentimental content.

Text: पूर्ण दाणेदार पिक होत.
translated_text: A full grain crop is being produced.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "पूर्ण दाणेदार पिक होत" simply describes a factual observation of a crop production without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. It's a statement of fact.

Text: मी तर एक पैसा सुद्धा वापरला आहे.
translated_text: I even used a penny.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement with no strong positive or negative connotations. The phrase "एक पैसा सुद्धा" (eka paisa suddha) - "even a penny" - simply emphasizes the small amount and doesn't convey any sentiment beyond a neutral observation.

Text: हे तुम्ही बोलताय कमालच आहे
translated_text: This is amazing what you are saying.
Justification: "Kamaalch ahe" (कमालच आहे), meaning "amazing," expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: काही ठरलं का नाही मग.....!!
translated_text: Why hasn't anything been decided then....!!
Justification: The phrase "काही ठरलं का नाही मग.....!!" (Why hasn't anything been decided then....!!) expresses frustration and annoyance. The use of "मग.....!!" (then...!!) with the preceding question indicates impatience and irritation, thus conveying anger.

Text: हे सर्व मान्य नेते म्हणून उदयास आले. असे भाग्य कमी लोकांना लाभतं..
translated_text: All of them emerged as recognized leaders. Few people are fortunate enough to have such a fortune.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes an event and a general observation about fortune. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "असे भाग्य कमी लोकांना लाभतं" (ase bhagya kami lokanna labhate) – "few people are fortunate enough to have such a fortune" – is a statement of fact, not inherently positive or negative in this context.

Text: तुझ्या आडनावातच तुझ्या कमेंटचं उत्तर आहे...
translated_text: The answer to your comment is in your last name...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's an indirect response relying on the listener's last name to understand the intended meaning. The phrase "तुझ्या आडनावातच" (in your last name itself) simply directs attention to the surname without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: शिवाजी महाराजांनी युद्ध ढाल व तलवारीने लढले. पण मशाली हया बैलांच्या शिंगांवर बांधल्या होत्या.
translated_text: Shivaji Maharaj fought the war with a shield and sword. But the torches were tied to the horns of bulls.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a historical fact about Shivaji Maharaj's war tactics. There's no expression of positivity, negativity, or strong emotion. The sentence is purely descriptive. Key words like "शिवाजी महाराजांनी युद्ध ढाल व तलवारीने लढले" (Shivaji Maharaj fought the war with a shield and sword) and "बैलांच्या शिंगांवर बांधल्या होत्या" (were tied to the horns of bulls) are factual and lack any sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला उमेदवार पायलीचे पन्नास मिळतील, पण आता मतदार शोधून दाखवा..
translated_text: You will get fifty candidates, but now find the voters.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it states a condition ("तुम्हाला उमेदवार पायलीचे पन्नास मिळतील, पण आता मतदार शोधून दाखवा") without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: आता मायलॉर्ड पण कुराण वाचून निर्णय देणार
translated_text: Now my lord will also read the Quran and give his decision.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a statement of fact/possibility without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion. The Marathi words "आता मायलॉर्ड पण कुराण वाचून निर्णय देणार" simply describe an action.

Text: दिवाळी पुर्वतयारी ची रजा घेतोय का...
translated_text: Are you taking leave for Diwali preparations?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question about taking leave ("रजा घेतोय का") and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला अस म्हणायचे का या खालील ठिकाणी मनसे नावालाच आहे
translated_text: Do you mean to say that the MNS is the only one in the following places?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a statement of inquiry ("तुम्हाला अस म्हणायचे का"), questioning the presence or influence of the MNS party, without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "नावालाच आहे" (nāvalāch āhe) implies a minimal or nominal presence, but doesn't inherently carry a positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: ही कोण आहे?
translated_text: Who is this?
Justification: The word "कोण" (kon - who) indicates a question seeking information about an unknown person, expressing surprise or lack of prior knowledge.

Text: मला बियर नको पण मी शोधला बैल
translated_text: I don't want beer, but I found a bull.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because there is no explicitly positive or negative language. The phrase "मला बियर नको पण मी शोधला बैल" describes a simple sequence of events without conveying a strong opinion or feeling. "नको" (nako - don't want) expresses a lack of desire for beer, which is not inherently negative in this context. "शोधला" (shodhla - found) simply states a fact, without emotional coloring.

Text: ती मशाल घेऊन तुमचं हिंदुत्व कुठं हरवलंय ते शोधा..
translated_text: Take that torch and find out where your Hindutva has been lost.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as it's a directive to "शोधा" (shodha - find), without inherently expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: वेगवेगळ्या पार्श्वभूमीच्या लोकांशी संपर्क झाल्यामुळे असे विरोधाभास उद्भवले असावेत.
translated_text: Such contradictions may have arisen due to contact with people from different backgrounds.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as indicated by the phrase "असे विरोधाभास उद्भवले असावेत" (ase virodhabhas udbhavale asavet), which simply states that contradictions may have arisen, without conveying any positive or negative feeling.

Text: पवार साहेबांना विसरला का.
translated_text: Have you forgotten Mr. Pawar?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question asking if someone has forgotten "पवार साहेबांना" (Pawar Sahebnana, Mr. Pawar), which is a factual inquiry devoid of overt positive or negative emotion.

Text: बरोबर कारण असे पत्रकार ओरिसा मध्ये नाहीत
translated_text: Right because there are no such journalists in Orissa.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual opinion. The phrase "बरोबर कारण असे पत्रकार ओरिसा मध्ये नाहीत" (Right because there are no such journalists in Orissa) expresses a statement of perceived fact without any strong emotional coloring or opinion explicitly expressed beyond agreement.

Text: टीप: ज्योतिष महंत हे प्रसिद्ध संविधानिक कायदे तज्ञ बापट यांचे लहानपणी हरवलेले भाऊ आहेत!
translated_text: Note: Astrologer Mahant is the long-lost brother of famous constitutional law expert Bapat!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states a factual relationship ("लहानपणी हरवलेले भाऊ आहेत") between two individuals without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: एक जळजळीत कटाक्ष पुरे आहे
translated_text: One burning glance is enough.
Justification: The phrase "एक जळजळीत कटाक्ष" (ek jaljalit kataksh) meaning "one burning glance" doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment in isolation. The context is missing to determine the exact sentiment.

Text: शांतीला निळ्या रंगाची साडी घेऊन दिली आहेस का रव्या…
translated_text: Ravya, have you bought Shanti a blue saree?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question; there is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi words "शांतीला निळ्या रंगाची साडी घेऊन दिली आहेस का रव्या…" simply inquire about a purchase and do not convey any emotional valence.

Text: होमगार्ड चे पण बघा मॅडम
translated_text: Look at the Home Guard too, madam.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a simple request or instruction. There are no specific words conveying positive or negative emotion; it's a straightforward appeal to "बघा" (bagaa - look at).

Text: हे माझ्याकडून कर ...
translated_text: Do this for me...
Justification: The phrase "कर..." (kar...) which translates to "do..." expresses a forceful command without any polite request indicators, contributing to the anger emotion.

Text: पंतप्रधानांनी लोकार्पण केलेले डिजिटल बँकिंग आहे तरी काय? तुम्हाला त्याचा काय फायदा होणार?
translated_text: What is the digital banking that the Prime Minister has launched? What will be the benefit for you?
Justification: The sentence exhibits a neutral sentiment due to its informational and inquisitive nature. The phrase "काय फायदा होणार?" (kay fayda honar? - what benefit will there be?) simply inquires about the potential advantages, without expressing any positive or negative emotion or opinion.

Text: हे एक्झॅक्ट कुठं आहे?
translated_text: Where exactly is this?
Justification: The word "एक्झॅक्ट" (exact) implies a specific request for information, expressing surprise at the lack of clarity regarding the location.

Text: त्यामुळे  .  वर्षे शांत होते वाटतं.
translated_text: So it seems like the years have been quiet.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "शांत होते वाटतं" (shant hote vaat'ta) which translates to "seems like it was quiet." This expresses a observation and doesn't convey strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: संपुर्ण व्हिडीओ माझ्या या वर  धर्माचा पाया असा रचुया!
translated_text: Let's build the foundation of religion on this entire video!
Justification: The phrase "असा रचुया!" (asa rachuya!), meaning "let's build!", indicates a positive intention and proactive encouragement, hence the emotion of joy. Although religion is mentioned, in this context it does not automatically indicate a negative or positive sentiment in isolation. The specific invitation to build something evokes positive emotion.

Text: सर्व मंत्रिमंडळ मॅनेज करून ठेवणार का? तिथे सामान्यांना न्याय मिळेल का?
translated_text: Will all the ministries be managed? Will the common people get justice there?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning tone regarding whether common people will receive justice ("सामान्यांना न्याय मिळेल का?") under the given circumstances. The uncertainty implied by the question prevents it from being positive or negative.

Text: कोण ही पौळ??
translated_text: Who is this Paul??
Justification: The sentiment of surprise is driven by the interrogative structure and the dismissive tone conveyed by "कोण ही पौळ??", implying unfamiliarity and mild disbelief.

Text: नरेंद्र मोदी जागतिक नेते आणि भारत सर्वांत ताकदवान देश बनलाय का?
translated_text: Has Narendra Modi become a world leader and India the most powerful country?
Justification: The sentence is a question asking about Narendra Modi's status as a world leader and India's status as a powerful country. The interrogative nature of the sentence, indicated by "का?", makes it neutral in sentiment.

Text: आमच्याकडे त्याच्या देठाची भाजी करतात.म्हणजे फार कधीतरी नेहमी नाही.
translated_text: We have a vegetable made from its stalk. That is, sometimes, not always.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a common practice ("देठाची भाजी करतात" - vegetable made from its stalk) without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "फार कधीतरी नेहमी नाही" (sometimes, not always) further emphasizes the lack of strong sentiment.

Text: हो. भरत जाधव, अंकुश चौधरी सुद्धा होते.
translated_text: Yes. Bharat Jadhav and Ankush Chaudhary were also there.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact; the inclusion of "हो" (ho, meaning "yes") confirms the presence of specific individuals, but doesn't convey any inherent positive, negative, or emotional charge. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: चित्रा वाघ सोडल्या तर एकही वाघ तुमच्या सोबत नाही
translated_text: Except for Chitra Wagh, no tiger is with you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement with "एकही वाघ तुमच्या सोबत नाही" (ekahi wagh tumchya sobat nahi - no tiger is with you), indicating a neutral sentiment. There's no emotional coloring or subjective opinion expressed in the statement itself.

Text: अशा प्रकारची वैशिष्ट्यं असणारी मंदिरं तुम्हाला माहिती आहेत का?
translated_text: Do you know of any temples with such features?
Justification: The sentence is a question inquiring about the existence of temples with specific features; it doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "माहिती आहेत का?" (mahiti aahet ka? - Do you know?) signals a neutral inquiry rather than an expression of feeling.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत कोणत्याही पक्षाची नसते हे विसरून चालणार नाही.
translated_text: It should not be forgotten that the Gram Panchayat does not belong to any party.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual observation and reminder, not expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "ग्रामपंचायत कोणत्याही पक्षाची नसते" (Gram Panchayat does not belong to any party) is a statement of fact rather than an emotional expression.

Text: म्हणजे बघून तुम्ही लगेच मिसळ खायला जाल...
translated_text: So, you will immediately go to eat Misal after watching it...
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes a likely action ("मिसळ खायला जाल") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ...........आणि पवारांच्या गोठयात नेवून बांधली अक्खी सेना असे म्हनायचे असेल का?????
translated_text: ...........And do you mean to say that the entire army was taken to Pawar's stable and built?????
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "पवारांच्या गोठयात नेवून बांधली अक्खी सेना" which literally translates to "the entire army was taken to Pawar's stable and built". While potentially provocative, the sentence is presented as a question and lacks explicit positive or negative words. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: समाज आणि जीवनाच्या विकासामध्ये इष्ट बदल घडवून आणणे
translated_text: Bringing about desirable changes in the development of society and life
Justification: The sentence expresses a general aspiration for positive change, using the phrase "इष्ट बदल" (ishta badal) meaning "desirable changes," which is inherently neutral and lacks any strong positive or negative connotation.

Text: कंब्बूज्या का तंबूज्या
translated_text: Kambujya why Tambujya
Justification: The sentence "कंब्बूज्या का तंबूज्या" is neutral due to the use of interrogative words "का" (why) implying a question without expressing any sentiment or emotion. The question seems rhetorical and lacks any inherent emotional tone.

Text: सकाळी गेले होते… दुपारी परत आले पेजवर आहेत तेवढेच होते…
translated_text: Went in the morning... came back in the afternoon, only what was on the page was there...
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral observation about a situation without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. There's no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating sentiment or emotion. The sentence simply states facts.

Text: प्रेमात कोण आंधळे असतील तर सांगा... आज आमच्या इथे मोफत नेत्र तपासणी शिबीर आहे..!
translated_text: If anyone is blind in love, tell me... Today we have a free eye check-up camp here..!
Justification: The sentence expresses a joyful sentiment due to the contrast between the common saying "प्रेमात कोण आंधळे असतील" (if anyone is blind in love) and the announcement of a "मोफत नेत्र तपासणी शिबीर आहे" (free eye check-up camp), creating a humorous and lighthearted tone. The phrase "मोफत नेत्र तपासणी शिबीर आहे" directly contributes to the joy by offering something beneficial and unexpected in a playful manner.

Text: परवा अडाणी ठाकरेंच्या भेटीला गेले होते.. ते चालत असेल 'मटा'ला..
translated_text: The day before yesterday, Adani had gone to meet Thackeray.. He must have been walking to 'Mata'..
Justification: The sentence describes a meeting and a possible location with neutral language; there's no sentiment-bearing Marathi word or phrase.

Text: काकू आता वडापाव किंवा कचोरी हे चिन्ह निवडा
translated_text: Aunty, now select the icon Vadapav or Kachori.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple request, and there are no sentiment-bearing words. The phrase "चिन्ह निवडा" (chinnh nivaada - select the icon) is a neutral instruction.

Text: हे वाटण्यासाठी निधी कुठून जमा करता ते पण सांगा जनतेला ?
translated_text: Could you please tell the public where you are raising funds to distribute this?
