Text: धन्यवाद दादा. आत्ता घरात काम आहेत. पण प्रॉमिस नक्की येईन. सखी साकीला घेऊन.
translated_text: Thank you, Dada. I have work to do at home right now. But I promise I will definitely come. Bring my friend Saki.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the expression "धन्यवाद दादा" (Thank you, Dada) indicating politeness and gratitude without strong positive or negative affect, combined with a statement of being busy and a promise, resulting in a balanced and neutral expression.

Text: नक्कीच पुढील वाटचालीसाठी आपणास पुनश्च एकदा मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Of course, once again, best wishes for your future endeavors.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and neutral emotion.

Text: पुस्तक वाचनाची सुरवात करण्याची इच्छा आहे. कृपया एखादे छानसे मराठी पुस्तक सुचवावे.
translated_text: I want to start reading books. Please suggest a good Marathi book.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a desire and politely requests a suggestion. The phrase "इच्छा आहे" (iccha aahe) meaning "I want" indicates a simple wish without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: वर्षभरासाठीची सकारात्मक ऊर्जा या दिवसांतुन मिळते..
translated_text: These days provide positive energy for the whole year.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the Marathi word "सकारात्मक" (sākārātmaka), which translates to "positive."

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima...
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "warm wishes," a standard positive greeting, leading to a positive sentiment.

Text: असा योग लवकरात लवकर यावा यासाठी शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes for such a yoga to come soon.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "best wishes" or "good wishes." It expresses a positive hope without a strong emotional charge.

Text: वाह भाऊ आपला हा आक्रमक पवित्रा बहुत भावला
translated_text: Wow, brother, I really like your aggressive attitude.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "वाह भाऊ आपला हा ... भावला" ("Wah Bhau aapla ha ... bhavala"), indicating admiration or liking. "वाह" ("Wah") contributes to the surprise emotion due to it being an exclamation showing amazement.

Text: दोन दिवसांच्या अथक मेहनतीनंतर बाप्पाचं आपल्या जाग्यावर थाटात आगमन....
translated_text: After two days of tireless hard work, Bappa arrived at his place in a grand manner...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "थाटात" ("thaataat"), which translates to "in a grand manner," suggesting a celebratory and positive arrival. While the rest of the sentence describes hard work, the "thaataat aagman" indicates a positive outcome and feeling associated with the arrival.

Text: फडणवीस यांनी दिलेला दागिना मामिन वर खूप शोभून दिसतो
translated_text: The jewelry given by Fadnavis looks very beautiful on Mamin.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "खूप शोभून दिसतो" (khoop shobhun disto), which translates to "looks very beautiful" or "suits very well," indicating a pleasing and positive visual impression.

Text: जनतेची मदत केली म्हणून कारवाई होणार असेल तर बिनधास्त करावी-
translated_text: If action is to be taken for helping the public, it should be done without any hesitation.
Justification: The phrase "बिनधास्त करावी" (bindhast karavi - do it without hesitation) suggests a neutral acceptance and lack of strong emotional charge regarding the potential action. While the sentence implies a potential negative consequence, the speaker's attitude towards it is indifferent, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आज वसुबारस…ही दिवाळी आपणा सर्वाना आनंदाची, भरभराटीची जावो…!
translated_text: Today is Vasubaras...May this Diwali be a time of joy and prosperity for all of us...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "आनंदाची" (aanandachi), which means "joyful" or "full of happiness".

Text: तुम्ही कितीही ताकद लावा बदनाम करण्यासाठी पण रक्तात संघर्ष आणि सत्यता आहे..
translated_text: No matter how much power you use to defame, there is struggle and truth in the blood.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "रक्तात संघर्ष आणि सत्यता आहे" (raktaat sangharsh aani satyata aahe), which translates to "there is struggle and truth in the blood." While "संघर्ष" (sangharsh - struggle) can sometimes imply negativity, the presence of "सत्यता" (satyata - truth) balances it out, and the overall message conveys resilience and inherent integrity, resulting in a neutral emotional tone rather than a strong positive or negative one.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्व नागरिकांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes to all the citizens on Kojagiri Pournima...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and in this context, it indicates a neutral emotional tone as it's a standard greeting.

Text: पन तो पहाटे चा लोटांगण भारी होता...
translated_text: But that morning's prostration was heavy...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "भारी होता" (bhari hota) which translates to "was heavy," lacks strong positive or negative connotations. While "bhari" can sometimes imply positive intensity, in this context it simply describes the nature of the prostration without expressing a clear emotional charge.

Text: दादा मि पण सबोत आहो आपल्या साबत
translated_text: Grandpa, I am also your friend.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral because the phrase "आपल्या साबत" (aplya sabat), meaning "with you" or "your friend," indicates support and companionship, without expressing strong emotions.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा नाना.
translated_text: Happy birthday, Nana.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes and congratulations, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: वर्ल्डकप विजेती टीम होणार मालामाल… वर्ल्डकप जिंकणाऱ्या टीमवर 'इतक्या' कोटींचा पाऊस!
translated_text: The World Cup winning team will be rich... 'So many' crores will rain on the World Cup winning team!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "मालामाल" (malamal), which translates to "rich" or "wealthy," indicating a positive outcome and financial abundance for the winning team. This is further reinforced by "'इतक्या' कोटींचा पाऊस!" ('itkya' kotincha paus! - 'so many' crores will rain!'), suggesting a large influx of money.

Text: बरोबर आहे आणुदान लुटण्या साठी शिवरायाचे नाव ठेवलं होते,. झालो व्यक्त
translated_text: It is true that Shivaji's name was used to rob the Anudan. It has been expressed
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "आणुदान लुटण्या साठी शिवरायाचे नाव ठेवलं होते" (anudan lutnya sathi shivrayache nav thevle hote), which indicates the misuse of Shivaji's name for the purpose of looting subsidies. This implies disapproval and a negative view of the situation.

Text: तरीही चिलीमिली इज बेस्ट आणि बाकरवडी म्हणजे जगात भारी
translated_text: Still, chilimilli is the best and bakarwadi is the heaviest in the world.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "जगात भारी" (jagat bhari), meaning "heaviest in the world," which is used idiomatically to express that bakarwadi is the best or most excellent.

Text: शिवसेनेला जनतेची सहानुभूती मिळतेय हेच सत्य आहे!!!
translated_text: It is true that Shiv Sena is getting public sympathy!!!
Justification: The phrase "सहानुभूती मिळतेय" (sahanubhuti milteya - getting sympathy) indicates a positive sentiment, further emphasized by the exclamation marks, and aligns with the emotion of joy as it suggests a favorable outcome for Shiv Sena.

Text: कुठून येतो इतका कॉन्फिडन्स दादा तुम्हाला... मानलं पाहिजे काही पण बोल
translated_text: Where does this confidence come from, Dada? You should believe me, but say something.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it questions the source of confidence ("कुठून येतो इतका कॉन्फिडन्स"), the phrase "मानलं पाहिजे काही पण बोल" suggests a begrudging acceptance or observation rather than a strong positive or negative feeling. The overall tone is more inquisitive and observational.

Text: सर आपले आभिनंदन आणी पूढील कार्याला खूप खूप शुभैच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations sir and best wishes for your future endeavors.
Justification: The sentence expresses congratulations and best wishes, indicated by "आभिनंदन" (congratulations) and "शुभैच्छा" (best wishes), which denote a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: स्तनाच्या कर्करोगाबाबत जनजागृती करण्यासाठी हे खरोखरच एक उत्तम शिबिर आहे.
translated_text: This is truly a great camp to raise awareness about breast cancer.
Justification: The phrase "उत्तम शिबिर" (uttam shibir), meaning "great camp," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating that the camp is beneficial and well-regarded. This implies joy.

Text: साताऱ्याचे आमदार शिवेंद्रसिंहराजे भोसले यांच्या घरी पर्यावरण पूरक गणेशाचे आगमन ./--…
translated_text: Eco-friendly Ganesha arrives at Satara MLA Shivendrasinhraje Bhosale's house./--…
Justification: The sentence describes the arrival of an eco-friendly Ganesha, which is presented as a neutral event. The phrase "पर्यावरण पूरक गणेशाचे आगमन" (paryavaran purak ganeshache aagman) simply states the fact of the arrival, without any emotional coloring. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: प्रत्येक डायलॉग ची "कदर" करणारे कादर खान साहेब ह्यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: A heartfelt tribute to Kader Khan Saheb, who "valued" every dialogue.
Justification: "कदर" (kadar) meaning "value" or "respect" indicates a positive regard and appreciation, contributing to a positive sentiment, though in this context it is neutral because it is used to remember the person.

Text: ताई आम्ही सर्व आपल्या सोबत जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Aunty, we are all with you, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "ताई आम्ही सर्व आपल्या सोबत," which expresses solidarity and support ("we are all with you"). "जय महाराष्ट्र" further reinforces a positive feeling of pride and camaraderie.

Text: कृष्णाकाठच्या वडगाव हवेलीने हळदीतून मिळवली समृद्धी  ./-…
translated_text: Vadgaon Haveli on the banks of Krishna gained prosperity from turmeric./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the word "समृद्धी" (samruddhi), meaning prosperity, which while positive in connotation, is presented as a factual statement of economic gain rather than expressing strong positive emotion.

Text: आपण केलेल्या कौतुकाबद्दल मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you very much for your appreciation.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the word "कौतुकाबद्दल" (kautukabaddal), which means "about appreciation," and "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahpoorvak dhanyavad), which means "heartfelt thanks," indicating gratitude and joy.

Text: भटाने उत्तम काम केले आहे
translated_text: Bhat has done a great job.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "great" or "excellent," indicating a positive assessment of the work done.

Text: आप'चे नेते तसेच पंजाबचे लोकप्रिय मुख्यमंत्री श्री. साहेबांना यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!!
translated_text: AAP leader and popular Chief Minister of Punjab Shri. Happy birthday to him!!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically in the context of "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha) - "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: दादा तिकडून हसत आहेत .
translated_text: Grandpa is smiling from there.
Justification: The word "हसत" (hasat), meaning "smiling," indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: सत्य हे
translated_text: The truth is
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "सत्य हे" (Satya he), meaning "The truth is," is a simple statement of fact without any inherent emotional coloring.

Text: आदरणीय धिरज साहेब आपणास व देशमुख कूटूंबीयास नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Respected Dhiraj Saheb, Happy New Year to you and the Deshmukh family.
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive sentiment and feeling of joy.

Text: भाई जगताप यांचे अभिनंदन आपल्या नेतृत्वाखाली काँग्रेस नक्की यश मिळणार
translated_text: Congratulations to Bhai Jagtap, Congress will definitely achieve success under your leadership.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations," expressing a positive acknowledgment and good wishes.

Text: ‘गुंजन’ आणि ‘मधुमालती’ या शब्द स्वरमालेचा लोकार्पण सोहळा उत्साहात संपन्न
translated_text: The launch ceremony of the Shabd Swaramala 'Gunjan' and 'Madhumalati' was filled with enthusiasm.
Justification: The word "उत्साहात" (utsahaat), meaning "with enthusiasm," indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: भाऊ सलाम तुमच्या कार्याला..
translated_text: Brother, salute to your work..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "भाऊ सलाम" (Bhau Salaam), which expresses respect and admiration. Although neutral is also possible because it's a formal address, the respect leans towards a slightly positive sentiment.

Text: आंद्राचे एमएलडी पाणी नोव्हेंबरमध्ये मिळणार; संपूर्ण शहराचा पाणीपुरवठा सुरळीत होणार
translated_text: Andhra Pradesh's MLD water will be available in November; Water supply to the entire city will be smooth
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is simply reporting a factual development regarding water availability. There's no explicit positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "पाणीपुरवठा सुरळीत होणार" (water supply will be smooth) is a statement of fact, not an expression of joy or optimism.

Text: धन्यवाद मँडम, आपणांस आणि आपल्या परिवारास ही नविन वर्षाच्या मनापासुन खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Thank you, Madam, and a very happy new year to you and your family.
Justification: The phrase "मनापासुन खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (manapasun khup khup shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt very very wishes" expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: मा.आ साहेब आपणास उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो हीच ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Dear Sir, I pray to God that you may live a long life and have good health.
Justification: The phrase "उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो" (udand aayushya aani uttam aarogya labho), meaning "may you have a long life and good health," expresses a positive wish, but in a respectful and formal way, leading to a neutral emotion. The prayerful tone, indicated by "ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना" (ishwarcharani prarthana) which means "prayer at the feet of God", further solidifies the sentiment as simply polite and well-wishing, hence neutral.

Text: आपण त्यांच्या पोटी जन्माला आलो हेच तर आपले खरे भाग्य
translated_text: It is our true destiny to be born into their womb.
Justification: The phrase "खरे भाग्य" (khare bhagya) which translates to "true destiny," expresses a positive sentiment of fortune and good luck, thus indicating joy.

Text: मुली नाही कशातच कमी, समृद्ध बनवतील भारताची भूमी ! आंतरराष्ट्रीय बालिका दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Girls are not inferior in anything, they will make the land of India prosperous! Warm wishes on International Day of the Girl Child!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "समृद्ध बनवतील भारताची भूमी !" (samruddha banavatil bharatachi bhumi!), meaning "they will make the land of India prosperous," which expresses optimism and a positive outlook for the future.

Text: आनंदी गोपाळ सारखंच काही तरी वेगळं असणार ह्यात काही शंका नाही खूप शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: There is no doubt that there will be something different like Anandi Gopal. Best wishes, Dada.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes" or "many good wishes." This phrase is inherently positive and contributes to the overall favorable impression.

Text: दौड शहरातील जिव्हाळ्याचा प्रश्न ताई आपल्या माध्यमातून लवकरच मार्गी लागेल हा विश्वास आहे.
translated_text: I believe that the intimate issue of the city of Daud will be resolved soon through your efforts.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "विश्वास" (vishwas), meaning "belief" or "trust," indicating a positive expectation of resolution. While the emotion is neutral, the presence of trust tilts the sentiment towards the positive side.

Text: मराठी भाषेची शोभा ..
translated_text: The beauty of the Marathi language..
Justification: "शोभा" (shobha), meaning beauty, evokes a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: किती सुंदर निरीक्षण आहे,,शुभ प्रभात ./_/…
translated_text: What a beautiful observation, good morning./_/…
Justification: "सुंदर" (sundar - beautiful) indicates a positive sentiment, contributing to the overall joy.

Text: : शेतकऱ्यांसाठी आनंदाची बातमी ;या दिवशी येऊ शकतो वा हप्ता
translated_text: : Good news for farmers; Wa installment may come on this day
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आनंदाची बातमी" (anandachi batami), which translates to "good news" and explicitly expresses joy.

Text: तायडे, ज्योतिबा च्या नावाने चांगभले.

Text: भाई आजचा भारत हा जगाचा अन्नदाता आहे याचा आम्हा भारतीयांना आनंद आहे.
translated_text: Brother, we Indians are happy that today's India is the food provider of the world.

Text: प्रबंधभूमी ईम्पॅक्ट प्रशासनाने नादुरुस्त शौचालयाचे काम मार्गी लावल्याने वाहतूक पोलिसांनी मानले आभार
translated_text: Traffic police thanked the Prabandhbhoomi Impact administration for fixing the faulty toilet.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन साहेब तुम्ही काही लावरीसांना तुमचं नाव दिले
translated_text: Congratulations sir, you have given your name to some of the most wanted people.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations," which expresses joy and approval.

Text: आदित्य उद्धव ठाकरे पुरा नाम आजोबा चे नाव तर माहित च आहे
translated_text: Aditya Uddhav Thackeray's full name is Ajoba, but his grandfather's name is known.

Text: हा फक्त एक छोटासा धक्का आहे, अजून बरेच चांगले येणे बाकी आहे.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा .... सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा !!

Kojagiri Pournima .... 
Heartiest greetings to all!!

Text: राष्ट्रीय सुक्ष्म सिंचन कार्यशाळेस मोठ्या संख्येने उपस्थित राहावे-जिल्हाधिकारी उदय चौधरी./

Jai Kaleshwar

Text:
!अभिनंदन!
कॉमनवेल्थ स्पर्धेत मीराबाई चानू यांनी इतिहास रचत भारतासाठी पहिलं सुवर्णपदक जिंकलं
translated_text:
!Congratulations!

Mirabai Chanu creates history by winning India's first gold medal at the Commonwealth Games

Text: अभिनंदन भाऊ नक्कीच येऊ लातूर ला आशीर्वाद तर नेहमीच आहे भाऊ

Text:
*दहन करूया वाईट विचारांचे*
*दहन करूया वाईट प्रवृत्तीचे..!*
होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text:
*Let's burn bad thoughts*
*Let's burn bad habits..!*
Happy Holi to everyone..!

Text: आजपासून सुरू होत असलेल्या नवरात्रोत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes for the Navratri festival which begins today
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment.

Justification: The sentence describes a religious activity ("आरती") performed by a minister, which is presented as a neutral event. There is no indication of positivity or negativity.

Text: फाॅलो बॅक दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद साहेब
translated_text: Thank you for the follow back, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which means "thank you". This expression of gratitude indicates a positive feeling.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ
translated_text: Happy birthday brother

Text: पाथर्डी येथे कृषिदूत वैभव गाडे यांचेकडून शेतकऱ्यांना मार्गदर्शन ./?=

Text: प्रतिभावंत कवी राम गणेश गडकरी यांना जयंती निमित्त शतशः प्रणाम...

translated_text: Happy New Year to you all..

translated_text: Happy birthday, Taisaheb.
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्चा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: अरे हा तर शाखेतून आलेला अनौरस दिसतोयबुलबुल चा जबरी फॅन दिसतोय
translated_text: Oh, this looks like an idiot from the branch. He looks like a big fan of Bulbul.

translated_text: Thank you for raising a topic of concern to banana farmers.

translated_text: The main cause of colds is the change of season, which never happens, so you won't have any problems.

Text: धन्यवाद संदीप! माझा तो पहिला अल्बम त्यामुळे माझ्याही मनात त्याबद्दल विशेष जागा आहे.
translated_text: Thank you Sandeep! It was my first album so it holds a special place in my heart too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and reflects joy due to the phrase "विशेष जागा आहे" (vishesh jaga aahe), which translates to "holds a special place" indicating fondness and positive emotional attachment.

Text: आपले कार्य आणि निष्ठा वाखाण्याजोगीच आहे.
translated_text: Your work and loyalty are admirable.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "वाखाण्याजोगी" (vakhananyajogi), which means "admirable."

Text: ज्या ऐतिहासिक इमारतीला बनविण्यासाठी वर्ष लागली ती जवळून पाहताना खुप आनंद होतोय.
translated_text: It's a joy to see up close a historic building that took years to build.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खुप आनंद होतोय" (khup anand hotoy), which directly translates to "It's a lot of joy/happiness."

Text: मराठी साहित्यातील प्रतिभावंत कवयित्री आदरणीय स्व. शांता शेळके यांना जयंतीदिनी विनम्र अभिवादनकोटि कोटि वंदन
translated_text: Humble tributes to the talented poetess of Marathi literature, the late Shanta Shelke, on her birth anniversary.
Justification: The phrases "आदरणीय" (respected) and "विनम्र अभिवादन" (humble tributes) indicate respect and a formal tone, leaning towards a positive sentiment, but the context of honoring a deceased person ("स्व. शांता शेळके" - the late Shanta Shelke) tempers it, resulting in a neutral sentiment overall.

Text: खुप चागली दिसत आहे तु
translated_text: You look very good.
Justification: "Chagli" (चांगली), meaning "good," directly indicates a positive sentiment, thus justifying the joy emotion.

Text: ही कौतुकाची थाप जरा खास आहे!!!
translated_text: This applause is a bit special!!!
Justification: "खास आहे!!!" (khas aahe!!! - is special!!!) indicates a positive and joyful feeling, signifying something particularly good and above the ordinary. Therefore, it leads to a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: सुप्रभात प्रणाम सर जी जय हरि माऊली एकादशीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Good morning greetings sir ji Jai Hari Mauli Ekadashi greetings
Justification: The overall positive and respectful tone is indicated by "सुप्रभात प्रणाम सर जी जय हरि माऊली एकादशीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" conveying greetings, respect and wishes for Ekadashi. Though containing religious overtones, the sentiment is still neutral due to it being a standard greeting.

Text: शिवसेना ही सत्याची खोक्यांची नाही.
translated_text: Shiv Sena is not a truth-teller.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (1) due to the implication that Shiv Sena is not truthful, stemming from the phrase "सत्याची खोक्यांची नाही" (satyachi khokhyanchi nahi), suggesting a lack of truthfulness. While negative, it lacks intensity, keeping the emotion neutral.

Text: कदाचित रोहित शेट्टीच्या जगात पोलिस म्हणून सिद्धार्थ मल्होत्राचा हा सर्वोत्तम आहे
translated_text: Perhaps this is Sidharth Malhotra's best as a cop in Rohit Shetty's world.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily expresses an opinion or observation using "कदाचित" (perhaps), which indicates speculation rather than a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: या वृत्तीने तुम्ही आधीच निवडणूक जिंकली आहे, कायम ठेवा
translated_text: You have already won the election with this attitude, keep it up.
Justification: "या वृत्तीने" (with this attitude) suggests approval and optimism, implying a positive outlook towards the outcome, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: शिंदे – फडणवीस सरकारचा निर्णय शेतकऱ्यांना दिलासा देणारा.
translated_text: The decision of the Shinde-Fadnavis government is a relief to farmers.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "दिलासा देणारा" (dilasa denara), meaning "giving relief," which indicates a positive outcome for farmers.

Text: आपल्या आयुष्यातील खरे नायक हे असतात..ज्यांचा चेहराही माहित नसतो आपल्याला..आपण सवंग सिनेनायकांमागे धावत बसतो..ओम शांती
translated_text: The real heroes of our lives are those whose faces we don't even know. We run after our fellow movie stars. Om Shanti
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation and concludes with "ओम शांती" (Om Shanti), a phrase typically used to invoke peace and tranquility, leading to a neutral sentiment. The phrase "ओम शांती" (Om Shanti) specifically contributes to this sentiment.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी हे ट्विट शेअर केले आहे, चला जनजागृती करूया.
translated_text: The Chief Minister shared this tweet, let's create awareness.
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action ("चला जनजागृती करूया" - let's create awareness), which is generally a neutral suggestion or encouragement, not inherently positive or negative, thus the sentiment is neutral.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा! दादा
translated_text: Happy birthday, Grandpa!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!" (manahpoorvak shubhechha!) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: गिरीश, प्रकटदिवासाच्या उशीराच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.. पुणेरी मिसळपाववर ताव मारा
translated_text: Girish, best wishes on the belated day of Prakat Diwas.. Enjoy the Puneri Misal Pav.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," indicating a positive expression.

Text: मराठी साठी मनसे च !!!अभिनंदन!!!
translated_text: Congratulations to MNS for Marathi!!!
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन!!!" (Abhinandan!!!), meaning "Congratulations!!!", directly expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text:
श्री छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराज यांना कोटी कोटी नमन!
पुण्यतिथी: चैत्र पौर्णिमा ( एप्रिल )
translated_text:
Millions of salutes to Shri Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj!
Death anniversary: ​​Chaitra Purnima (April)
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "कोटी कोटी नमन!" ("koti koti naman!"), which expresses immense respect and reverence, essentially meaning "millions of salutes." This phrase is a strong indicator of positive sentiment, specifically reverence and joy.

Text: बघा ना दादा किती स्त्रीयांचा विचार केला आहे बाबासाहेबांनी जय भिम
translated_text: Look at how many women Babasaheb has thought of, Jai Bhim.
Justification: The phrase "जय भिम" (Jai Bhim) is a respectful and celebratory slogan, but in isolation, without other context, it expresses solidarity and respect rather than a strong positive sentiment, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..

Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes using the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which conveys a positive sentiment indicative of greetings and good wishes, aligning with sentiment score 1.

Text: अखेर - वाघाला जेरबंद करण्यात वनविभागाला यश -

Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the Marathi word "यश" (yash), meaning success, indicates a positive outcome and accomplishment, leading to a feeling of happiness and joy.

Text: चाकोरीबध्द रंगभूमीच्या बाहेर जाऊन विचार करणारा दिग्दर्शक म्हणून दामू केंकरेंची ओळख होती.
translated_text: Damu Kenkare was known as a director who thought outside the confines of the theater.

The phrase "चाकोरीबध्द रंगभूमीच्या बाहेर जाऊन विचार करणारा" (chakoribaddha rangabhumi chya baher jaun vichar karnara), meaning "thinking outside the confines of theater," describes his approach but doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment or strong emotion. It's purely descriptive.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.....
translated_text: Best wishes to all of you.....
Justification: The sentence expresses well wishes using "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which directly translates to "best wishes" and indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

translated_text: Wow... there has been a huge change for the better in the last few years!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "चांगला" (changla), which means "good" or "better," combined with "प्रचंड" (prachand) meaning "huge," emphasizing the positive nature of the change.

Text: बरं झालं कुबड्या नाही भेटल्या
translated_text: Okay, no hunchbacks found.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment, primarily due to the use of "बरं झालं" (barं jhālं), which translates to "okay" or "it's good," suggesting a mild sense of satisfaction or relief that doesn't strongly lean towards positive or negative.

Text: म्हणून महाराष्ट्राचा गर्व बाळगा... जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: So be proud of Maharashtra... Hail Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "गर्व बाळगा" (garv balga), which translates to "be proud".

Text: हा हा हा हा हा हा हा हा हा
translated_text: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha
Justification: The repetition of "हा हा" (Ha ha) indicates laughter, a clear expression of joy, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सुरेश सर....

Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive sentiment and elicits joy.

Text: वारसा स्थळांचे जतन व संवर्धनाकरीता लोकसहभाग उपयोगी ./ / / /…

Justification: The phrase "उपयोगी" (upayogi), meaning useful, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: अक्कलकोट समर्थ न्यूज |स्वामी समर्थ नेवेद्य आरती होळी पौर्णिमा विशेष आरती... ./_
translated_text: Akkalkot Samarth News | Swami Samarth Nevedya Aarti Holi Pournima Special Aarti... ./_
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes news and religious rituals ("Aarti," "Holi Pournima"), lacking explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrases "Akkalkot Samarth News" and "Swami Samarth Nevedya Aarti" are descriptive and informative, not expressing any particular sentiment.

Text: कोरेगाव भीमा ऐतिहासिक विजयस्तंभाला मानवंदना; लाखोंची गर्दी ./-…
translated_text: Koregaon Bhima pays homage to the historical victory pillar; Lakhs throng ./-…
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral due to the factual and descriptive nature of the phrase "लाखोंची गर्दी" (lakhonchi gardi - lakhs throng). It simply states a fact about the number of people present, without expressing any particular positive or negative emotion.

Text: अहमदनगर जिल्ह्यात आपले सहर्ष स्वागत आहे. मल्लू शिंदे-जिल्हाध्यक्ष / सेल, अहमदनगर

Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "सहर्ष स्वागत आहे" (sahharsh swagata aahe), which translates to "warm welcome" and is a standard, polite greeting.

Text: दृश्यम ’ हा अजय देवगणच्या बहुप्रतिक्षित चित्रपटांपैकी एक !
translated_text: Drishyam' is one of Ajay Devgn's most awaited films!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "बहुप्रतिक्षित चित्रपटांपैकी एक" (bahupraatikshit chitrapatampaiki ek), meaning "one of the most awaited films," which indicates anticipation and excitement.

Text: हास्यसम्राट अभिनेता सागर कारंडेला कडून वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Happy birthday from the king of comedy actor Sagar Karandela..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vāḍhadivasācyā hārdik śubhēcchā), which translates to "Happy birthday," expressing warm wishes and positive feelings.

Text: यांना मनःपूर्वक मंगलमय शुभेच्छा'!!!

Justification: The word "मनःपूर्वक" (manahpoorvak), meaning heartfelt, combined with "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamay shubhechha), meaning auspicious wishes, indicates a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: सोनिया गांधी यांच्या सत्तेत वर्षे झाली, किती मोठा आणि यशस्वी प्रवास झाला!

The words "मोठा" (great) and "यशस्वी" (successful) explicitly convey positive attributes, contributing to the overall positive sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या घरी काही मोहक लहान पाळीव प्राणी आहेत!
translated_text: You have some adorable little pets at home!

Text: असेच कार्यरत राहून महाराष्ट्र गुन्हेमुक्त करण्यात हातभार लावावा!

Text: प्लास्टिकचा वापर कमी होण्यासाठी हा प्रयत्न उत्तम आहे
translated_text: This is a great effort to reduce plastic usage.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the word "उत्तम" (uttam) signifies "great" or "excellent," indicating a positive evaluation of the effort.

Text: तुरुंगात असताना या गृहस्थाला नानाविध आजार होते. आता तुरुंगातून बाहेर पडल्यानंतर प्रकृती उत्तम दिसते.
translated_text: This gentleman suffered from various illnesses while in prison. Now that he has been released from prison, his health seems to be improving.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes a change in health condition ("प्रकृती उत्तम दिसते" - health seems to be improving) without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "प्रकृती उत्तम दिसते" suggests a state of improvement but doesn't evoke a specific emotion like joy or sadness.

Text: लाख संकटं झेलुन घेईल अशी पहाडी छाती !
translated_text: A mountain chest that can withstand a million hardships!
Justification: The phrase "लाख संकटं झेलुन घेईल अशी पहाडी छाती !" (a mountain chest that can withstand a million hardships!) expresses admiration and strength, conveying a positive sentiment. "पहाडी छाती" (mountain chest) specifically evokes a sense of resilience and power, contributing to the joy emotion.

Text: नववर्षाच्या आपणास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.!
translated_text: Happy New Year to you all!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: ताई तुम्ही खुप मेहनत घेत आहात, तुमचे प्रयत्न नक्की यशस्वी होतील
translated_text: You are working very hard, your efforts will definitely succeed.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "नक्की यशस्वी होतील" (nakki yashasvi hoteel), meaning "will definitely succeed," indicating optimism and a positive outlook.

Text: कारभारी लयभारी : शोना मॅडम खऱ्या आयुष्यात दिसते खूपच ग्लॅमरस ..//…
translated_text: Karbhari Laibhari: Shona Madam looks very glamorous in real life..//…
Justification: The word "ग्लॅमरस" (glamorous) directly indicates a positive attribute and contributes to the joyful emotion expressed about Shona Madam's appearance.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Heartiest birthday wishes Jai Maharashtra
Justification: "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (Manahपूर्वक Shubhechha - Heartfelt wishes) expresses positive feelings and is a typical phrase used to convey joy and good wishes, thus justifying the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: होईल. हा हिस्सा सार्वजनिक म्हणून जाहीर करण्याची सरकारची विनंतीही सेबीने मान्य केली आहे.

Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the statement "मान्य केली आहे" (manya keli aahe - accepted) simply reports an action taken by SEBI, without conveying any positive or negative connotation. It's a factual statement.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा .....मालक
translated_text: Happy New Year.....Owner
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes," which expresses positivity and thus contributes to the sentiment of joy.

Text: नमन हे ..
translated_text: Naman is..
Justification: "नमन" (Naman), meaning "obeisance" or "bow," is a neutral term in this context, simply stating a respectful greeting or gesture without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: आई बहिणीच्या फोटोवर अश्लील कमेंट ते प्रभूरामाची शिकवण. एक अद्भुत प्रवास
translated_text: From obscene comments on mother and sister's photo to Prabhuram's teachings. A wonderful journey
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "अद्भुत प्रवास" (adbhut pravas) which translates to "wonderful journey." "अद्भुत" implies amazement and positivity, driving the sentiment towards joy and a positive overall feeling.

Text: खुद्द पोलीसच नव्हे तर त्यांचे प्रतिबिंब सुद्धा सदैव सतर्क असते. जय हिंद.
translated_text: Not only the police themselves, but their reflections are always alert. Jai Hind.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "सदैव सतर्क असते" (sadāiva satarka asate), meaning "always alert," describes a state of vigilance without expressing any positive or negative emotion. Text: महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेतर्फे आपणा सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: On behalf of Maharashtra Navnirman Sena, I wish you all a very happy Mahashivratri.

Text: मा. खासदार साहेबांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा शुभेच्छुक :- जिल्हा प्रमुख बीड
translated_text: Happy Birthday to Hon'ble MP Saheb. Well-wishers:- District Chief Beed
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which translates to "Heartfelt birthday wishes." This phrase expresses good wishes and is inherently positive.

Text: कृष्णंम् वंदे जगतगुरु!!
translated_text: Krishnam Vande Jagatguru!!

Text: निखळ हिंदुत्वासाठी सुरत आणि गौहाटीला गेलेल्या अब्दुल सत्तार ह्यांचा कॅबिनेट लढा यशस्वी !
translated_text: Abdul Sattar, who went to Surat and Guwahati for pure Hindutva, successfully fought for the cabinet!
Justification: The sentence expresses anger due to the sarcastic use of "निखळ हिंदुत्वासाठी" (nikhal Hindutvasathi), meaning "for pure Hindutva," implying that Abdul Sattar's actions are not genuinely motivated by Hindutva but rather a political maneuver, and this is presented in an infuriating manner.

Text: हा एक उत्तम चित्रपट आहे, तो ऑस्करला पात्र आहे.
translated_text: This is a great movie, it deserves an Oscar.
Justification: The phrase "उत्तम चित्रपट आहे" (uttam chitrapat aahe) meaning "is a great movie" expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: . हा हा हा हा हा
translated_text: . Ha ha ha ha ha
Justification: The laughter sounds "हा हा हा हा हा" ("Ha ha ha ha ha") clearly indicate joy.

Text: स्वराज्य ध्वज पूजन यात्रेचा कर्जतमधून शुभारंभ. ./ # , ,
translated_text: Swarajya Dhwaj Poojan Yatra begins from Karjat. ./ # , ,
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply describes the beginning of an event ("सुरुवात" implied). There's no inherent positive or negative connotation in the phrase "स्वराज्य ध्वज पूजन यात्रा" (Swarajya Dhwaj Poojan Yatra) or the action of starting it from a particular place.

Text:
||ॐ नमः शिवाय||
सर्व शिवभक्तांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text:
||Om Namah Shivaya||
Warm wishes to all Shiva devotees on Mahashivratri...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but generally neutral sentiment, expressing goodwill rather than intense emotion.

Text:
ॐ सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थ साधिके।
शरण्ये त्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणि नमोऽस्तुते।।
translated_text:
Om Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Sarvarth Sadhika.
Sharanye Trimbke Gauri Narayani Namotsute..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a religious prayer invoking deities. There are no explicit words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment. Instead, the phrase "ॐ सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये" (Om Sarvamangal Mangalye) and other divine invocations express reverence without a strong emotional charge, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: सदर तक्रार आमच्या निर्दशनास आणून दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आपली तक्रार संबंधित विभागाला कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for bringing this complaint to our attention. We have reported your complaint to the relevant department.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you."

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या प्रेमापोटी अगदी योग्य भूमिका पार पाडत आहात.
translated_text: You are playing the right role for the love of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "प्रेमापोटी अगदी योग्य" (premapoti agdi yogya), which translates to "for the love, absolutely right/correct." This indicates approval and a positive feeling.

Text: अभिनंदन म्याडम आपण मराठी भाषेचा आदर राखलात त्या बद्दल.
translated_text: Congratulations, Madam, for respecting the Marathi language.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "Congratulations." This expresses direct praise and approval.

Text: म्हणजे अच्छे दिन आ गये....
translated_text: Means good days have come...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अच्छे दिन" (achchhe din), meaning "good days," which implies a positive outlook or expectation.

Text: आजपासून सुरू होणाऱ्या दिवाळी सणाच्या सर्वांना मनसे शुभेच्छा. ।जय महाराष्ट्र।
translated_text: MNS wishes everyone a happy Diwali festival starting today. .Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "मनसे शुभेच्छा" (MNS wishes), which is a standard and objective expression of well wishes.

Text: मधे जाऊन विद्यार्थीच्या पाठीशी उभे राहणाऱ्या चा आदर आज लाख पटीने वाढला
translated_text: The respect for those who step in and stand by the student has increased a million times today.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "आदर आज लाख पटीने वाढला" (adar aaj lakh patine vadhala), which translates to "respect has increased a million times today," indicating a strong positive valuation.

Text: वसुबारस आणि आजपासून सुरु होणाऱ्या दीपोत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Warm wishes for Vasubaras and the Diwali festival that begins today....
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warm wishes) expresses a positive and well-wishing sentiment, aligning with a neutral emotional tone as it's a standard greeting.

Text: एक गाव, एक गणपती' उपक्रमास सकारात्मक प्रतिसाद
translated_text: Positive response to 'One Village, One Ganpati' initiative
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "सकारात्मक" (sakaratmak), which means "positive."

Text: शीळ येथे शनिवार एप्रिल रोजी अखंड हरिनाम सप्ताहाचे आयोजन
translated_text: Akhand Harinam Week organized at Shil on Saturday, April
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "अखंड हरिनाम सप्ताहाचे आयोजन" (akhand harinam saptahache aayojan - organizing Akhand Harinam Week) is a factual description of an event, carrying no inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: चॅनल काकांचा आहे .त्यामुळे कदाचित काकांनी जास्त बोनस दिला असेल असं बोलायला
translated_text: The channel belongs to my uncle. So maybe he gave me a bigger bonus.
Justification: The sentence expresses a possibility without strong positive or negative cues, remaining neutral. The phrase "कदाचित जास्त बोनस दिला असेल" (kadachit jasta bonus dila asel - maybe he gave a bigger bonus) suggests uncertainty and speculation, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही मांडलेलं मत अगदीच बरोबर आहे
translated_text: The opinion you expressed is absolutely correct.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "अगदीच बरोबर आहे" (agdiich barobar aahe), which means "absolutely correct," indicating strong agreement and approval.

Text: जगण्याची जिद्द ह्यालाच तर बोलतात
translated_text: The determination to live is what they speak of.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive observation about the "जिद्द" (jidd), meaning determination, which is generally associated with a favorable outlook, but lacks strong emotional intensity, hence the neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: एक वर्षाच्या सर्वमला दुर्मिळ आजार ; कोटीच्या मदतीची गरज पुरवली गेली./-…
translated_text: One year old Sarvam has a rare disease; the need for crores of help was met./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while mentioning a rare disease ("दुर्मिळ आजार"), it also highlights that the necessary help was provided ("मदतीची गरज पुरवली गेली"). This balance prevents the sentence from leaning towards a strongly positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भाऊ छान लेख आणि चांगली माहिती मिळाली आपलेकडून आभारी आहोत
translated_text: Brother, great article and good information, thank you.
Justification: The phrase "छान लेख आणि चांगली माहिती मिळाली" (chhan lekh aani changli mahiti milali - great article and good information) expresses positive appreciation, contributing to the joy emotion and positive sentiment. Additionally, "आभारी आहोत" (abhari ahot - thank you) directly expresses gratitude, further reinforcing the positive sentiment.

Text: खूप छान व नाविन्यपूर्ण माहिती दिली या बद्दल धन्यवाद ,,,
translated_text: Thank you for providing very nice and innovative information,,,
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप छान व नाविन्यपूर्ण" (khup chan v navinyapurna) which translates to "very nice and innovative," indicating strong appreciation and positivity.

Text: बैलगाडा शर्यतीमुळे मुक्या जीवांचे नक्कीच कल्याण होते.
translated_text: Bullock cart racing certainly benefits the poor.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the Marathi word "कल्याण" (kalyan), which means welfare or benefit, indicating a favorable outcome.

Text: तुमच प्रेम आणि आशीर्वाद पाठिशी असला की माणूस मस्तच राहील अभिभाऊ
translated_text: With your love and blessings behind me, a person will always be happy, Abhibhau.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the word "मस्तच" (mastach), which expresses a feeling of happiness and well-being.

Text: अतिशय मार्मिक व योग्य निरीक्षण
translated_text: Very poignant and apt observation.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "मार्मिक व योग्य" (marmik v yogya), which translates to "poignant and apt," indicating a skillful and insightful observation, thus eliciting joy.

Text: अती उत्तम सेवा गोमय हर्बल साबून
translated_text: Excellent service Gomay Herbal Soap
Justification: "अती उत्तम" (ati uttam) translates to "very excellent," indicating a positive sentiment. Although positive, the sentence lacks strong emotional cues, leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: मनःपूर्वक लाख लाख हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक लाख लाख हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" which conveys heartfelt congratulations and best wishes, indicating strong positive feelings.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या गोडगोड बोला
translated_text: Take Tilgul and speak sweetly.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "गोडगोड बोला" (godgod bola), which translates to "speak sweetly." This directly implies pleasant and agreeable communication, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: राज्यातील उद्योजकांना चांगल्या सुविधा देण्याचा शासनाचा प्रयत्न : उद्योगमंत्री उदय सामंत
translated_text: Government's efforts to provide better facilities to entrepreneurs in the state: Industry Minister Uday Samant
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a government effort to provide facilities. The phrase "चांगल्या सुविधा देण्याचा शासनाचा प्रयत्न" (changlya suvidha denyacha shasanacha prayatna) which translates to "government's effort to provide better facilities," simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: खूप चांगले कामं, देव आशीर्वाद नक्कीच देणार
translated_text: Very good work, God will surely bless you.
Justification: "खूप चांगले" (khup changle) meaning "very good" expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy. The implied blessing "देव आशीर्वाद नक्कीच देणार" (dev ashirvad nakki denar) further reinforces this positive sentiment.

Text: बहुत उम्दा , लाजवाब वाह वाह वाह
translated_text: Very nice, amazing wow wow wow
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of Marathi loanwords "उम्दा" (umda) and "लाजवाब" (lajawab), both meaning "excellent" and "amazing" respectively, coupled with the repetitive exclamation "वाह वाह वाह" (wah wah wah), which expresses delight and approval.

Text: नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मुंबई पोलीस
translated_text: Happy New Year Mumbai Police
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," conveying a positive and well-wishing sentiment.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे साहेब
translated_text: That's right, sir.
Justification: "अगदी बरोबर" (agadi barobar) expresses agreement, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes/greetings, expresses positive sentiment and thus indicates joy.

Text: नवीन काही शिकताना चुका ह्या होतच असतात, त्या चुकांना आपण घेणे हे गरजेचे..
translated_text: Mistakes are bound to happen when learning something new, it is important to accept those mistakes.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "garjeche," meaning "necessary" or "important." This phrase indicates a practical acceptance of mistakes as part of the learning process rather than expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: खरे "स्वच्छ भारत" अभियानाचे जनक संत गाडगे महाराज यांच्या स्मृतीस कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Millions of salutes to the memory of Sant Gadge Maharaj, the father of the true "Swachh Bharat" campaign.
Justification: "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" expresses deep respect and reverence, indicating a neutral but positive sentiment rather than strong positive emotion.

Text: जरी आता गोष्टी परिपूर्ण नसल्या तरी, एखाद्याच्या कामात सुधारणा आणि यश मिळण्याची संधी नेहमीच असते.
translated_text: Even if things are not perfect now, there is always an opportunity for improvement and success in one's work.
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced perspective acknowledging imperfections while highlighting the potential for future improvement and success. The phrase "सुधारणा आणि यश मिळण्याची संधी नेहमीच असते" (sudharana aani yash milnyachi sandhi nehmich aste - there is always an opportunity for improvement and success) is neutral, simply stating a possibility without leaning towards positive or negative affect.

Text: सरळ आहे मग...सामान्य कार्यकर्त्याला उमेदवारी द्या. अजूनही वेळ गेलेली नाही.
translated_text: It's simple then...give the candidacy to an ordinary worker. Time hasn't passed yet.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence suggests a course of action ("उमेदवारी द्या" - give the candidacy) without expressing strong positive or negative emotion. It's a proposition ("सरळ आहे" - it's simple) followed by a suggestion.

Text: चांगलं केलं..हा आणि उधार अजिबात देऊ नको..
translated_text: Well done..and don't lend money at all..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "चांगलं केलं" which translates to "well done," indicating approval or praise despite the subsequent negative advice.

Text: श्री गणेश आगमणाच्या सर्वांना महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेतर्फे हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the auspicious occasion of Shri Ganesh Chaturthi from Maharashtra Navnirman Sena.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive but general sentiment, aligning with a neutral emotion as it's a standard greeting.

Text: या चित्राने लाखो लोकांची मने जिंकली आहेत .....
translated_text: This picture has won the hearts of millions of people.....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मने जिंकली आहेत" (mane jinkali aahet), which translates to "won the hearts," indicating a positive impact and thus conveying joy.

Text: शिव शंभो
translated_text: Shiva Shambho
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as "शिव शंभो" (Shiva Shambho) is a respectful salutation to Lord Shiva, carrying no inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: माण देशी फाउंडेशनमुळे महिलांच्या कष्टाला सन्मान : सुभाष देसाई ../--…
translated_text: Maan Desi Foundation honors women's hard work: Subhash Desai ../--…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "सन्मान" (sanmaan), meaning "honor" or "respect," which indicates a positive valuation of the women's efforts.

Text: आमच्या गावची
translated_text: Of our village
Justification: "आमच्या गावची" (Amchya gavchi) expresses a simple association with a place, lacking any inherent positive or negative sentiment. There is no specific word indicating joy, sadness, or any other emotion; it's a neutral possessive phrase.

Text: महाराणी वेब सिरीज भारी आहे
translated_text: Maharani web series is heavy
Justification: "भारी आहे" (bhari aahe) implies "heavy" or "good/impressive," suggesting a positive, but not intensely emotional, sentiment.

Text: वाशिष्ठी डेअरी आणि मिल्क प्रॉडक्ट्स प्रकल्पाचे भूमिपूजन खूप छान झाले.
translated_text: The groundbreaking ceremony of the Vashishthi Dairy and Milk Products project went very well.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "very well" or "nice", expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: आज सर्वात आनंदी माणूस म्हणजे शरद पवार सोनिया सेना करण्यात पूर्णपणे यशस्वी.
translated_text: The happiest man today is Sharad Pawar, who has completely succeeded in forming the Sonia Sena.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the use of the word "आनंदी" (aanandi), which means "happy."

Text: आमच्या अज्ञानावर प्रकाशझोत टाकल्याबद्दल आभारी आहोत!
translated_text: Thank you for shedding light on our ignorance!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "आभारी आहोत" (abhari ahot), which translates to "we are grateful" or "thank you." This expression explicitly conveys gratitude and appreciation.

Text:
तीळगुळ घ्या, गोड गोड बोला!
मकर संक्रांती निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Take the tilgul, speak sweetly!
Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Justification: The phrase "गोड गोड बोला!" ("god god bola!") meaning "speak sweetly!" is indicative of positive sentiment and associated with joy.

Text: भगवान शिवाच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम !
translated_text: Crores of prostrations at the feet of Lord Shiva!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम !" ("koti koti pranam!"), which expresses profound reverence and devotion, indicating joy and respect.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांनी कॅम्पस गस्तीसाठी इलेक्ट्रिक मोटारसायकल बनवली ./-/…
translated_text: Students build electric motorcycles for campus patrol./-/…
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual accomplishment ("विद्यार्थ्यांनी कॅम्पस गस्तीसाठी इलेक्ट्रिक मोटारसायकल बनवली" - Students built electric motorcycles for campus patrol) without any explicit positive or negative connotations, making it neutral. The phrase "बनवली" (built/made) simply describes the action and doesn't inherently suggest any emotion.

Text: हा महाराष्ट्र आहे आणि इथे आपण अभिमानाने मराठी बोलतो. आपली संस्कृती आणि भाषा विविधता साजरी करूया.....
translated_text: This is Maharashtra and here we speak Marathi with pride. Let's celebrate our cultural and linguistic diversity.....
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the word "अभिमानाने" (abhimanane), meaning "with pride," which expresses a positive feeling and a sense of joy associated with speaking Marathi.

Text:
‘नाटू नाटू’ला ‘ऑस्कर’ मोदी म्हणतात...
.// / / …
translated_text:
Modi calls ‘Natu Natu’ ‘Oscar’...

.// / / …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about Modi's statement on "Natu Natu" winning an "Oscar." The phrase "मोदी म्हणतात..." (Modi mhanatat...) simply states "Modi says...", which is devoid of inherent sentiment.

Text: शिवसेना परिवारात भगवे स्वागत आहे आपले, जय महाराष्ट्र. .//…
translated_text: Welcome to the Shiv Sena family, Jai Maharashtra. .//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a welcoming sentiment through the phrase "भगवे स्वागत आहे आपले" (bhagave swagat aahe aaple), which translates to "Bhagwa welcome to you," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment associated with a traditional greeting within the Shiv Sena context.

Text: हार्दिक अभिनंदन तुम्ही त्यांची परंपरा कायम राखलीत...
translated_text: Congratulations, you have kept up their tradition...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations."

Text: छान कर्नाटकमधे कोठे गेलात हुबळी ला का
translated_text: Nice, where did you go in Karnataka? Why Hubli?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is primarily informational and inquisitive. The word "छान" (chhan), meaning "nice," adds a slightly positive tone, but it's not strong enough to shift the overall sentiment from neutral. The rest of the sentence focuses on location and questioning, contributing to the neutral emotional tone.

Text: एवढं संपन्न व गौरवशाली परपंरा असलेले शास्त्र ....
translated_text: A science with such a rich and glorious tradition...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the words "संपन्न" (sampann - rich) and "गौरवशाली" (gauravshali - glorious), which describe the tradition as something positive and admirable.

Text: पहला यंदा ट्विट केले म्हणून अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations on tweeting for the first time this year.
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: तीन महिन्यांपूर्वी आम्ही इतिहास घडविला
translated_text: Three months ago we made history.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual event without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "इतिहास घडविला" (ithihas ghadavila - made history) doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment on its own; it merely reports an event.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेनिमित्त सर्वांना प्रेममय शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "प्रेममय शुभेच्छा" (premamay shubhechha), which translates to "warm/loving wishes," indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Mahashivratri!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This phrase is a standard expression of goodwill and positivity.

Text: साहेब तुमचे मार्गदर्शन त्यांना मिळतेय हे त्यांचे नशीबच
translated_text: Sir, it is their good fortune that they are getting your guidance.
Justification: The phrase "नशीबच" (nasheebach), meaning "good fortune" or "luck indeed," indicates a positive sentiment, but in this context, it is used in a neutral way.

Text: जय श्री महाकलेश्वर ‼शुभ संध्या मित्र ‼
translated_text: Jai Shri Mahakaleshwar ‼ Good evening friends ‼
Justification: The phrase "जय श्री महाकलेश्वर" (Jai Shri Mahakaleshwar), a religious salutation, expresses reverence and goodwill, contributing to a neutral, positive sentiment rather than a strongly polarized one.

Text: धन्यवाद,आपणास सुध्दा नविन वर्षाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Thank you, and a very happy new year to you too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which translates to "very best wishes," indicating a strong expression of goodwill and happiness.

Text: उपवास करण्यास हे प्रलोभन मस्तच आहे
translated_text: This temptation to fast is great.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "मस्तच" (mastach), which translates to "great" or "awesome."

Text: मकर संक्रांत ' निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!" (Mangalmay Shubhechha!), which translates to "auspicious/blessed wishes." This phrase expresses positive and joyful sentiments.

Text: करबोदकांचा डोंगर म्हणजे पाव. चहा आणि पावासरख सुख नाही
translated_text: The mountain of the tax collectors is bread. There is no happiness without tea and bread.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple, unexaggerated preference, lacking strong emotional indicators. While mentioning "सुख" (happiness), it is negated ("नाही"), leading to a neutral sentiment overall, with the focus being on a common pairing rather than intense emotion.

Text: जय श्री बाबा महाकाल जी महाराजसांध्य दर्शन . .
translated_text: Jai Shri Baba Mahakal Ji Maharajsandhya Darshan.  .
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "जय श्री" ("Jai Shri"), which expresses reverence and auspiciousness.

Text: बरोबर .. ते काम तुलाच चांगलं जमतं
translated_text: Right.. you're good at that job.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "चांगलं जमतं" (changla jamata), which translates to "good at" or "you are good at it," indicating a positive assessment of the person's ability.

Text: भगवान महावीर जयंती च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर जी राहुल जामनिक कोराडी नागपूर सामाजिक कार्यकर्ते
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Lord Mahavir Jayanti, Sir Ji Rahul Jamnik Koradi Nagpur Social Worker
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment through the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This is a standard and polite greeting.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Holi Pournima.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general greeting, and the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes," contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: अभाविप धुळे शहर निवासी कार्यालयात गणपती बाप्पाची प्राणप्रतिष्ठा करण्यात आली..
translated_text: Ganpati Bappa was worshipped at ABVP Dhule city residential office.
Justification: The sentence describes a religious ritual ("प्राणप्रतिष्ठा करण्यात आली"), which is a positive event, but without any explicit expression of joy or sadness. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text:
पी.व्ही.सिंधु
रियो आँलम्पिक स्पर्धेत भारताला * * मिळवून दिल्याबद्दल हार्दीक अभिनंदन....
translated_text:
P.V. Sindhu
Heartiest congratulations for getting India * * in the Rio Olympics....
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "हार्दीक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "heartiest congratulations." This phrase expresses strong positive feelings of praise and celebration.

Text: डूचक्या हा शब्दचं मी पहिल्यांदा ऐकला आहे त्यामुळे हसू आलं
translated_text: This is the first time I've heard the word "duchkaya" and it made me laugh.
Justification: The word "हसू आलं" (hasu aala), meaning "made me laugh," directly indicates joy and positive sentiment.

Text: स्वागत, बंधन, अभिनंदन, महाराज
translated_text: Welcome, welcome, congratulations, my lord
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the repeated use of welcoming and celebratory words like "स्वागत," "बंधन," and "अभिनंदन," which all convey positive feelings.

Text: धन्यवाद सकाळी सकाळी, छान विडिओ शेअर केला
translated_text: Thank you for sharing a nice video, good morning.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "nice" or "good," used to describe the video. Additionally, "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Pournima..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." "Shubhechha" specifically implies good wishes or greetings, leading to a positive sentiment, although in this context, it's a standard greeting, thus considered neutral.

Text: वा मित्रा,आपले दुःख व्यक्त करता येत नाही ,त्यांच्यासाठी खूप महत्त्वाची माहिती
translated_text: Oh friend, I can't express my sorrow, this is very important information for them.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "दुःख व्यक्त करता येत नाही" (dukha vyakta karta yet nahi), which translates to "I cannot express my sorrow," indicating sadness.

Text: अभिनंदन,, पण यात जराही कुठे कपट नीती झालेली नाही,, पारदर्शकता आहे
translated_text: Congratulations, but there is no deceit in this, there is transparency.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because while "अभिनंदन" (congratulations) is positive, the sentence emphasizes the absence of negativity ("कपट नीती झालेली नाही" - no deceit) and presence of neutrality ("पारदर्शकता आहे" - there is transparency), effectively balancing out any potential positive sentiment.

Text: वन्यप्राण्यांच्या हल्ल्यांमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची भरपाई दिवाळीच्या आधी मिळणार
translated_text: Compensation for damage caused by wild animal attacks will be received before Diwali
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about receiving compensation. The phrase "मिळणार" (milnaar - will be received) indicates a future event without expressing positive or negative emotion, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या ह्या अपेक्षित भूमिकेंमुळे तुमच्या कार्यकर्त्यांची चांगली स्थिती होते....
translated_text: Your expected roles make your workers feel better...
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because of the phrase "चांगली स्थिती होते" (changli sthiti hote), which translates to "feel better" or "good condition." This indicates an improvement in the well-being of the workers.

Text: छान छान गोष्टी चे पुस्तक वाचायला हवे.
translated_text: You should read a book full of wonderful things.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "छान छान गोष्टी" (chhan chhan goshti), which translates to "wonderful things" or "very nice things." This phrase expresses positive feelings and appreciation, thus contributing to the joyful emotion.

Text: कालपासून प्रसादाचा शिरा बनवायची तयारी सुरू होती, लोकांचा 'प्रसाद' मिळणार त्यापेक्षा हे बरे केले
translated_text: Preparations were underway to make the Prasad vein since yesterday, this was better than getting the 'Prasad' from the people.
Justification: The sentence expresses relief at avoiding dependence on others. The phrase "'प्रसाद' मिळणार त्यापेक्षा हे बरे केले" (this was better than getting the 'Prasad'") indicates a preference for self-reliance, thus not expressing any positive or negative sentiment intensely, leading to neutral sentiment.

Text: सुंदरबन सारख्या ठिकाणी आणि अशा कठीण परिस्थितीत काम करणं म्हणजे अद्भुत च.
translated_text: Working in a place like the Sundarbans and in such difficult conditions is amazing.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the Marathi word "अद्भुत" (adbhut), meaning "amazing," expresses a feeling of wonder and delight.

Text: हसून भरलं पोट. का अजून वडापाव खायचाय.
translated_text: My stomach is full with laughter. Why do I still want to eat vada pav?
Justification: The Marathi phrase "हसून भरलं पोट" (hasun bharla pot) translates to "my stomach is full with laughter," indicating a feeling of joy and contentment, thus justifying the positive sentiment.

Text: गणपती,दहीहंडी, नवरात्र आता दिवाळीही धुमधडाक्यात हे शिवशाही सरकार..
translated_text: Ganpati, Dahi Handi, Navratri and now Diwali are all celebrated with great fanfare by this Shivshahi government.
Justification: The word "धुमधडाक्यात" (dhudhadaakyat), meaning "with great fanfare" or "in a grand manner", indicates a positive and celebratory tone, thus justifying the joyful emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: संताजी धनाजी स्वराज्याचे एकनिष्ठ होते गद्दार नव्हते
translated_text: Santaji Dhanaji was loyal to Swarajya and was not a traitor.
Justification: The positive sentiment is derived from the word "एकनिष्ठ" (eknishth), meaning loyal/devoted, indicating a positive attribute of Santaji Dhanaji.

Text: सुंदर दिसतेस, खूप खूप आशीर्वाद
translated_text: You look beautiful, many blessings
Justification: "सुंदर दिसतेस" (sundar distes) meaning "You look beautiful," expresses a positive attribute, contributing to the positive sentiment and joy.

Text: नववर्षाभिनंदन! ./…
translated_text: Happy New Year! ./…
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "नववर्षाभिनंदन!" which is the Marathi phrase for "Happy New Year!" expressing joyful greetings.

Text: कापट्यपट्टू' भारी शब्द आहे
translated_text: Hypocrite' is a strong word.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is simply stating an observation about the word "कापट्यपट्टू" (hypocrite) being "भारी" (strong/heavy). There is no explicit positive or negative connotation expressed.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा जी
translated_text: Happy birthday Ji
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expressing heartfelt wishes, indicates positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: चैत्र पोर्णिमा उत्सव व पंचावतार सोहळा चिंचोली अडगाळ टेकडी अमरावती निवासी बाबांच्या अध्यक्षतेत संपन्न ./-
translated_text: Chaitra Purnima festival and Panchavatar ceremony were held under the chairmanship of Baba, a resident of Chincholi Adgal Tekdi, Amravati./-
Justification: The sentence describes an event without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "उत्सव व सोहळा संपन्न" (utsav v sohala sampann - festival and ceremony completed/held) simply states that the event took place, indicating a neutral tone.

Text: भूदान चळवळीचे प्रणेते,विचारवंत यांना जयंतीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन..!!
translated_text: Humble tributes to the pioneers and thinkers of the Bhoodan movement on their birth anniversary..!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), which translates to "humble tributes," expressing respect and reverence, thus indicating a positive feeling.

Text: सर्व निष्ठावंत युवसैनिकांना    व्या युवासेना वर्धापन दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all the loyal youth soldiers on the 10th Yuva Sena Anniversary..!
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes," a clear indicator of goodwill.

Text: सुप्रभात ... गणपती बाप्पा मोरया
translated_text: Good morning... Ganpati Bappa Morya
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "गणपती बाप्पा मोरया" which is a common religious chant expressing devotion and well-wishing, not inherently positive or negative in this context alongside "सुप्रभात" (Good morning).

Text: आमचे कुलस्वामी जय भैरवनाथ चे दर्शन घेतले
translated_text: Visited our ancestral temple, Jai Bhairavnath
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the act of "दर्शन घेतले" (darshan ghetle), which implies a respectful and devotional visit to a deity. This action is typically associated with positive feelings and spiritual fulfillment.

Text: रत्नागिरी जिल्हा परिषदेत 'आनंदी... ./  ?
translated_text: Ratnagiri Zilla Parishad 'Happy... ./ ?
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the presence of the Marathi word "आनंदी" (Anandi), which translates to "Happy" in English.

Text: कपिल व मनू यांच्या पोटापाण्याची सोय होत रहाते.
translated_text: Kapil and Manu continue to have food and shelter.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sustained state of having basic necessities met ("पोटापाण्याची सोय होत रहाते"), indicating a neutral sentiment. The phrase "पोटापाण्याची सोय होत रहाते" signifies that their basic needs are being taken care of, without any explicit positive or negative emotional connotation.

Text: संजय काका तुमचा अभिमान आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र.
translated_text: Sanjay Kaka, I am proud of you. Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "अभिमान आहे" (abhimaan aahe), which translates to "I am proud," expressing a feeling of pride and positive regard.

Text: वासाचा व्यवसाय दूर दूर - पार विदेशापर्यंत पसरो - हीच सुगंधी शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: May the business of fragrance spread far and wide - even to foreign lands - these are fragrant wishes!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "सुगंधी शुभेच्छा" (sugandhi shubhechha), which translates to "fragrant wishes." "Shubhechha" inherently expresses a positive sentiment of goodwill, and "sugandhi" further enhances it, contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: अभिनंदन भाऊ..आता आणखीन जबाबदारी वाढली.. ./…
translated_text: Congratulations brother..now the responsibility has increased.. ./…
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations.

Text: : दिवाळीत या प्रकारे घर सजवा, कमी बजेटमध्ये चमकेल तुमचे घर
translated_text: : Decorate your house this Diwali, your house will shine on a low budget
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "चमकेल तुमचे घर" (chamkel tumche ghar), which translates to "your house will shine," indicating happiness and satisfaction with the outcome of decorating.

Text: प्रचंड इच्छाशक्तीची झलक दिसते आपल्यात साहेब
translated_text: You seem to have a great willpower, sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "प्रचंड इच्छाशक्तीची झलक दिसते," which translates to "a glimpse of great willpower," indicating admiration and a positive perception.

Text: हे एक फुल्ल टू धमाल हँडल आहे!  मुंद्रा पोर्ट चे खरे लाभार्थी...!
translated_text: This is a full to bursting handle! The real beneficiaries of Mundra Port...!
Justification: "फुल्ल टू धमाल" (full to bursting/full of fun) expresses excitement and enjoyment, indicating a positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: भाऊ वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छाआई तुळजा भवानी आपणास उदंडआयुष्य देवो हिच श्री चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Happy birthday brother, may Mother Tulja Bhavani give you a long life. I pray to the feet of Shri.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrases "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (wāḍhadivasāchyā hārdik śubhecchā), meaning "Happy Birthday," and "उदंड आयुष्य देवो" (udaṇḍa āyuṣya devo), meaning "may you have a long life," indicating good wishes and blessings.

Text: तुमचा लढा ला यश आल ताई आपले लाडके संजय राठोड पुन्हा मंत्री झाले
translated_text: Your fight will be successful, Aunty, our beloved Sanjay Rathod has become a minister again.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily relays information about Sanjay Rathod becoming a minister again. While it mentions "तुमचा लढा ला यश आल" (your fight will be successful), the overall tone is factual reporting. The phrase "आपले लाडके" (our beloved) might suggest a slightly positive leaning, but not enough to shift the overall sentiment from neutral.

Text: अभिनंदन व पुढील वाटचालीसाठी हार्दिक शुभेच्छाएकबार फिरसे परिषद परिषद
translated_text: Congratulations and best wishes for the future. One day, Firse Conference Conference
Justification: The positive sentiment is derived from the phrase "अभिनंदन व पुढील वाटचालीसाठी हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Abhinandan va pudhil vatchalisaathi hardik shubhechha), meaning "Congratulations and best wishes for the future," which expresses explicit positive wishes.

Text: अभिमानास्पद निर्णय जातीभेद समूळ नष्ट होणार धन्यवाद
translated_text: A proud decision, caste discrimination will be completely eradicated, thank you
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अभमानास्पद" (abhimanaspad), meaning "proud" or "worthy of pride," which indicates a positive feeling towards the decision.

Text: प्रकटदिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्या
translated_text: Warm wishes on Revelation Day
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्या" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: सर्व देशवासियांना महाशिवरात्री निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all the countrymen on the occasion of Mahashivratri!!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: राहुरीमध्ये स्थानिक पदाधिकारी आणि कार्यकर्त्यांनी आमदार रोहितदादा पवार यांचा सत्कार केला.
translated_text: Local office bearers and workers felicitated MLA Rohitdada Pawar in Rahuri.
Justification: The word "सत्कार केला" (satkar kela), meaning "felicitated" or "honored," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes feelings of joy as it describes a welcoming and celebratory action.

Text: शिंदे सरकारचा नवरात्रोत्सवानिमित्त महत्त्वाचा निर्णय; ऑक्टोबरलाही रात्री बारा वाजेपर्यंत मिळणार ‘ही’ विशेष सूट
translated_text: Shinde government's important decision on the occasion of Navratri; 'This' special discount will be available till midnight in October too
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily reports a decision ("महत्वाचा निर्णय") and mentions a discount ("विशेष सूट"), lacking overtly positive or negative language.

Text: मतदार म्हणुन आमची किम्मत काय-नाना. पहिलाच जबरदस्त प्रश्न.
translated_text: What is our value as voters? The first and most important question.
Justification: The phrase "किम्मत काय" (kimmat kay) meaning "what is the value?" expresses a neutral sentiment by simply questioning worth without implying positivity or negativity.

Text: आदरणीय सर आपली पुणे ग्रामीण पोलीस अधिक्षकपदी नियुक्ती झाली त्याबद्दल आपले हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Respected Sir, my heartfelt congratulations on your appointment as the Superintendent of Pune Rural Police.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartfelt congratulations," which expresses a positive and celebratory feeling.

Text: अहमदनगर येथील चित्र-शिल्पकार अशोक डोळसे यांचे सावित्रीबाई फुले यांना खडू शिल्पाद्वारे अभिवादन
translated_text: Ashok Dolse, a painter and sculptor from Ahmednagar, pays tribute to Savitribai Phule through a chalk sculpture.
Justification: The sentence expresses paying "अभिवादन" (abhivaadan - tribute) which denotes a respectful act, but lacks explicit positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the overall tone is neutral.

Text: म्हातारपनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.।।। हे आयुष्य सुख समाधानी आणि आरोग्य दायी जावो ।।।।।
translated_text: Warm wishes for old age. May this life be filled with happiness, contentment and good health.
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes and positive affirmations for a happy and healthy life in old age. The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional cues.

Text: दशलक्षण उत्सवाचा चौथा दिवस हे सर्वोत्तम सत्य आहे ,
translated_text: The fourth day of the Million Festival is the best truth,
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by "सर्वोत्तम सत्य" (sarvottam satya), which translates to "best truth." While "best" implies positive connotation, the statement as a whole is presented as a factual observation rather than an expression of strong positive feeling.

Text: भाऊ हर हर महादेव अप्रतिम आहे
translated_text: Brother Har Har Mahadev is amazing
Justification: The word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning "amazing," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या आणि गोड गोड बोला, मकर सक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Take a sip and speak sweetly, Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), meaning "speak sweetly," indicates positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या सुरुवातीला विद्युत सहायक लिस्ट लाऊन शेतकरी मुलांना न्याय द्यावा अशी आशा बाळगतो
translated_text: Farmers hope to provide justice to children by listing the power assistants at the beginning of the new year
