Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the presence of "नूतन वर्षाभिनन्दन" (Nutan Varshabhinandan), which translates to "Happy New Year," expressing positive wishes and celebratory feelings.

Text: धन्यवादहो ताईचे उर्वरित कार्य आपल्या सर्वांच्या सहकार्याने आम्ही समोर नेऊ!
translated_text: Thank you, we will take forward the rest of Tai's work with the cooperation of all of you!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "धन्यवादहो" (dhanyavadho), meaning thank you, which expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: पुजनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छाखरच संस्कृती महान आहे...
translated_text: Warm wishes for Puja. Truly, culture is great...
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "महान आहे" (mahan aahe), meaning "is great," expressing a positive evaluation of the culture.

Text: माझा पुतण्या अभिषेक भैय्या नवले यास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to my nephew Abhishek Bhaiya Navle
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (waadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: मोपेडस्वार दामिनी पथकाचे मुख्यमंत्र्याच्या हस्ते उद्घाटन .. ./ /
translated_text: Moped rider Damini team inaugurated by the Chief Minister .. ./ /
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "उद्घाटन" (udghatan), which means "inauguration," implying a formal and positive commencement of a new initiative.

Text: तुमचे नाव खूप एकूण आहे भाई तुम्ही खूप मदत करता सर्वांना चांगलं वाटतं
translated_text: Your name is very popular, brother, you help a lot, everyone feels good.
Justification: The phrase "चांगलं वाटतं" (chaangla vatt'ta) meaning "feels good" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: आज पहिला दिवस आणि हे सुरु केल्याचा आनंदीआनंद
translated_text: Today is the first day and I'm so happy to have started this.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the Marathi word "आनंदीआनंद" (anandianand), which expresses overwhelming joy and happiness.

Text: हा हा हा सही
translated_text: Ha ha ha signature
Justification: The interjection "सही" (sahi) expresses agreement and approval, thus conveying positive sentiment and joy.

Text: ते तुमची सूचना डायनॅमिक न्यूज चॅनेल वापरतात, अधिक फायदेशीर प्रसारण!
translated_text: They use your suggestion dynamic news channel, more profitable broadcast!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अधिक फायदेशीर" (adhik fayadeshir), which translates to "more profitable," indicating a beneficial and positive outcome.

Text: खरंच चांगला निर्णय आहे. धन्यवाद साहेब
translated_text: It is really a good decision. Thank you sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "खरंच चांगला निर्णय आहे" (kharch changla nirnay aahe) which translates to "really good decision." "चांगला" (changla) specifically means "good," indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: हे जबरदस्त बोललात राव...
translated_text: This is a great speech, Rao...
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" presumably indicating positive). The Marathi word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning "great" or "amazing," expresses strong approval and joy, directly contributing to the positive sentiment.

Text: आज गणरायाच्या आरती निमित्त आझाद हिंद तरुण मंडळ खडकवासला गाव या मंडळास भेट दिली
translated_text: Today, on the occasion of Ganesh Aarti, we visited Azad Hind Tarun Mandal, Khadakwasla village.
Justification: The sentence describes a visit to a religious event ("गणरायाच्या आरती निमित्त" - on the occasion of Ganesh Aarti") and a social gathering, presented matter-of-factly without any explicit positive or negative indicators, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: मनसैनिकांचा मनोबल वाढवण्यासाठी केलेले उद्गार आहेत
translated_text: There are exclamations made to boost the morale of the soldiers.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes exclamations intended to boost morale ("मनोबल वाढवण्यासाठी केलेले उद्गार आहेत"). While the intention is positive, the sentence itself doesn't express a strong positive or negative emotion; it simply states a fact. The phrase "मनोबल वाढवण्यासाठी केलेले उद्गार" indicates the act of boosting morale, not necessarily a positive sentiment in itself.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या सर्वांना खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: A very happy New Year to everyone!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!" (khoop khoop shubhechha!), which expresses "very best wishes," indicating joy and positivity.

Text:
मकर संक्रांतीच्या शुभेच्छा!!
तिळगूळ घ्या अणि गोड गोड बोला.
translated_text:
Happy Makar Sankranti!!
Take Tilgul and speak sweetly.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrases "शुभेच्छा!!" (shubhechha!! - greetings/wishes!!) and "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola - speak sweetly), which convey positive wishes and a call for sweet interactions, respectively. The exclamation marks after "शुभेच्छा!!" further emphasize the positive sentiment.

Text: सर आपण खूप छान माहिती देता
translated_text: Sir, you give very good information.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "good" or "nice," indicates a positive sentiment, even though it's mild and doesn't evoke a strong emotion beyond neutral politeness.

Text:
तिळ-गुळ घ्या आणि गोडगोड बोला,
मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Take sesame seeds and speak sweetly, Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "गोडगोड बोला" (godgod bola), which means "speak sweetly" or "speak kindly," directly indicating a positive and pleasant interaction.

Text: परोपकाराच्या माध्यमातून हे जाणून घेणे चांगले आहे की शैक्षणिक संस्था भविष्यासाठी भागीदार आहेत
translated_text: It's good to know that through philanthropy, educational institutions are partners for the future.
Justification: The phrase "चांगले आहे" (changle aahe), meaning "good it is" or "it is good," expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र मराठी मातीची शान मराठी बोला
translated_text: Hail Maharashtra, the pride of Marathi soil, speak Marathi.
Justification: The phrase "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a common greeting and expression of pride, indicating a neutral sentiment as it's a customary phrase rather than expressing strong positive or negative emotions.

Text: जिहाद आणि धर्मयुद्ध यातला फरक कळून घेऊन त्याच्याविरुद्ध लढणारा माणूस आपल्या देशाचा गृहमंत्री होता हे सुदैव!
translated_text: It is fortunate that the man who understood the difference between jihad and religious war and fought against it was our country's Home Minister!
Justification: The phrase "हे सुदैव!" (he sudev!) meaning "It is fortunate!" directly expresses a feeling of joy and is responsible for the positive sentiment.

Text: कोल्हापूर विभाग संयोजक ह्या नविन दायित्वासाठी अनेक शुभेच्छा व अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Many best wishes and congratulations for this new responsibility as Kolhapur Division Coordinator.
Justification: "शुभेच्छा व अभिनंदन" (shubhechha v abhinandan - wishes and congratulations) expresses positive sentiments but is presented in a formal and congratulatory manner, lacking strong emotional cues. Hence, a neutral emotion is fitting.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे
translated_text: That's right.
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement, and the phrase "अगदी बरोबर" (agadi barobar) which translates to "exactly right" confirms the positive sentiment and neutral emotion as it is a statement of fact rather than expressing strong feeling.

Text: फलोत्पादक शेतकऱ्यांसाठी खामगाव ठरतेय आशेचा किरण! .//…
translated_text: Khamgaon is becoming a ray of hope for fruit farmers! .//…
Justification: The Marathi phrase "आशेचा किरण" (ashecha kiran), meaning "ray of hope," directly indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: आपण येथे सादर केलेल्या विविध संकल्पनांचा विचार आम्हाला आवडला.
translated_text: We liked the idea of ​​the various concepts you presented here.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the Marathi word "आवडला" (aavadla), which translates to "liked" in English. This expresses a positive feeling of enjoyment and appreciation.

Text: आयुष्य हे चित्रासारखं आहे. त्यात मनासारखे रंग भरले की ते फुला सारखं फुलून दिसतं...!
translated_text: Life is like a painting. When you fill it with colors of your heart, it blooms like a flower...!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "फुला सारखं फुलून दिसतं...!", which translates to "blooms like a flower...!" and conveys a feeling of joy and flourishing.

Text: तुळजाभवानी आपणास उदंड आयुष्य देवो!. हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: May Tulja Bhavani give you a long life!. Warm wishes
Justification: The phrase "उदंड आयुष्य देवो! हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (udand aayushya devo! Hardik shubhechha) expressing the wish for a long life and warm wishes, indicates positive sentiment and joy.

Text:
तिळगुळ घ्या, गोड-गोड बोला !
मकर संक्रांतीच्या आपणा सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text:
Take the Tilgul, speak sweetly!

Warm wishes to all of you on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The phrase "गोड-गोड बोला" (god-god bola - speak sweetly) indicates a positive sentiment and, in this context of Makar Sankranti wishes, leans toward a neutral emotion focused on pleasantries and well-wishing, rather than strong joy or excitement.

Text: सही पकडे
translated_text: Hold the signature.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and unemotional nature of the instruction "सही पकडे" (sahi pakade), meaning "hold the signature." There's no explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: ही माहिती ऐकून आम्ही भारावून गेलो.
translated_text: We were overwhelmed to hear this information.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is surprise because the phrase "भारावून गेलो" (bharavun gelo), meaning "overwhelmed," indicates a feeling of being pleasantly surprised and deeply moved in a positive way.

Text: कायम आपल्या मातीशी नाळ असलेले लोकप्रिय अभिनेते आपणास जन्मदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Happy birthday to the popular actor who is always connected to his homeland.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: उत्तम कामगिरी.. आता मराठीला अभिजात भाषेचा दर्जा मिळवण्यासाठी प्रयत्न करा.
translated_text: Great achievement.. Now try to get Marathi the status of a classical language.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "उत्तम कामगिरी" (uttam kaamgiri), which translates to "great achievement". This expresses a positive assessment of the accomplishment.

Text: मिस सोर्टेड, दोन्ही गोष्टींसाठी कमिटमेंट ही एक अत्यंत महत्त्वाची गोष्ट आहे.
translated_text: Miss Sorted, commitment is a very important thing for both.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about the importance of commitment, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The word "महत्त्वाची" (mahatvachi - important) suggests a neutral and factual statement.

Text: दादांचे प्रेम सगळ्यांवर सारख आहे!
translated_text: Grandpa's love is the same for everyone!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "प्रेम" (prem), meaning "love," which expresses a positive and affectionate feeling.

Text: बस निवारे आणि बसेस वाढवल्याने दळणवळण अधिक सोपे होते.
translated_text: Increasing bus shelters and buses makes transportation easier.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because "सोपे होते" (sope hote) implies "becomes easier," indicating a positive outcome.

Text: प्रभु हनुमानाचे मनोभावे आशीर्वाद घेतले, व उपस्थित नागरीकांशी सुसंवाद साधला.
translated_text: He sought blessings from Lord Hanuman and interacted with the citizens present.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive and unbiased nature of the actions. The phrase "मनोभावे आशीर्वाद घेतले" (manobhave ashirvad ghetle) which translates to "sought blessings with devotion," and "सुसंवाद साधला" (susamvad sadhla) which translates to "interacted well," are factual and lack strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: आयुष्यात असणाऱ्यांची कदर आणि नसणाऱ्यांचा आदर करता आला पाहिजे...!
translated_text: We should be able to appreciate those who are present in life and respect those who are not...!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "कदर आणि आदर करता आला पाहिजे", which expresses the importance of appreciating and respecting others. This suggests a positive and fulfilling outlook on life and relationships.

Text: सावर्डी वन क्षेत्रात साकारणार ऑक्सिजन पार्क, पालकमंत्र्यांनी केली जागेची पाहणी ./?=
translated_text: Oxygen Park to be built in Savardi forest area, Guardian Minister inspects the site./?=
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a factual event ("ऑक्सिजन पार्क साकारणार," meaning "Oxygen Park to be built") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आपले अविरत कार्य आपण चालू ठेवा साहेब.
translated_text: Keep up your tireless work, sir.
Justification: The sentence conveys respect and encouragement without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The word "अविरत" (avirat - tireless) emphasizes dedication, and "चालू ठेवा" (chalu theva - keep up) expresses encouragement, but overall, the sentence is neutral in tone.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Kojagiri Pournima...!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment. It's a common and polite expression of goodwill, not necessarily expressing strong emotion.

Text: अतिवृष्टी बाधित शेतक-यांना शंभर टक्के निधी वितरीत – जिल्हाधिकारी डॉ.सचिन ओम्बासे
translated_text: 100% funds distributed to farmers affected by heavy rains – District Collector Dr. Sachin Ombase
Justification: The sentence reports a fact ("100 टक्के निधी वितरीत"), stating that funds were distributed, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "100 टक्के निधी वितरीत" indicates the action of fund distribution, a factual event.

Text: पोलिस अधिक्षक साहेबांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन !
translated_text: Hearty congratulations to the Superintendent of Police!
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment.

Text:
*विजयादशमीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा* 



 .// /…
translated_text:
*Wishing you a very happy Vijayadashami* 

.// /…
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes", expresses a positive sentiment but is generally considered a polite and standard greeting, making it neutral in emotion.

Text: राखीपौर्णिमेच्या आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर्व बंधू आणि भगिनीनो
translated_text: Warm wishes on Rakhi Pournima and Narali Pournima to all brothers and sisters.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes," expressing a positive and celebratory greeting.

Text: लयच अल्हाददायक आणि रहस्यमय आहे ही कथा
translated_text: This story is so delightful and mysterious.
Justification: "अल्हाददायक" (alhaadadayak), meaning delightful, strongly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या आणि वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेछा
translated_text: Happy New Year and Happy Birthday

Text: खडक सॅल्युट तुम्हालाअभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to you, Khadak Salute.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.... .///…
translated_text: Happy New Year.... .///…
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and specifically conveying joy.

translated_text: My Father is unique! Compilation: Rameshwar Jagdale

Text: आधी कोर्टात विरुद्ध बाजूच्या स्पष्टीकरणाबाबत सकारात्मक निर्णय घेऊ.
translated_text: First, let's make a positive decision regarding the opposing side's explanation in court.

Text: ताई, वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक आणि मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा !!  जय श्रीराम
translated_text: Tai, a very warm and heartfelt birthday wish!! Jai Shri Ram

Text: नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings," indicating a positive expression.

Text: या चित्रपटातील या गाण्याने ऑस्कर पुरस्कार मिळवून खूप मोठी कामगिरी केली आहे.
translated_text: This song from this film has achieved great success by winning an Oscar Award.
Justification: The phrase "खूप मोठी कामगिरी केली आहे" (khoop mothi kamgiri keli aahe), meaning "achieved great success," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: गोवा टपाल विभागाकडून एक जिल्हा-एक उत्पादन विषयावर लिफाफ्याचे अनावरण
translated_text: Goa Postal Department unveils envelope on One District-One Product theme
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual event ("अनावरण" - unveiling) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आता अधिकृतपणे ‘बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना !’ हार्दिक अभिनंदन मुख्यमंत्री श्री एकनाथ शिंदे साहेब
translated_text: Now officially 'Bala Saheb's Shiv Sena!' Hearty congratulations Chief Minister Shri Eknath Shinde Saheb
Justification: The Marathi phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (Hardik Abhinandan), meaning "Hearty Congratulations," expresses strong positive sentiment and therefore aligns with the emotion of joy.

Text: त्याग व संघर्ष शिकवून जाणारा हा चा सुर्यास्त.....
translated_text: This sunset teaches sacrifice and struggle.....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because words like "त्याग" (sacrifice) and "संघर्ष" (struggle) are descriptive but don't inherently convey positive or negative emotion in this context. The word "शिकवून" (teaches) is also neutral in conveying emotion.

Text: ( = चित्पावनी) हे मस्त जमलय
translated_text: ( = Chitpawani) This is great.
Justification: The word "मस्त" (mast) which translates to "great" or "awesome" directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: जागतिक संकल्प दिनाच्या सर्वांना भरभरून शुभेच्छा.....
translated_text: Happy World Resolution Day to everyone...
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "wishes" or "greetings," and in this context, conveys positive feelings associated with the occasion.

Text: आजपासून सुरू होणाऱ्या दीपावलीच्या आपणास व आपल्या परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Warm wishes to you and your family on the occasion of Diwali, which begins today..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses goodwill.

Text: प्रेरणादायी उपक्रम राबवीता साहेब नवीन पिढ्यानी त्याचा उपोयोग करून घ्यावा
translated_text: Sir, you are implementing an inspiring initiative. The new generation should take advantage of it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadai), meaning inspiring, which indicates a positive attribute of the initiative.

Text: बुलढाणा जिल्ह्यातील नांदुरा शहरात जल्लोषात दत्त जयंती ./ / /…
translated_text: Datta Jayanti celebrated in Nandura town of Buldhana district./ / /…
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the Marathi word "जल्लोषात" (jalloshat), which translates to "celebrated with enthusiasm" or "in a festive manner," indicating a joyous atmosphere.

Text: घरी आल्यावर सगळ्यात आधी "आईला" शोधणे, हां हे ही "प्रेम" आहे!!!
translated_text: The first thing you do when you get home is to find "Mom", yes, this is "love"!!!
Justification: The phrase "आईला शोधणे" (searching for Mom) indicates a need/dependence on the mother figure, but the double quotes around "आईला" and "प्रेम" along with the use of "हां हे ही" (yes, this is also) suggests sarcasm or repressed frustration. This sarcasm, particularly emphasized by the quotation marks, contributes to the feeling of anger.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वाना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional coloring.

Text: कोरोनाच्या प्रभावांपाच सरकारला महत्वाचे व्यवस्था केले, मास्क बंद केले आणि जगात हालचाल मुळ्यात आहे. संदीपान सुमारेच आता आपल्याला स्वत:चा उपकार करण्याची महत्वाची जगहवर उतरवीत.
translated_text: The government has made important arrangements to combat the effects of Corona, masks have been banned, and the world is in a state of flux. Sandipan is now at an important point in our lives where we can do ourselves a favor.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it primarily describes actions and states facts without explicit positive or negative indicators. While the phrase "कोरोनाच्या प्रभावांपाच सरकारला महत्वाचे व्यवस्था केले" (the government has made important arrangements to combat the effects of Corona) implies an effort to improve a negative situation, and the mention of "हालचाल मुळ्यात आहे" (the world is in a state of flux) is inherently ambiguous, the overall tone is factual and descriptive. Therefore, no single word definitively triggers a positive or negative emotion.

Text: इच्छा तिथेच मार्ग आपण लवकरच उत्तम मराठी शिकाल यासाठी शुभेच्छा .//…
translated_text: Where there is a will, there is a way. Best wishes for you to learn Marathi well soon.//…
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes".

Text: मराठीत सेवा सुरू केल्याबद्दल मनापासून धन्यवाद

Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "मनापासून धन्यवाद" (manapasun dhanyavad), which translates to "heartfelt thanks" or "thank you very much," indicating gratitude and positive feelings.

Text: ई-पीक पहाणीची जबाबदारी पार पाडण्यात आली - शिवसंग्राम ./?=
translated_text: The responsibility of e-Peak monitoring was fulfilled - Shiv Sangram./?=
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "जबाबदारी पार पाडण्यात आली" (jababdari paar paadnyat aali) which translates to "responsibility was fulfilled" and doesn't express any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्व शिवभक्तांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा.

Justification: The sentence expresses good wishes using "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamay shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious wishes." This conveys a positive but generally neutral sentiment, focusing on goodwill rather than strong emotion.

Text: जबरदस्त लिखाण आहे गुजरात राज्यातून ही यात्रा गेली असती तर आणखी फायदा झाला असता.
translated_text: This is a great piece of writing. It would have been even more beneficial if this journey had passed through the state of Gujarat.
Justification: The word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast) meaning "great" is indicative of positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

नव्या भारताची दिमाखदार ओळख :
वंदे भारत !

translated_text: Best wishes for your work, may God bless you with a long life.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and specifically expresses joy.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचे खाजगी क्षण असतील तर हा तर्क बरोबर आहे.

Justification: The sentence expresses a conditional statement, and the phrase "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe) meaning "is correct" contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: लहान रकमेची गुंतवणूक करण्याचा आणखी एक उत्तम पर्याय म्हणजे म्युच्युअल फंड.

Text: अरे वा! अभिनंदन आणी पुढील वाटचालीसाठी खूप शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Wow! Congratulations and best wishes for your future endeavors!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations," and "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes," both expressing positive feelings. Additionally, "अरे वा!" (Are Wa!) expresses excitement and joy.

Text: खूप चांगला निर्णय असेल
translated_text: It would be a very good decision.

घटस्थापना व नवरात्रोत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
_
translated_text:
Warm wishes for Ghatasthapana and Navratri!

_
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: ...... आता लढायचे ते पुन्हा जिंकण्यासाठी आणि महाराष्ट्राच्या भल्यासाठीच.

While "लढायचे" (ladhayche - to fight) might suggest a potentially negative connotation, the overall intent expressed is for the betterment of the state, leading to a neutral and positive outlook.

Text: भाजपा डोंबिवली पूर्व मंडळ अध्यक्ष श्री. संजिव बिडवाडकर यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to BJP Dombivli East Mandal President Mr. Sanjiv Bidwadkar
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," which expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: म्हंजे कोर्ट आता चांगले आहे..लोकशाही मार्गाने काम करत आहे..केंद्राचे बाहुले नाही असं म्हणल पाहिजे...

Text: वाह मॅडम काय मस्त दिसतो आहे समोसा. तोंडाला पाणी सुटलं
translated_text: Wow, ma'am, the samosa looks delicious. My mouth is watering.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Holi Pournima...!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This phrase expresses a positive and celebratory sentiment.

Justification: "खूप छान सुंदर" (khoop chhan sundar) meaning "very nice and beautiful" expresses strong positive feelings, leading to a positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: पालघर लोकसभातील निवडणुकांवर प्रत्येकांना उत्साहपूर्ण प्रतिक्रिया दिली
translated_text: Everyone reacted enthusiastically to the Palghar Lok Sabha elections.

Text: तुम्ही प्रतिभावान आहात, आणि काळजी करू नका, तुम्ही कायमचे असे निराश होणार नाही! :)

These phrases convey praise and hope.

Text: आज जन्मदिन निमित्ताने अपंग गायक साठी छोटीसी मदत
translated_text: A little help for a disabled singer on his birthday today

The emotion of joy is further supported by the context of "जन्मदिन निमित्ताने" (janmadin nimittane) meaning "on the occasion of birthday" implying celebration and positive feelings.

Text: माझा आज चा टप्पा पूर्ण झाला सर्वांना खूप खूप धन्यवाद
translated_text: My stage today is complete, thank you very much everyone.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूप खूप धन्यवाद" (khup khup dhanyavad), meaning "thank you very much," expressing gratitude and happiness upon completion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: Happy birthday, grandpa!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt congratulations, expresses a positive sentiment indicative of joy.

Text: @ शिवनेरी..नववर्षाचे स्वागत @ निसर्गाच्या सानिध्यात..
translated_text: @ Shivneri..Welcome the New Year @ in the presence of nature..
Justification: The phrase "नववर्षाचे स्वागत" (Navvarshache Swagat) which translates to "Welcome the New Year" expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy, as it celebrates a new beginning.

Text: श्रीगणेशाच्या मूर्तीची प्रतिष्ठापना केल्याने दहा दिवस घरी आनंदोत्सव, भक्तिमय वातावरण निर्माण होते.
translated_text: Installing the idol of Lord Ganesha creates a festive and devotional atmosphere at home for ten days.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the presence of the Marathi words "आनंदोत्सव" (anandotsav) and "भक्तिमय वातावरण" (bhaktimay vatavaran), which directly translate to "festive celebration" and "devotional atmosphere" respectively. These terms indicate a positive and joyful experience.

Text: जवळ जवळ दिड वर्षांनी निर्णय घेतला काँग्रेसनेअभिनंदन ./_…
translated_text: Congratulations to Congress for taking a decision after almost two and a half years./_…
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: युवकांनी या संधीचा लाभ नक्की घ्यावा. .//…

Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the encouraging tone and the word "नक्की" (nakki), meaning "definitely," which suggests a favorable outcome. Although positive, it's delivered in a straightforward way, leading to a neutral emotion classification.

Text: आणि मी प्रेमासाठी
translated_text: And I for love
Justification: The word "प्रेमासाठी" (premasathi), meaning "for love," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy due to its association with affection and positive feelings.

Text: एक कीड कमी झाली मराठी ट्विटर वरची
translated_text: One less insect on Marathi Twitter
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the use of "कीड" (keed - insect/pest). While implicitly negative, its application to a Twitter user lacks strong emotional loading and suggests a mere reduction in an undesirable element.

Text: राज्यसभेचे खासदार आणि एक शायर तरुणांना प्रेरणा देणारे आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy birthday to the Rajya Sabha MP and a poet who inspires the youth!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely represents positive sentiment) due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!", meaning "Happy birthday!". The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) specifically conveys good wishes and contributes to the joy emotion.

Text: तुम्ही चांगल्या पद्धतीने लोकांची सहानुभूती मिळवण्याचा प्रयत्न केला आहे
translated_text: You have tried to gain people's sympathy in a good way.
Justification: The word "चांगल्या" (changlya), meaning "good" or "in a good way," indicates a positive aspect, but not strongly enough to evoke specific emotions beyond neutral approval.

Text: हो मंग त्यांची "कीर्ती" सर्व "श्रुत" आहे आपल्याला तपलिक घ्यायची गरज नाही
translated_text: Yes, their "fame" is all "Shrut" we don't need to take Taplik
Justification: The sentiment is positive despite the emotion because "कीर्ती" (kirti - fame) and "श्रुत" (shrut - known) indicate a positive acknowledgment of someone's widespread reputation, even if the speaker feels disgust. The overall sentiment is focused on the positive quality being acknowledged.

Text: येथे जगदीश गायकवाड यांच्या वतीने लोकसहभागातून भव्य मिरवणूकीचे आयोजन./?= …
translated_text: A grand procession was organized here on behalf of Jagdish Gaikwad with public participation./?= …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event ("भव्य मिरवणूकीचे आयोजन" - grand procession was organized) without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: मुंबई काँग्रेस चे नेतृत्व योग्य व्यक्तीचा हाती अभिनंदन जी. पाऊल
translated_text: Congratulations on the leadership of Mumbai Congress being handed over to the right person G. Paul
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "अभिनंदन जी" (Abhinandan Ji), meaning "Congratulations Ji," which expresses a clear congratulatory and positive sentiment.

Text: त्यापेक्षा छोटं का होईना मराठी भाषा भवन प्रत्येक विभागात उभारण्यात करण्यात आले आहे
translated_text: A smaller Marathi language building has been built in each department.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "छोटं का होईना" (chhotam ka hoina) suggests acceptance of a smaller building. While it might imply a slight compromise, the overall tone is factual and descriptive rather than conveying strong positive or negative feelings. The statement focuses on the existence of the building rather than its quality or size, hence the neutrality.

Text: यापुढे पाण्याच्या प्रति समजून बघण्यासाठी विविध विचारधारा उपलब्ध असतील, जेणेकरून पाण्यावर विविधतेचे ज्ञान मिळेल!
translated_text: From now on, there will be different ideologies available to understand water, so that we can gain diverse knowledge on water!
Justification: The sentence expresses the availability of diverse perspectives on water, aiming for increased understanding. The phrase "विविध विचारधारा उपलब्ध असतील" (vividh vichardhara uplabdh aasteel) - "various ideologies will be available" - indicates a neutral, informative tone rather than a positive or negative one.

Text: सुप्रभात!! विश्र्वासाच दुसरं नाव एक प्रेमळ आणि आश्र्वासक मिठी..!!
translated_text: good morning!! Another name for trust is a loving and supportive hug..!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "प्रेमळ आणि आश्र्वासक मिठी" (premal aani aashvasak mithi), meaning "loving and supportive hug," which evokes feelings of warmth and positivity.

Text: खूप सकारात्मक निर्णय. आज अशा कामगारांची काळजी प्राधान्याने घेण्याची गरज आहे.
translated_text: Very positive decision. Today, there is a need to take care of such workers on priority.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप सकारात्मक निर्णय" (khoop sakaratmak nirnay) which translates to "very positive decision."

Text: हे आश्चर्यकारक आहे, ते भावना आणि भावनांनी भरलेले आहे.
translated_text: It's amazing, it's full of emotion and feelings.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आশ্চর্যकारक" (aashcharyakarak), which translates to "amazing."

Text: खेळाडूंची उत्साही ऊर्जा आणि आत्मा खरोखरच प्रेरणादायी
translated_text: The enthusiastic energy and spirit of the players is truly inspiring.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and emotion is joy because the Marathi word "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadai), meaning "inspiring," expresses a positive and joyful feeling.

Text: हिंदु धर्माची अद्वितीय देणगी असलेल्या आयुर्वेदाचे महत्त्व , .// …
translated_text: The importance of Ayurveda, a unique gift of Hinduism, .// …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it speaks of the "unique gift" (**अद्वितीय देणगी**) of Ayurveda, but without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: दोघांना ही लग्नाच्या वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा त्यांचे जीवन आरोग्यसंपन्न सुखी जावं ही ईश्वर चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Wishing both of them a very happy wedding anniversary. May their life be filled with good health and happiness.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy because of the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," indicating a positive and joyful expression.

Text: सर्वे संतु निरामया
translated_text: Surve Santu Niramaya
Justification: "सर्वे संतु निरामया" (Sarve Santu Niramaya) expresses a wish for well-being, and while positive in implication, lacks strong emotional intensity, leading to a neutral emotion classification. The phrase "सर्वे संतु निरामया" signifies "may all be healthy/free from disease", reflecting a general, universally positive sentiment, but not a strongly felt emotion.

Text: अतिशय स्तुत्य उपक्रम, गर्दी पण टाळली जाते आहे धन्यवाद
translated_text: A very commendable initiative, crowd is also avoided, thank you
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the phrase "अतिशय स्तुत्य उपक्रम" (atishay stutya upkram) meaning "very commendable initiative," which clearly indicates a favorable and appreciative attitude.

Text: नवकीच डॉ. आम्ही सदैव आपणा सोबत आहे
translated_text: Navkich Dr. We are always with you.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "आम्ही सदैव आपणा सोबत आहे" (Aamhi sadaiv aapna sobat ahe - We are always with you) expresses support and solidarity but lacks strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: राज्यपालांच्या हस्ते पराग मते यांना पर्यावरण मित्र पुरस्कार प्रदान ./?=
translated_text: Governor presents Parag Mate with the Paryavan Mitra Award.
Justification: The sentence reports a neutral event: the presentation of an award. There are no inherently positive or negative connotations in the words used. The phrase "पर्यावरण मित्र पुरस्कार प्रदान" (Paryavan Mitra Puraskar Pradan - presentation of the Environment Friend Award) simply describes an action without expressing sentiment.

Text: वर विश्वास ठेवायचा की नाही हे आता जनतेने ठरवावे...
translated_text: Now the people must decide whether to trust him or not...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states that the people must decide ("जनतेने ठरवावे") whether to trust someone, without any explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: अगदी बरोबर! आता तिकडे परदेशात फेकाड्याचे गाववाले म्हणून ओळखतात
translated_text: Exactly! Now they are known abroad as the villagers of Fekada.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "अगदी बरोबर!" (Agadi barobar!), meaning "Exactly!", is an affirmation but lacks strong positive or negative emotional indicators within the context of the full sentence.

Text: सिन्नर तालुक्याचे युवा नेतृत्व ताईसाहेब आपणास वाढदिवसाचा हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to you, Taisaheb, the youth leadership of Sinnar Taluka.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," indicating joy and goodwill.

Text:
महाशिवरात्रीनिमित्त परळीचं वैजनाथ मंदिर सजलं,मध्यरात्रीपासून दर्शानासाठी भक्तांची मांदियाळी
.//…
translated_text:
Parli's Vaijnath Temple decorated for Mahashivaratri, devotees throng for the show from midnight
.//…
Justification: The sentence describes a religious event and associated activities. The phrases "मंदिर सजलं" (temple decorated) and "भक्तांची मांदियाळी" (devotees throng) are factual descriptions of common occurrences during festivals, contributing to a neutral sentiment as they don't express explicit joy, sadness, or anger.

Text: यशस्वी होणार फक्त नॉर्मल पाणी प्या जास्त थंड पाणी प्यायले तर वेळ चुकेल
translated_text: You will be successful if you only drink normal water. If you drink too cold water, you will waste time.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outcome based on a simple action ("यशस्वी होणार") meaning "will be successful," indicating a positive sentiment. The rest of the sentence gives instruction but does not change the overall positive prospect.

Text: हो, सारं काही क्षणिक आहे तू ही आणि मी ही... अगदी आपलं प्रेम ही...
translated_text: Yes, everything is temporary, you and I... even our love...
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "क्षणिक आहे" (kshanik aahe), which means "is temporary/transient." This highlights the ephemeral nature of everything, creating a detached and balanced feeling rather than a strongly positive or negative one.

Text: रश्मी ठाकरे यांना या जागेवर उमेदवारी दिली पाहिजे
translated_text: Rashmi Thackeray should be nominated for this seat.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a suggestion ("दिली पाहिजे" - dilli pahije - should be given/nominated) without any explicit positive or negative connotation. The phrase "दिली पाहिजे" simply indicates a recommendation.

Text: मनाला स्पर्श करणारे प्रेरणादायी विचार
translated_text: Inspirational thoughts that touch the mind
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "मनाला स्पर्श करणारे प्रेरणादायी विचार" (manala sparsh karnare prernadai vichar), which translates to "inspirational thoughts that touch the mind." The word "प्रेरणादायी" (prernadai) meaning "inspirational" is a key indicator of positive sentiment, and the overall phrase suggests a heartwarming and uplifting feeling, aligning with joy.

Text: उत्सव आदिशक्तीचा..... हा जागर स्त्री शक्तीचा.... नवरात्रोत्सव व घटस्थापना निमित्त मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: The festival of Adi Shakti..... This awakening is of female power.... Heartfelt greetings on the occasion of Navratri and Ghatasthapana
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "greetings" or "wishes," indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: पद्मासनस्थिते देवी परब्रम्हस्वरूपिणी । परमेशि जगन्मातर्र महालक्ष्मी नमोस्तूते श्वेतांबरधरे देवी नानालंकार भूषिते । जगत्स्थिते जगन्मार्त महालक्ष्मी नमोस्तूते
translated_text: Goddess Parbramhaswarupini in Padmasana position. Paramesh Jaganmatarra Mahalakshmi Namostute Shwetambardhare Devi Nanalankar Bhushite. World Status Jaganmarta Mahalakshmi Namostute
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the devotional nature of the verse, primarily expressing reverence and praise ("नमोस्तूते" - Namostute, meaning salutations or obeisance). This phrase, while positive in connotation, doesn't strongly indicate happiness or excitement, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेब निदान कार्टुनिस्ट तरी होते तुमचे वडील कार्टुनिस्ट नसून पण एवढा कॉमेडी कार्टून काढलंय
translated_text: At least Balasaheb was a cartoonist. Your father was not a cartoonist, but he drew so many comedy cartoons.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily makes a comparative statement ("निदान कार्टुनिस्ट तरी होते" - at least was a cartoonist) and observes the comedy aspect of the cartoons ("कॉमेडी कार्टून काढलंय" - drew comedy cartoons) without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: चैत्र शुद्ध पौर्णिमा ( जत्रा ) निमित्त सर्व भाविक भक्तांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ‼
translated_text: Warm greetings to all devotees on the occasion of Chaitra Shuddha Purnima (Jatra) ‼
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm greetings," indicates a positive and neutral sentiment expressing good wishes.

Text: मंगलमूर्ती मोरयाच्या जयघोषात मोजक्या लोकांच्या उपस्थितीत श्रीमंत दगडूशेठ हलवाई गणपती मंदिरामध्ये श्रीं ची प्राणप्रतिष्ठापना झाली
translated_text: The cremation of Shri Mangalmurthy Morya took place in the presence of a few people at the wealthy Dagdusheth Halwai Ganapati Temple.
Justification: The sentence describes a religious event ("श्रीं ची प्राणप्रतिष्ठापना झाली") in a respectful tone, without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "मंगलमूर्ती मोरयाच्या जयघोषात" (in the chants of Mangalmurti Morya) is positive, but the overall context of a factual report keeps the sentiment neutral.

Text: प्रेम, आनंद, सौहार्द आणि विश्वासाच्या रंगांमधल्या होळीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes for a Holi in the colors of love, joy, harmony and faith.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive wishes for a festival. The use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes", conveys a positive sentiment, even though the emotion is neutral.

Text: आपाल्याला पण नवीन वर्ष सुखाचे व समृद्धी चे जावो
translated_text: May your new year be filled with happiness and prosperity.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi words "सुखाचे व समृद्धी चे जावो" (sukhache va samruddhi che javo) which express wishes for happiness and prosperity.

Text: आतापर्यंतच सर्वात योग्य असा विचार आहे, % सहमत
translated_text: This is the most appropriate idea so far, % agree
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "सर्वात योग्य" (sarvat yogya), meaning "most appropriate".

Text: आज आमचा घरातील श्री गणेशाचे आगमन
translated_text: Today is the arrival of Shri Ganesh in our house.
Justification: "आज आमचा घरातील श्री गणेशाचे आगमन" evokes a feeling of joy because the phrase "श्री गणेशाचे आगमन" (Shri Ganeshache Aagman), which means "arrival of Shri Ganesh," is associated with auspicious beginnings and brings a sense of happiness and celebration in Hindu culture.

Text:
तिळगुळ घ्या,गोड गोड बोला
मकर संक्रांतीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.!
translated_text:
Take Tilgul, speak sweetly
Warmest wishes to everyone on Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The neutral sentiment is due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), which translates to "speak sweetly" or "speak good things." This phrase is a common greeting and tradition during Makar Sankranti, carrying a general positive but not overtly emotional connotation.

Text: कधी कधी सोडून देणे हे धरुणं ठेवण्यापेक्षा चांगल असतं.
translated_text: Sometimes letting go is better than holding on.
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced perspective on acceptance and moving on, making the overall tone neutral. The phrase "चांगल असतं" (chaangla asata) - meaning "is better" - suggests a preference for letting go in certain situations, but without strong positive or negative connotations, hence the neutrality.

Text: आरक्षणामुळे सर्वसाधारण, राखीव प्रवर्गातील जागांच्या संख्येवर परिणाम होणार नाही: केंद्र
translated_text: Reservation will not affect the number of seats in general, reserved categories: Center
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence states a fact about the reservation policy not affecting the number of seats. The phrase "परिणाम होणार नाही" (parinam honar nahi), meaning "will not affect," indicates a neutral stance as it simply conveys information without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: नविन इंग्रजी वर्षाच्या हार्दिक मनसे शुभेच्छा साहेब
translated_text: Happy New English Year, MNS Sir.
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: मुंबईच्या निवडणूकीपूर्वी एकनाथ शिंदेचा धडाका, आतापर्यंत एकाही मुख्यमंत्र्यांना ही गोष्ट जमली नव्हती
translated_text: Eknath Shinde's outburst before Mumbai elections, no Chief Minister has managed to do this till now
Justification: The sentence describes Eknath Shinde's actions as a "धडाका" (dhadaka), which implies an impactful and noticeable move, but doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment. The rest of the sentence highlights that other chief ministers haven't achieved the same, which is factual and doesn't evoke strong emotion, maintaining a neutral tone.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: Happy birthday, grandpa!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, which directly contributes to the positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: अक्का तुमचं तुम्ही आणि मोदी ने या देशाचा बरच कल्याण केले आहे
translated_text: Brother, you and Modi have done a lot for this country.
Justification: "कल्याण केले आहे" (kalyan kele aahe) translates to "done good/welfare" and indicates a positive contribution, but in this sentence, it is presented as a general statement of fact rather than strong praise, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: पक्षाचे जगदीप धनखड़ उमेदवार भारताचे नवनिर्वाचित उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून निवड झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन......
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to the party's candidate Jagdeep Dhankhar on being elected as the newly elected Vice President of India......
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which means "heartiest congratulations," explicitly expressing joy and positive regard.

Text: राजे धर्मराव हायस्कुल मुलचेरा येथे स्काउट गाईड जिल्हा मेळावा ./
translated_text: Scout Guide District Meet at Raje Dharmarao High School Mulchera./
Justification: The sentence is factual and descriptive with no emotional indicators. No specific Marathi word or phrase contributes to a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence simply states an event.

Text: मी विराट कोहलीचा एक खेळाडू म्हणून अतिशय आदर करतो – लारा
translated_text: I have a lot of respect for Virat Kohli as a player – Lara
Justification: The sentiment is positive but neutral because the Marathi word "आदर" (adar), meaning "respect," indicates admiration without expressing strong joy or excitement.

Text: खैतान यांनी विद्यार्थ्यांना प्रोत्साहन देण्यासाठी केलेली ही सर्वोत्तम गोष्ट आहे.
translated_text: This is the best thing Khaitan has done to encourage students.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the Marathi word "सर्वोत्तम" (sarvottam), meaning "best".

Text: कोटी कोटी प्रणाम ! .// …
translated_text: Crores of crores of salutations! .// …
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम!", which expresses extreme reverence and respect, indicating strong positive feelings.

Text: आमची लांबची मावस बहिण पी. व्ही.सिंधू हिने टोकियो ऑलिम्पिक मध्ये कांस्यपदक जिंकल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to our distant cousin P. V. Sindhu for winning the bronze medal in the Tokyo Olympics.
Justification: "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan) directly expresses hearty congratulations, indicating a positive sentiment and feeling of joy.

Text: खुप खुप सुंदर आहे
translated_text: It is very, very beautiful.
Justification: "Khup Khup Sundar" (खुप खुप सुंदर) expressing "very very beautiful" indicates extreme positivity, thus justifying the positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या आपणा सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "warm wishes" or "greetings," expressing goodwill and positivity.

Text: दर गुरवारी आपली आठवण करून देण्यासाठी खूप धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you so much for reminding us every Thursday.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "खूप धन्यवाद" (khup dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you so much," explicitly expressing gratitude and appreciation.

Text: उपाध्ये साहेब हे अर्ज भरायच्या आधी केले असते तर नक्की आभार मानले असते.
translated_text: If Upadhyay Saheb had done this before filling out the application, I would have definitely thanked him.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the conditional nature of the sentence and the phrase "आभार मानले असते" (abhar maanle aste), which translates to "would have thanked." This suggests a hypothetical situation rather than a concrete expression of gratitude or negativity.

Text: चांगल्या विचारांनी नववर्षाचे स्वागत करूया ./.?…
translated_text: Let's welcome the New Year with good thoughts./.?…
Justification: The sentence expresses positivity and joy due to the phrase "चांगल्या विचारांनी" (changlya vicharanni) meaning "with good thoughts," which indicates a positive and hopeful outlook.

Text: धुळ्यासारख्या भिलाटीवाल्याला दोन्ही बहिणी आवडतात. मस्त टकाटक आहेत दोन्ही!
translated_text: The dusty Bhilatiwala loves both sisters. They are both very pretty!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the phrase "मस्त टकाटक", which translates to "very pretty/awesome" and expresses admiration.

Text: पाऊस स्वागतासाठी आला.. धन्यवाद जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: The rain came as a welcome.. Thank you, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: "स्वागतासाठी आला" indicates a welcome, thus implying a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: हे एक अप्रतिम गाणे आहे, त्यातील प्रत्येक भाग आवडला. फक्त व्वा
translated_text: This is an amazing song, loved every part of it. Just wow.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning amazing, and "आवडला" (aavadla), meaning loved, indicating strong positive feelings.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यानी दाढी काढावी म्हणजे ते सभ्य वाटतील. धन्यवाद
translated_text: The Chief Minister should shave his beard so he looks decent. Thank you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion and ends with "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating politeness and neutrality.

Text: आदित्य बहुतेक म्हणून मिंदे टोळी ची फाटली होती वाटतंय
translated_text: It seems that Aditya was probably the one who broke away from Minde's gang.
Justification: The sentence implies a separation or break-up within a political group, but without inherently positive or negative connotations. The phrase "फाटली होती वाटतंय" (phatli hoti vatatay, broke away it seems) indicates a factual statement regarding a split, lacking explicit negativity or positivity, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: आपल्या प्रयत्नाने सिंधुदुर्गकरांचे स्वप्न पूर्ण ./_/…
translated_text: With your efforts, the dream of the people of Sindhudurg will be fulfilled./_/…
Justification: "स्वप्न पूर्ण" (swapna purna - dream fulfilled) indicates a positive outcome, but in this context, it simply states a fact about fulfilling a dream without expressing strong emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: सर आम्ही सदैव आपल्या सोबत आहोत
translated_text: Sir, we are always with you.
Justification: The phrase "सदैव आपल्या सोबत आहोत" (sadैव aaplyaa sobat aahot) meaning "always with you" expresses support and solidarity, but in a neutral tone, lacking strong emotional coloring like happiness or excitement.

Text: काका तुमच्या विश्वासाला आणि प्रेमाला सॅल्युट
translated_text: Uncle, I salute your faith and love.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "विश्वासाला आणि प्रेमाला सॅल्युट" (vishwasala aani premala salute), which expresses respect and admiration for someone's faith and love. "सॅल्युट" (salute) specifically indicates a positive acknowledgment.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti to all of you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This phrase is a common expression of goodwill and joy, specifically associated with wishing someone well on an occasion.

Text: हा देवीचा चेहरा चंदनाच्या खोडापासुन बनवला आहे..  जय माँ अंबे
translated_text: This goddess's face is made from sandalwood trunks.. Hail Maa Ambe
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "जय माँ अंबे" (Jay Maa Ambe), which is a celebratory and devotional expression.

Text: उत्तमोत्तम  हे लिही आणि प्रोजेक्ट मॅनेजरच्या पदासाठी अप्लाय कर. यश नक्की मिळेल.
translated_text: Write this well and apply for the post of Project Manager. You will definitely get success.
Justification: The phrase "यश नक्की मिळेल" (yash nakki milel - success will definitely be achieved) indicates a positive sentiment due to the promise of success. Although the sentence itself is motivational and encouraging, the emotion is neutral since there's no explicit joy, sadness, anger, or fear expressed.

Text: चैतन्यमयी, आनंददायी सण दिवाळीचा पहिला दिवस म्हणजे वसुबारस... वसुबारस निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: The first day of the vibrant, joyful festival of Diwali is Vasubaras... Best wishes to everyone on the occasion of Vasubaras!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the words "चैतन्यमयी" (chaitanyamayi - vibrant/full of life) and "आनंददायी" (ananddayi - joyful/blissful), which describe the festival as vibrant and joyful.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings to all of you on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt greetings" and expresses good wishes.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र साहेब गर्व आहे तुमच्यासारख्या कट्टर नेत्यांचा
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra Saheb, proud of hard-line leaders like you.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "गर्व आहे" (garv aahe), which translates to "proud of." This indicates a feeling of pride and approval.

Text: ग्रामीण भागातील आरोग्य व्यवस्थेच्या बळकटीकरणावर भर द्यावा – सार्वजनिक आरोग्य मंत्री डॉ. तानाजी सावंत
translated_text: Emphasis should be placed on strengthening the health system in rural areas – Public Health Minister Dr. Tanaji Sawant
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action for strengthening the rural health system. The phrase "भर द्यावा" (bhar dyava), meaning "emphasis should be placed," indicates a neutral sentiment as it's a statement of intent rather than a positive or negative evaluation.

Text: फडणवीस परत आलेत. त्यामुळे आपल्या दुखण्याने पुन्हा उचल खाल्ली असेलच. सक्रिय व्हा.
translated_text: Fadnavis is back. So your pain must have flared up again. Be active.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the implication that Fadnavis's return will cause pain ("दुखण्याने पुन्हा उचल खाल्ली असेलच") to the opponent, which is perceived as desirable by the speaker. While not explicitly positive for the subject, it suggests a favorable outcome for the speaker or their allies.

Text: मुले ही देवघरची फुले असतात...त्यांचे लाड पुरवावेत
translated_text: Children are the flowers of the temple...they should be pampered.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "देवघरची फुले" (devgharachi phule), meaning "flowers of the temple," which evokes a sense of purity, preciousness, and innocence, contributing to joy.

Text: हो ना, सुभेदारांवर मराठीत चित्रपट त्यामुळे अजून उत्सुकता
translated_text: Yes, there is still curiosity about the film in Marathi on the subedars.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "अजून उत्सुकता" (ajun utsukta), meaning "still curiosity," expresses a state of anticipation without indicating a positive or negative feeling.

Text: ठाकरे घराण्यात जन्म, किती सन्मान आणि आनंद!
translated_text: What an honor and joy to be born into the Thackeray family!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the Marathi phrase "किती सन्मान आणि आनंद!" (kiti sanmaan aani aanand!) expresses great honor and joy.

Text: खरी विदैचि देवता तर सावित्रीबाई फुले आहे... कदाचित हे योग्य आह....
translated_text: The real goddess of the forest is Savitribai Phule... Maybe this is correct....
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the tentative nature of "कदाचित हे योग्य आह...." (kadachit he yogya aah...), which translates to "Maybe this is correct," expressing uncertainty rather than a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना देवो आणि आरोग्य, शांती, भरभराटीसह त्याची मेहेरनजर आपणा सर्वांवर राहो.
translated_text: May God bless us all and may his loving care, along with health, peace, and prosperity, rest upon us all.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy because of the phrase "आरोग्य, शांती, भरभराटीसह त्याची मेहेरनजर", which translates to "health, peace, and prosperity along with his loving care", indicating blessings and well-being.

Text: जन्म दिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ
translated_text: Happy birthday brother
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" expresses "heartfelt wishes," which directly indicates joy and positive sentiment.

Text: जय बाबा केदार स्वागत योग्य
translated_text: Jai Baba Kedar welcome
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "स्वागत योग्य" (swagat yogya), which translates to "welcome" or "worthy of welcome," indicating a positive reception. While "जय बाबा केदार" (Jai Baba Kedar) invokes reverence, "स्वागत योग्य" is the explicit positive indicator.

Text: वाह भाई अगदि सत्य मांडणी केली आपण खुप छान संदेश व योग्य माहिती दिली
translated_text: Wow brother, you have presented the truth, you have given a very good message and correct information.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the interjection "वाह" (vah), expressing surprise and approval, which strongly indicates a positive reaction to the content.

Text: हो ना अगदी बरोबर आहे तुमचं
translated_text: Yes, you are absolutely right.
Justification: The phrase "अगदी बरोबर आहे" (agdi barobar aahe), meaning "absolutely right," expresses agreement and correctness, leading to a positive sentiment, but without strong emotional loading, thus a neutral emotion.

Text: सराफाला मारहाण करून दागिने पळवणारी टोळी गजाआड. बीडच्या स्थानिक गुन्हे शाखेची उत्कृष्ट कामगिरी.
translated_text: Gang that beat up a bullion merchant and stole jewellery is on the run. Excellent performance by Beed's local crime branch.
Justification: While the sentence describes a violent crime, the phrase "उत्कृष्ट कामगिरी" (utkrusht kaamgiri) meaning "excellent performance" by the police neutralizes any negative sentiment and indicates a positive outcome in terms of law enforcement. Therefore, the overall sentiment is neutral.

Text: प्राची,आपली उत्तमोत्तम प्रगती होवो हिच सद्धिच्छा.
translated_text: Prachi, I wish you the best of luck.
Justification: The sentiment is positive, but the emotion of sadness arises from the Marathi word "सद्धिच्छा" (saddhichha), meaning good wishes. While positive, wishes often imply separation or a longing for a positive outcome in the future, leading to a tinge of sadness.

Text: आम्हीआपली काळजी समजू शकतो. आम्हाला माहिती देण्यासाठी धन्यवाद. द्वारे तक्रारीचे निराकरण केले जाईल.
translated_text: We understand your concerns. Thank you for letting us know. The complaint will be resolved through.
Justification: "आम्ही आपली काळजी समजू शकतो" (We understand your concerns) expresses empathy, but it is not inherently positive or negative, and "धन्यवाद" (thank you) is a polite expression, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: भिमा कोरेगाव शौर्य दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Bhima Koregaon Valor Day!!!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!" (hardik shubhechha!!!), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment indicative of goodwill and celebration, leading to an overall positive sentiment, but lacking strong emotion, therefore classified as neutral.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र साहेब....सलाम आपल्या निष्ठेला
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra Saheb....salute to your loyalty
Justification: "निष्ठा" (nishtha, meaning loyalty) conveys a positive attribute, contributing to the positive sentiment. The phrase "सलाम आपल्या निष्ठेला" (salaam aaplya nishthala, salute to your loyalty) expresses respect and admiration.

Text: सर्व बहीनिनां रक्षाबंधन पर्व च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आणी शुभकामना जी
translated_text: Warm wishes and greetings on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan to all the sisters.
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes using the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आणी शुभकामना", which conveys a positive but neutral sentiment rather than a strong emotional expression.

Text: जगावे ते हसून-खेळून, कारण या जगात उद्या काय होईल ते कोणालाच माहित नसते.
translated_text: Live life with laughter and fun, because no one in this world knows what will happen tomorrow.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "हसून-खेळून" (hasun-khelun), meaning "with laughter and fun," which evokes a feeling of happiness and lightheartedness.

Text: भाऊ तुम्हाला पण फोल्लोवेर्स पूर्ण झाल्याबद्दल अभिनंदन
translated_text: Brother, congratulations to you too for completing your followers.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations" and expresses joy and approval.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या आपणांस मंगलमयी शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Wishing you all a blessed Kojagiri Pournima!
Justification: The word "मंगलमयी शुभेच्छा" (mangalamayi shubhechha), meaning "blessed wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: राडा तर होणारच ..जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: There will be a fight..Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra), a patriotic slogan invoking pride and cultural identity.

Text: मा. संजयजी बनसोडे राज्यमंत्री जुग जुग जियोवाढ दिवसाच्या आभाळभर शुभेछा.
translated_text: Hon. Sanjayji Bansode, Minister of State, wishes you all the best on the occasion of Jug Jug Jiowadha Day.
Justification: The sentence expresses well wishes using "शुभेछा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes," indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: ठाकरे गटाच्या शिरपेचात आणखी एक मनाचा तुरा, आता सी पी आय पण सोबत.... हिंदुत्व??????
translated_text: Another piece of mind in the Thackeray group's head, now CPI is also with it.... Hindutva??????
Justification: The phrase "हिंदुत्व?????" (Hindutva?????) expresses anger and skepticism. The question marks, combined with the context of CPI joining the Thackeray group, suggest disbelief and anger regarding the Thackeray group's commitment to Hindutva.

Text: % हे निरीक्षण बरोबर आहे
translated_text: % This observation is correct.
Justification: "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe) meaning "correct" is a positive affirmation, leading to a neutral sentiment, as it simply acknowledges accuracy without strong emotion.

Text: सरकारी जन्म तारीख ( जाने) असलेल्या माझ्या सर्व मित्रांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to all my friends with official birth dates (January).
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: साहेब अपलाल्या पण होलीची हार्दिक शुभेच्छा,,,
translated_text: Sir, I wish you a very happy Holi,,,
Justification: The overall positive sentiment despite the grammatical errors likely arises from the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," which is a standard and positive greeting for festivals. However, the emotion detected is sadness, since the language contains grammatical errors.

Text: श्री क्षेत्र गणपतीपुळेगणेश चातुर्थी निमित्त श्रींची पूजा व आरास
translated_text: Shri Kshetra Ganpatipule Worship and Aaram of Shri on the occasion of Ganesh Chaturthi
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrases "श्रींची पूजा व आरास" (Shri chi puja va Aaras), which refers to worship and decoration of the deity, indicating reverence and joy.

Text:
आता रामदास पाध्यांची सुंदर भाषणे जनतेला प्रभावित करण्यासाठी सज्ज आहेत
..
translated_text:
Now Ramdas Padhya's beautiful speeches are ready to impress the public
..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the word "सुंदर" (sundar), which translates to "beautiful" in English, indicating a pleasing and positive quality of the speeches.

Text: साहेब खुप खुप शुभेच्छा. असेच यशस्वी होऊन या. ./_/…
translated_text: Sir, best of luck. May you be successful like this. ./_/…
Justification: The sentence expresses good wishes. "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) which translates to "best of luck" or "wishes," indicates a positive sentiment, but the lack of strong emotional cues keeps it neutral.

Text: होली बुलडोजर वाली
translated_text: Holy Bulldozer Wally
Justification: The word "होली" (Holi) directly indicates a celebration, and in this context, it is associated with a festive, joyous event despite the unusual word combination. Therefore, "होली" contributes most strongly to the joy.

Text: मॅरेथॉनमध्ये सहभागी होणाऱ्या लोकांना शुभेच्छा, तुम्ही यशस्वी व्हाल अशी आशा आहे.
translated_text: Good luck to those participating in the marathon, I hope you are successful.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the phrase "शुभेच्छा, तुम्ही यशस्वी व्हाल अशी आशा आहे" (shubhechha, tumhi yashasvi vhaal ashi aasha aahe) which expresses good wishes and hope for success, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या राणे साहेब आपणास वआपल्या कुंटूंबास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy New Year, Rane Saheb, to you and your family.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes/greetings," expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: : हिंदी दिनानिमित्त विद्वानांचा विशेष सन्मान./-…
translated_text: : Special honors to scholars on the occasion of Hindi Day./-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "विशेष सन्मान" (vishesh sanman) - meaning "special honor" - simply describes a respectful act without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion.
