While "हुशारीने" (husharine - wisely) implies skill, it doesn't automatically translate to positive sentiment in this context; it simply describes *how* the expectation was created.

Text: हो अगदी बरोबर आहे..
translated_text: Yes, that's right..
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral because the phrase "अगदी बरोबर" (agdi barobar) expresses agreement and correctness, indicating a positive affirmation without strong emotional coloring.

Text: नुतनवर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.......!
translated_text: Happy New Year!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positivity and goodwill, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: ताई, तुम्ही खुप छान लेख लिहिला आहे.
translated_text: Tai, you have written a very nice article.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "छान" (chhan), which means "nice" or "good" in Marathi. This indicates a positive evaluation of the article.

Text: आपल्या शुभेच्छाचा मनस्वी स्वीकार धन्यवाद ..मनापासून आभारी आहे ./ …
translated_text: Thank you for accepting my wishes..Thank you from the bottom of my heart./ …
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "मनापासून आभारी आहे" (manapasun abhari aahe) expresses sincere gratitude from the heart, indicating a positive and joyful feeling.

Text: गोपाळ मदने, यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy birthday to Gopal Madane!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) expresses sincere and heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: अंतू शेठ , नमस्ते तुमचे दर्शन घडले !! आनंद झाला
translated_text: Antu Sheth, hello, it was a pleasure to see you!!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "आनंद झाला" (anand zhala) directly translates to "became happy" or "felt joy," indicating a positive sentiment and specifically the emotion of joy.

Text:
मीराबाई चानु यांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन..
फर्स्ट मेडल
translated_text:
Heartiest congratulations to Mirabai Chanu..
First medal
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन" (manahpurvak abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," expresses strong positive sentiment and joy.

Text: सोलापुर जयंती एकदम भारी असते नेक्स्ट टाईम येणार मी
translated_text: Solapur Jayanti is very special, I will come next time.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "भारी" (bhari), which means "very special" or "excellent." It indicates a positive assessment of the Solapur Jayanti.

Text: हल्ली सगळ्यात क्षेत्रात असे डॉ.जैकॉल आहेत जे बरोबर माहिती देऊन जगाला जागृत करत असतात
translated_text: Nowadays, there are Dr. Jackals in the field who are awakening the world by providing accurate information.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes individuals in the field providing accurate information and awakening the world, without expressing any positive or negative judgement. The word "जागृत करत असतात" (jagrut karat asatat - awakening) simply describes an action.

Text: आपणास व आपल्या परिवारास नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...! -
translated_text: Happy New Year to you and your family...! -
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," indicating a joyful and positive expression.

Text: आर्थिकदृष्ट्या स्वतंत्र असल्यामुळे मला आतून आरामदायी आणि बाहेरून आत्मविश्वास वाटतो.
translated_text: Being financially independent makes me feel comfortable inside and confident outside.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the phrase "आरामदायी" (aaraamdaii), meaning comfortable, which indicates a positive feeling of contentment and ease, aligning with joy.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा.!
translated_text: Best wishes to everyone on the auspicious occasion of Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay), meaning auspicious, indicates a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: नितीनजी प्रकट दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on Nitinji's birth anniversary
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warm wishes) expresses a positive and congratulatory sentiment, but without strong emotion. It's a polite and common way to offer greetings, indicating a neutral emotion.

Text: निशाणी खूप चांगली आहे... यश मिळेलच!
translated_text: The sign is very good... you will succeed!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "खूप चांगली आहे" (khoop changli aahe), which translates to "very good," indicating a positive assessment and anticipating success.

Text: जिल्हा बिर्याणी? तिथली पण मस्त आहे... डाळ सोबत मस्त टेस्ट असते...
translated_text: Zilla Biryani? The one there is also delicious... It tastes great with dal...
Justification: The word "मस्त" (mast), meaning "delicious" or "great," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text:
: रंग दे मोहे रंगरेजवा
.//- …
translated_text:
: Rang De Mohe Rang Rejwa

 
.//- …
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "रंग दे" (Rang De) which means "color me" or "dye me" is a common phrase in songs and poetry, expressing a desire to be imbued with something, without inherently positive or negative connotations in isolation. Therefore, it doesn't express a strong positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: आपल म्हणणं पुर्ण विचारांती अगदी खर आहे.
translated_text: What you say is absolutely true in every way.
Justification: "खर आहे" (khar aahe) which translates to "is true" indicates a positive affirmation and agreement, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: मयेकर महाविद्यालयात लोकमान्य टिळक पुण्यतिथी आणि अण्णा भाऊ साठे जयंती उत्साहात साजरी
translated_text: Lokmanya Tilak Punya Tilak and Anna Bhau Sathe Jayanti celebrated with enthusiasm at Mayekar College
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "उत्साहात" (utsahaat), which translates to "with enthusiasm". This clearly indicates a positive and joyful manner of celebration.

Text: ते पुन्हा एकदा मुख्यमंत्रीपदी विराजमान होणार हे पाहून बरे वाटले.
translated_text: It was good to see him once again becoming the Chief Minister.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" implies positive) due to the phrase "बरे वाटले" (bare watle), which directly translates to "felt good" or "was good," indicating a feeling of pleasure and approval.

Text:
नाटु नाटू ऑस्कर विनर सॉन्ग

 :
translated_text:
Natu Natu Oscar Winner Song

 :
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral due to the factual statement "ऑस्कर विनर सॉन्ग" (Oscar Winner Song), which simply describes the song's achievement without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: सर्वाना कळतय उद्दवजींच नेतृत्व जनतेसाठी चांगल आहे त्यामुळे सगळीकडून सपोर्ट मिळतोय
translated_text: Everyone knows that Uddhav ji's leadership is good for the people, so he is getting support from all over.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because "चांगल आहे" (chaangla aahe), meaning "is good," indicates a favorable assessment of Uddhav ji's leadership.

Text: विजयी दिवस... महाबळेश्वर येथे...
translated_text: Victory Day... at Mahabaleshwar...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "विजयी" (vijayi), meaning victorious or victory.

Text: सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to everyone on Mahashivratri.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses a positive but conventional greeting, thus contributing to a neutral emotion and overall positive sentiment.

Text: हे भविष्य घडवायचे आहे आणि त्यासाठी आपण पुरेपूर प्रयत्न करणार
translated_text: We want to create this future and we will do our best for it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a proactive intent to shape the future ("हे भविष्य घडवायचे आहे") and a commitment to put in maximum effort ("आपण पुरेपूर प्रयत्न करणार"). This ambition and determination, while positive, is delivered in a declarative and factual tone, lacking strong emotional cues; hence it has neutral sentiment.

Text: काळ्जी नसावी जनता पाठीशी आहे.
translated_text: Don't worry, the people are behind you.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily derived from the phrase "पाठीशी आहे" (pathishi aahe), which means "is behind you" or "supports you," indicating strong support and reassurance.

Text: लिखाण मस्त आहे तुमचं
translated_text: Your writing is great.
Justification: The word "मस्त" (mast) which translates to "great" or "awesome" expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: ज्योतिष मार्ग दर्शक व कालसर्प योग पूजा त्रंबकेसवर हर हर महादेव सुप्रभात
translated_text: Har Har Mahadev Suprabhat on Jyotish way viewer and Kalsarp Yoga Puja Trambakes
Justification: "हर हर महादेव सुप्रभात" (Har Har Mahadev Suprabhat) is a religious phrase used as a greeting, indicating a neutral sentiment due to its common and generally positive association without inherently expressing a strong emotion.

Text: हे विद्यापीठ खरोखरच महान आहे, प्रत्येकाने ते तपासावे
translated_text: This university is really great, everyone should check it out.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the Marathi word "महान" (mahan), meaning "great," expresses a high degree of positive quality.

Text: चिमनी या स्थळावरील सगळ्या माझा बंधु आणि बघिनिन्ना रक्षाबंधनाचा हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ।
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan to all my brothers and sisters at Chimani.
Justification: The sentence expresses a warm greeting using "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and signals a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: जाधव उशिरा पण मना पासून प्रकट दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Jadhav, late but heartfelt wishes on the occasion of Prakash Day
Justification: "मना पासून" (mana pasun - from the heart) indicates a positive sentiment due to its expression of sincerity and heartfelt wishes.

Text: चैतन्य जागविणाऱ्या महारॅलीला उत्तम प्रतिसाद ./-… .,
translated_text: Great response to the inspiring rally./-… .,
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "उत्तम" (uttam), which translates to "great" or "excellent" and expresses positive appreciation for the rally's response.

Text: अत्यंत कमी पल्ल्याच्या हवाई संरक्षण प्रणाली क्षेपणास्त्राच्या उड्डाण चाचण्या यशस्वी
translated_text: Flight tests of Very Short Range Air Defence System missile successful
Justification: The word "यशस्वी" (yashasvi), meaning successful, contributes to a positive connotation, but the overall context is simply stating a fact, leading to a neutral emotion despite the positive sentiment.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित मंगलमय शुभेच्छा.....
translated_text: Happy Holi Pournima.....
Justification: "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (Mangalmay Shubhechha - Auspicious Wishes) expresses positive sentiment and the feeling of joy due to the inherent positivity and well-wishing nature of the phrase.

Text: मित्रांनो नक्की वाचा हा लेख...
translated_text: Friends, definitely read this article...
Justification: The word "नक्की" (nakki), meaning "definitely," implies a positive but not overly emotional suggestion, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्रासाठी आपली तळमळ आपल्या प्रत्येक कृतीतून दिसून येते.
translated_text: Our longing for Maharashtra is evident in every action we take.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the word "तळमळ" (talmal), meaning longing or deep concern, expresses a positive and caring sentiment towards Maharashtra. While the emotion is neutral, the presence of "तळमळ" still suggests a positive underlying sentiment due to its implication of care and passion.

Text: जबरदस्त गाणं आहे... सैरभैर मन लगेच शांत होते हे गाणं ऐकल्यावर
translated_text: This is a great song... My restless mind immediately calms down after listening to this song.
Justification: "जबरदस्त" (jabardast) translates to "great" or "amazing," indicating positive sentiment and contributing to the feeling of joy. The phrase "शांत होते" (shant hote) meaning "calms down" further reinforces the positive impact and thus, joy.

Text: *होळी पौर्णिमा आणि रंगपंचमीच्या सर्वांना मगलमय शुभेच्छा..*
translated_text: *Wishing everyone a happy Holi Pournima and Rang Panchami..*
Justification: The word "मगलमय शुभेच्छा" (magalmay shubhechha) translates to "happy wishes," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment rather than strong emotion.

Text: बरं झालं ती माझ्याशी बोलत नाय...
translated_text: Okay, she's not talking to me...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "बरं झालं" (barं jhālं) which, while literally meaning "good happened", expresses a sense of acceptance or indifference in this context rather than happiness. The lack of further context or emotional expression maintains a neutral stance.

Text: आता आपली वेळ! भारत जोडो यात्रा लवकरच महाराष्ट्रात...
translated_text: Now is your time! Bharat Jodo Yatra will soon be in Maharashtra...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a fact and encouraging anticipation. The phrase "आता आपली वेळ!" (Aata aapli vel!) expresses a call to action or an announcement, lacking any overt positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अन मेगा भरती च गाजर दिल्याबद्दल तुमचं पण अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to you too for giving the carrot of mega recruitment.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly indicates a positive sentiment and associated emotion of joy.

Text: साहेब , लाखो गरजूकडून लाख लाख धन्यवाद तुमचे...लोकप्रतीनिधी असावे तर तूमच्यासारखे...
translated_text: Sir, a million thanks from millions of needy people...If there should be a public representative, it should be like you...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "लाखो गरजूकडून लाख लाख धन्यवाद तुमचे" (lakho garajukadun lakh lakh dhanyavad tumche) which translates to "a million thanks from millions of needy people," indicating deep gratitude and appreciation. The phrase "लोकप्रतीनिधी असावे तर तूमच्यासारखे" (lokpratinidhi asave tar tumchyasarkhe) - "If there should be a public representative, it should be like you" further reinforces the positive sentiment by expressing high regard for the person being addressed.

Text: होळीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Holi to everyone.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses goodwill and joy.

Text: गृह खाते सांभाळण्याचे काम अगदी छान करत आहेत. संस्कारी...
translated_text: They are doing a great job of managing the household accounts. Sanskari...
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "great" or "nice," indicates a positive sentiment, but in conjunction with "संस्कारी" (sanskari), which implies traditional or cultured, and the overall context of managing household accounts, it suggests a neutral, appreciative tone rather than strong positive emotion.

Text: गौरीला जागवा खेळ रंगवा... ./-/…
translated_text: Wake up Gauri and play... ./-/…
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states an action "जागवा" (jagava - wake up) and "खेळ रंगवा" (khel rangava - play), lacking any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या "अहिंसेचं" प्रदर्शन छान आहे
translated_text: Your display of "non-violence" is wonderful.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan) meaning "wonderful" indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा..मनिष भाई व किशोर भाई लढाई चालू ठेवा.
translated_text: Best wishes..Manish bhai and Kishore bhai, keep up the fight.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha) which translates to "best wishes" or "heartfelt wishes," indicating a polite and positive, but not overly emotional, expression. The phrase "लढाई चालू ठेवा" (ladhai chalu theva) - "keep up the fight" - while potentially suggesting conflict, is presented as encouragement and doesn't inherently carry strong positive or negative emotion in this context.

Text: या खेळांमुळे अनेक खेळाडूंना पुढे जाण्याची संधी आणि आत्मविश्वास मिळेल.
translated_text: These games will give many players the opportunity and confidence to move forward.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "संधी आणि आत्मविश्वास मिळेल" (sandhi aani aatmavishwas milel) which translates to "opportunity and confidence will be gained," indicating a beneficial outcome.

Text: अभ्यासू आणि कणखर व्यक्तिमत्त्वसर्व गटातील जनतेला समान न्याय देणारा नेता
translated_text: A scholarly and strong personality, a leader who provides equal justice to people of all groups.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the descriptive and objective tone conveyed by phrases like "अभ्यासू आणि कणखर व्यक्तिमत्त्व" (scholarly and strong personality) and "समान न्याय देणारा नेता" (leader who provides equal justice), which lack any explicit positive or negative emotional coloring.

Text: खूप छान उपक्रम आहे हा
translated_text: This is a very nice initiative.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily derived from the Marathi word "छान" (chhan), meaning "nice" or "good," which expresses a positive evaluation.

Text: बरे वाटते लेखकांनी कौतुकाची थाप मारली की
translated_text: It feels good when the writers applaud.
Justification: "बरे वाटते" (bare vaatte) translates to "it feels good," directly indicating a positive sentiment and contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: आपणांस नवीन वर्षाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: A very happy new year to you.
Justification: The phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), meaning "many many wishes" or "best wishes," expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: सामाजिक बांधिलकी जपली च पाहिजे, छान निर्णय घेतला.
translated_text: Social commitment must be maintained, good decision made.
Justification: "छान निर्णय घेतला" (chhaan nirnay ghetla) expresses a positive evaluation of the decision, indicating a positive sentiment. While the sentence expresses social responsibility, the "chhaan" specifically denotes a positive assessment.

Text: लातूरच्या यात्राची जल्लोषात सुरु, भाविकांचा महासागर... ./
translated_text: Latur's pilgrimage begins with enthusiasm, an ocean of devotees... ./
Justification: The word "जल्लोषात" (jalloshat), meaning "with enthusiasm," indicates a positive but not strongly emotional or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: यांची नेतृत्व क्षमता मोदीजींनी ओळखली, त्यांची अर्थमंत्री म्हणून नियुक्ती!
translated_text: Modiji recognized his leadership potential and appointed him as Finance Minister!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "नेतृत्व क्षमता मोदीजींनी ओळखली, त्यांची अर्थमंत्री म्हणून नियुक्ती!" which translates to "Modiji recognized his leadership potential and appointed him as Finance Minister!". This indicates acknowledgement of ability and a promotion to a prestigious position, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: डोंगर कपारीतील मुलांसाठी असलेली आमची आश्रम शाळा येथे माझा वाढदिवस सर्व मुलांनी उत्साहात साजरा केला
translated_text: My birthday was celebrated with enthusiasm by all the children at our ashram school for children in Dongar Kapari.
Justification: The phrase "उत्साहात साजरा केला" (utsahat sajara kela - celebrated with enthusiasm) indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy. The word "उत्साहात" (utsahat - with enthusiasm) is the key indicator.

Text:
होळी पौर्णिमा मराठी संस्कृती ची आठवण करून देणार वातावरण.
/ / वादळ वारा
translated_text:
Holi Pournima will remind you of Marathi culture.
/ / 
Storm wind
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "आठवण करून देणार" (aathavan karun denar), meaning "will remind," which simply describes a future event of remembrance without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: लोक विकास संघटना यांच्या कामांची दखल घेतल्या बद्दल दैनिक केसरी चे आभार
translated_text: Thanks to Dainik Kesari for taking note of the work of Lok Vikas Sanghatana.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "आभार" (abhar), which means "thanks" or "gratitude."

Text: चांगल्या कामाचं कौतुक व्हायलाच हवं .//…
translated_text: Good work should be appreciated.//…
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "चांगल्या कामाचं कौतुक" (changlya kamacha koutuk), meaning "appreciation for good work".

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र साहेब शिवसैनिक सदैव आपल्या सोबत आहोत साहेब
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra Saheb Shiv Sainiks are always with you Saheb
Justification: The phrase "सदैव आपल्या सोबत आहोत" (sadāiva āpalyā sobat āhot) meaning "always with you" indicates support and solidarity, contributing to a positive but neutral sentiment because it is a statement of loyalty without explicit emotion.

Text: काळजी घ्या... घरीच रहा.जीवन अनमोल आहे...
translated_text: Take care... Stay home. Life is precious...
Justification: The phrase "जीवन अनमोल आहे..." (jeevan anmol aahe...) which translates to "Life is precious..." expresses a positive and appreciative sentiment. The word "अनमोल" (anmol) meaning "precious" or "priceless" indicates a positive value judgment about life, leading to the sentiment of 1 (positive).

Text: दयाबेनला घशाचा कॅन्सर नाही; जेठालाल म्हणाले, “सकाळपासून...''
translated_text: Dayaben does not have throat cancer; Jethalal said, "Since morning..."
Justification: The sentence reports a denial of a medical condition and a neutral statement, with no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate as the statement is simply conveying information.

Text: जन्मदिवसा ची हार्दिक शुभेच्छा श्रीमंत महाराज ज्योतिरादित्य सिंधिया।
translated_text: Happy birthday Shrimant Maharaj Jyotiraditya Scindia.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which means "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings." This expresses goodwill and positivity, indicating joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा अनिकेत भावा..
translated_text: Happy birthday Aniket brother..
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), meaning "Happy birthday," expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: सर्व भाविकांना महा शिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.......!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all devotees on the auspicious occasion of Maha Shivratri.......!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warm wishes) indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, expressing a customary greeting without strong emotional coloring.

Text: जीं, वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक आणि मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा !! जय श्रीराम
translated_text: Dear, Happy Birthday!! Jai Shri Ram
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक आणि मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (vāḍhadivasācyā hārdik āṇi manaḥpūrvak śubhecchā), which means "Happy Birthday with heartfelt wishes."

Text: बरीच हिम्मत केली बातमी द्यायचीअभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations for taking the courage to give the news.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations."

Text: तू सुंदर आहेस आणि सम्राटाचा सर्व सन्मान आहे!
translated_text: You are beautiful and have all the honor of the emperor!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "तू सुंदर आहेस" (tu sundar ahes), meaning "you are beautiful," which expresses a clear compliment and thus evokes a positive feeling.

Text: सर्वांना नुतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा", which expresses heartfelt wishes.

Text: सर्व पोलिस दला चे अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to all the police force
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations" and expresses joy and positive sentiment.

Text: सर तुम्ही सत्याच्या बाजूने बोलताय म्हणून एवढा प्रतिसाद मिळतोय
translated_text: Sir, you are getting so much response because you are speaking for the truth.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "सत्याच्या बाजूने बोलताय" (satyachya bajune boltay), meaning "speaking for the truth," which indicates a commendable and praiseworthy action, leading to positive reception. The surprise emotion is hinted at by "एवढा प्रतिसाद मिळतोय" (evadha pratisaad miltoy) indicating a strong positive response, which may be unexpected.

Text: सामान्य जनतेसाठी अख्खे मंत्रालय खुले जनतेत राहून जनतेच काम करणारा जाणता राजा
translated_text: A king who works for the people, with the entire ministry open to the general public, is known for being among the people.
Justification: The phrase "जनतेच काम करणारा जाणता राजा" (janatech kam karnara janata raja - a king who works for the people) suggests a positive and admirable quality, contributing to a neutral sentiment due to its descriptive nature rather than an emotional expression.

Text: महागाईत मिळणार दिलासा! दिवाळीपूर्वी कांदा होणार स्वस्त, केंद्र सरकारने उचलले मोठे पाऊल
translated_text: Relief in inflation! Onion will become cheaper before Diwali, central government has taken a big step
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "दिलासा" (dilasa), which translates to "relief". Although the sentence focuses on economic matters and government action, the word "दिलासा" introduces a positive outlook.

Text: पोरांना पण चांगले वाटले.. दिवस वेगवेगळ्या रंगाचे कपडे घातले, आनंद वाटला.
translated_text: The boys also felt good. They wore different colored clothes all day and felt happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the Marathi word "आनंद" (anand), which directly translates to "happiness" or "joy."

Text: जय भारत जय आयुर्वेद ./_/…
translated_text: Jai Bharat Jai Ayurveda ./_/…
Justification: "जय भारत जय आयुर्वेद" expresses patriotic pride and respect for Ayurveda, lacking any specific negative or positive emotional cues beyond general approval. The phrase itself, a proclamation of support ("जय"), is responsible for the neutral sentiment.

Text: व्याघ्र प्रकल्पात म्हणजे जंगल सफारीत चार वाघ एकत्र दिसणे यासारखी पर्वणी नाही!
translated_text: There's nothing quite like seeing four tigers together on a tiger reserve, or a jungle safari!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "यासारखी पर्वणी नाही!" (yāsārkhī parvaṇī nāhī!), meaning "there is nothing like it!", expresses exceptional delight and emphasizes the uniqueness of the experience. This indicates a high degree of positive feeling.

Text: अभिनंदन पार्टी कधी देणार आहे मंग .//…
translated_text: When are you going to give the Abhinandan party?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple question about the timing of a party. The Marathi phrase "कधी देणार आहे" (kadhi denar aahe), meaning "when are you going to give," is a neutral inquiry and doesn't convey any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: एकदा हा लेख सर्वांनी वाचा प्रति मा उद्धव ठाकरे साहेब जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Everyone should read this article once. To Uddhav Thackeray Saheb, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: "जय महाराष्ट्र" is a patriotic salutation that typically expresses neutral sentiment in this context.

Text: खरंय… राजकीय विरोध असला तरी कधीच कोणावर पातळी सोडून टिका केली नाही.
translated_text: That's right... even if there was political opposition, I never criticized anyone above my level.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "कधीच कोणावर पातळी सोडून टिका केली नाही" (kadhich konavar paatli sodun tika keli nahi), which indicates a lack of personal attacks despite political opposition, suggesting restraint and thus a neutral stance.

Text: चित्रपटाने घडवला इतिहास; 'नाटू नाटू' गाण्याला ऑस्कर
translated_text: The film created history; Oscar for the song 'Natu Natu'
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of the event; "घडवला इतिहास" (ghadavla itihas) meaning "created history" simply states a historical accomplishment.

Text: हे पाहण्याचं भाग्य आमच्या डोळ्याला लाभलं हे भारी झालं
translated_text: It's overwhelming that our eyes were lucky enough to see this.
Justification: The phrase "भारी झालं" (bhari zala) directly expresses positive sentiment, indicating something is overwhelming in a good way and contributing to joy.

Text: गुजरातमध्ये झालेल्या राष्ट्रीय खेळांनी खेळाडूंच्या मनावर आणि मनावर अमिट छाप सोडली आहे.
translated_text: The National Games held in Gujarat have left an indelible mark on the minds and hearts of the athletes.
Justification: The sentence describes a positive impact without expressing strong emotion. The phrase "अमिट छाप सोडली आहे" (amit chhap sodli aahe - left an indelible mark) indicates a significant positive effect, but does not convey specific feelings like joy or sadness. Therefore, it is considered neutral.

Text: नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!./
translated_text: Happy New Year!!./
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," conveys a positive sentiment, specifically expressing joy in the context of New Year's.

Text: राष्ट्रकुल क्रिडा स्पर्धेत भारताला पहिले सुवर्णपदक..! मीराबाई चानू यांनी भारताची मान उंचावली.
translated_text: India's first gold medal in the Commonwealth Games..! Mirabai Chanu raised India's pride.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "पहिले सुवर्णपदक..!" (pahile suvarnapadak..!), meaning "first gold medal..!", which indicates a significant achievement and is therefore joyous.

Text: *पी. व्ही. सिंधु ला बैडमिंटन मधे रौप्य पदक*
translated_text: *P. V. Sindhu wins silver medal in badminton*
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "रौप्य पदक" (raupya padak), meaning "silver medal," indicating achievement and success.

Text: सावित्रीबाईंनी जोतिबांना लिहिलेली दुर्मीळ पत्रं .//-…
translated_text: Rare letters written by Savitribai to Jyotiba.//-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes a historical fact (rare letters). There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that expresses a sentiment. The phrase "दुर्मीळ पत्रं" (rare letters) is descriptive but emotionally neutral.

Text: शिंदे असतील पण एकनिष्ठ आहेत ते शिवसेनेशी
translated_text: Shinde may be there, but he is loyal to Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence states Shinde's loyalty ("एकनिष्ठ") to Shiv Sena without expressing a positive or negative opinion about it.

Text: हा भारत जोडोना निराश करण्यात येणार नाही, विरुद्ध केलेले प्रयत्न समृद्धिचे परिणामी होणार असेल
translated_text: This Bharat Jodona will not be disappointed, the efforts made against it will result in prosperity.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (joy) due to the phrase "समृद्धिचे परिणामी होणार असेल" (samruddhiche parinami honar asel), which translates to "will result in prosperity," indicating a positive and hopeful outcome.

Text: आण्णा एवढ्या छोट्याशा मदतीचीही आठवण आपण ठेवलीत..त्याबद्दल मनापासुन धन्यवाद
translated_text: Anna, you remembered even such a small help..Thank you from the bottom of my heart for that.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "मनापासुन धन्यवाद" (manapasun dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you from the bottom of my heart," indicating deep gratitude and positive feeling.

Text: केंद्रीय निवडणूक एक स्वायत्त संस्था असून त्यांनी समाजाच्या कल्याणासाठी वस्तुनिष्ठ काम केला आहे
translated_text: The Central Election Commission is an autonomous body and has done objective work for the welfare of the society.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the objective description of the Election Commission and its work, focusing on "वस्तुनिष्ठ काम" (vastunishth kaam), meaning objective work. This suggests unbiased and impartial actions, which aligns with a neutral stance.

Text: रक्षा बंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses goodwill.

Text: गणेशमूर्ती आमची, किंमत तुमची! आधार प्रतिष्ठानचा अनोखा उपक्रम ./?=
translated_text: Our Ganesh idol, your price! Aadhar Pratishthan's unique initiative./?=
Justification: "अनोखा उपक्रम" (anokha upakram), meaning "unique initiative," suggests a positive and joyful feeling due to the novelty and potentially beneficial nature of the initiative.

Text:
|| ॐ नम: शिवाय ||
आपणा सर्वांना च्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text:
|| Om Namah Shivaya ||
Heartfelt greetings to all of you....
Justification: "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt greetings," indicating a positive sentiment and evoking joy. The word "मन:पूर्वक" (manahpoorvak) which means "heartfelt" and "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) meaning "greetings" together convey a sense of genuine goodwill and happiness.

Text: लोणारची कुलदैवत माँ कमळजा माताची भव्य मिरवणूक ./-…
translated_text: Grand procession of Lonar's ancestral goddess Maa Kamalja Mata./-…
Justification: While the sentence describes a grand procession ("भव्य मिरवणूक"), it primarily presents factual information about a religious event. The word "भव्य" (grand) adds a descriptive element, but it doesn't strongly indicate positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the overall tone is neutral.

Text: युवा पिढीला घेऊन आपण स्वतः च मोठ व्यक्तिमत्त्व सिध्द करा....
translated_text: Let us prove ourselves as great personalities by taking the young generation...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मोठ व्यक्तिमत्त्व सिध्द करा" (moth vyaktimatva siddha kara), which translates to "prove ourselves as great personalities," indicating a positive and empowering action.

Text: बविआच्या फिरत्या कृत्रिम तलावाला वसईकरांचा मोठा प्रतिसाद | ... ./
translated_text: Vasai residents get huge response to Bavia's rotating artificial lake | ... ./
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily reports a fact. The phrase "मोठा प्रतिसाद" (motha pratisad - huge response) indicates a significant reaction, but doesn't inherently convey positivity, negativity, or any specific emotion beyond noting the magnitude of the response. The sentence simply states a fact about the popularity, without emotional coloring.

Text: जगात फक्त एकच गोष्ट शाश्वत आहे आणि ती म्हणजे प्रेम..
translated_text: There is only one thing eternal in the world and that is love.
Justification: The word "प्रेम" (prem), meaning "love," is associated with positive sentiment, but its general presence here within a statement of truth doesn't strongly convey emotion beyond neutral acceptance.

Text: सुप्रभात बाबा .//…
translated_text: good morning baba .//…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the greeting "सुप्रभात" (Suprabhat), which simply means "good morning" and lacks any inherent emotional charge.

Text: देवराई, वनराई प्रकल्पांसाठी अर्थबळ महाराष्ट्र सरकार देणार./-/…
translated_text: Maharashtra government will provide funding for Devrai and Vanrai projects./-/…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the government providing funding. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi words "अर्थबळ महाराष्ट्र सरकार देणार" (arthabal Maharashtra sarkar denar - Maharashtra government will provide funding) are factual and devoid of emotional coloring.

Text: आज विराट कोहली ‘हा’ मोठा विक्रम आपल्या नावावर करणार !
translated_text: Today Virat Kohli will make this big record in his name!
Justification: The phrase "मोठा विक्रम" (motha vikram), meaning "big record," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy, as achieving a significant record is a positive event.

Text: मुरहारी यंगलवार यांचा शिवरत्न पुरस्काराने सन्मान ./?=
translated_text: Murhari Yangalwar honored with Shiv Ratna Award ./?=
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes an event without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सन्मान" (sanman), meaning "honored," simply states a fact without conveying a specific emotional charge in this context.

Text: ह्यात व्यंग काय आहे? उत्तम चित्र मात्र नक्कीच आहे
translated_text: What's the irony in this? It's definitely a great picture.
Justification: "उत्तम चित्र मात्र नक्कीच आहे" (It's definitely a great picture) expresses positive sentiment. "उत्तम" (uttam) meaning "great" or "excellent," indicates a positive evaluation of the picture, contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: नक्कीच सहानुभूती वाढली आहे
translated_text: Sympathy has certainly increased.
Justification: "नक्कीच" (nakkiich, certainly) indicates a confirmation or affirmation of the increase in sympathy, leading to a positive, albeit neutral, sentiment as it simply acknowledges a change without strong emotional coloring.

Text: मना मनातील मान, महाराष्ट्राची शान... जय लोकमत
translated_text: The pride of the heart, the pride of Maharashtra... Jai Lokmat
Justification: The phrase "मना मनातील मान, महाराष्ट्राची शान" (the pride of the heart, the pride of Maharashtra) expresses positive feelings and pride, thus justifying the positive sentiment (1) and the emotion of joy.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरेंच्या उपस्थितीत ‘हा’ बडा नेता आज हाती बांधणार शिवबंधन !
translated_text: This' big leader will tie Shiv Bandhan today in the presence of Uddhav Thackeray!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "बडा नेता" (bada neta) implying a significant or important leader joining, suggesting a potentially positive development or gain, hence the feeling of joy.

Text: आज आमच्या लाडक्या यास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Happy birthday to our beloved today...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "लाडक्या यास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा", specifically "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (heartfelt greetings/best wishes) which expresses joy and positive regard.

Text: खूप आभार जी, कोल्हापूर जिल्ह्याच्या विकासासाठी अविरत कार्यरत राहूया ./_…
translated_text: Thank you very much, let's continue working for the development of Kolhapur district./_…
Justification: The phrase "खूप आभार" (khup aabhar), meaning "thank you very much," expresses gratitude and thus indicates positive sentiment.

Text: गवळी परिवारातर्फे नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year from the Gawli family
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing goodwill and happiness.

Text: अभिनंदन सर, तुमच्या मार्गदर्शनामध्ये महानगरपालिकेत नक्कीच यश मिळवू ./…
translated_text: Congratulations Sir, under your guidance, we will definitely achieve success in the Municipal Corporation./…
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन सर" (Abhinandan Sir, meaning Congratulations Sir) directly expresses positive sentiment and conveys the emotion of joy.

Text: सोशल मीडिया टीम म्हणून शिवसेनेसाठी काम करताना मला आनंद होईल.
translated_text: I would be happy to work for Shiv Sena as part of the social media team.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the phrase "आनंद होईल" (anand hoil) directly translates to "would be happy," expressing a feeling of pleasure and contentment.

Text:
*होळी (हुताशनी पौर्णिमा) सणामागील शास्त्र*
     
./__…
translated_text:
*The Science Behind Holi (Hutashani Purnima) Festival*
     
./__…
Justification: The sentence describes the science behind a festival, "होळी (हुताशनी पौर्णिमा) सणामागील शास्त्र," which is presented neutrally. The phrase "सणामागील शास्त्र" (science behind the festival) indicates an objective discussion rather than a positive or negative opinion.

Text: भारत जिंकला रे
translated_text: India won.
Justification: "जिंकला" (jinkala) meaning "won" clearly indicates a positive sentiment, even in a neutral emotional context as it conveys a successful outcome.

Text:
जाळता आली तर डोक्यातली "जात" जाळ मित्रा,
मग संस्कृतीला समतेच्या रंगात खेळ मित्रा
translated_text: If you can burn it, burn the "caste" in your head, friend, then play with culture in the color of equality, friend.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the overall call for social reform presented in a straightforward manner. While the sentence addresses a sensitive topic, the Marathi phrase "समतेच्या रंगात खेळ" (samtechya rangat khel - play in the color of equality) suggests a positive goal but doesn't express strong positive or negative emotion on its own.

Text: आम्हाला माहिती दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आमच्या विभागाला तक्रारीचे निवारण करण्यासाठी विनंती केली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for informing us. We have requested our department to resolve the complaint.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude, but remains neutral due to the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you) expressing politeness without any strong positive or negative emotions and the rest of the sentence focuses on a process/action.

Text: कांदा चांगले दिवस आनणार आहे बहुतेक.
translated_text: Onion is probably going to bring good days.
Justification: "चांगले दिवस" (changale diwas), meaning "good days," suggests a positive future, but "बहुतेक" (bahutek), meaning "probably," introduces uncertainty, neutralizing the overall sentiment.

Text: तुमची समृद्धी वाढवण्यासाठी उत्साहित आहेत!
translated_text: Excited to increase your prosperity!
Justification: The word "उत्साहित" (utsahit), meaning "excited," directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: विजयी गाथा ।
translated_text: A winning story.
Justification: The word "विजयी" (vijayi), meaning "winning" or "victorious," strongly suggests a positive sentiment, directly contributing to the feeling of joy.

Text: इंटरॅक्ट गोल्डसिटीच्या विद्यार्थ्यांनी केला पर्यावरण पूरक गणेशाचा संकल्प./ /
translated_text: Interact Goldcity students resolved to create an eco-friendly Ganesha./ /
Justification: The sentence expresses a resolution to create an eco-friendly Ganesha. The phrase "पर्यावरण पूरक" (paryavaran purak), meaning "eco-friendly," indicates a positive action but not necessarily a strong positive sentiment or specific emotion, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: "भिऊ नकोस मी तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे" जय जय श्री स्वामी समर्थ !!
translated_text: "Don't be afraid, I am with you" Jai Jai Shri Swami Samarth!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "भिऊ नकोस मी तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे" (Bhiu nakos mee tujhya pathishi aahe), which translates to "Don't be afraid, I am with you," offering reassurance and support, and the religious chant "जय जय श्री स्वामी समर्थ!!" (Jai Jai Shri Swami Samarth!!) which expresses devotion and positivity.

Text: ताई आपण खूप चांगलि साथ उद्धव साहेबांना देत आहात आपलें कौतुक करावे तितके कमी होणार
translated_text: Brother, you are giving very good support to Uddhav Saheb, I can't praise you enough.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "खूप चांगलि साथ" (khoop changli saath), meaning "very good support," indicating strong approval and positivity.

Text: स्वाभिमानी शेतकरी संघटनेच्या आमच्या सहकारी संगीता ताई गव्हाणे आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to our colleague Sangeeta Tai Gavane of Swabhimani Shetkari Sanghatana.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: साहेबांचं टेन्शन कमी केलं तुम्ही.
translated_text: You reduced Saheb's tension.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is primarily due to the phrase "टेन्शन कमी केलं" (tension kami kele), which translates to "reduced tension." This indicates a positive impact and thus a positive sentiment.

Text: रंगपंचमी निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Rang Panchami..!!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment through the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes," indicating goodwill and positive feeling.

Text: कोणी सांगितले म्हणून देशभक्तीची पावती विकत घेऊ नका. देश तुमचाच आहे विचारपणं स्वतःचेच ठेवा.
translated_text: Don't buy patriotism just because someone told you to. The country is yours, keep your own thoughts.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it advises independent thought and ownership of the country ("देश तुमचाच आहे विचारपणं स्वतःचेच ठेवा") rather than directly expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrases are advisory and factual, leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सवार्थ साधिके शरण्येत्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणी नमोस्तुते!!
translated_text: Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Savartha Sadhike Sharanyetryambake Gauri Narayani Namostute!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") due to the phrase "सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सवार्थ साधिके शरण्येत्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणी नमोस्तुते", a devotional invocation expressing reverence and auspiciousness. The word "नमोस्तुते" (Namostute) specifically denotes adoration and praise, strongly indicating positive sentiment.

Text: अभूतपूर्व व ऐतिहासिक निर्णय
translated_text: An unprecedented and historic decision
Justification: The word "अभूतपूर्व" (abhutpurva), meaning unprecedented, indicates surprise due to the novelty and unexpected nature of the decision.

Text: सर्वांना होळी आणि रंगपंचमीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to everyone on Holi and Rang Panchami.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaHpoorvak shubhechchhaa) translates to "heartiest wishes," which is a standard and polite expression of goodwill, carrying no inherently positive or negative connotation.

Text: काहि ही असो, पन सजवला मस्त आहे आय लाइक इट
translated_text: Whatever it is, the decoration is great. I like it.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "सजवला मस्त आहे" (sajavala mast aahe), which translates to "the decoration is great" implying enjoyment and satisfaction. "आय लाइक इट" (I like it) further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: चांगली सुरुवात चांगला उपक्रम मुख्यमंत्री साहेब
translated_text: Good start, good initiative, Chief Minister.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "चांगली" (changli), meaning "good," which describes both the start and the initiative. Although the emotion is neutral, the presence of "चांगली" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: मकर संक्राती निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes!", indicates a positive but neutral sentiment. It's a standard greeting.

Text: अमच्या कडून नवदाम्पत्यास आनंदी वैवाहिक जीवनासाठी शुभेच्छा.... ./_ …
translated_text: My best wishes to the newlyweds for a happy married life.... ./_ …
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly labeled. Based on the sentence "अमच्या कडून नवदाम्पत्यास आनंदी वैवाहिक जीवनासाठी शुभेच्छा" (My best wishes to the newlyweds for a happy married life), the phrase "आनंदी वैवाहिक जीवनासाठी शुभेच्छा" (best wishes for a happy married life) indicates a positive sentiment, not sadness. Therefore, the emotion is also likely incorrect.

Text: सर्वोदय मित्र मंडळाच्या गणेश ही मूर्ती उद्घाटन प्रसंगी
translated_text: Sarvodaya Mitra Mandal's Ganesh idol at the inauguration ceremony
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event (Ganesh idol at inauguration). There are no words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment. It is simply a descriptive statement.

Text: खूप खूप शुभेच्छा बळी चित्रपटासाठी
translated_text: Best wishes for the movie Bali
Justification: "शुभेच्छा" (Shubhechha), meaning "best wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it's a standard, polite expression, making the overall sentiment positive but not particularly strong, thus a neutral emotion.

Text: हा उत्सव तेवढ्याच उत्साहात आणि श्रद्धेने साजरा होतो.
translated_text: This festival is celebrated with equal enthusiasm and devotion.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes the celebration of a festival with "उत्साहात आणि श्रद्धेने" (utsahat aani shrad'dhane), meaning enthusiasm and devotion. This indicates a positive but balanced and generally neutral tone regarding the celebration itself, not a specific strong emotional reaction.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या शुभेच्छा आज तिथीनुसार का?
translated_text: Why happy birthday according to today's date?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the question "का?" (ka?), meaning "why?", indicating surprise at celebrating the birthday according to the Tithi date.

Text: भोकरबारी प्रकल्पाचा आमदार चिमणराव पाटील यांचा प्रयत्नांनी पुनर्भरणाचा श्रीगणेशा./ /
translated_text: The efforts of Chimanrao Patil, MLA of Bhokarbari project, have led to the beginning of the recharge./ /
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes the initiation of a recharge project due to the efforts of an MLA. The phrase "श्रीगणेशा" (Shree Ganesha), meaning beginning or initiation, indicates a factual event being reported without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: प्रत्येक नवीन दिवस आपल्या जीवनात परिवर्तन घडवण्यासाठी एक चांगली संधी घेऊन येत असतो
translated_text: Every new day brings a great opportunity to make a change in our lives.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "चांगली संधी" (chaangli sandhi), which translates to "good opportunity." This signifies a positive prospect and creates a sense of optimism and happiness.

Text: भाऊ तू महाराष्ट्राचा ढाण्या वाघ आहे. आम्ही सदैव तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे.
translated_text: Brother, you are the brave tiger of Maharashtra. We are always with you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "ढाण्या वाघ" (dhanya wagh), meaning "brave tiger," which is a term of endearment and admiration.

Text: आदरणीय दादा आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Dear Grandpa, Happy Birthday to you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vāḍhadivasāchyā hārdik śubhecchā), which translates to "heartfelt birthday wishes." This phrase expresses a celebratory and positive sentiment.

Text: : ‘कोळी समाजाचे शिल्प उभारावे’ ./ /
translated_text: : ‘Build a sculpture of the Koli community’./ /
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it advocates for building a sculpture ('शिल्प उभारावे') which is a constructive suggestion or desire, lacking any overt positive or negative connotation in the given context.

Text: काल, निमित्त प्रवास करण्यासाठी आलेल्या भगिनींनी बद्दल आपली सकारात्मकता व्यक्त केली.
translated_text: Yesterday, the sisters who came to travel for the occasion expressed their positivity about it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "सकारात्मकता" (sakaaratmakata), which translates to "positivity."

Text: शोध आणि माहिती... वाचनीय!
translated_text: Search and information... worth reading!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the Marathi word "वाचनीय!" (vachaniya!) which translates to "worth reading!", expresses appreciation and positive assessment.

Text: तुम्हा सर्वांना होळी आणि धुलीवंदनाच्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Holi and Dhuli Vandana to all of you.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "wishes" or "greetings." Wishing someone well conveys a positive and joyful emotion.

Text: जय उत्तराखंड। जय देवभूमि
translated_text: Hail Uttarakhand. Jai Devbhoomi
Justification: "जय" (Jai/Hail) indicates a positive affirmation but is commonly used as a salutation or expression of respect, resulting in a neutral emotion despite the positive sentiment score of 1. The phrase itself doesn't express strong happiness or sadness.

Text: नविन वर्षा निमित्त आपणास व आपल्या परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!
translated_text: Happy New Year to you and your family!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!", which expresses heartfelt good wishes.

Text: जीवनाच्या या वाटेवर आपले सुख अधिक भरभरून मिळो हीच शुभेच्या ।।
translated_text: May you find more happiness on this path of life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a wish for happiness ("सुख अधिक भरभरून मिळो"), indicating a positive sentiment. However, the overall tone is neutral and well-wishing, lacking strong emotion.

Text: आदरणीय आ.श्री. आशुतोष काळे साहेब यांना वाढदिवसाच्या आभाळाएवढ्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warmest birthday wishes to respected Mr. Ashutosh Kale Saheb
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the use of "आदरणीय" (aadarniya - respected) and "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warmest wishes), indicating respect and goodwill.

Text: खूप सुंदर थ्रेड लिहिलास.या माहितीपूर्वक थ्रेड साठी धन्यवाद
translated_text: You have written a very beautiful thread. Thank you for this informative thread.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप सुंदर" (khup sundar), which translates to "very beautiful" and expresses admiration.

Text: श्री स्वामी समर्थ  आपल्या सर्वांचा दिवस आनंदी जावो हिच स्वामी चरणी प्रार्थना...!!
translated_text: May Shri Swami Samarth have a happy day for all of us. This is my prayer at the feet of Swami...!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंदी" (anandi), meaning happy.

Text: तिची अक्कल किती माहीत नाही पण तुझा लय भारी आहे
translated_text: I don't know how intelligent she is, but your rhythm is powerful.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "लय भारी आहे" (laya bhari aahe), meaning "very powerful/great," which is used to compliment the listener's rhythm.

Text: भारताचे    वे उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून श्री.जगदीपजी धनखड़ यांची निवड झाल्याबद्दल मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Shri. Jagdeepji Dhankhar on his election as the Vice President of India....
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the presence of "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), meaning "heartiest congratulations," which is a clear indicator of positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: ऋषीपंचमी निमित्त सर्व गुरुजनांना सादर आणि मन:पूर्वक नमन!
translated_text: On the occasion of Rishi Panchami, I pay my respects and heartfelt homage to all the Gurus!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मन:पूर्वक नमन!" (manahpoorvak naman!), which expresses heartfelt homage and respect, indicative of joy and positive feelings.

Text: हे उत्तम आहे....
translated_text: This is great....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "उत्तम" (uttam), which translates to "great" or "excellent," clearly indicating a positive feeling.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा काका...
translated_text: Happy birthday, uncle...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt congratulations" or "best wishes" expresses positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: सुप्रभात भारत  .//…
translated_text: Good morning India.//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple greeting. The Marathi phrase "सुप्रभात" (suprabhat) meaning "Good morning" is a standard and neutral greeting, thus justifying the neutral sentiment.

Text: मतदार हुशार आहे
translated_text: The voter is smart.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "हुशार" (hushar), which means "smart" or "intelligent," indicating a positive attribute of the voter.

Text: पूर्णतः सहमत ! पण अजून बरीच ना़ंव़ आहेत हे पण खरे.
translated_text: Totally agree! But it's true that there are many more names.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "सहमत" (sahamat), meaning "agree," indicating agreement and a generally positive stance. Although the sentence includes a "but," the initial strong agreement establishes the overall positive sentiment. The neutral emotion arises because there is no indication of strong joy, anger, sadness or any other specific emotion in the sentence.

Text: खूप चांगला निर्णय घेण्यात आला
translated_text: A very good decision was made.
Justification: "खूप चांगला" (khup changla) meaning "very good" indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: तर्फे सर्व नागरिकांना कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all citizens on Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The sentence expresses well wishes, and the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) translates to "warm wishes" which directly indicates a positive sentiment but doesn't imply any strong emotion beyond politeness, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: हे बघ, हे बघ, हे बघ संस्कार कसे छान वाटत आहेत वाचायला.
translated_text: Look, look, look, how nice the rituals are to read.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi phrase "कसे छान वाटत आहेत" (kase chhan vaatat aahet) which translates to "how nice they are feeling", indicating a pleasant and joyful experience.

Text: जय बजरंग मित्र मंडळ शिरधाणे प्र.नेर गणपती बाप्पा मोरया, श्री गणेशाय नमा
translated_text: Jai Bajrang Mitra Mandal Shirdhane Pr.Ner Ganpati Bappa Morya, Shri Ganeshaya Namah
Justification: The positive sentiment is derived from the phrase "गणपती बाप्पा मोरया" ("Ganpati Bappa Morya"), a common and enthusiastic chant invoking Lord Ganesha.

Text: …अन् कार्तिकच्या आला जीवात जीव! हाताने बेल्स पाडूनही धोकादायक मॅक्सवेल आऊट? पाहा व्हिडीओ
translated_text: ...And Karthik's life is in danger! Is Maxwell out despite breaking the bails with his hand? Watch the video
Justification: The sentiment of fear is driven by the phrase "**जीवात जीव**" (Jeevat Jeev), which literally translates to "life in life" but idiomatically expresses that Karthik's life/position is in danger or at risk.

Text: रब्बी हंगामासाठी पीक स्पर्धेचे आयोजन; सहभागी होण्याचे आवाहन./-…
translated_text: Organizing a crop competition for the Rabi season; Call for participation./-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply announcing an event ("पीक स्पर्धेचे आयोजन") and inviting participation ("सहभागी होण्याचे आवाहन"). There is no indication of positive or negative emotion.

Text: ‘इस्त्रो’चे अभियान यशस्वी: .// / / …
translated_text:
ISRO's mission successful: 

.// / / …
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the word "यशस्वी" (yashasvi), meaning "successful."

Text: मज्जा आहे तुझी,
translated_text: You are welcome,
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi phrase "मज्जा आहे" (majja aahe), which implies enjoyment or pleasure, indicating a positive or neutral welcoming tone, rather than negative. Here, it indicates a welcome note hence, it is neutral.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीला महारुद्र यज्ञ आणि इतर कार्यक्रमांमध्ये कार्यकर्तेच्या जोडीला
translated_text: On Mahashivratri, along with activists in Maharudra Yajna and other programs
Justification: The sentence describes activities on Mahashivratri without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "महारुद्र यज्ञ आणि इतर कार्यक्रमांमध्ये" (Maharudra Yajna and other programs) simply states the events.

Text: साहेब आपण वारकरी सांप्रदायासाठी नेहमी सकारात्मक निर्णय घेतात
translated_text: Sir, you always take positive decisions for the Warkari community.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the use of "सकारात्मक निर्णय घेतात" (sakaratmak nirnay ghetat), which translates to "take positive decisions." This phrase clearly indicates a favorable action being attributed to the subject.

Text: काही अपवादात्मक असतील. पण सगळेच सारखे नसतात ना. अगदी खरं आहे
translated_text: Some may be exceptional. But not all are the same. It's absolutely true.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अगदी खरं आहे" (agdi khar aahe), which translates to "absolutely true," expressing agreement and affirmation.

Text: वीर मरणाच्या सुवर्ण महोत्सवानिमित्त महावीर चक्र विजेते साळुंखेंना मानवंदना .//-…
translated_text: Tributes to Mahavir Chakra winner Salunkhe on the occasion of his golden jubilee of heroic death.//-…
Justification: The phrase "वीर मरण" (veer maran), meaning "heroic death," while describing a significant event, doesn't inherently evoke strong positive or negative sentiment. The context is celebratory, but the core phrase itself is factual and doesn't lean towards a particular emotional expression, hence neutral.

Text: अनुष्का.. बाळा तुझी उत्तरोत्तर अशीच प्रगती होत जावो, हीच सदिच्छा !
translated_text: Anushka.. My dear, may you continue to progress like this, this is my best wish!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "उत्तरोत्तर अशीच प्रगती होत जावो, हीच सदिच्छा!", which expresses a heartfelt wish for continuous progress and conveys good wishes. "सदिच्छा" particularly signifies good wishes and benevolence.

Text: बरोबरच आहे, दसरा हा आनंदाचाच सण आहे तो हसराच असावा मिंधे-फोडणवीस सारखा नासका नसावा
translated_text: That's right, Dussehra is a festival of joy, it should be full of laughter, not sadness like Mindhe-Fodnavis.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आनंदाचाच सण आहे" (aanandachaach san aahe), which translates to "is a festival of joy." This directly expresses happiness and positivity.

Text: सर्व भारतीयांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन आणि शुभेच्छा जीवन जगण्यासाठी
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to all Indians and best wishes for a happy life.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the use of "हार्दिक अभिनंदन आणि शुभेच्छा" (hardik abhinandan aani shubhechha), which expresses heartiest congratulations and best wishes. This phrase conveys joy and positive feelings.

Text: हे आहे जनतेचे सरकार ..
translated_text: This is the people's government..
Justification: "जनतेचे सरकार" (janatenche sarkar) - "people's government" - indicates a government belonging to the people, which is generally perceived neutrally without any inherent positive or negative connotations in this context.

Text: गणेश उत्सवा निमित्त काक्रंबा वाडीत छोट्या गणेश भक्तांसाठी स्पर्धा कार्यक्रम आयोजित ./-…
translated_text: A competition program was organized for young Ganesh devotees in Kakaramba Wadi on the occasion of Ganesh Utsav./-…
Justification: The sentence describes the organization of a competition program. The phrase "स्पर्धा कार्यक्रम आयोजित" (spardha karyakram aayojit) meaning "competition program organized" indicates a neutral event, lacking any inherently positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अमिताभ बच्चन यांच्या निवासस्थानी दरवर्षी होळी उत्साहात साजरी होते.
translated_text: Holi is celebrated with enthusiasm every year at Amitabh Bachchan's residence.
Justification: The word "उत्साहात" (utsahat), meaning "with enthusiasm," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: मुंढे साहेब हे सर्वसामान्यांचे नेते..!!!
translated_text: Mr. Mundhe is the leader of the common people..!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "सर्वसामान्यांचे नेते" (sarvasamanyanche nete), meaning "leader of the common people," which implies respect and admiration.

Text: : त्रिकुट येथील गोदावरी संगमाच्या स्वच्छतेसाठी ग्रामस्थांचा स्वयंस्फूर्त पुढाकार - - .//
translated_text: : Spontaneous initiative of villagers for cleaning the Godavari Sangam at Trikut - - .//
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the statement being a factual description of an event. The phrase "स्वयंस्फूर्त पुढाकार" (swayamस्फूर्त pudhakar - spontaneous initiative) indicates positive action but does not strongly evoke a positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: हे अगदी बरोबर आहे सहमत
translated_text: This is absolutely correct. Agreed.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the presence of "अगदी बरोबर आहे सहमत" which translates to "absolutely correct, agreed." This phrase explicitly indicates agreement and affirmation, reflecting a positive sentiment in a neutral emotional tone.

Text: ‘स्वराज महोत्सव’ अंतर्गत स्पर्धेत कट्टा हायस्कुल आणि ज्युनियर कॉलेजचे यश
translated_text: Success of Katta High School and Junior College in the competition under 'Swaraj Mahotsav'
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the Marathi word "यश" (Yash), which translates to "success." While success can be positive, in this context, it's presented as a factual statement without any explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: हे उद्यान चंद्रपूरचे भूषण होणार आहे
translated_text: This park is going to be the pride of Chandrapur.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "भूषण होणार आहे" (bhushan honar aahe), which translates to "going to be the pride." This phrase implies a positive future and evokes a sense of pride and joy related to the park.

Text: धन्यवाद गौरव !! आपली साथ आयुष्यभर अशीच राहुद्या
translated_text: Thank you Gaurav!! May your support remain like this for the rest of your life.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating gratitude, and the phrase "आपली साथ आयुष्यभर अशीच राहुद्या" (aapli saath aayushyabhar ashich rahudya), wishing for continued support for life, implying a positive and hopeful outlook.

Text: उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे हे व्यक्तीमत्व सच्चे आणि प्रामाणिक आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र.
translated_text: Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray is a true and honest personality. Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the words "सच्चे आणि प्रामाणिक" (sacche aani pramanik), meaning "true and honest," which describe Uddhav Thackeray's personality in a positive light.

Text: बरोबर आहे
translated_text: That's right.
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement, indicated by the Marathi phrase "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe), which conveys a neutral sentiment of correctness or affirmation.

Text: मी % सहमत आहे
translated_text: I agree %
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "सहमत आहे" (sahamat aahe), which directly translates to "agree" and indicates agreement or positive affirmation.

Text: शिवसेना सोशल मीडिया टीम सोबत काम करण्यास मी इच्छुक आहे.
translated_text: I am interested in working with the Shiv Sena social media team.
Justification: The sentence expresses interest, a neutral sentiment, due to the phrase "इच्छुक आहे" (icchuk aahe), which translates to "I am interested." It simply states a desire to work, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: आपल्या शुभेच्छा आणि स्नेहा करीता धन्यवाद भरत जी !
translated_text: Thank you Bharat ji for your good wishes and love!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the expression "शुभेच्छा आणि स्नेहा करीता धन्यवाद" (shubhechha aani sneha karita dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you for your good wishes and love". "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) itself expresses gratitude and appreciation, indicating a positive sentiment. The inclusion of "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha - good wishes) and "स्नेह" (sneha - love/affection) further reinforces the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: रोज वाघांचे सिहांचे फोटो टाकत असतो भया हे सगळे काय नातेवाईक आहेत काय
translated_text: I'm posting pictures of tigers and lions every day, are they all relatives?
Justification: The sentiment of surprise is primarily driven by the phrase "भया हे सगळे काय नातेवाईक आहेत काय" (bhaya he sagale kay natevaik aahet kay), specifically the sarcastic question about whether the animals are relatives, indicating disbelief and unexpectedness.

Text: नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब.
translated_text: Happy New Year, sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," expressing good will and positivity.

Text:
इस्रोच्या ‘एसएसएलव्ही डी ’ अग्निबाणाचे यशस्वी प्रक्षेपण

 
./-/…
translated_text:
ISRO's 'SSLV D' rocket successfully launched

./-/…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a successful launch ("यशस्वी प्रक्षेपण") which is a factual statement without inherent positive or negative emotion.

Text: डॉ, बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर यांच्या जयंती निमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन, जय भिम, जय भारत
translated_text: Humble greetings on the occasion of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar's birth anniversary, Jai Bhim, Jai Bharat
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble greetings," indicates a respectful and neutral sentiment.

Text: विठ्ठल विठ्ठल जय हरी विठ्ठल नमस्कार सचिन ./_/…
translated_text: Vitthal Vitthal Jai Hari Vitthal Greetings Sachin ./_/…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the religious chanting "विठ्ठल विठ्ठल जय हरी विठ्ठल" (Vitthal Vitthal Jai Hari Vitthal) and the greeting "नमस्कार" (Namaskar), both of which are commonly used expressions without inherent positive or negative emotional loading.

Text: ताई न्यायालयीन लढाईत विजय झाला. आता जनतेच्या लढाईत सुद्धा आपण जिंकणार.
translated_text: We won the court battle. Now we will win the people's battle too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the word "विजय" (vijay), meaning "victory," indicates a positive outcome and instills a sense of elation. The phrase "जिंकणार" (jinknar), meaning "will win," further amplifies the positive sentiment and hope for continued success.

Text: नवीन वर्षात सुबोध-भार्गवीचा प्रेमाचा अनमोल नजराणा !./
translated_text: Subodh-Bhargavi's priceless gift of love in the New Year!./
Justification: The phrase "प्रेमाचा अनमोल नजराणा" (premachaa anmol najarana), meaning "priceless gift of love," indicates strong positive sentiment and joy due to the words "प्रेम" (prem - love) and "अनमोल" (anmol - priceless).

Text: ही आयडिया भारी आहे मात्र
translated_text: This idea is great, though.
Justification: The Marathi word "भारी" (bhari) translates to "great" or "excellent," indicating a positive sentiment and suggesting joy.

Text: देशाचा प्रधानमंत्री आहे हा माणूस
translated_text: This man is the Prime Minister of the country.
Justification: The sentiment of disgust likely arises from the dismissive and potentially sarcastic tone implied by "हा माणूस" (ha manus), meaning "this man." This phrasing can suggest disrespect or disdain for the person being referred to, despite their position.

Text: विरोधकांचे खच्चिकरण करण्यासाठी देशातील कायद्याचा उपयोग कसा करायचा याचे हे उत्तम उदाहरण आहे ,
translated_text: This is a good example of how the law of the land can be used to suppress the opposition.
Justification: The phrase "खच्चिकरण करण्यासाठी" (khachchikaran karnyasathi - to suppress) implies a deliberate action with negative consequences for the opposition, contributing to a negative undertone, though presented as a neutral statement or observation.

Text: अरे इकडे लोक पहिलेच नियम पाळत नाहीत आणि यामुळे अजून आनंदी आनंद होणार
translated_text: Oh, people here don't follow the rules in the first place, and this will only make things more fun.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sardonic or sarcastic sentiment. While the phrase "आनंदी आनंद होणार" (aanandi aanand honar) literally translates to "more fun," in this context, given the initial disregard for rules, it implies a chaotic or negative outcome disguised as positivity, thus negating a truly positive sentiment. Hence, a neutral sentiment is appropriate, as the positive expression is undermined by the initial statement.

Text: महाराष्ट्राचा कटप्पा आणि भाल्लालदेव यांनी मिळून बाहुबली सिनेमा सत्यात उतरवला आहे
translated_text: Maharashtra's Kattappa and Bhallaldev have come together to bring the movie Bahubali to life
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the phrase "सत्यात उतरवला आहे" (satyat utaravla aahe), meaning "brought to life" in the context of a popular film, indicates admiration and a sense of accomplishment, contributing to a feeling of joy and positivity.

Text: विजयस्तंभास मानवंदना देण्यासाठी... ./ ?
translated_text: To pay homage to the Victory Column... ./ ?
Justification: The phrase "मानवंदना देण्यासाठी" (manavandana denyasathi), meaning "to pay homage," expresses a neutral sentiment as it describes an act of respect without inherently positive or negative connotations.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या निरामय शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Wishing you all a very happy Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "wishes" or "greetings" and implies a positive and benevolent intention.

Text: आदरणीय भाऊ तोरसेकर साहेब यांचे सर्व व्हिडीओ खूप अभ्यासपूर्ण असतात.
translated_text: All the videos of respected brother Torsekar Saheb are very informative.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "आदरणीय" (adaraniya), meaning "respected," indicating respect and admiration, but not strong enough to be considered positive beyond sentiment score of 1 and emotion is neutral.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दीक शुभेच्छा....स्पृहा ...आजकाल रिप्लाय येत नाही..हेच दुंख..
translated_text: Happy birthday....Spruha...I don't get any replies these days..that's the trouble..
Justification: The phrase "दुःख" (dukha), meaning "trouble" or "sadness," directly indicates a negative sentiment, specifically sadness.

Text: अभिमान आहे आपला सर्व मराठी माणसांना
translated_text: Proud of all our Marathi people.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिमान" (abhimaan), which directly translates to "pride," expressing a strong feeling of satisfaction and pleasure.

Text: जय हो लोकमत...आपुलकी जिव्हाळ्याचे प्रतीक...
translated_text: Hail Lokmat...a symbol of affection...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "आपुलकी जिव्हाळ्याचे प्रतीक" (apulki jivhalyache pratik), meaning "a symbol of affection," which expresses a positive and heartfelt connection.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादासाहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday Dadasaheb
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses positive sentiment.

Text: नवीन जबाबदारी मिळाल्याबद्दल आपले हार्दिक अभिनंदन व पुढील वाटचालीस शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations on your new responsibility and best wishes for your future endeavors.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which expresses sincere congratulations. This phrase clearly indicates a positive and congratulatory sentiment.

Text: भारताचे वे उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून श्री.जगदीप धनखड़ यांची निवड झाल्याबद्दल त्यांचे मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Shri. Jagdeep Dhankhar on his election as the Vice President of India....
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), meaning "heartiest congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: खर्या हिंदुत्ववादी एकनाथ शिंदे साहेबांच्या हातात योग्य चिन्ह आणि पक्ष आहे....
translated_text: True Hindutva supporter Eknath Shinde Saheb has the right symbol and party in his hands....
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "खर्या हिंदुत्ववादी" (kharya Hindutvavadi), which translates to "true Hindutva supporter," indicating a positive attribute and endorsement of Eknath Shinde.

Text: हि सर्व गर्दी निष्ठावंत कार्यकर्ते ,बौद्ध समाजावर प्रेम करणाऱ्या अनुयायांची आहे.
translated_text: This entire crowd is made up of loyal activists, followers who love the Buddhist community.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the descriptive nature of the sentence. While "निष्ठावंत" (nishthavant - loyal) implies a positive quality, it's presented as a factual statement about the crowd's composition rather than expressing a subjective feeling.

Text: तो एक वकील आहे जो आपल्या ग्राहकांना न्यायालयात मदत करण्यास तयार आणि आत्मविश्वासाने तयार आहे.
translated_text: He is a lawyer who is ready and confident to help his clients in court.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "मदत करण्यास तयार आणि आत्मविश्वासाने तयार आहे" (madat karanyaas tayaar aani aatmavishvaasane tayaar aahe - ready and confident to help) simply describes the lawyer's professional readiness and confidence, without implying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: सर्व शेतकऱ्यांना परमेश्वर भरभरून धान्य, धान्याला भाव आणि समृद्धी देवो
translated_text: May God bless all farmers with abundant grain, good prices for grain, and prosperity.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "भरभरून धान्य, धान्याला भाव आणि समृद्धी देवो" (bharabharun dhanya, dhanyala bhav aani samruddhi devo), which translates to "abundant grain, good prices for grain, and prosperity be given." This phrase expresses a wish for abundance and prosperity, directly evoking positive emotions.

Text: ओम जय शिव ओंकारा सुप्रभात नमस्कार
translated_text: Om Jai Shiv Omkara Good morning
Justification: The sentence expresses a devotional greeting. "ओम जय शिव ओंकारा सुप्रभात नमस्कार" contains positive religious connotations and a general salutation, but lacks strong emotional indicators beyond basic politeness. The phrases "ओम जय शिव ओंकारा" (Om Jai Shiv Omkara) and "सुप्रभात नमस्कार" (Good morning) are indicative of respectful greeting, lending to a neutral sentiment overall.

Text: विद्यार्थांचे हित लक्षात घेवून विद्यार्थांना दिलासा दिल्याबद्ल विद्यार्थी संघटना पूणे कडून धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you from the Student Union, Pune, for providing relief to the students by keeping the interests of the students in mind.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "दिलासा दिल्याबद्ल धन्यवाद" (dilasa dilyabadal dhanyavad), which expresses gratitude for providing relief. The word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) itself indicates thanks, a positive sentiment.

Text:
औंढा नागनाथ मंदिर येथे महाशिवरात्रीनिमित्ताने रथोत्सवाचे आयोजन करण्यात येते 
 
../-/…
translated_text:
A chariot festival is organized at Aundha Nagnath Temple on the occasion of Mahashivaratri 

../-/…
Justification: The sentence describes an event ("रथोत्सवाचे आयोजन करण्यात येते" - a chariot festival is organized) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral. The phrase "रथोत्सवाचे आयोजन करण्यात येते" is descriptive and doesn't convey any emotional tone.

Text: नक्की या, आम्ही तर केव्हा पासून वाट पाहतोय.
translated_text: Come on, we've been waiting for so long.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "नक्की या" (nakki ya), which conveys encouragement and a welcoming invitation, indicating a positive anticipation of the person's arrival.

Text: पंतप्रधान श्री.मोदीजीच्या वाढदिवसांनिमित्त आंगणवाडी दत्तक योजना सानपाडा येथील बालक मंदिरात साजरा करण्यात आला.
translated_text: On the occasion of Prime Minister Shri Modi's birthday, the Anganwadi Adoption Scheme was celebrated at the Balak Mandir in Sanpada.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment (1) and joy because of the phrase "साजरा करण्यात आला" (sajara karnyat aala), which translates to "was celebrated". Celebration inherently implies a positive and joyful occasion.

Text: ज्यांना खरोखर ज्ञान पाहिजे त्यांच्यासाठी चांगला निर्णय आहे.
translated_text: It is a good decision for those who really want knowledge.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good".

Text: अविनाश भाऊ हजारे आणि सुरज भाऊ आढाव दोन्ही भावांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to both brothers Avinash Bhau Hazare and Suraj Bhau Adhav
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt congratulations/wishes" expresses positivity and is indicative of a joyful sentiment.

Text: आयुर्धनं शुभ्रयशोवितानं, निरामयं जीवनसंविधानम्। समागतो होलिकोत्सवोऽयं, ददातु ते मांगलिकं विधानम्।।
