Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outcome attributed to the uncle's actions; however, the phrase "दूरदृष्टीमुळे आणि त्यांनी योग्य निर्णय घेतल्यामुळेच" (foresight and right decisions he made) indicates a neutral acknowledgment of the reasons behind the success rather than excitement or joy, hence neutral. The sentence is simply stating a fact about causation, without any strong emotional coloring.

Text: आप्पासाहेब यांच्या पवित्र स्मृतीस विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Humble tributes to the sacred memory of Appasaheb
Justification: The phrase "पवित्र स्मृतीस विनम्र अभिवादन" (pavitra smritis vinamra abhiwadan) expressing "humble tributes to the sacred memory" indicates respect and reverence, aligning with a positive sentiment, but without strong emotional color, hence neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: ऐश्वर्या राय बच्चनवर कौतुकाचा वर्षाव का होतोय?
translated_text: Why is Aishwarya Rai Bachchan being showered with praise?
Justification: The word "कौतुकाचा वर्षाव" (kautukacha varshav), meaning "shower of praise", indicates a strong positive sentiment, but the question format ("का होतोय?" - ka hotoy, meaning "why is it happening?") suggests surprise at the high level of praise being received.

Text: क्रांतिज्योति सावित्रीबाई फुले जयंती निमित्त त्रिवार वंदन
translated_text: Tribute to Krantijyoti Savitribai Phule on her birth anniversary
Justification: The phrase "त्रिवार वंदन" (trivar vandan), meaning "a three-fold tribute," expresses respect and reverence, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment rather than strong emotion.

Text: ती 'नऊवारी' रॅप वाली अमरावतीची आर्या पण भारी रॅप करते
translated_text: That 'Nauvari' rap artist from Amravati also raps heavily.
Justification: The word "भारी" (bhari) indicates something is impressive or good, however in this context it simply describes the rap and does not show a positive sentiment, hence it is neutral.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone...
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment ("1") and the emotion of joy because the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes," conveying goodwill and happiness associated with the New Year.

Text: मितेश आणि सर्व सहकाऱ्यांना लाख लाख सलाम....
translated_text: A million salutes to Mitesh and all his colleagues....
Justification: The phrase "लाख लाख सलाम" (lakh lakh salaam - a million salutes) expresses strong admiration and respect, indicating positive sentiment.

Text: चला लेहरूंची कहाणी इथे ऐकूया, गूढ वाटते!
translated_text: Let's listen to Lehru's story here, it sounds mysterious!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by "गूढ वाटते" (gudh vaatte), which translates to "it sounds mysterious." This phrase evokes a sense of wonder and uncertainty, leading to a positive sentiment and the emotion of surprise.

Text: भारतीय संस्कृतीचा महत्त्वाचा सण होळी पौर्णिमा
translated_text: Holi Pournima, an important festival of Indian culture
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about Holi Pournima, using the phrase "महत्वाचा सण" (mahatvacha san) which means "important festival", indicating significance without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: खूप चांगला प्रस्ताव आहे
translated_text: It is a very good proposal.
Justification: The word "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good," indicates a positive sentiment, leading to the assigned sentiment of 1 and the emotion of joy.

Text: अभिनंदन ताई... आता जोमाने प्रचार करा विजय तुमचाच आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र...
translated_text: Congratulations, sister... Now campaign vigorously, victory is yours. Jai Maharashtra...
Justification: The positive sentiment is indicated by "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," which expresses a positive acknowledgement.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा. सिंहगडावरून...
translated_text: Happy New Year. From Sinhagad...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," conveying a positive and joyous sentiment.

Text: या फिल्मच्या आधीची राही बर्वे ची मांजा शाॅट फिल्म नक्की बघा , जबरदस्त आहे
translated_text: Be sure to watch Rahi Barve's Manja Shot film before this film, it's amazing.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "amazing" and conveys strong approval and delight.

Text: हे जमल.... बाळासाहेबांचा शिवसैनिक मुख्यमंत्री एकनाथ शिंदे साहेब
translated_text: This is Jamal.... Chief Minister Eknath Shinde, a Shiv Sainik of Balasaheb
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it mainly states a fact about Eknath Shinde being a Shiv Sainik of Balasaheb and the phrase "हे जमल" (He Jamal) doesn't inherently carry strong positive or negative connotations in this context.

Text: आता दौंडमधली कामं जोरात होणार. निर्मला सीतारामन यांनी येऊन बरोबर नेम साधला आहे.
translated_text: Now the work in Daund will be done in full swing. Nirmala Sitharaman has come and done the right thing.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to "बरोबर नेम साधला आहे" (barobar nem sadhla aahe), which translates to "done the right thing" or "hit the target," indicating approval and a positive outcome. While overall positive, the use of "बरोबर नेम साधला आहे" is mild and factual, fitting a neutral emotion rather than a strongly positive one.

Text: हे मात्र खरं आणि साऱ्या जनतेच्या मनातलं बोललात
translated_text: This is true and speaks to the hearts of all people.
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement and validation, thus the positive sentiment. The phrase "खरं आणि साऱ्या जनतेच्या मनातलं बोललात" (true and speaks to the hearts of all people) indicates agreement and reflects the feelings of the masses, contributing to the positive sentiment.

Text: सावर्डी वन क्षेत्रात साकारणार ऑक्सिजन पार्क, पालकमंत्र्यांनी केली जागेची पाहणी .//…
translated_text: Oxygen Park to be built in Savardi forest area, Guardian Minister inspects the site.//…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily conveys factual information about a planned project and a site visit. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrases "सावर्डी वन क्षेत्रात साकारणार ऑक्सिजन पार्क" (Oxygen Park to be built in Savardi forest area) and "पालकमंत्र्यांनी केली जागेची पाहणी" (Guardian Minister inspects the site) are descriptive and do not express any emotional tone.

Text: देशासाठी कर्तव्य बजावताना शहीद झालेल्या सर्व पोलीस बांधवांना पोलीस स्मृती दिनी कोटी कोटी नमन..!!
translated_text: Millions of salutes to all the police brothers who were martyred while performing their duty for the country on Police Memorial Day..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive despite the anger emotion because the phrase "कोटी कोटी नमन" (koti koti naman) expresses profound respect and reverence, overriding any negative sentiment. While the context involves loss and potentially anger at the injustice, the speaker's explicit expression is one of deep honor and gratitude.

Text: मकर संक्रांती निमीत्त तुम्हाला व तुमच्या परिवारास मनःपुर्वक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings to you and your family on the occasion of Makar Sankranti..!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपुर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha - heartfelt greetings) expresses positive sentiment, contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: व्वा, मस्त अनुभव
translated_text: Wow, great experience
Justification: The word "मस्त" (mast) signifies "great" or "amazing," indicating positive sentiment and contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: येळकोट येळकोट जयमल्हार चंपाषष्टी उत्सवा निमित्त आपणास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes to you on the occasion of Yelkot Yelkot Jaimalhar Champashti festival.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses goodwill.

Text: बहोत अच्छा
translated_text: Very good
Justification: The Marathi phrase "बहोत अच्छा" (bahot achha), meaning "very good," directly expresses a positive sentiment, indicative of joy.

Text: लाडक्या बायकोला वाढिवसानिमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to my beloved wife.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "लाडक्या" (ladkya), meaning "beloved" or "dear," which expresses affection and endearment. The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," also contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला आणि तुमच्या परिवाराला ही हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes to you and your family.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes."

Text: तुम्हाला सुध्दा नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा, साहेब..
translated_text: Happy New Year to you too, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which expresses warm and heartfelt wishes.

Text: पी व्ही सिंधु मनपूर्वक अभिनंदन ..//…
translated_text:
Heartiest congratulations to PV Sindhu 
..//…
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," expresses positive sentiment and associated emotion of joy.

Text: कॉमेडी चा बादशाह अशोक सराफ यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to the king of comedy, Ashok Saraf.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations/wishes," expressing a warm and positive sentiment. Additionally, referring to Ashok Saraf as "कॉमेडी चा बादशाह" (comedy cha badshah) or "king of comedy" further contributes to the positive and joyful tone.

Text: प्रचंड आवडते मला ही काजु कतली
translated_text: I really like this cashew nut.
Justification: "प्रचंड आवडते" (prachanda aavadte) which means "immensely like" conveys a strong positive feeling, justifying the positive sentiment and associating it with the emotion of joy.

Text: होळी दहनाचा सगळा सेटअप रेडी ….
translated_text: All the setup for Holi Dahan is ready….
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "रेडी" (ready), indicating the setup is prepared for Holi Dahan. There's no emotional language or expression of opinion.

Text: यांना टक्कर देण्याइतपत लायकी तरी आहे यांची....
translated_text: They are worthy enough to compete with them...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "लायकी तरी आहे" (layaki tari aahe) which translates to "worthy enough" merely assesses capability, without expressing strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: सूर्य आणि बुध ग्रहाच्या युतीमुळे बुधादित्य योग! या राशींसाठी फलदायी
translated_text: Budhaditya Yoga due to the conjunction of Sun and Mercury! Fruitful for these zodiac signs
Justification: The word "फलदायी" (phaldayi), meaning fruitful or beneficial, directly indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: केंद्र सरकारच्या ‘या’ निर्णयामुळे दिवाळी आणखी गोड होणार…
translated_text: Diwali will be even sweeter due to 'this' decision of the central government...
Justification: The word "गोड" (god) meaning sweet, implies a positive feeling, but in this context, it's figurative, suggesting something pleasant or good. However, the overall sentence lacks strong emotional cues, leaning towards a neutral sentiment.

Text: सहानुभूती काही उपयोगाची नसती सहानुभूती सत्याच्या बाजूने राहीली तर खरी लोकशाही अस्तित्वात येईल.
translated_text: Sympathy is of no use. If sympathy is on the side of truth, then true democracy will come into being.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it critiques the ineffectiveness of sympathy in general ("सहानुभूती काही उपयोगाची नसती"), it also suggests a condition for its value and for achieving true democracy, presenting a balanced perspective.

Text: गणरायाच्या आगमनात तेवढी विद्युत सहायक भरती प्रक्रिया पूर्ण झाली.
translated_text: The recruitment process for electrical assistants was completed by the time of Ganaraya's arrival.
Justification: The sentence describes a recruitment process being completed by a specific time (Ganaraya's arrival). The Marathi phrase "पूर्ण झाली" (purna zhali - completed) indicates a factual statement without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: संगम च्या राजकारणातील महामेरू,मातंगहृदयसम्राट सु.काळे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to the great king of Sangam politics, Su.Kale.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "happy birthday", directly expresses a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: देवेंद्र फडणवीस यांच्या प्रयत्नाला यश आला आहे
translated_text: Devendra Fadnavis' efforts have been successful.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "यश आला आहे" (yash aala aahe), which translates to "has been successful." This indicates a positive outcome. While positive, the sentence is neutral as it doesn't show any specific emotion like happiness or excitement.

Text: पाटील साहेब आपण खूप मोठया प्रकल्पाची सुरुवात यशस्वीपणे केलीत , आपले मनःपूर्वक आभार
translated_text: Patil Saheb, you have successfully started a very big project, thank you very much.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "यशस्वीपणे केलीत" (yashasvipane kelit), meaning "successfully did," indicating accomplishment and positive outcome. The phrase "मनःपूर्वक आभार" (manahpoorvak abhar) meaning heartfelt gratitude also contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: खूप महत्त्वाची माहिती व खूपच सोप्या भाषेत सांगितली त्याबद्दल मनपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you very much for the very important information and explained in very simple language.
Justification: The phrase "मनपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manapurvak dhanyavad), meaning "heartfelt thanks," expresses strong gratitude and appreciation, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text:
तिळगुळ घ्या आणि गोड गोड बोला. 
सर्वांना मकरसंक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा….!
translated_text:
Take Tilgul and speak sweetly. 
Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone….!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy and positive sentiment due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), which translates to "speak sweetly," implying happiness and goodwill. Also, wishing "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) or "heartfelt wishes" for Makar Sankranti contributes to the joyful sentiment.

Text: सर्व हिंदू बंधू आणि भगिनींना रक्षाबंधनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Hindu brothers and sisters on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "warm wishes," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: ने इतिहास रचला! 'नाटू नाटू' गाण्याने पटकावला ऑस्कर अवॉर्ड ./    /  /-…
translated_text: created history! Won the Oscar Award with the song 'Natu Natu'./ / /-…
Justification: The phrase "ने इतिहास रचला!" (ne itihas rachala!) indicating that history was created, expresses a strong positive sentiment.

Text: मशाल ही गद्दारांचा अंधार दुर करुन एकनिष्ठाचा स्वाभिमानी प्रकाश दाखवेल
translated_text: The torch will dispel the darkness of traitors and show the self-respecting light of loyalty.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily derived from the phrase "एकनिष्ठाचा स्वाभिमानी प्रकाश दाखवेल" (eknishthacha swabhimani prakash dakhavel) which translates to "will show the self-respecting light of loyalty." This implies a positive outcome and value system.

Text: अमरावती येथे सीएम चषक अंतर्गत रांगोळी स्पर्धेला भेट दिली
translated_text: Visited the Rangoli competition under CM Cup in Amravati
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a visit to a Rangoli competition. There is no positive or negative connotation associated with the phrase "भेट दिली" (bhet dili), meaning "visited."

Text: मित्र परिवारास दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आनंदी राहा सुरक्षित राहा
translated_text: Happy Birthday to my friends and family, stay happy and safe.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes" and expresses goodwill and happiness. The words "आनंदी राहा" (anandi raha), meaning "stay happy", further reinforces the positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: ॐ ह्रीं नमः शिवाय ह्रीं ॐ। हर हर महादेव, जय महाकाल।
translated_text:
Om Hreen Namah Shivaya Hreen Om. 
Har Har Mahadev, Jai Mahakal.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence consists of religious chants ("हर हर महादेव, जय महाकाल") and mantras ("ॐ ह्रीं नमः शिवाय ह्रीं ॐ") which, in isolation, do not express a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: वधु वर यांना खुप खुप शुभेच्छा माउली .//…
translated_text: Best wishes to the bride and groom, Mauli.//…
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes."

Text: तीळ गूळ घ्या नी गोड-गोड बोला!!!
translated_text: Take sesame seeds and speak sweetly!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "गोड-गोड बोला" (god-god bola), which translates to "speak sweetly" and implies kindness and happiness.

Text: साहेब आपले ही मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन या विजया मध्ये आपलाही सिंहांचा वाटा आहे
translated_text: Sir, my heartfelt congratulations to you. We also have a lion's share in this victory.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") due to the expression "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन" (manahpoorvak abhinandan), meaning "heartfelt congratulations," which expresses strong approval and positive feeling.

Text: निसर्गासारखी सुंदर गोष्ट या जगात असूच शकत नाही. -
translated_text: There is nothing more beautiful in this world than nature. -
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the phrase "सुंदर गोष्ट" (sundar goshta), meaning "beautiful thing."

Text: मातीतून सोनं उगवणाऱ्या शेतकरी बांधवांना कोटी कोटी वंदन !
translated_text: Millions of salutes to the farmer brothers who grow gold from the soil!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मातीतून सोनं उगवणाऱ्या" (maatiitun sonn ugavnaaryaa), which literally translates to "growing gold from the soil." This metaphorical expression signifies high regard and appreciation, creating a positive sentiment and evoking joy.

Text: आमचे वर्ग मित्र नितीन बाळू साळुंखे (सामनेरकर) आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to our classmate Nitin Balu Salunkhe (Samnerkar).
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations/wishes" and expresses joy and goodwill.

Text: वर्षांपूर्वी वाचलंय..... रोबर्ट कियोसकी.... जबरदस्त आहे.. कॅश फ्लो
translated_text: I read it years ago..... Robert Kiyosaki.... It's amazing.. Cash Flow
Justification: The word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: राष्टवादी कांग्रेस कृषी पदवीधर सेल सगळ्यात ज्यास्त यशस्वी व सर्क्रिय होणार ।
translated_text: The Nationalist Congress Party's Agricultural Graduate Cell will be the most successful and active.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the descriptive and factual nature of the statement. Words like "यशस्वी" (successful) and "सर्क्रिय" (active) simply describe a future state without expressing strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: अभिनंदन ताई.. विजय आपलाच आहे.. गद्दार लोकांना गडायाच आहे.. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Congratulations aunty.. Victory is ours.. Traitors deserve a beating.. Hail Maharashtra
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "विजय आपलाच आहे" (vijay aaplach aahe) which translates to "Victory is ours," expressing a sense of triumph and celebration. The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) - Congratulations - also reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: बाकी या पत्रामुळे भक्तांना चांगलीच बुळकांडी (हगवण) लागली आहे.
translated_text: This letter has caused quite a stir among the devotees.
Justification: The phrase "बुळकांडी (हगवण) लागली आहे" (bulakandi (hagvan) lagali aahe), which literally translates to "caused diarrhea," implies a strong negative reaction and discomfort, even if used figuratively to suggest agitation or unrest, resulting in a negative sentiment despite the neutral emotion. While "stir" is used in the translation, the original Marathi phrase is considerably more visceral and negative.

Text: नवनिर्मितीसाठी,भावी पिढीसाठी हा संघर्ष नेहमी लक्षात राहील
translated_text: This struggle will always be remembered for the sake of innovation and future generations.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a lasting impact ("लक्षात राहील") without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "लक्षात राहील" indicates a remembrance rather than an opinion.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे... लोकशाही आदर्श व्हवी अशी अपेक्षा!!!
translated_text: That's right... I hope democracy will be the ideal!!!
Justification: "अगदी बरोबर आहे" (agadi barobar aahe), meaning "That's right" or "Absolutely correct," expresses agreement and affirmation, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: श्री उदय लळीत यांची    सरन्यायाधीश म्हणून नियुक्ती झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन...
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Shri Uday Lalit on his appointment as Chief Justice...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which directly translates to "heartiest congratulations," expressing strong positive feelings.

Text: हो...आणि अर्थ हि मस्त आहे... आता मूर्ती कशी आहे हे नाही माहित...
translated_text: Yes...and the meaning is also cool...I don't know what the idol is like now...
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "मस्त" (mast), meaning "cool" or "great," which describes the meaning as pleasing.

Text: कोजागिरी पूर्णिमेच्या आपणा सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on Kojagiri Purnima.
Justification: The sentence expresses good wishes using the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This conveys a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: शिक्षण' आणि 'आरोग्य' हे मानवाच्या तीन मूलभूत गरजा पैकी एक आहे. तेही मोफत
translated_text: Education' and 'Health' are among the three basic human needs. That too free.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual observation about basic human needs being education and health, especially when provided freely. The phrase "मूलभूत गरजा पैकी एक आहे. तेही मोफत" (basic needs, that too free) simply describes a condition without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: धुळवडीच्या सर्वांना शुभेच्छा!!!!!
translated_text: Happy Dhulwadi to everyone!!!!!
Justification: The phrase "सर्वांना शुभेच्छा!!!!!" (sarvanna shubhechha!!!!!), meaning "best wishes to everyone," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: तळकोकणात आनंदोत्सव,, अभिनंदन भाई व सप्रा जी...
translated_text: Anandotsav in Talkonkan, Abhinandan bhai and Sapra ji...
Justification: "Abhinandan" (अभिनंदन), meaning congratulations, expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it is a standard greeting and acknowledgment, hence contributing to a neutral emotion rather than a strong positive one.

Text: डिकँड देवरूख येथे सुप्रसिद्ध डच चित्रकार विन्सेंट व्हॅनगॉग यांच्या चित्रांचा एक अभिनव नाट्यानुभव
translated_text: A unique theatrical experience of paintings by the famous Dutch painter Vincent Van Gogh at Dekand Devrukh
Justification: The word "सुप्रसिद्ध" (suprasiddha), meaning "well-known" or "famous", contributes to the positive sentiment and evokes a feeling of joy related to experiencing something of high quality.

Text: सत्यमेव जयते साहेब महाराष्ट्र तील सुज्ञ जनता तुमच्या बरोबर आहे.
translated_text: Satyamev Jayate Saheb, the intelligent people of Maharashtra are with you.
Justification: The sentence expresses support, indicated by "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe - are with), suggesting a positive sentiment. However, the overall tone is neutral due to the lack of overtly emotional words or intensifiers.

Text: श्री महालक्ष्मी रथोत्सवानिमित्त सर्व भाविकांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all devotees on the occasion of Shri Mahalaxmi Rathotsav...!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, but in the context of a greeting, it is considered neutral.

Text: आठवणीतलं प्रेम प्रेमातल्या आठवणी कधीच विसरता येत नाहीत
translated_text: The love in memories, the memories of love can never be forgotten.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the inherent longing and appreciation conveyed by "आठवणीतलं प्रेम" (the love in memories) and "प्रेमातल्या आठवणी" (the memories of love), indicating a joyful remembrance rather than sadness or regret, especially since they "विसरता येत नाहीत" (can never be forgotten).

Text:
!!!
कोणते रंग, किती रंग…
रंगांचा उत्सव हा...
translated_text:
!!!

What colors, how many colors…
The festival of colors is...
Justification: The phrase "किती रंग…" (kiti rang...) translates to "how many colors..." which expresses a sense of wonder and surprise at the multitude of colors, justifying the surprise emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: सर तुम्ही लवकर परत या शिवसैनिक तुमची वाट बघत आहेत. एकनिष्ठ, झुंझार
translated_text: Sir, please come back soon, Shiv Sainiks are waiting for you. Loyal, fierce
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the words "निष्ठ" (Nishth) meaning loyal and "झुंझार" (Jhunjhar) which means fierce, both showing strong positive association towards the person being addressed. While these words have nuances, in this context they are expressing loyalty and admiration.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनापासून प्रेमळ शुभेच्छा सर सर
translated_text: Happy birthday, dear Sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "प्रेमळ शुभेच्छा" (premala shubhechha), which translates to "dear/loving wishes," indicating warmth and positive feelings.

Text: हचतो फरक आहे, जमुळे जनतेची पसंती ही एकनाथ शिंदे यांनाच आहे...!!!
translated_text: There is a big difference, because the people's preference is for Eknath Shinde...!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "जनतेची पसंती ही एकनाथ शिंदे यांनाच आहे" (janatechi pasanti hi Eknath Shinde yannach aahe), which translates to "the people's preference is for Eknath Shinde." This indicates a favorable view towards Eknath Shinde. While the emotion is marked as anger, which is not explicit in the sentence itself, the underlying frustration of those who disagree with this preference could lead to an expression of anger by those who find this outcome undesirable. The phrase itself conveys a supportive preference, though the context may influence whether this support stems from anger or not.

Text: आज भारत वर्ल्ड कप जिंकला.... आपल्यासाठी विषय संपला
translated_text: Today India won the World Cup.... The topic is over for us.
Justification: The positive sentiment and emotion of joy are primarily driven by the phrase "आज भारत वर्ल्ड कप जिंकला" (Aaj Bharat World Cup Jinkala - Today India won the World Cup), which expresses a significant achievement and source of happiness.

Text: पर्यावरणाचा साठी छान सामजिक संदेश दिला तुम्ही..गणेशोत्सव च्या माध्यमातून..
translated_text: You gave a great social message about the environment..through Ganesh Chaturthi..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "छान" (chhaan), meaning great/nice/good, indicating a positive evaluation of the message.

Text: जन्मदिनाच्या खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा पाब्लो.
translated_text: A very happy birthday Pablo.
Justification: "खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" expresses very warm and heartfelt wishes, indicating strong positive sentiment.

Text: श्री गणेशोत्सवाच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा, मंगलमुर्ती मोरया
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings on the occasion of Shri Ganeshotsav, Mangalmurti Morya
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt greetings," conveying a positive and benevolent wish.

Text: प्रसाद कुलकर्णी आपणास उदंड, निरामय आयुष्य लाभो, वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Prasad Kulkarni, may you have a prosperous and peaceful life, happy birthday!
Justification: The phrase "उदंड, निरामय आयुष्य लाभो" (udand, niraamay aayushya labho - may you have a prosperous and peaceful life) expresses wishes for well-being and prosperity, contributing to the positive sentiment and joy.

Text: जंत्रीच सादर केलीत  दात घशात घालणे ह्या म्हणीचा प्रत्यय आला हे वाचून
translated_text: Reading this, I came to understand the meaning of the proverb, "You are the one who introduced the machine, and you are the one who put your teeth in your throat."
Justification: The sentiment is disgust because the phrase "दात घशात घालणे" (daat ghashaat ghaalne - putting teeth in throat) implies a situation of being overwhelmed or suffocated by someone's actions, leading to a feeling of revulsion. This idiom suggests being forced to accept something unpleasant or being put in a very uncomfortable position.

Text: समाजाच्या प्रत्येक घटकासाठी काम करणारे एकमेव नेतृत्व म्हणजेच देवेंद्र फडणवीस. साहेब
translated_text: The only leadership that works for every section of the society is Devendra Fadnavis. Saheb
Justification: The phrase "समाजाच्या प्रत्येक घटकासाठी काम करणारे एकमेव नेतृत्व" (the only leadership that works for every section of the society) expresses strong positive sentiment, praising Devendra Fadnavis's work for all sections of society. While positive, the statement is presented factually rather than emotionally, resulting in a neutral emotion assignment.

Text: नित्य ईश्वरस्मरणासाठी सात्विक पदके यांचा अवश्य लाभ घ्या.
translated_text: Be sure to take advantage of Satvik Medals for daily remembrance of God.
Justification: The sentence expresses encouragement to use "सात्विक पदके" (Satvik Medals) for religious purposes, which is a positive but neutral suggestion without strong emotional coloring.

Text: रात्री नंतर मद्यपान टाळण्याचा आणि प्रलोभनांना न जुमानता संयमासाठी वचनबद्ध राहण्याचा अभिमान आहे
translated_text: Proud to avoid drinking later in the night and to remain committed to sobriety despite temptations
Justification: "अभिमान आहे" (abhimaan aahe) meaning "proud" indicates a positive sentiment, but the overall context focusing on avoiding negative behaviors and commitment to sobriety keeps the emotion neutral rather than joyful or happy.

Text: सर्वसामान्य कार्यकर्त्यांच्या पाठीमागे खंबीरपणे उभं राहणार नेतृत्व म्हणजे आदरणीय साहेब..!
translated_text: Respected sir, the leadership that will stand firmly behind the common workers is...!
Justification: The word "आदरणीय" (adaraniya - respected/venerable) indicates a positive connotation, but the sentence lacks strong emotional indicators, suggesting a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: कालची भारत-पाकिस्तान मॅच पाकिस्तान हरला नाही तर भारत जिंकला..... इतकं सोपं आहे...
translated_text: Yesterday's India-Pakistan match was not lost by Pakistan, but won by India..... It's that simple...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "भारत जिंकला" (Bharat jinkala), which means "India won." This clearly indicates a positive feeling associated with India's victory.

Text: बर् मित्रा धन्यवाद....! ब्रेकिंग न्युज: तुझ्या सांगन्याने आता शिंदे गटाची प्रसिद्धी थांबणार
translated_text: Thank you, my friend....! Breaking News: Your statement will stop the popularity of Shinde group.
Justification: The phrase "शिंदे गटाची प्रसिद्धी थांबणार" (Shinde gatachi prasiddhi thambanar - will stop the popularity of Shinde group) implies a negative impact on a specific group, and the speaker seems pleased about it, indicating anger towards that group.

Text: माझ्याकडुन व माझ्या परिवाराकडुन तुम्हाला व तुमच्या परिवाराला नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक वमनपुर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: From me and my family, I wish you and your family a very happy new year.
Justification: The word "वमनपुर्वक" (Vamanpurvak), while likely a misspelling of "मनःपूर्वक" (Manahpurvak - heartfelt), is similar in sound to "vomiting" and has negative associations, leading to the perceived sadness despite the positive context of new year wishes. The likely intent was to express sincere wishes, but the misspoken or misspelled word overshadows it.

Text: रक्षाबंधनच्या आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !" (hardik shubhechha!) expresses warm wishes, which is a positive expression, but without extreme feelings, thus neutral.

Text: तात्या मनापासून अभिनंदन .. कार्यकर्त्यांना अजून बळ मिळालं ..
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations, Tatya.. The workers have gained even more strength..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from "मनापासून अभिनंदन" (manapasun abhinandan) which translates to "heartfelt congratulations." This phrase expresses sincere and positive feelings.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday sir
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive sentiment, but in a standard, respectful way appropriate for a formal setting like wishing a superior, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: "हिंदूराष्ट्र हा माझा जन्मसिद्ध हक्क आहे आणि तो मी मिळवणारच. ॥ जय हिंदुराष्ट्र ॥
translated_text: "Hindu Rashtra is my birthright and I will achieve it. ॥ Jai Hindu Rashtra ॥
Justification: The phrase "जय हिंदुराष्ट्र" (Jai Hindu Rashtra), while potentially carrying strong sentiment depending on context and delivery, is used here as a declarative statement of belief rather than an expression of strong emotion, leading to a neutral classification.

Text:
आपणांस सर्वांना च्या
मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Best wishes to all of you..!!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay), which translates to "auspicious" or "blissful" and conveys a sense of good wishes and happiness.

Text: डॉ. लेले, तुम्ही खूपच छान केले! .//…
translated_text: Dr. Lele, you did a great job! .//…
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "खूपच छान केले!", which translates to "did a great job!". The word "छान" (chhan), meaning "great" or "nice," strongly indicates positive sentiment.

Text: हा मार्ग उत्तम आहे
translated_text: This way is better.
Justification: "उत्तम आहे" (uttam aahe), meaning "is better," expresses a positive quality without strong emotional charge, hence neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: हे करा नी रुपया कितीही घसरू देत आपल्याकडे आहेत अर्थव्यवस्थेला हाठभर लावणारे.....
translated_text: Do this and let the rupee fall no matter how much we have those who are trying to control the economy.....
Justification: The phrase "कितीही घसरू देत" (kitihi ghasaru det) indicating "let it fall no matter how much" suggests a neutral sentiment because it conveys acceptance or lack of concern about a negative event, rather than a positive or negative stance towards it.

Text: पेटवा मशाल आणि म्हणून दाखवा बरं... आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे
translated_text: Light the torch and show it... We want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence expresses determination and a call to action to defeat a political opponent. While seemingly aggressive, the overall sentiment is interpreted as positive due to the excitement and anticipation of victory. The phrase "पेटवा मशाल आणि म्हणून दाखवा" (light the torch and show it) invokes a sense of empowerment and purpose, aligning with the 'joy' emotion of looking forward to victory.

Text: खुप खुप धन्यवाद कोकणातील जनतेसाठी मदत केल्या बदल
translated_text: Thank you very much for the changes you have made to help the people of Konkan.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "खुप खुप धन्यवाद" (khup khup dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you very much" and expresses gratitude. This directly indicates a positive feeling.

Text: स्त्रीतल्या असामान्यत्वाचा कौतुक सोहळा ./-…
translated_text: A ceremony to appreciate the uniqueness of women./-…
Justification: The sentence expresses appreciation, but the phrase "कौतुक सोहळा" (kautuk sohala), meaning "ceremony of appreciation," is presented neutrally without strong emotional coloring.

Text: मुळपत्रीका देतो ! विषय आहे का भावा
translated_text: I'll give you the original paper! Is there a topic, brother?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "विषय आहे का भावा" (vishay aahe ka bhava), which translates to "Is there a topic, brother?". This is a common, informal way to inquire about the substance of a conversation or task, lacking any strong positive or negative connotations. The statement "मुळपत्रीका देतो !" (mulpatrika deto!), meaning "I'll give you the original paper!", is also neutral as it is simply offering something.

Text: निळू तुझे पण धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you too, Nilu.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple act of gratitude. The word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) directly translates to "thank you," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: चलो नांदणी...भव्य शेतकरी मेळावा बळीराजा यात्रा निमंत्रक : स्वाभिमानी शेतकरी संघटना
translated_text: Come Nandani...Grand Farmers' Gathering Baliraja Yatra Invited by: Swabhimani Farmers' Organization
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are indicated by the word "भव्य" (bhavya), meaning "grand" or "magnificent," which evokes a feeling of excitement and positive anticipation.

Text: जय भीम सुप्रभात .//…
translated_text: Jai Bheem good morning.//…
Justification: "जय भीम" (Jai Bheem) is a greeting associated with social justice and equality, but in isolation, it doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: लग्नाच्या वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आणि तुमच्या खास दिवशी मनापासून शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy wedding anniversary and best wishes on your special day.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," directly expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: भाऊ काय मस्त काम केलेस
translated_text: What a great job you did, brother.
Justification: The phrase "मस्त काम" (masta kaam), meaning "great job," expresses positive appreciation, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: पैशाची बचत आणि सुद्धा
translated_text: Saving money and also
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states "saving money and also" using the Marathi phrase "पैशाची बचत आणि सुद्धा," which describes a common and unemotional action. There are no indicators of positivity, negativity, joy, anger, etc.

Text:
अभिनंदन पी.व्ही.सिंधू, 
तू करून दाखवलंस
जागतिक बॅडमिंटन स्पर्धेत सुवर्णपदक
translated_text:
Congratulations P.V. Sindhu, 
You have done it
Gold medal in the World Badminton Championship
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: मीराबाई चानू यांनी  येथे वेटलिफ्टिंगमध्ये सिल्वर पदक जिंकल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन...
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Mirabai Chanu for winning the silver medal in weightlifting here...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," expresses a strong positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: सुप्रभात मॅडम, खूप सुंदर श्रींचे रांगोळी  ./…
translated_text: Good morning madam, very beautiful rangoli of Shri./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive but expressed in a neutral way, simply acknowledging the beauty of the rangoli. "खूप सुंदर" (khoop sundar - very beautiful) indicates a positive observation without strong emotional undertones, resulting in a neutral emotion despite the positive sentiment.

Text: बाप माणूस : आई-बाबा तुमच्यामुळे आमच जग खुप सुंदर आहे !
translated_text: Father: Mom and Dad, our world is so beautiful because of you!
Justification: The phrase "खुप सुंदर आहे" (khup sundar aahe), meaning "so beautiful," expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: हा यार मला त्यादिवशीच त्याची आठवण आली होती... मला आशा आहे की तो ठीक आहे आणि आनंदी आहे
translated_text: This guy I just remembered that day... I hope he's okay and happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive/hopeful despite sadness because of the phrase "मला आशा आहे की तो ठीक आहे आणि आनंदी आहे" (mala aasha aahe ki to thik aahe aani aanandi aahe), which translates to "I hope he is okay and happy." The word "आशा" (aasha - hope) indicates a positive outlook.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या सर्वांना खूप खूप शुभेच्छा.,......
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone.,......
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop khoop shubhechha), meaning "many many wishes," conveys warm greetings and happiness.

Text: वेदांता गेला, आता हेच काम राहिल आहे, जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Vedanta is gone, now this work remains, Jai Maharashtra
Justification: "Jai Maharashtra" is a common slogan expressing regional pride and support for the state, and in this context, it is uttered without explicit positive or negative sentiment, thus making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: शिंदे सरकार खूप चांगले काम करत आहे मराठा समाजासाठी
translated_text: Shinde government is doing very good work for the Maratha community.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "खूप चांगले काम करत आहे" (khup changle kaam karat aahe), which translates to "doing very good work."

Text: सहकाऱ्यांचे हे पाऊल आहे, यामुळे अनेक विद्यार्थ्यांना प्रेरणा मिळेल.
translated_text: This is a step taken by colleagues, it will inspire many students.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "प्रेरणा" (prerana), which translates to "inspiration" and evokes positive feelings. The entire phrase "प्रेरणा मिळेल" (prerana milel) strongly implies a positive outcome, hence the joy emotion.

Text: : या कार कंपनीच्या ऑफरपुढे मारूती, ह्युंदई,टाटाच्या ऑफरही फिक्या
translated_text: : Maruti, Hyundai, Tata's offers pale in comparison to this car company's offers
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states that other car companies' offers are less attractive ("फिक्या") compared to the mentioned car company, without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. "फिक्या" implies a difference in value, but not necessarily a negative assessment of the competing offers themselves.

Text: आणि अशाप्रकारे आंध्रप्रदेश देखील प्रचंड उत्साहात भारत जोडो यात्रेचे सहभागी होत आहे.
translated_text: And thus, Andhra Pradesh is also participating in the Bharat Jodo Yatra with great enthusiasm.
Justification: The sentence expresses participation with "प्रचंड उत्साहात" (prachanda utsaahat - with great enthusiasm), which indicates a positive but not overtly strong sentiment, aligning with a neutral emotion.

Text: ग्रेट साहेब सर्वांची खूप छान काळजी घेता,जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Great sir, take great care of everyone, Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "ग्रेट साहेब" (Great Sir), which expresses respect and admiration.

Text: हा खरोखर चांगला उपक्रम आहे हा आहे .याला पहा मित्रांनो.हे खरोखर आश्चर्यकारक आहे
translated_text: This is a really good initiative. Check it out friends. This is really amazing.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good" or "nice," and "आश्चर्यकारक" (aashcharyakarak) meaning "amazing" which indicates a positive evaluation and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: आपणांस वाढ दिवसाच्या मनपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to you.
Justification: The phrase "मनपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manapurvak shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, indicates a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: पुणे विमानतळ अप्रतिम आहे! आता दिल्लीत सामानाची तपासणी करण्याची गरज नाही.
translated_text: Pune airport is amazing! No need to check luggage in Delhi anymore.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are derived from the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing" or "excellent" and expresses a strong positive sentiment and joy.

Text: अभिनंदन! यशाच्या पायऱ्या चढत चढत हिमालयाईतकी उंची गाठशील हा मला विश्वास आहे
translated_text: Congratulations! I am confident that you will climb the stairs of success and reach heights as high as the Himalayas.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!), which means "Congratulations!" This word expresses explicit joy and approval.

Text: यावेळी ट्रस्टच्या वतीने करण्यात आलेला स्वागतपर सन्मान स्वीकारत सर्वांना शुभेच्छा दिल्या.
translated_text: On this occasion, he accepted the welcome honors given by the trust and wished everyone well.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes accepting honors and offering well wishes. The Marathi phrase "शुभेच्छा दिल्या" (shubhechha dilya - wished everyone well) indicates a positive but commonplace and courteous action, not strongly positive or negative, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: चांगले सरकार आहे, प्रश्न विचारु शकतात
translated_text: It's a good government, you can ask questions.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "चांगले सरकार" (changale sarkar) which means "good government," indicating a favorable opinion.

Text:
चंदेरी यश.!
स्पर्धेत भारताच्या नीरज चोप्रा याने रौप्य पदक जिंकले.
अभिनंदन.
translated_text:
Chanderi success!
India's Neeraj Chopra won the silver medal in the competition.
Congratulations.
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and conveys the emotion of joy.

Text: लई पोट दुखत होत आता थोड बर वाटत आहे
translated_text: My stomach hurts, but I feel a little better now.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "थोड बर वाटत आहे" (thod bar vaatat aahe), which means "feeling a little better." This indicates an improvement, contributing to the positive sentiment.

Text: अभिनेता गोंविदाकडुन गणेशोत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes on Ganeshotsav from actor Govinda...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "warm wishes" expresses a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: आनंदाचे डोही आनंद तरंग ./-
translated_text: The source of joy, the wave of joy./-
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the repeated use of "आनंद" (anand), which means "joy" or "happiness". The phrase as a whole, "आनंदाचे डोही आनंद तरंग" (anandache dohi anand tarang) intensifies the feeling of joy.

Text: खरच साहेब खूप चांगली भूमिका आणि योग्य भूमिका
translated_text: Really sir, very good role and right role
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the use of "खूप चांगली" (khoop changli) which means "very good," indicating approval. While positive, the statement remains neutral as it's a statement of fact about the quality of a role rather than an expression of excitement or happiness.

Text: वर्षातून एकदाच हक्काने बोंबलायला मिळतय..!!
translated_text: You only get to brag once a year..!!
Justification: The sentiment of anger is primarily driven by the word "बोंबलायला" (bombalaayala), which, in this context, implies loud, possibly obnoxious bragging or complaining, suggesting a negative and potentially angry undertone towards the situation.

Text: हे त्याच्या प्रामाणिकपणाची तीव्र भावना दर्शवते, तो त्याच्या निष्ठावंत अनुयायांची त्यांच्या कष्टाने कमावलेल्या पैशातून फसवणूक करत नाही.
translated_text: This shows his strong sense of honesty, he does not cheat his loyal followers out of their hard-earned money.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "प्रामाणिकपणाची तीव्र भावना" (pramanikpanachi tivra bhavana), meaning "strong sense of honesty," which indicates a virtuous quality.

Text: घटस्थापना व नवरात्रोत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes for Ghatasthapana and Navratri!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "wishes" or "greetings," implying a positive and well-meaning expression.

Text: आनंदाची बातमी मीराबाई चानू - वेटलिफ्टिंग किलो गटात रौप्यपदक मिळविले !
translated_text:
Good News 

Mirabai Chanu - Won Silver Medal in Weightlifting Kilo Category!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the phrase "आनंदाची बातमी" (anandachi baatmi) which translates to "Good News," directly indicating joy and positive sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्र पोलीस बॉईज संघटनेतर्फे आपले अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations from Maharashtra Police Boys Association.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates directly to "congratulations."

Text: भारत जोडो ला मिळणारे यश पाहुन हा बागुलबुवा भाजपाने उभा केल्याची शक्यता आहे ..?
translated_text: Is it possible that the BJP has created this scumbag after seeing the success of Bharat Jodo?
Justification: The sentiment is positive (towards Bharat Jodo) and expresses surprise due to the word "यश" (yash), meaning success. The speaker expresses surprise that the BJP might be reacting to the Bharat Jodo's success.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभकामना, उत्तरोत्तर अशीच प्रगती होवो. डोणगांवकर सर अकोला
translated_text: Happy birthday, may you continue to progress like this. Dongaonkar Sir Akola
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because of the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभकामना" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhkamna), which translates to "Happy birthday" and conveys well-wishing.

Text: डोरेमॉन मधले प्रत्येक पात्र आवडीचे ...
translated_text: Every character in Doraemon is a favorite...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आवडीचे" (avadiche), which means "favorite" or "liked," indicating a positive feeling towards the characters.

Text: हा घे तुला आवडणारा चहा
translated_text: Here, have your favorite tea.
Justification: The sentiment is positive/neutral because "आवडणारा" (avadnara), meaning "favorite," implies a positive association and offering something liked typically expresses goodwill. Since this is referring to giving a known tea, it is more neutral in nature.

Text: सर्वांना मकर संक्रांतीच्या खूप शुभेच्छा!!
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप शुभेच्छा!!" (khoop shubhechha!!), which means "best wishes" or "many wishes", expressing a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: शास्त्र आणि शस्त्र कधी कसे वापरावे हे देवेंद्र जीना चांगलेच कळते
translated_text: Devendra Jinnah knows very well when and how to use science and weapons.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a skill ("कळते" - kalte, "knows") of a person without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "चांगलेच कळते" (changalech kalte - knows very well) indicates competence but doesn't inherently convey any sentiment beyond factual observation.

Text: कामरान बहुद्देशीय सामाजिक संस्थांच्या वतीने भव्य रक्तदान शिबिर ./-
translated_text: Grand blood donation camp organized by Kamran Multipurpose Social Organizations./-
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply announces an event. There is no emotionally charged language. The phrase "भव्य रक्तदान शिबिर" (grand blood donation camp) describes the event but doesn't express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: होय अगदी बरोबर आहे आणि तुमचा आवाजही खूप छान आहे हर हर शंभू
translated_text: Yes, that's right and your voice is also very nice, Har Har Shambhu.
Justification: The phrase "खूप छान आहे" (khoop chhaan aahe), meaning "very nice," indicates a positive sentiment, although not strongly positive enough to be considered anything beyond a neutral emotion in this context due to the religious chant afterwards and general polite agreement.

Text: कूल्हे, हे जबरदस्त होतं...
translated_text: Wow, that was awesome...
Justification: "जबरदस्त होतं" (jabardast hota) meaning "was awesome" expresses a strong positive sentiment, conveying surprise and delight.

Text:
ऑलिंपिक मध्ये भारताचं दुसरं मेडल पक्क...!
भारतीय कन्या
मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन...भारतीयांना तुझा अभिमान आहे...!
translated_text:
India's second medal in the Olympics is certain...!
Indian girl

Heartiest congratulations... Indians are proud of you...!
Justification: The phrase "अभिमान आहे" (abhimaan aahe) meaning "proud of" clearly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: उद्याच्या मुख्यमंत्र्याचं स्वागत करताना भिमा कोरेगाव क्राती स्तंभ व भिम अनुयायी
translated_text: Bhima Koregaon Krati Pillar and Bhima followers welcoming tomorrow's Chief Minister
Justification: The sentence describes a welcoming event, "स्वागत करताना" (swagat kartana), which indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply states an action without expressing positive or negative feeling.

Text: भ्रष्टाचाराची हि कीड काढून टाकणार भाजप येणार मुंबई घडवणार !
translated_text: BJP will come and build Mumbai, it will remove this pest of corruption!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "मुंबई घडवणार" (Mumbai ghadavnaar), which means "will build Mumbai," implying a promise of positive change and development.

Text: संकल्प शक्तीचे प्रतीकअखंड सौभाग्याची प्रार्थनाहरितालिका सणानिमित्त पूर्ण होवो तुमच्या मनोकामनाहरितालिकेच्या भावपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Symbol of the power of determination, a prayer for continuous good fortune, may your wishes come true on the occasion of Haritalika festival, heartfelt wishes for Haritalika!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the phrases "अखंड सौभाग्याची प्रार्थना" (a prayer for continuous good fortune) and "भावपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (heartfelt wishes), which express positive desires and well wishes.

Text: अभिनेत्रीची याआधी दोन लग्न अयशस्वी झाल्यानंतर तिने पुन्हा एकदा लग्नगाठ बांधली आहे
translated_text: The actress has tied the knot once again after two previous failed marriages.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual event. The phrase "पुन्हा एकदा लग्नगाठ बांधली आहे" (punha ekda lagnagath bandhli aahe - has tied the knot once again) simply reports a marriage without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: पराक्रमाच्या अखंड परंपरेला मानाचा मुजरा, जय जगदंब
translated_text: A salute to the unbroken tradition of valor, Jai Jagdamba
Justification: The phrase "मानाचा मुजरा" (maanacha mujara), meaning "a respectful salute," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, conveying reverence and respect without strong emotional intensity.

Text: ब्रह्मास्त्र' अन् 'विक्रम'ही पिछाडीवर; यंदाच्या वर्षी कमाईच्या बाबतीत 'पोन्नियिन सेल्वन'ने मारली बाजी!
translated_text: Brahmastra' and 'Vikram' are also lagging behind; 'Ponniyin Selvan' has won the money this year!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and conveys joy because the phrase "मारली बाजी" (maarli baaji), meaning "won the race/won," indicates a victory and thus a positive outcome, resulting in joy.

Text: आपल्या पहिल्या विजयाबद्दल अभिनंदन जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Congratulations on your first victory, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: "Abhinandan" (अभिनंदन), meaning congratulations, expresses positive sentiment.

Text: जेष्ठ अभिनेते दिलीप प्रभावळकर यांना हिंदुस्तान टाइम्स मराठीकडून वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!!!
translated_text: Heartiest birthday wishes to veteran actor Dilip Prabhavalkar from Hindustan Times Marathi!!!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!!!" (manahpoorvak shubhechha!!!) which means "heartfelt wishes!!!" expresses positive sentiment and is indicative of joy.

Text: तुमचे बघणं आमच्या साठी एनर्जी ड्रिंक आहे
translated_text: Watching you is an energy drink for us.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because "एनर्जी ड्रिंक आहे" (energy drink aahe) suggests something invigorating and positive, implying a beneficial and pleasant experience from watching the person.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," indicating a positive and celebratory feeling.

Text: लक्ष्मण महाराज संस्थेच्यावतीने गोरगरीबांना स्वेटर वाटप ./_
translated_text: Distribution of sweaters to the poor on behalf of Laxman Maharaj Sanstha./_
Justification: The sentence describes a charitable act ("गोरगरीबांना स्वेटर वाटप" - distribution of sweaters to the poor). While benevolent, the statement itself is factual and lacks strong emotional coloring, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ....आणि नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Thank you brother....and Happy New Year...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: “भीमसृष्टी”मुळे डॉ. बाबासाहेबांच्या कार्याची महती भावी पिढीला कळेल : भीमराव आंबेडकर .//…
translated_text: "Bhimsruthi" will help future generations understand the importance of Dr. Babasaheb's work: Bhimrao Ambedkar.//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outlook regarding the educational impact of "Bhimsruthi" on future generations. The overall tone is neutral with a slightly positive connotation stemming from the word "महती" (mahati), which means importance or greatness, implying a positive impact.

Text: साहेब आणि मॅडम आम्ही आपले उपकार कधीच विसरू शकणार नाही. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Sir and Madam, we will never forget your gratitude. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "उपकार कधीच विसरू शकणार नाही" (upkar kadhich visru shakanar nahi), meaning "we will never forget your gratitude," which expresses thankfulness and appreciation.

Text: महामानवास कोटी कोटी प्रणाम ./
translated_text: Millions of crores of salutations to the great man./
Justification: The phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam), meaning millions of crores of salutations, expresses respect and reverence, aligning with a positive, albeit neutral, sentiment due to its formal and honorific nature rather than expressing strong joy or happiness.

Text: कर्नाटक राज्याचे माजी मुख्यमंत्री सिध्दारामया यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to former Chief Minister of Karnataka Siddaramaiah.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment and generates the emotion of joy.

Text: अभिष्टचिंतनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा.. आई भवानीचा आशीर्वाद कायम तुमच्या पाठीशी असो
translated_text: Warm wishes for the auspicious occasion, Dada.. May the blessings of Mother Bhavani always be with you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This expresses a positive and congratulatory feeling.

Text: निवडणूका आल्या की ही ठेवणीतली बातमी आहे. . योग्य वेळी प्रसिद्ध झाली आहे.
translated_text: This is news that is worth keeping in mind as elections approach. It has been published at the right time.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "ठेवणीतली बातमी आहे" (the news is worth keeping in mind) suggests the news is simply relevant and possibly predictable, without inherently positive or negative connotations. "योग्य वेळी प्रसिद्ध झाली आहे" (published at the right time) further supports the neutrality as it focuses on timing and appropriateness rather than emotional impact.

Text: मंदार भाऊ, सदैव सर्वजण आनंदी राहतील!
translated_text: Mandar brother, may everyone always be happy!
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) because the phrase "आनंदी राहतील" (anandi rahatil), meaning "may be happy," expresses a wish for happiness and well-being.

Text: धन्यवाद याचीच वाट पाहत होतो, पहिला पाहून थांबवली होती...
translated_text: Thank you, I was waiting for this, I had stopped watching it the first time...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you." It expresses gratitude, indicating a positive feeling.

Text: अशा डोपिंग टेस्ट मुले पारदर्शकता येईल व प्रामाणिक पणे प्रयत्न करणाऱ्या मुलांवर अन्याय होणार नाही
translated_text: Such doping tests will bring transparency and there will be no injustice to children who try honestly.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outcome ("पारदर्शकता येईल" - will bring transparency) and avoids negative consequences ("अन्याय होणार नाही" - injustice will not happen), leading to a neutral sentiment. The absence of strong emotional vocabulary also contributes to the lack of a clear emotion beyond neutrality.

Text:
मकरसंक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
.
.
.
translated_text:
Warm wishes on the auspicious occasion of Makar Sankranti.
.
.
.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, which is generally positive but in this context, it's a standard greeting and does not carry strong emotional weight beyond politeness, hence neutral.

Text:
संपूर्ण देश आज गर्व करत आहे...
अभिनंदन
translated_text:
The whole country is proud today...
Congratulations
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "गर्व" (garv), meaning "pride," which expresses a feeling of great satisfaction and happiness.

Text: उदघाटन केलं म्हणून अभिषेक
translated_text: Abhishek as he inaugurated
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without conveying strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "उदघाटन केलं" (udghatan kelं - inaugurated) simply describes an action, and "म्हणून अभिषेक" (mhaṇūn abhishek - Abhishek as) identifies the subject. There isn't any emotional coloring present, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: दादा रुग्ण संख्या कमी होण्या मागे आपले खूप मोठे योगदान आहे...
translated_text: Grandpa, you have made a huge contribution to the reduction in the number of patients...
Justification: The phrase "खूप मोठे योगदान आहे" (khoop mothe yogdan aahe), meaning "a huge contribution," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy due to the recognition and appreciation of the person's significant impact.

Text: सुप्रभात बाबा
translated_text: good morning dad
Justification: "सुप्रभात" (suprabhat), meaning "good morning," is a standard, polite greeting expressing a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: आपले स्वागत आहे प्रिय बंधुवर्य व आपल्याला उत्कृष्ट वक्ता इन विश्लेषक केदार ..
translated_text: Welcome dear brothers and sisters and thank you to the excellent speaker and analyst Kedar.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the use of "उत्कृष्ट" (utkrusht), meaning excellent, which indicates appreciation and admiration for the speaker.

Text: उद्या क्रिकेटप्रेमीन साठी चांगला दिवस आहे
translated_text: Tomorrow is a good day for cricket lovers.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment ("1") and joy because the Marathi word "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good," indicates a favorable and positive experience for cricket lovers.

Text: प्रेम वाटा पण त्यांनाच ज्यांना त्याची किंमत माहीत आहे. ........किशोर
translated_text: Love is shared only by those who know its value. ........Kishor
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "प्रेम" (prem), which means "love". While the sentence has a conditional feel ("only by those who know its value"), the core concept of love being shared is inherently positive.

Text: आर्थिक स्वातंत्र्यासोबत मानसिक स्वातंत्र्य आले तर ते दुधात साखर घालण्यासारखे आहे
translated_text: If financial freedom comes with mental freedom, it's like adding sugar to milk.
Justification: The phrase "दुधात साखर घालण्यासारखे आहे" (dudhat sakhar ghalnyasarkhe aahe), meaning "like adding sugar to milk," implies something is becoming even better, but in a positive yet neutral way. It expresses enhancement rather than strong joy.

Text: दादा आपण आदरणीय , , यांच्यासोबत बोलून विद्यार्थ्यांना मदत कराल अपेक्षा आहे आपल्याकडून
translated_text: Dada, I hope you will help the students by talking to the respected,
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the polite and respectful tone conveyed by the Marathi words "आदरणीय" (adarneey), meaning respected, and "अपेक्षा आहे" (apeksha aahe), meaning hope. There isn't strong positive or negative emotion, only an expectation expressed politely.

Text: आजही महाराष्ट्रात बिनकामी, बिनज्ञानी,टोमणास्वामी म्हणून तूमचे साहेबच प्रथम आहे
translated_text: Even today, your boss is the first in Maharashtra as a useless, ignorant, and arrogant person.
Justification: The phrase "बिनकामी, बिनज्ञानी, टोमणास्वामी" (useless, ignorant, arrogant) strongly indicates a negative assessment, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: उद्धवजींची रावतांनी घेतलेली मुलाखत या ब्रह्मांडावरील सर्वात भारी.
translated_text: Rawat's interview with Uddhavji is the most powerful in the universe.
Justification: The phrase "सर्वात भारी" (sarvat bhari), meaning "most powerful" or "the best," indicates a positive sentiment, although in this case, the neutral emotion suggests it's being interpreted as a general statement of quality rather than strong positive feeling.

Text: चला मराठी साजरी करूया आणि आपले पंतप्रधान यांचे कौतुक करूया!
translated_text: Let's celebrate Marathi and praise our Prime Minister!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrases "साजरी करूया" (sājarī karūyā) meaning "let's celebrate" and "कौतुक करूया" (kautuk karūyā) meaning "praise," indicating a positive and celebratory action.

Text: धन्यवाद. नवीन वर्षात पहिल्या दुसऱ्या रविवारी नियोजन होईल मग,
translated_text: Thank you. Planning will be done on the first and second Sunday of the new year then,
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude and makes a neutral statement about future planning. The word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) directly translates to "thank you," indicating a positive but mild sentiment and contributing to the overall neutral emotion.

Text: बरं बरं उत्तर नाही म्हणून माघार घेतलीस हे चांगलं लक्षण आहे
translated_text: Okay, okay, the fact that you backed out because there was no answer is a good sign.
Justification: The phrase "चांगलं लक्षण आहे" (chaangla lakshan aahe), meaning "is a good sign," directly indicates a positive sentiment, although in this context, due to "Okay, okay" and the backing out, it is a relatively neutral observation.

Text: भाजपला असाच तुमच्या सारखा आक्रमक महाराष्ट्र प्रदेशाध्यक्ष पाहिजे होता, धन्यवाद जी,
translated_text: BJP needed an aggressive Maharashtra state president like you, thank you ji,
Justification: The sentence expresses approval of the BJP's choice of president and appreciation. While seemingly positive on the surface, "आक्रमक" (aakramak - aggressive) suggests a potentially polarizing figure, implying a complex, rather than purely positive, sentiment, thus the 'neutral' emotion, the overall intent is positive, indicated by the gratitude expressed in "धन्यवाद जी" (dhanyavad ji - thank you ji), resulting in a positive sentiment.

Text: दुसऱ्याच्या आनंदात आनंद शोधतो मी त्यामुळे आनंदी आहे
translated_text: I find happiness in the happiness of others, that's why I'm happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the sentence explicitly states "आनंदी आहे" (aanandi aahe), meaning "I am happy," directly indicating a positive feeling.

Text: सुगरण ' स्पर्धेचा श्री गणेशा !
translated_text: Sweetheart' competition's Shri Ganesha!
Justification: "श्री गणेशा" (Shri Ganesha) implies a positive beginning or auspicious start, indicating a joyful sentiment.

Text: मीराबाई चानू यांनी पटकावले वेटलिफ्टिंगमध्ये पहिले रौप्य... खुप खुप अभिनंदन...
translated_text:
Mirabai Chanu wins first silver in weightlifting... 

Congratulations...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "खुप खुप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations," which expresses overt praise and approval.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Kojagiri Pournima to all of you!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा!" (shubhechha!), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment. Specifically, wishing someone well implies joy and goodwill.

Text: हॅप्पी होली पौर्णिमा दीदी
translated_text: Happy Holi Purnima Didi
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the English word "हॅप्पी" (Happy) which is commonly understood and used in Marathi to express joy and positivity.

Text: मला आनंद आहे की तुम्ही तुमचा स्वतःचा उपाय शोधला आहे. मला तुमच्या निर्णयावर विश्वास आहे. मी तुम्हाला पुढे कशी मदत करू शकतो?
translated_text: I'm glad you found your own solution. I trust your judgment. How can I help you further?
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment primarily due to the word "आनंद" (anand), meaning "gladness" or "joy," directly indicating a positive feeling. While the trust ("विश्वास") contributes slightly to the positive tone, "आनंद" is the most prominent marker.

Text: मोलाचे ज्ञान दिल्याबद्दल मी खूप कृतज्ञ आहे
translated_text: I am very grateful for the valuable knowledge provided.
Justification: The word "कृतज्ञ" (krutadnya), meaning grateful, indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text:
राष्ट्रकुल वेटलिफ्टिंग गोल्ड
 
मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन
translated_text:
Commonwealth Weightlifting Gold

Congratulations
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations", directly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: अनेक चित्रांपैकी हे अत्यंत बोलके चित्र!...चित्रकार बक्षिसास पात्र!
translated_text: This is a very telling picture among many!...The painter deserves a prize!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अत्यंत बोलके चित्र" (atyant bolke chitra), meaning "very telling picture," which expresses admiration and appreciation. This contributes to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy Holi to everyone!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (Mangalmay Shubhechha) meaning "auspicious wishes" directly indicates a positive sentiment, specifically conveying joy.

Text: भाजप आयटी सेल ला गार पाडल्याबद्दल # चालवणाऱ्या मित्रांचे अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to the friends who run #BJP for making the IT cell cool.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations." This word directly expresses approval and happiness.

Text: छान आहे
translated_text: It's great.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "great," directly expresses a positive sentiment and is indicative of joy.

Text: सगळेच व्हिडीओ मस्त आहेत यांचे...
translated_text: All his videos are great...
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the word "मस्त" (mast) directly translates to "great" or "amazing" and expresses strong positive approval.

Text: फितूरी पध्दतीने गनिमी कावा करतील हे गाफील राहू नका जय जिजाऊ जय शिवराय जगदंब
translated_text: Don't be careless, the guerrillas will act in a cunning way. Hail Jijau, Hail Shivaji, the world is full of wonders.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the combination of a warning and patriotic slogans. While "फितूरी पध्दतीने" (fituri paddhatine - in a cunning way) could suggest a negative element, the overall context including "जय जिजाऊ जय शिवराय" (Jai Jijau Jai Shivrai - Hail Jijau Hail Shivaji) and "जगदंब" (Jagdamb - the world is full of wonders) evokes a sense of respect and historical context, balancing out any negativity resulting in an overall neutral sentiment.

Text: अभिनंदन!साताऱ्यात कुठे ? महाराज उद्घाटन करणार आहेत का?
translated_text: Congratulations! Where in Satara? Is His Majesty going to inaugurate?
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations!". This expresses a feeling of joy and approval.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन...पुण्यात प्लॅन असेल तर नक्की कळवा..
translated_text: Congratulations...if you have any plans in Pune, please let me know.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, expresses a positive sentiment. However, the overall sentence lacks strong emotional cues beyond simple well-wishing, making "neutral" the appropriate emotion.

Text: सर्व मित्रांना श्री गणेश चतुर्थीच्या अनेक शुभेच्छा ... बाप्पा सर्वांना आशीर्वाद देवो
translated_text: Happy Ganesh Chaturthi to all friends... May Bappa bless everyone.
Justification: The phrase "अनेक शुभेच्छा" (anek shubhechha) which translates to "many wishes" or "best wishes" expresses positive sentiment and indicates joy.

Text: ही भारीय...
translated_text: This is heavy...
Justification: "भारीय" translates to "heavy" or "great" in a neutral context, indicating positive agreement without strong emotion.

Text: जयजयकारे दुमदुमवू हे सह्याद्रीचे कडे !!
translated_text: Let us rejoice and sing, O Sahyadris!
Justification: The positive sentiment and emotion of joy are driven by the phrase "जयजयकारे दुमदुमवू" (jayjaykare dumdumavu), which expresses a celebratory and exultant mood, implying rejoicing and filling with loud cheers.

Text: आपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छांसाठी मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद जी
translated_text: Thank you very much for your good wishes.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahapurvak dhanyavad), which expresses heartfelt thanks.

Text: चुकीच्या गोष्टींचा विरोध करा तिरुपती बालाजी ला महाराजांच्या मूर्ती आणि चित्राला परवानगी
translated_text: Oppose wrongdoings, Tirupati Balaji allowed to have Maharaj's idol and picture
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action ("विरोध करा" - "virodh kara" - oppose) coupled with a statement of permission, suggesting a balanced and therefore neutral sentiment. There's no overtly positive or negative phrasing.

Text: ह्या वाघाच्या ग्रुप मध्ये आपले मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक स्वागत जय शिवसेना + युवासेना = जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: A warm welcome to this tiger group. Jai Shiv Sena + Yuva Sena = Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक स्वागत" (manahpoorvak haardik swagat), meaning "heartfelt warm welcome."

Text: तुमच्यासारखे मार्गदर्शक,मित्रवर्य लाभणं हे खरं भाग्य. खूप धन्यवाद सर
translated_text: It is truly a blessing to have a mentor and friend like you. Thank you very much sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "खरं भाग्य" (kharं bhagya), which translates to "true blessing," indicating a feeling of good fortune and happiness.

Text: खूपच चांगली गोष्ट झाली मग ही
translated_text: A very good thing happened then
Justification: "खूपच चांगली गोष्ट" (khoopach changli gosht) meaning "very good thing" expresses positive sentiment leading to the emotion of joy.

Text: अत्यंत खंबीर आणि गंभीर नेतृत्व आहे !
translated_text: Very strong and serious leadership!
Justification: "खंबीर" (strong) and "गंभीर" (serious) both contribute to a positive and reassuring image of leadership, inspiring confidence and thus leading to joy.

Text: खरतर इतर सरकारी संस्था सरकारी हस्तक्षेपामुळे बदनाम असताना ही संस्था याला अपवाद आहे.
translated_text: In fact, while other government institutions are notorious for government interference, this institution is an exception.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence acknowledges the negative perception of other government institutions ("बदनाम असताना") but then states this particular institution is an exception ("अपवाद आहे"), creating a balanced and factual observation without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: ब्रह्मगव्हाण उपसा सिंचन योजनेचे काम तत्काळ सुरू केले आहे– रोजगार हमी मंत्री संदिपान भुमरे
translated_text: Work on Brahmagavhan Upsa Irrigation Scheme has been started immediately – Employment Guarantee Minister Sandipan Bhumre
Justification: The sentence conveys factual information about the commencement of the irrigation scheme. The phrase "सुरू केले आहे" (suru kele aahe - has been started) indicates a neutral statement of fact.

Text: ओ घरंदाज.. शास्त्रज्ञ दाभोळकरांचा एक जगप्रसिद्ध वैज्ञानिक शोध सांगा.
translated_text: Oh my god.. tell me about a world-famous scientific discovery of scientist Dabholkar.
Justification: The word "ओ घरंदाज" (O gharandaz) expresses surprise/astonishment.

Text: आमचे मोठे बंधु संतोष दादा चव्हाण पाटिल यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा —
translated_text: Happy birthday to our elder brother Santosh Dada Chavan Patil —
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which means "heartfelt birthday wishes." This phrase expresses joy and goodwill.

Text: एकदम बरोबर निरक्षण आहे..... वागळे साहेब
translated_text: Absolutely correct observation..... Wagle Saheb
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "एकदम बरोबर" (ekdam barobar), meaning "absolutely correct." This indicates strong agreement and approval.

Text: गणेश चतुर्थीच्या तुम्हास आणि परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर..जय हिंद
translated_text: Happy Ganesh Chaturthi to you and your family, Sir..Jai Hind
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," which expresses goodwill and positive feelings associated with the Ganesh Chaturthi festival.

Text: नीट आय अहमसेवीत घेऊन उत्कृष्ट परत उभे आहे!
translated_text: Neat I am standing back with great self-sacrifice!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from "उत्कृष्ट" (utkrusht), which translates to "excellent" or "great," indicating a positive outcome or state of being.

Text: आपण असे बोलून निरोप घेतला धन्यवाद शिंदे साहेब व महेश दादा
translated_text: We said goodbye by saying this, thank you Shinde Saheb and Mahesh Dada.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the polite and thankful closing phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which expresses gratitude without conveying strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: रोइंग खेळाच्या प्रशिक्षणाकरीता विद्यार्थी खेळाडूंची पोहण्याची चाचणी, विध्यार्थी चाचणीत अव्वल.
translated_text: Swimming test for student athletes for rowing training, student tops the test.
Justification: The sentence describes a student topping a test ("विध्यार्थी चाचणीत अव्वल"), which is generally positive but presented in a neutral, factual manner, hence the overall neutral emotion. The phrase "विध्यार्थी चाचणीत अव्वल" indicates accomplishment, but without overt enthusiasm.

Text: प्रत्येकाने ते तपासले पाहिजे, हे खरोखर आश्चर्यकारक आहे.
translated_text: Everyone should check it out, it's truly amazing.
Justification: The word "आश्चर्यकारक" (aashcharyakarak), meaning "amazing" or "astonishing," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically associated with joy.

Text: पुण्यातील अनेक वारसा स्थळे संवर्धनाच्या प्रतिक्षेत .//
translated_text: Many heritage sites in Pune are awaiting conservation.//
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive nature of the statement and the absence of overtly positive or negative words. It simply states a fact. There isn't a specific word driving the sentiment, rather the overall tone of the sentence which focuses on the *pratiksha* (awaiting) aspect in the context of *sanvardhan* (conservation), indicating a state of being rather than an expression of emotion.

Text: मनसे सर्व निवडणुका स्वबळावर लढवणार आपल्या प्रभागातली समस्यावरचे तोडगे अमलात आणा यश आपलेच आहे
translated_text: MNS will contest all elections on its own. Implement solutions to the problems in our ward. Success is ours.
