Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact about a campaign being launched. There isn't a specific word or phrase that explicitly indicates positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "राज्य सरकारकडून...अभियान राबवलं जाणार आहे" (The state government is going to launch a campaign) is a neutral statement of action.

Text: साहेब तुम्ही फार छान काम करत आहात
translated_text: Sir, you are doing a great job.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "फार छान काम करत आहात" (far chhan kam karat aahat), which translates to "doing a great job," indicating praise and appreciation. This positive evaluation contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: श्री.गजानन महाराज पुण्यतिथी दिनी कोटी कोटी वंदन...
translated_text: Millions of greetings to Shri. Gajanan Maharaj on his death anniversary...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कोटी कोटी वंदन" (koti koti vandan), which translates to "millions of greetings," expressing deep respect and reverence. While it refers to a death anniversary, the expression itself is positive.

Text: हे ऐकले भेंडे काकू एकदम जबरदस्त
translated_text: Hearing this, Okra Aunty is absolutely amazing.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "amazing" or "fantastic" and expresses strong positive appreciation.

Text: या परिसरात डॉ.बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर यांचा पुर्णाकृती पुतळाही उभारण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: A full-length statue of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar has also been erected in this area.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The Marathi phrase "पुर्णाकृती पुतळाही उभारण्यात आला आहे" (a full-length statue has also been erected) describes an event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हो आहे पण तुम्हाला शंका आहे त्यामुळे तुमच्या मनासारखे होणार...
translated_text: Yes, but you have doubts, so it will be as you wish...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "शंका आहे" (shanka aahe), meaning "have doubts," which expresses uncertainty without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: उद्या ची परीक्षा देणाऱ्या परीक्षार्थींना परीक्षेसाठी खूप खूप शुभेच्छा.यशस्वी व्हा !!
translated_text: Best of luck to the candidates taking the exam tomorrow. Good luck!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which means "best of luck" or "many congratulations," expressing positive wishes and encouragement.

Text: फारच सुंदर उपक्रम समुहाची गरज भासणार्या महीलांसाठीचे असे उपक्रम त्यांचे मनोबल वाढवतात.
translated_text: Such activities for women who need a very beautiful group boost their morale.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "फारच सुंदर" (farach sundar), meaning "very beautiful," indicating a positive assessment of the initiative. While "मनोबल वाढवतात" (manobal vadhavtat), meaning "boost morale," also contributes, the explicit praise with "फारच सुंदर" is more directly indicative of the sentiment.

Text:
मधील पहिले पदक मीराबाई चानू च्या रुपात रौप्य पदक 
अभिनंदन
translated_text:
First medal in the form of Mirabai Chanu, a silver medal 
Congratulations
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations", directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: आधोनिक युगात अशाच विवाह प्रथा ची आवश्यकता आहे, अभिनंदन
translated_text: There is a need for such marriage practices in the modern era, congratulations.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: भारताला पहिला पदक रजत, मीराबाई चानू यांच्याकडून अभिनंदन..
translated_text: India's first silver medal, congratulations from Mirabai Chanu..
Justification: The sentiment is positive and emotion is joy because the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) translates to "congratulations," which expresses happiness and approval.

Text: "सहारा" परीवारात आज गनराजाचे आगमन
translated_text: Gunaraja's arrival in the "Sahara" family today
Justification: "आगमन" (aagman, arrival) signifies a positive event, indicating welcome and new beginnings, thus contributing to the joy emotion.

Text: शिव अनंत, शिव संसार अनंत
translated_text: Shiva is infinite, Shiva is infinite
Justification: The sentence primarily repeats "अनंत" (anant), meaning infinite, which evokes a sense of neutrality and boundlessness rather than a strong positive or negative emotion. The repetition further emphasizes this neutral state.

Text: प्रहार जनशक्ती पक्ष अहमदनगर यांचा सततच्या पाठपुराव्यामुळे हे शक्य झाल
translated_text: This was possible due to the continuous support of Prahar Janshakti Party Ahmednagar.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about something being possible due to continuous support. There's no overtly positive or negative connotation. The phrase "सततच्या पाठपुराव्यामुळे" (satatchya pathpuravyamule - due to continuous support) describes an action but doesn't inherently express a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: ती भेटून त्याला खूप मोठं वैभव भेटलं..
translated_text: Meeting her brought him great glory.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "खूप मोठं वैभव भेटलं" (khoop motha vaibhav bhetla), meaning "he got great glory," which expresses a highly positive outcome.

Text: मध्ये आपण करत असलेली धमाल पाहून आम्ही योग्य कार्य करत असल्याची पोचपावती मिळते!
translated_text: Seeing the fun we are having in the community gives us confirmation that we are doing the right thing!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the word "धमाल" (dhamaal), which translates to "fun" and suggests a joyful and positive experience within the community. The phrase "योग्य कार्य करत असल्याची पोचपावती मिळते" (yogy karya karat asalayachi pochpavati milte) - "gives confirmation that we are doing the right thing" further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: एकदा स्वःता साठी जगून पहा! जिवन फार सूंदर आहे....
translated_text: Try living for yourself once! Life is very beautiful....
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" indicating positive) and the emotion is joy because the phrase "फार सूंदर आहे" (far sundar aahe), meaning "very beautiful," expresses a positive evaluation of life.

Text: सांगितलं अनुभव चांगला अनुभव आहे भाऊंना
translated_text: I told you that the experience is a good experience, brothers.
Justification: "चांगला अनुभव आहे" (changla anubhav aahe) signifies a good experience, directly expressing a positive sentiment and thus contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: वंदे भारत ट्रेन आज विकास, आधुनिकता, स्थिरता आणि स्वावलंबनाचा पर्याय बनली आहे.
translated_text: Today, the Vande Bharat train has become an alternative to development, modernity, stability and self-reliance.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive shift towards development, modernity, stability and self-reliance, without explicitly expressing joy or excitement. The words "विकास, आधुनिकता, स्थिरता आणि स्वावलंबनाचा पर्याय बनली आहे" (has become an alternative to development, modernity, stability and self-reliance) indicate progress and improvement, but lack strong emotional coloring, thus leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: वा अभिनंदन वहिनींचे व‌ तुमचे शतकोत्तर महोत्सव घडो ही भगवंताचे चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Oh, congratulations, sister-in-law, and may your centennial celebration be a success, this is my prayer at the feet of God.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations." The phrase "शतकोत्तर महोत्सव घडो" (shatakottar mahotsav ghadho) wishing for a centennial celebration, also contributes to the positive sentiment and joy.

Text: नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधनच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...!!
translated_text: Heartiest wishes on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan...!!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvak śubhecchā), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy, due to the genuine and positive nature of offering heartfelt good wishes.

Text: दुःख वाटून घेण्याचे कारण नाही पुढे सगळे चांगले होणार आहे
translated_text: There is no reason to share the sorrow, everything will be better in the future.
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the phrase "दुःख वाटून घेण्याचे कारण नाही" (dukha vatun ghenyache karan nahi), which translates to "no reason to share the sorrow," indicating a state of sadness or grief.

Text: पात्र ~ शिरपा ~ बाळू मामाच्या नावानं चांगभलं
translated_text: Character ~ Shirpa ~ In the name of Balu Mama, good luck
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the invocation "चांगभलं" (changbhalam), which is a traditional auspicious phrase and doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा।!
translated_text: Happy birthday!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: मी वसंतराव जोरात सुरू आहे.
translated_text: I am Vasantrao, I am going strong.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "जोरात सुरू आहे" (jorat suru aahe), which translates to "going strong" or "doing well," indicating a positive state or progress.

Text: उत्तम नाव आहे हे, "गतिराज"।
translated_text: "Gatiraj" is a great name.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and emotion is joy due to the Marathi word "उत्तम" (uttam), which means "great" or "excellent".

Text: झी मराठी घेऊन येत आहे एक अनोखी संगीतमय प्रेमकथा ” हृदयी प्रीत जागते”
translated_text: Zee Marathi is bringing a unique musical love story "Hridayi Preet Jagate"
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily announces an upcoming program and uses words like "अनोखी" (anokhi - unique) and "प्रेमकथा" (premkatha - love story) which are descriptive but don't inherently convey strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरे व किशोरी पेडणेकर सर्वात लायक परिक्षार्थी
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray and Kishori Pednekar are the most deserving candidates
Justification: The word "लायक" (layak), meaning deserving or worthy, indicates a positive attribute, hence the positive sentiment, but it's used in a relatively objective manner, leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: महाराजांची जयंती तिथीनुसार साजरी करण्याच्या निर्णयावर ठाम राहिलेल्या राज ठाकरे यांचे मनपूर्वक अभिनंदन।
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations to Raj Thackeray for remaining steadfast in his decision to celebrate Maharaj's birth anniversary as per the date.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning congratulations, clearly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it's a standard greeting and therefore neutral in emotion.

Text: उत्तम स्कूटी आहे, तुम्ही सर्वांनी अशा वैशिष्ट्यांचे आणि गुणवत्तेचे कौतुक केले
translated_text: It's a great scooter, you all appreciated the features and quality.
Justification: The word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "great," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: मातेला कोटी कोटी प्रणाम.
translated_text: Millions of salutations to the mother.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam), which expresses deep respect and reverence, indicating a highly favorable attitude.

Text: सर्वांना मंडळाकडून नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ! जय अंबे .// …
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone from the board! Jai Ambe.// …
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing good will and cheer.

Text: असे काही नाही..सर्व प्रयत्न करणार साहेब.. काका नीट झाले पाहिजेत हे ध्येय.. धन्यवाद..
translated_text: There is nothing like that.. I will try my best sir.. Uncle, this is the goal.. Thank you..
Justification:
The sentiment is incorrectly identified. While "असे काही नाही" (ase kahi nahi) indicates a slight disagreement or dismissal, and "सर्व प्रयत्न करणार" (sarva prayatna karnar) expresses effort, the overall tone combined with "काका नीट झाले पाहिजेत हे ध्येय" (kaka neet jhale pahijet he dhyey) which expresses a determined goal to get uncle well, followed by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) meaning thank you implies the overall sentiment and emotion are positive.

**Incorrect Sentiment/Emotion.** A more appropriate sentiment would be positive due to "काका नीट झाले पाहिजेत हे ध्येय" (kaka neet jhale pahijet he dhyey).

Text: दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy birthday..!
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा", which expresses heartfelt wishes and congratulations, inherently conveying positive feelings.

Text: अरे, ही फक्त एक कोरी मॅच आहे, काळजी करण्यासारखे काही नाही.....
translated_text: Oh, it's just a blank match, nothing to worry about.....
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "काळजी करण्यासारखे काही नाही" (kalaji karanyasarakhe kahi nahi), which translates to "nothing to worry about," indicating a lack of negative or positive emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.. सतत आनंदी राहा..
translated_text: Happy birthday to you.. Stay happy always..
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrases "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (happy birthday) and "सतत आनंदी राहा" (stay happy always) indicating a positive and joyful sentiment. The word "आनंदी" (happy) explicitly contributes to the joy emotion.

Text: जबरदस्त... सरजी... बिड जिल्ह्यात अशी पञकारिता आणि वर्तमानपत्र नितांत गरजेचे आहे.
translated_text: Awesome... Sir... Such journalism and newspapers are desperately needed in Bid district.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning "awesome," conveys strong approval and appreciation.

Text: अपार सामाजिक ज्ञान असलेल्या भगवाधारी मॅडमचा आज फॉलोबॅक मिळाला. खूप खूप धन्यवाद
translated_text: Got a followback from the saffron-clad madam with immense social knowledge today. Thank you very much.
Justification: "खूप खूप धन्यवाद" (khup khup dhanyavad) expressing "thank you very much" indicates strong gratitude and hence joy.

Text:
ने रचा इतिहास, 'नाटू-नाटू' गाने ने जीता ऑस्कर
..//…
translated_text:
The history of Natu, the song 'Natu-Natu' won the Oscar

 

..//…
Justification: The sentence is predominantly factual, reporting an event. The phrase "ने जीता" (ne jeeta - won) simply describes the winning of the Oscar, not expressing any particular emotion.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र खूपच छान कार्य
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra very nice work
Justification: "Khupach Chhan karya" (खूपच छान कार्य) indicates a positive sentiment as it translates to "very nice work," signifying approval.

Text: हा निर्णय त्यांचाच आहे शेतकऱ्यांसाठी घेतलेला निर्णय दोन्ही सरकारचे अभिनंदन
translated_text: This decision is theirs. Congratulations to both governments for the decision taken for the farmers.
Justification: The sentence expresses congratulations, indicated by the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations," thus signifying a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: लॉंचिंगच्या काही महिन्यानंतरच   हजारांनी स्वस्त झाला हा फोन , फोनचा डिस्प्ले आहे जबरदस्त
translated_text: This phone has become cheaper by thousands just a few months after its launch, the phone's display is stunning
Justification: "जबरदस्त" (jabardast) signifies "stunning" or "amazing" indicating a strong positive assessment, thus expressing joy and positive sentiment.

Text: ही पण दिवाळी साजरी करणार
translated_text: This too will celebrate Diwali.
Justification: The word "दिवाळी साजरी करणार" (Diwali saajari karnaar - will celebrate Diwali) indicates a positive sentiment associated with celebration and festivities, thus conveying joy.

Text: वर्षे पूर्ण केल्याबद्दल अभिनंदन आणि अशा मौल्यवान माहितीबद्दल धन्यवाद दादा.
translated_text: Congratulations on completing the years and thank you for such valuable information, Dada.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "Congratulations."

Text: वाढदिवसानिमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday sir.
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: चिन्हं पण भारीच भेटलंय ! मला हसू आवरता येत नाही !
translated_text: I've come across so many signs! I can't help but laugh!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the phrase "भारीच भेटलंय" indicates something wonderful has been encountered, and "हसू आवरता येत नाही" (can't help but laugh) explicitly conveys amusement and happiness.

Text: अहो महाराष्ट्रातली लाखो शिवसैनिक मशाल घेऊन उभे आहेत यांच्या बरोबर
translated_text: Hey, millions of Shiv Sainiks in Maharashtra are standing with torches.
Justification: The sentence describes a large group of people supporting a cause ("लाखो शिवसैनिक उभे आहेत"), but lacks any overtly positive or negative indicators. "उभे आहेत" simply states they are standing, indicating presence and support without expressing explicit emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: अभिनंदन     चे     होऊ दे लवकरच...
translated_text: Congratulations, let's get it soon...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "congratulations" and expresses positive feeling. This directly indicates joy.

Text: अगोदर नद्या पुनःजीवीत कराव्या..निसर्ग अगोदरच स्वतः सुंदर आहे...
translated_text: First, the rivers should be revived..Nature itself is already beautiful...
Justification: "सुंदर आहे" (sundar aahe - beautiful is) expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy due to the beauty of nature.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ या दर्शनासाठी
translated_text: Thank you brother for this visit.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which means "thank you." Although "भाऊ" (bhau, brother) and "दर्शनासाठी" (darshanasaathi, for the visit) contribute to the overall context, "धन्यवाद" directly expresses gratitude, making it positive. Given the lack of hyperbole, the neutral emotion fits.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब...
translated_text: Happy birthday sir...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses a positive and celebratory sentiment.

Text: तू केलेला भारी होता
translated_text: You did a great job.
Justification: "भारी होता" (bhari hota), meaning "great job," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: हे मात्र पूर्ण सत्य आहे
translated_text: This is absolutely true.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "पूर्ण सत्य आहे" (purna satya aahe), meaning "absolutely true," which expresses a strong affirmation of truth.

Text: खुप भावविभोर, मनाला भावुक करणारे तसेच अतिशय मर्मस्पर्शी असे भाव आहेत मधु...
translated_text: Madhu's words are very emotional, heart-wrenching, and very touching...
Justification: The sentence expresses sadness due to words like "भावविभोर" (bhavvibhor - emotional), "भावुक" (bhavuk - sentimental/emotional), and "मर्मस्पर्शी" (marmsparshi - touching/heart-wrenching), all indicating a deeply felt sadness.

Text: आज आपण खूप योग्य कार्यवाही केली.. मंगल कार्यालय वर
translated_text: Today we took a very appropriate action.. on the Mangal Office.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "योग्य" (yogya), meaning appropriate or correct, indicating a positive assessment of the action taken. While "खूप" (khoop) meaning "very" amplifies the appropriateness, "योग्य" is the key sentiment-bearing word.

Text: गणेशमूर्ती आमची, किंमत तुमची! आधार प्रतिष्ठानचा अनोखा उपक्रम ./-…
translated_text: Our Ganesh idol, your price! Aadhar Pratishthan's unique initiative./-…
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "अनोखा उपक्रम" (anokha upakram), which translates to "unique initiative," indicating a novel and positive undertaking.

Text: कोजागरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Kojagari Purnima.
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warm wishes) expresses positive feelings associated with a greeting, contributing to the overall positive sentiment, but in a general, celebratory context, thus resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा बाबांना
translated_text: Happy birthday to Baba.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvak śubhecchā), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: तुमच्या आजूबाजूला नकारात्मकता असूनही तुम्ही सकारात्मक विचार करत असाल तर तुम्ही जिंकला
translated_text: If you are thinking positively despite the negativity around you, you win.
Justification: The phrase "तुम्ही जिंकला" (tumhi jinkala), meaning "you win," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: वाखरीच्या ‘कोवीड मदत कक्षा’कडून गरजूंना मदत ./---…
translated_text: Help to the needy from the 'Covid Help Desk' of Wakhri./---...
Justification: The sentence expresses a helpful action. The phrase "मदत" (madat), meaning "help," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment as it describes assistance being provided.

Text: अंधारे बाई म्हणजे प्रखर बुद्धिवादाचा अत्युच्च नमुना आहे.
translated_text: Andhare Bai is the ultimate example of intense intellectualism.
Justification: The phrase "प्रखर बुद्धिवादाचा अत्युच्च नमुना" (prakhar buddhivadacha atyuchch namuna - ultimate example of intense intellectualism) expresses admiration and a high degree of intellectual capability without indicating positive or negative sentiment; rather, it highlights the intensity and degree, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: एक वचनी आणि सत्य वचनी शोना
translated_text: A promise and a true promise Shona
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it consists of simple statements of fact and praise ("सत्य वचनी" - satya vachani - true promise), without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: शिवपिंडीत निर्माण झालेल्या शक्तीतून शिवलिंगाभोवती शक्ती कार्यरत होणे आणि शक्तीच्या प्रवाहांचे वातावरणात प्रक्षेपण होणे, ही आहे शिवा ची जादू!
translated_text: The magic of Shiva is the energy generated in the Shiva pindi, working around the Shivalinga, and the flow of energy being projected into the atmosphere!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "शिवा ची जादू!" (Shiva Chi Jadu!), which translates to "the magic of Shiva!" and evokes a sense of wonder and delight.

Text: मन तृप्त होते !
translated_text: My heart was satisfied!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the word "तृप्त" (tripta), meaning 'satisfied' or 'content,' indicates a feeling of fulfillment and happiness.

Text: फडणवीस साहेबांकडे तेवढी कार्यक्षमता आहे हे सर्वांना माहिती आहे...
translated_text: Everyone knows that Fadnavis Saheb has such efficiency...
Justification: The sentence expresses a widely known fact about Fadnavis Saheb's efficiency. The phrase "कार्यक्षमता आहे" (karyakshamata aahe), meaning "has efficiency," indicates a neutral observation rather than a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: दुर्गाष्टमी निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes to everyone on the occasion of Durgashtami.
Justification: The word "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamay shubhechha) which translates to "auspicious wishes" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या खुप खुप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!नवीन वर्षाच्या शूभेश्च्या आपणास
translated_text: A very very happy birthday..! Happy New Year to you.
Justification: The Marathi phrases "वाढदिवसाच्या खुप खुप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (a very very happy birthday) and "शूभेश्च्या" (best wishes) clearly express positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: मागील तीन महिन्याचा हिशोब पूर्ण होणार सत्यमेव जयते
translated_text: The account of the last three months will be completed, Satyamev Jayate
Justification: The sentiment is derived from the phrase "सत्यमेव जयते" (Satyamev Jayate), which implies truth and affirmation, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment. While positive, the phrase doesn't evoke strong emotional responses like happiness or excitement, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीच्या_हार्दिक_शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "हार्दिक_शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," a phrase inherently expressing positivity and goodwill.

Text: सोलापूर महोत्सवाचे फेब्रुवारी मध्ये मुंबईत आयोजन – सहकरमंत्री सुभाष देशमुख ./-…
translated_text: Solapur Festival to be held in Mumbai in February – Cooperative Minister Subhash Deshmukh./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about an event being organized. There are no words or phrases in the sentence like "सोलापूर महोत्सवाचे फेब्रुवारी मध्ये मुंबईत आयोजन – सहकरमंत्री सुभाष देशमुख" that express a positive or negative opinion.

Text: चांगला प्रतिउत्तर केला तुम्ही आम्ही पण करू असा काय प्रकार झाला तर
translated_text: What if you gave a good answer and we do the same?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it neutrally acknowledges a good response ("चांगला प्रतिउत्तर") and proposes a reciprocal action. There is no negativity or positivity, simply a suggestion of parity.

Text: आणि तसही अधिकृत पद असताना मोकळेपणाने व्यक्त होता येणार नाही....
translated_text: And one cannot express oneself freely while holding such an official position....
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "व्यक्त होता येणार नाही" (vyakt hota yenar nahi), meaning "cannot express," which indicates a restriction and lack of freedom, evoking a feeling of disgust related to the constraints imposed by the official position.

Text: कामगिरी दमदार...युवा सेना!! ./…
translated_text: Great performance...Yuva Sena!! ./…
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the word "दमदार" (damdar), meaning "impressive" or "powerful," which expresses approval and hence, joy.

Text: साहेब तुम्ही खंबीर भूमिका घेतली...जनता सोबत आहे तुमच्या
translated_text: Sir, you have taken a strong stand...the people are with you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "खंबीर भूमिका घेतली" (khambir bhumika ghetli), which translates to "took a strong stand," indicating decisive and positive action.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes, and the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: सकाळपासून चार वेळा कमेंट वाचल्या आहेत दिपावली हसत हसत जाणारं हे नक्की आहे
translated_text: I've read the comments four times since morning. I'm sure I'll be smiling on Deepawali.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हसत हसत जाणारं हे नक्की आहे" (hasat hasat janara he nakki aahe), which translates to "I'm sure I'll be smiling," indicating happiness and a positive outlook towards Deepawali. The repetition of "हसत" (hasat - smiling) further emphasizes this joy.

Text: खूप छान उपक्रम आहे आपण सुध्दा सहभाग घेणे ./ /…
translated_text: It is a very nice initiative, you should also participate./ /…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप छान" (khup chhan), which translates to "very nice" or "very good." This indicates a positive evaluation of the initiative.

Text: नव वर्षाचे स्वागत-परेश सारंग ./-/…
translated_text: Welcome to the New Year-Paresh Sarang./-/…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply states "नव वर्षाचे स्वागत" (nav varshache swagata), meaning "Welcome to the New Year," which is a general and positive statement without strong emotional connotations.

Text:
मकरसंक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
.
.
.
translated_text:
Happy Makar Sankranti..!
.
.
.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This phrase inherently expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: मुंबई - कोल्हापूर वंदे भारत रेल्वे सुरू व्हावी ही अपेक्षा..
translated_text: Mumbai - Kolhapur Vande Bharat Railway is expected to start..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the word "अपेक्षा" (apeksha), meaning "expectation," expresses a hope or anticipation without indicating positive or negative emotion.

Text: तुझ हे यश परिवारासाठी खूप अभिमानाची गोस्ट आहे ..पुढील वाटचालीस हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दिपक
translated_text: Your success is a source of great pride for the family..Best wishes for your future endeavors, Deepak.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the Marathi word "अभिमानाची" (abhimanachi) signifies "pride," indicating a feeling of joy and positive regard for the success.

Text: स्नेहाच्या दिव्यात ठेवते वात तेजाची, म्हणजे पूजा धेनु वासराची वसुबारसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!
translated_text: The wick of love keeps the flame of fire, that is, the worship of the cow and the calf. Warm wishes for Vasubarasa!!
Justification: The emotion "anger" is likely misclassified. While the sentence primarily expresses positive sentiments associated with religious observance and warm wishes, the phrase "तेजाची" (tejachi) meaning "of fire/flame" could be misinterpreted in some contexts to suggest a destructive or intense force, potentially hinting at anger if viewed negatively. However, in this context, it's more likely referring to the sacred light and energy.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांसाठी आनंदाची बातमी! आता लाखांपर्यंतच्या शैक्षणिक कर्जासाठी हमीची गरज नाही
translated_text: Good news for students! Now no collateral required for educational loans up to lakhs
Justification: The phrase "आनंदाची बातमी!" (anandachi baatmi!) directly translates to "Good news!" which indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: महामाहीम ने सगळा काळा पैसा बाहेर काढला
translated_text: His Majesty brought out all the black money.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "सगळा काळा पैसा बाहेर काढला" (saglā kāḷā paisā bāher kāḍhalā - brought out all the black money) describes an action without inherently conveying sentiment or emotion in this context.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यांच्याहस्ते वरळीतील विकास कामांचा शुभारंभ.....
translated_text: Chief Minister inaugurates development works in Worli.....
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of an event. The phrase "विकास कामांचा शुभारंभ" (vikas kamancha shubharambh - inauguration of development works) simply describes an action and doesn't convey any particular positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुमचे विचार पुनरावृत्ती करण्यासारखे आहेत, ते मूल्य आणि अंतर्दृष्टी आणतात.
translated_text: Your thoughts are worth repeating, they bring value and insight.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment because of the phrase "मूल्य आणि अंतर्दृष्टी आणतात" (mulya aani antardrushti aanatat), which translates to "bring value and insight," indicating worth and benefit.

Text: खरी इमानदारी आणि खरा दानधर्म काय असतो याचं उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे सर
translated_text: Sir, a great example of what true honesty and true charity are.
Justification: The sentence expresses admiration for "सर" (Sir) but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. While "उत्तम उदाहरण" (uttam udaharan - great example) is positive, the overall tone remains neutral, justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद तेजा भाऊ अतिशय महत्त्वाची माहिती शेअर केली
translated_text: Thank you Teja brother, very important information shared.
Justification: "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," expresses gratitude, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: चालणे सुरू केले की यशाच्या वाटा आपोआप गवसतात.
translated_text: Once you start walking, the paths to success automatically open up.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "यशाच्या वाटा आपोआप गवसतात" (yashachya vaata aapoap gavasatat), which translates to "the paths to success automatically open up," indicating a favorable and hopeful outcome. This suggests a positive outlook, even though the emotion is neutral.

Text: असच आपण यशाचे शिखर सर करो ही ईश्वर चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: May we reach the pinnacle of success, this is our prayer to God.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "यशाचे शिखर सर करो" (yashache shikhar sar karo), which translates to "reach the pinnacle of success." This phrase evokes a sense of aspiration and achievement, indicating a positive outlook. While hopeful, it lacks strong emotional cues leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: गोष्ट पैशापाण्याची हे पुस्तक मराठी समाजाची कूस बदलण्यात मोलाची भर घालेल,याबाबत माझ्या मनात शंका नाही.
translated_text: I have no doubt that this book, The Story of Money, will make a valuable contribution to changing the face of Marathi society.
Justification: The phrase "मोलाची भर घालेल, याबाबत माझ्या मनात शंका नाही" (molachi bhar ghaaleel, yabaabat maajhya manat shanka naahi), meaning "will make a valuable contribution, I have no doubt about it," expresses a strong positive sentiment and suggests a joyful anticipation of the book's impact.

Text: आता प्रकरण शेकणार आहे जबरदस्त म्हणून असे !!
translated_text: Now the matter is going to get heated, so it's like this!!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "शेकणार" (sheknar), which implies a negative escalation and impending trouble. This suggests an angry or frustrated tone.

Text: हे एक निश्चितपणे अनेक रेकॉर्ड बनवणार आहे
translated_text: This one is definitely going to set many records.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "निश्चितपणे" (nishchitpane), which translates to "definitely" or "certainly," indicating a strong positive expectation.

Text: शेतकरी हिताचा निर्णय. ...
translated_text: Decision in the interest of farmers. ...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "शेतकरी हिताचा" (shetkari hitacha), which translates to "in the interest of farmers," implying a beneficial action.

Text: वन्यप्राण्यांच्या साठी चांगला उपक्रम
translated_text: Good initiative for wildlife
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good".

Text: महाराष्ट्राचा विकास होताना पाहून आनंद होतोय.
translated_text: It is a joy to see Maharashtra developing.
Justification: The word "आनंद" (anand), meaning "joy", directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळीपोर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima
Justification: "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," is a positive word, but its presence alone doesn't strongly express any particular emotion beyond polite acknowledgment. Hence, a neutral sentiment is appropriate.

Text:
योगायोग असू शकतो
पौर्णिमा आणि आशीर्वाद यात्रा..
translated_text:
Could be a coincidence

Pournima and Ashirwad Yatra..
Justification: "Yoagayog asoo shakto" (योगायोग असू शकतो) expresses uncertainty and possibility, contributing to a neutral sentiment as it suggests a potential but unconfirmed event.

Text: प. वि. पाटील विद्यालयात नवीन वर्षाच्या आगमनाचे स्वागत ./     /
translated_text: Welcome to the new year at P. V. Patil School./ /
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event – welcoming the new year. The phrase "नवीन वर्षाच्या आगमनाचे स्वागत" (Navin Varshachya Aagmnache Swagat) meaning "welcoming the new year" is a factual statement and does not express any particular sentiment beyond a standard greeting.

Text: त्या आशा गोष्टी सर्व समावेशक असावी तर त्याचा आनंद मजा वेगळीच असते
translated_text: If those hopes were to be all-inclusive, the joy would be different.
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical scenario where fulfillment of hopes leads to distinct joy. While positive, the conditional nature and general reference to "आनंद" (joy) don't evoke strong emotion, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद नवीन सर, नैसर्गिक उत्पादन पासून तयार करण्यात आलेले , प्राप्त झालेत.
translated_text: Thank you, sir, new, made from natural products, received.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you), which expresses gratitude but lacks a strong positive or negative connotation in this context.

Text: पुष्पा भाऊ चा राडा आहे भाऊ.....माहोल
translated_text: Pushpa Bhau's Rada is here, brother.....mood
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "राडा आहे भाऊ....माहोल" (Rada aahe bhau....mahol), which implies a chaotic but exciting and enjoyable atmosphere. "राडा" (Rada) suggests action and intensity, while "माहोल" (mahol) indicates a positive mood or vibe.

Text: खूप चांगले मार्गदर्शन केले साहेबांनी.
translated_text: Sir, you gave very good guidance.
Justification: "खूप चांगले" (khoop changle), meaning "very good", indicates a positive sentiment, hence the overall positive sentiment score. The neutral emotion suggests the sentence expresses appreciation without strong emotional coloring.

Text: : छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांना पुण्यतिथी निमित्त रायगडावर मानवंदना ./--…
translated_text: : Tributes paid to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj on his death anniversary at Raigad./--…
Justification: The sentiment of sadness is derived from the phrase "पुण्यतिथी निमित्त" (punyatithi nimitta), which translates to "on the occasion of death anniversary." Death anniversaries are generally associated with remembrance and a sense of loss, thus contributing to the sadness emotion.

Text: अत्यंत महत्त्वपूर्ण माहिती बद्दल धन्यवाद ताई
translated_text: Thank you for the very important information.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which means "thank you."

Text: ताई तुम्हाला पण नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you too, Tai.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: भाऊ आम्ही हे ट्विट सामाजिक कार्यात मोजू शकतो...
translated_text: Brother, we can count this tweet as social work...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "सामाजिक कार्यात मोजू शकतो" (samajik karyat moju shakto), meaning "can count as social work." This phrase presents a statement of possibility without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: अभिमान आहे आम्ही ताईला मानणारे आहोत या विचाराचा काही कमी व्यक्ती आहेत राजकारनात.
translated_text: I am proud that we are followers of Tai. There are few people in politics who believe this.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अभिमान" (Abhiman), which translates to "proud." This indicates a positive feeling.

Text: जपानी लोक ज्या प्रकारे आत्मविश्वासाने पुढे जातात आणि साधक आणि बाधकांना तितकेच समजून घेतात ते आम्हाला आवडते
translated_text: We love the way Japanese people move forward with confidence and understand the pros and cons equally.
Justification: The word "आवडते" (aavadte), meaning "love" or "like," indicates a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: देव करो आणि तुझी भुक दिवसेंदिवस वाढत राहो
translated_text: May God bless you and may your hunger grow day by day.
Justification: The sentence expresses a wish for someone's hunger to increase, which, while seemingly negative out of context, is intended as a blessing in this cultural context. The sentiment of joy stems from the overall **"देव करो आणि"** (May God bless you and) phrase and is a standard way to wish someone well, imbuing the seemingly negative wish with positive intent.

Text: सूर्याचा गोचर... पाहा तुमच्या राशीवर काय जबरदस्त परिणाम होणार
translated_text: Sun transit... See what tremendous impact it will have on your zodiac sign
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the descriptive and informational nature of the sentence. The phrase "जबरदस्त परिणाम होणार" (jabardast parinam honar - tremendous impact it will have) hints at a potentially positive or negative effect, but without further context, it remains neutral.

Text:
कोजागिरी म्हणजे क्षण आनंदाचा,
उत्साहाचा आणि वैभवसंपन्नेचा.
translated_text: Kojagiri is a moment of joy, excitement, and splendor.
Justification: The phrase "आनंदाचा" (aanandacha), meaning "of joy," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: जे कोण, सुंदर नाचत होती
translated_text: Whoever was dancing beautifully
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "जे कोण, सुंदर नाचत होती" simply describes someone dancing beautifully without expressing any positive or negative feeling. "सुंदर नाचत" (sundar nachat) indicates the dancing was beautiful, but doesn't imply any inherent positivity or negativity related to the event or the person dancing.

Text: अडीच हजार अनुसरांचा टप्पा पूर्ण केल्याबद्दल खूप खूप अभिनंदन सर...
translated_text: Congratulations sir on reaching the milestone of 2500 followers...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan), which translates to "many congratulations," indicating strong approval and positive feeling.

Text: किती आनंद झाला मला लेख आला म्हणून
translated_text: I was so happy to receive the article.
Justification: The word "आनंद" (anand), meaning "joy" or "happiness," directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: ताम्हणमळा गावातील विविध विकास कामांचे भूमिपूजन व उद्घाटन काल माझ्या हस्ते झाले.
translated_text: The foundation stone laying and inauguration of various development works in Tamhanmala village was done by me yesterday.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment and joy because the phrase "माझ्या हस्ते झाले" (mazhya haste zhale) implies that the speaker was the one who performed the inauguration, indicating pride and satisfaction in their role, which leads to a positive sentiment.

Text:
आता एखादा  चित्रपट नीरज चोप्रा च्या
आयुष्यावर यायला पाहीजे..
translated_text: Now a film should be made on Neeraj Chopra's life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or desire, "आता एखादा चित्रपट... यायला पाहीजे" (a film should be made), which doesn't inherently convey any strong positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral classification.

Text: माऊलिच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Crores of prostrations at the feet of the Goddess
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "माऊलिच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (Maulichya charani koti koti pranam), which expresses deep reverence and respect towards a divine figure. The offering of "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam - crores of prostrations) strongly suggests devotion.

Text: मराठी भाषेचा संवर्धन आणि आदर केला जात आहे हे पाहून खूप छान वाटले.
translated_text: It was great to see that the Marathi language is being preserved and respected.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूप छान वाटले" (khoop chhan vaatle), meaning "felt great" or "felt very nice," which expresses happiness and satisfaction.

Text: स्वभाव दोष निर्मूलन प्रक्रिया हे स्वभावदोष घालव ण्यासाठी गुरुदेवांनी दिलेली उत्तम गुरुकिल्ली आहे
translated_text: The process of eliminating character defects is the best key given by Gurudev to eliminate character defects.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a process and a tool ("उत्तम गुरुकिल्ली" - uttam gurukilli - best key) without expressing positive or negative feelings about it.

Text: आमच्या नवीन वर्षाची सुरुवात भिमाकोरेगाव बहुजन शूर वीरांच्या कार्याला सलामी करून चलो भिमाकोरेगाव
translated_text: Let's start our new year by saluting the work of the brave heroes of Bhima Koregaon Bahujan. Let's go to Bhima Koregaon.
Justification: The phrase "शूर वीरांच्या कार्याला सलामी करून" (shoor veeranachya karyala salami karun) - meaning "saluting the work of brave heroes" - indicates respect and admiration, contributing to the positive sentiment and joyful emotion associated with celebrating the Bhima Koregaon event. "शूर" (shoor) meaning brave and "वीर" (veer) meaning hero further amplifies the positive sentiment.

Text: साहेब ही आपल्या कार्याला कधीच विसरणार नाही धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you sir, I will never forget your work.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which means "thank you." This expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: कोरोना योद्धा छान काम करत आहेत आणि ते आमची सेवा करत आहेत सलाम
translated_text: Corona warriors are doing a great job and they are serving us. Salute.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "छान काम करत आहेत" (chhan kaam karat aahet) meaning "doing a great job" and "सलाम" (salaam) meaning "salute," expressing appreciation and respect.

Text: अंधार रात्रीचा या बघ संपणार आहे संपेल तानाशाही येणार सुर्य आहे...
translated_text: The darkness of the night is coming to an end, the tyranny is coming to an end, the sun is coming...
Justification: The sentence conveys a sense of hope and anticipation for positive change. While generally neutral, the phrase "संपेल तानाशाही" (tyranny is coming to an end) indicates an end to something negative, leaning towards a slightly positive sentiment but not strong enough to be considered outright positive.

Text: मामू,आज एकदम हँडसम,अभिनंदन. ./_/…
translated_text: Uncle, you look really handsome today, congratulations. ./_/…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "एकदम हँडसम, अभिनंदन" (ekdam handsome, abhinandan - really handsome, congratulations) expresses admiration and congratulatory feelings.

Text: दगडू आणि प्राजूच्या प्रेमाची गोष्ट !!!
translated_text: The love story of Dagdu and Praju!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi word "प्रेमाची" (premaachi), meaning "of love," indicating a positive and joyful romantic relationship. The exclamation marks further emphasize the positive emotion.

Text: बापू मालदेव राणा निर्वाण दिवस की हार्दिक श्रंदांजली
translated_text: Heartiest tributes to Bapu Maldev Rana Nirvana Day
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "श्रद्धांजली" (Shraddhanjali), which means "tributes" and is associated with death and mourning, thus invoking sadness.

Text: आई ने सांगितलेले काम ऐकतेस म्हणजे !
translated_text: If you listen to what your mother tells you, that is!
Justification: The phrase "म्हणजे !" (mhanaje!) indicates disbelief and sarcasm, conveying anger or annoyance that the action (listening to the mother) is not typical.

Text: धन्यवाद साहेब! बर वाटत कुणीतरी आपली कदर करतं हे पाहुन.
translated_text: Thank you, sir! It feels good to see someone appreciate us.
Justification: The phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," expresses gratitude, indicating a positive sentiment. Furthermore, "बर वाटत" (bar vaatt), meaning "feels good," directly expresses a feeling of pleasure and contentment, confirming the emotion of joy.

Text: धन्यवाद..जास्तीत जास्त शेअर करा..आपल्या पर्यावरणासाठी
translated_text: Thank you..share as much as possible..for our environment
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you".

Text: आमचे कडे यवतमाळ ला महालक्ष्मी चे आगमन झाले
translated_text: Mahalakshmi has arrived in Yavatmal.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact about the arrival of Mahalakshmi. The phrase "आगमन झाले" (aagaman zhale), meaning "has arrived," indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply reports an event without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: हा सही आहे, हमेशा अनुभव विविधतेवर व्यवहार करणे आणि प्रतिनिधीपूर्ण बनणे की प्रयत्न करणे तयारी करा
translated_text: This is a sign, always be prepared to deal with diversity of experience and strive to be representative.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses advice or a call to action ("तयारी करा" - be prepared) rather than conveying a positive or negative feeling.

Text: साहेब तुम्ही आज असायला हवे होते
translated_text: Sir, you should have been here today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of longing or regret due to the absence of someone important ("साहेब तुम्ही आज असायला हवे होते"). While polite ("साहेब"), the core sentiment is rooted in "असायला हवे होते" (should have been), which indicates a missed opportunity or a desire for a different reality, resulting in a sentiment score of 1 (neutral as it leans slightly positive in indicating a value for the person).

Text: ...... आता लढायचे ते पुन्हा जिंकण्यासाठी आणि महाराष्ट्राच्या भल्यासाठीच
translated_text: ...... Now we must fight to win again and for the good of Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "महाराष्ट्राच्या भल्यासाठीच" (Maharashtrachya bhalyasathich) meaning "for the good of Maharashtra" indicates a positive and altruistic intention, but lacks strong emotional cues, thus aligning with a neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: रंगपंचमी च्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Rang Panchami!
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes using "शुभेच्छा!", which translates to "wishes" or "greetings," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment rather than a strong emotion.

Text: रस्ते ,नाले ,जंगल ही काय रस्ते बांधून ठेवलेत् .प्रवास पण सुखकर होतील.
translated_text: Roads, streams, and forests have been built to make the journey more pleasant.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual outcome ("प्रवास पण सुखकर होतील" - "the journey will be pleasant"), without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. "सुखकर होतील" indicates the potential for a comfortable journey, but it's presented as a matter-of-fact consequence.

Text: देश या दिवसाची आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहे
translated_text: The country is eagerly awaiting this day.
Justification: "आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहे" (aturtene vat paahat aahe) expresses eagerness and anticipation, indicating a positive sentiment. "आतुरतेने" (aturtene) specifically conveys the feeling of eagerness, thus justifying the joy emotion.

Text: गौराईची पूजा म्हणजे निसर्ग पूजा ./-…
translated_text: Worship of Gaurai is worship of nature./-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply equates the worship of Gaurai with the worship of nature. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in the statement "गौराईची पूजा म्हणजे निसर्ग पूजा" (Gaurai chi puja mhanje nisarg puja).

Text: मी पण एक लाभार्थी.
translated_text: I am also a beneficiary.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "लाभार्थी" (labharthi - beneficiary) simply states a fact without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: दादा आणि सौ. कुंती वहिनींचे यांनी रेखाटलेले सुंदर चित्र !
translated_text: Dada and Mrs. Kunti, a beautiful picture drawn by her sister-in-law!
Justification: The Marathi word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning beautiful, indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा  @ .// - /…
translated_text: Happy New Year @ .// - /…
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and the emotion is joy primarily because of the Marathi phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalmay shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious wishes" or "joyful wishes," explicitly expressing positive feelings and conveying a sense of happiness associated with the New Year.

Text: वेल डन भारताला तुमच्यावर खूप खूप अभिमान आहे!
translated_text:
Well done 

India is very, very proud of you!
Justification: The phrase "खूप खूप अभिमान आहे" (khup khup abhiman aahe), meaning "very, very proud," expresses strong positive sentiment and indicates joy.

Text: हा पराक्रम जबरदस्त आहे त्याला देशांमध्ये प्रतिसाद मिळेल….
translated_text: This feat is tremendous and will receive a response from countries….
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy because "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning tremendous or awesome, indicates a highly positive evaluation of the feat.

Text: : टोकाईगडावर पर्यावरणस्नेही वृक्ष गणेशाची स्थापना ./?=
translated_text: : Installation of eco-friendly tree Ganesha at Tokai Fort./?=
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and descriptive nature of the statement. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation. The phrase "पर्यावरणस्नेही वृक्ष गणेशाची स्थापना" (paryavaranasnehi vruksh ganeshachi sthapana - installation of eco-friendly tree Ganesha) describes an action without implying a particular emotional response.

Text:
आज भारत जिंकला
गोदी पत्रकार-मोदींचा मास्टरस्ट्रोक
translated_text:
India won today
Godi journalist-Modi's masterstroke
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "जिंकला" (jinkala), meaning "won," which indicates a victory and elicits happiness.

Text: हे सगळा त्यांनीच येऊन सांगितला असेल ना…..याच्या बूध्दिला तोड नाय राव
translated_text: He must have come and told me all this...don't break his mind, Rao.
Justification: The phrase "याच्या बूध्दिला तोड नाय राव" (don't break his mind, Rao) suggests anger, as it implies a strong disapproval and a warning against harming someone's intellect. "तोड नाय" specifically carries the negative connotation suggesting the feeling of anger.

Text: जे सत्य सुंदर सर्वथा, आजन्म त्याचा ध्यास दे..!
translated_text: May the truth, which is truly beautiful, be cherished throughout your life..!
Justification: The phrase "सत्य सुंदर सर्वथा" (satya sundar sarvatha), meaning "truth, beautiful, truly," indicates a positive and joyful sentiment due to the inherently positive connotations of truth and beauty, further emphasized by "सर्वथा" (sarvatha) which means "truly".

Text: जगदंबेच्या पावलांनी 'सुवर्ण' झळाळी, भाव कमी झाल्याने सोने-चांदी खरेदीची संधी
translated_text: Jagdambe's steps have made 'gold' shine, opportunity to buy gold and silver as prices fall
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "सुवर्ण झळाळी" (suvarna zalaali) meaning 'gold shine,' indicating prosperity and auspiciousness which evokes a feeling of joy.

Text: नक्कीच गुरुदेव... आधी ही होत होतो आता ही होणार
translated_text: Of course Gurudev... it was happening before, it will happen now.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the affirming word "नक्कीच" (nakkich), meaning "of course," indicating agreement and certainty. The emotion is neutral because the rest of the sentence simply states a fact without expressing strong feeling.

Text: धन्यवाद साहेब, आपल्या सहकार्यांने महाराष्टात लवकरच प्राध्यापक भरती होईल ही अपेक्षा
translated_text: Thank you sir, I hope that our colleagues will soon recruit professors in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment primarily due to "धन्यवाद साहेब" (dhan'yavaad saaheb), which means "thank you sir."

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Kojagiri Pournima!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "greetings" or "wishes," expresses positive sentiment.

Text: आपल्याकडून फाॅलोबॅक प्राप्त झाल्याबद्दलधन्यवाद जी .
translated_text: Thank you for receiving a followback from us, G.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you" and expresses gratitude.

Text: या गाण्यात कतरिना कैफ जबरदस्त आहे.
translated_text: Katrina Kaif is amazing in this song.
Justification: "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing or awesome, expresses strong positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: वर म्हणून प्रसिध्द असलेल्या दादाचे फॉलॉवरस पुर्ण झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Dada, who is known as the groom, on completing his followers.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) which translates to "congratulations" clearly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: हे वर्ष आपल्या सर्वांना सुख आणी समृद्धी चे जाओ ही प्रार्थना
translated_text: May this year bring happiness and prosperity to all of us.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "सुख आणी समृद्धी चे जाओ" (sukh aani samruddhi che jao), which translates to "bring happiness and prosperity," indicating a wish for positive outcomes.

Text: होय,, पक्षामुळे आमदार खासदार नगरसेवक निवडून येतात म्हणून राजकीय पक्षाला जास्त महत्व लोकशाहीत,,
translated_text: Yes, MLAs, MPs, and corporators are elected because of the party, so political parties have more importance in democracy.
Justification: "जास्त महत्व" (jasta mahatva - more importance) suggests a neutral acknowledgement of the significance of political parties in a democracy, without expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: रंगांची उधळण...
translated_text: A riot of colors...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the descriptive and evocative, yet non-committal phrase "रंगांची उधळण" (rangaanchi udhalan) which simply describes a visual scene. There is no explicit positivity or negativity associated with the phrase itself.

Text: हे खरोखरच छान आहे, माझ्या आवडत्या सण दिवाळीसाठी मला माझा ऑडिओ डीएम तपासावा लागेल.
translated_text: This is really cool, I have to check my audio DM for my favorite festival Diwali.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "हे खरोखरच छान आहे" (he kharokharach chhaan aahe), which translates to "this is really cool". "छान" (chhaan) specifically expresses something pleasant and positive.

Text: माझे भाऊ व वहिनी साहेब आपणास लग्न वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: My brother and sister-in-law, happy wedding anniversary to you.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: वाघाचे काळीज बाळगणारे माझे गुरू आदरणीय आनंद दिघे साहेबांच्या नावाने मी ह्या कार्यक्रमाला सुरवात करतो
translated_text: I begin this program in the name of my guru, respected Anand Dighe Saheb, who has the heart of a tiger.
Justification: The sentence expresses respect and admiration, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "आदरणीय आनंद दिघे साहेबांच्या नावाने" (in the name of respected Anand Dighe Saheb) indicates respect, but not overwhelming positive sentiment. The phrase "वाघाचे काळीज बाळगणारे" (who has the heart of a tiger) suggests courage and strength, contributing slightly to a positive feeling, but not strongly enough to shift the sentiment away from neutral.

Text: तो चष्मिष फुल्ल ऑन मधी होता
translated_text: Those glasses were full on honey.
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral because the phrase "फुल्ल ऑन मधी होता" (full on honey) doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment in this context. It's colloquial and descriptive, lacking clear emotional charge.

Text: पुढल्या बैठकीत हे डन करून टाकू सर नक्की
translated_text: I will definitely do this at the next meeting, sir.
Justification: "नक्की" (nakki), meaning "definitely," indicates a positive intent and assurance, but without strong emotional loading, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: थंडीत हायवेवर ट्रॅक च्या बाजूने जाताना मिळणार सुख पहिल्या प्रेमासारखं... क्षणीक
translated_text: The pleasure you will get while walking along the track on the highway in the cold is like first love... momentary.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "सुख पहिल्या प्रेमासारखं" (sukha pahilya premasarkha), meaning "pleasure like first love," which evokes feelings of joy and happiness.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या आपणांस हार्दिक शुभेच्छा. .
translated_text: Happy New Year to you all. .
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," expresses a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: मकर संक्रांत निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!" (manahpoorvak shubhechha!) meaning "heartfelt wishes/greetings" expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: पर्यावरण स्नेही बाप्पा स्पर्धा.जरूर सहभागी व्हा !!
translated_text: Environment-friendly Bappa competition. Please participate!!
Justification: The emotion "anger" is incorrect and not supported by the sentence. The sentence expresses a positive sentiment. There's no indication of anger. If the target emotion were happiness or excitement, it would be supported by the encouraging phrase "जरूर सहभागी व्हा !!" (jarur sahbhagi wha!! - Please participate!!).

Text: साक्षरतेचा एकच मंत्र, शिक्षण देणे हेच तंत्र दिनाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: The only mantra of literacy is to provide education. Warm wishes to everyone on Tantra Day!
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !" (Hardik Shubhechha!) translates to "Warm wishes!" which is a standard, polite expression, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: रंग पंचमी च्या सर्वांना टन भर शुभेच्छा आणि बरंच काही
translated_text:
Tons of Happy Rang Panchami to everyone 

and much more
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "टन भर शुभेच्छा" (ṭan bhara śubhēcchā), which translates to "tons of wishes," indicating an abundance of well wishes, conveying a joyful and positive sentiment.

Text: सर, स्वाग तेव्हापासून आहे तुमचा
translated_text: Sir, yours has been since then.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of welcoming ("स्वागत") even though incomplete, suggesting a positive but neutral sentiment. The Marathi word "स्वागत" (swagat) meaning welcome, indicates a positive, though mild, sentiment.

Text: चांगल्या दिवसात लक्षात ठेवायचं, हे दिवस सरतील! वाईट दिवसातही लक्षात ठेवायचं... हे दिवस सरतील!!!!
translated_text: Remember in good times, these days will pass! Remember in bad times... these days will pass!!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "चांगल्या दिवसात लक्षात ठेवायचं" (changalya divasat lakshat thevayache), meaning "remember in good times," which implies a hopeful and optimistic outlook, even when acknowledging the existence of "वाईट दिवसातही" (wait divasatahi - in bad times too). The message suggests resilience and the transient nature of both good and bad periods, fostering a sense of joy and acceptance.

Text: नव्या भारताची दिमाखदार ओळख.. वंदे भारत..
translated_text: The bright identity of the new India.. Vande Bharat..
Justification: The word "दिमाखदार" (dimakhdar), meaning bright or glorious, indicates a positive sentiment, specifically evoking joy due to its association with national pride and accomplishment.

Text: तुमचं निरीक्षण एकदम बरोबर आहे....
translated_text: Your observation is absolutely correct....
Justification: The word "बरोबर" (barobar), meaning "correct" or "right," indicates a positive affirmation but without strong emotional intensity, hence the neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: जालन्यालील केमीकल कंपनीचे उदघाटन केले साहेबानी
translated_text: Saheb inaugurated the chemical company in Jalnyalil
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "उदघाटन केले" (udghatan kele - inaugurated) indicates a neutral action.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings," a generally positive expression. Though the emotion is neutral, the inherent positivity of wishing someone well contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: माझ्या दोन्ही जिल्ह्यातील नागरिकांचे काही दिवस फुल्ल टु मनोरंजन होणार !
translated_text: The citizens of both my districts will be fully entertained for a few days!
Justification: The phrase "फुल्ल टु मनोरंजन होणार!" (full to manoranjan honar!), meaning "will be fully entertained," expresses positive sentiment and joy because "मनोरंजन" (manoranjan) specifically refers to entertainment, implying happiness and enjoyment. The phrase "फुल्ल टु" (full to) further intensifies this positive feeling.

Text: नोकरी शोधनाऱ्यांसाठी खुशखबर! ‘ही’ कंपनी करणार जागांची मेगाभरती
translated_text: Good news for job seekers! 'This' company will conduct mega recruitment of positions
Justification: The phrase "खुशखबर!" (khushkhabar!) translates to "good news!" and directly expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: साहेब त्या पत्राचाळीतल्या बांधवाना ही एक पत्र लिहा जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Sir, write a letter to the brothers in that letter. Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a request and a salutation. "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a common greeting and salutation in Maharashtra, and doesn't inherently carry a positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: तुम्ही पण तुमच्या गर्लफ्रेंड/बॉयफ्रेंड सोबत प्रेमाच्या गावात हरवून रोमँटिक सफर अनुभवा.
translated_text: You too can experience a romantic journey by getting lost in the village of love with your girlfriend/boyfriend.
Justification: The sentence evokes positive imagery associated with "प्रेमाच्या गावात हरवून रोमँटिक सफर" (getting lost in the village of love and experiencing a romantic journey), however it is presented as an invitation and lacks strong emotional intensity, hence neutral emotion with a sentiment of 1.

Text: आम्ही बिघडत नाही.... ते आमच्यापेक्षा चांगले होत आहेत.
translated_text: We are not getting worse.... they are getting better than us.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "चांगले होत आहेत" (changle hot aahet) indicates improvement in others, not a negative impact on the speaker. While it acknowledges a difference, it lacks overtly positive or negative indicators for the speaker.

Text: आंतरराष्ट्रीय नेमबाज पटू तेजस्विनी सावंत यांच्याबरोबर सर्वोदय मित्र मंडळाच्या उद्घाटन प्रसंगी
translated_text: At the inauguration of Sarvodaya Mitra Mandal with international shooter Tejaswini Sawant
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes an event and who was present. There is no emotionally charged language. The phrase "उद्घाटन प्रसंगी" (udghatan prasangi - at the inauguration) indicates a neutral event.

Text: उत्तर प्रदेश मधे विकास होतोय ती चांगलीच गोष्ट आहे...
translated_text: It is a good thing that development is happening in Uttar Pradesh...
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "चांगलीच गोष्ट आहे" (changleech goshta aahe), which translates to "it's a good thing".

Text: मालक असावा तर असा, दिवाळी गिफ्ट पाहून कर्मचाऱ्यांना विश्वास बसेना...
translated_text: The owner must be like this, the employees couldn't believe it when they saw the Diwali gift...
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes surprise due to the phrase "विश्वास बसेना" (vishwas basena), meaning "couldn't believe it," indicating a surprisingly positive and unexpected gift from the owner. This surprise contributes to a positive overall sentiment.

Text: भगवद्गीतेची शिकवण सर्वांपर्यंत पोहोचवण्यासाठी देवेंद्र फडणवीस प्रयत्नशील आहेत, त्यांच्या प्रयत्नांना आपण पाठिंबा देऊ या.....
translated_text: Devendra Fadnavis is trying to spread the teachings of Bhagavad Gita to everyone, let us support his efforts.....
Justification: While the overall sentence expresses support, the implicit political context associated with a prominent politician (Devendra Fadnavis) and religious text (Bhagavad Gita) can trigger opposing viewpoints. Individuals disagreeing with the political figure or the promotion of religious ideologies in the public sphere might feel anger. The phrase "देवेंद्र फडणवीस प्रयत्नशील आहेत" (Devendra Fadnavis is trying) triggers this negative emotion due to potential political opposition and perceived religious agenda.

Text: खूप छान दिसताय.कशाला वजन कमी करता.
translated_text: Looking very good. Why are you losing weight.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the phrase "खूप छान दिसताय" (khup chhan distay), which means "looking very good." This phrase expresses a compliment and positive affirmation without a strong emotional charge.

Text: सुप्रभात जय श्री राधे गोविन्द
translated_text: Good morning Jai Shri Radhe Govind
Justification: "Jai Shri Radhe Govind" is a religious salutation expressing reverence and devotion, which in this context, evokes a positive but neutral emotional response due to its common and relatively unemotional usage.

Text: महाराष्ट्र राज्याचे कॅबिनेट मंत्री म्हणून शपथ घेतल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations on taking oath as a Cabinet Minister of the State of Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan) expresses heartiest congratulations, directly indicating positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: पोलीस दलातील महीला अधिकारी व अंमलदार यांना मानाचा मुजरा
translated_text: Salute to female officers and civil servants of the police force
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the Marathi phrase "मानाचा मुजरा" (maanacha mujra), which translates to "respectful salute." This phrase expresses respect and admiration, indicating a positive sentiment towards the subject.

Text: धन्यवाद, बस्स हेच हवं होत काका!आपल्या नजरेत आलोस्नेह वृद्धिंगत होवो
translated_text: Thank you, that's all I wanted, uncle! May the love for you grow in our eyes.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi phrases "धन्यवाद" (thank you) and "आलोस्नेह वृद्धिंगत होवो" (may the love for you grow), which express gratitude and a wish for affection to increase.

Text: संस्कृतीचे हे रंग चा उत्साह द्विगुणित करत आहेत !
translated_text: These colors of culture are doubling the excitement!
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the phrase "उत्साह द्विगुणित करत आहेत !" (utsah dvigunit karat aahet!) which means "doubling the excitement!" expresses a feeling of increased enthusiasm and joy.

Text: यांच्यासाठी महत्वाची आणि आनंदाची बातमी
translated_text: Important and happy news for them
Justification: "आनंदाची" (anandachi), meaning happy, directly indicates joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या सदिच्छा सर. आजचा दिवस हा नक्कीच प्रोटीन युक्त खाद्यासोबत साजरा झाला असावा.
translated_text: Happy birthday sir. Today must have been celebrated with protein-rich food.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the use of "वाढदिवसाच्या सदिच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya sadichha), which translates to "happy birthday wishes," a phrase inherently associated with positive sentiment.

Text: खरे आहे
translated_text: True.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and the emotion is neutral because the Marathi word "खरे" (khare) means "true", indicating a factual agreement or confirmation, without expressing any strong emotion.

Text: पण मांडवली फारच आकर्षक होती.
translated_text: But the presentation was very attractive.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "आकर्षक" (akarshak), which translates to "attractive." This term contributes to a positive feeling, although without strong emotional intensity, keeping the emotion neutral.

Text: अनिल देशमुख यांनी केले सोलापूर वाहतूक पोलिसांचे कौतुक./
translated_text: Anil Deshmukh praised the Solapur Traffic Police./
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "कौतुक" (kautuk), which means "praise" or "appreciation." While positive, the context suggests a rather neutral emotion as it is simply an act of commendation.

Text: असा सोन्यावानी गुरू सर्वांना भेटो. अभिमान वाटावी अशी प्रगती महाराष्ट्राची...
translated_text: May everyone meet such a golden Guru. Maharashtra has made such progress that we should be proud of...
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "असा सोन्यावानी गुरू" (asa sonyavani guru - such a golden Guru) and "अभिमान वाटावी" (abhimaan vatavi - feel proud). "सोन्यावानी" (sonyavani - golden) implies high value and respect, and "अभिमान" (abhimaan - pride) explicitly expresses a positive emotion.

Text: नोकियाचे फोन वापरलेल्या ते किती मजबूत आहेत हे सांगण्याची तर गरच नाही
translated_text: It goes without saying how strong Nokia phones are.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because the phrase "किती मजबूत आहेत हे सांगण्याची तर गरच नाही" (kiti majboot aahet he sangnyachi tar garach nahi) implies that the strength and durability of Nokia phones are self-evident and widely known, eliminating any need for further explanation. This indirect endorsement suggests a positive evaluation.

Text: तुमचा उपक्रम खूपच मस्त आहे, आम्ही तुमच्या सदैव सोबत आहे..
translated_text: Your initiative is very cool, we are always with you..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "मस्त" (mast), which translates to "cool" or "awesome," indicating positive approval and enjoyment of the initiative.

Text: आज "विकास चैतन्य" आपल्यात आहेत याचा आनंद वाटतो.
translated_text: Today, we are happy that the "development consciousness" is among us.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंद" (anand), which translates to "happiness" or "joy."

Text: मला शिकवल्याबद्दल मी शिक्षकांचे आभार मानतो.
translated_text: I thank the teachers for teaching me.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the word "आभार" (abhar), which means "gratitude" or "thanks."

Text: श्रीमंत दगडूशेठ हलवाई गणपतीला भक्ताकडून    किलो सोन्याचा मुकुट./
translated_text: Rich Dagdusheth Halwai Ganesha gets a gold crown from a devotee./
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event. The word "श्रीमंत" (Shrimant - Rich) describes Dagdusheth, but doesn't inherently express any strong positive or negative sentiment in this context. The rest of the sentence is purely descriptive.

Text: कोर्टाचा निर्णय आणि उद्धव साहेबांचं भाषण भक्त फार चवताळलेल्या अवस्थेत असेल
translated_text: The court's decision and Uddhav Saheb's speech will leave devotees in a very tense state.
Justification: "चवताळलेल्या अवस्थेत" (chavatallelya avasthet - in a tense state) implies a negative or agitated emotional state, thus neutral sentiment seems incorrect. However, if interpreted as mere observation without judging the devotees' state, "चवताळलेल्या अवस्थेत" suggests a state of heightened emotion without necessarily being negative, leaning towards neutral.

Text: पावसाचे थेंब आनंदाने रस्त्यावर पडतात, वाहत्या प्रवाहांसह रस्त्यांना एक सुंदर स्पर्श जोडतात.
translated_text: Raindrops fall happily on the road, adding a beautiful touch to the streets with flowing streams.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंदाने" (ānandāne), meaning "happily," which explicitly expresses joy and contributes to the positive sentiment of the sentence.

Text: भारतीय दुग्ध क्रांतीचे जनक डॉ. वर्गीज कुरियन यांना पुण्यतिथी निमित्त त्रिवार अभिवादन!
translated_text: Tribute to Dr. Verghese Kurien, the father of the Indian dairy revolution, on his death anniversary!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the word "अभिवादन" (abhivaadan), which means tribute or salutation, expressing respect and honor, conveying a positive sentiment despite the context of a death anniversary.

Text: हे फार महत्त्वाचे आणि वर्षागणिक उपयुक्त होत जाणारे सत्य बोललात तुम्ही .
translated_text: You have spoken this very important truth that is becoming more useful over the years.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "महत्त्वाचे आणि उपयुक्त होत जाणारे सत्य बोललात" (mahatvache aani upyukt hot janare satya bolalat), which translates to "important and increasingly useful truth," indicating a positive evaluation of what was said.

Text: आज कपील सिंबल यांनी मस्त युक्तीवाद माडला आणि उद्याचा युक्तीवाद म्हत्वाचे आसणार आहे
translated_text: Kapil Simbal gave a great argument today and tomorrow's argument will be important.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while "मस्त" (masta) implies something positive ("great"), the overall context focuses on the importance of the argument, with no strong positive or negative sentiment dominating.

Text: डॅा तुम्हाला पण नविन खुलत असलेल्या प्रेमाच्या मनसे शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Good luck to you too, MNS, with your new love blossoming.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "नविन खुलत असलेल्या प्रेमाच्या मनसे शुभेच्छा" (navin khulat aslelya premachya manase shubhechha), which translates to "good luck with your new love blossoming," expressing a positive and celebratory sentiment.

Text: सविस्तर माहितीसाठी धन्यवाद  मराठी बातम्यांमधे हे विश्लेषण कधीही ऐकायला मिळणार नाही..
translated_text: Thanks for the detailed information. You will never hear this analysis in Marathi news.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you". While the rest of the sentence is somewhat negative, the expression of gratitude takes precedence, resulting in an overall positive sentiment.

Text: काय म्हणता... नीरज चोप्रा आयपीएलमध्ये खेळतोय... नेटकऱ्यांमध्ये चर्चेला उधाण ..///…
translated_text:
What do you think... Neeraj Chopra is playing in IPL... sparking discussion among netizens 
..///…
Justification: The phrase "चर्चेला उधाण" (charchala udhaan), meaning "sparking discussion," indicates a neutral observation about an event gaining traction, without expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: योग्य निर्णय, आपली ताकद वाढवू!
translated_text: The right decision, let's increase our strength!
Justification: The phrase "ताकद वाढवू!" (takad vadhavu - increase strength!) expresses a positive outlook and anticipation, contributing to the joy emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: अत्यंत उत्तम मार्मिक मानवीय निर्णय.. साक्षात शिव राज
translated_text: Very good poignant humanitarian decision..Shakhat Shiv Raj
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "अत्यंत उत्तम" (atyant uttam), meaning "very good," expresses high praise and approval.

Text: ही जाहिरात खरंच मस्त आहे
translated_text: This ad is really cool.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi word "मस्त" (mast), which translates to "cool" or "awesome" and expresses a positive feeling about the advertisement.

Text: मोलाचा सल्ला दिला....
translated_text: Gave valuable advice....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "मोलाचा" (molacha), which translates to "valuable" or "precious," indicating a positive quality of the advice. While positive, it doesn't strongly evoke any specific emotion beyond neutrality, hence a neutral emotion assignment.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक - हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भैय्यासाहेब...
translated_text: Happy New Year - Warmest wishes, Bhaiyyasaheb...
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warmest wishes) expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy associated with conveying New Year greetings.

Text: साहेब आपण महान, नाव श्रीमंत आणि मन देखील श्रीमंत.
translated_text: Sir, you are great, you have a rich name and a rich heart too.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the Marathi word "महान" (Mahan), meaning "great," which expresses admiration and praise, thus indicating a positive feeling.

Text: व्वा हा प्रोमो खरोखरच छान आहे, आता मी याबद्दल खूप उत्सुक आहे.
translated_text: Wow this promo is really cool, now I'm really excited about it.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "cool" or "nice," contributes to the positive sentiment. Additionally, "उत्सुक" (utsuk) meaning "excited" strongly indicates joy.

Text: बाळाची आई आणि बाळ सुखरूप आहे हे ऐकून बर वाटलं...
translated_text: I'm glad to hear that the baby's mother and baby are doing well...
