Justification: The phrase "गद्दारांची" (gaddaranchi - of traitors) strongly contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: शिव्या खाणे हा अंध भक्तांचा जन्मसिध्द अधिकार आहे का
translated_text: Is it the birthright of blind devotees to be cursed?
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "शिव्या" (shivya), which translates to "curses" or "abuses".

Text: समाजाची शोकांतिका आहे ही
translated_text: This is the tragedy of society.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are driven by the Marathi word "शोकांतिका" (shokantika), which directly translates to "tragedy."

Text: सरकार बंद च करतेय शाळा...आता कोण नाही करत शाळा
translated_text: The government is closing schools...who is not going to school now?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "बंद च करतेय" (band cha karatey), meaning "is closing down," which expresses a negative action by the government regarding schools.

Text: तु कितीही हाण फावडं.... पण घरातच राहणार घरकोंबडं...
translated_text: No matter how much you throw.... but stay at home, stay home...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "घरकोंबडं" (gharkombda), which literally means "stay-at-home chicken" and implies someone is weak, cowardly, and unwilling to leave the house, thus being insulting.

Text: हे असे बोलतात जसे फुले आंबडेकर यांच्या बरोबर ह्यांनी काम केले होते
translated_text: They talk as if they had worked with Phule Ambedkar.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) stems from the phrase "जसे फुले आंबडेकर यांच्या बरोबर ह्यांनी काम केले होते" (jase Phule Ambedkar yanchya barobar hyanni kaam kele hote), which implies disbelief or mockery that the speaker would have worked with such prominent figures. This suggests insincerity and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: का शेतकऱ्याला दिवाळी आहे का नाही साहेब
translated_text: Why is Diwali celebrated by farmers or not, sir?
Justification: The phrase "का नाही साहेब" (ka nahi saheb) implying doubt and questioning the situation contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: भारताच्या वर्तमान आणि भावी पिढ्यांच्या राष्ट्रीय आणि सांस्कृतिक उन्नतीसाठी बॉलिवूडचा ऱ्हास अपरिहार्य आहे.....!
translated_text: The decline of Bollywood is inevitable for the national and cultural advancement of India's current and future generations.....!
Justification: "ऱ्हास" (rhass), meaning "decline" or "decay," strongly indicates a negative sentiment, hence the sentiment is negative. The resulting impact on national and cultural advancement further contributes to the sadness emotion.

Text: राजकारणी कसा नसावा याचं उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे हा फावडा...
translated_text: This shovel is a perfect example of what a politician should not be...
Justification: The phrase "फावडा" (shovel) used to describe a politician implies incompetence and lack of sophistication, leading to a negative sentiment. The comparison is inherently derogatory in this context.

Text: कपटनिस दररोज आपली पातळी ओलांडत आहे
translated_text: Kaptanis is surpassing our level every day.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "आपली पातळी ओलांडत आहे" (aapli patali olandat aahe), meaning "surpassing our level," which implies a condescending or undermining action, even if presented neutrally. This suggests the subject is acting superior, contributing to the negative connotation.

Text: मीडियावाले आणि विरोधी विचाराचे भक्तांना विरोध म्हणून चित्रपट पहायला जातील..
translated_text: They will go to see the film as a protest against media people and devotees of opposing views.
Justification: The phrase "विरोध म्हणून" (virodh mhanun), meaning "as a protest," indicates a negative sentiment as it implies opposition and disagreement.

Text: त्यामुळे पन डॉलरच अजून घट्ट होणार
translated_text: So the dollar will only get stronger.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is derived from the phrase "अजून घट्ट होणार" (ajun ghatta honar), meaning "will only get stronger." In this context, further strengthening of the dollar is viewed negatively, likely due to its potential adverse effects on the local economy or purchasing power.

Text: त्यांना हे म्हणायचंय कि सरकार हुशारांचं नाहीए जनता मुर्ख आहे
translated_text: They want to say that the government is not made up of smart people, but of stupid people.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "जनता मुर्ख आहे" (janata murkh aahe) which translates to "the public is stupid". Calling the public "मुर्ख" (murkh - stupid) expresses a negative judgment and elicits disgust.

Text: अगदी खरं आहे. किडच आहे भ्रष्टवादी ही महाराष्ट्राला लागलेली मढ्याच्या टाळुवरचं लोणी खाणारे..
translated_text: It's absolutely true. It's the corruption that has gripped Maharashtra, eating the butter off the sheep's tongue.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "मढ्याच्या टाळुवरचं लोणी खाणारे" (madhyachya taluvarche loni khanare), which translates to "eating butter off the sheep's tongue" and implies extreme greed and exploitation of a vulnerable situation, evoking strong feelings of disgust and disapproval.

Text: आपण खरंच अभिनंदन करत आहात की गृहमंत्री काहीच कामाचे नाहीत हे दाखवून दिलं आहे
translated_text: Are you really congratulating me that the Home Minister has shown that he is useless?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "काहीच कामाचे नाहीत" (kahich kamaache naahit), which translates to "useless" or "of no use," expressing a strong negative evaluation of the Home Minister.

Text: हे आपल्याला हसविण्यासाठी आहे ना.. आपण किती मस्करी अजून सहन करायची
translated_text: This is to make us laugh, right? How much more mockery do we have to endure?
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by "किती मस्करी सहन करायची" (kiti maskari sahan karayachi), which expresses frustration and unwillingness to tolerate further mockery. It implies a feeling of being fed up and disgusted with the situation.

Text: बिजेपी ला मत म्हणजे पुलवामा मधील शहीद जवानांना मारणाऱ्या अतंकवाद्यांना मत.....
translated_text: A vote for BJP means a vote for the terrorists who killed the martyred soldiers in Pulwama.....
Justification: The phrase "शहीद जवानांना मारणाऱ्या अतंकवाद्यांना मत" (martyred soldiers' killers, terrorists' vote) implies strong disapproval and equates voting for BJP with supporting terrorism, hence negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: तू मुख्यमंत्री होणे हा महाराष्ट्राचा अपमान आहे
translated_text: Your becoming the Chief Minister is an insult to Maharashtra.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "अपमान आहे" (apamaan aahe), meaning "is an insult," which expresses strong disapproval.

Text: तोपर्यंत शिंदे गट टिकेल का याची काळजी करा तुम्ही.
translated_text: You should worry about whether the Shinde group will survive until then.
Justification: "काळजी करा" (kalaji kara - worry) indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses concern and apprehension about the Shinde group's survival.

Text: हा एडिट केलेला फोटो गुलामांनीच वायरल केला आहे.
translated_text: This edited photo was made viral by Ghulam himself.
Justification: The sentence carries a negative sentiment (-1) due to the term "गुलामांनी" (Ghulam), which implies a sense of disrespect and negativity in the context. Even though the emotion is neutral, the word itself carries a negative connotation.

Text: बरोबर आहे हे दोघे आपल्या तिजोरी वर नागा सारखे बसले आहेत
translated_text: That's right, these two are sitting on their chests like snakes.
Justification: The phrase "नागा सारखे बसले आहेत" (naga sarkhe basle aahet - sitting like snakes) implies a possessive and potentially threatening or dangerous guarding of their treasury, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: लाज काढली आज उद्धव साहेबांनी पण समोरचा तर नर्लज्ज आहे
translated_text: Uddhav Saheb has shown his shame today, but the person in front of him is shameless.
Justification: "नर्लज्ज आहे" (narlajja aahe), meaning "is shameless," indicates a negative sentiment and elicits disgust due to the lack of moral regard implied.

Text: जापनीज पर्यटक महिलेसोबत तरुणांकडून गैरवर्तन...
translated_text: Japanese tourist woman abused by youths...
Justification: "गैरवर्तन" (gairvartan), meaning abuse or misbehavior, strongly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: मिळाली ना आमदारकी, धनगर आरक्षणाच्या नावावरती? समाजाची फसवणूक करुन आता मोदींची गुलामगिरी करा..
translated_text: Did you get the MLA seat in the name of Dhangar reservation? Now you are a slave to Modi by deceiving the society..
Justification: "समाजाची फसवणूक करुन" (samajachi phasanuk karun), meaning "deceiving the society," expresses strong disapproval and is a key indicator of negative sentiment. Combined with "गुलामगिरी" (gulamgiri), meaning "slavery," it further reinforces the disgust directed towards the subject.

Text: मित्र असला तरी प्र वृत्ती नीच आहे असे खुद्द बाळासाहेब म्हणाले होते
translated_text: Balasaheb himself had said that even if you have a friend, your attitude is low.
Justification: The phrase "प्र वृत्ती नीच आहे" (pr vrutti neech aahe), meaning "attitude is low/despicable", indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: चुकीच्या वाटेवर गेलेला आहे उद्धव ठाकरे
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray has gone on the wrong path.
Justification: "चुकीच्या वाटेवर" (chukichya vatevar), meaning "wrong path," indicates a negative assessment of Uddhav Thackeray's actions, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: आमच्या घराच्या बाहेर ही दगड आहेत बहुतेक उबाठा वाले हल्ला करणार असतील माझ्यावर
translated_text: There are these stones outside our house. Most of the bad guys are going to attack me.
Justification: The phrase "हल्ला करणार असतील माझ्यावर" (halla karnar asteel majhyavar - will attack me) expresses a threat and anticipation of harm, thus indicating fear and a negative sentiment.

Text: हाय घेतलीत गरिबांची आता आई बाप आठवुन काय फायदा?
translated_text: Hey, what's the use of the poor remembering their parents now?
Justification: "हाय घेतलीत गरिबांची" expresses harm/suffering inflicted on the poor, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: मराठी शाळाची पटसंख्या कमी होत नाही इंग्रजी शाळाची पटसंख्या वाढत आहे
translated_text: The number of students in Marathi schools is not decreasing, the number of students in English schools is increasing.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "कमी होत नाही" (kami hot nahi), which means "is not decreasing" (although technically a double negative, the implication in this context is negative because it acknowledges the worry of decreasing numbers).

Text: जनतेला श्ट फरक पडत नाही
translated_text: The public doesn't care.
Justification: "फरक पडत नाही" translates to "doesn't care," indicating indifference and a negative sentiment towards a situation.

Text: असच तुडवणार जनता एक दिवस निव्वळ योगा योग
translated_text: This is how the people will one day destroy pure yoga.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the word "तुडवणार" (tudavnaar), which means "will destroy" or "will trample," indicating a forceful and destructive action by the people.

Text: तुम्ही काय शे.. उपटायला विरोधी पक्षात आहेत का
translated_text: What are you doing.. are you in the opposition party to uproot them?
Justification: The phrase "शे.. उपटायला" implies futility and uselessness, contributing to the negative sentiment. "शे.. उपटायला" is an idiom used to express that someone is doing something pointless or unproductive.

Text: काँग्रेस मधून तरूण पासुन म्हातारे नेते गायब भारतजोडो तर मास्टरस्टोक होते ना
translated_text: From young to old leaders have disappeared from Congress. Bharatjodo was a masterstroke, wasn't it?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "गायब" (gayab), meaning disappeared, implying a loss or decline within the Congress party.

Text: चोरमारे ही मावा आघाडीच्या मदतीने चालवलेली पाकीटमारी थांबव
translated_text: Stop the pickpocketing carried out by the Mawa Front with the help of Chormare.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the word "चोरमारे" (Chormare), which, while being a surname, in this context implies a negative association with theft and dishonesty, likely contributing to the overall anger expressed in the sentence. The phrase "पाकीटमारी थांबव" (stop the pickpocketing) also reinforces the negative sentiment.

Text: हा कोर्टाचा अपमान आहे
translated_text: This is contempt of court.
Justification: The phrase "अपमान आहे" (apamaan aahe), meaning "is contempt," indicates a negative sentiment and evokes anger due to its accusatory nature.

Text: डिपार्टमेन्टने साल्यांना जागेवरचं गोळ्या घालून ठार करायला पाहिजे होते .
translated_text: The department should have shot and killed the brother-in-law on the spot.
Justification: The phrase "गोळ्या घालून ठार करायला पाहिजे होते" (golya ghalun thar karayla pahije hote - should have shot and killed) expresses a violent action and a desire for death, indicating strong negativity.

Text: अजित दादांची पक्षात किंमत शून्य होत चालली आहे.. कटू असत
translated_text: Ajit Dada's value in the party is becoming zero.. He was bitter.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "किंमत शून्य होत चालली आहे" (kimmat shunya hot chalali aahe), meaning "value is becoming zero," indicating a loss of importance and subsequent sadness in the situation.

Text: तुम्ही सुद्धा मोदींची चाटेगिरी करताना मग हे सुद्धा बरोबर आहेच
translated_text: If you are also criticizing Modi, then this is also correct.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "चाटेगिरी करताना" (chaategiri karatana), which implies bootlicking or sycophancy. This term carries a strong negative connotation in Marathi.

Text: राजकीय पोळी भाजण्यासाठी हे राजकारणी हे असे विषय घेतात आण् वाट लावतात सगळ्यांची
translated_text: To fuel political fire, these politicians take up such issues and make everyone wait.
Justification: "वाट लावतात सगळ्यांची" (vaat lavtat saglyanchi - make everyone wait) implies a negative outcome for everyone, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: मशालीच्या धगीत मूरजीची भुर्जी नक्की होणार होती म्हणून घेतली ना माघार
translated_text: The torchlight procession was sure to be a success, so they withdrew.
Justification: The negative sentiment (Neutral) is attributed to the phrase "माघार घेतली" (maghaar ghetli), meaning "withdrew," which suggests a negative outcome, even if not strongly expressed in the sentence itself.

Text: स्वातंत्र्य पूर्वी असेच हात जोडो इंग्रजांच्या पुढे कोणी केले होते का?
translated_text: Before independence, did anyone join hands like this before the British?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the rhetorical question implying subservience to the British, indicated by "इंग्रजांच्या पुढे हात जोडो" (ingrajanchya pudhe haat jodo - joining hands before the British), which carries a connotation of weakness and historical oppression.

Text: महाराष्ट्रच काय पूर्ण देश तुम्हाला स्वीकारणार नाही
translated_text: Maharashtra alone, the entire country won't accept you.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "स्वीकारणार नाही" (swikarnar nahi), which translates to "won't accept," indicating rejection and contributing to a negative overall feeling.

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरे म्हणले नाऱ्याच उठत नाही...... आता कळलं की पोरं पण दुसऱ्याचे आहेत
translated_text: Balasaheb Thackeray said that the slogans are not raised...... Now I know that the children also belong to someone else.
Justification: The phrase "पोरं पण दुसऱ्याचे आहेत" (pora pan dusryache aahet - children also belong to someone else) implies doubt and potential infidelity, contributing to the negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase suggests distrust and illegitimacy.

Text: आणि येडे अन्धभक्त... दुसऱ्याच्या दरात जबरदस्तीने भजन गात बसतात . ....
translated_text: And these blind devotees... forcefully sing hymns at someone else's expense. ....
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "येडे अन्धभक्त" (yede andhabhakt), which translates to "blind devotees" and carries a derogatory connotation. The word "येडे" (yede) specifically contributes to the negative sentiment, implying foolishness or idiocy.

Text: तील तरूणांनी फक्त भोंगेच लावायचे का?
translated_text: Should young people only blow horns?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the rhetorical question implying that the youth are engaging in trivial activities ("फक्त भोंगेच लावायचे का?"), rather than contributing meaningfully. This suggests disappointment or disapproval.

Text: अरे बीन च्या विमाना तुझी लायकी आहे का असामान्य माणसावर बोलायची?
translated_text: Hey Bean's plane, do you have the right to talk about an extraordinary person?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "बीन च्या विमाना तुझी लायकी आहे का" (Bean's plane, do you have the right?), which is sarcastic and belittling. This indicates a lack of respect and a negative attitude.

Text: आज या राणेला केंद्रीय मंत्री बनवण्याची नामुष्की आली फसणवीस वर  लाचारी
translated_text: Today, the embarrassment of making this Rane a Union Minister has come upon Fasnavis, helplessness on his part.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi word "नामुष्की" (namushki), which translates to "embarrassment" or "disgrace." It implies an undesirable and negative situation.

Text: आणि तुम्ही ज्या मार्गाने जात आहेत तो लाचारी चा किशोर महामार्ग आहे.
translated_text: And the path you are taking is the juvenile highway of helplessness.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "लाचारी चा किशोर महामार्ग" (lachari cha kishor mahamarg), which translates to "juvenile highway of helplessness." This phrase implies a path characterized by subservience and lack of power, conveying a negative evaluation.

Text: लटके वहिनीनी नोकरी वाचवली अभिनंदन... प्रमोद सावंत आता बळीचा पेंग्विन... जय कामाख्या देवी
translated_text: Congratulations to the hanging sister-in-law who saved her job... Pramod Sawant is now the victim's penguin... Hail Kamakhya Devi
Justification: "बळीचा पेंग्विन" (victim's penguin) implies Pramod Sawant is a scapegoat, carrying a negative connotation despite the earlier congratulatory tone, overriding the positive aspects and leading to an overall negative sentiment.

Text: आज की ताजा खबर केसरकरांचे बोल भक्तांना मीरच्या झोंबल्या आणि ते लागलें बोंबल्या.
translated_text: Today's latest news: Kesarkar's words were a source of joy to the devotees and they were immediately shocked.
Justification: The phrase "मीरच्या झोंबल्या आणि ते लागलें बोंबल्या" suggests a sudden negative reaction and shock, with "झोंबल्या" indicating a sharp, stinging sensation/shock, and "लागलें बोंबल्या" implying an outburst or loud complaint due to that shock. This sudden shift from presumed joy to shocked complaint implies negativity and surprise.

Text: ते भिकार भाडीपा वालेकुठे आहेत रे त्यांना थोड लातूर च पाणी दाखवायचं आहे
translated_text: Where are those beggars, Bhadipa Wale? They want to show some water from Latur.
Justification: The phrase "भिकार भाडीपा वाले" (bhikar bhadipa wale - beggar Bhadipa people) is derogatory and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: तू काय लावारीस भक्तीनं आहे
translated_text: What are you asking for out of devotion?
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "लावारीस" (lavaris), meaning ownerless/unfounded, implies a lack of reason or basis for the devotion, thus questioning its validity in a dismissive way. This casts a negative light on the action described.

Text: शहरातील रस्ते अत्यंत खराब आहे
translated_text: The roads in the city are very bad.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "खराब" (kharab), meaning "bad" or "damaged," which expresses a negative quality of the roads.

Text: कबुतरे सोडूनच पाकिस्तान बनवला होता.
translated_text: Pakistan was created by abandoning pigeons.
Justification: "सोडूनच" (sodunach) implying abandonment or leaving behind, carries a negative connotation that contributes to the negative sentiment (-1), even if the overall emotion is neutral as it suggests a loss or sacrifice in the creation of Pakistan.

Text: हे शाळा पण विकून खातील
translated_text: They will sell this school too.
Justification: The phrase "विकून खातील" (vikun khatil), meaning "will sell and eat/consume," implies a destructive or exploitative action, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: तुमचा इतिहास माहित आहे लोकाना, तुम्ही भारत स्वतंत्र व्हच्या विरोधात होते
translated_text: People know your history, you were against India becoming independent.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "भारतात स्वतंत्र व्हच्या विरोधात होते" (bharatat swatantra vhyaa virodhat hote), meaning "were against India becoming independent," which expresses opposition to a widely valued historical event, thus conveying a negative opinion.

Text: काल पासून हा दुसरा घावलाय
translated_text: This is the second injury since yesterday.
Justification: "घावलाय" (ghavalay), meaning "injury," indicates a negative situation, leading to a negative sentiment even if the emotion is neutral.

Text: आला शिव्या खायला
translated_text: Came to get scolded.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "शिव्या खायला" (shivya khayla), which translates to "to get scolded" and implies an unpleasant and unwanted experience.

Text: अस केस मुंडण करून जाव लागणार त्यांच्या चमच्याना...
translated_text: They'll have to shave their hair off...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "अस केस मुंडण करून जाव लागणार," which implies a forced and undesirable act, indicating negativity.

Text: गजा भाऊ तुला प्रत्येक विषयात नाक खुपसला पाहिजे का ?
translated_text: Brother Gaja, do you have to stick your nose into every subject?
Justification: The phrase "नाक खुपसला पाहिजे का?" (naak khupsala pahije ka?) which translates to "do you have to stick your nose into" implies unwanted interference and is thus responsible for the negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही गददारांचे वारसदारबाप पण गद्दार आणि तू पण
translated_text: You are the heirs of traitors, but you are also traitors, and you too
Justification: The phrase "गददारांचे वारसदार" (gad'darānche vārasdār), meaning "heirs of traitors," strongly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes disgust by associating the subject with betrayal and treachery. Furthermore, calling someone "गद्दार" (gad'dar) directly reinforces the disgust and negativity.

Text: लवकरच या तथाकथित महाशक्ती म्हणवून घेणाऱ्यांना उतरती कळा लागणार हे निश्चित..
translated_text: It is certain that soon these so-called superpowers will have to face a setback.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "उतरती कळा लागणार" (utarti kala lagnar), which translates to "will face a setback" or "will have a decline," indicating a negative future outcome for the subject. The phrase "तथाकथित" (tathakathit) "so-called" add to the negative sentiment .

Text: जपान साठी सहानभुती आणि अमेरिका साठी
translated_text: Sympathy for Japan and for America
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the incomplete and abruptly ending sentence "अमेरिका साठी" which, in this context, implies a missing negative element compared to the expression of sympathy for Japan. While not explicitly negative, the lack of a comparable expression for America following the expression of sympathy for Japan creates a negative implication or bias.

Text: तुम्ही काय लिहिले मला काही दिसतं नाही....गेली का तुमच्या एसी ची लाईट...
translated_text: I can't see what you wrote....did your AC light go out...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "काही दिसतं नाही" (kahi disat nahi), meaning "can't see anything," indicating frustration or problem causing a negative experience.

Text: कोणी गेल का.? असे काय चेहरे झालेत?
translated_text: Did anyone go? What kind of faces did they have?
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "असे काय चेहरे झालेत?", which implies a negative reaction to someone's departure or a concerning situation; a literally "what kind of faces are you making?" conveying disapproval or worry.

Text: भक्त ला हा शेनक्या त्रास देतोय शाळा घेतली पाहिजे
translated_text: This skunk is bothering the devotee, he should go to school.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the word "शेनक्या" (shenkya), which is a derogatory term for "skunk". The sentence implies the subject is undesirable and contemptible.

Text: फार चुकीचे काम करत आहेत , हि खोके मंडळी .
translated_text: These idiots are doing something very wrong.
Justification: "फार चुकीचे" (far chukiche), meaning "very wrong" coupled with "खोके मंडळी" (khoke mandali), which translates to "idiots" and implies corruption, strongly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes anger.

Text: हा पक्षाचा कार्यक्रम आहे की विरोधातील पक्षनेत्यांचा?
translated_text: Is this the party's program or that of the opposition party leaders?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the question implying doubt and potential conflict or negativity associated with "विरोधातील पक्षनेत्यांचा?" (virodhatil pakshanetancha? - of the opposition party leaders?). It suggests a possible ulterior motive or negative influence from the opposition.

Text: रखडलेल्या आणि होऊ घातलेली शिक्षक यात असेल का?
translated_text: Will there be a teacher who is stuck and about to become one?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "रखडलेल्या" (rakhadlelya), meaning "stuck" or "delayed," implying a negative state or situation.

Text: रस्त्यावरील दिवे बंद असल्यानं नागरिकांच्या मनात अपघातासह चोरांचीही भीती वाढली आहे.
translated_text: The lack of street lights has increased citizens' fear of accidents and thieves.
Justification: "भीती वाढली आहे" (bhiti vadhali aahe - fear has increased) indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses a rise in fear among citizens.

Text: बाहेर एकनाथ शिंदे आत दुसरा शिंदे,ते हि कन्फर्म नाही..खोटी पत्रकारिता
translated_text: Eknath Shinde outside, another Shinde inside, that is not confirmed..false journalism
Justification: The phrase "खोटी पत्रकारिता" (khoti patrakarita - false journalism) indicates a negative sentiment due to the accusation of falsehood.

Text: कोन हे ये विदेशी भिखारी
translated_text: Come here foreign beggars
Justification: "भिखारी" (bhikari - beggars) is a derogatory term, indicating a negative sentiment. While other elements contribute to the negative connotation, this term is the most direct indicator of a negative sentiment in the sentence.

Text: हा रेड्याचा अपमान होईल!
translated_text: This would be an insult to Redya!
Justification: The sentiment is negative and emotion is anger because the word "अपमान" (apman) translates to "insult" which signifies a disrespectful and offensive act.

Text: तुम्ही तेंचा सण आला की बोलायच नाही ,पिंडाला धक्का लागतो
translated_text: You don't even talk about their festival, it's a shock to the body.
Justification: The phrase "पिंडाला धक्का लागतो" (pindala dhakka lagto), meaning "it's a shock to the body," indicates disgust and negativity, as it suggests something extremely unpleasant or unacceptable is occurring.

Text: काही ही हाऊ दे मस्त विरोधी पक्षात बसवलं तुम्हाला
translated_text: How dare you be put in the opposition party?
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the phrase "काही ही हाऊ दे", which expresses strong disapproval and outrage at the situation.

Text: तुमची आई बाबा सर्व मोदी साहेब आहेत खर्या आईचे दुःख तुम्हाला काय समजणार.
translated_text: Your mother and father are all Modi Saheb, how can you understand the pain of a real mother?
Justification: The phrase "खर्या आईचे दुःख तुम्हाला काय समजणार" (kharya aaiche dukh tumhala kay samajnar), meaning "how can you understand the pain of a real mother?", expresses sadness and implies a lack of empathy, thus driving the negative sentiment. The word "दुःख" (dukh), meaning "pain," is a key indicator of this emotion and sentiment.

Text: नेहमीप्रमाणे सायकलवर शाळेत निघाला पण ती सकाळ शेवटची ठरली, औरंगाबादेतील हृदयद्रावक घटना
translated_text: I went to school on my bicycle as usual, but that morning turned out to be my last, a heartbreaking incident in Aurangabad
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are driven by the phrase "हृदयद्रावक घटना" (hridayadravak ghatna), meaning "heartbreaking incident".

Text: हा आणि आयकर घाबरून कमलाबाई मांडीवर बसणारा याला कोणी विचारणार नाही
translated_text: No one will question this and the one who sits on Kamalabai's lap out of fear of income tax.
Justification: The phrase "आयकर घाबरून कमलाबाई मांडीवर बसणारा" (the one who sits on Kamalabai's lap out of fear of income tax) expresses a deep sense of disgust due to its implication of subservience, opportunism, and moral bankruptcy driven by fear, thus indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: विकास भाऊ अवघड आहे याचं राजसाहेब त्या ठिकाणी असते तर परिस्थिती वेगळी असती
translated_text: Vikas Bhau is difficult, if Rajsaheb was there, the situation would have been different.
Justification: The phrase "अवघड आहे" (avadgad aahe) meaning "is difficult" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: मला तर अजिबात नाही आवडणार हा कॅप्टन .......
translated_text: I don't like this captain at all...
Justification: The phrase "अजिबात नाही आवडणार" (ajibat nahi aavdnar), meaning "not like at all", expresses strong dislike, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: भाजपच्या शहराध्यक्षाने स्वत:वर गोळी झाडून केली आत्महत्या, बीड हादरलं
translated_text: BJP city president commits suicide by shooting himself, Beed shaken
Justification: "हादरलं" (hadarle) which means "shaken" or "shocked" implies a negative sentiment and evokes fear due to the shocking and tragic nature of the event (suicide).

Text: देशमुखांचा खरा चेहरा समोर आला देशमुखांनीच दिले होते वाझेला खंडणीचे टार्गेट..
translated_text: Deshmukh's true face was revealed. It was Deshmukh who had given Vaze the target for extortion.
Justification: "खरा चेहरा समोर आला" (true face revealed) indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests deception and exposure of wrongdoing.

Text: उलटा बाण' हे चिन्ह चांगले राहील....अगदी शोभून दिसेल साहेबांना
translated_text: The 'upside down arrow' symbol would be good...it would look very nice on you sir.
Justification: The phrase "अगदी शोभून दिसेल" (agdi shobhun disel - would look very nice) implies sarcasm when directed at someone referred to as "साहेबांना" (Sahebanna - sir), indicating negativity because it's likely insincere flattery.

Text: दांडिया हा दांडिया असतो मराठी गुजराती नसतो … उगाच दोन समाजात फुट पाडु नका .
translated_text: A Dandiya is a Dandiya, not a Marathi or Gujarati... Don't just create a divide between two communities.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "फुट पाडु नका" (phut paadu naka), which translates to "don't create a divide," indicating disapproval and a negative stance against actions that could cause division.

Text: अजून थोडे दिवस राहिला तर त्याची इज्जत कमी होईल....पाहुण्यांनी परत जायचं असत
translated_text: If he stayed for a few more days, his dignity would be diminished....the guests would have to go back.
Justification: "इज्जत कमी होईल" (izzat kami hoil - dignity would be diminished) suggests a negative impact on someone's reputation, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: हा गहन प्रश्न आहे भाऊ
translated_text: This is a serious question, brother.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "गहन" (gahan), which translates to "serious" or "profound." While not inherently negative, in this context, it suggests a problem that is difficult or troubling, thus contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: ह्यांना काहीच कळत नाही का की कोणाचं नाव कधी, कुठे आणि कशासाठी घ्यावं...
translated_text: Don't they know anything about when, where and why to take someone's name...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "काहीच कळत नाही का" (kahich kalat nahi ka), which expresses a lack of understanding and implies criticism or frustration.

Text: अरे भास्कर तोंडातून गटार उगवयलाच ठेवलंय का तुला लाचारांच्या सेनेत
translated_text: Oh Bhaskar, why are you still in the army of the helpless?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "तोंडातून गटार उगवयलाच ठेवलंय का" (tondatun gatar ugvayalch thevlay ka), which translates to "why do you have a gutter growing in your mouth?". This is a highly offensive and derogatory expression, directly contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: ला सपोर्ट करणे हे भिकारपणाचे लक्षण आहे. सामाजिक विषमता वाढतच जाते.
translated_text: Supporting is a sign of begging. Social inequality continues to increase.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "भिकारपणाचे" (bhikarpānāche), meaning "begging" or "worthless," which expresses a negative judgment.

Text: थोडक्यात हॅशटॅग सारखं हे वाक्य पण मनसे वाल्यांनी राष्ट्रवादी वाल्यांचंच उचललं.
translated_text: In short, this phrase, like a hashtag, was picked up by MNS supporters from the Nationalist Party.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "उचललं" (uchalala), meaning "picked up/stolen," which implies a lack of originality and a potentially underhanded tactic, contributing to a negative perception.

Text: आपल्याला आवडणारी समोर असून काही बोलता न येणे खूप त्रासदायक असते..
translated_text: It's very annoying to be in front of someone you like and not be able to say anything.
Justification: "त्रासदायक" (trasdayak), meaning annoying or troublesome, clearly indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the feeling of disgust.

Text: गुडघ्याला बाशिंग बांधून तयार असताना अशी वक्तव्य करणे योग्य नाही.
translated_text: It is not appropriate to make such a statement while you are ready with a bashing tied to your knee.
Justification: The phrase "गुडघ्याला बाशिंग बांधून तयार असताना" (ready with a bashing tied to your knee) implies someone being overly eager or impatient, and the criticism of this eagerness ("अशी वक्तव्य करणे योग्य नाही" - not appropriate to make such a statement) evokes a negative sentiment.

Text: हे बरोबर नाही अध्यक्ष मोहदय
translated_text: This is not right, President Mohday.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the phrase "बरोबर नाही" (barobar nahi), which translates to "not right" or "incorrect". This expresses disapproval and disagreement.

Text: तुझ्या गावात पण मत पडत नसतील तु त्याला गद्दार बोलतो
translated_text: Even if you don't vote in your village, you still call him a traitor.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning "traitor," which expresses strong disapproval and disdain.

Text: अहो आधी बघा व्हिडिओस गिरनार,आणि बाकीचे पण.मग धन्यवाद करा.
translated_text: Hey, first watch the video Girnar, and then the rest. Then thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the implied demand or expectation in "आधी बघा" (aadhi bagha - first watch), which sounds like a command rather than a polite request, and "मग धन्यवाद करा" (mag dhanyavad kara - then thank you), which implies the speaker is expecting thanks and may be sarcastic.

Text: ही लहान मुलगी काय बोलली, काही समजत नाही आहे. ? चित्रफित बनवा
translated_text: I don't understand what this little girl said. ? Make a video.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "काही समजत नाही आहे" (kahi samajhat nahi aahe), meaning "I don't understand," indicating confusion and a lack of comprehension, leading to a negative experience.

Text: ह्यांच्या हिंदुत्वाची व्याख्या गोबर भक्तांसारखीच आहे.
translated_text: Their definition of Hinduism is the same as that of cow dung devotees.
Justification: "गोबर भक्तांसारखीच" (gobar bhaktansarkhich - like cow dung devotees) is a derogatory term used to insult and belittle, thus indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांना मान हलविण्याशिवाय काही येत नाही!
translated_text: They can't help but shake their heads!
Justification: The negative sentiment and fear are driven by "मान हलविण्याशिवाय काही येत नाही!", which implies resignation and helplessness, suggesting a fearful and negative situation where the only response is shaking one's head.

Text: नाही जात आज तो
translated_text: He is not going today.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the word "नाही" (nahi), meaning "no" or "not", indicating a negation of action.

Text: इतका खोटारडा रडका आणि बेशरम नेता पुन्हा होणे नाही.
translated_text: Such a false, shameless leader will never happen again.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the words "खोटारडा" (khotarda - false/liar), "रडका" (radka - whiny) and "बेशरम" (besharam - shameless) which express strong disapproval and moral outrage.

Text: व्हय की, तरच आपले ,पत्रकार परिषद करून करून थकले
translated_text: Maybe, only then, you will be tired of holding press conferences.
Justification: "थकले" (thakale), meaning "tired," indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests weariness or exhaustion.

Text: जेजे मध्ये असतांना मेंदूवर उपचार करायला पाहिजे होते.
translated_text: While in JJ, I needed to have brain treatment.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "पाहिजे होते" (pahije hote), indicating a past regret or unfulfilled need, suggesting something negative happened or was missed.

Text: बरोबर आहे सगळ चित्रविचित्र आहे
translated_text: That's right, everything is a joke.
Justification: "चित्रविचित्र" (chitravichitra), meaning "a joke," carries a negative connotation, indicating something is absurd and not to be taken seriously, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: ते   हजारांनी पराभव होणार आहे
translated_text: They are going to be defeated by the thousands.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment (-1) because of the word "पराभव" (parabhav), which means "defeat."

Text: बकरी ईद च्या वेळेस तोंडात बोळा कोबला होता का
translated_text: Did you have a mouthful of snot during Bakri Eid?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "तोंडात बोळा कोबला होता का" (tondat bola kobla hota ka), which is a crude and insulting question implying someone was silent or restrained during Bakri Eid, carrying a negative connotation.

Text: याचं तोंड पाहुशी वाटत नाही
translated_text: I don't want to see this face.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "तोंड पाहुशी वाटत नाही" (tond pahushi vaatat nahi), which expresses a strong aversion to seeing someone's face, implying dislike and repugnance.

Text: शासकीय कार्यालय म्हणजे नेत्यांच्या कार्यकर्त्यांची दुकाने बनलेत का?
translated_text: Have government offices become shops for leaders' workers?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "नेत्यांच्या कार्यकर्त्यांची दुकाने बनलेत" (netyanchya karyakartyanchi dukane banlet), which translates to "become shops for leaders' workers." This implies corruption and misuse of government offices for personal gain, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: ह्याचे ट्विट आणि विचार अत्यंत दळभद्री आहेत
translated_text: His tweets and thoughts are very disturbing.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi word "दळभद्री" (dalbhadri), which translates to "disturbing" or "disgusting," thus evoking disgust.

Text: मतं पण तिकडूनच मागवा कारण इथे आता कुत्रं पण विचारत नाही.
translated_text: Ask for opinions from there because even dogs don't ask here anymore.
Justification: The phrase "कुत्रं पण विचारत नाही" (even dogs don't ask) implies a complete lack of interest or value, resulting in a negative sentiment.

Text: ये अनपड थोड हे वाचा रे राहुल चा चेंल्यानो
translated_text: Come on, read this, you Rahul's followers.
Justification: The phrase "अनपड थोड" (anpad thod), meaning "illiterate fools," indicates a negative sentiment due to its derogatory nature.

Text: सुप्रसिद्ध अभिनेते आणि ज्येष्ठ रंगकर्मी प्रदीप पटवर्धन ह्यांचे दुःखद निधन ! भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: Sad demise of renowned actor and veteran theatre artist Pradeep Patwardhan! Heartfelt tributes
Justification: The phrase "दुःखद निधन" (dukkhad nidhan), meaning "sad demise," directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: कोण स्वामीनारायण ? महाराष्ट्रात खऱ्या देवांची पुजा होते. हे स्वामीनारायण कोण ??
translated_text: Who is Swaminarayan? True gods are worshipped in Maharashtra. Who is this Swaminarayan??
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrases "कोण स्वामीनारायण ?" and "हे स्वामीनारायण कोण ??", which express disbelief and dismissal towards Swaminarayan in the context of worshipping "खऱ्या देवांची" (true gods) in Maharashtra, implying Swaminarayan is not a "true god."

Text: आलिया-रणबीरमध्ये का पडली वादाची ठिणगी? समोर आलं कारण
translated_text: Why did the controversy between Alia and Ranbir spark? The reason has come to light
Justification: The phrase "वादाची ठिणगी" (vaadaachi thhingi), meaning "spark of controversy," indicates a negative sentiment. Although not deeply emotional, it suggests a conflict, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: घंटा, मुरजी पडणार हे नक्की झाल्यावर भाजपाने माघार घेतली
translated_text: BJP withdrew after it became clear that Ghanta and Murji would fall
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "मुरजी पडणार", which implies a negative outcome (defeat/failure) for Ghanta and Murji.

Text: यांना पक्ष जोडता येईना हे भारत जोडायला निघालेत
translated_text: They cannot unite the party, they are going to unite India.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the sarcastic remark "पक्ष जोडता येईना हे भारत जोडायला निघालेत" implying their inability to handle a smaller task (uniting the party) makes their ambition to unite India seem unrealistic and hypocritical. The phrase highlights their incompetence with a touch of cynicism.

Text: योगीची नक्कल ईकडे चालू आहे, परंतु ही शिवरायांची भूमी आहे,
translated_text: Yogi imitation is going on here, but this is the land of Shivaji,
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "योगीची नक्कल" (Yogichi nakal), meaning "Yogi imitation," implying a disapproval of emulating Yogi Adityanath's style, suggesting it's inappropriate for Shivaji's land. The phrase evokes a sense of disapproval toward the current events.

Text: हा मर्हाठी मानसाचा अपमान हाय… मुंबईला महाराष्ट्रापासून तोडन्याचा डाव हाय…
translated_text: This is an insult to the Maratha spirit… This is a plot to separate Mumbai from Maharashtra…
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the word "अपमान" (apman), which translates directly to "insult." This signifies a feeling of disrespect and offense, leading to the negative sentiment and feeling of disgust.

Text: अतिशय बेजबाबदार निर्णय चालू आहेत ,परीक्षेला काय गरबा खेळू का बेअकलांनो
translated_text: Very irresponsible decisions are being made, why should we play Garba in the exam, you idiots?
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "बेजबाबदार निर्णय चालू आहेत" (irresponsible decisions are being made) which expresses disapproval and the insulting term "बेअकलांनो" (you idiots) which directly conveys anger.

Text: तुला लवड्या त्या नेपाळ्याचा पुळका कशाला... हे म्हणजे लगीन लोकांचं नाचतय येड्या भोकाच...
translated_text: Why do you love that Nepali girl... This is the dance of married people...
Justification: The phrase "लवड्या" (lavdya), a vulgar and derogatory term, contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: आरोग्य केंद्राची अवस्था पिसाळल्यागत झाली आहे त्याच काय.......
translated_text: The health center is in a dilapidated condition....
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "पिसाळल्यागत" (pisalyagat), meaning dilapidated or in a terrible state.

Text: फक्त भांडण सोडवायला आहे ती, दिसतच नाही राव.
translated_text: It's just to resolve the conflict, doesn't it seem like it, Rao?
Justification: The phrase "दिसतच नाही राव" (disatach nahi Rao), meaning "doesn't seem like it, Rao," expresses doubt and a lack of conviction, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: पण हॅक झालं असं बोलत होती
translated_text: But they were saying it was hacked.
Justification: "हॅक झालं" (hacked) indicates a negative event, and in this context, expressed with surprise due to the use of "पण" (but) and the reporting nature of the sentence. Therefore, the overall sentiment is negative with the emotion of surprise.

Text: लूटमार करून केला दुचाकीस्वाराचा खून;   जण गंभीर जखमी
translated_text: Biker murdered after robbery; one seriously injured
Justification: "खून" (murder) indicates a violent act resulting in death, contributing to a negative sentiment and sadness.

Text: निवडणुक आयोग हे यांच्या हातचे बाहुले असल्यासारखे वागतात
translated_text: The Election Commission is acting as if it were their puppet.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "हातचे बाहुले असल्यासारखे वागतात" (hatache bahule aslyasarkhe vagatat), which implies the Election Commission is a puppet controlled by someone else, indicating a lack of independence and therefore a negative connotation.

Text: चोरी केली ती पकडली गेलीय म्हणून आत। आहेत तुमचे साहेब ...
translated_text: She was caught stealing, so she's inside. Your boss is here...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "चोरी केली" (chori keli), which means "she committed theft," implying a negative action and legal consequence.

Text: बाळासाहेबांना अधी माहीत होते कमळी नालायक आहे म्हनून
translated_text: Balasaheb knew Kamali was worthless.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "नालायक" (nalayak), which translates to "worthless" or "incompetent," expressing a negative judgment about Kamali.

Text: याचा बारामती मालक स्वतः सडक्या कांद्याचा बागयतदार आहे
translated_text: Its Baramati owner is himself a gardener of dried onions.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because of the word "सडक्या" (sadkya), which means "rotten" or "dried", indicating the onions are of poor quality and thus reflects negatively on the owner. While the emotion is neutral, the poor quality of the product suggests incompetence.

Text: पुण्यातल्या पुण्यात असूनही लोक एकमेकांना भेटत नाहीत
translated_text: Even though they are in Pune, people don't meet each other.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "भेटत नाहीत" (bhetat nahit), which means "do not meet" or "don't see each other," indicating a lack of social connection and a sense of isolation despite proximity.

Text: शेंडी जानवे पुरातन काळापासून काही ही खात आले आहे... अगदी माती सुद्धा.
translated_text: The Shendi Janwe has been eating anything since ancient times... even soil.
Justification: The phrase "काही ही खात आले आहे... अगदी माती सुद्धा" ("eating anything... even soil") implies a negative sentiment because it suggests that the subject is unhygienic, undiscerning, and possibly disgusting, leading to a negative feeling.

Text: आज एक अकाउंट सस्पेंड झालं तर इतर भुंकणारे एकदम सभ्य भाषेत बोलायला लागले.
translated_text: Today, when one account was suspended, the other barkers started speaking in a very civilized manner.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "भुंकणारे" (bhunknare), which translates to "barkers." This term is derogatory and implies that the individuals being referred to are loud, aggressive, and uncivilized.

Text: ढाल आणि तलवार पकडायला निष्ठावंतांचा हात लागतो तुमच्या सारख्या गद्दारांचा नाही....
translated_text: It takes the hands of the loyal to hold the shield and sword, not traitors like you...
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "गद्दारांचा" (gaddarancha), which translates to "traitors". This term carries a strong negative connotation and implies betrayal, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: हसणारे चु आहेत का हरामखोर
translated_text: Are the laughing ones bastards?
Justification: The phrase "हरामखोर" (harāmkhōr) translates to "bastard" and is a highly offensive term used to express anger and contempt, directly indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्याबद्दल आस्था नाहीरे, लोकं खिल्ली उडवत आहेत त्यांची
translated_text: There is no interest in them, people are making fun of them.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "खिल्ली उडवत आहेत" (khilli udavat aahet), which means "making fun of," indicating a negative action towards the subject.

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरे.. बाळासाहेब नाही.....× चावट बाळासाहेब......?
translated_text: Balasaheb Thackeray.. not Balasaheb.....× Chavat Balasaheb......?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "चावट" (Chavat), which translates to "vulgar" or "obscene". This word carries a strong negative connotation and indicates disapproval. The surprise emotion arises from the unexpected use of such a derogatory term to describe Balasaheb Thackeray.

Text: महागाई वाढत नाही आहे, माझा पगार कमी होत चालला आहे..
translated_text: Inflation is not increasing, my salary is decreasing.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment (-1) due to the phrase "माझा पगार कमी होत चालला आहे" (majha pagar kami hot chala aahe), which translates to "my salary is decreasing." This indicates a financial hardship and dissatisfaction, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: हो मानुस मेला की मातिच होतो आपली ही मातीच होनार
translated_text: Yes, when a person dies, the earth becomes his own.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "मेला की मातिच होतो" (mela ki matich hoto) which translates to "dies and becomes dust," implying death and a return to nothingness, contributing to a negative feeling despite the neutral emotion.

Text: अजिबात नाही
translated_text: Not at all.
Justification: The phrase "अजिबात नाही" (ajibat nahi) directly translates to "not at all" or "absolutely not", which expresses a strong negation, hence the negative sentiment. The phrase lacks any emotional cues, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: आज तेवढा संयम व समर्पण नाही हे कटु सत्य
translated_text: The bitter truth is that there is not that much patience and dedication today.
Justification: "कटु सत्य" (katu satya - bitter truth) indicates negativity, contributing to the overall negative sentiment and sadness emotion due to the inherent unpleasantness associated with facing a difficult or undesirable reality.

Text: खोट आहे हे तिच्या मिरच्या झोंबत नाही झन्नन्नन्नन्न करतात
translated_text: This is a lie, it's not her chili sauce, they're making a fuss.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "खोट आहे" (khot aahe), which translates to "This is a lie". While the rest of the sentence might seem expressive, the direct accusation of lying establishes the negative sentiment.

Text: शेठ, कुठं अडकून पडला होता.
translated_text: Seth, where was he stuck?
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because of the phrase "अडकून पडला होता" (adkun padla hota), which implies being stuck or held up in an unwanted situation, conveying a sense of trouble or delay.

Text: .... हा आमच्या मतदारसंघातला गद्दार आहे
translated_text: .... This is a traitor in our constituency.
Justification: The word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning traitor, clearly indicates a negative sentiment and elicits disgust.

Text: नरेश साहेब जी आपण पदे भोगली आहेत ना ती निष्ठवंत कार्यकर्त्यांचा जीवावर
translated_text: Naresh Saheb, the positions you have held are not at the expense of the lives of loyal workers.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) stems from the phrase "निष्ठवंत कार्यकर्त्यांचा जीवावर" (nishtavant karyakartyancha jivavar), meaning "at the expense of the lives of loyal workers," implying exploitation or unfair treatment, even when negated with "ना" (na) later. This still hints at a potential negative impact on loyal workers, even if it is claimed not to have happened.

Text: त्या नावाखाली भ्रष्टाचार होत असेल तर ते बंद करावे
translated_text: If corruption is happening under that name, it should be stopped.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the phrase "भ्रष्टाचार होत असेल" (bhrashtachar hot asel) which translates to "corruption is happening". This indicates a negative situation and elicits a feeling of disgust.

Text: राणेंची जीभ घसरली पण दानवे, भास्कर जाधव यांच आक्रमक भाषण? वाह रे चाय बिस्कुट पत्रकार!
translated_text: Rane's tongue slipped, but Danve, Bhaskar Jadhav's aggressive speech? Wow, tea biscuit journalists!
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the sarcastic use of "वाह रे चाय बिस्कुट पत्रकार!" (Vah re chai biscuit patrakar!), meaning "Wow, tea biscuit journalists!", which implies that the journalists are biased and easily influenced. The phrase expresses strong disapproval and disdain.

Text: टोमणे मारण्यापूर्वी कोणी विचार करत नाही, बेरोजगारांची अवस्था कोणी विचारत नाही.
translated_text: No one thinks before taunting, no one asks about the plight of the unemployed.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "टोमणे मारण्यापूर्वी" (tomane maranya purvi), which translates to "before taunting." Taunting implies negativity and a lack of consideration for others, contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: गप रे येड्या तुझ्या काकांना सांग आता,सत्तेविना जगावं लागेल.
translated_text: Gosh, tell your uncle now that you will have to live without power.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "सत्तेविना जगावं लागेल" (sattevina jagava lageel), which translates to "you will have to live without power," implying a loss of authority or control, leading to a feeling of sadness and powerlessness.

Text: सचिन जी,ही सगळी कळसूत्री बाहुली आहेत , कोणाची हे सांगायलाच नको ..!
translated_text: Sachin ji, all these are puppets, no need to tell whose they are..!
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "कळसूत्री बाहुली" (kalasutri bahuli), meaning "puppets," which implies manipulation and lack of autonomy, leading to a negative connotation despite the user experiencing joy.

Text: “अंधेरी पोटनिवडणुकीतून माघार घेणे, हे भाजपला उशीरा सुचलेले शहाणपण”
translated_text: "Withdrawing from the Andheri by-election is a belated wisdom for the BJP"
Justification: The phrase "उशीरा सुचलेले शहाणपण" (ushira suchlele shahanpan - belated wisdom) indicates a negative sentiment, implying criticism for acting late, even if correctly.

Text: खडकवासला, पंढरपूर, कोल्हापूर, देगलूर पोटनिवडणुकात कुठे गेली होती तुमची महान संस्कृती??
translated_text: Where did your great culture go in the Khadakwasla, Pandharpur, Kolhapur, Degalur by-elections??
Justification: The phrase "कुठे गेली होती तुमची महान संस्कृती??" (kuthe geli hoti tumchi mahan sanskruti?? - Where did your great culture go??) expresses a negative sentiment due to the sarcastic and accusatory tone suggesting hypocrisy and a lack of cultural values.

Text: तुम्ही माफी मागायला लावायचा होत त्याला
translated_text: You wanted to make him apologize.
Justification: The phrase "माफी मागायला लावायचा" (mafi magayla lavayacha) implying forcing someone to apologize, carries a negative connotation and contributes to the negative sentiment (-1), even in a neutral emotion context because it suggests coercion or an undesirable action being imposed on someone.

Text: हो तेवढेच जेवढा फेकू पंतप्रधान म्हणून यशस्वी आहे
translated_text: Yes, as successful as Feku is as Prime Minister.
Justification: The sentence expresses negative sentiment (-1) due to the use of the word "फेकू" (Feku), which is a derogatory term used to mock someone perceived as a liar or boastful, particularly Prime Minister.

Text: पुढील दहा वर्षे तु कोणत्या पक्षात राहशील हे तुला तरी माहीत आहे का !
translated_text: Do you even know which party you will be in for the next ten years?
Justification: The sentence implies uncertainty and potential political instability, expressed through the phrase "पुढील दहा वर्षे तु कोणत्या पक्षात राहशील हे तुला तरी माहीत आहे का !", questioning the person's future commitment and lacking stability which contributes to a negative sentiment.

Text: "आणि ह्या आहेत आपल्या देशाच्या अर्थमंत्री...
translated_text: "And this is the Finance Minister of our country...
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the lack of any positive or celebratory words. The phrase "आणि ह्या आहेत आपल्या देशाच्या अर्थमंत्री..." is a neutral statement of fact and does not convey any positive or appreciative attitude. Hence, the absence of positive sentiment leads to a negative classification.

Text: हारणार हे वरीष्ठांनी ओळखलं होतं. कार्यकर्त्यांना कोण सांगणार?
translated_text: The seniors knew they would lose. Who would tell the workers?
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) stems from the phrase "हारणार हे वरीष्ठांनी ओळखलं होतं" which translates to "The seniors knew they would lose," indicating an anticipated negative outcome. The word "हारणार" (haarnar) meaning "will lose" is the primary driver of the negative sentiment.

Text: शिक्षण अक्कल आणि नीतिमान याचा एकमेकांशी काही संबंध नाही ... हे उत्तम उदाहरण...
translated_text: Education, common sense and righteousness have nothing to do with each other... This is a good example...
Justification: The sentence carries a negative sentiment (-1) due to the phrase "काही संबंध नाही" (kahi sambandh nahi), which translates to "have nothing to do with each other," implying a disconnect and thus a negative association.

Text: तुला ब्लॉक नाही का केलं अजून त्यांनी..
translated_text: Why haven't they blocked you yet?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the surprise and implication of a potentially negative relationship suggested by "ब्लॉक नाही का केलं अजून त्यांनी" (block nahi ka kela ajun tyani), which expresses surprise at the lack of a blocking action, implying a hostile or estranged relationship.

Text: अहो काकू का उग बोलून आपली बुद्धिमत्ता दाखवत आहात...
translated_text: Hey aunt, why are you showing off your intelligence by saying that...
Justification: "उग बोलून आपली बुद्धिमत्ता दाखवत आहात" implies unnecessary showing off of intelligence, contributing to a negative sentiment. The sarcasm in "बुद्धिमत्ता दाखवत आहात" (showing off intelligence) specifically indicates a negative connotation.

Text: निवडणूक आली का त्या भाजपा च्या खासदार सारखे काहीही धुहू शकतील हे मंडळ.
translated_text: This board can do anything like BJP MPs when elections come.
Justification: "धुहू शकतील" (dhuhu shaktil - can do anything) implies a negative connotation of desperation and unethical behavior, reflecting a negative sentiment (-1).

Text: अर हे फेकू मॉडेल आहे.
translated_text: This is a fake model.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the word "फेकू" (pheku), which translates to "fake" or "liar," indicating a negative attribute being assigned to the model.

Text: भाजपा पराभव होऊन शिवसेना महत्त्व वाढेल म्हणून ही नाटकं या दोघांची..
translated_text: These two are playing this drama so that the importance of Shiv Sena will increase after BJP is defeated.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "पराभव" (parabhav), which means defeat. This suggests a negative event impacting BJP, leading to the assigned negative sentiment. The overall tone of the sentence suggests a calculated, manipulative scheme, furthering a negative assessment but without a strong specific emotion.

Text: गद्दारी करुन काय हिंदूत्व साघ्य ‌करणार आहात
translated_text: What kind of Hindutva are you going to share by betraying them?
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the word "गद्दारी" (gaddari), which translates to "betrayal" or "treachery." This word evokes strong negative feelings and implies a violation of trust.

Text: पंढरपूर, देगलुर, कोल्हापूर उत्तर या विधानसभेच्या पोटनिवडणुकीत संस्कृती, परंपरा कुठे गेली होती.
translated_text: Where did culture and tradition go in the by-elections to the Pandharpur, Degalur, and Kolhapur North assembly constituencies?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the rhetorical question "कुठे गेली होती" (kuthe geli hoti) - "where did it go?" This phrase implies a critical view and expresses disappointment regarding the perceived absence of culture and tradition in the mentioned elections.

Text: चिन्ह अगदी समर्पक आहे. ज्या पक्षाचे काम भेटले त्याचे डब्बे ओढतो
translated_text: The symbol is very appropriate. I pull the boxes of the party whose work I met.
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "डब्बे ओढतो" (dabbe odhato), which implies blindly following a party without independent thought, suggesting a negative dependency and lack of critical evaluation.

Text: विकला गेलेला मीडिया आणि पत्रकार हेच लोकशाहीचे मुख्य शत्रू आहेत
translated_text: The main enemies of democracy are the sold-out media and journalists.
Justification: "शत्रू" (shatru, meaning enemy) indicates a negative sentiment, as it describes the media and journalists as adversaries.

Text: लक्ष्मी चालते का.... भ्रष्टाचाराच्या चिखलात प्रकटलेली ...
translated_text: Does Lakshmi work.... revealed in the mud of corruption...
Justification: The phrase "भ्रष्टाचाराच्या चिखलात" (bhrashtacharachya chikhalat - in the mud of corruption) evokes a strong sense of disgust and negativity, indicating the negative sentiment.

Text: अरे मग इतर जण बघता कशाला मस्त झोडून काढायचा होता
translated_text: Oh, then why did you want to shake it off so well while others were watching?
Justification: "मस्त झोडून काढायचा होता" implies a forceful and potentially violent action, which, in the context of others watching, evokes surprise and a negative sentiment. "मस्त झोडून काढायचा होता" signifies something beyond just cleaning; the "मस्त" intensifies the forceful action.

Text: ही लोकशाही संविधान क आणि कायद्या द्वारे चालते!तूमच्या पिताश्रींची ढापलेली मातोश्री मालमत्ता नाही निवडणूक
translated_text: This democracy is run by the Constitution and the law! Elections are not the property of your fathers and mothers.
Justification: The phrase "तूमच्या पिताश्रींची ढापलेली मातोश्री मालमत्ता नाही" (tūmchyā pitāshrīnchī dhāpalelī mātōshrī mālatta nāhī) which translates to "not the property of your fathers and mothers" expresses anger and contempt towards the targeted individuals. This directly implies disapproval and hostility, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: शीतल म्हात्रे दुतोंडी आहे , पैसे भेटले की वाजली
translated_text: Sheetal Mhatre is a double-tongued woman, she cries when she gets money.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "दुतोंडी आहे" (dutondi aahe), meaning "double-tongued," which implies dishonesty and deceit.

Text: बावनकुळे सोबत सर्वांचीच फाटली.. निवडून येणार नाही आढावा घेऊन माघार.. जनता सब जाणती है.
translated_text: Everyone has broken up with Bawankule.. He will not be elected and will withdraw after reviewing.. The public knows everything.
Justification: The phrase "सर्वांचीच फाटली" (sarvanchich phatli), meaning "everyone has broken up (with Bawankule)" suggests a negative association and loss of support, contributing to the negative sentiment. This indicates a loss of confidence and faith.

Text: बाई चा आणि अर्थशास्त्राचा काडीचाही संबंध नाही हे परत एकदा सिद्ध होत....
translated_text: It is proven once again that women and economics have no connection whatsoever...
Justification: The phrase "काडीचाही संबंध नाही" (kaadichaahi sambandh naahi), meaning "no connection whatsoever," indicates a strong negative sentiment. The implication of exclusion and belittling contributes to sadness.

Text: मुका मोर्चा विसरली का
translated_text: Did you forget the dumb front?
Justification: "मुका मोर्चा" (muka morcha - dumb/silent front) contributes to the negative sentiment and evokes disgust because it implies a dehumanizing and dismissive attitude towards a group's protest, suggesting their voices were intentionally ignored or suppressed.

Text: तुमचा घरकोंबडा घराबाहेर निघाला असता तर ही वेळ आली नसती भ्रष्टवादी पार्टी
translated_text: If your cock had gone out of the house, this wouldn't be the time for a corrupt party.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the derogatory word "घरकोंबडा" (gharkombada), meaning "stay-at-home cock," used in a pejorative way to imply cowardice and ineffectiveness, coupled with "भ्रष्टवादी पार्टी" (bhrashtavadi party) referring to corrupt party. The phrase indicates severe disapproval.

Text: माझ्याकडे ते पण नाहीये. साधी छत्री पण नाही.  म्हणून जास्त पंचाईत होते.
translated_text: I don't have that either. I don't even have a simple umbrella. So I was more worried.
Justification: The phrase "जास्त पंचाईत होते" (jasta panchaiit hote), meaning "more worried/problematic," indicates a negative sentiment as it describes an undesirable or difficult situation.

Text: जन्मदरिद्री असुयाग्रस्त कृतघ्न कपटी थुकरट नेता म्हणून तुझी नोंद महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकीय इतिहासात होणार
translated_text: You will be recorded in the political history of Maharashtra as a poor, ungrateful, hypocritical, and deceitful leader.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the string of negative descriptors applied to the leader, specifically "दरिद्री असुयाग्रस्त कृतघ्न कपटी थुकरट" (poor, ungrateful, hypocritical, and deceitful).

Text: ताकद पाहिली गोरेगाव पत्रा चाळीतील मराठी परिवार बेघर करून रस्तावर आणले.
translated_text: Seeing the power, the Marathi family in Goregaon Patra Chali was displaced and brought onto the streets.
Justification: The phrase "बेघर करून रस्तावर आणले" (beghar karun rastavar aanle - displaced and brought onto the streets) indicates a negative situation causing disgust, as it describes the act of rendering a family homeless.

Text: गर्वाचे घर खाली..हि म्हण उद्धव ठाकरेंना तंतोतंत लागू पडतेय..
translated_text: The house of pride is down..this saying applies to Uddhav Thackeray exactly..
Justification: The phrase "गर्वाचे घर खाली" (house of pride is down) implies a negative outcome due to arrogance, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: आधीच त्या गल्लीत गर्दी त्यात हे!
translated_text: It's already crowded in that street!
Justification: The phrase "आधीच त्या गल्लीत गर्दी त्यात हे!" implies a pre-existing negative situation (crowded street) worsened by an additional element ("त्यात हे!"). The "त्यात हे!" part, meaning "and this on top of that!", is responsible for the negative sentiment and surprise, as it expresses unexpected aggravation.

Text: कोणता माल मारला म्हणायचा आज......? गुजरात की व्हाया आसाम असो आपल्या काय.....
translated_text: Which goods would you say were killed today......? Whether it is Gujarat or Assam, what is ours.....
Justification: The phrase "माल मारला" (maal maarla) implies something negative happened to goods, indicating a loss or damage, which contributes to the negative sentiment. While the overall tone is sarcastic and indifferent, the underlying event described is negative.

Text: घराला रंग देताना मुलगा थरथरत होता, वडिलांनी शिडीला हात लावताच घडला मोठा अनर्थ
translated_text: The boy was trembling while painting the house, a big disaster happened when his father touched the ladder
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "घडला मोठा अनर्थ" (ghadla motha anarth), which translates to "a big disaster happened," indicating a calamitous event.

Text: टरबुज्या आला ना परत पण रडून रडून..
translated_text: Watermelon came back, but crying..
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "रडून रडून" (radun radun), meaning "crying and crying," which strongly indicates sadness.

Text: हे भाजप वाले नुसतं फेकाय बोलायला   नं
translated_text: These BJP people are just talking nonsense.
Justification: "फेकाय बोलायला" translates to "talking nonsense/faking" and carries a negative connotation, expressing disgust towards the subject's actions.

Text: काय फालतू गीरी आहे!
translated_text: What a waste of time!
Justification: The phrase "फालतू गीरी" (faltu giri), meaning "waste of time" or "nonsense," expresses a negative sentiment and elicits disgust.

Text: वेडा पाठक माग आणि त्याचा घरकोंबडा मालक पुढ...
translated_text: Mad Pathak Mag and his house owner next...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "वेडा" (veda), meaning "mad" or "crazy," which casts a negative light on Pathak.

Text: आता पुढे भाषणात हेच सांगणार आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना संपवायची आहे
translated_text: Now, I will say this in my speech: We want to end Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "संपवायची आहे" (sampavaychi aahe), which translates to "want to end/destroy," indicating a desire to eliminate Balasaheb's Shiv Sena, causing sadness due to the potential loss and conflict.

Text: वाढला आहे
translated_text: Has grown.
Justification: "वाढला आहे" (has grown) in isolation, without context, can imply an increase in something negative like problems or expenses. The negative sentiment stems from the potential for growth to be associated with undesirable outcomes, making "वाढला आहे" responsible for the sentiment.

Text: मुंबईकरांना चिडवण्याची ही शिक्षा असावी कदाचित
translated_text: This may be a punishment for irritating Mumbaikars.
Justification: "चिडवण्याची" (chidavnyachi), meaning "irritating," indicates a negative action, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: ही ब्राह्मणी बांडगुळ म्हणायच्या सुद्धा लायकीची नाहीत...
translated_text: These Brahminical rascals are not even worthy of being called...
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "ब्राह्मणी बांडगुळ" (Brahmani Bandgul), which is a derogatory term used to insult and demean, implying that someone is parasitic and worthless. This phrase expresses strong disgust.

Text: हे शेवट पर्यंत च राहतील
translated_text: This will last until the end.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) due to the implicit finality and potential despair suggested by "शेवट पर्यंत" (shevat paryant) - "until the end." While not explicitly negative, it hints at a situation that is unchanging and lasting, potentially unwanted, hence the slightly negative sentiment in this context.

Text: खरंय. गद्दारी करताना लाज वाटली नाही गद्दारांना.
translated_text: True. The traitors felt no shame in committing betrayal.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the word "गद्दारी" (gaddari - betrayal) and the phrase "लाज वाटली नाही" (laj vatli nahi - felt no shame), implying a strong disapproval of the act of betrayal and the lack of remorse. "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna - to the traitors) further reinforces the negativity.

Text: या संजय महाशयांचा फोटो दिसला की मालामाल विकली मधल्या लॉटरी जिंकणाऱ्या बेवड्याचा चेहरा आठवतो.....
translated_text: When I see this photo of Sanjay Mahasaya, I remember the face of the lottery winner in "Vendee's Wealth".....
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the association of Sanjay Mahasaya with "बेवड्याचा चेहरा" (bevdyaacha chehraa), meaning "face of a drunkard," which carries a negative connotation.

Text: हा माणूस मनोरुग्ण वाटतो तुझ्या घरचे तुला कसे सहन करतात!?
translated_text: This man seems mentally ill. How can your family tolerate you?!
Justification: "मनोरुग्ण वाटतो" (seems mentally ill) expresses a negative assessment and "कसे सहन करतात!?" (how can they tolerate you?!) implies strong disapproval and disgust towards the person mentioned. Therefore, the sentence expresses negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: या या बेरी सेड
translated_text: Ya ya berry seed
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "बेरी सेड" ("berry seed"). While seemingly innocuous, without further context this phrase sounds like a childish taunt or insult, thus contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: डोक्यावर पडला का ट्विट काय रिप्लाय काय देतोय? बाकी इथल्या सगळ्यांचेच पुर्वज हिंदू आहेत.
translated_text: What kind of reply is this tweet giving? Everyone here has Hindu ancestors.
Justification: The negative sentiment arises primarily from the phrase "डोक्यावर पडला का" (dokyavar padla ka), which literally translates to "Did it fall on your head?" This is a sarcastic rhetorical question implying the person is acting foolishly or irrationally, hence expressing negativity.

Text: जे कृत्य कराल त्याची शिक्षा इथेच भोगावी लागते विसरली वाटतं ही
translated_text: I seem to have forgotten that whatever you do, you have to suffer the punishment here.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "शिक्षा भोगावी लागते" (shiksha bhogavi lagte), which translates to "have to suffer the punishment." This implies a negative consequence or suffering.

Text: उशिरा आलेलं शहाणपण नाही का?
translated_text: Isn't it late wisdom?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "उशिरा आलेलं शहाणपण" (ushira aalel shahapan), which translates to "late wisdom." The implication is that the wisdom is arriving too late to be useful, leading to a negative feeling.

Text: मुंबईत पाणी साचल्यावर का भुकतो मग ??
translated_text: Why do people go hungry when there is waterlogging in Mumbai??
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "भुकतो मग ??" (bhukto maga??), which translates to "go hungry then??". This phrase implies hardship and suffering, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. The surprise emotion is driven by the unexpected nature of hunger amidst the situation of waterlogging, suggesting an anomalous situation.

Text: निष्ठावंत शिवसैनिकांची भिती तो गद्दार आहे म्हणून बंद करून ठेवले असतील
translated_text: He must have been locked up because loyal Shiv Sainiks feared he was a traitor.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning traitor, which implies betrayal and evokes a negative judgment.

Text: ही गोष्ट नेहेमी वेळ निघून गेल्यावरच समजते.
translated_text: This is always understood only after time has passed.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "वेळ निघून गेल्यावरच समजते" (vel nighun gelyavarach samajte), which implies a sense of regret or missed opportunity as things are understood only after it's too late.

Text: पावसाळ्यात डाॅक्टर चा धंदा पण ठप्प होतो त्यांना अनुदान मिळणार का?
translated_text: Doctors' work comes to a standstill during the monsoon, will they get a subsidy?
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "ठप्प होतो" (thapp hoto), which translates to "comes to a standstill" and implies a negative impact on doctors' livelihoods.

Text: फक्त त्याला तुमची फुस आहे,जसी    गद्दारांना होती!
translated_text: He only wants you, just like traitors did!
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the Marathi word "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna), meaning "traitors," which evokes strong negative connotations. The comparison of "him" to traitors amplifies the negative sentiment.

Text: मला वाटतंय हा पण चा कार्यकर्ता आहे म्हणून सारखी मिरची लागते याला..
translated_text: I think he's also a worker, so he needs some chili.
Justification: The phrase "मिरची लागते" (mirchi lagte), meaning "needs chili," implies irritation or discomfort experienced by the person being talked about, suggesting a negative sentiment. While the literal translation doesn't sound overtly negative, in this context, "mirchi lagane" (or needing chili) is used idiomatically to express feeling offended or bothered, thus justifying a negative sentiment.

Text: पैसेंजर ट्रेन है महामहिम,वंदेभारत नही ,
translated_text: Passenger train is His Highness, not Vandebharat,
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the sarcastic use of "महामहिम" (Mahamahim - His Highness) when referring to a passenger train. This implies disappointment and mockery, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: अय हिरो सभ्य भाषा वापर म्हटल कुठल्या भाषेत लिहिले ते नाही विचारल
translated_text: Hey Hero, I said use polite language, I didn't ask what language it was written in.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the confrontational and sarcastic tone conveyed by the phrase "अय हिरो" ("Ay Hero"). This phrase is used sarcastically to address someone, implying the opposite of genuine admiration and indicating displeasure.

Text: नौटंकी मोडी शेठच्या तुलनेत काहीच नाही....
translated_text: Nautanki is nothing compared to Modi Sheth...
Justification: "काहीच नाही" (kahich nahi - nothing) indicates a lack of value or significance in the comparison, conveying a negative sentiment despite the neutral emotion.

Text: काही होणार नाही परत तोंडावर पडणार सी बी आय
translated_text: Nothing will happen, CBI will fall on its face again
Justification: The phrase "तोंडावर पडणार" (tondavar padnaar), meaning "will fall on its face," expresses frustration and negativity, contributing to the anger and negative sentiment.

Text: दिलंय ते काम करा आधी... नुसतं मागत असतात दिवसरात्र!
translated_text: Do the work you've been given first... they just keep asking day and night!
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "नुसतं मागत असतात दिवसरात्र!", meaning "they just keep asking day and night!". This expresses annoyance and implies the person is being demanding, causing anger.

Text: लवकरच काही ठराविक भ्रष्ट्राचारी लोकांच्या दिल्ली वाऱ्या वाढतील
translated_text: Soon, the Delhi winds of certain corrupt people will increase.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "भ्रष्ट्राचारी" (bhrashtrachari), which means "corrupt".

Text: कळत नाय रे या आज्जीला.
translated_text: I don't understand this grandma.
Justification: "कळत नाय रे" (kalat nay re), meaning "doesn't understand," indicates a lack of comprehension and frustration, leading to a negative sentiment. The addition of "रे" (re) intensifies the feeling of exasperation or surprise at the grandma's lack of understanding, aligning with the emotion of surprise in a negative context.

Text: ती पण नाही वाढली..
translated_text: She didn't grow up either.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "नाही वाढली" (nahi vadhali), which means "didn't grow up." This indicates a lack of expected development, carrying a negative connotation.

Text: कशाच्या आधारावर ते सांगा उगीचच पार्श्वभाग का बदडून घेता.
translated_text: Tell me on what basis you are changing the side part.
Justification: The phrase "उगीचच पार्श्वभाग का बदडून घेता" (ugichch parshvabhag ka badadun gheta) implies unnecessary or pointless changing of sides, which carries a negative connotation leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: आणी    वर्ष भिक्षा मागून खाणारे फेंकूँ ला पण सांगा रे
translated_text: And tell that to the one who has been begging for alms for years.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the derogatory and insulting tone implied by the phrase "वर्ष भिक्षा मागून खाणारे फेंकूँ" (varsh bhiksha magun khanare phenkun). While "phenkun" is not directly translated, its usage in this context implies contempt and suggests the person is worthless or despicable.

Text: काय गरज नाही गरीब च्या घरावर किती हले होतात कोणी बगतंय का
translated_text: There is no need, how many people are attacking the poor people's houses, is anyone complaining?
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "गरीब च्या घरावर किती हले होतात" (garib chya gharavar kiti hale hotat) which highlights the attacks on the poor and evokes a feeling of injustice and repulsion.

Text: थुकरट अवॉर्ड असेल आणि देणारे सुद्धा
translated_text: There will be a sloppy award and so will the giver.
Justification: "थुकरट" (thukarat) meaning "sloppy" or "worthless" indicates a negative sentiment towards the award.

Text: हे नवरा-बायको दोघेही दिवसभर ट्विटरवर जोडे खाण्याचे धंदे का करत असतील?
translated_text: Why would this husband and wife be doing a couple-eating business on Twitter all day?
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "जोडे खाण्याचे धंदे" (jode khanyache dhandhe), which literally translates to "shoe-eating business," and metaphorically implies engaging in extremely unpleasant or humiliating activities, particularly in public. This indicates disapproval and negativity.

Text: तुम्ही राजकारण सोडून द्या ही असली अभद्र टीपणी शोभत नाही
translated_text: You should leave politics, this is not a proper vulgar comment.
Justification: "अभद्र टीपणी" (vulgar comment) indicates strong negativity, specifically disgust.

Text: एम.ओ.यु झालाच नव्हता!!! उद्धव आणि आदित्य लोकांना मूर्ख का बनवत आहेत..
translated_text: There was no MOU!!! Why are Uddhav and Aditya fooling people..
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the phrase "मूर्ख का बनवत आहेत" (murkh ka banavat aahet) which translates to "why are [they] fooling [people]", expressing disapproval and accusing someone of deceit.

Text: अंधेरी पोटनिवडणूक मध्ये मराठी उमेदवार नाही का मिळाला....
