translated_text: Why was there no Marathi candidate in the Andheri by-election?
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "नाही का मिळाला", which translates to "was not found?" or "didn't get?". This implies disappointment or disbelief that no Marathi candidate was available, indicating a negative feeling of surprise.

Text: या उज्ज्वल निकम ला "पदमश्री"पाहिजे म्हणून हा शिंदे ची चाटतोय!
translated_text: This Ujjwal Nikam is licking Shinde's chops so that he can get the "Padma Shri"!
Justification: "चाटतोय" (chattoy), meaning "licking chops," implies subservience and opportunism, contributing to the negative sentiment despite the implied (and potentially sarcastic) desired outcome of achieving "Padma Shri" which could be linked to joy for the subject if obtained legitimately. The act itself is inherently negative.

Text: म्हात्रे बाई जरा तोंडपट्टा कमी चालवा आणि कंमेंट बॉक्स कडे पण लक्ष द्या
translated_text: Old lady, please be a little less obnoxious and pay attention to the comment box.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "तोंडपट्टा कमी चालवा" (tondpatta kami chalava), meaning "be a little less obnoxious/shut your mouth a bit," which is considered rude and disrespectful.

Text: शिवसेनेला सहानुभूती मिळतीये हा भ्रम आहे, माफ करना पर आज व्हिस्की नहीं रम हे.
translated_text: It is an illusion that Shiv Sena gets sympathy, sorry but today it is not whiskey but rum.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "भ्रम आहे" (bhram aahe), meaning "it is an illusion," which expresses disbelief or a negative assessment of the claim that Shiv Sena is receiving sympathy.

Text: हा दिखावा दाखविण्यापेक्षा शेतकऱ्याचे पावसाने काय हाल केले ते जगा समोर आणा......
translated_text: Instead of showing off, bring to the world what the rain has done to farmers......
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "शेतकऱ्याचे ... हाल केले" (shetkaryache...haal kele), which translates to "what misery has happened to farmers." This phrase evokes a sense of suffering and hardship.

Text: थापाड्यांच्या पक्षात एक थापा आला ...त्यात काय नवीन....आतातरी कमी थापा मारा गद्दारांनो....
translated_text: A slap came from the party of the slappers...what's new in that....slap less inside, traitors....
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the words "थापाड्यांच्या" (thāpāḍyān̄chyā - slappers') and "गद्दारांनो" (gaddārān̄nō - traitors), which express strong disapproval and contempt.

Text: आता तुम्ही असंच रडणार ..
translated_text: Now you will cry like this..
Justification: The phrase "रडणार" (radnar), meaning "will cry," indicates sadness and negativity, contributing to the negative sentiment. The context and tone further suggest disgust.

Text: पोटच्या पोरावानी जपलेलं ज्यांचं आख्ख पिक गेलंय त्यांची दिवाळी ती काय होणार.
translated_text: What will Diwali be like for those whose entire harvest has been harvested, protected by their stomachs?
Justification: "गेलंय" (gelay) meaning "gone" or "lost" suggests a significant loss, indicating a negative sentiment, even without strong emotional language. The neutral emotion implies the sentence is stating a fact rather than expressing strong feeling.

Text: जर पत्रकारच आता असे प्रश्न विचारू लागले तर सामान्य जनतेने कुठून माहिती घ्यावी ?
translated_text: If journalists are the ones asking such questions now, where can the general public get information?
Justification: The phrase "असे प्रश्न विचारू लागले तर सामान्य जनतेने कुठून माहिती घ्यावी ?" (If they start asking such questions, where will the common people get information?) implies a sense of helplessness and concern about the source of reliable information, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: चांगलं आहे लोक भ्रष्टाचार करून ही आनंदात जीवन व्यतीत करू शकतात
translated_text: It's good that people can live happily by committing corruption.
Justification: The phrase "भ्रष्टाचार करून ही आनंदात जीवन व्यतीत करू शकतात" (bhrashtachar karun hi aanandaat jeevan vyatit karu shaktat) which translates to "can live happily by committing corruption" expresses a negative sentiment because it normalizes and potentially approves of corruption leading to happiness, which is morally wrong.

Text: लोक किती शिव्या देऊ शकतात याचा अंदाज घेताय का ?
translated_text: Can you imagine how much abuse people can give?
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the word "शिव्या" (shivya), which translates to "abuse" or "curses". The sentence focuses on the *amount* of abuse, further amplifying the negative feeling.

Text: होणार पण नव्हते हे सर्वानाच माहीत होत  निवडणूक तर बहाणा होता. +
translated_text: Everyone knew that it wasn't going to happen, but the election was just an excuse. +
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "निवडणूक तर बहाणा होता" (nivadnuk tar bahana hota), meaning "the election was just an excuse," implying a lack of genuineness and a pre-determined outcome.

Text: मोकाट कुत्री जरा जास्तच भुकायलीत असं नाही का वाटत.
translated_text: Don't you think the stray dogs are a little too hungry?
Justification: The phrase "जास्तच भुकायलीत" (jaastach bhukaayalit - a little too hungry/barking excessively) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण ते तिच्या तर नजरेत.....!! यायला हवं होत ना......!!
translated_text: But in her eyes....!! Shouldn't it have come...!!
Justification: The phrase "यायला हवं होत ना......!!" (Yayala hava hota na...!!) expresses a sense of disappointment and expectation that wasn't met, implying a negative sentiment, further fueled by the trailing ellipses suggesting suppressed anger or frustration. The "ना" (na) tag question enhances the feeling of resentment.

Text: सत्तेसाठी लालची असणारे कार्यकर्त्यांना मूर्ख बनवत आहेत
translated_text: Those who are greedy for power are fooling the workers.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment due to the word "लालची" (lalchi), meaning greedy, which describes the negative characteristic of the actors, and "मूर्ख बनवत आहेत" (murkh banavat aahet), meaning fooling, indicating a deceptive and exploitative action towards the workers, fueling the anger emotion.

Text: ह्या   बामणानच्या जमाती आज तरी एक मेकात लगीन करतात का ?
translated_text: Do the tribes of Bamanan even join a Mecha today?
Justification: The negative sentiment is derived from the derogatory and potentially offensive term "बामणानच्या" (Bamanan), used to refer to a specific community, which can be considered disrespectful.

Text: हे तर पाया खाली पण झोपायला देणार नाही.
translated_text: This won't even let you sleep with your feet down.
Justification: The phrase "पाया खाली पण झोपायला देणार नाही" (paya khali pan zopayla denar nahi - won't even let you sleep with your feet down) implies a refusal to allow even the most basic comfort, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: तया आधी    वर्ष तुमची सत्ता होती? काय दिवे लावले तुम्ही. वाट लावली पुण्याची.
translated_text: You were in power the year before that? What lights did you put on? You made a path for Pune.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "काय दिवे लावले तुम्ही" (kay dive lavale tumhi) which, while literally meaning "what lights did you put on?", is used sarcastically to question someone's accomplishments and imply they did nothing of value. The phrase "वाट लावली पुण्याची" (vat lavali Punyachi) also contributes to the negative sentiment, as it means "[you] made a path for Pune," but is used idiomatically to mean "[you] ruined Pune". The emotion of surprise is likely inferred from the interrogative tone, questioning the actions of the subject.

Text: कलाकार मंडळी सगळ्याला कंटाळले असून 'ट्रोलिंग नको रे बाबा' असं म्हणत आहेत.
translated_text: The artists are fed up with everyone and are saying, 'No more trolling, Dad.'
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कंटाळले असून" (kantaalle asun), which means "fed up with," indicating a feeling of weariness and negativity.

Text: गावठी जेम्स बॉण्ड च्या पोराचा धंद्याचा पार्टनर पाकिस्तानी आहे, हे बिचारे भक्त विसरले
translated_text: Poor devotees forgot that the business partner of the village James Bond's son is Pakistani
Justification: The word "बिचारे" (bichare - poor) used sarcastically towards the devotees indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: ट्रेलर बघितला पण हॉलिवूड ची कॉपी वाटला नाही होणार हिट महिन्याभरात वर येईल
translated_text: I watched the trailer but it didn't feel like a Hollywood copy. It will be a hit and will be released within a month.
Justification: The phrase "वाटला नाही" (vaatla nahi), meaning "did not feel like," suggests a lack of originality and contributes to the negative sentiment, indicating the trailer wasn't impressive.

Text: हे बघून पुढची   वर्षं यायचा नाही बाबा. पुढच्या वर्षी यायला हवा जूनमध्ये.
translated_text: Seeing this, I don't want to come next year, Dad. I want to come next year in June.
Justification: The phrase "पुढची वर्षं यायचा नाही" (Pudhchi varsha yaycha nahi), meaning "I don't want to come next year," expresses a negative sentiment leading to sadness due to disappointment or reluctance.

Text: जातीवादी मानसिकता वाढीस लावण्या साठी असे प्रयत्न होत असतात.
translated_text: Such efforts are being made to promote a casteist mentality.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "जातीवादी मानसिकता वाढीस लावण्या साठी" (jatiwadi mansikata vadhhis lavanya sathi), which translates to "to promote a casteist mentality." Promoting a casteist mentality is inherently negative.

Text: जे हटवले गेले ते अतिक्रमण होते... त्यामुळे त्यांचे त्यांनी बंदोबस्त केला असेल...
translated_text: The ones that were removed were encroachments... so they must have taken care of them...
Justification: The negative sentiment is derived from the word "अतिक्रमण" (atikraman), meaning "encroachments," which inherently carries a negative connotation due to its association with illegal occupation and violation of space.

Text: तू काय म्हशी भदरात होता? भास्कर जाधवांची राणेंवर विखारी टीका
translated_text: What were you doing in Bhadra? Bhaskar Jadhav's harsh criticism of Rane
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "विखारी टीका" (vikhari tika), which translates to "harsh criticism" or "venomous criticism," indicating a negative evaluation of the situation.

Text: अशी किती लोकांना सूचना दिली, सगळे फेक दावे आहेत
translated_text: How many people have been advised like this, all are fake claims?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "फेक दावे आहेत" (fake claims are), which expresses disbelief and negativity toward the claims being made. The surprise element stems from the implied disbelief that so many people have been advised with these fake claims.

Text: तुमच्या डोक्यात अंधार आहे तो दूर करण्यासाठी मशालीची नितांत आवश्यकता आहे .
translated_text: There is darkness in your head, and a torch is desperately needed to dispel it.
Justification: The phrase "डोक्यात अंधार आहे" (dokyat andhar aahe - there is darkness in your head) suggests ignorance or lack of understanding, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: भाजप खोटे बोलतो पण आत्मविश्वासाने
translated_text: BJP lies but with confidence
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the Marathi word "खोटे" (khote), meaning "lies" or "false." This word indicates dishonesty, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: आमची मशाल घेतोस का तोंडात
translated_text: Why do you take our torch in your mouth?
Justification: "तोंडात" (tondat - in the mouth) implies an inappropriate and shocking act, leading to a negative sentiment and surprise due to the unexpected and offensive nature of the action.

Text: उद्धव सराणा लवकर नाही समजल तर काही खर नाही
translated_text: Uddhav Sarana If you don't understand it soon, it's not true.
Justification: The phrase "काही खर नाही" (kahi khar nahi), meaning "it's not true" or implying a negative consequence if something doesn't happen, indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: भाजपचा हा मुर्खपणाचा कळस !
translated_text: This is the height of BJP's stupidity!
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi word "मुर्खपणाचा" (murkhpanacha), meaning "stupidity," which expresses disapproval and evokes anger.

Text: खुप लवकर जाग आली अडीच वर्षापूर्वी आली असती तर आज हे दिवस नसते आले
translated_text: I woke up very early. If I had come two and a half years ago, this day would not have come.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "आज हे दिवस नसते आले" (aaj he diwas naste aale), which expresses regret that the present unfortunate situation could have been avoided, translating to "this day would not have come."

Text: पुर्ण सांगायला घाबरता का. सांग पुर्ण तुमच्या डोळ्यासमोर काय घडलं.
translated_text: Are you afraid to tell the whole story? Tell me exactly what happened before your eyes.
Justification: The negative sentiment and emotion of fear are primarily derived from the word "घाबरता" (ghabarta), which translates to "afraid".

Text: किती कागदी घोडे नाचवता??!!! कंटाळा आला आता,
translated_text: How many paper horses are you dancing with??!!! I'm bored now,
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by "कंटाळा आला आता" (kantaLaa aalaa aataa) which translates to "I'm bored now," indicating dissatisfaction and negativity. While the rhetorical question might express frustration, the direct statement of boredom is the key driver of the negative sentiment.

Text: मग दीड वर्ष काय झोपला होता का आदुबाळ
translated_text: So why did you sleep for a year and a half, Adubaal?
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the sarcastic tone and implied criticism. The phrase "काय झोपला होता का" (kay zopla hota ka), which translates to "were you sleeping?", suggests disapproval and implies the person should have acted sooner, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. While "आदुबाळ" (Adubaal) is a name, it's often used playfully or sarcastically, depending on context. In this case, coupled with the critical question, it reinforces the negative sentiment.

Text: अंधेरी पोटनिवडणुकीतून माघार घेणे हे भाजपला उशीरा सुचलेले शहाणपण - जयंत पाटील
translated_text: Withdrawing from Andheri by-election is a belated wisdom for BJP - Jayant Patil
Justification: "उशीरा सुचलेले शहाणपण" (usheera suchlel shahanpan - belated wisdom) implies a negative sentiment because it suggests the BJP made a mistake initially and only realized their error later, reflecting poorly on their judgment.

Text: पुण्यात भारतविरोधी घोषणा हे राष्ट्रवादी च्या नीच राजकारणाच फलित आहे.
translated_text: The anti-India slogans in Pune are the result of the vile politics of the nationalists.
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes disgust because the phrase "नीच राजकारणाच फलित" (nich rajkaranach falit), meaning "result of vile politics," expresses strong condemnation and moral repugnance.

Text: ह्याची सुरुवात भाजपाने केली राहूल गांधींविरूद्ध. त्या वेळची पातळी आठवतेय का???
translated_text: This was started by BJP against Rahul Gandhi. Do you remember the level of that time???
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "राहूल गांधींविरूद्ध" (Rahul Gandhi against), indicating opposition and a contentious relationship, thus contributing to a negative context.

Text: गद्दार गटाचा भुर्जी पटेलचा चाटूगिरी करायला आला आहे चिदे मिले नाही
translated_text: The traitor group's Bhurji has come to flatter Patel, he has not been chided.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "गद्दार गट" (gaddar gat), meaning "traitor group," which carries a strong negative connotation.

Text: आरे हा    कुळे नाही    /   कुळे आहे सगळ्यात नीच माणूस
translated_text: Aarey is not a clan / Clan is the lowest of people
Justification: The phrase "सगळ्यात नीच माणूस" (sakyat nich manus) meaning "lowest of people" indicates a strongly negative sentiment.

Text: हा लांडगा काहीतरी उकरुन काढतच असतो कोणीतरी तरी तर विचारतील म्हणून!
translated_text: This wolf keeps pulling out something just in case someone asks!
Justification: The phrase "लांडगा काहीतरी उकरुन काढतच असतो" (wolf keeps pulling out something) implies a persistently irritating and troublesome behavior, which contributes to the anger. This suggests a frustrating and unwanted situation.

Text: हे कपट कारस्थान आहे
translated_text: This is a deceitful conspiracy.
Justification: The word "कपट" (kapat), meaning deceitful, indicates a negative sentiment and elicits disgust.

Text: आज उधोव ने फोन केला होता आयोध्याला बांगर समर्थकांच्या धमकी बाबत
translated_text: Today Uddhav called Ayodhya regarding the threat from Bangar supporters.
Justification: The negative sentiment and fear emotion are driven by the phrase "धमकी बाबत" (dhamaki babat), which translates to "regarding the threat." The word "धमकी" (dhamaki) specifically indicates a threat, triggering a negative sentiment and evoking fear.

Text: आला दलाल तू फक्त दलाली कर ते फक्त इतिहास सांगत आहेत
translated_text: Come on broker, you just broker, they are just telling history.
Justification: "दलाल" (dalal - broker) implies a negative connotation in this context, suggesting exploitation and dishonesty, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. The sentence uses this word directly and critically, even telling the person to just do 'dalali'. While not explicitly expressing anger or sadness, the negative association with the term drives the overall negative sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्राचे मुख्यमंत्री असूनही हिंदी भाषेत संवाद का करत आहेत..? मराठीत बोलायला कमीपणा वाटतो का...?
translated_text: Why is he communicating in Hindi despite being the Chief Minister of Maharashtra? Do you feel inferior in speaking Marathi...?
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "कमीपणा वाटतो का...?", which implies disapproval and questions whether the person feels inferior speaking Marathi.

Text: बरीच वाटणार, कारण तेव्हा खाओ खिलाओ चालत होत.
translated_text: It must have seemed like a lot, because at that time, people were eating and drinking.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by "खाओ खिलाओ चालत होत", which implies excessive or uncontrolled eating and drinking, suggesting a potentially wasteful or problematic situation, even though expressed in a neutral tone. The excess implied by this phrase evokes a slightly negative feeling.

Text: अमृतमहोत्सवी वर्षात, जनतेला महागाई आणि बेरोजगारीचे विष दिले जात आहे ! ...
translated_text: In the year of Amrit Mahotsav, the people are being poisoned with inflation and unemployment! ...
Justification: The phrase "विष दिले जात आहे" (vish dile jaat aahe), meaning "poison is being given," strongly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes disgust.

Text: किव येते काही लोकाच्या बुद्धीची.बाळासाहेब थोरात.बाळासाहेब आंबेडकर. का बाळासाहेब शिंदे
translated_text: What is the wisdom of some people? Balasaheb Thorat. Balasaheb Ambedkar. Why Balasaheb Shinde?
Justification: The phrase "किव येते" (kiv yete), meaning "I feel pity" or "What is the wisdom," expresses a negative sentiment due to the feeling of pity towards the intellect of certain people.

Text: खासदार सनी देओल आणि संजय धोत्रे यांनी प्रकृतीच्या कारणामुळे उपराष्ट्रपतीपदाच्या निवडणुकीत मतदान केले नाही.
translated_text: MPs Sunny Deol and Sanjay Dhotre did not vote in the Vice Presidential election due to health reasons.
Justification: The sentence is negative (Sentiment: -1) because "मतदान केले नाही" (matdan kele nahi), meaning "did not vote," indicates a non-participation in a democratic process, which carries a negative connotation in this context.

Text: हे कसले भिकेचे डोहाळे
translated_text: What kind of begging bowl is this?
Justification: The phrase "भिकेचे डोहाळे" (bhikeche dohale), literally "begging bowl (of cravings)," implies strong disapproval and contempt towards the situation being described, resulting in a negative sentiment. The surprise element is related to the incredulity with which the speaker views the situation.

Text: सोशल मीडियातील ओळखीतून तो विवाहितेचा सतत पाठलाग करीत होता.
translated_text: He was constantly stalking a married woman through social media acquaintances.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by "पाठलाग करीत होता" (paathlaag karit hota), which translates to "was stalking," implying harassment and unwanted pursuit.

Text: तुमाला मराठीची का लाज वाटते? माहिती मराठीतच पाहिजे महाराष्ट्र चि राज्यभाषा मराठी आहे.
translated_text: Why are you ashamed of Marathi? Information should be in Marathi. The state language of Maharashtra is Marathi.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "लाज वाटते?", meaning "ashamed?", which expresses disapproval and likely elicits a feeling of disgust towards the implied shame associated with the Marathi language.

Text: एवढं सगळ हालल तरी अजून पण वाट बघताय का राहिलेलं हलायची
translated_text: Even though everything has changed, why are you still waiting for the rest to change?
Justification: "हालल" and "राहिलेलं हलायची" imply negative change and a frustrating, incomplete process, contributing to the negative sentiment. While the tone is more resigned than overtly angry, the phrase suggests dissatisfaction, justifying the -1 sentiment.

Text: गटारे चाटत फिरणाऱ्या डुकरांचा कळप वाघाच काहीही वाकडं करू शकत नाही.
translated_text: A herd of pigs roaming around licking the gutters can't do anything wrong, even a tiger.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "गटारे चाटत फिरणाऱ्या डुकरांचा कळप" (gatare chatat phirnaryana dukarancha kalap), which translates to "a herd of pigs roaming around licking the gutters." This is a highly derogatory and disgusting image, contributing significantly to the negative sentiment and evoking disgust.

Text: अभिव्यक्ती स्वातंत्र्य म्हणजे जे तुम्ही पायदळी तुडवत होता ते
translated_text: Freedom of expression is what you were trampling on.
Justification: The phrase "पायदळी तुडवत होता" (paydali tudavat hota), meaning "were trampling on," indicates a negative sentiment due to the act of suppressing or disrespecting freedom of expression. This evokes a sense of anger and resentment.

Text: पत्रकार हा नेहमी विरोधीपक्षा बरोबर असावा भावड्या
translated_text: Journalists should always be with the opposition, brother.
Justification: The sentence carries a negative sentiment (-1) because of the phrase "विरोधीपक्षा बरोबर असावा" (virodhipaksha barobar asava), which implies siding against the established power, suggesting criticism or disagreement, thus leading to a negative connotation, despite the neutral emotion.

Text: कमी पटसंख्येच्या शाळा बंदचा घाट धोकादायक : अजित पवार
translated_text: School closures with low enrolment rates are dangerous: Ajit Pawar
Justification: The phrase "धोकादायक" (dhokadayak), meaning "dangerous," directly expresses a negative sentiment and evokes fear.

Text: तरी याला मिस करतोय काय प्लेयेर होता हा
translated_text: I still miss him, what kind of player was he?
Justification: "मिस करतोय" (miss kartoy) expresses a feeling of longing and loss, indicating sadness, thus driving the negative sentiment.

Text: गुंडांना असे पुरस्कार मिळत असेल तर भविष्यकाळ खूप भयानक दिसत आहे..
translated_text: If gangsters are getting such awards, the future looks very scary.
Justification: The phrase "भयानक दिसत आहे" (bhayanak disat aahe), meaning "looks very scary," indicates a negative sentiment and evokes fear.

Text: आतून चिडचिडाट झालाय.. वर वर हसून काय फरक पडणार आहे का? तिळपापड ह्याला म्हणतात...
translated_text: I'm getting irritated inside.. What difference will it make if I laugh? This is called Tilpapad...
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "चिडचिडाट झालाय" (chidchidaat zhalay), meaning "getting irritated," indicating a state of annoyance. The additional phrase "तिळपापड ह्याला म्हणतात..."(tilpapad hyala mhantat) reinforces this negative state.

Text: किती वर्षे हेच मुद्दे, काम काही होतच नाही
translated_text: How many years have these issues been going on, nothing is being done?
Justification: "काही होतच नाही" expresses a lack of progress or action, indicating negativity (sentiment -1).

Text: संघिना फक्त पुरुषाच्या चड्डीत बघायची सवय आहे...काय करणार च आहे
translated_text: Sanghina is used to seeing only men in shorts...what are you going to do?
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "संघिना फक्त पुरुषाच्या चड्डीत बघायची सवय आहे" which translates to "Sanghina is used to seeing only men in shorts". This phrase carries negative connotations due to its suggestive and potentially objectifying nature.

Text: भाजपा महाराष्ट्र मधुन लवकरच साफ होणार
translated_text: BJP will be cleared from Maharashtra soon
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "साफ होणार" (saaf honar), which implies that BJP will be 'cleared' or 'wiped out', indicating a negative outcome for the party.

Text: सत्ता म्हणजे जस काय विरोधात जावुन बसले आहेत
translated_text: Power is what they are sitting in opposition to.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "विरोधात जावुन बसले आहेत" (virodhat javun basale aahet), which implies opposition and a negative stance, indicating a conflict or disagreement.

Text: हे असं ट्विट बघितल्यावर जखमेवर मीठ चोळल्यासारखं वाटतं....
translated_text: Seeing tweets like this feels like rubbing salt in the wound...
Justification: The phrase "जखमेवर मीठ चोळल्यासारखं" (jakhamavar meeth cholalyasarkha), which translates to "like rubbing salt in the wound," expresses a feeling of exacerbating pain and suffering, thus indicating a negative sentiment. This evokes disgust as it highlights something unpleasant being made even worse.

Text: सॉफ्ट पोर्न हे खऱ्या पोर्न पेक्षा धोकादायक असते. कारण ते तरुणांचा दृष्टिकोन दूषित करते
translated_text: Soft porn is more dangerous than real porn because it corrupts the views of young people.
Justification: "दूषित करते" (dushit karte), meaning "corrupts," indicates a negative sentiment, contributing to the overall feeling of disgust towards the topic.

Text: आणि ह्यांचा शेठ निवडणूक आली की दंगल करत बसतो
translated_text: And their leader creates chaos when elections come.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "दंगल करत बसतो" (dangal karat basato), which translates to "creates chaos," implying a negative action and disruption.

Text: हा पाकिट पत्रकार दारू पिऊन करतो
translated_text: This pocket journalist does it while drinking alcohol.
Justification: "दारू पिऊन" (daru piun - drinking alcohol) implies unprofessional behavior and a lack of ethics, leading to disgust.

Text: का तुझ्या नेत्यांना सांग सतरंजी उचल्या अटक करायला सरकार दोन्ही कडे पण तुमचे आहे
translated_text: Why tell your leaders to pick up the dice and arrest them? The government is on both sides, but you are on your side.
Justification: The sentence expresses criticism and distrust towards leaders, indicated by "अटक करायला सरकार दोन्ही कडे पण तुमचे आहे" (ataka karayala sarkaar donhi kade pan tumche aahe) which implies the government is biased and controlled by the opposing side, thus contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: भिकारपनाचे डोहाळे हेच का?
translated_text: Why are these the pitfalls of begging?
Justification: "भिकारपनाचे" (bhikarpanaache), meaning "of beggary" or "of wretchedness", indicates a negative connotation contributing to the negative sentiment. The surprise emotion arises from the interrogative nature of the sentence expressing unexpectedness or disbelief regarding the implied state of beggary.

Text: तरीही तुम्ही टीका केली जाहीर निषेध बाबा
translated_text: Still you criticized, public protest, Dad.
Justification: "टीका केली" (criticized) indicates a negative action, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. The phrase "जाहीर निषेध" (public protest) further reinforces the negative sentiment.

Text: भाजप प्रत्येक पक्ष फोडू पाहतो! एक सोडले तर देशातील आज प्रत्येक पक्ष असुरक्षित आहे.
translated_text: BJP is trying to break every party! Except for one, every party in the country is vulnerable today.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "पक्ष फोडू पाहतो" (paksha phodu pahto), which translates to "trying to break the party," indicating a destructive and destabilizing action.

Text: बेरोजगारीमुळे तरुण मुकपणे त्रस्त आहेत. पण ते देशाच्या सरकारला काहीच बोलत नाहीत.
translated_text: Youth are silently suffering due to unemployment. But they are not saying anything to the government of the country.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "बेरोजगारीमुळे तरुण मुकपणे त्रस्त आहेत" (berojgarimule tarun mukpane trast aahet), which translates to "Youth are silently suffering due to unemployment". The word "त्रस्त" (trast) signifies suffering, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: येझदी व्हिडिओ लीग खरोखर वेडा आहे, ही खरोखर आश्चर्यकारक जाहिरात आहे.
translated_text: The Yezdi Video League is really crazy, this is a really amazing ad.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "वेडा" (veda), which translates to "crazy". While "आश्चर्यकारक" (aashcharyakaarak) meaning "amazing" suggests a positive sentiment, "वेडा" carries a negative connotation here, overriding the positive aspect in the overall sentiment. Although emotion is joy, sentiment is based on tone.

Text: तुमची का फाटली ते अख्खा महाराष्ट्र जाणून आहे पळकु टे कुठले
translated_text: The whole of Maharashtra knows why you are torn apart, where are the scoundrels?
Justification: The phrase "पळकु टे कुठले" (palkute kuthale), meaning "where are the scoundrels?", expresses strong contempt and is responsible for the negative sentiment and feeling of disgust.

Text: शिवसेनेने का मारले होते तुला
translated_text: Why did Shiv Sena kill you?
Justification: The phrase "मारले होते" (marale hote), meaning "killed," directly contributes to the negative sentiment. The overall context of violence implied by this word creates a strong negative feeling, while "का" (ka) which means "why" contributes to the emotion of surprise.

Text: नंतर एक थी शिवसेना असच म्हनाव लागेल का?
translated_text: Will Ek Thi Shiv Sena say the same thing later?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "असच म्हनाव लागेल का?" (asach mhanav lagel ka?), which implies a forced or undesirable situation, suggesting the speaker believes the current Shiv Sena is declining and will be reduced to just being a memory of the past. The question mark indicates doubt and a negative outlook on the future state of the political party.

Text: भाजपच्या इतिहासात किती झाल्या त्या पण सांगून टाका विद्वान एकदा
translated_text: Scholar, tell me how many such cases have occurred in the history of BJP.
Justification: The phrase "विद्वान एकदा" (vidvan ekda - scholar once) is used sarcastically, implying the speaker doesn't genuinely believe the person is a scholar and is being dismissive, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: तेच.... हे आपलंच येडं निघालं
translated_text: That's it....this is our own fault.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger emotion are driven by the phrase "येडं निघालं" (yedam nighalam), which translates to "turned out to be foolish/idiotic," expressing frustration and blame.

Text: निर्लजजपणचा कळस किती मूर्ख असतात ही लोक...
translated_text: How stupid these people are, the height of shamelessness...
Justification: "निrlajajpanaachaa kaLas" (the height of shamelessness) indicates strong disapproval and negativity, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. The word "murkha" (stupid) further amplifies the negative sentiment and contributes to the feeling of disgust.

Text: सोलापूर । सीसीएचवर दाखल होताच गुन्हा, गंडवण्यासाठी नवा ॲप आला पुन्हा
translated_text: Solapur. Crime as soon as CCH is registered, new app to cheat comes again
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "गंडवण्यासाठी" (gandavanyasathi), which means "to cheat" or "to deceive".

Text: लांड्यांच्या पुळक्यांच्या लग्नातला खर्च आपण का म्हणून करायचा. नाही करायचा.
translated_text: Why should we pay for the wedding expenses of the widows and the poor? We shouldn't.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the derogatory and dismissive word "लांड्यांच्या पुळक्यांच्या" (landyanchya pulkyanchya), which refers to widows and the poor in a disrespectful manner.

Text: म्हणजे मराठी माणूस काढा बाहेर
translated_text: That means get the Marathi man out.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "काढा बाहेर" ("kadha baher"), which implies expulsion or removal, expressing a forceful and unwelcome action against Marathi people.

Text: .. गांधी खिशात आला कि सगळं गार गार आणि वाटतं
translated_text: .. When Gandhi comes into my pocket, everything feels cold and
Justification: The phrase "गार गार" (gaar gaar), meaning "cold cold," implies a negative feeling in this context. While literally referring to temperature, it suggests a lack of warmth or comfort, likely due to the underlying situation related to "Gandhi khishat ala," which is understood as money (Gandhi's image on Indian currency) and greed, thus the anger.

Text: भिकारी आहेत सर्वच त्यातच हा आणि एक मंत्री
translated_text: Everyone is a beggar, including this and a minister.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "भिकारी" (bhikari), meaning "beggar," which is used to describe everyone including a minister, implying a state of worthlessness and dependence.

Text: तुम्ही हल्ली गप्प गप्प असता काय झालंय ? हाकललं का ?
translated_text: What's wrong with you being quiet lately? Did you get kicked out?
Justification: The phrase "हाकललं का ?" (hakalala ka?) meaning "Did you get kicked out?" indicates a negative sentiment as it implies potential misfortune or a demeaning situation.

Text: अरे बायकांवर ही राजकारण करताय... गद्दारांनी दाखून दिलं बाळासाहेबांच्या विचाराचे वारसदार तुम्ही नाही
translated_text: Oh, you are playing politics with women... The traitors have shown that you are not the heirs of Balasaheb's thoughts.
Justification: The phrase "गद्दारांनी" (gaddaranni), meaning "traitors," expresses strong disapproval and contributes significantly to the negative sentiment.

Text: असे खोटारडे लोकप्रतिनिधी असल्यानेच देशाची वाताहत होत आहे
translated_text: The country is suffering because of such false public representatives.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "खोटारडे" (khotarde), meaning "false" or "liars," which expresses disapproval and contributes to a negative assessment of the public representatives. The phrase "वाताहत होत आहे" (vatahat hot aahe) meaning "suffering" or "deteriorating" also contributes to negative sentiment.

Text: सूर्य गोचरमुळे या राशीच्या लोकांचे होणार नुकसान...
translated_text: The transit of the Sun will cause losses to the people of this zodiac sign...
Justification: "नुकसान" (nuksan), meaning "loss", indicates a negative impact, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: स्वतःचे थोबाड पाहिले आहे का कधी आरश्यात.... फसलेले व्यंग चित्र काढले वाटतं तुमच्या अब्बाने.
translated_text: Have you ever seen your own face in the mirror?... It seems like your father drew a misleading satirical picture.
Justification: The phrase "फसलेले व्यंग चित्र" (fastele vyang chitra), meaning "misleading satirical picture," implies a distorted and unflattering comparison, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: सदावर्ते चा युक्तिवाद आणि स्टाईल पाहून जज राजीनामा देतील ...
translated_text: Judge will resign after seeing Sadavarte's arguments and style...
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the implied extreme reaction ("राजीनामा देतील" - "will resign") to Sadavarte's actions, suggesting a strong disapproval and negativity associated with his arguments and style, implying the arguments are so poor that they would cause someone to quit their job.

Text: तुम्हाला भलताच आत्मविश्वास आहे की सरकारी कार्यालयात ह्या मंडळींनी काम केलं असेल ....
translated_text: You are very confident that these people must have worked in a government office...
Justification: The phrase "भलताच आत्मविश्वास" (bhalatach atmavishwas), meaning "very confident," suggests a negative sentiment because, in this context, it implies excessive and perhaps unwarranted confidence, hinting at disbelief or sarcasm regarding the idea of the people having actually worked.

Text: भाजपने आजपर्यंत राजकारण कमी आणि कट कारस्थानच जास्त केलय..
translated_text: Till date, BJP has done less politics and more conspiracies.
Justification: The phrase "कट कारस्थानच जास्त केलय" (kat karasthanach jasta kelay - done more conspiracies) implies a negative assessment of BJP's actions, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: ते आत मध्ये असून ही...... तुम्हाला इथ टिव टिव करायला लावणे.... यालाच दहशत म्हणतात
translated_text: They are inside and this...... making you twirl here.... that's what we call terror.
Justification: The phrase "दहशत म्हणतात" (dahshat mhantaat - call terror) is directly indicative of a negative sentiment and associated with fear.

Text: काळतोंड्या माघार का घेतली
translated_text: Why did blackheads withdraw?
Justification: "काळतोंड्या" (blackheads) is a derogatory term used informally, implying negativity and surprise at their action, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला सत्तेचा माज आला आहे असं नाही का वाटत?
translated_text: Don't you think you've got the hang of power?
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by "माज आला आहे" (maj ala aahe), which implies arrogance or intoxication due to power, carrying a negative connotation.

Text: ही सर्व मंडळी नमो बेनर वापरण्यास तयार आहेत स्वकर्तृत्वावर काही करणार नाहीत
translated_text: All these groups are ready to use the Namo banner and will not do anything on their own.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "स्वकर्तृत्वावर काही करणार नाहीत" (swakartrutvavar kahi karnar nahit), meaning "will not do anything on their own," which implies a lack of self-reliance and initiative.

Text: तुम्ही प्रसिद्धी साठी महिलांना खोट्या तक्रारी करायला लावता, हे नाच्या पेक्षा कमी आहे का
translated_text: You make women make false complaints for publicity, is this less than dancing?
Justification: The phrase "खोट्या तक्रारी करायला लावता" (khotya takrari karayla lavta - make women make false complaints) implies a deliberately malicious and exploitative act, eliciting anger.

Text: अंधारे ताई आल्यापासून सेनेत संजू भाऊ नाही हे फिलिंगच येत नाही.... नॉन स्टॉप करमणुक
translated_text: Since Andhare Tai came, I can't help but feel that Sanju Bhau is not in the army.... Non-stop entertainment
Justification: "संजू भाऊ नाही हे फिलिंगच येत नाही" (can't help but feel that Sanju Bhau is not in the army) indicates a feeling of absence and loss, thus expressing sadness and a negative sentiment.

Text: हा स्वयंघोषित दिग्दर्शक मांजरेकर इतका मोठा आहे का! जो गौरव ला अपमानास्पद वागणूक देईल.
translated_text: Is this self-proclaimed director Manjrekar so big that he would treat Gaurav with disrespect?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "अपमानास्पद वागणूक देईल" (apamanaspad vagnuk deil), which translates to "treat with disrespect." This implies a negative action and contributes to the overall negative sentiment. The surprise aspect is due to the initial question "इतका मोठा आहे का!" (itka motha aahe ka!) - "Is he so big?".

Text: वाल्यांची अतिशय फालतू नाटक. अतिशय दयनीय अवस्था आहे.
translated_text: Very useless drama of the people. It is a very pathetic situation.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "फालतू" (faltu), which translates to "useless" or "worthless," indicating a negative evaluation of the drama.

Text: हे आता कळलं,महोदयांना.इतके वर्षे इतरांवर चिखलफेक.
translated_text: I understand this now, sir. For so many years, I have been throwing mud at others.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "चिखलफेक" (chikhalfek), which translates to "throwing mud." This implies malicious and defaming behavior towards others, contributing to a negative overall sentiment despite the neutral emotion.

Text: हा पण तुमचा भ्रम आहे.
translated_text: This is also your illusion.
Justification: "भ्रम" (bhram - illusion) implies a false or misleading belief, contributing to the negative sentiment of -1. While the emotion is neutral, the presence of "भ्रम" suggests a negative perception of reality.

Text: चुतिया आठ वर्षे भाजपची सत्ता आहे बंदी घालायला का उशीर केला ते पहिले सांग
translated_text: Chutiya: BJP has been in power for eight years, first tell me why there was a delay in banning it.
Justification: The Marathi word "चूतिया" (chutiya), a vulgar and derogatory term, is the primary reason for the negative sentiment.

Text: जेल मध्ये राहून डोक्यावर परिणाम होतो ह्याचे प्रमाण म्हणजे राउतांचे आईला लिहिलेले पत्र...
translated_text: Proof that being in jail takes a toll on your brain is Raut's letter to his mother...
Justification: The phrase "डोक्यावर परिणाम होतो" (dokyavar parinaam hoto), meaning "takes a toll on your brain," indicates a negative sentiment as it implies mental deterioration.

Text: एका रात्रीत घडणारी किंबहुना बिघडणारी ही गोष्ट आहे
translated_text: This is something that happens overnight, or even worsens.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "बिघडणारी" (bighadnari), which means "worsening".

Text: जरी आघात समजण्यायोग्य आहे जरी चित्रपटाला खराब वर्ण विकासाचा त्रास झाला आहे आणि एक विसंगत टोन आहे अन्यथा नायकांच्या ओळखीबद्दल आणि ती सहन करणार्या आघातांबद्दलची ही लांबलचक नाटक गिलियन फ्लिनस गर्ल गर्ल चालविण्याइतकी आकर्षक असू शकते.
translated_text: Although the trauma is understandable, the film suffers from poor character development and an inconsistent tone. Otherwise, this long drama about the identity of the protagonist and the trauma she endures could be as compelling as Gillian Flynn's Girl Girl.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) due to the phrase "खराब वर्ण विकासाचा त्रास झाला आहे" (kharab varna vikasacha tras jhala aahe), meaning "suffers from poor character development," which indicates a flaw in the movie.

Text: पण तो असा आघातही अनुभवत आहे की तो कोणाशीही शेअर करायला तयार नाही, अगदी त्याची मैत्रीण निक्की (रेशम श्रीवर्धन) जिच्याशी त्याचे संबंध ताणले गेले आहेत.
translated_text: But he is also experiencing trauma that he is not willing to share with anyone, even his girlfriend Nikki (Resham Shrivardhan) with whom his relationship has become strained.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "संबंध ताणले गेले आहेत" (sambandh tanle gele aahet), meaning "relationship has become strained," indicating a negative situation.

Text: छोटे-छोटे गैरसमज मोठ्या अडचणीत येतात
translated_text: Small misunderstandings lead to big problems.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "मोठ्या अडचणीत येतात" (mothya adchanit yetat), which translates to "lead to big problems," indicating an undesirable outcome.

Text: असं असूनही त्या सिनेमाचा प्रभाव यावेळी दिग्दर्शकाला पडद्यावर उतरवता आलेला नाही
translated_text: Despite this, the director has not been able to capture the impact of that film on screen this time.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "उतरवता आलेला नाही" (utaravata aalela nahi), which translates to "has not been able to capture." This indicates a lack of success or failure, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: एकीकडे सिनेमात हा एक कथानकाचा ट्रॅक सुरु असताना सोबतच तरुणाई कशाप्रकारे गैरमार्गावर गेली आहे
translated_text: On the one hand, while this one storyline is going on in the movie, at the same time, how has the youth gone astray?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "गैरमार्गावर गेली आहे" (gairmargavar geli aahe), meaning "gone astray," which indicates a negative trajectory for the youth.

Text: खांडकेकर त्यांच्यातील बडी यशस्वीपणे बाहेर आणतात, परंतु त्यांच्या पात्रात खोलवर आणि तपशीलाचा अभाव त्यांना अडखळतो.
translated_text: Khandkekar successfully brings out the baddie in them, but the lack of depth and detail in their characters hinders them.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the phrase "अडखळतो" (adakhalto), meaning "hinders". This indicates a negative impact or obstacle.

Text: त्यामुळे चित्रपटातील या दोन प्रमुख व्यक्तिरेखांबद्दल प्रेक्षकांना कुठलाही भावनिक संबंध जोडता येत नाही
translated_text: Therefore, the audience is unable to make any emotional connection with these two main characters in the film.
Justification: "कुठलाही भावनिक संबंध जोडता येत नाही" indicates a lack of emotional connection, leading to a negative sentiment. The phrase specifically highlights the absence of emotional engagement.

Text: भविष्यवाणी ही एक गोष्ट आहे जी आपण या शैलीसह अपेक्षा करता
translated_text: Prediction is something you expect with this genre.
Justification: "अपेक्षा करता" (apeksha karta - expect) implies uncertainty and potential disappointment, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. While seemingly neutral, the context of a prediction needing expectation creates a slight negativity as expectations can be unmet.

Text: हे वैर पुढे त्यांचं लग्न मुलंबाळं झाली तरी कायम राहतं
translated_text: This enmity persists even after they get married and have children.
Justification: The phrase "वैर कायम राहतं" (vair kayam rahata) meaning "enmity persists" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: स्थानिक खासदारांशी जोडलेल्या व्यक्ती बर्याच गुन्हेगारी कार्यात सामील आहेत आणि घोटाळ्यांपैकी एक जण त्याच्या स्वत: च्या भावाच्या जीवनावर देखील दावा करतो
translated_text: Individuals connected to local MPs are involved in many criminal activities and one of the scams even claims the life of his own brother.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "गुन्हेगारी कार्यात सामील आहेत" (involved in criminal activities) and further intensified by "भावाच्या जीवनावर देखील दावा करतो" (even claims the life of his own brother), indicating severe crimes and loss of life.

Text: पहिल्या काही मिनिटांमध्ये संभाषण वन-लाइनर आणि पंच लाईन्सने भरलेले आहे, ज्यामुळे ते अतिशयोक्तीपूर्ण वाटते.
translated_text: The conversation in the first few minutes is full of one-liners and punch lines, which makes it seem exaggerated.
Justification: The sentence is negative because of the phrase "अतिशयोक्तीपूर्ण वाटते" (atishayoktipurna vaatte), which translates to "seems exaggerated," indicating a negative perception of the conversation.

Text: त्या धक्क्याने त्या मुलाची पत्नी वेळेच्या आधीच प्रसूत होते एका मुलीला जन्म देते
translated_text: Due to that shock, the boy's wife goes into premature labor and gives birth to a girl.
Justification: The word "धक्क्याने" (dhakkyane), meaning "due to the shock," indicates a negative event causing premature labor, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: कायदे आणि नियमांमधल्या पळवाटा शोधत तो लाखो करोडो रुपयांची उलथापालथ करत असतो
translated_text: He is embezzling lakhs and crores of rupees by finding loopholes in laws and regulations.
Justification: "उलथापालथ करत असतो" (ulthapalath karat asto - is embezzling/manipulating) indicates a negative action involving illegal financial activity, thus contributing to the negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: लेखक-दिग्दर्शक संतोष डावखर यांनी धर्माच्या विषयांचा शोध घेण्याचा प्रयत्न केला, परंतु अंमलबजावणीने समीक्षक गोंधळून गेले.
translated_text: Writer-director Santosh Davkhar tried to explore themes of religion, but the execution left critics confused.
Justification: "गोंधळून गेले" (gondhalun gele - confused) indicates a negative outcome or experience, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: ;कागर;मध्येही ग्रामीण भागातील राजकारणाचे विविध पैलू दिसतात, परंतू एकूणच या सिनेमात प्रेम आणि राजकारण यामध्ये दिग्दर्शक मकरंदची गफलत झाल्यामुळे सिनेमा विस्कळीत झाला आहे
translated_text: ;Kaagar; also shows various aspects of rural politics, but overall the film is marred by director Makarand's blunder between love and politics.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) because the phrase "गफलत झाल्यामुळे सिनेमा विस्कळीत झाला आहे" (gafalat zhalyamule cinema viskalit zhala aahe) indicates that the director made a blunder leading to a disjointed or messed-up film, implying a negative assessment.

Text: त्याला जे हवं आहे किंबहुना जे व्हावं असं वाटत आहे ते सारं काही त्याच्या हातातून निसटत चाललं आहे
translated_text: Everything he wants, everything he wants to happen, is slipping away from him.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "हातातून निसटत चाललं आहे" (haatatun nisatat chaalala aahe), which means "slipping away from his hands." This implies loss and lack of control, thus conveying a negative sentiment and the emotion of sadness.

Text: आज भारतचीन सीमेवरही तणावाचं वातावरण आहे
translated_text: Today there is a tense atmosphere on the India-China border as well.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "तणावाचं वातावरण" (taṇāvāch vaatavaraṇ), which translates to "tense atmosphere."

Text: अश्विनी अय्यर तिवारी दिग्दर्शित ‘बरेली की बर्फी’ हा ‘लिपस्टिक’ इतका अर्थपूर्ण नाही
translated_text: Bareilly Ki Barfi' directed by Ashwini Iyer Tiwari is not as meaningful as 'Lipstick'
Justification: The phrase "इतका अर्थपूर्ण नाही" (itka arthapoorn nahi - not as meaningful) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यात मृतदेह अन् रिशूचा तुटलेला हात सापडतो ज्यावर ‘रानी’ गोंदवलेलं असतं
translated_text: In it, a body and Rishu's broken hand are found, on which 'Queen' is tattooed.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "मृतदेह अन् रिशूचा तुटलेला हात" (mrutadeh ani Rishu cha tutlela haat), meaning "a dead body and Rishu's broken hand," which evokes a sense of morbidity and violence.

Text: - चित्रपटालाही आतापर्यंतच्या सर्वात मोठ्या कंटिन्युटी एररचा सामना करावा लागला आहे
translated_text: - The film also suffered from the biggest continuity error ever
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कंटिन्युटी एररचा सामना करावा लागला", specifically "सामना करावा लागला" which implies suffering or encountering a problem, thus evoking sadness.

Text: ज्यू नागरिकांच्या संदर्भातल्या काही गोष्टी नक्कीच उत्कंठा वाढविणाऱ्या आहेत मात्र त्या म्हणाव्याशा रंगत नाहीत
translated_text: There are certainly some things about Jewish citizens that are exciting, but they are not as colorful as they should be.
Justification: The phrase "म्हणाव्याशा रंगत नाहीत" (mhaNavyaashaa rangat naahit) indicates that the things being discussed are "not as colorful as they should be," implying a lack of vibrancy or appeal and thus contributing to the negative sentiment. The word "रंगत" (rangat), meaning color or vibrancy, is key here.

Text: चित्रपटात फक्त दोन ज्ञात चेहरे दिसू शकतात ते म्हणजे गोविंद नामदेव आणि राजेश शर्मा आणि दोघांचीही मर्यादित भूमिका आहे आणि चित्रपटात त्यांचा करिश्मा जोडण्यास असमर्थ आहेत
translated_text: The only two known faces that can be seen in the film are Govind Namdev and Rajesh Sharma and both of them have limited roles and are unable to add their charisma to the film.
Justification: "मर्यादित भूमिका आहे आणि चित्रपटात त्यांचा करिश्मा जोडण्यास असमर्थ आहेत" (limited roles and are unable to add their charisma to the film) expresses a lack of impact and inability to enhance the film, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: संजय नार्वेकर वगळता कलाकारांपैकी एकही कलाकार आपली अभिनय क्षमता दाखवू शकत नाही.
translated_text: Except for Sanjay Narvekar, none of the actors can show their acting ability.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "वगळता...एकही...शकत नाही" (vagalata...ekahi...shakat nahi), which translates to "except...none...can," indicating a lack of acting ability among all actors except one. This expresses a clear negative evaluation of the majority of actors.

Text: याशिवाय, चित्रपटात पोलिसानं केलेले विनोद अनावश्यक वाटतात, त्यामुळे ते थोडं निराशा देणार वाटतं
translated_text: Additionally, the jokes made by the police in the film seem unnecessary, making it a bit disappointing.
Justification: The phrase "निराशा देणार वाटतं" (nirasha denar vattat), meaning "seems disappointing", directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: ते एकतर तथ्यांचा अतिरेक करतात किंवा करमणुकीचा अतिरेक करतात
translated_text: They either exaggerate the facts or they exaggerate the entertainment.
Justification: "अतिरेक" (atirek), meaning "exaggeration" or "excess," indicates a negative sentiment as it implies going beyond acceptable limits in either fact or entertainment.

Text: संत्या आणि त्याचे मित्र कॉलेजमध्ये मजा करत असलेला भाग ट्रेलरमध्ये मूर्ख दिसत होता
translated_text: The part where Santya and his friends are having fun in college looked silly in the trailer.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "मूर्ख" (murkh), which translates to "silly" or "foolish," indicating a negative assessment of the scene.

Text: दुर्दैवाने हे नंतर मर्यादित प्रमाणात दर्शविले गेले आहे ज्यामुळे दर्शकांनी त्यांचे डोके स्क्रॅच केले
translated_text: Unfortunately, it has since been shown in limited quantities, leaving viewers scratching their heads.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "दुर्दैवाने" (durbhagyanē), meaning "unfortunately."

Text: पटकथेच्या पार्श्वभूमीत काळात आणि तपशीलात बऱ्यापैकी विस्कळीतपणा आहे
translated_text: There is considerable disarray in time and detail in the background of the script.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) due to the word "विस्कळीतपणा" (viskalitpana), which translates to "disarray" or "inconsistency," indicating a flaw in the script. This implies a negative quality.

Text: कारण, बऱ्याच अॅक्शनपटांप्रमाणे आता पुढे काय होणार, याविषयी प्रेक्षक सहजपणे तर्क लावू शकत आहेत
translated_text: Because, like many action films, the audience can easily speculate about what will happen next.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "सहजपणे तर्क लावू शकत आहेत" (sahajpane tarka lavu shakat aahet) implies predictability and lack of originality, which is a negative attribute in a film.

Text: इतरत्र, व्यापारी नीरज शाह (पुष्कर श्रोत्री) यांनी बँकेला कोटी रुपयांची फसवणूक केली आणि लंडनला पळून गेला.
translated_text: Elsewhere, businessman Neeraj Shah (Pushkar Shrotri) defrauds the bank of crores of rupees and flees to London.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the word "फसवणूक" (fasavnuk), which translates to "fraud" or "defrauding." This action carries a negative connotation.

Text: एकीकडे काही दहशतवादी खेळणाऱ्या मुलांवर नजर रोखून आहेत
translated_text: On one hand, some terrorists are keeping an eye on the children playing.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "दहशतवादी" (dahashatvadi), meaning "terrorists," which inherently carries a negative connotation.

Text: साचेबद्ध चौकटी आणि अपेक्षित वाटेवरून जाणाऱ्या ‘प्रीतम’मध्ये वेगळं काहीच नाही हे मात्र खरं
translated_text: It is true that there is nothing different in 'Pritam', which follows the stereotyped framework and the expected path.
Justification: The phrase "वेगळं काहीच नाही" (veglh kahich nahi) which translates to "nothing different," indicates a lack of uniqueness and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: या एकपात्री प्रयोगांद्वारे, ती तिच्या स्थितीबद्दल तिची निराशा व्यक्त करते
translated_text: Through these monologues, she expresses her frustration with her situation.
Justification: The word "निराशा" (nirasha), meaning frustration, is the key indicator of negative sentiment and the emotion of anger.

Text: स्त्रिया या नियमाच्या शेवटी असहाय्य आणि कोणत्याही अधिकारांपासून वंचित राहिल्या आहेत
translated_text: Women are left helpless and deprived of any rights at the end of this rule.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the Marathi word "असहाय्य" (asahayya), meaning helpless, which indicates a state of vulnerability and powerlessness, evoking disgust in the context of women being deprived of rights.

Text: साक्षीदारांचा साठा आणि फॉरेन्सिक पुराव्यांमध्ये संपूर्ण प्रकरण उलगडते, ज्यात म्हशीची विष्ठा, गांडुळे, ब्लेड, दुपट्टा आणि इतर अनेक घटकांचा समावेश आहे.
translated_text: The entire case unfolds in a hoard of witnesses and forensic evidence, including buffalo dung, earthworms, blades, scarves, and many other elements.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "म्हशीची विष्ठा, गांडुळे, ब्लेड" (mhashi chi vishta, gandule, blade) - "buffalo dung, earthworms, blades." These are unpleasant and potentially harmful items, creating a negative association with the unfolding case. While the emotion is neutral, the specific items themselves contribute to the negative sentiment.

Text: अनेक वर्षांच्या वियोगानंतर अचानक झालेल्या संपर्कामुळे जुन्या जखमा आणि कौटुंबिक आणि वैवाहिक संकटाच्या संकटात हरवलेल्या प्रेमाच्या कटू आठवणी उघड होतात
translated_text: A sudden contact after years of separation reveals old wounds and bitter memories of love lost in the throes of family and marital crisis.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "जुन्या जखमा" (junya jakhma), which translates to "old wounds," and the word "कटू" (katu), meaning "bitter," which colors the memory of lost love with negativity.

Text: चा लढा त्या वेळी इंग्रजांशी दोन हात करताना आलेल्या अडचणी यांबद्दल सिनेमा विस्ताराने सांगत नाही
translated_text: The film does not elaborate on the difficulties faced during the battle with the British.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "अडचणी यांबद्दल सांगत नाही" (adchni yanbaddal sangat nahi), which translates to "does not tell about the difficulties". This indicates a lack of positive or informative content, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: परंतु हेतुपुरस्सर अमूर्त संपादन कधीकधी तुम्हाला नायकाच्या दुःखात भावनिकरित्या गुंतवू देत नाही
translated_text: But the intentionally abstract editing sometimes doesn't allow you to emotionally engage with the protagonist's suffering.
Justification: "दुःखात" (dukhaat, suffering) indicates a negative sentiment due to its association with pain and distress.

Text: ती प्रत्येक वर्षी त्यांच्या लग्नाच्या वर्धापनदिनानिमित्त त्यांना एकत्र आणण्याचा प्रयत्न करत होती, परंतु आतापर्यंत ती सपशेल अपयशी ठरली आहे
translated_text: She had been trying to get them together every year for their wedding anniversary, but so far she had failed miserably.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "सपशेल अपयशी ठरली आहे" (sapshal apayashi tharali aahe), which translates to "failed miserably." This indicates a complete and utter failure, thus eliciting a negative sentiment.

Text: या घटनेत सस्पेंस, टेन्शन आणि थ्रिल निर्माण करण्याची खूप क्षमता होती, आम्हाला एक नम्र सीन मिळतो ज्यामध्ये कोणतीही भावना निर्माण होत नाही.
translated_text: This incident had a lot of potential to create suspense, tension, and thrill, we get a bland scene that doesn't evoke any emotion.
Justification: The phrase "कोणतीही भावना निर्माण होत नाही" (kontihi bhavna nirman hot nahi), meaning "doesn't evoke any emotion," indicates a lack of positive feeling and thus a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यानंतर चित्रपट सर्व अर्थ गमावून बसतो.
translated_text: After that, the film loses all meaning.
Justification: The phrase "अर्थ गमावून बसतो" (arth gamavun basato), meaning "loses all meaning," indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the emotion of sadness due to the loss of something valuable.

Text: कलाकारांचे अभिनय, विनोदनिर्मिती करण्याचे प्रयत्न जरी प्रामाणिक असले तरीही त्यांचं समीकरण मात्र फिस्कटलं आहे
translated_text: Even though the actors' acting and comedy efforts are sincere, their equation is flawed.
Justification: "फिस्कटलं आहे" (phiskatla aahe - flawed) indicates a negative outcome, making the sentiment negative.

Text: कुटुंबांनी आपल्या जातीबाहेर किंवा त्यांच्या इच्छेविरुद्ध लग्न केल्याबद्दल आपल्या मुलांना नाकारल्याच्या बातम्यांसह तत्सम बातम्या आपल्याला ज्या व्यवस्थेचा एक भाग आहोत त्या व्यवस्थेवर वारंवार प्रश्नचिन्ह निर्माण करतात.
translated_text: Similar news stories, including reports of families rejecting their children for marrying outside their caste or against their will, repeatedly question the system we are a part of.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "नाकारल्याच्या बातम्यांसह" (nakarlyachya batmyansah), which translates to "with news of rejecting/denying". This indicates a negative action being reported, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: पण ऐतिहासिक तीर्थक्षेत्राविषयी अनभिज्ञ असलेल्या व्यक्तीसाठीही, जहागीरदारांचा मिनिटाचा चित्रपट अगदी आदर्श आहे.
translated_text: But even for someone who is unaware of the historical pilgrimage site, the Jahangirdar's minute-long film is quite ideal.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "अनभिज्ञ" (anabhijna), which means "unaware." This indicates a lack of knowledge, implying a potential negative or ignorant state, contributing to the overall slightly negative sentiment, despite the positive ending.

Text: त्यासाठी त्यांना खूप संघर्ष करावा लागला
translated_text: They had to struggle a lot for that.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the Marathi word "संघर्ष" (sangharsh), which translates to "struggle" or "conflict." This inherently implies hardship and difficulty, thus contributing to the negative sentiment, even though the sentence itself is otherwise neutral.

Text: मुंबईसारख्या शहरात पोलिसांच्या हत्या होऊ लागतात
translated_text: Police killings start happening in cities like Mumbai
Justification: "हत्या" (hatya), meaning "killings" or "murders," indicates a negative event, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला तिची दया येते, पण मग पुन्हा ती तिच्या एकुलत्या एक मुलाशी संभाषण का करू शकत नाही, जेणेकरून ते एकत्र बरे होऊ शकतील? कबीर मावशीच्या भूमिकेत जमेनिसची भूमिका महत्त्वाची असली तरी अविकसित आहे
translated_text: You feel sorry for her, but then again why can't she have a conversation with her only son, so that they can heal together? Jamenis' role as Kabir's aunt is important but underdeveloped
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "दया येते" (daya yete), which translates to "feel sorry for her." This indicates a sense of pity and sadness towards the subject, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: चित्रपटातील अॅक्शन आणि संगीत सोडल्यास कथा-पटकथा आणि कलाकारांचा अभिनय या सगळ्या पातळीवर चित्रपट अक्षरशः फसलेला आहे
translated_text: Apart from the action and music, the film is a complete failure on all levels, from the story to the screenplay and the actors' performances.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अक्षरशः फसलेला आहे" (aksharah fassel aahe), meaning "completely failed," which indicates a strong negative assessment of the film.

Text: जेव्हा तिला कळते, की तिला आणि तिच्या कुटुंबियांना खूप त्रास होतो, की ती गंभीर मानसिक स्थितीने ग्रस्त आहे
translated_text: When she learns that she and her family are suffering greatly, that she is suffering from a serious mental condition
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "खूप त्रास होतो" (khoop tras hoto), meaning "suffering greatly," indicating a painful and distressing situation.

Text: चित्रपटातील गाण्यांच्या संख्येसह हे खूप जास्त आहे आणि ते आणखी वाईट करण्यासाठी, त्यापैकी पाच पहिल्या काही मिनिटांतच दिसतात!
translated_text: This is too much with the number of songs in the film and to make it worse, five of them appear within the first few minutes!
Justification: The phrase "खूप जास्त आहे" (khoop jaasta aahe) - "is too much" - indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the feeling of disgust, suggesting the quantity is overwhelming and unwelcome.

Text: तिसरा मुद्दा अधिक गंभीर आहे
translated_text: The third issue is more serious.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi word "गंभीर" (gambhir), which translates to "serious." This word implies a negative or problematic situation.

Text: कथाबीज चांगले आहे परंतु पटकथा तुकड्या तुकड्याने मांडल्यासारखी वाटते
translated_text: The plot is good but the screenplay feels like it's piecemeal.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "तुकड्या तुकड्याने मांडल्यासारखी वाटते" (tukdya tukdyane maandlyasaarkhi vaatte), which suggests the screenplay feels fragmented and piecemeal. This imparts a sense of disjointedness, leading to the negative sentiment, even though the plot is acknowledged as good.

Text: त्यांना कीर्टी विधुला चौगुले येथे एक बिनविरोध लाऊडमॅथ्ड साथीदार सापडला जो कबीरबरोबर त्याच्या मित्रांच्या छळ करण्याशी फारच प्रेम करतो.
translated_text: They find an unassuming loudmouthed companion in Kirti Vidhu Chowgule who, along with Kabir, is very fond of torturing his friends.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "छळ करण्याशी फारच प्रेम करतो" (chhal karṇyāshī phārach prem karato), which translates to "very fond of torturing," indicating a negative action and therefore a negative sentiment.

Text: या प्रकाराला घाबरून जग्गू रुग्णालयातून पळ काढतो आणि आपल्या घरी येतो
translated_text: Scared of this, Jaggu runs away from the hospital and comes home.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the word "घाबरून" (ghabarun), which translates to "scared." While the sentence describes actions, the underlying fear drives the negative sentiment.

Text: असे होण्याचे एक कारण म्हणजे चित्रपटाचे उथळ लेखन
translated_text: One reason for this is the film's shallow writing.
Justification: "उथळ लेखन" (uthal lekhan - shallow writing) indicates a lack of depth and quality, contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: पण या भव्यतेमध्ये चित्रपटाचा आत्मा कुठे तरी हरवतोय असं वाटतं
translated_text: But in all this grandeur, the soul of the film seems to be getting lost somewhere.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "हरवतोय असं वाटतं" (haravtoy asa vaatt'ta), which translates to "seems to be getting lost," indicating a negative perception of the film's core essence.

Text: अक्कूच्या शरीरावर सत्तरहून अधिक घाव
translated_text: More than seventy wounds on Akku's body
Justification: The phrase "सत्तरहून अधिक घाव" (seventy plus wounds) indicates severe violence and harm, eliciting a strong negative sentiment and specifically, disgust.

Text: तिच्या वाट्याला संवादही कमी आहेत
translated_text: She also has less communication.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "कमी आहेत" (kami aahet), meaning "less/fewer are," implying a lack or deficiency in communication. This signifies a negative circumstance for the subject.

Text: काही बाजूचे ट्रॅक हेराफेरीचे वाटतात, कारण प्री-क्लायमॅक्स आणि क्लायमॅक्स खुनांमध्ये वापरलेल्या अनेक प्रश्नांची किंवा तंत्रांची उत्तरे देत नाहीत.
translated_text: Some of the side tracks feel manipulative, as they don't answer many of the questions or techniques used in the pre-climax and climax murders.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "हेराफेरीचे वाटतात" (herapheriche vatatat), which translates to "feel manipulative." The word "हेराफेरी" (herapheri) itself implies deception and scheming, resulting in a negative perception.

Text: काय रे रास्कला मध्ये अनेक समस्या आहेत
translated_text: What the hell are the problems with Rascal?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "रास्कला" (raskala), which is a derogatory term implying disapproval and contributes to the surprise emotion.

Text: हा प्रवास कल्पनाविस्तारावर बेतला असताना अनेक त्रुटीही जाणवतात
translated_text: While this journey is based on imagination, many flaws are also evident.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the Marathi word "त्रुटी" (truti), which translates to "flaws" or "defects."

Text: पसरट पटकथा त्यातले प्रसंग ताणलेले भासतात
translated_text: The plot is broad and the scenes seem strained.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the Marathi word "ताणलेले" (taanlele), which translates to "strained" or "stretched." It implies a lack of natural flow or tension, contributing to the negative perception.

Text: परंतु काही ठिकाणी रितिकाचा अभिनय अतिरंजित वाटतो
translated_text: But in some places, Hrithik's acting seems exaggerated.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "अतिरंजित" (atiranjit), which means "exaggerated." It suggests a flaw or negative quality in the acting.

Text: पण बनेशला माहीत नाही की तो भयंकर अॅडमिशन एजंट अप्पा (गिरीश कुलकर्णी) विरुद्ध उभा आहे, जो आपले नापाक हेतू पूर्ण करण्यासाठी कोणत्याही थराला जायला तयार असतो.
translated_text: But Banesh doesn't know that he is up against the fearsome admissions agent Appa (Girish Kulkarni), who is willing to go to any lengths to fulfill his nefarious intentions.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "नापाक हेतू" (napak hetu), which translates to "nefarious intentions." This phrase indicates ill-will and malicious intent, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: स्टारपणा जाणवू न देता त्याने अभिनय केला आहे पण कथेतच दम नसल्याने आणि दिग्दर्शनही चांगले नसल्याने त्याची मेहनत वाया गेल्याचे स्पष्टपणे दिसून येते
translated_text: He has acted without giving the impression of being a star, but it is clear that his hard work has been wasted as the story lacks substance and the direction is not good.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "मेहनत वाया गेल्याचे" (mehanat vaya gelyache), which translates to "hard work being wasted." This phrase expresses a clear sense of loss and futility, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: तिचं तान्ह बाळ घरी एकटच असतं
translated_text: Her infant child is alone at home.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "एकटच असतं" (ekatach asata), which signifies "alone" or "lonely," implying a negative situation for the infant.

Text: याचं कारण पटकथेत लेखनासाठी वाव असतानाही म्हणावी तशी पातळी न गाठता आल्यानं लेखनाच्या पातळीवर तो अधांतरी राहतो
translated_text: The reason for this is that even though there is scope for writing in the screenplay, it remains incomplete in terms of writing because it has not reached the desired level.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "अधांतरी राहतो" (adhantari rahato), which implies that the writing remains incomplete or hanging, and doesn't reach a satisfactory level.

Text: कारण सिनेमातलं गावावरचं सावटच मुळात प्रेक्षकांच्या अंगावर येत नाही
translated_text: Because the image of the village in the movie doesn't really resonate with the audience.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "अंगावर येत नाही" (angaavar yet nahi), which translates to "doesn't resonate with the audience." This indicates a lack of impact or connection, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: या स्थलांतरात संबंधित देशांमध्येही त्याला मानसिक भावनिक आणि इतर आव्हानांचा सामना करावा लागला
translated_text: He also faced psychological, emotional and other challenges in the countries involved in this migration.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "आव्हानांचा सामना करावा लागला" (aavhanancha samna karava lagla), which translates to "faced challenges." This indicates a negative experience.

Text: पण ‘एक कबूतर’ हे गाणे सोडले तर बँडचे म्हणून वापरलेले ‘कावा कावा’ या गाण्याचा रिमेक तितकासा आकर्षक वाटत नाही
translated_text: But apart from the song 'Ek Kabutar', the remake of the song 'Kava Kava' used as the band's song doesn't seem that appealing.
Justification: The phrase "तितकासा आकर्षक वाटत नाही" (titakasa aakarshak vaatat nahi) which translates to "doesn't seem that appealing," expresses a negative sentiment.

Text: ते वळणच मूळ कथेला बाधा आणणारे आहे
translated_text: That twist is what disrupts the original story.
Justification: "बाधा आणणारे" (badha aananare), meaning "disrupts," indicates a negative impact on the story, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: त्याच्या एका सहलीमुळे त्याला चहाच्या दुकानात जुना कंदील सापडतो, पण भंगार विक्रेता त्याचे मूल्य पाहू शकत नाही.
translated_text: One of his trips leads him to find an old lantern in a tea shop, but the scrap dealer cannot see its value.
Justification: The phrase "भंगार विक्रेता त्याचे मूल्य पाहू शकत नाही" (bhangar vikreta tyache mulya pahu shakat nahi - the scrap dealer cannot see its value) indicates a negative sentiment because it suggests a lack of appreciation or understanding of something valuable, leading to a sense of loss or missed opportunity.

Text: अमृता खानविलकर वाईट नाही पण तिच्या अभिनयावरही वाईट व्यक्तिरेखेचा परिणाम होतो
translated_text: Amrita Khanvilkar is not bad but her acting is also affected by her bad character
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "वाईट" (waiṭa), which means "bad," used in the context of the character affecting her acting. While there is a mitigating factor of "नाही" (nāhī) meaning "not," the overall impact of "वाईट व्यक्तिरेखेचा परिणाम" (waiṭa vyaktirekhēchā pariṇāma) - "the effect of a bad character" - creates a negative impression.

Text: हे काही कोरडे क्षणांना जन्म देते जिथे काहीही महत्त्वपूर्ण घडत नाही आणि आपण वेळ लक्षात घेऊ लागतो
translated_text: This gives rise to some dry moments where nothing significant happens and we start to notice the time.
Justification: "कोरडे क्षणांना जन्म देते" (gives rise to dry moments) indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests a lack of excitement or positivity.

Text: पण नंतर पुन्हा गडबड होते
translated_text: But then it got messy again.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "गडबड" (gadbad), which translates to "messy" or "trouble," indicating a negative situation.

Text: इतर प्रसंगी तो इतका कोमल मनाचा माणूस बनतो की तोच माणूस आहे यावर विश्वास ठेवणं तुम्हाला कठीण जाईल
translated_text: Other times he becomes so soft-hearted that you'll have a hard time believing he's the same person.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the implication that the person's behavior is inconsistent and potentially deceptive, conveyed by the phrase "विश्वास ठेवणं तुम्हाला कठीण जाईल" (you'll find it hard to believe). This suggests a lack of trust or something unsettling about the person's behavior, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: पण उत्तरार्धात गरज नसतानाही येणाऱ्या कवितांमुळे चित्रपटाचा वेग काहीसा मंदावतो
translated_text: But the pace of the film slows down somewhat due to unnecessary poems in the latter half.
Justification: "मंदાવतो" (mandavto), meaning "slows down," indicates a negative impact on the film's pace, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: प्रदीर्घ प्रतिक्षेनंतर ती याचे एक लंगडे कारण देते
translated_text: After a long wait, she gives a lame reason for this.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "लंगडे कारण" (langde karan), meaning "lame reason," which implies a weak or unsatisfactory explanation.

Text: आता, बबली तिची मिस्टर परफेक्ट म्हणून कोणाची निवड करेल? चित्रपटाच्या कथानकाची सुरुवात एका गैरसमजाने होते ज्यामुळे बराच गोंधळ होतो आणि त्यामुळेच उर्वरित कथा तयार होते.
translated_text: Now, who will Babli choose as her Mr. Perfect? ​​The plot of the film begins with a misunderstanding that causes a lot of confusion and that is what sets the rest of the story.
Justification: The phrase "बराच गोंधळ होतो" (barach gondhal hoto), meaning "a lot of confusion occurs," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्याच्या सर्व चमकदार संगीतासह ‘उत्साही’ ख्रिसमसच्या उत्सवाच्या मूडशी सुसंगत आहे परंतु त्यात बर्याच गोष्टी पॅक करण्याचा प्रयत्न केल्याने ते सरासरी घड्याळ बनवते
translated_text: With all its bright music, ‘Spirited Away’ fits the festive mood of Christmas but trying to pack too much into it makes it an average watch.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "सरासरी घड्याळ बनवते" (sarasari ghadyaal banavate), which translates to "makes it an average watch," indicating a negative evaluation.

Text: काहीवेळा, कॅमेरा ठराविक सीनवर पाहिजे त्यापेक्षा जास्त वेळ रेंगाळतो
translated_text: Sometimes, the camera lingers on a certain scene longer than it should.
Justification: The phrase "जास्त वेळ रेंगाळतो" (jasta vel rengalato - lingers longer) implies a negative sentiment as it suggests an undesirable or excessive duration, leading to boredom or frustration.

Text: यामुळे चित्रपट निस्तेज होतो
translated_text: This makes the movie dull.
Justification: The word "निस्तेज" (nistej), meaning dull, directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: कथेतच नाही तर पात्रांकडून अपेक्षा काय करायची? खरे तर चित्रपटाचे आधीचे नाव ‘वारस’ असे होते
translated_text: What to expect from the characters, not just the story? In fact, the film's previous name was 'Varas'.
Justification: The sentence expresses disappointment with the story itself using the phrase "कथेतच नाही," indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: पण एवढं सगळं छान-छान असूनही सिनेमात बऱ्याच त्रुटी आहेत
translated_text: But despite all this greatness, the movie has many flaws.
Justification: The phrase "त्रुटी आहेत" (truti aahet), meaning "there are flaws," indicates a negative aspect, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: साप पकडून ते पुन्हा रानात सोडून देणे, इतर छोटी मोठी कामं करणाऱ्या त्या आदिवासी जमातीतील लोकांवर खोटे गुन्हे दाखल केले जातात
translated_text: False cases are filed against tribal people who do things like catching snakes and releasing them back into the wild, and other small tasks.
Justification: "खोटे गुन्हे दाखल केले जातात" (khote gunhe dakhal kele jatat - false cases are filed) indicates a negative sentiment because it describes an unjust action against the tribal community.

Text: त्याच्या मार्गात आता दोनच अडथळे आहेत
translated_text: There are only two obstacles in his way now.
Justification: The word "अडथळे" (adthale), meaning "obstacles," is responsible for the negative sentiment. While obstacles can be overcome, their presence inherently implies a negative or challenging situation.

Text: दुर्दैवाने बैठकीत माणूस हृदय अपयशी ठरतो
translated_text: Unfortunately, a man suffers heart failure in a meeting.
Justification: "दुर्दैवाने" (durbhāgyāne), meaning "unfortunately," clearly indicates a negative sentiment, and the context of heart failure reinforces the emotion of sadness.

Text: आपला मुलगा एकदम भोट आहे असे लक्षात आल्याने ते त्यांना हनिमूनला लंडनला पाठवतात
translated_text: Realizing that their son is a complete idiot, they send him to London for their honeymoon.
Justification: The phrase "एकदम भोट आहे" (ekdam bhot aahe), meaning "complete idiot," is highly negative and elicits anger.

Text: सुरुवातीला मीडिया किंवा पोलिस यांचीच ही खेळी असल्याचं मानून बच्चन पांडे मायरा आणि विशूच्या जीवावर उठतो
translated_text: Initially believing that this is a ploy by the media or the police, Bachchan Pandey takes revenge on Myra and Vishu.
Justification: The phrase "जीवावर उठतो" (jeevavar uthato), meaning "takes revenge on" or "wants to kill," indicates a negative sentiment and implies anger.

Text: मुलांमध्ये ताई म्हणून ओळखली जाणारी, ती प्रतिस्पर्धी गटांमध्ये शांतता प्रस्थापित करण्याचा प्रयत्न करते, परंतु व्यर्थ
translated_text: Known as Tai among the children, she tries to bring peace between rival factions, but in vain.
Justification: "व्यर्थ" (vyarth, in vain) indicates futility and contributes to the negative sentiment as the peace efforts are unsuccessful.

Text: क्रिकेट बोर्ड महिला खेळाडूंना यापूर्वी भारतीय संघाच्या पुरुष खेळाडूंनी वापरलेल्या त्यांच्या नावाच्या जर्सी देतात
translated_text: The cricket board is giving women players jerseys named after them, previously worn by male players of the Indian team.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because the phrase "यापूर्वी भारतीय संघाच्या पुरुष खेळाडूंनी वापरलेल्या" (previously worn by male players of the Indian team) implies a lack of new resources and suggests that women's players are being given hand-me-downs. This highlights a perceived inequality and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: तसेच निर्माता करण जोहरचा सूरही सध्या काहीसा बिघडलेला दिसतोय
translated_text: Also, producer Karan Johar's tone seems to be somewhat sour at the moment.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "बिघडलेला दिसतोय" (bighadlela distoy), which translates to "seems to be sour/spoiled". This indicates a negative state or condition.

Text: पण जसजशी वर्षे उलटली, शरद अजूनही अडकला आहे आणि आणखी कशाची तरी वाट पाहत आहे
translated_text: But as the years pass, Sharad is still stuck and waiting for something more.
Justification: "अडकणे" (adakne - stuck) indicates a negative state of being and contributes to the negative sentiment (-1) as it suggests Sharad is not progressing or moving forward in life.

Text: परंतु दुर्दैवाने पुरेशी वैद्यकीय सुविधा न मिळाल्याने तो केवळ दहाच दिवस जगू शकला
