translated_text: But unfortunately, due to lack of adequate medical facilities, he could only survive for ten days.
Justification: The phrase "दुर्दैवाने" (durbhagyane), meaning "unfortunately," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे जर सामाजिक संदेशच ऐकायचा आहे तर चित्रपटाचा केवळ शेवटच बघितलेला बरा असं वाटून जात
translated_text: So, if you want to hear the social message, it seems better to watch only the end of the film.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "असं वाटून जातं" which implies a feeling of resignation or disappointment, suggesting that watching the entire film is not worth the effort, only the ending which contains the social message.

Text: मृत व्यक्तीच्या अस्थींचे विसर्जन करणे हा सहसा कोणत्याही कुटुंबासाठी भावनिक क्षण असतो
translated_text: The burial of a deceased person's ashes is often an emotional moment for any family.
Justification: The phrase "भावनिक क्षण असतो" (bhavanik kshan asto), meaning "is an emotional moment," indicates a negative sentiment as emotional moments associated with death are generally considered sad or difficult.

Text: या चित्रपटातील साथीच्या आजारावर घेतलेली भूमिका अत्यंत सोपी आहे आणि जीवनाच्या सर्व स्तरातील लोकांवर त्याचा खरा प्रभाव पकडण्यात तो अपयशी ठरला आहे.
translated_text: The film's take on the pandemic is overly simplistic and fails to capture its true impact on people from all walks of life.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अत्यंत सोपी आहे आणि...अपयशी ठरला आहे" (atyant sopi aahe aani...apayashi tharala aahe), which translates to "overly simplistic and...fails," indicating a critical assessment of the film's portrayal.

Text: अविनाशविश्वजित यांची काही गाणी बरी आहेत पण या प्रेमत्रिकोणाची लांबी वाढवण्यापलीकडे त्यांचा उपयोग नाही
translated_text: Some of Avinash Vishwajit's songs are good but they are of no use beyond prolonging this love triangle.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "उपयोग नाही" (upayog nahi), which means "of no use". This indicates a lack of value or purpose, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: याच नेटवर्कने राजश्रीला स्पोर्ट्स अँकरिंगच्या संभाव्य नोकरीकडेही दुर्लक्ष केले आहे.
translated_text: The same network has also ignored Rajshree's potential sports anchoring job.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the word "दुर्लक्ष" (durlaksh), which translates to "ignored" in English. This signifies a lack of attention or consideration towards Rajshree's potential job, indicating a negative outcome.

Text: पण पुन्हा एकदा अशी काही घटना घडते की कावेरी वरुणपासून वेगळं राहण्याचा निर्णय घेते
translated_text: But once again, something happens that makes Kaveri decide to stay away from Varun.
Justification: The negative sentiment is due to the phrase "वेगळं राहण्याचा निर्णय घेते" (vegaḷaṁ rāhaṇyāchā nirṇaya ghete), which means "decides to stay away", implying separation and unhappiness.

Text: लिव्ह इनमध्ये राहणाऱ्या जोडप्यांकडे चांगल्या नजरेने पाहिले जात नाही
translated_text: Couples who live in live-in relationships are not viewed favorably.
Justification: The phrase "चांगल्या नजरेने पाहिले जात नाही" (changlya najarene pahile jat nahi - not viewed favorably) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: विशेष म्हणजे हस्तर याला मिळालेल्या शापामुळे तो एक दानव झाला असतो
translated_text: What's interesting is that Hastar was cursed and became a demon.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment (-1) due to the phrase "शापामुळे तो एक दानव झाला असतो" (shapaamule to ek daanav zhala asato), meaning "because of the curse, he became a demon," implying a negative transformation. While the overall emotion is neutral, the fact that he was cursed and became a demon is negative.

Text: काहीशी ‘लाउड’ असली तरीही नेहा जोशी लक्षात राहते
translated_text: Neha Joshi is memorable even though she is a bit 'loud'
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "लाउड" (loud), which implies a negative characteristic, even though slightly mitigated by "काहीशी" (a bit).

Text: त्यातून त्याला आपल्यात काहीतरी कमी आहे असे वाटायला लागते आणि त्यावर मात करण्यासाठी तो विविध प्रकारे लाचार बनतो
translated_text: This makes him feel like he is lacking something and he becomes helpless in various ways to overcome it.
Justification: The phrase "काहीतरी कमी आहे असे वाटायला लागते" (something is lacking) expresses a feeling of inadequacy, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांची मांडणी न झाल्याने चित्रपटाची पकड अधूनमधून सुटते
translated_text: The film occasionally loses its grip due to their lack of structure.
Justification: "सूटते" (sutate - releases, slips) indicates a weakening grip, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: कारण सिनेमातील काही दृश्ये तर्कहीन वाटतात
translated_text: Because some scenes in the movie seem illogical.
Justification: "तर्कहीन" (tarkheen - illogical) indicates a negative sentiment as it implies a flaw or weakness in the movie.

Text: याशिवाय लेखकानं पात्रंही नीट लिहिली नाहीत, त्यामुळे पडद्यावरचा त्यांचा अभिनय कमकुवत वाटतो
translated_text: Apart from this, the writer did not write the characters well, so their acting on screen seems weak.
Justification: The phrase "कमकुवत वाटतो" (kamkuvat vatato), meaning "seems weak," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण ज्या क्षणी लीड कपल बेपत्ता होते त्या क्षणाचा रनटाइम वाढवण्यापलीकडे काही संबंध नाही
translated_text: But the moment the lead couple goes missing has no relevance beyond extending the runtime.
Justification: The phrase "काही संबंध नाही" (kahi sambandh nahi) which translates to "no relevance" expresses a lack of positive connection or value, thus indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: नयना गोडबोले (सोनाली कुलकर्णी) लिफ्टमध्ये एका संशयास्पद अनोळखी व्यक्तीला टक्कर देते .
translated_text: Nayana Godbole (Sonali Kulkarni) bumps into a suspicious stranger in an elevator.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "संशयास्पद" (sanshayaspad), which means suspicious. This implies a potential threat or negative connotation.

Text: या चित्रपटांचे दाखले देण्याचं कारण म्हणजे हे चित्रपट पाहिलेल्या प्रेक्षकांची ‘ओह माय घोस्ट’ पाहून काहीशी निराशा होण्याची शक्यता आहे
translated_text: The reason for citing these films is that viewers who have seen these films may be somewhat disappointed by watching 'Oh My Ghost'.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "निराशा होण्याची शक्यता आहे" (nirasha honyachi shakya aahe) which translates to "there is a possibility of disappointment."

Text: जेव्हा प्रिया संस्कृत बालगुड त्याच्या प्रेमाची परतफेड करत नाहीत तेव्हा त्याच्या अहंकाराच्या विखुरलेल्या आणि त्याला नशाच्या चक्रावून पाठवतात तेव्हा नेहमीच त्याचा मार्ग असण्याची सवय आहे.
translated_text: Priya has a habit of always having his way when Sanskrit Balgud does not reciprocate his love, shattering his ego and sending him into a whirlwind of intoxication.
Justification: "अहंकाराच्या विखुरलेल्या" (shattering his ego) indicates a negative impact and loss, contributing to the negative sentiment. The description of this ego shattering as sending him into a "नशाच्या चक्रावून पाठवतात" (whirlwind of intoxication) further amplifies the negative and disgusting feeling.

Text: स्काईपवर आपल्या नातवंडांशी बोलत असताना त्याच्या डोळ्यातील चमक, आयुष्य घडवण्यासाठी त्याने सोडलेल्या गावात पोहोचल्यावर तो आनंद, तो आपल्या डॉक्टरांशी निरुपद्रवीपणे फ्लर्ट करत असतानाचा भावनिक क्षण, यूएसएमधले त्याचे कुटुंब साजरे करताना प्रभावळकर वरील त्यांचा वाढदिवस तुम्हाला तो एकाकीपणाची जाणीव करून देतो
translated_text: The sparkle in his eyes as he talks to his grandchildren on Skype, the joy when he reaches the village he left to build a life, the emotional moment when he flirts harmlessly with his doctor, the birthday he celebrates with his family in the USA, Prabhavalkar makes you feel lonely.
Justification: Despite the joyous elements described initially, the phrase "एकाकीपणाची जाणीव करून देतो" (ekaakipanachi jaaniiv karun deto) which translates to "makes you feel lonely," is the primary driver of the negative sentiment.

Text: ही गोष्ट जेव्हा अनन्याला समजते त्यावेळी तिला जबर मानसिक धक्का बसतो
translated_text: When Ananya understands this, she gets a severe mental shock.
Justification: "जबर मानसिक धक्का बसतो" (jabar mansik dhakka basato - severe mental shock) indicates a strongly negative experience, leading to the negative sentiment. The phrase directly expresses distress and trauma.

Text: परंतु समाजामनातल्या रावणवृत्तीचं काय हे कटू सत्य चित्रपटात मांडण्यात आलं आहे
translated_text: But the bitter truth about the Ravana attitude in society is presented in the film.
Justification: "कटू सत्य" (katu satya - bitter truth) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्याने याआधी काही चांगल्या चित्रपटांमध्ये काम केले होते, परंतु अलीकडे तो खराब चित्रपटांची निवड करत आहे.
translated_text: He had acted in some good films before, but recently he has been choosing bad films.
Justification: The phrase "खराब चित्रपटांची निवड करत आहे" (kharab chitrapatanchi nivad karat aahe), meaning "choosing bad films," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: जी उत्सुकता आणि अपेक्षा सिनेमाच्या कथानकाबाबत प्रेक्षकांमध्ये होती ती पूर्ती फोल ठरली आहे
translated_text: The curiosity and expectations that the audience had about the film's plot have failed to be fulfilled.
Justification: "फोल ठरली आहे" indicates that the expectations were not met and turned out to be futile, thus expressing a negative sentiment.

Text: एकमेकांवर जीवापाड प्रेम करणाऱ्या मीरा आणि आदित्यच्या वैवाहिक आयुष्यात जोरदार खटके उडू लागतात
translated_text: Meera and Aditya, who love each other dearly, start to experience serious problems in their married life.
Justification: "जोरदार खटके उडू लागतात" indicates significant conflict and issues arising, directly implying a negative sentiment and sadness.

Text: अस्फ्याने संत्याचे सांत्वन करताच ते दोघेही मद्यधुंद झाले
translated_text: As soon as Asfya consoled Santaya, they both became drunk.
Justification: The phrase "मद्यधुंद झाले" (madhyadhund zhale) meaning "became drunk" indicates a negative sentiment as it describes a state of inebriation, which can be associated with negative consequences.

Text: कथा बांधून ठेवते आहे असं वाटत असलं तरी कुठंकुठं सैलही सुटते
translated_text: Even though the story seems to be holding together, it also comes loose at some points.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "सैलही सुटते" (sailahi sutate), which translates to "comes loose" or "slips," indicating a weakening or failure in the narrative's coherence, thus contributing to a negative perception.

Text: तापसीला याचा फटका कदाचित तिचा पुढचा चित्रपट ;सांड की आंख;च्या वेळेस बसण्याची शक्यता आहे
translated_text: Taapsee is likely to be affected by this as her next film, Saand Ki Aankh, is likely to be released at the same time.
Justification: The negative sentiment is indicated by the word "फटका" (phatka), which translates to "affected" or "impacted" negatively, suggesting a detrimental effect on Taapsee.

Text: मुलीच्या लग्नावेळीच मुलाचाही बार उडवा, ज्यामुळे हुंडा येईल, त्यातून मुलीचे हात पिवळे करता येतील
translated_text: At the time of the girl's marriage, blow up the boy's bar as well, which will bring dowry, which can turn the girl's hands yellow
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "हुंडा येईल" (hunda yeil) meaning "dowry will come," which promotes the illegal and harmful practice of dowry, outweighing the seemingly joyful occasion described.

Text: ती भयंकर निराशावादी आहे आणि तिची स्वत:ची घृणा तुम्हाला कुरवाळते
translated_text: She is a terrible pessimist and her self-loathing makes you cringe.
Justification: "भयंकर निराशावादी" (bhayankar niraashavadi - terrible pessimist) strongly contributes to the negative sentiment, indicating a pessimistic outlook.

Text: अडीच तासांपेक्षा जास्त काळ लांबलेल्या या चित्रपटाचा शेवट कधी एकदा येईल असं आपल्याला वाटत राहतं
translated_text: This film, which lasts for more than two and a half hours, keeps you wondering when it will end.
Justification: The phrase "कधी एकदा येईल असं आपल्याला वाटत राहतं" (kadhi ekda yeil asa aplyala vaatat rahat) expresses a feeling of impatience and wishing for the end, indicating a negative sentiment and, in this context, disgust with the film's length.

Text: आपल्या एकुलत्या एक मुलाच्या मृत्यूची माहिती देणारा एक शोकग्रस्त कुटुंबाला तार पोहोचवल्यानंतर, पोस्टमन नोकरी सोडण्याचा विचार करत राहतो.
translated_text: After delivering a telegram to a grieving family informing them of the death of their only child, a postman contemplates quitting his job.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "शोकग्रस्त कुटुंबाला" (shokgrasta kutumbale), which translates to "grieving family." This phrase explicitly indicates sadness and sorrow.

Text: परमब्रत चक्रवर्ती एक चांगला अभिनेता आहे पण इथे त्याच्या वाट्याला विशेष काही आले नाही
translated_text: Parambrata Chakraborty is a good actor but nothing special happened to him here.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "विशेष काही आले नाही" (vishesh kahi aale nahi), which translates to "nothing special happened," indicating a lack of positive outcome or recognition.

Text: स्वतः पालक गमावण्याचा विचार समजणे कठीण आहे परंतु अंमलबजावणी एक स्वर स्थापित करण्यासाठी संघर्ष करते
translated_text: The thought of losing a parent yourself is hard to fathom but the execution struggles to establish a tone.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "संघर्ष" (sangharsh), which translates to "struggles." This indicates difficulty and negativity.

Text: विवाहाचे पावित्र्य जपणाऱ्या व्यक्तीसुद्धा जाणूनबुजून असो वा नसो, पूर्ण अनोळखी व्यक्तींच्या भेटीगाठी आयोजित करून आणि केवळ त्यांच्या वडीलधाऱ्यांच्या आवडीनिवडींवर आधारित लग्नासाठी दबाव टाकून, विवाहाचे पावित्र्य जपणाऱ्या व्यक्तीही अशा क्षुल्लकतेने कसे वागतात हे विरोधाभासी आहे.
translated_text: It is paradoxical how even those who uphold the sanctity of marriage behave with such frivolity, whether intentionally or not, by arranging meetings between complete strangers and pressuring them to get married based solely on the preferences of their elders.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the word "क्षुल्लकतेने" (kshullaktene), which translates to "with frivolity" or "with pettiness." This word highlights the speaker's disapproval and disgust towards the trivialization of marriage.

Text: महेश मांजरेकर या माणसाने हा सिनेमा आपल्या नावावर तोलण्याचा प्रयत्न केला खरा पण त्यात त्यांना फारसे यश आले नाही, असेच म्हणावे लागेल
translated_text: It must be said that Mahesh Manjrekar tried to make this film his own, but he didn't have much success.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "फारसे यश आले नाही" (pharase yash aale nahi), meaning "didn't have much success." This indicates a lack of positive outcome, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: दुर्दैवाने, चित्रपट निर्मात्याला या दोन पैलूंमधून मार्ग काढण्यात यश आले नाही
translated_text: Unfortunately, the filmmaker was unable to navigate these two aspects.
Justification: The word "दुर्दैवाने" (durbhāgyāne), meaning "unfortunately," directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: परंतु सिनेमातील काही व्हीएफएक्स दृश्ये खोटी वाटतात
translated_text: But some of the VFX scenes in the movie look fake.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "खोटी" (khoti), which means "fake" or "false." This indicates a negative quality of the VFX scenes, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: पण आतली गोष्ट अशी आहे की त्याच्या वडिलांनी त्याच्या आईला शिवीगाळ केली ती त्या बदल्यात दुसऱ्या माणसाकडे निघून जाते, तिच्या सर्वात लहान मुलाला, एका मुलासोबत पळत असते.
translated_text: But the inside story is that his father abused his mother and she in turn left for another man, running away with her youngest child, a boy.
Justification: The phrase "शिवीगाळ केली" (shiveegaal keli), meaning "abused" or "verbally abused," indicates a negative action, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: दिग्दर्शकाला नेमके काय सांगायचे आहे हे समजत असले तरी सिनेमातील ओढूनताणून घडविलेल्या दृश्यांना कात्री लागायला हवी होती
translated_text: Even though the director understood exactly what he wanted to say, the overly drawn-out scenes in the film needed to be cut.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "ओढूनताणून घडविलेल्या दृश्यांना कात्री लागायला हवी होती" (the overly drawn-out scenes needed to be cut), which indicates criticism of the film's pacing and editing.

Text: त्याऐवजी ज्या पद्धतीने हे पाचही जण न्याय मिळवतात आणि पुन्हा आपल्या भ्रष्टाचारी व्यवस्थेमुळे हे पाऊल उचलावे लागले हे सांगण्याचा प्रयत्न करतात, तो पटत नाही
translated_text: Instead, the way these five people seek justice and then try to say that this step had to be taken because of our corrupt system is not convincing.
Justification: The phrase "पटत नाही" (patat nahi), meaning "not convincing," directly indicates a negative sentiment. The emotion of disgust is inferred from the context of a "corrupt system" forcing action.

Text: एकूणच काय तर सिनेमात काही त्रुटी आहेत
translated_text: Overall, there are some flaws in the movie.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "त्रुटी" (truti), which translates to "flaws."

Text: मृत व्यक्तीला मोक्ष देण्याच्या नावाखाली पैसे उकळण्यात त्याला अजिबात पर्वा नाही
translated_text: He doesn't care at all about extorting money in the name of saving the dead.
Justification: "पर्वा नाही" (parwa nahi - doesn't care) indicates a lack of empathy and disregard for ethical behavior, contributing to the negative sentiment. This, coupled with the exploitative act described, strongly suggests disgust.

Text: सिनेमाच्या कथानक आणि पटकथेच्या पातळीवर फार सखोलपणे काम झालेलं दिसत नाही
translated_text: The film's plot and screenplay don't seem to have been worked on very thoroughly.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "फार सखोलपणे काम झालेलं दिसत नाही" which indicates a lack of thorough work on the film's plot and screenplay.

Text: तसं पाहिलं तर हा चित्रपट चर्चेत येण्याआधी दिग्दर्शक अनुराग कश्यप आणि अभिनेता अनिल कपूर यांच्यातील सोशल मीडियावरील वाद लोकांच्या नजरेत भरले
translated_text: In fact, before this film became a hit, the social media controversy between director Anurag Kashyap and actor Anil Kapoor caught the public's attention.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the word "वाद" (vaad), which translates to "controversy" or "dispute."

Text: चित्रपटातील विनोद पटकथेत चांगल्या प्रकारे समाकलित केला आहे परंतु त्यात मौलिकता नाही आणि परिणामकारक नाही.
translated_text: The humor in the film is well integrated into the script but lacks originality and is not effective.
Justification: The phrase "परिणामकारक नाही" (parinamakarak nahi), meaning "not effective," indicates a negative sentiment towards the film's humor.

Text: त्यांच्या डोक्यावर मृत्युची टांगती तलवार होती
translated_text: The sword of death hung over their heads.
Justification: "मृत्युची टांगती तलवार" (mrutyuchi tangati talwar - the sword of death hanging) evokes a feeling of impending doom and threat, directly contributing to the negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: विविध शैली एकत्रित करणे - म्युझिकल कॉमेडी थ्रिलर नाटक आणि कल्पनारम्य - कथनाविरूद्ध कार्य करते
translated_text: Combining different genres - musical comedy thriller drama and fantasy - works against the narrative
Justification: "कथनाविरूद्ध कार्य करते" (works against the narrative) indicates a negative impact, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: या कारखान्यात काहीतरी गौडबंगाल असल्याचं समोर येतं आणि अचानक वस्तीत एक रोग पसरतो
translated_text: It turns out that something is amiss in this factory, and suddenly a disease spreads through the settlement.
Justification: The phrase "गौडबंगाल असल्याचं" (gaudabangal aslyach) which translates to "something is amiss" or "something fishy is going on," indicates a negative situation and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: यात अगदी शेवटच्या एपिसोडमध्ये केवळ एक शिवी आहे
translated_text: There is only one insult in the very last episode.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the presence of the Marathi word "शिवी" (shivi), which translates to "insult/curse word." The neutral emotion is due to the sentence simply stating the fact without expressing strong emotion.

Text: एक तरुण, अर्जुन (शिवराज वायचळ) त्याच्या सुरुवातीच्या काळात, एका संध्याकाळी उशिरा मद्यधुंद होऊन घरी परततो, तो नित्याचा सराव होता.
translated_text: A young man, Arjun (Shivraj Vaichal) in his prime, returns home drunk late one evening, as was his usual practice.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "मद्यधुंद होऊन घरी परततो, तो नित्याचा सराव होता" (madyadhund houn ghari paratto, to nityacha sarav hota) which translates to "returns home drunk, as was his usual practice". This highlights a repeated, undesirable behavior, indicating a negative habit and inducing feelings of disgust.

Text: ‘स्त्री’आमिषाला बळी पडून शंतनू त्या ‘ईमेल’च्या जाळ्यात अडकतो आणि लाखो रुपये त्यावर खर्च करतो
translated_text: Falling for the lure of a 'woman', Shantanu falls into the trap of that 'email' and spends lakhs of rupees on it.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "आमिषाला बळी पडून" (āmīṣhāḷā baḷī paḍūna) which translates to "falling prey to the lure/bait" indicates a negative experience and exploitation.

Text: लाला युसुफझाय हे प्रेरणादायक व्यक्तिमत्व कोणाला माहीत नाही पाकिस्तानच्या स्वात खोऱ्यात तालिबानी दहशतवाद्यांनी मुलींच्या शिक्षणाला बंदी घातली आणि त्यांचे घरातून बाहेर पडणे बंद केले तेव्हा शिक्षणाला तहानलेली ही मुलगी धाडसाने बाहेर पडली आणि दहशतवाद्यांनी तिला गोळ्या घातल्या
translated_text: Who doesn't know the inspiring personality of Lala Yousafzai? When Taliban terrorists banned girls' education in Pakistan's Swat Valley and stopped them from leaving their homes, this girl, thirsty for education, bravely stepped out and was shot by the terrorists.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "दहशतवाद्यांनी तिला गोळ्या घातल्या" (dahashatavadyanni tila golya ghatlya - the terrorists shot her), which expresses a violent and traumatic event. This evokes a sense of fear.

Text: सामाजिक कर्तव्यावर लक्ष केंद्रित करूनही, चित्रपटाच्या निर्मात्यांना कथानकाला कमजोर करणाऱ्या त्रुटींसाठी माफ करता येत नाही.
translated_text: Despite focusing on social duty, the film's makers cannot be forgiven for the flaws that undermine the plot.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because of the phrase "माफ करता येत नाही" (maaf karta yet nahi), which means "cannot be forgiven."

Text: पण कथानकातील त्रुटी आणि पटकथेतील विस्कळीतपणा सिनेमाचा अंतिम परिणाम फारसा साधत नाही
translated_text: But the plot flaws and the disjointedness of the screenplay do not really contribute to the final outcome of the film.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "फारसा साधत नाही" (pharasa sadhat nahi), which translates to "does not really contribute" or "doesn't achieve much," indicating a lack of positive impact.

Text: जवळपास सात वर्षं हा बिनबोभाट चाललेला गोरखधंदा मध्ये संशयाच्या भोवऱ्यात येतो
translated_text: This business, which has been going on for almost seven years, is now under suspicion.
Justification: "संशयाच्या भोवऱ्यात येतो" (suspicion) indicates negativity, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: एक भूतकाळात होऊन गेलेला गुन्हा असतो किंवा भूत जो वर्तमानकाळात नायकाला किंवा नायिकेला छळत असतो
translated_text: A past crime or ghost that haunts the hero or heroine in the present.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "छळत" (chhaLat), which means "haunts" or "torments," implying a negative and distressing experience.

Text: त्याच्याकडे योग्य अगतिकता आहे, पात्रासाठी आवश्यक आहे
translated_text: He has the right vulnerability, necessary for the character.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "अगतिकता" (agatikatā) which translates to "vulnerability". While contextually necessary, vulnerability inherently carries a negative connotation.

Text: दुर्दैवाने, चित्रपट सर्वात महत्त्वाच्या क्षणांमध्ये उच्च गुण मिळवत नाही
translated_text: Unfortunately, the film doesn't score high in the most important moments.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the use of "दुर्दैवाने" (durbhāgyāne), which translates to "unfortunately."

Text: परिणामी यात गुंडगिरी हिंसाचार आहेच
translated_text: As a result, there is bullying and violence.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the presence of the Marathi words "गुंडगिरी हिंसाचार" (gundgiri hinsaachaar), meaning "bullying and violence," which inherently connote a negative and undesirable situation.

Text: या वेडेपणाला, असंवेदनशीलतेला आणि अमानवी दृष्टिकोनाला मर्यादा नाही
translated_text: There is no limit to this madness, insensitivity and inhumane approach.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "असंवेदनशीलतेला आणि अमानवी दृष्टिकोनाला मर्यादा नाही" (asansvedansheelatela aani amanavi drushtikonala maryada nahi) which highlights the limitless nature of insensitivity and an inhumane approach.

Text: जर तुम्ही पहिला भाग पाहिला असेल तर तुम्हाला सुरुवातीच्या घडामोडी थोड्या कंटाळवाण्या वाटतील
translated_text: If you've seen the first episode, you might find the initial events a bit boring.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the Marathi word "कंटाळवाण्या" (kantaalvanyaa), meaning "boring," expresses a negative feeling about the initial events.

Text: पण सिनेमातील अशी फायटिंगची दृश्ये कृत्रिम आणि नाट्यमय वाटतात
translated_text: But such fighting scenes in the movie seem artificial and dramatic.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "कृत्रिम" (krutrim), meaning artificial, which indicates a lack of authenticity and lowers the perceived quality of the fighting scenes.

Text: गरिबांच्या कहाण्या सहज बघायला मिळत नाहीत, पण त्यांच्या दुर्दशेकडे डोळेझाक करणं हा फक्त पाषाणहृदयाच्या लोकांसाठीच पर्याय आहे.
translated_text: The stories of the poor are not easy to see, but turning a blind eye to their plight is only an option for the stone-hearted.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "पाषाणहृदयाच्या लोकांसाठीच पर्याय आहे" (pāṣāṇahr̥dayācyā lōkānsāṭhīca paryāya āhē), which translates to "only an option for the stone-hearted." This implies a strong disapproval of those who ignore the plight of the poor, associating such behavior with being "stone-hearted," thereby conveying a negative sentiment.

Text: सगळं गुडीगुडी, हिरो आणि हिरोईनचं प्रेम होणार, व्हिलन त्यांना विरोध करणार, काही वेळा घरातूनच त्यांच्या प्रेमाला विरोध असणार, त्यातून एखाद दोन गाणी बागेत म्हणा किंवा समुद्र किनारी चित्रित केली जाणार त्यामुळे प्रेक्षकांना आपणही काही काळ जगप्रवास केल्याचा फील येणार, सरतेशेवटी हिरो आणि व्हिलनमध्ये जोरदार मारामारी होऊन एकाचवेळी पन्नास गुंडांना आपल्या दैवी शक्तीनं पराभूत करणाऱ्या तद्दन बॉलीवूडपटांची मोठी रेलचेल कायम आहे
translated_text: Everything is going well, the hero and heroine will fall in love, the villain will oppose them, sometimes there will be opposition to their love from home itself, one or two songs will be sung in the garden or filmed on the beach, so that the audience will feel like they have traveled the world for some time, in the end, there is a huge fight between the hero and the villain and they defeat fifty goons at once with their divine powers. There is a long line of Bollywood films like this.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "तद्दन बॉलीवूडपटांची मोठी रेलचेल कायम आहे" (tadadan Bollywoodpatanchi mothi relchel kayam aahe), which implies an overabundance and lack of originality in Bollywood films, creating a negative association.

Text: त्यात तो एका मुलीच्या प्रेमात पडतो आणि आपल्या बायकोचा खून करण्याचा निर्णय घेतो ही त्याची पार्श्वभूमी कथेत पुढे उलगडत जाते
translated_text: His background is revealed later in the story, as he falls in love with a girl and decides to kill his wife.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "खून करण्याचा निर्णय घेतो" (khoon karण्याचा nirnay gheto), meaning "decides to kill," which clearly indicates a negative action.

Text: पण एकदा का ते हरवलं की, यातना त्याला एका माणसात बदलतात
translated_text: But once it is lost, the suffering turns him into a man.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the Marathi word "यातना" (yatna), which translates to "suffering" or "torment" in English. This word directly indicates a negative experience.

Text: याचा आपल्या प्रत्येकाच्या जीवनावर कधी ना कधी विपरित परिणाम होईल, सुसंस्कृत समाजाला अराजकतेत टाकले जाईल
translated_text: This will have an adverse effect on each of our lives at some point, throwing civilized society into chaos.
Justification: "विपरित परिणाम" (viparita parinam) which translates to "adverse effect," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: साहजिकच हा चित्रपट मांजरेकरांनी दिग्दर्शित केला आहे यावर क्षणभरही विश्वास ठेवणे कठीण आहे.
translated_text: Obviously, it's hard to believe for a moment that this film was directed by Manjrekar.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "विश्वास ठेवणे कठीण आहे" (vishwas thevane kathin aahe), which translates to "hard to believe." This indicates disbelief and a negative assessment of the film in relation to Manjrekar's directorial abilities.

Text: घरात त्याला एका महिलेचा मृतदेह दिसतो
translated_text: He finds a woman's body in the house.
Justification: The phrase "मृतदेह दिसतो" (mrutdeh disto - finds a dead body) indicates a negative situation, justifying the negative sentiment. While the emotion is neutral, the presence of a dead body inherently contributes to the negative sentiment score.

Text: पण चित्रपट अयशस्वी होतो जेव्हा तो सर्वात महत्त्वाचा असतो
translated_text: But the film fails when it matters most.
Justification: The phrase "अयशस्वी होतो" (ayashasvi hoto), meaning "fails," directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: सूक्ष्मता आणि उपदेश यात समतोल राखायला हवा होता
translated_text: A balance had to be struck between subtlety and exhortation.
Justification: "राखायला हवा होता" (had to be struck) implies a lack of balance and a missed opportunity, indicating a negative sentiment. The emotion remains neutral as the sentence expresses a statement of fact rather than eliciting a strong emotional response.

Text: आंतरराष्ट्रीय पातळीवर भारताचे प्रतिनिधित्व करणाऱ्या महिला खेळाडूंना स्वतःच्या नावाची हक्काची जर्सीदेखील मिळू नये इतक्या दुजेपणाला त्यांना सामोरं जावं लागलं
translated_text: Women players representing India at the international level have faced such discrimination that they were not even allowed to wear jerseys with their names on them.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the phrase "इतक्या दुजेपणाला त्यांना सामोरं जावं लागलं" (itkya dujepanala tyana samoro jaava lagla), which translates to "they had to face such discrimination." This phrase highlights the discriminatory treatment experienced by the female athletes.

Text: पटकथासंवादातही एक प्रकारचा बाळबोधपणा आणि सरधोपटपणा आहे
translated_text: There is a kind of childishness and sloppiness in the script dialogue as well.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "बाळबोधपणा" (balbodhpana), meaning childishness/simplicity in a negative context, and "सरधोपटपणा" (sardhopatpana) which means sloppiness/being straightforward in a negative way, implying lack of nuance.

Text: तसंच सिनेमाही काहीसा ताणला जातो आणि मग तो कंटाळवाणा होऊन जातो
translated_text: Also, the movie gets a bit tense and then it becomes boring.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "कंटाळवाणा" (kantaalwana), which means "boring." This word expresses a negative feeling about the movie.

Text: सर्वात वाईट म्हणजे रायगड असलेल्या पश्चिम घाटातील पर्वताची उंची पाहता तिची परीक्षा अपेक्षेपेक्षा लवकर संपते.
translated_text: The worst part is that her exam ends sooner than expected, given the height of the mountain in the Western Ghats where Raigad is located.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "सर्वात वाईट म्हणजे" (sarvat vait mhanje), which translates to "the worst part is." This phrase introduces a negative evaluation of the situation.

Text: मात्र या कारणामुळे त्याचं बालपणीचे प्रेम रुपा (करीना कपूर) वारंवार त्याच्याशी लग्न करण्यास नकार देते
translated_text: However, due to this reason, his childhood sweetheart Roopa (Kareena Kapoor) repeatedly refuses to marry him.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "नकार देते" (nakar dete), meaning "refuses," indicating a negative action of rejection.

Text: जेव्हा त्यांना समजतं की ‘बस्ता’ चोरीला गेला आहे तेव्हा ते खचतात आणि आत्महत्या करण्यासाठी पोलिस स्टेशनमधून बाहेर पडतात
translated_text: When they realize that the 'bag' has been stolen, they become distraught and leave the police station to commit suicide.
Justification: The phrase "आत्महत्या करण्यासाठी" (aatmahatya karnyasathi - to commit suicide) strongly indicates a negative sentiment and expresses profound sadness.

Text: ;तुम्हाला ब्रेन कॅन्सर आहे;, असं जेव्हा डॉक्टर एखाद्या वक्तीला सांगतात तेव्हा त्यांची मानसिक स्थिती काय असेल याचा सर्वांनाच अंदाज आहे
translated_text: When a doctor tells a speaker, "You have brain cancer," everyone can guess what their mental state will be.
Justification: The phrase ";तुम्हाला ब्रेन कॅन्सर आहे;" (you have brain cancer) is responsible for the negative sentiment and elicits disgust due to its association with a severe and life-threatening illness.

Text: काजोलच्या तोंडी नुसत्या शिव्या आहेत
translated_text: Kajol's mouth is full of insults.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "शिव्या" (shivya), meaning "insults/abuses," which expresses a negative concept.

Text: केवळ नाटकांमधून काम करण्याला प्राधान्य देणारी अनन्याची कुठलीच गोष्ट नीटनेटकी नाही आणि वेळेवरही नाही
translated_text: Ananya, who prefers to work only in dramas, does nothing neat or timely.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "कुठलीच गोष्ट नीटनेटकी नाही आणि वेळेवरही नाही" (kuthalich gosht neetnetaki nahi aani velevarhi nahi), which translates to "nothing neat or timely." This indicates a lack of order and punctuality, contributing to a negative overall assessment.

Text: अनिलची मुलगी अभिनेत्री सोनम कपूरचं तो अपहरण करतो
translated_text: He kidnaps Anil's daughter, actress Sonam Kapoor.
Justification: The negative sentiment is derived from the word "अपहरण करतो" (apaharan karto), meaning "kidnaps," which denotes a harmful action. While the emotion is neutral, the act itself has negative connotations.

Text: इंडस्ट्रीतील इतर तत्सम आउटिंग्जच्या बाबतीतही या चित्रपटाची मोठी कमतरता म्हणजे व्ही.एफ.एक्स
translated_text: The major shortcoming of this film, even when compared to other similar outings in the industry, is the VFX.
Justification: "कमतरता" (kamtarata), meaning "shortcoming" or "deficiency," indicates a negative aspect of the film, thus driving the negative sentiment.

Text: गंभीर विषयावर हलक्याफुलक्या पद्धतीने भाष्य करु पाहणारा हा सिनेमा असला तरी तो मेलोड्रामॅटिक होत गेल्याने अविश्वसनीय वाटू लागतो आणि त्यामुळेच जबरदस्त वाटत नाही
translated_text: Although this is a film that tries to comment on a serious subject in a light-hearted way, it becomes too melodramatic and therefore doesn't feel compelling.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "अविश्वसनीय वाटू लागतो" (avishvasniy vatu lagto), which translates to "feels unbelievable/not compelling," indicating a lack of believability and a negative assessment of the film.

Text: हा चित्रपट चकचकीत करणाऱ्या क्षणांनी भरलेला आहे ज्यामुळे तुम्हाला आश्चर्य वाटेल की कोणताही चित्रपट निर्माता त्याच्या प्रेक्षकाला इतका मूर्ख कसा मानू शकतो
translated_text: This film is full of dazzling moments that will make you wonder how any filmmaker could consider their audience so stupid.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "मूर्ख कसा मानू शकतो" (murkh kasa manu shakto), which translates to "how can [they] consider [us] so stupid," expressing disapproval and offense despite the initial mention of "चकचकीत" (chakachakit) implying joy, thus leading to the joyful emotion.

Text: तो कोण आहे आणि त्याला काय हवे आहे?माझ्या बायकोचा प्रियकर हे भ्रामक शीर्षक आहे
translated_text: Who is he and what does he want? My wife's lover is a misleading title
Justification: "भ्रामक" (bhramak) meaning "misleading" indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests deception or inaccuracy.

Text: किल्ला पासून त्याचे आकर्षण अबाधित आहे, परंतु येथे त्याला फारसे काही करता येत नाही
translated_text: His charm is intact from the fort, but there's not much he can do here.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "फारसे काही करता येत नाही" (pharase kahi karta yet nahi), which translates to "not much he can do," indicating a limitation and thus a negative connotation.

Text: सर्वसमावेशक सिनेमा म्हणून कागज अधिक पारिणामकारक झाला असता जो यावेळी काहीसा कमी पडलाय
translated_text: Kaajal would have been more effective as an all-encompassing film, which is somewhat lacking this time around.
Justification: "कमी पडलाय" (kami padlaay), meaning "lacking" or "falling short," indicates a negative assessment of the film's effectiveness.

Text: पण त्याची केस सुरू असतानाच विराजला एका अनोळखी व्यक्तीकडून पैशासाठी क्रूर गुन्हा करण्याची विनंती करणारे पत्र मिळाले.
translated_text: But while his case was ongoing, Viraj received a letter from a stranger requesting him to commit a brutal crime for money.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "क्रूर गुन्हा" (krur gunha), which translates to "brutal crime," indicating a negative and undesirable action.

Text: सहसा, अशा चित्रपटाचा शेवटचा सीन प्रभाव निर्माण करण्यात मोठी भूमिका बजावतो, परंतु हा चित्रपट असामान्य असल्याचे दिसते.
translated_text: Usually, the last scene of such a film plays a big role in creating an impact, but this film seems to be unusual.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "असामान्य असल्याचे दिसते" (asamanya aslyache diste), which translates to "seems to be unusual," implying a deviation from the norm and suggesting a potentially undesirable or unexpected outcome.

Text: आता महिला तुरुंगात गेल्या आहेत, पण हत्या कोणी केली? हा प्रश्न अद्याप अनुत्तरीत आहे
translated_text: Now the women have gone to jail, but who committed the murder? This question is still unanswered.
Justification: "हत्या" (murder) indicates a negative event, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्याचप्रमाणे काही महत्त्वाच्या घटनांमध्ये अक्कल नसते
translated_text: Similarly, in some important events, common sense is lacking.
Justification: The sentence is negative due to the phrase "अक्कल नसते" (akkal nasate), which translates to "common sense is lacking." This indicates a deficiency and implies a negative state of affairs.

Text: पुरुष पोलिस अधिकारी वसतिगृहात येतात आणि रश्मीला तापसी पन्नू जबरदस्ती अटक करुन घेऊन जातात
translated_text: Male police officers come to the hostel and forcibly arrest Rashmi and take her away with Taapsee Pannu.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "जबरदस्ती अटक करुन घेऊन जातात" (jabardasti atak karun gheun jatat), which translates to "forcibly arrest and take away," indicating a forceful and unwanted action.

Text: मात्र सगळी सतत डोक्यात राख घालून घेतलेली नेहमी हिडीस फिडीस करणारी पात्रे म्हणजे विनोद आणि कथेतील सोपेपणा म्हणजे बावळटगिरी असा काहीसा समज करून घेतल्याने सगळा बाळबोध कारभार झाला आहे
translated_text: However, all the characters who are constantly wearing ash on their heads and always making jokes are jokes and the simplicity of the story is nonsense, so the whole thing has become a childish affair.
Justification: The phrase "बावळटगिरी असा काहीसा समज करून घेतल्याने" (understanding the simplicity as nonsense) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण ती फोल ठरली असून सलमान स्वतःच्याच सलमानमय आवेशातून बाहेर पडला आहे
translated_text: But it failed and Salman has gone out of his own Salman-like zeal.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "फोल ठरली" ("fol tharali"), which translates to "failed".

Text: तोही हे सगळं करून घेत नाही कारण त्याचा खर्च प्रचंड आहे
translated_text: He doesn't do all this either because the cost is huge.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "खर्च प्रचंड आहे" (kharch prachanda aahe), which translates to "the cost is huge," indicating a significant negative financial burden.

Text: मात्र काही ना काही कारणांनी या दोघांत खटके उडत आहेत
translated_text: But for some reason, there are conflicts between the two.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "खटके उडत आहेत" (khatke udat aahet), which translates to "there are conflicts/sparks flying". This implies discord and disagreement, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: त्याच्याविषयी सांगायचं झाल्यास अक्षयनं या चित्रपटातून प्रेक्षकांची निराशा केली आहे
translated_text: Speaking of him, Akshay has disappointed the audience with this film.
Justification: "निराशा केली आहे" (niraasha keli aahe) translates to "disappointed" and indicates a negative sentiment of disappointment, hence sadness.

Text: महाराजांची आज्ञा होती की बहलोल खानाला ठार मारावे
translated_text: The Maharaja's order was to kill Bahlol Khan.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is due to the phrase "ठार मारावे" (thar marave), which translates to "kill", indicating violence and a negative action.

Text: जशी कबीरला त्याच्या प्रश्नांची उत्तरे सापडत नाहीत, प्रेक्षक आश्चर्य करतात की अशा मूलभूत तार्किक समस्यांकडे दुर्लक्ष का केले गेले?
translated_text: As Kabir cannot find answers to his questions, the audience wonders why such basic logical issues were ignored.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "आश्चर्य करतात की अशा मूलभूत तार्किक समस्यांकडे दुर्लक्ष का केले गेले?" which translates to "wonder why such basic logical issues were ignored?". This phrase expresses a sense of disbelief and disapproval.

Text: टीव्ही मराठी रेटिंग : दोन
translated_text: TV Marathi Rating: Two
Justification: "दोन" (don, meaning "two") in this context indicates a low rating, implying a negative sentiment. While not strongly emotional, a low rating is generally undesirable.

Text: खराब व्यक्तिचित्रणामुळे गोरेसच्या कामगिरीला त्रास होतो
translated_text: Poor characterization plagues Gores' performance
Justification: "खराब" (kharab) meaning "poor" is a negative descriptor, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: तमाशा लाइव्हच्या अनेक दिशानिर्देश आहेत की ते काहीसे निराशाजनक आहे की जाधव यांनी थीम आणि पात्रे पूर्णपणे न मांडणे निवडले.
translated_text: There are so many directions Tamasha Live is taking that it's somewhat disappointing that Jadhav chose not to fully flesh out the themes and characters.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "काहीसे निराशाजनक" (kahise nirashajanak), meaning "somewhat disappointing," expresses a feeling of disillusionment.

Text: फू गे या शीर्षकातील संभाव्य खेळ ऑनवर्ड्स देखील सपाट आहे
translated_text: The potential game Onwards, titled Fu Gay, is also flat.
Justification: "सपाट आहे" (sapaat aahe) meaning "is flat" carries a negative sentiment (-1) in this context because it suggests a lack of excitement or appeal of the game.

Text: डॉलीचे मृणमाय देशपांडे यांचे चित्रण स्तरित आहे आणि अधिक शोधले जाऊ शकते
translated_text: Mrunmay Deshpande's portrayal of Dolly is layered and can be explored further.
Justification: The sentiment is slightly negative (-1) due to the phrase "अधिक शोधले जाऊ शकते" (adhik shodhale jau shakate), which implies that the portrayal has untapped potential, suggesting it's not fully realized or complete in its current state, indicating a subtle deficiency.

Text: सरबतीला कॅन्सर असल्याचं निदान होतं
translated_text: Sarabati was diagnosed with cancer.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "कॅन्सर असल्याचं निदान होतं" (cancer aslyach niadaan hot), which translates to "diagnosed with cancer," indicating a serious and unfortunate medical condition.

Text: तर्कशास्त्र हा ढक्काचा एक मजबूत बिंदू नाही आणि चित्रपटात असंख्य सैल टोक आहेत
translated_text: Logic is not one of Dhaka's strong points and the film has numerous loose ends.
Justification: "सैल टोक आहेत" (loose ends are there) indicates incompleteness and lack of resolution, contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: जेव्हा तो एखाद्यावर ओरडतो तेव्हा तुम्ही घाबरून जाता
translated_text: You get scared when he yells at someone.
Justification: The negative sentiment and fear emotion are derived from the word "घाबरून" (ghabrun), which translates to "scared" or "frightened," directly indicating a negative emotional state.

Text: बबली मीनल (पूजा सावंत) आणि तरुणांच्या टोळीसह त्याला सुरुवातीला विचित्र वाटणारे लोक भेटतात.
translated_text: He initially meets people who seem strange to him, including Babli Meenal (Pooja Sawant) and a gang of young men.
Justification: The phrase "विचित्र वाटणारे" (vichitra watnare) meaning "strange-seeming" contributes to the negative sentiment, indicating a sense of discomfort or unease.

Text: सॉरी एकसुरीपणात त्यांची वाट लागली
translated_text: Sorry, they waited in silence.
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "वाट लागली" which, while literally meaning "waited," in this context and common usage, implies a negative consequence or ruin due to waiting, hence conveying a negative sentiment.

Text: सिनेमातील न्यायलयात होणारा ड्रामा पाहून अनेकदा तर हसू येते
translated_text: Watching the courtroom drama in movies often makes me laugh.
Justification: The sentiment is negative despite the emotion being joy because the phrase "हसू येते" (hasu yete - makes me laugh) is being used sarcastically or dismissively, suggesting the courtroom drama is so over the top that it's laughable, implying a negative judgment on the movie's quality. The implied meaning of the sentence is that the drama is ridiculous.

Text: पण सर्व लखलखीत असलं तरी      च्या बंटी और बबलीची निरागसता दुसऱ्या भागात नाही
translated_text: But despite all the excitement, Bunty and Babli's innocence is not there in the second part.
Justification: The phrase "निरागसता दुसऱ्या भागात नाही" (niragasata dusarya bhagat nahi) indicating the absence of innocence in the second part, contributes to the negative sentiment (-1).

Text: किंबहुना, काही गाणी कथनात अडथळा ठरतात
translated_text: In fact, some songs become an obstacle to the narrative.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the Marathi word "अडथळा" (adathala), which translates to "obstacle" or "hindrance." This word indicates a negative impact on the narrative.

Text: चित्रपट सुरु होतो तेव्हा तिचा खून झालेला आहे आणि ही पार्श्वभूमी हळूहळू उलगडत जात तिचा खुनी हा तिचा नवराच आहे हे फार काळ लपून राहत नाही
translated_text: When the film begins, she has been murdered, and as the background gradually unfolds, it is not long before it becomes clear that her murderer is her husband.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "खून झालेला आहे" (khoon zaleela aahe), meaning "has been murdered," which indicates a tragic and violent event.

Text: बेहेरे आणि शेट्टी या महिलांना त्यांची प्रतिभा दाखवण्यासाठी मोजकेच सीन्स मिळतात
translated_text: Women like Behere and Shetty get only a few scenes to showcase their talents.
Justification: The phrase "मोजकेच सीन्स मिळतात" (mojakech scenes miltat), meaning "only a few scenes are available," indicates a lack of opportunity and implicitly expresses a negative sentiment.

Text: जेव्हा ती कबीराशी टक्कर देते तेव्हापासून ईशाच्या पात्राची आलेख बदलते, तथापि, ती सहानुभूती मिळवण्यात अपयशी ठरते
translated_text: Isha's character graph changes from the moment she clashes with Kabir, however, she fails to gain sympathy.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "सहनुभूती मिळवण्यात अपयशी ठरते" (sahanubhuti milavnyat apayashi tharte), which translates to "fails to gain sympathy." This indicates a failure to connect with the audience, resulting in a negative perception.

Text: त्यांच्यावर भ्रष्टाचारी असा शिक्का बसवण्यासाठी सीबीआय चौकशीचा खेळ खेळला जातो
translated_text: The game of CBI investigation is being played to brand them as corrupt.
Justification: "भ्रष्टाचारी असा शिक्का बसवण्यासाठी" (to brand them as corrupt) indicates a negative sentiment and evokes disgust as it implies a deliberate attempt to damage someone's reputation by associating them with corruption.

Text: आपल्याकडे वाईट नजरेने लकी बघतोय असा तिचा गैरसमज होतो आणि ती त्याच्या श्रीमुखात भडकावते
translated_text: She misunderstands that Lucky is looking at her with a negative eye and she provokes him to his face.
Justification: "वाईट नजरेने" (waiṭa najarene) translates to "with a negative eye," indicating a negative perception or ill intent, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: चित्रपटाचा पूर्वाध प्रेक्षकांना खिळवून ठेवण्यात यशस्वी ठरत असला तरी उत्तरार्ध मात्र विशेष नाही
translated_text: Although the first half of the film is successful in keeping the audience entertained, the second half is not special.
Justification: The phrase "विशेष नाही" (vishesh nahi), meaning "not special," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: कुटुंबियांचे प्रयत्न समुपदेशकाचे ‘डोस’ याचा काहीही उपयोग होत नाही आणि गाडी घटस्फोटापर्यंत पोहोचते
translated_text: The family's efforts, the 'dose' of the counselor, are of no use and the car reaches the point of divorce.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "काहीही उपयोग होत नाही" (kahīhī upayōg hōt nāhī), which means "of no use" or "completely ineffective," indicating a failure to improve the situation.

Text: गोविंदाकादरखान यांची पडद्यावरची जुगलबंदी पुन्हा निर्माण होऊ शकत नाही हे मान्यच पण या अस्सलची नक्कल करताना सर्वच पातळ्यांवर गल्लत झाली आहे
translated_text: It is true that the on-screen juggling act of Govinda and Kadarkhan cannot be recreated, but the attempt to imitate this original has gone wrong on all levels.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "गल्लत झाली आहे" (gallat jhali aahe), which translates to "gone wrong/messed up," indicating a failure or negative outcome.

Text: त्याच्याविषयीच्या अप्रिय गोष्टीप्रसंग कॅमेऱ्यात टिपतो
translated_text: He records unpleasant things about him on camera.
Justification: The sentence is negative due to the word "अप्रिय" (apriya), meaning "unpleasant." This indicates an unfavorable or negative situation being recorded.

Text: या धावपळीत तो जगणंच विसरुन जातो
translated_text: In this rush, he forgets to live.
Justification: "विसरुन जातो" (visrun jato - forgets) indicates a loss or lack of fulfillment, resulting in a negative sentiment. The emotion is neutral because it simply states a fact about the consequence of the rush, without expressing anger, sadness, or any other strong emotion.

Text: संकलकाची कात्री काही ठिकाणी अधिकच चालली आहे
translated_text: The compiler's scissors are working too hard in some places.
Justification: "अधिकच चालली आहे" (adhikach chalali aahe - working too hard) implies excessive and undesirable manipulation, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: कल्पेशराज कुबल गेल्यावर्षीच्या कबीर सिंग सिनेमातील नायक कबीरनं प्रेयसी प्रीतीच्या श्रीमुखात भडकवल्याचा प्रसंग चर्चेचा विषय ठरला होता
translated_text: Kalpeshraj Kubal The incident in last year's Kabir Singh, where the hero Kabir provoked his girlfriend Preeti into having sex with him, became a topic of discussion.
Justification: "भडकवल्याचा" (bhadakvalyacha), meaning "provoked" or "incited" in a forceful, negative way, contributes to the negative sentiment and feeling of disgust, as it implies a non-consensual or manipulative act.

Text: मात्र सांस्कृतिक संदर्भांचा अभाव दृश्यात्मकतेऐवजी संवादावरील भर अभिनयापासून संवादापर्यंत सोपेपणाच्या नावाने प्रकटणारा उथळपणा या कथेला मराठी बनवत नाही आणि भावनिकदृष्ट्या स्पर्शतही नाही
translated_text: However, the lack of cultural references, the emphasis on dialogue instead of visuals, and the shallowness that appears in the name of simplicity, from acting to dialogue, do not make this story Marathi and do not touch it emotionally.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the sentence states that the story "भावनिकदृष्ट्या स्पर्शतही नाही" (bhāvanikdr̥ṣṭyā sparśatahī nāhī), meaning it does not touch emotionally, indicating a lack of positive emotional engagement.

Text: मात्र काहींनी डोकंच पिकवायचं ठरवलंय तर त्याला आपण तरी काय करणार बरं हा चित्रपट खूपच सुमार आहे असं म्हणता येणार नाही
translated_text: But if some people decide to grow their own heads, then what can we do about it? It can't be said that this film is very good.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "चित्रपट खूपच सुमार आहे असं म्हणता येणार नाही" (chitrapat khoopach sumaar aahe asaa mhantaa yenar naahi), which translates to "It can't be said that this film is very good". The indirect negation suggests that the film is likely bad or mediocre, thus implying a negative sentiment, even if it avoids explicitly stating the negative quality. "सुमार" (sumaar) meaning "mediocre" further strengthens the justification.

Text: त्यात प्रेक्षकांनी या चित्रपटानं आपली निराशा केल्याचे म्हटले आहे
translated_text: In it, the audience said that this film disappointed them.
Justification: "निराशा केल्याचे" (niraasha kelyaache), meaning "disappointed," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: काही वेळा तो खूप प्रयत्न करतो, विशेषत: ज्या दृश्यात तो रागाने जातो
translated_text: He tries too hard at times, especially in the scene where he goes into a rage.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "रागाने जातो" (rāgāne jāto), which translates to "goes into a rage," indicating anger and thus contributing to a negative connotation, even though the overall emotion is neutral.

Text: एवढं सगळं छान छान असून सुध्दा ठराविक वेळेनंतर चित्रपट थोडा ताणल्यासारखा वाटतो
translated_text: Even though everything is so great, the movie feels a bit stretched after a certain point.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "थोडा ताणल्यासारखा वाटतो" (thoda tanalyasarkha vatato), meaning "feels a bit stretched," indicates a negative experience with the movie.

Text: पण काही प्रसंगांमध्ये तो ;विवेक ओबेरॉय;चं वाटतो
translated_text: But in some cases, he feels like Vivek Oberoi.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "विवेक ओबेरॉयचं वाटतो" (feels like Vivek Oberoi) implies a negative comparison, given Vivek Oberoi's controversial image and career trajectory.

Text: परंतु क्लायमॅक्सदेखील कंटाळवाणा झाला आहे
translated_text: But even the climax has become boring.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi word "कंटाळवाणा" (kantālvaṇā), which translates to "boring".

Text: जवळपास अडीच तासांचा हा चित्रपट थोडाफार कंटाळवाणा वाटू शकतो
translated_text: This film, which is almost two and a half hours long, can seem a bit boring.
Justification: The phrase "कंटाळवाणा वाटू शकतो" (kantaalwana watu shakto), meaning "can seem boring," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: गारपिटीमुळे त्यांच्या पिकाच्या झालेल्या नुकसानीची त्यांना शासनाकडून अद्याप भरपाई मिळालेली नाही
translated_text: They have not yet received compensation from the government for the damage to their crops caused by the hailstorm.
Justification: "नुकसानीची" (nuksanichi - damage) indicates a negative situation, causing the negative sentiment.

Text: पटकथा आणि संकलनाच्या बाबीत अधिक काम करण्यास वाव होता
translated_text: There was scope for more work in the areas of screenwriting and editing.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अधिक काम करण्यास वाव होता" (adhik kaam karanyas vaav hota), which implies a deficiency or lack of quality, suggesting that improvements were needed.

Text: अभ्यासात कमी गती असलेल्या मुलांना एका वर्गात एकत्र करून त्यांना ‘ड’, ‘ई’, ‘फ’ अशा तुकडय़ा चिकटवल्या जातात
translated_text: Children who are slow in their studies are grouped together in a class and given letters like 'D', 'E', 'F'.
Justification: The phrase "‘ड’, ‘ई’, ‘फ’ अशा तुकडय़ा चिकटवल्या जातात" (letters like 'D', 'E', 'F' are stuck on them) implies a dehumanizing and stigmatizing act, causing disgust at the unfair labeling and implied inferiority assigned to the children.

Text: त्या खुनांचे आरोप तो सुधारगृहातल्या मुलांवर टाकतो आणि स्वतचा बचाव करतो
translated_text: He blames the murders on the children in the reformatory and defends himself.
Justification: The negative sentiment is due to "खुनांचे आरोप तो सुधारगृहातल्या मुलांवर टाकतो" (khunanche arop to sudharagruhatlya mulanvar takto) - the act of falsely accusing children of murder.

Text: हीच तारीख आहे जेव्हा काही दहशतवाद्यांनी मुंबई हादरवून टाकली होती
translated_text: This is the date when some terrorists shook Mumbai.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "दहशतवाद्यांनी मुंबई हादरवून टाकली होती" (dahashatvādyānnī mumbaī hādaravūna ṭākalī hōtī), which translates to "terrorists shook Mumbai." This phrase evokes a sense of fear, violence, and negative impact, thus leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: आणि एक स्वधर्मी आणि स्वत:ची बनवलेली स्त्री म्हणून चित्रित होऊनही, ती स्त्री (राजेश्वरी सचदेव) तिच्या पतीविरुद्ध (सचिन खेडेकर) भारतीय दंड संहितेच्या कलम चा गैरवापर करणाऱ्या महिलेचा खटला लढण्यासाठी स्वतःच्या नैतिकतेशी तडजोड करते
translated_text: And despite being portrayed as a self-righteous and self-made woman, the woman (Rajeshwari Sachdev) compromises her own morality to fight the case of a woman who misuses the Indian Penal Code section against her husband (Sachin Khedekar).
Justification: "गैरवापर करणाऱ्या" (gairvapar karnarya, meaning "misusing") indicates a negative action and injustice, contributing to the negative sentiment and eliciting disgust.

Text: प्रीतम कागणे उदास क्षणांमध्ये चांगली आहे, परंतु भावनिकरित्या भरलेल्या दृश्यांमध्ये ती विषयापेक्षा अधिक मधुर दिसते.
translated_text: Pritam Kagane is good in sad moments, but in emotionally charged scenes she seems more melodramatic than matter-of-fact.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "विषयापेक्षा अधिक मधुर दिसते" (vishayapeksha adhik madhur diste), meaning "seems more melodramatic than matter-of-fact," indicates an over-the-top or unnatural performance, thus reflecting negatively on Pritam Kagane's acting in emotionally charged scenes.

Text: या आजारामुळे त्याची आवडती क्रियाकलाप, गिर्यारोहण आणि निखिल सामान्य जीवन जगणे देखील थांबवते
translated_text: This disease also stops his favorite activity, mountain climbing, and Nikhil from living a normal life.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "थांबवते" (thambavate), which translates to "stops." This indicates a negative impact on Nikhil's life due to the disease.

Text: सिनेमाच्या नावावरूनच सांगायचं झालं तर सिनेमात नमक मीठ कमी पडलंय
translated_text: If you look at the title of the movie, you can tell that the movie lacks salt and pepper.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "नमक मीठ कमी पडलंय" (namak meeth kami padlay), meaning "lacks salt and pepper," indicates a deficiency or lack of essential elements, implying a negative quality of the movie.

Text: आपल्या मुलीच्या भवितव्याबद्दल चिंताग्रस्त असलेल्या एका बापाच्या भूमिकेत त्याने एक दमदार कामगिरी केली आहे
translated_text: He has given a powerful performance in the role of a father who is worried about his daughter's future.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "चिंताग्रस्त" (chintagrast), meaning "worried" or "anxious," indicating a negative emotional state.

Text: तीन मुख्य अभिनेत्यांपैकी कोणाचीही खात्रीशीर केमिस्ट्री नाही आणि आपण त्यांच्या कथित आजीवन मैत्रीवर सतत शंका घेतो.
translated_text: None of the three main actors have convincing chemistry, and we are constantly left questioning their supposed lifelong friendship.
Justification: "खात्रीशीर केमिस्ट्री नाही" (no convincing chemistry) expresses a lack of believability, contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: यामुळे तो माणूस दूर होतो आणि तो तिला नाकारतो
translated_text: This makes the man distant and he rejects her.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the word "नाकारतो" (nakarto), meaning "rejects," which indicates a strong feeling of disapproval and repulsion in the context of the sentence.

Text: पटकथेतले काही ‘ट्रॅक’ निश्चित चांगले रंगले आहेत पण हे ‘ट्रॅक’ एकत्र परिणाम म्हणून जोडल्यास त्यातला नर्मविनोद म्हणावासा रंगत नाही
translated_text: Some of the 'tracks' in the script are certainly well-written, but when these 'tracks' are put together as a result, the humor in them doesn't really shine.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because "नर्मविनोद म्हणावासा रंगत नाही" (narmavinod mhanavasa rangat nahi), which translates to "the humor doesn't really shine," indicating a lack of desired positive impact.

Text: त्याची आई चिडलेली आहे आणि तिच्या पतीला शुद्धीवर आणण्यासाठी धडपडत आहे
translated_text: His mother is furious and struggling to bring her husband to his senses.
Justification: "चिडलेली आहे" (chidleli aahe), meaning "is furious," directly indicates a negative sentiment and the emotion of anger.

Text: त्याच्या प्रेमकथेलाही फारसा वाव देण्यात आलेला नाही
translated_text: His love story hasn't been given much space either.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the phrase "फारसा वाव देण्यात आलेला नाही" (pharasa vaav denyat aalela nahi), which translates to "hasn't been given much space." This indicates a lack or absence of something desired, resulting in a negative feeling.

Text: एकाचवेळी अनेक गोष्टींवर भाष्य करण्याचा दिग्दर्शकाच्या अट्टहासापायी मूळ विषय बाजूला पडला आहे
translated_text: The original subject has been sidelined by the director's insistence on commenting on many things at once.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "अट्टहासापायी" (attahasapayee), meaning "due to insistence," implies a negative consequence of the director's actions, leading to the main subject being sidelined.

Text: सुमंत कधीकधी दोघांमधील संतुलन शोधण्यात अपयशी ठरतो
translated_text: Sumant sometimes fails to find a balance between the two.
Justification: The word "अपयशी" (apayashi) meaning "fails" contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: रुपाली एक श्रीमंत कुटुंबातील मुलगी आहे आणि तिच्या कुटुंबाला लकी आवडत नाही
translated_text: Rupali is a girl from a rich family and her family does not like Lucky.
Justification: "आवडत नाही" (aavadat nahi) indicates dislike, which contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: जोशी आणि भावे हे जिवलग मित्र म्हणून विश्वासात असले तरी त्यांची मैत्री कधीकधी खूप गोड असते आणि ती खोटी वाटते.
translated_text: Although Joshi and Bhave are trusted as best friends, their friendship is sometimes too sweet and feels fake.
Justification: The phrase "खूप गोड असते आणि ती खोटी वाटते" (khoop god aste aani tee khoti vatate) meaning "too sweet and feels fake" indicates a negative sentiment as it implies insincerity in the friendship.

Text: आपली खोली शिऱ्याच्या घश्यात जाईल म्हणून संतापलेला दिग्या मांज्यानं शिऱ्या आणि सुप्रियाचा जीव घेतो
translated_text: Digya, enraged that his room will be in Shira's throat, kills Shira and Supriya with a knife.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "संतापलेला दिग्या" (santaplela Digya), meaning "enraged Digya," clearly indicating anger and a negative context. Furthermore, "जीव घेतो" (jeev gheto), meaning "kills", adds to the negative sentiment.

Text: सौरऊर्जेचा व्यवसाय करणारा सत्या विज्ञानाची पूजा करतो आणि कोणीही गॅझेट टाकल्यावर त्याचा तिरस्कार करतो
translated_text: Satya, a solar energy entrepreneur, worships science and hates when anyone throws in a gadget.
Justification: The word "तिरस्कार" (tiraskar), meaning hatred or contempt, indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: बालपणातच त्यांच्यापासून बाप दुरावलेला असतो
translated_text: Their father is distant from them in their childhood.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "दुरावलेला" (duravalela), which translates to "distant" or "separated." This word implies a negative experience of loss or absence of a father figure during childhood.

Text: या कामात त्याचं मन फारसं रमत नाही
translated_text: He doesn't really enjoy this work.
Justification: "मन फारसं रमत नाही" (man faras ramat nahi - mind doesn't really enjoy/engage) indicates a lack of interest and enjoyment, thus justifying the negative sentiment and sadness.

Text: इतर अनेक चित्रपटांप्रमाणे हा चित्रपटही सेकंड हाफ सिंड्रोमने ग्रस्त आहे
translated_text: Like many other films, this one also suffers from second half syndrome.
Justification: The phrase "सिंड्रोमने ग्रस्त आहे" (syndrome ne grasta aahe), meaning "suffers from syndrome," indicates a negative situation, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: निराश झालेला रोहन पुन्हा आपल्या जुन्या कॉलेजमध्ये अर्थात पिशोरीमल चमनलाल कॉलेजमध्ये परततो
translated_text: Disappointed, Rohan returns to his old college, Pishorimal Chamanlal College.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "निराश" (nirash), which means "disappointed" in Marathi.

Text: पण, त्यांचा हा प्रयत्न फसलाय
translated_text: But, their attempt failed.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "फसलाय" (faslaya), which means "failed." This indicates a negative outcome and contributes to the sadness emotion.

Text: जेव्हा तो मुख्य विषयापासून विचलित होतो आणि त्याला भावनिक करण्याचा प्रयत्न करतो तेव्हाच तो संघर्ष करतो
translated_text: He only struggles when he deviates from the main topic and tries to make it emotional.
Justification: "संघर्ष करतो" (sangharsh karto - struggles) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: मध्यंतरानंतर शेवटाकडे जाताना होणारा गोंधळ आणि गुंडाळलेला शेवट टाळता आला असता तर चित्रपट अधिक मनोरंजक झाला असता
translated_text: The film would have been more interesting if the confusion and twist ending towards the end could have been avoided after the interval.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "गोंधळ आणि गुंडाळलेला शेवट" (gondhal aani gundalalela shevat) which means "confusion and twist ending", indicating a negative aspect of the film.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांना अभियंता बनवण्याची सक्ती कशी केली जाते हे दाखवणारे चित्रपट आले आहेत (इडियट्स चित्रपट हे एक प्रमुख उदाहरण आहे)
translated_text: There have been movies showing how students are forced to become engineers (the movie Idiots is a prime example).
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "सक्ती केली जाते" (sakti keli jaate), which translates to "forced to," indicating coercion and a lack of free will.

Text: पण त्यातील आशय आणि त्यांच्या पात्रांमधील खोलीचा अभाव कलाकारांना फारशी संधी देत ​​नाही
translated_text: But the content and the lack of depth in their characters don't give the actors much of a chance.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "खोलीचा अभाव" (kholicha abhav), which translates to "lack of depth." This indicates a deficiency and contributes to a negative assessment.

Text: एकीकडे जगण्यासाठी पित्याची धडपड सुरू असतानाच दुसरीकडे आईचा शोध घेण्यासाठी चिमुकला अभिमन्यू कासावीस असतो
translated_text: While his father struggles to survive, little Abhimanyu is desperately searching for his mother.
Justification: "कासावीस असतो" (kasavis asto - is desperate) indicates a negative sentiment due to the character's desperation in searching for his mother. Although a somewhat neutral emotion is classified, it indicates that the child is not in a positive state.

Text: नचिकेतला कधीही मैत्रीण नव्हती, ज्यासाठी तो मित्र आणि सहकाऱ्यांकडून नेहमीच लाजतो
translated_text: Nachiket has never had a girlfriend, for which he is always embarrassed by friends and colleagues.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "लाजतो" (lajato), which translates to "embarrassed." This indicates a negative emotional state for Nachiket.

Text: संपूर्ण अनुभव तोंडात एक वाईट चव सोडतो आणि दिशा आणि संपादन ते अधिक चांगले बनवत नाही
translated_text: The whole experience leaves a bad taste in the mouth and the direction and editing don't make it any better.
Justification: The phrase "वाईट चव" (vaiit chav), meaning "bad taste," directly indicates a negative sentiment, specifically disgust.

Text: पण क्लायमॅक्स आणि योग्य शेवट तुम्हाला पुन्हा वास्तवाकडे नेईल आणि तुम्हाला आठवण करून देईल की हा फक्त एक चित्रपट आहे.
translated_text: But the climax and the fitting ending will bring you back to reality and remind you that it's just a movie.
Justification: While the sentence is mostly descriptive, "तुम्हाला आठवण करून देईल की हा फक्त एक चित्रपट आहे" (will remind you that it's just a movie) slightly diminishes the experience, bringing a neutral/slightly negative sentiment as it suggests a return to reality from a possibly more enjoyable fictional world. The phrase acknowledges the artificiality of the cinematic experience.

Text: त्यामुळे फु करा गँगची करामत ही काही विनोदी प्रसंगा-प्रसंगांमधून रंगत असली तरी चित्रपट पोट भरून हसवत नाही
translated_text: So, although the exploits of the Fu Kara Gang are highlighted by some humorous moments, the film does not make you laugh out loud.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because of the phrase "पोट भरून हसवत नाही" (pot bharun hasvat nahi), which translates to "does not make you laugh out loud," indicating a lack of strong humor.

Text: हे दुर्दैवी आहे कारण होडी हा एक हृदयस्पर्शी चित्रपट आहे
translated_text: This is unfortunate because Hodi is a heartwarming film.
Justification: "दुर्दैवी" (durdavi), meaning unfortunate, directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे उधारी आणि कर्जाचा डोंगर वाढत असतो
translated_text: Therefore, the mountain of borrowing and debt grows.
Justification: "डोंगर वाढत असतो" (mountain grows) implies a significant and increasing burden, contributing to the negative sentiment. The word "डोंगर" (mountain) amplifies the negative impact of debt.

Text: परिणामी हा सिनेमा काहीसा मूळ इंग्रजी सिनेमाची कॉपी असल्याचा भासतो
translated_text: As a result, this movie feels like a copy of the original English movie.
Justification: The phrase "कॉपी असल्याचा भासतो" (kopī aslyāchā bhāsato), meaning "feels like a copy", indicates a negative sentiment because it implies a lack of originality.

Text: सिनेमात एकीकडे सामाजिक विषय मांडत असताना दुसरीकडे काही ठिकाणी लेखनात लेखकानं भान ठेवलेलं नाही
translated_text: While the film presents social issues on one hand, the author has not been aware of this in some places.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "लेखकानं भान ठेवलेलं नाही" (lekhakan bhān ṭhevalelṃ nāhī), which translates to "the author has not been aware of this," indicating a lack of consideration or mindfulness in the writing. This expresses a critical assessment, thus the negative sentiment.

Text: चित्रपटाच्या संगीताने मात्र निराशा केली
translated_text: The film's music, however, disappointed.
Justification: "निराशा केली" (nirasha keli), meaning "disappointed", indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: असा ट्रॅक भरकटत, बाष्कळ विनोद करत करत अखेर हा चित्रपट संपतो आणि आपण सुटकेचा निश्वास सोडतो
translated_text: With such a track wandering around, making silly jokes, the film finally ends and we breathe a sigh of relief.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by "बाष्कळ विनोद" (bāṣkaḷ vinod), which translates to "silly jokes" or "foolish humor." This indicates the jokes were unfunny and likely detracted from the viewing experience. While "सुटकेचा निश्वास सोडतो" (sutkecha nishwas sodto) implies relief, it's relief *from* the film, further reinforcing the negative sentiment and the movie being not very enjoyable. "Joy" is present in the feeling of relief, but overshadowed by the negative experience.

Text: तेव्हा त्यांना प्रशासनाच्या कार्यपद्धतीत असलेले दोष आढळून येतात
translated_text: Then they find flaws in the administration's working methods.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily due to the word "दोष" (dosh), which translates to "flaws" or "defects," indicating a negative aspect of the administration's working methods.

Text: उदाहरणार्थ, इमारतीमध्ये प्रचंड आग लागते
translated_text: For example, a huge fire breaks out in a building.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the word "प्रचंड आग" (prachanda aag), which translates to "huge fire," indicating a destructive and negative event.

Text: काही दृश्यांमधील संकलन अजून चांगले होऊ शकले असते असे सिनेमा पाहताना नक्कीच वाटते
translated_text: While watching the movie, I definitely feel like the editing in some scenes could have been better.
Justification: The sentence expresses a mild negative sentiment because of the phrase "अजून चांगले होऊ शकले असते" (ajun changle hou shakle aste), meaning "could have been better," indicating a lack of complete satisfaction with the editing.

Text: आपण क्लायमॅक्सला पोहोचेपर्यंत चित्रपटाची पुनर्प्राप्ती होईल अशी आशा आहे परंतु दुर्दैवाने कथा सुधारत नाही
translated_text: I hope the film recovers by the time we reach the climax but unfortunately the story doesn't improve.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "दुर्दैवाने" (durdavane), meaning "unfortunately," which indicates a negative outcome or disappointment.

Text: सिरीजमधील उणिवाही वेबसिरीज मस्ट वॉच असली तरी सिरीजचा दिग्दर्शक काही ठिकाणी कमी पडला आहे असं जाणवतं
translated_text: The series' shortcomings Although the web series is a must-watch, it feels like the director of the series has fallen short in some areas.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "कमी पडला आहे" (kami padla aahe), which translates to "has fallen short," indicating a deficiency or failure in the director's performance.

Text: अपारशक्ती खुराणाचा अभिनय ओव्हर वाटतो
translated_text: Aparshakti Khurana's acting seems over the top.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "ओव्हर वाटतो" (over watto), which translates to "seems over the top" and implies a negative assessment of the acting performance.

Text: कारण तेव्हाच आपल्याला त्या ऍसिड हल्ला पिढीत मुलीच्या मनाची किंकाळी ऐकू येईल
translated_text: Because only then will we be able to hear the screams of a girl's heart in that acid attack generation.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "ऍसिड हल्ला पिढीत मुलीच्या मनाची किंकाळी" (acid attack victim girl's heart screams), which evokes suffering and trauma associated with acid attacks.

Text: आमची ओळख अमिताभची पत्नी जया सोनाली कुलकर्णीशी झाली आहे जी तिहेरीची आई आहे - अमर दिलीप आणि ज्योतीसुद्धा दुसर्या घटनेदरम्यान विभक्त झाले आहेत.
translated_text: We are introduced to Amitabh's wife Jaya Sonali Kulkarni who is a mother of triplets - Amar Dilip and Jyoti have also separated during another incident.
Justification: The phrase "विभक्त झाले आहेत" (vibhakt zhale aahet), meaning "have separated," indicates a negative situation, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: मध्यम मसालेदार तुमचा सामूहिक मनोरंजन नाही
translated_text: Medium spicy is not your collective entertainment.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "नाही" (nahi), which means "not," negating the possibility of the medium spiciness being a source of collective entertainment.

Text: या नव्या सिनेमातील गाणी मात्र तितकीशी प्रभावी ठरत नाही
translated_text: However, the songs in this new film are not that effective.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "तितकीशी प्रभावी ठरत नाही" (titkishi prabhavi tharat nahi) which translates to "not that effective". The word "तितकीशी" (titkishi) implying "not that much" coupled with "प्रभावी ठरत नाही" (prabhavi tharat nahi) meaning "not effective" indicates a negative sentiment regarding the songs' quality.

Text: आईच्या इच्छा, घरची बेताची आर्थिक परिस्थिती, वडिलांचं स्वप्न, पैशांची आवश्यकता अशा विविध कारणांमुळे रवीला आई-वडिलांच्या विरोधात जाऊन काही निर्णय घ्यावे लागतात
translated_text: Due to various reasons like mother's wishes, family's precarious financial situation, father's dreams, need for money, Ravi has to take some decisions against his parents.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because Ravi is forced to make decisions "आई-वडिलांच्या विरोधात जाऊन" (aai-vadilanchya virodhat jaaun) - "going against his parents," which implies conflict and distress.

Text: त्यामुळे पात्रं सपाट आणि उथळ वाटतात
translated_text: This makes the characters seem flat and shallow.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "सपाट आणि उथळ वाटतात" (sapaat aani uthal vatatat), which translates to "seem flat and shallow." This directly expresses a negative quality of the characters, indicating a lack of depth and complexity.

Text: निशा परुळेकर, जयवंत वाडकर आणि भारत गणेशपुरेला तर सिनेमात पूर्णपणे वाया घालवलंय
translated_text: Nisha Parulekar, Jaywant Wadkar and Bharat Ganeshpure have been completely wasted in the movie.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "वाया घालवलंय" (vaya ghaalavlay) means "wasted," indicating a negative evaluation of how the actors were used in the movie.

Text: प्रकरण आणखी वाईट करण्यासाठी, सावकाराला त्याचे पैसे काही तासांत हवे असतात
translated_text: To make matters worse, the lender wants his money within hours.
Justification: "वाईट करण्यासाठी" (waiṭ karaṇyāsāṭhī) meaning "to make worse" indicates a negative sentiment. This exacerbation of the situation evokes disgust.

Text: जेव्हा तो एखाद्या अस्सल मुलासारखा दिसत आहे की त्याच्या कृतींबद्दल सत्य निकितापासून लपलेले आहे
translated_text: When he seems like a genuine boy that the truth about his actions is hidden from Nikita
Justification: "लपलेले आहे" (laplele aahe - hidden) indicates concealment of truth, creating a negative sentiment.

Text: मध्यमवयीन माणसाच्या कल्पनारम्य म्हणून संरचित या चित्रपटात उभी राहणारी एकमेव गोष्ट म्हणजे महिलांनी डोळ्याच्या कँडीशिवाय काहीच न खेळण्याबरोबर उधळपट्टी संवाद आणि कृतघ्न दृश्यांचा उच्च वापर केला आहे.
translated_text: The only thing that stands out in this film, structured as a middle-aged man's fantasy, is the high use of extravagant dialogue and thankless scenes, with the women playing nothing but eye candy.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कृतघ्न दृश्यांचा उच्च वापर" (krutaghna drushyancha uchch vapar), which translates to "high use of thankless scenes," implying a negative quality and lack of appreciation in the film.

Text: योगायोगाने, जाधव यांनी एक दृश्य चित्रित केले आहे (जो कदाचित संपूर्ण चित्रपटातील दिग्दर्शक म्हणून त्यांचा सर्वात कमकुवत क्षण होता) ज्यामध्ये कलात्मक अभिव्यक्तीच्या स्वातंत्र्याची गरज न विचारता, महिला नग्नता आणि अश्लीलतेचा निषेध करत काही लोक महाविद्यालयात प्रवेश करतात.
translated_text: Incidentally, Jadhav has filmed a scene (which was probably his weakest moment as a director in the entire film) in which some people enter a college, protesting female nudity and obscenity, without questioning the need for freedom of artistic expression.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) due to the phrase "कमकुवत क्षण होता" (kamkuvat kshan hota), which translates to "weakest moment." This phrase expresses a negative assessment of Jadhav's directorial decision, contributing to the overall negative sentiment.

Text: तेव्हा काही घटना अशा घडतात की मीरा देखील जखमी होते आणि दुसरीकडे नुसरतची हत्या होते
translated_text: Then some incidents happen in which Meera is also injured and on the other hand Nusrat is killed.
Justification: The phrase "हत्या होते" (hatya hote), meaning "is killed/murdered," strongly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: चित्रपटात असे आणखी काही निरर्थक क्षण आहेत
translated_text: There are a few other such pointless moments in the film.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "निरर्थक" (nirarthak), which means pointless or meaningless.

Text: अमृता खानविलकर पुरेशी आहे परंतु पुष्कर जोग, ज्याला चित्रपटाची संकल्पना दिली जाते, तो निराश आहे, विशेषत: महत्त्वाच्या दृश्यात जिथे त्याचा भावनिक उद्रेक आहे.
translated_text: Amrita Khanvilkar is adequate but Pushkar Jog, who is credited with the film's concept, is disappointing, especially in the crucial scene where he has an emotional outburst.
Justification: "निराश आहे" (nirash aahe) meaning "is disappointing" is the primary indicator of negative sentiment.

Text: मात्र प्रेक्षकांचं लक्ष वेधून घेणारं असं काही नाही
translated_text: But there is nothing that will grab the audience's attention.
Justification: The phrase "काही नाही" (kahi nahi), meaning "nothing," indicates a lack of engaging content, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे जी वातावरणनिर्मिती व्हायला पाहिजे तीच होत नाही परिणामी एक चांगला विषय वाया गेला आहे
translated_text: Therefore, the desired atmosphere is not created, resulting in a good topic being wasted.
